FIB-RW 下拉填空 · 逐空格拆解

機經 532 題 · 2026/06/06 版 ｜ 詞性→單複數→時態→搭配→語意

用法：每個空格先看標籤判斷依據—— 詞性單複數時態 能用文法判斷就先判斷；不行才看 搭配語意。 紅字 ✗ 是為什麼不選其他。需覆核 是程式未能鎖定、靠語意推的答案。點標題列可收合。
1.Lawyer（律師）5 格#080533
Consider defending a client you believe is guilty, or representing opposing 1sides in a heated legal battle. Welcome to the daily reality of ethical 2conflicts faced by lawyers, where professional obligations and personal beliefs clash, and loyalties become a tightrope walk. Navigating these situations requires navigating professional 3codes of conduct, intricate maps outlining rules on conflicts of interest, confidentiality, and candor. But the terrain isn't always clear-cut. What if a client confesses to a crime? Can a lawyer maintain confidentiality 4while upholding the law? These ethical landmines demand careful judgement, sometimes requiring withdrawal from cases or disclosing conflicts to clients for informed consent. Ultimately, being a lawyer goes beyond legal expertise; it demands balancing the letter of the law with a moral compass. It's about advocating for fair trials, challenging unjust laws, and sometimes even choosing to walk 5away from ethically compromised cases. It's a constant balancing act, requiring both legal prowess and unwavering ethical grounding.
空格 1sides sides / principles / victims / trials
詞性opposing 後面接名詞，四個選項都是名詞，詞性分不出
搭配固定說法 opposing sides＝對立的雙方，呼應前面 defending a client / legal battle 的對抗情境
✗ principles 原則、victims 受害者、trials 審判 都搭不上「對立的__」
空格 2conflicts interactions / surveys / conflicts / measures
搭配ethical conflicts＝倫理衝突，是固定搭配，呼應後文 professional obligations 與 personal beliefs clash
✗ interactions 互動、surveys 調查、measures 措施 語意都不對，跟 clash（衝突）方向不合
空格 3codes elements / codes / regulations / cases
搭配professional codes of conduct＝專業行為準則，是固定片語
✗ elements、regulations、cases 都無法構成 ___ of conduct 這個慣用法；只有 codes 接 of conduct
空格 4while since / becauseof / while / asif
詞性後面是子句 a lawyer maintain confidentiality...，需連接詞
語意while＝同時／一邊…一邊，表「維持保密」與「遵守法律」兩件事並行的張力
✗ since（因為）語意不合；becauseof、asif 拼寫應為兩字且語意不通，無法連接兩個對等的動作
空格 5away down / outside / away / through
搭配片語動詞 walk away from＝抽身離開（放棄案件），是固定搭配
✗ walk down/outside/through from 都不是合法片語；只有 walk away from 成立
2.Oxford medical school (牛津醫學院)6 格#080001
"When I enrolled in my master's course at Oxford last year, I had come straight from medical school with the decision to leave clinical science for good. Thinking back, I realize that I didn't put very much 1weight on this decision at the time. But today, I more clearly understand the 2consequences of leaving my original profession. When I meet old friends who are now physicians and surgeons, I sense how our views on medical problems have 3diverged . They scrutinize the effects of disease and try to eliminate or alleviate them; I try to understand how they come about in the first place. I feel happier working on this side of the problem, although I do occasionally miss clinical work and seeing patients. However, when I think about the rate at which my medical skills and knowledge have 4dissipated , the years spent reading weighty medical textbooks, the hours spent at the bedside, I sometimes wonder if these years were partly a 5waste of time now that I am pursuing a research career. Nonetheless, I know the value of my medical education. It is easy to forget the importance of the biosciences when working with model organisms in basic research that seem to have nothing to do with a sick child or a suffering elderly person. Yet, I still have vivid memories of the cruel kaleidoscope of severe diseases and of how they can 6strike a human being. I hope to retain these memories as a guide in my current occupation."
空格 1weight attention / weight / significance / consideration
搭配put weight on something＝看重某事，是固定搭配（put much weight on this decision）
✗ put attention/significance/consideration on 都不是道地搭配；put weight on 才慣用
空格 2consequences impacts / meaning / consequences / influences
語意下文 leaving my original profession（離開原本職業）帶來的「後果」，consequences 最貼切
搭配the consequences of＝…的後果，常見搭配
✗ impacts/influences 偏中性影響、meaning 意義 語氣不合；consequences 才扣住「離職的代價」
空格 3diverged moved / fluctuated / diverged / run
語意對比「他們研究疾病、我研究成因」，views have diverged＝看法分歧最貼切
✗ moved/run 太籠統、fluctuated（上下波動）不合「分道揚鑣」之意
空格 4dissipated managed / accumulated / dissipated / developed
語意下文 wonder if these years were a waste（懷疑白費），技能 dissipated＝逐漸消散最合
✗ accumulated（累積）、developed（發展）方向相反；managed 語意不通
空格 5waste period / waste / number / lot
搭配a waste of time＝浪費時間，固定片語，由 of time 鎖定
✗ a period/number/lot of time 文法都通，但下文 wonder if...partly（懷疑是否白費）需貶意，只有 waste 表否定評價
空格 6strike strike / end / kill / affect
搭配strike a human being＝（疾病）侵襲人，是疾病主詞的慣用動詞，呼應前文 strike a human being
語意形容 severe diseases（重病）如何「打擊」人體，strike 最有力
✗ end/kill 太極端絕對、affect 太弱；strike 才貼「重病突然侵襲」的畫面
3.School-to-work Transitions (學校到工作的過渡)6 格#080002
School-to-work 1transition is a historically persistent topic of educational policy-making and reform School-to-work transition is a historically persistent topic of educational policy-making and reform that impacts national systems of vocational education and training. The transition process refers to a period between completion of general education and the beginning of vocational education or the period between completion of general education and the beginning of vocational education or the beginning of gainful 2employment as well as to training systems, institutions, and programs that prepare young people for careers. The status passage of youth from school-to-work has changed prepare young people for careers. The status passage of youth from school-to-work has changed structurally under late modernism, and young people are 3forced to adapt to changing demands of their environment especially when planning for entry into the labour market. Since the transition to a their environment especially when planning for entry into the labour market. Since the transition to a job is seen as a major success in life, youth who manage this step successfully are more 4optimistic about their future; till others are disillusioned and pushed to the margins of society. While some young about their future; till others are disillusioned and pushed to the margins of society. While some young people have developed 5successful strategies to cope with these requirements, those undereducated and otherwise 6disadvantaged in society often face serious problems when trying to prepare for and otherwise disadvantaged in society often face serious problems when trying to prepare for careers. Longer transitions lead to a greater vulnerability and to risky behaviours.
空格 1transition transformation / transition / translation / transaction
語意全文主題 school-to-work transition＝學校到工作的過渡，標題與下文反覆出現
✗ transformation 轉型、translation 翻譯、transaction 交易 都不是「過渡」之意
空格 2employment life / lesson / development / employment
搭配gainful employment＝有收入的就業，固定搭配
語意與前句 vocational education（職業教育）並列，指「開始工作」
✗ gainful life/lesson/development 都不成搭配；只有 gainful employment 慣用
空格 3forced forced / struggling / keen / eager
時態are ___ to adapt 為被動式，需過去分詞；be forced to＝被迫
語意下文 changing demands（不斷變動的環境要求）迫使年輕人適應，forced 語意合
✗ struggling/keen/eager 為形容詞或現在分詞，無法構成 be ___ to adapt 的被動；且 keen/eager（渴望）語氣不合「被迫」
空格 4optimistic intrepid / passive / optimistic / indifferent
語意順利就業者對未來的態度，搭配 about their future＝對未來樂觀
✗ passive 被動、indifferent 冷漠 語氣相反；intrepid（勇敢）不搭 about future
空格 5successful successive / success / successful / succeed
詞性developed ___ strategies，名詞 strategies 前需形容詞，successful 才是形容詞
✗ successive（連續的）語意不合；success 名詞、succeed 動詞 詞性不符
空格 6disadvantaged disadvantaged / useless / advantaged / meaningless
語意與 undereducated（教育不足）並列，指弱勢者，disadvantaged＝弱勢的
✗ advantaged（優勢）語意相反；useless/meaningless（無用、無意義）不能形容人且方向錯
4.Push and pull factors (推動和拉動因素)5 格#080003
People move to a new region for many different reasons. The 1motivation for moving can come from a People move to a new region for many different reasons. The motivation for moving can come from a combination of what researchers sometimes call 'push and pull factors' – those that encourage people to leave a region, and those that attract people to a region. Some of the factors that motivate people to leave a region, and those that attract people to a region. Some of the factors that motivate people to move 2include seeking a better climate, finding more affordable housing, looking for work or retiring from work, leaving the 3congestion of city living, wanting a more pleasant environment, and wanting to from work, leaving the congestion of city living, wanting a more pleasant environment, and wanting to be near to family and friends. In reality, many complex 4factors and personal reasons may 5interact to motivate a person or family to move. motivate a person or family to move. motivation solution energy courage include including includes included congestion transportation environment construction
空格 1motivation motivation / solution / energy / courage
詞性The ___ for moving，定冠詞後接名詞作主詞
語意全文談「搬遷的動機（push and pull factors）」，motivation 扣題
✗ solution 解答、energy 能量、courage 勇氣 語意都不合「搬家的動機」
空格 2include include / including / includes / included
單複數主詞 the factors（複數）需動詞原形 include，主謂一致
時態陳述普遍事實用現在式，且非分詞片語，故用 include 而非 including/included
✗ includes 是第三人稱單數、不合複數主詞；including/included 為分詞，無法當主要動詞
空格 3congestion congestion / transportation / environment / construction
搭配the congestion of city living＝都市生活的壅塞，leaving 的受詞
語意與 leaving（離開）相配，人們想逃離都市壅塞
✗ transportation 運輸、construction 建設 非人們想離開的負面項；environment 中性，下文另有 pleasant environment
空格 4factors attributes / factors / influences / ratios
搭配呼應全文 push and pull factors，many complex factors＝許多複雜因素
✗ attributes 屬性、influences 影響、ratios 比例 都不及 factors 扣住主題
空格 5interact interact / interacted / complicate / disorder
時態may ___ 助動詞 may 後接原形動詞，interact 為原形
語意many factors may interact＝諸多因素可能交互作用
✗ interacted 為過去式不接在 may 後；complicate/disorder 語意不合「交互作用」
5.The Bridge to Pop (通往流行音樂的橋梁)5 格#080004
In the U.S., artists in the mid-1950s began to create a 1bridge to Pop. Strongly influenced by Dada and its 2emphasis on appropriation and everyday objects, artists increasingly worked with 3collage , its emphasis on appropriation and everyday objects, artists increasingly worked with collage , consumer products, and a healthy dose of irony. Jasper Johns 4reimagined iconic imagery like the American flag; Robert Rauschenberg employed silk-screen printings and found objects; and Larry American flag; Robert Rauschenberg employed silk-screen printings and found objects; and Larry Rivers used images of mass-produced goods. All three are considered American 5forerunners of Pop.
空格 1bridge joint / union / connection / bridge
搭配create a bridge to Pop＝搭起通往普普藝術的橋梁，呼應標題 Bridge to Pop
✗ joint/union（接合、聯合）、connection（連結）搭 to Pop 不道地；bridge to 才慣用
空格 2emphasis emphasis / significance / prominence / focus
搭配emphasis on＝對…的強調，固定搭配（its emphasis on appropriation）
✗ significance/prominence on、focus on 中 focus 雖也接 on，但 Dada 語境慣用 emphasis on；其餘搭配不自然
空格 3collage model / collage / sketch / concept
語意與 consumer products、found objects 並列的藝術手法，collage＝拼貼，最合普普／達達脈絡
✗ model 模型、sketch 素描、concept 概念 都不是「拼貼」這種挪用現成物的手法
空格 4reimagined reimagined / reimagines
單複數主詞 Jasper Johns 為單數，但句子敘述過去事蹟，用過去式 reimagined
時態全段描述 1950 年代藝術家的作為，與 employed、used 並列，皆過去式
✗ reimagines 為現在式第三人稱，與全段過去式時態（employed/used）不一致
空格 5forerunners candidates / ancestors / forerunners / leaders
語意三人被視為普普藝術的「先驅」，American forerunners of Pop
✗ candidates 候選人、leaders 領導者 語意偏；ancestors（祖先）多指血緣，不及 forerunners 指先行者貼切
6.Wine and ale (葡萄酒和麥芽酒)6 格#080005
By the Bronze Age drinking 1vessels were being made of sheer metal, primarily bronze or gold. By the Bronze Age drinking vessels were being made of sheer metal, primarily bronze or gold. However, the peak of feasting – and in particular, of the “political” type of feast came in the late Hallstatt period (about 600 – 450 BC), soon after the foundation of the Greek 2colony of Massalia Hallstatt period (about 600 – 450 BC), soon after the foundation of the Greek colony of Massalia (Marseille) at the mouth of the Rhine. From that date on, the blood of the grape began to make its 3way north and east along major river systems together with imported metal and ceramic drinking vessels north and east along major river systems together with imported metal and ceramic drinking vessels from the Greek world. 4Wine was thus added to the list of mood-altering beverages – such as and ale available to establish social networks in Iron Age Europe. Attic pottery fragments found at hillforts available to establish social networks in Iron Age Europe. Attic pottery fragments found at hillforts such as Heuneburg in Germany and luxury goods such as the monumental 5th century Greek bronze krater (or wine mixing vessel) found at Vix in Burgundy supply archaeological evidence of this krater (or wine mixing vessel) found at Vix in Burgundy supply archaeological evidence of this interaction. Organic 5containers such as leather or wooden wine barrels may also have travelled north into Europe but have not survived. It is unknown what goods were 6traded in return, but they may have into Europe but have not survived. It is unknown what goods were traded in return, but they may have included salted meat, hides, timber, amber and slaves.
空格 1vessels pots / dishes / basins / vessels
搭配drinking vessels＝飲器，固定搭配，下文 drinking vessels 反覆出現
✗ pots 鍋、dishes 盤、basins 盆 都不是「飲用容器」；drinking vessels 才慣用
空格 2colony colony / territory / battlefield / environment
語意the Greek colony of Massalia（馬賽）＝希臘殖民地馬賽，史實
✗ territory 領土、battlefield 戰場、environment 環境 都不符「希臘人建立的殖民地」
空格 3way methodology / way / direction / policy
搭配make its way（north and east）＝一路向北向東傳播，固定片語 make one's way
✗ make its methodology/direction/policy 皆不成片語；只有 make its way 成立
空格 4Wine Food / Water / Wine / Grape
語意前文 the blood of the grape（葡萄之血）即指酒，故 Wine was added to...beverages；與標題 Wine and ale 呼應
✗ Food/Water 非 mood-altering beverages（會改變情緒的飲品）；Grape 是原料非飲品本身
空格 5containers containers / boxes / basins / bottles
語意Organic ___ such as leather or wooden wine barrels，皮革／木桶是「容器」，containers 最廣涵蓋
✗ boxes 盒、basins 盆、bottles 瓶 都太具體，無法概括 leather 與 wooden barrels
空格 6traded purchased / managed / traded / exchanged
時態what goods were ___ in return 被動式，需過去分詞 traded
搭配traded in return＝作為交換而交易，呼應上文貿易往來
✗ exchanged 雖也可被動，但 goods traded in return 更道地；purchased/managed 語意不合「以物易物的回報」
7.Monkeys and typewriters (猴子和打字機)6 格#080006
This 1illustration often used is the one that the monkey and the typewriters. OK, we have a monkey This illustration often used is the one that the monkey and the typewriters. OK, we have a monkey sitting at 2typewriter and the claim here is basically if you leave chance in time long enough you will get life. Don’t worry about it, yes, it's strange, yes it's wonderful, but leaves enough matter 600 million life. Don’t worry about it, yes, it's strange, yes it's wonderful, but leaves enough matter 600 million years on earth and you will have life. So, the monkey sitting at the typewriter, the chances are eventually he produces the complete works of Shakespeare but he doesn't manage to do it in 600 eventually he produces the complete works of Shakespeare but he doesn't manage to do it in 600 million years. So what I decide to do is to run the numbers. Instead of saying typing the complete work of Shakespeare, I just run the numbers. For how long would it take a monkey typing one key 3striker a of Shakespeare, I just run the numbers. For how long would it take a monkey typing one key striker a second to type “to be or not to be that is the question”, right? On average how long is it gonna take my monkey friend one 4keystroke a second? I don't know how you think it would be. Maybe you could my monkey friend one keystroke a second? I don't know how you think it would be. Maybe you could have a guess. Would it be less or more than 600 million years, which is the period life on earth isn't supposed to have 5emerged within and when I run the numbers “to be or not to be is the question” supposed to have emerged within and when I run the numbers “to be or not to be is the question” takes 12.6 trillion years to type just that 6phrase and a DNA string that something of that complexity emerges by chance undirected within 600 million years? Again, it’s mathematically complexity emerges by chance undirected within 600 million years? Again, it’s mathematically possible but it's so incredible unlikely that it would have that it tilts me in favor of the Christian story in which God creating life, simply a question of saying let that be and there was. which God creating life, simply a question of saying let that be and there was. computer printer machine typewriter type input hit striker unit keyboard time keystroke
空格 1illustration question / illustration / scenario / article
語意猴子打字機是用來說明論點的「例證」，illustration＝例證／比喻，呼應下文 This illustration
✗ question 問題、scenario 情境、article 文章 都不如 illustration 貼「常被引用的例子」
空格 2typewriter computer / printer / machine / typewriter
語意全文主題猴子坐在「打字機」前，sitting at typewriter，與標題 typewriters 呼應
✗ computer/printer/machine 都不是「猴子打字」這個經典思想實驗的器材
空格 3striker需覆核 type / input / hit / striker
語意one key striker a second＝每秒按一個鍵，下文 one keystroke a second 對照
✗ type/input/hit 在 one key ___ a second 句構不成名詞片語；striker 才指「敲擊（者）」
空格 4keystroke unit / keyboard / time / keystroke
搭配one keystroke a second＝每秒一次擊鍵，固定說法，且原文後句出現 keystroke
✗ unit/keyboard/time 都無法構成 one ___ a second 的擊鍵頻率表達
空格 5emerged recessed / emerged / dissipated / embedded
語意life...supposed to have emerged＝生命應在這段時間內「出現」，呼應後文 emerged
✗ recessed 凹陷、dissipated 消散、embedded 嵌入 都不合「生命出現」之意
空格 6phrase phrase / article / description / sentence
語意“to be or not to be...” 是一句「片語／短句」，type just that phrase
✗ article 文章、description 描述、sentence 句子 中 sentence 雖近，但原文用 phrase 指這段引文，且後句重複 phrase
8.Life expectancy at birth (出生時的預期壽命)3 格#080007
Life expectancy at birth is one of the most widely used and internationally recognised indicators of population health. It focuses on the length of life 1rather than its quality, and provides a useful summary of the general health of the population. 2While an indicator describing how long Australians live that simultaneously takes into account quality of life would be a desirable summary measure of progress in the area, currently no such measure exists, and this is why life expectancy at birth is used as the Main Progress Indicator here. During the decade 1999 to 2009, life expectancy at birth improved for both sexes. A girl born in 2009 could expect to reach 83.9 years of age, while a boy could expect to live to 79. 3 years. Over the decade, boys 'life expectancy increased 3slightly more than girls'(3. 1 compared with 2. 1 years). This saw the gap between the sexes' life expectancy decrease by one year to 4.6 years In the longer term, increases in life expectancy also occurred over most of the 20th century. Unfortunately, life expectancy isn't shared across the whole population though, being lower in Tasmania and the northern Territory, and for Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander peoples. less rather more instead as when since while
空格 1rather less / rather / more / instead
搭配rather than＝而非，由後面的 than 鎖定（length of life rather than its quality）
✗ less than 是比較級、more 方向相反、instead 需接 of；只有 rather than 構成「而非」對比
空格 2while需覆核 as / when / since / while
語意while＝雖然／儘管，引出讓步：雖然理想指標尚不存在，故用 life expectancy
詞性後接完整子句 an indicator...would be desirable，需連接詞
✗ as/when/since 語意偏（當…／因為），不及 while 表「雖然」這層讓步轉折
空格 3slightly slightly / lightly / dramatically / drastic
語意下文具體數字 3.1 比 2.1（僅差一年），故男生增幅 slightly more＝略多
詞性increased ___ more，副詞修飾 more，slightly 為副詞
✗ dramatically（大幅）與小差距矛盾；drastic 是形容詞詞性不符；lightly 不修飾增幅
9.The United Nations (聯合國)4 格#080008
The United Nations is an international organization founded in 1945. Due to its unique international character, and the powers vested in its founding Charter, the organization can take 1action on a wide character, and the powers vested in its founding Charter, the organization can take action on a wide range of issues and provide a forum for its 193 Member States to 2express their views, through the General Assembly, the Security Council, the Economic and Social Council and other bodies and General Assembly, the Security Council, the Economic and Social Council and other bodies and committees. The work of the United Nations reaches every 3corner of the globe. Although best known for peacekeeping, peacebuilding, conflict 4prevention and humanitarian assistance, there are many for peacekeeping, peacebuilding, conflict prevention and humanitarian assistance, there are many other ways the United Nations and its System (specialized agencies, funds and programmes) affect our lives and make the world a better place. lives and make the world a better place. picture define express sketch angle corner hole spot ban prohibition prevention disallowance
空格 1action responsibility / motion / action / decision
搭配take action＝採取行動，固定搭配（can take ___ on a wide range of issues）
✗ take responsibility/motion/decision 雖有 take＋名詞，但 take action on issues 才道地，語意也最合「對議題行動」
空格 2express picture / define / express / sketch
時態to ___ their views，to 後接原形動詞，express 為動詞原形
搭配express views＝表達看法，固定搭配
✗ picture/sketch 是描繪、define 是定義，皆不搭 views；express their views 才慣用
空格 3corner angle / corner / hole / spot
搭配every corner of the globe＝世界每個角落，固定片語
✗ angle 角度、hole 洞、spot 點 都無法構成 every ___ of the globe 這個慣用語
空格 4prevention ban / prohibition / prevention / disallowance
搭配conflict prevention＝衝突預防，是聯合國語境固定詞組
語意與 peacekeeping、peacebuilding 並列的維和工作
✗ ban/prohibition/disallowance（禁止）都偏「明令禁止」，不及 conflict prevention 指「預防衝突」
10.Job-hunting (求職)6 格#080009
When it comes to job-hunting, first 1impressions are critical. Remember, you are marketing a product- yourself-to a potential employer. The first thing the employer sees when greeting you is your attire; yourself-to a potential employer. The first thing the employer sees when greeting you is your attire; thus, you must make every effort to have the proper dress for the type of job you are seeking. Will dressing properly get you the job? Of course not, but it will give you a competitive edge and a 2positive dressing properly get you the job? Of course not, but it will give you a competitive edge and a positive first impression. Should you be judged by what you wear? Perhaps not, but the reality is, of course, that you are judged. Throughout the entire job-seeking process employers use short-cuts — heuristics that you are judged. Throughout the entire job-seeking process employers use short-cuts — heuristics or rules of thumb — to save time. With cover letters, it’s the opening paragraph and a quick scan of your qualifications. With resumes, it is a quick scan of your accomplishments. With the job interview, your qualifications. With resumes, it is a quick scan of your accomplishments. With the job interview, it’s how you’re dressed that sets the 3tone of the interview. How should you dress? Dressing conservatively is always the safest route, but you should also try and do a little 4investigation of your conservatively is always the safest route, but you should also try and do a little investigation of your 5prospective employer so that what you wear to the interview makes you look as though you 6fit in with the organization. If you overdress (which is rare but can happen) or under dress (the more likely the organization. If you overdress (which is rare but can happen) or under dress (the more likely scenario), the potential employer may feel that you don't care enough about the job.
空格 1impressions sensation / consciousness / impressions / conversations
搭配first impressions＝第一印象，固定搭配，呼應下文 a positive first impression
✗ sensation 感官、consciousness 意識、conversations 對話 都不搭 first ___「第一印象」
空格 2positive gloomy / pessimistic / positive / mild
語意穿著得體帶來正面印象，a positive first impression＝正面第一印象，與 competitive edge（優勢）同為正向
✗ gloomy 陰沉、pessimistic 悲觀、mild 溫和 語氣都不合「正面印象」
空格 3tone norm / tone / standard / stone
搭配set the tone＝定調，固定搭配（sets the tone of the interview）
✗ norm/standard/stone 都無法構成 set the ___「定調」這個慣用語
空格 4investigation investigation / integration / criterion / integrity
語意do a little ___ of your prospective employer＝對未來雇主做點調查，investigation＝調查
✗ integration 整合、integrity 正直、criterion 標準 語意都不合「調查雇主」
空格 5prospective prosperous / prospective / perspective / retrospective
語意prospective employer＝未來／可能的雇主，呼應前文 potential employer
✗ prosperous 繁榮的、perspective 觀點（名詞）、retrospective 回顧的 都不合「未來雇主」
空格 6fit suit / fit / catch / maintain
搭配fit in with the organization＝融入組織，片語 fit in with
✗ suit/catch/maintain 都不接 in with；只有 fit in with 成立「融入」之意
11.Allergies (過敏)4 格#080010
Allergies are abnormal immune system reactions to things that are typically harmless to most people. Allergies are abnormal immune system reactions to things that are typically harmless to most people. When you’re allergic to something, your immune system 1mistakenly believes that this substance is harmful to your body. Substances that cause allergic reactions — such as certain foods, dust, plant harmful to your body. Substances that cause allergic reactions — such as certain foods, dust, plant pollen, or medicines — are known as allergens. In an attempt to 2protect the body, the immune system produces IgE antibodies to that allergen. Those antibodies then cause certain cells in the body to produces IgE antibodies to that allergen. Those antibodies then cause certain cells in the body to 3release chemicals into the bloodstream, one of which is histamine. The histamine then 4acts on a person's eyes, nose, throat, lungs, skin, or gastrointestinal tract and causes the symptoms of the person's eyes, nose, throat, lungs, skin, or gastrointestinal tract and causes the symptoms of the allergic reaction. Future exposure to that same allergen will trigger this antibody response again. This means that every time you come into contact with that allergen, you'll have an allergic reaction. means that every time you come into contact with that allergen, you'll have an allergic reaction. precisely illogically chaotic mistakenly prohibit protect protest preclude sponge release dispose digest
空格 1mistakenly precisely / illogically / chaotic / mistakenly
詞性your immune system ___ believes，副詞修飾動詞 believes，mistakenly 為副詞
語意免疫系統「錯誤地」以為物質有害，mistakenly 扣 abnormal（異常反應）
✗ chaotic 是形容詞詞性不符；precisely（精準地）語意相反；illogically 雖是副詞但不及 mistakenly 貼「誤判」
空格 2protect prohibit / protect / protest / preclude
時態In an attempt to ___ the body，to 後接原形動詞
語意免疫系統「保護」身體而產生抗體，protect the body
✗ prohibit 禁止、protest 抗議、preclude 排除 語意都不合「保護身體」
空格 3release sponge / release / dispose / digest
時態cause certain cells to ___ chemicals，to 後接原形動詞
搭配release chemicals into the bloodstream＝把化學物質釋放進血液，固定搭配
✗ sponge/dispose/digest 都不搭 chemicals into the bloodstream；release 才指「釋放」
空格 4acts acts / indulges / pretends / forces
搭配act on＝作用於，固定搭配（histamine acts on a person's eyes, nose...）
單複數主詞 The histamine 單數，故用 acts（第三人稱單數）
✗ indulges/pretends/forces 都不接 on 表「作用於」；act on 才道地
12.Farming (農事)5 格#080011
In the last years of the wheat boom, Bennett had become increasingly 1frustrated at how the government seemed to be encouraging an 2exploitative farming binge. He went directly after the government seemed to be encouraging an exploitative farming binge. He went directly after the Department of Agriculture for 3misleading people. Farmers on the Great Plains were working 4against nature, he 5thundered in speeches. nature, he thundered in speeches. defensible exploitative endurable coercionary misunderstanding inducting misleading conducting for within against with
空格 1frustrated frustrated / desirous / insistent / reassuring
時態had become increasingly ___，become 後接形容詞表狀態；frustrated 為情緒形容詞
語意他「越來越沮喪」於政府鼓勵掠奪式耕作，下文 went directly after the Department（直接砲轟）證實負面情緒
✗ desirous 渴望、insistent 堅持、reassuring 令人安心 語氣都不合「沮喪／不滿」
空格 2exploitative defensible / exploitative / endurable / coercionary
語意exploitative farming binge＝掠奪式的耕作狂潮，與下文 working against nature（與自然作對）呼應負面
✗ defensible 站得住腳的、endurable 可忍受的 語意偏正；coercionary 非標準詞，語意也不合
空格 3misleading misunderstanding / inducting / misleading / conducting
語意after the Department for ___ people＝砲轟農業部「誤導」民眾，misleading＝誤導
時態for 後接動名詞，misleading／conducting 皆 V-ing，靠語意取捨
✗ misunderstanding（誤解，名詞）詞性／語意不合；inducting 引入、conducting 進行 不合「指責政府誤導」
空格 4against for / within / against / with
搭配working against nature＝與自然對抗，固定搭配 work against
✗ for（為了）語意相反；within（在…內）、with（與）不合「對抗自然」
空格 5thundered scratched / thundered / scrambled / praised
語意he ___ in speeches＝他在演講中「怒吼／疾呼」，thunder 喻激烈發言，呼應前文 went directly after（強烈抨擊）
✗ scratched 抓、scrambled 攀爬／攪亂、praised 讚揚 都不合「在演講中激烈控訴」
13.What's a herbal? (什麽是草藥？)5 格#080012
A herbal is a book of plants, describing their appearance, their properties and how they may be used for preparing ointments and medicines. The medical use of plants is 1recorded on fragments of papyrus for preparing ointments and medicines. The medical use of plants is recorded on fragments of papyrus and clay tablets from ancient Egypt, Samaria and China that date back 5,000 years but document traditions far older still. Over 700 herbal remedies were detailed in the Papyrus Ebers, an Egyptian text traditions far older still. Over 700 herbal remedies were detailed in the Papyrus Ebers, an Egyptian text written in 1500 BC. Around 65 BC, a Greek physician called Dioscorides wrote a herbal that was 2translated into Latin and Arabic. Known as ‘De materia medica’, it became the most influential work translated into Latin and Arabic. Known as ‘De materia medica’, it became the most influential work on medicinal plants in both Christian and Islamic worlds until the late 17th century. An illustrated manuscript copy of the text made in Constantinople (modern-day Istanbul) 3survives from the sixth manuscript copy of the text made in Constantinople (modern-day Istanbul) survives from the sixth century. The first printed herbals date from the dawn of European printing in the 1480s. They provided valuable information for apothecaries, whose job was to make the pills and potions 4prescribed by valuable information for apothecaries, whose job was to make the pills and potions prescribed by physicians. In the next century, landmark herbals were produced in England by William Turner, considered to be the father of British botany, and John Gerard, whose illustrations would 5inspire the considered to be the father of British botany, and John Gerard, whose illustrations would inspire the floral fabric, wallpaper and tile designs of William Morris four centuries later.
空格 1recorded recorded / registered / inscribed / subscribed
時態is ___ on fragments of papyrus 被動式，需過去分詞 recorded
搭配recorded on＝記載於，搭配書寫載體 papyrus／clay tablets
✗ registered 登記、subscribed 訂閱 語意不合；inscribed（鐫刻）雖近，但慣用 recorded on fragments 且 inscribed 多接硬質表面
空格 2translated imported / translated / interpreted / traded
時態was ___ into Latin and Arabic 被動式，需過去分詞
搭配translated into（語言）＝翻譯成…，由 into Latin and Arabic 鎖定
✗ imported/traded into 語意不合；interpreted（口譯）多指即時翻譯，不接 into a language 表書面翻譯
空格 3survives compensates / survives / outlasts / suffers
語意六世紀的手抄本「留存至今」，survives from the sixth century＝自六世紀存留下來
單複數主詞 An illustrated manuscript copy 單數，用 survives
✗ compensates 補償、suffers 受苦 語意不合；outlasts 需受詞，不接 from
空格 4prescribed determined / forced / prescribed / resolved
時態pills and potions ___ by physicians 被動分詞，需過去分詞
搭配prescribed by physicians＝由醫師開立（處方），藥物與醫師的固定搭配
✗ determined/forced/resolved by physicians 都不合「醫師開藥」；prescribe 才是「開處方」
空格 5inspire expire / simulate / vanish / inspire
語意illustrations would ___ the floral fabric...designs＝插畫「啟發」了日後設計，inspire＝啟發
✗ expire 到期、vanish 消失 語意相反；simulate（模擬）不合「啟發後世設計」
14.Stress (強調)6 格#080013
Stress is tense feeling often connected to having too 1much to do, too many bills to pay and not Stress is tense feeling often connected to having too much to do, too many bills to pay and not enough time or money — is a common emotion that knows few borders. About three-fourths of people in the United States, Australia, Canada, France, Germany, Italy, South Korea and Britain reported people in the United States, Australia, Canada, France, Germany, Italy, South Korea and Britain reported experiencing stress on a daily basis, according to AP-Ipsos 3polling . Anxious feelings were more 4intense during the holidays. Germans feel stress more 5intensely than those in other countries polled. People in during the holidays. Germans feel stress more intensely than those in other countries polled. People in the United States cited financial pressures as the top worry. About half the people polled in Britain said they frequently or 6sometimes felt that life was beyond their control, the highest level in the 10 they frequently or sometimes felt that life was beyond their control, the highest level in the 10
空格 1much many / much / enough / little
單複數too ___ to do，修飾不可數的「事情量」用 much（too much to do＝太多事要做）
✗ many 修飾可數複數（下文 too many bills 才用 many）；enough/little 語意不合「太多」
空格 2less需覆核 less / sufficient
語意對比結構 too much to do...and not ___ time or money，語意應為「時間或金錢不夠」
搭配原文是 not enough time or money（時間金錢不足）；兩選項中 less 較貼「不夠」之意，sufficient 與前面 not 連用為 not sufficient 雖通但較生硬
✗ sufficient（充足）接在 not 後雖文法可通，但原句慣用 not enough；兩選項皆非原字 enough，依語意傾向 less，請覆核
空格 3polling polling / election / research / dictionary
搭配AP-Ipsos polling＝AP-Ipsos 民調，呼應後文 the people polled（受訪者），polling＝民意調查
✗ election 選舉、dictionary 字典 語意全不合；research 太籠統，不及 polling 扣「AP-Ipsos 民調」
空格 4intense vigorous / intense / obvious / truculent
詞性Anxious feelings were more ___，be 動詞後接形容詞，intense 為形容詞
語意焦慮感「更強烈」，more intense，呼應下文 intensely
✗ vigorous 精力旺盛、obvious 明顯、truculent 兇狠 都不合形容「焦慮更強烈」
空格 5intensely intensively / intensely / extensively / mildly
詞性feel stress more ___，副詞修飾動詞 feel，intensely 為副詞
語意德國人感受壓力「更強烈」，feel stress intensely
✗ intensively（密集地）語意不同；extensively（廣泛地）方向錯；mildly（輕微地）相反
空格 6sometimes always / seldom / sometimes / rarely
搭配frequently or ___＝經常或「有時」，與 frequently 並列且語氣遞減，sometimes 最合
✗ always（總是）比 frequently 更強、與遞減語氣不合；seldom/rarely（很少）方向相反，不會與 frequently 並列
15.Nutrition scientists (營養科學家)4 格#080014
Since nutrition scientists are constantly making new discoveries, we need to revise our Since nutrition scientists are constantly making new discoveries, we need to revise our 1recommendations for healthy eating from time to time. However, nutrition is an art as well as a 2science . It's an art because it requires creativity to develop a healthy eating plan for people who differ in their . It's an art because it requires creativity to develop a healthy eating plan for people who differ in their food preferences, beliefs and culture, let alone in their nutritional needs according to their genes and life stage. As we discover more about how our genes and our environment 3interact , it's becoming life stage. As we discover more about how our genes and our environment interact , it's becoming increasingly difficult to provide a single set of dietary recommendations that will be 4suitable for recommendations persistence conjecture hypothesis philosophy science subject theme
空格 1recommendations recommendations / persistence / conjecture / hypothesis
搭配revise our recommendations for healthy eating＝修訂健康飲食建議，呼應下文 dietary recommendations
✗ persistence 堅持、conjecture 臆測、hypothesis 假設 語意都不合「（飲食）建議」
空格 2science philosophy / science / subject / theme
搭配an art as well as a ___，與 art 對舉，nutrition is an art as well as a science＝既是藝術也是科學
✗ philosophy/subject/theme 都無法與 art 形成「藝術 vs 科學」的經典對舉
空格 3interact interact / collaborate / intermingle / blend
語意genes and environment ___＝基因與環境「交互作用」，interact 最精準
✗ collaborate（協作，多指人）、intermingle/blend（混合）都不及 interact 表「基因與環境交互作用」的科學用語
空格 4suitable applicable / sensible / suitable / photographic
搭配suitable for＝適合，由 for 鎖定（recommendations that will be suitable for...）
✗ applicable to／sensible 搭配或語意不合；photographic（攝影的）完全離題；suitable for 最自然
16.Pinker (平克)5 格#080015
In a sequence of bestsellers, including The Language Instinct and How the Mind Works, Pinker has argued the swathes of our mental, social and emotional lives may have 1originated as evolutionary adaptations, well suited to the lives our ancestors eked out on the Pleistocene savannah. Sometimes it seems as if nothing is 2immune from being explained this way. Road rage, adultery, marriage, altruism, our tendency to reward senior executives with corner offices on the top floor, and the smaller number of women who become mechanical engineers—all may have their 3roots in natural selection, Pinker claims. The controversial implications are obvious: that men and women might 4differ in their inborn abilities at performing certain tasks, for example, or that parenting may have 5little influence on little lots sufficient plenty
空格 1originated originated / raised / developed / progressed
時態may have ___，have 後接過去分詞，originated 為過去分詞
語意心智社會生活「源自」演化適應，originated as evolutionary adaptations
✗ raised（養育／提高）、progressed（進展）語意不合；developed 雖近，但 originate as（起源為）更精準扣「演化起源」
空格 2immune immune / assorted / exempt / deducted
搭配immune from＝免於、不受…影響，由 from 鎖定（nothing is immune from being explained）
✗ exempt 雖也接 from，但 immune from being explained 更道地；assorted/deducted 語意全不合
空格 3roots resources / preferences / roots / origins
搭配have their roots in＝根源在於，固定片語（roots in natural selection）
✗ origins in 雖近，但慣用 have their roots in；resources/preferences 語意不合
空格 4differ harmonize / differ / quarrel / dissent
語意men and women might ___ in their abilities＝兩性在能力上「有所不同」，differ in
✗ harmonize（協調）相反；quarrel（爭吵）、dissent（異議）指人際衝突，不合「天生能力差異」
空格 5little little / lots / sufficient / plenty
語意parenting may have ___ influence＝教養可能影響「很小」，呼應 Pinker 強調天性的論點
單複數influence 為不可數，用 little（少量）修飾，且語意偏負
✗ lots/plenty 表「很多」與論點相反；sufficient（充足）語意不合「微小影響」
17.Sustainable Development Strateg. (可持續發展戰略)6 格#080016
The principal recommendation of the world conferences was that countries must take full responsibility for their own development. National responsibility for national development is the necessary consequence of 1sovereignty. sovereignty . The Monterrey Consensus states that ‘Each country has primary responsibility for its own economic and social development, and the role of national policies and development strategies cannot be over-employed. The Johannesburg Plan of Implementation called for all governments to begin implementing national sustainable development strategies (NSDS) by 2005 and the 2005 Summit agreed on a target of 2006 for all developing countries to 2adopt and start implementation of these strategies to 3achieve the internationally agreed goals. The automatic corollary of that principle is that each country must be free to determine its own development strategy. It is essential that all donors and lenders accept the principle of country ownership of national development strategies. This implies the acceptance of the principle that development strategies should not only be 4attuned to country circumstances, but also be prepared and implemented under the leadership of the governments of the countries themselves. The 2005 World Summit also acknowledged, in this 5regard , that all countries must recognize the need for developing countries to strike a 6balance between their national policy priorities and their international commitments. nationality sovereignty bureaucracy liberality adopt evacuate abuse adjust
空格 1sovereignty nationality / sovereignty / bureaucracy / liberality
語意國家自負其責是「主權」的必然結果，the necessary consequence of sovereignty，下文 sovereignty 重現
✗ nationality 國籍、bureaucracy 官僚、liberality 慷慨 都不合「主權」這層政治概念
空格 2adopt adopt / evacuate / abuse / adjust
搭配adopt...strategies＝採行策略，固定搭配（adopt and start implementation of these strategies）
時態to ___ and start，to 後接原形動詞
✗ evacuate 撤離、abuse 濫用、adjust 調整 都不搭 strategies 表「採行」
空格 3achieve contest / achieve / abandon / wrap
搭配achieve...goals＝達成目標，固定搭配（to achieve the internationally agreed goals）
✗ contest 爭奪、abandon 放棄、wrap 包裹 都不搭 goals 表「達成」
空格 4attuned against / successive / attended / attuned
搭配attuned to＝契合於，由 to country circumstances 鎖定（strategies should be attuned to country circumstances）
時態should be ___ to，被動需過去分詞
✗ against（對抗）語意相反；successive（連續）、attended（出席）搭 to circumstances 不通
空格 5regard regard / option / approach / brief
搭配in this regard＝在這方面，固定片語
✗ in this option/approach/brief 都不成慣用語；只有 in this regard 成立
空格 6balance distinction / combination / equivalence / balance
搭配strike a balance between＝在…之間取得平衡，固定片語（strike a balance between national policy priorities and international commitments）
✗ distinction/combination/equivalence 都不搭 strike a ___ between；只有 balance 構成「取得平衡」
18.Children sleep patterns (兒童睡眠模式)3 格#080017
Children have 1sound sleep patterns. They can 2successfully sleep for 8-9 hours and get up at a fixed time. But teenagers don’t. Their need of early start to schools or other schedules can 3influence their time. But teenagers don’t. Their need of early start to schools or other schedules can influence their sleep patterns. Despite these factors, they actually need longer sleep time.
空格 1sound sound / poor / mild / eccentric
搭配sound sleep＝安穩的睡眠，固定搭配，呼應下文 successfully sleep 8-9 hours（正面）
✗ poor（差的）與下文「能睡 8-9 小時」矛盾；mild 溫和、eccentric 古怪 都不形容睡眠品質
空格 2successfully seldom / successfully / completely / periodically
詞性can ___ sleep，副詞修飾動詞 sleep，successfully 為副詞
語意孩子能「順利地」連睡 8-9 小時並定時起床，與 sound sleep 正面呼應
✗ seldom（很少）與「能睡 8-9 小時」矛盾；completely 不修飾 sleep；periodically（週期性）語意不合
空格 3influence diverge / acquire / influence / impress
時態can ___ their sleep，助動詞 can 後接原形動詞
語意上學早起等作息「影響」睡眠模式，influence＝影響
✗ diverge（分歧）不及物、不接受詞；acquire（取得）、impress（使印象深刻）語意不合「影響睡眠」
19.Debt-for-developing exchanges (發展交易所的債務)5 格#080018
Books and articles highlighting intractable debt, poverty and development abound in both the academic and popular literature. This addition to the debate is both timely and interesting 1as it subsumes the economic debate to the broader social, political, environmental and institutional context of debt in developing countries. Debt-for-Development Exchanges: History and New Applications is 2intended for a wide audience including: academics from a range of disciplines (including accounting and finance); non-Government organisations (NGOs); civil society groups; and, both debtor and creditor governments and public sector organization. Professor Ross Buckley, author and editor, has 3developed an international profile in the area of debt relief and this book is the outcome of an Australian Research Council (ARC) Discovery grant to explore debt-for development mechanisms that relieve debt, improve development outcomes 4from aid, are practically and politically attractive to creditors and 5contribute to regional security. into within from in contribute attribute ascribe lead
空格 1as as / for / while
語意as it subsumes...＝因為它把經濟辯論納入更廣脈絡，as 表原因，解釋為何 timely and interesting
詞性後接完整子句 it subsumes...，需連接詞
✗ for 作連接詞較文言且少接在此；while（雖然）語意轉折不合，此處是補充原因
空格 2intended determined / granted / intended / declined
搭配be intended for＝為…而設計／適用對象，由 for a wide audience 鎖定
時態is ___ for 被動，需過去分詞
✗ determined/granted/declined for 都不搭「面向某讀者群」；intended for 才慣用
空格 3developed developed / develop
時態has ___ an international profile，現在完成式 has 後接過去分詞 developed
搭配develop a profile＝建立聲望，固定搭配
✗ develop 為原形，無法接在 has 之後構成完成式
空格 4from into / within / from / in
搭配the outcome of...grant to explore...mechanisms that relieve debt, improve...outcomes from aid＝來自援助的成果，from aid＝來自援助
✗ into/within/in aid 都不合；improve outcomes from aid（改善援助帶來的成果）才道地
空格 5contribute contribute / attribute / ascribe / lead
搭配contribute to＝有助於，由 to regional security 鎖定（contribute to regional security）
時態與前面並列 relieve, improve...，皆原形動詞
✗ attribute/ascribe to＝歸因於，語意不合；lead to（導致）較負面，不及 contribute to 表「促進區域安全」
20.The horned desert viper (有角的沙漠蝰蛇)6 格#080019
The horned desert viper’s ability to hunt at night has always puzzled biologists. Though it lies with its 1head buried in the sand, it can strike with great precision as soon as prey appears. Now, Young and physicists Leo van Hemmen and Paul Friedel at the Technical University of Munich in Germany have developed a computer 2model of the snake’s auditory system to explain how the snake “hears” its 3prey without really having the ears for it. Although the vipers have 4internal ears that can hear 5frequencies between 200 and 1000 hertz, it is not the sound of the mouse scurrying about that they are detecting. “The snakes don’t have external 6eardrums ” says van Hemmen. “So unless the mouse wears boots and starts stamping, the snake won’t hear it.” internal external exterior surface quality frequencies voices quantities earpieces eardrums eyes eyeballs
空格 1head hand / head / neck / feet
語意its head buried in the sand＝頭埋在沙裡，呼應蝰蛇潛伏狩獵；下文 head 重現
✗ hand 蛇無手、neck 脖子、feet 腳 都不合「埋在沙中的部位」，且蛇無 hand/feet
空格 2model model / standard / module / criterion
搭配a computer model＝電腦模型，固定搭配（developed a computer model of the snake's auditory system）
✗ standard 標準、module 模組、criterion 準則 都不合「電腦模型」；computer model 才慣用
空格 3prey voice / sound / prey / shout
語意蛇「聽見」獵物，hears its prey，呼應前文 as soon as prey appears（獵物出現）
✗ voice/sound/shout 雖與「聽」相關，但下文明說不是靠老鼠的聲音，且 prey（獵物）才扣狩獵主題
空格 4internal internal / external / exterior / surface
語意internal ears＝內耳，與下文 don't have external eardrums（沒有外耳鼓膜）對比，蛇有內耳無外耳
✗ external/exterior（外部）與下文「無外耳膜」矛盾；surface（表面）不形容耳朵
空格 5frequencies quality / frequencies / voices / quantities
搭配hear frequencies between 200 and 1000 hertz＝聽到 200-1000 赫茲的頻率，由 hertz 鎖定
✗ quality 品質、voices 嗓音、quantities 數量 都不搭 between...hertz（赫茲是頻率單位）
空格 6eardrums earpieces / eardrums / eyes / eyeballs
語意external eardrums＝外耳鼓膜，下文 the mouse...stamping the snake won't hear（無鼓膜故聽不到空氣傳聲）佐證
✗ earpieces 耳機、eyes/eyeballs 眼睛 都不合「外耳鼓膜」這個聽覺器官

Buying a 1home can be a daunting process, especially when there are so many things to consider like: where and what can I buy? how much deposit will I need? how much can I borrow? who should I where and what can I buy? how much deposit will I need? how much can I borrow? who should I borrow from? what are all the other costs involved? how can I repay my mortgage quickly, and what other decisions do I need to make during this process? First you need to work out how much you can other decisions do I need to make during this process? First you need to work out how much you can borrow. This is where our services will really help you. Make sure you have an accurate and detailed budget that takes into account all expenses associated with purchasing a property, including stamp budget that takes into account all expenses associated with purchasing a property, including stamp duty, council rates, and other fees. We can help you identify these extra costs. Ask us for our budget planner if you don't already have one. Interest rates move constantly, so you will need to allow room in planner if you don't already have one. Interest rates move constantly, so you will need to allow room in your budget for interest rate increases and for other 2unforeseen additional spending. When interest rates drop, simply maintaining the same repayment is one of the fastest ways of paying off more of rates drop, simply maintaining the same repayment is one of the fastest ways of paying off more of your loan and building a buffer if rates rise again. All purchase funds are paid at settlement. In the 3ordinary course of events, settlement takes place, the purchase price is paid in full and the deposit ordinary course of events, settlement takes place, the purchase price is paid in full and the deposit bond simply lapses. It is advisable to have your two most recent pay slips and group certificates for the past two years, and documentation from your employer detailing income and length of employment. past two years, and documentation from your employer detailing income and length of employment. extraordinary dubious uninmaginable unforeseen standard common high_level ordinary
空格 1home home / workplace / family / present
語意全文主題買房，Buying a ___ 呼應標題 Buying a home＝買房
✗ workplace 職場、family 家人、present 禮物 都不合「買房」的受詞
空格 2unforeseen extraordinary / dubious / uninmaginable / unforeseen
語意other ___ additional spending＝其他「未預見的」額外支出，unforeseen＝無法預見的，呼應利率波動的不確定
✗ extraordinary 非凡、dubious 可疑、uninmaginable（拼寫應為 unimaginable）難以想像 都不合「預料外的支出」
空格 3ordinary standard / common / ordinary
搭配in the ordinary course of events＝在通常情況下，固定片語
✗ standard/common course of events 都不成慣用語；只有 the ordinary course of events 成立
22.Tomb of Tutankhamun (圖坦卡蒙墓)3 格#080022
The last tourists may have been leaving the Valley of the Kings on the West Bank in Luxor but the area in front of the tomb of Tutankhamun remained far from deserted. Instead of the 1tranquility that usually descends on the area in the evening it was a hive of activity. TV crews trailed masses of equipment, journalists milled and photographers held their cameras at the ready. The reason? For the first time since Howard Carter 2discovered the tomb in 1922 the mummy of Tutankhamun was being prepared for public display. Inside the subterranean burial chamber Egypt's archaeology supremo Zahi Hawass, accompanied by four Egyptologists, two restorers and three workmen, were slowly lifting the mummy from the golden sarcophagus where it has been rested--mostly undisturbed--for more than 3,000 years. The body was then placed on a wooden stretcher and 3transported to its new home, a high-tech, climate-controlled plexi-glass showcase located in the outer chamber of the tomb where, covered in linen, with only the face and feet exposed, it now greets visitors. tranquility composure kindness noisy
空格 1tranquility tranquility / composure / kindness / noisy
詞性the ___ that usually descends，定冠詞後接名詞作主詞；noisy 為形容詞詞性不符
語意傍晚通常降臨的「寧靜」，與下文 a hive of activity（熱鬧忙碌）形成對比
✗ noisy 是形容詞且語意相反；composure（鎮定）、kindness（善意）形容人的心緒，不形容場域氛圍
空格 2discovered founded / discovered / created / investigated
搭配Carter discovered the tomb in 1922＝卡特於 1922 年「發現」此墓，史實固定說法
時態敘述 1922 年的事，過去式 discovered
✗ founded（創立）用於機構國家、created（創造）、investigated（調查）都不合「發現古墓」
空格 3transported transcended / transmitted / transported / transformed
時態was placed...and ___ to its new home 被動，需過去分詞
搭配transported to＝運送至，由 to its new home 鎖定
✗ transcended 超越、transmitted 傳輸（訊號）、transformed 轉變 都不合「（遺體）被運送到新處」
23.The Ironbridge Gorge (鐵橋峽谷)0 格#080023
The Ironbridge Gorge World Heritage property covers an area of 5.5 km2 (550ha) and is located in Telford, Shropshire, approximately 50km north-west of Birmingham. The Industrial Revolution had its Telford, Shropshire, approximately 50km north-west of Birmingham. The Industrial Revolution had its 18th century roots in the Ironbridge Gorge before spreading across the world, bringing with it some of the most far-reaching changes in human history. The site incorporates a 5km length of the steep- the most far-reaching changes in human history. The site incorporates a 5km length of the steep- sided, mineral-rich Severn Valley from a point immediately west of Ironbridge downstream to Coalport, together with two smaller river valleys extending northwards to Coalbrookdale and Madeley. Coalport, together with two smaller river valleys extending northwards to Coalbrookdale and Madeley. The Ironbridge Gorge offers a powerful insight into the origins of the Industrial Revolution and also contains extensive evidence and remains of that period when the area was the focus of international contains extensive evidence and remains of that period when the area was the focus of international attention from artists, engineers, and writers. The site contains substantial remains of mines, foundries, factories, workshops, warehouses, iron masters' and workers' housing, public buildings, infrastructure, factories, workshops, warehouses, iron masters' and workers' housing, public buildings, infrastructure, and transport systems, together with traditional landscape and forests of the Severn Gorge. In addition, there also remain extensive collections of artifacts and archives relating to the individuals, processes, and products that made the area so important. processes, and products that made the area so important. 1 took_up_its story get_it_commenced had_its_18th_century_ro first_represented_itself 2 covers_lots_and_lots constitute_millions incorporates_a_5km_len comprises_the_area offers_a_powerful_insig gives_a_meaningful_un provide_some_informati allows_a_good_compre 3 offers_a_powerful_insig gives_a_meaningful_un provide_some_informati allows_a_good_compre ht derstanding on hension 4 conventional_woods outstanding_roadside_s old_school_countryside traditional_landscape_a 5 complex_crowds huge_communities extensive_collections customized_groups
24.Cause of unemployment (失業原因)5 格#080024
One cause of unemployment may be downswings in the trade cycle, i.e. periods of recession. Another explanation of wide-scale unemployment refers to 1structural employment. Structural unemployment explanation of wide-scale unemployment refers to structural employment. Structural unemployment arises from longer-term changes in the economy, affecting 2specific industries, regions and occupations. Structural unemployment often explains regional unemployment. Some regions of the UK occupations. Structural unemployment often explains regional unemployment. Some regions of the UK such as Central Scotland, and the North-West have higher rates of unemployment because the 3traditional heavy industries which 4located there have gone intodecline as they are 5replaced by cheaper traditional heavy industries which located there have gone intodecline as they are replaced by cheaper imports from abroad. The new high-tech industries based on new technologies tend to be based in the South-East and along particular growth corridors. South-East and along particular growth corridors. identical unique specific individual ancient traditional heretical orthodox are locating locate located have_located
空格 1structural structural / regional / perpetual / temporary
語意下句即定義 Structural unemployment 來自經濟的長期結構性改變，與前文呼應
搭配固定詞組 structural unemployment（結構性失業）
✗ regional/temporary/perpetual 雖搭 unemployment，但後文明確界定為「長期結構改變」即 structural
空格 2specific identical / unique / specific / individual
語意affecting specific industries, regions and occupations 指「特定」產業，語意最合
✗ identical(相同)/unique(獨一)/individual(個別)語意都不符「特定一群產業」
空格 3traditional ancient / traditional / heretical / orthodox
語意traditional heavy industries 傳統重工業，與後文衰退、被進口取代呼應
搭配traditional heavy industries 為常見搭配
✗ ancient(古代)過頭；heretical(異端)/orthodox(正統)語意不通
空格 4located are / locating / locate / located
時態industries which ___ there 用過去式 located 表「曾位於該地」，與後句 have gone into decline 一致
詞性關係子句需要限定動詞；are(後無 -ing/p.p.)、locating、have located 都不合此處主動過去式語境
✗ are 後無補語；locating 非限定式；have located 完成式時態與語境不符
空格 5replaced lagged / replaced / deducted / impacted
搭配be replaced by 被…取代，後接 cheaper imports，被動固定搭配
語意傳統工業衰退因被便宜進口品取代，語意最合
✗ lagged/deducted/impacted 皆不搭 be ___ by imports 的被動取代語意

Comparing the intelligence of animals of different species is difficult, how do you compare a dolphin and a horse? Psychologists have a technique for looking at intelligence that 1does not require the and a horse? Psychologists have a technique for looking at intelligence that does not require the cooperation of the animal involved. The relative size of an individual's brain is a reasonable indication of intelligence. Comparing 2across species is not as simple an elephant will have a larger brain than a of intelligence. Comparing across species is not as simple an elephant will have a larger brain than a human simple because it is a large beast. 3Instead , we use the Cephalization index, which compare the size of an animal's brain to the size of its body. Based on the Cephalization index, the brightest animals size of an animal's brain to the size of its body. Based on the Cephalization index, the brightest animals on the planet are humans, 4followed by great apes, porpoises and elephants. As a general 5rule , animals that hunt for a living (like canines) are smarter than strict vegetarians (you don't need much that hunt for a living (like canines) are smarter than strict vegetarians (you don't need much intelligence to outsmart a leaf of lettuce). Animals that live in social groups are always smarter and have large EQ's than solitary animals. have large EQ's than solitary animals. towards across through against Although Thus Instead Otherwise follows followed follow following
空格 1does do / did / does / done
時態a technique that ___ not require 現在式，主詞 technique 為第三人稱單數，用 does
單複數助動詞須配單數主詞 technique，故 does not require
✗ do(複數)、did(過去)、done(過去分詞)皆與單數現在式不符
空格 2across towards / across / through / against
搭配compare across species 跨物種比較，across 為固定介系詞
✗ towards/through/against 皆不搭 compare ___ species 的「跨越」語意
空格 3Instead Although / Thus / Instead / Otherwise
語意前句說大腦大小不可靠，本句改用 Cephalization index，Instead 表「改而」轉折

✗ follows/follow 主動現在式不合被動片語；following 方向相反（其前）

26.Australian Overseas Departures (澳大利亞海外離境)5 格#080026
Over the past ten years, Australian overseas departures have grown from 1.7 million to 3.2 million. This represents strong average, annual growth of 6.5 per cent. This paper 1analyses outbound travel demand represents strong average, annual growth of 6.5 per cent. This paper analyses outbound travel demand to each destination country using the travel demand models of short-term resident departures. The models are specified in terms of a double logarithmic linear functional form, with overseas departures models are specified in terms of a double logarithmic linear functional form, with overseas departures as the dependent variable and real household disposable income prices of travel and accommodation in Australia, and overseas and the exchange rate as independent 2variables. . The models were estimated in Australia, and overseas and the exchange rate as independent variables The models were estimated using historical time series data from 1973 to 1998. The data were obtained from several 3sources such as the World Tourism Organization, Australian Bureau of Statistics, World Bank and International as the World Tourism Organization, Australian Bureau of Statistics, World Bank and International Monetary Fund. The results suggest that the estimated elasticity parameters are consistent with standard economic theory. The number of short-term resident departures is positively influenced by standard economic theory. The number of short-term resident departures is positively influenced by per capita real household disposable income; and the price of domestic travel and accommodation, and 4negatively influenced by the price of travel and accommodation overseas. The estimated demand and negatively influenced by the price of travel and accommodation overseas. The estimated demand models were used to develop the Tourism Forecasting Council’s long run forecasts. The forecasts suggest that the number of short-term resident departures will increase strongly over the next ten suggest that the number of short-term resident departures will increase strongly over the next ten years, largely due to the strength of the Australian economy, competitive trove prices, and Australians’ interest in 5experiencing different cultures and lifestyles. Australians’ interest in experiencing different cultures and lifestyles. variables adaptation varieties variability sources origins resources roots definite hardly significantly negatively
空格 1analyses inspires / analyses / describes / expedites
語意This paper ___ outbound travel demand，論文「分析」需求，analyses 最合

空格 2variables variables / adaptation / varieties / variability
語意與後文 independent variables 對應，departures 為 dependent variable（依變數）

空格 3sources sources / origins / resources / roots

空格 4negatively definite / hardly / significantly / negatively
語意與前文 positively influenced 對比，海外旅遊價格上升使離境下降，故 negatively influenced
詞性需副詞修飾 influenced，negatively/significantly 皆副詞，但語意需「負面」
✗ definite 為形容詞不能修飾動詞；hardly/significantly 語意不符「負相關」對比

In so doing I shall first consider the properties of provide an excellent source of speaking practice. In so doing I shall first consider the properties of computer simulations from a theoretical point of view, then describe the experience of 1using a particular simulation with a general EFL class. On the basis of this 2experience, , and of some very particular simulation with a general EFL class. On the basis of this experience and of some very straightforward pedagogical considerations, I shall argue that the claim is justified, 3subject to a very important caveat: computer simulations can form the basis of excellent speaking exercises, provided important caveat: computer simulations can form the basis of excellent speaking exercises, provided you do not expect the computer to do all the work. Put in another way, many computer simulations only 4attain their full potential as language exercises if they are 5integrated into a larger, planned, only attain their full potential as language exercises if they are integrated into a larger, planned,

Roads of rails called Wagonways were being used in Germany as 1early as 1550. These 2primitive railed Roads of rails called Wagonways were being used in Germany as early as 1550. These primitive railed roads consisted of wooden rails over which horse-drawn wagons or carts moved with greater ease than over dirt roads. Wagonways were the beginnings of modern railroads. 3By 1776, iron had replaced than over dirt roads. Wagonways were the beginnings of modern railroads. By 1776, iron had replaced the wood in the rails and wheels on the carts. Wagonways evolved into Tramways and spread throughout Europe. Horses still provided all the pulling power. In 1789, Englishman, William Jessup throughout Europe. Horses still provided all the pulling power. In 1789, Englishman, William Jessup designed the first wagons with flanged wheels. The 4flange was a groove that allowed the wheels to better grip the rail, this was an important design that carried over to later locomotives. better grip the rail, this was an important design that carried over to later locomotives. tardy similar many early primitive underlying prioritized fundamental Within As In By

✗ underlying/prioritized/fundamental 與「原始簡陋的鐵道」語意不符
空格 3By Within / As / In / By
搭配By 1776 到1776年為止，By + 年份表時間點
✗ Within 後須接時段；As/In 搭年份不表「到…為止」的完成語意（had replaced）

搭配flanged wheels 凸緣輪，鐵道專有名詞
✗ tire/trim/parts 皆與下句對 flange（凸緣）的定義不符

In addition to acquiring specialist under the label of politics and international relations and commerce. In addition to acquiring specialist 3knowledge and competencies in Politics and International Relations and Commerce, students will graduate with a range of generic skills such as critical thinking, enhanced communication abilities, graduate with a range of generic skills such as critical thinking, enhanced communication abilities, problem solving and strong capacities to work with others. They will also develop ethically based and socially 4responsible attitudes and behaviors. socially responsible attitudes and behaviors. narrow broad widely mild experiment knowledge information capacity answerable accountability responsible rebuttable

The invasion of non-indigenous plants is considered a primary threat to integrity and function of ecosystems. However, there is little quantitative or 1experimental evidence for ecosystem impacts of ecosystems. However, there is little quantitative or experimental evidence for ecosystem impacts of invasive species. Justifications for control are often based on potential, but not presently realized, recognized or quantified, negative impacts. Should lack of scientific certainty about impacts of non- recognized or quantified, negative impacts. Should lack of scientific certainty about impacts of non- indigenous species result in postponing measures to prevent degradation? Recently, management of purple loosestrife (Lythrum salicaria), has been criticized for lack of evidence demonstrating negative purple loosestrife (Lythrum salicaria), has been criticized for lack of evidence demonstrating negative impacts of L. salicaria, and management using biocontrol for lack of evidence documenting the failure of conventional control methods. Although little quantitative evidence on negative impacts on native of conventional control methods. Although little quantitative evidence on negative impacts on native wetland biota and wetland function was available at the onset of the control program in 1985, recent work has demonstrated that the invasion of purple loosestrife into North American freshwater work has demonstrated that the invasion of purple loosestrife into North American freshwater wetlands alters 2decomposition rates and nutrient cycling, leads to reductions in wetland plant diversity, reduces pollination and seed output of the native Lythrum alatum, and reduces habitat 3suitability for reduces pollination and seed output of the native Lythrum alatum, and reduces habitat suitability for specialized wetland bird species such as black terns, least bitterns, pied-billed grebes, and marsh wrens. Conventional methods (physical, mechanical or chemical), have continuously failed to 4curb the wrens. Conventional methods (physical, mechanical or chemical), have continuously failed to curb the spread of purple loosestrife or to provide satisfactory control. Although a number of generalist insect and bird species utilize purple loosestrife, wetland habitat specialists are excluded by 5encroachment of and bird species utilize purple loosestrife, wetland habitat specialists are excluded by encroachment of L. salicaria. We conclude that negative ecosystem impacts of purple loosestrife in North America justify control of the species and that 6detrimental effects of purple loosestrife on wetland systems and biota control of the species and that detrimental effects of purple loosestrife on wetland systems and biota and the potential benefits of control outweigh potential risks associated with the introduction of biocontrol agents. Long term experiments and monitoring programs that are in place will evaluate the biocontrol agents. Long term experiments and monitoring programs that are in place will evaluate the impact of these insects on purple loosestrife, on wetland plant succession and other wetland biota.
空格 1experimental experimental / experienced / empirical / proficient
搭配quantitative or experimental evidence 量化或實驗證據，與 quantitative 並列
詞性與 quantitative 並列修飾 evidence，需形容詞 experimental
✗ experienced/proficient 修飾人；empirical 雖近義但原文搭 experimental，且 experimental 與 quantitative 並列更自然
空格 2decomposition decomposition / composition / compositing / decompositing
語意alters ___ rates and nutrient cycling 改變「分解」速率與養分循環，生態語境
搭配decomposition rates 分解速率，固定搭配
✗ composition(組成)語意不合；compositing/decompositing 為非標準字
空格 3suitability capacity / capability / suitability / stability
搭配habitat suitability 棲地適宜性，生態固定術語
語意reduces habitat ___ for bird species 降低鳥類棲地適宜性
✗ capacity/capability/stability 皆不搭 habitat 構成標準生態術語
空格 4curb quit / curb / widen / decrease
語意failed to ___ the spread 未能「抑制」蔓延，curb 表遏止
搭配curb the spread 遏止蔓延，固定搭配
✗ quit/widen/decrease 與「遏止擴散」語意不符（widen 相反）
空格 5encroachment encroachment / enrollment / encouragement / engagement
語意excluded by ___ of L. salicaria 被該植物「侵佔」排擠，encroachment 表侵入蔓延
✗ enrollment/encouragement/engagement 皆與「植物侵佔」語意不符
空格 6detrimental wholesome / beneficial / detrimental / impartial
語意___ effects on wetland systems 對濕地系統的「有害」影響，全文論其負面衝擊
搭配detrimental effects 有害影響，固定搭配
✗ wholesome/beneficial 語意相反；impartial(公正)不合語境

The 23-year-old Good Schools increasingly looking beyond the private sector to educate their children. The 23-year-old Good Schools Guide – a 2popular reference book for fee-paying families set on the best private school – has increased the number of state schools in this year’s edition to 251, pushing the figure to more than a quarter of the number of state schools in this year’s edition to 251, pushing the figure to more than a quarter of its 1,000 entries for the first time. 3Explaining why the guide has more than doubled the number of schools, it features outside the private 4sector in only five years, Sue Fieldman, regional editor, told the schools, it features outside the private sector in only five years, Sue Fieldman, regional editor, told the Financial Times: “The parents we speak to want more information on the state sector and the best it

These fast-moving, lightweight animals live in the rainforests of South America. Their small size 1makes it easy for them to dart about the trees, catching insects and small animals such Their small size makes it easy for them to dart about the trees, catching insects and small animals such as lizards, frogs, and snails. Marmosets have another unusual food 2source-they source -they use their chisel-like incisor teeth to dig into tree bark and lap up the gummy sap that seeps out, leaving telltale, oval- incisor teeth to dig into tree bark and lap up the gummy sap that seeps out, leaving telltale, oval- shaped 3holes in the 4branches when they have finished. But as vast tracts of rainforest are cleared for plantations and cattle ranches marmosets and tamarins are in serious 5danger of extinction. plantations and cattle ranches marmosets and tamarins are in serious danger of extinction. holes traps snares traces roots twigs trunks branches hazard danger vulnerability weakness

34.Active Reading (主動閱讀)4 格#080034
Reading is an active process, not a 1passive one. We always read within a 2specific context and this affects what we notice and what seems to matter. We always have a purpose in reading a text, and this affects what we notice and what seems to matter. We always have a purpose in reading a text, and this will shape how we 3approach it. Our purpose and background knowledge will also 4determine the strategies we use to read the text. strategies we use to read the text. grab read take approach undermine exterminate terminate determine
空格 1passive passive / proactive / subjective / prejudiced
語意an active process, not a ___ one 主動而非「被動」，active 的反義即 passive
✗ proactive(更積極)非反義；subjective/prejudiced 與 active 不成對比
空格 2specific explicit / specific / broad / ambiguous
語意within a ___ context 在「特定」情境中閱讀，specific context 最合
搭配specific context 特定情境，固定搭配
✗ explicit(明確)/broad(廣泛)/ambiguous(模糊)皆不搭「特定情境」
空格 3approach grab / read / take / approach
語意how we ___ it 我們如何「處理/著手」文本，approach 表處理方式
搭配approach a text 著手處理文本，固定搭配
✗ grab/read/take 皆不搭 how we ___ it 表「採取的方式」之意
空格 4determine undermine / exterminate / terminate / determine
語意will also ___ the strategies 也將「決定」所用策略，determine 表決定
✗ undermine(破壞)/exterminate(消滅)/terminate(終止)語意皆不符「決定策略」
35.Imperial Control (帝國控制)5 格#080035
In the southern cone especially, from Venezuela to Argentina, the region is rising to overthrow the legacy of external 1domination of the past centuries and the cruel and destructive social forms that they have helped to establish. The 2mechanisms of imperial control-violence and economic warfare, hardly a distant memory in Latin America-are losing their effectiveness, a sign of the shift toward independence. Washington is now compelled to tolerate governments that in the past would have drawn intervention or reprisal. Throughout the region a vibrant 3array of popular movements provide the basis for a meaningful democracy. The indigenous populations, as if in a rediscovery of their pre- Columbian legacy, are much more active and influential, particularly in Bolivia and Ecuador. These developments are in part the result of a phenomenon that has been observed for some years in Latin America: As the elected governments become more formally democratic, citizens 4expressed an increasing disillusionment with democratic institutions. They have sought to construct democratic systems based on popular participation rather than elite and foreign 5domination. domination mechanical mechanisms materialism militarism array group order sequence suppressed repressed compressed expressed
空格 1domination suppression / domination / subordination / invasion
搭配external domination 外部支配，與後文 elite and foreign domination 呼應
語意the legacy of external ___ 外部「支配」的遺緒
✗ suppression/subordination/invasion 皆不如 domination 貼合「外部支配遺緒」並與後文一致
空格 2mechanisms mechanical / mechanisms / materialism / militarism
單複數The ___ of imperial control-...-are losing 動詞 are 為複數，主詞需複數名詞 mechanisms
語意imperial control 的「機制」（暴力與經濟戰），mechanisms 語意合
✗ mechanical 為形容詞；materialism/militarism 為單數且語意不符複數機制
空格 3array array / group / order / sequence
搭配a vibrant array of popular movements 一系列蓬勃的群眾運動，an array of 固定搭配
✗ group/order/sequence 皆不搭 a vibrant ___ of 構成「一系列」
空格 4expressed suppressed / repressed / compressed / expressed
語意citizens ___ an increasing disillusionment 公民「表達」日益幻滅，expressed disillusionment 語意合
搭配express disillusionment 表達幻滅，固定搭配
✗ suppressed/repressed/compressed 皆與「表達不滿幻滅」語意相反或不符
空格 5domination invasion / domination / corruption / suppression
搭配elite and foreign domination 菁英與外國支配，與 popular participation 對比
語意rather than elite and foreign ___ 而非菁英外國「支配」
✗ invasion/corruption/suppression 皆不如 domination 貼合「菁英外國支配」對比語境

No matter the size of your business good customer service needs to be at the heart of your business model if you size of your business good customer service needs to be at the heart of your business model if you wish to be successful. it is important to provide good customer service; to all types of customers, including 2potential, , new and existing customers. Although it can take extra resources, time and money, including potential new and existing customers. Although it can take extra resources, time and money, good customer service leads to customer satisfaction which can generate positive word of mouth for your business, keep your customers happy and encourage them to purchase form your business again. your business, keep your customers happy and encourage them to purchase form your business again. Good customer service can help your business grow and prosper. 3 break_even cost_benefit word_of_mouth value_for_money

37.Zika Virus (寨卡病毒)5 格#080037
Zika is more pernicious than public health officials anticipated. At present, it is circulating in more than 50 countries. And as of mid-May, seven countries or territories have reported cases of microcephaly or other serious birth defects linked to the virus, which is transmitted by mosquito bite, blood transfusion or sexual contact with an infected human. It can also be passed from mother to fetus during pregnancy. Despite Zika’s vast 2range over almost 70 years, there is little genetic difference among the various strains, according to an analysis by researchers at the University of Texas Medical Branch at Galveston. For example, the strain currently in the Americas and another previously detected in French Polynesia are practically 3indistinguishable from each other (group in white box). If the virus has changed so little over time, why is it rearing its ugly head now? Scientists are not sure yet, but new experimental work in mosquitoes suggests that the virus was capable of 4causing detrimental health effects and outbreaks all along. Therefore, it is unlikely mutations enabled new abilities. Instead public health officials probably did not understand Zika’s potential because the virus 5circulated mostly in remote locations until recently. revoking causing making evoking is_circulated are_circulated circulated circulate
空格 1transmits需覆核 transmits / tranmisting
詞性兩選項僅 transmits 為正確拼字，tranmisting 為拼錯的非字，故選 transmits
✗ tranmisting 拼寫錯誤（應為 transmitting）且非正確型態，排除
空格 2range capacity / range / similarity / immutability
搭配vast range 廣大範圍，over almost 70 years 指時間與地理跨度，vast range 固定搭配
語意Despite Zika's vast ___ over 70 years 儘管病毒分布範圍廣
✗ capacity/similarity/immutability 皆不搭 vast ___ over 70 years 表「範圍」
空格 3indistinguishable indistinguishable / invisible / imperceptible / indistinct
搭配indistinguishable from each other 彼此難以區分，indistinguishable from 固定搭配
語意兩株病毒幾乎相同，practically ___ from each other 表「無法區分」
✗ invisible(看不見)/imperceptible(難察覺)/indistinct(模糊)皆不搭 ___ from each other 表互相難辨
空格 4causing revoking / causing / making / evoking
搭配capable of causing detrimental health effects 能造成有害健康影響，cause effects 固定搭配
詞性capable of 後接動名詞，causing 表「造成」
✗ revoking(撤銷)/making(較弱不搭 effects)/evoking(喚起)皆不符「造成有害健康影響」
空格 5circulated circulated / circulate
時態the virus ___ mostly in remote locations 過去主動式 circulated 表病毒「曾流通」於偏遠地
詞性circulate 為不及物動詞，此處無 be 動詞作被動，故用主動過去式 circulated
✗ circulate 為原形與過去語境不符；無 be 動詞故不取被動形
