There isn’t a financial director around who wouldn’t like to 1accelerate cash flow by reducing debtor days-in other words, get customers to pay up faster. In Europe’s top 1,000 quoted companies, nearly one quarter of all invoices are unpaid 2at any point in time, , according to recent research carried out by one quarter of all invoices are unpaid at any point in time according to recent research carried out by the ASF organization. This means they are sitting on a total of 274 billion overdue debt. Most of this is caused by poor collection practices. According to Jan Porter, ASF’s Managing Director, “You can set caused by poor collection practices. According to Jan Porter, ASF’s Managing Director, “You can set up all the systems you want, you can insist on 3watertight contracts and payment terms, the government can even introduce late payment legislation, but there are always some debtors who fail government can even introduce late payment legislation, but there are always some debtors who 4fail to pay on time. time . Once a payment is overdue, your first step is to talk to your debtor. You should let them know the payment is late and try to find out if there is a dispute about the work, or if your debtor them know the payment is late and try to find out if there is a dispute about the work, or if your debtor has financial problems. 5This is OK. OK . but Tim Vainio, a chartered accountant, believes that too many companies are afraid of losing a relationship, and that, 6before undertaking any action the focus should companies are afraid of losing a relationship, and that, before undertaking any action the focus should be on recovering as much money as possible, rather than on preserving a relationship. 2 at_any_point_in_time before_purchase after_purchase when_purchase 4 willing_to_pay fail_to_pay_on_time don’t_know_how_to_p don’t_know_about_the 5 This_is_OK This_is_not_fine In_other_words That_is_to_say
空格 1accelerate decelerate / accelerate / desiccate / flow
語意語意：財務長想「加快」現金流（accelerate cash flow），與後文 pay up faster 一致
搭配accelerate cash flow 為固定搭配
✗ decelerate（減慢）語意相反；desiccate（使乾燥）、flow 不通。
空格 2at any point in time at any point in time / before purchase / after purchase / when purchase
語意語意：在「任何時間點」都有四分之一發票未付，描述持續狀態
✗ before/after/when purchase 皆與購買時點有關，但本句談的是發票未付的整體時間狀態。
空格 3watertight resistant / watertight / irresistible / suitable
搭配watertight contracts 為固定搭配，指「滴水不漏、無懈可擊的合約」
✗ resistant、irresistible、suitable 皆不與 contracts 構成「嚴密無漏洞」的慣用搭配。
空格 4fail to pay on time willing to pay / fail to pay on time / don't know how to pay / don't know about the payment
語意語意：總有些債務人「未能準時付款」（debtors who fail to pay on time）
✗ willing to pay（願意付）與語境矛盾；don't know how/about 過於牽強，不符 debtor 拖欠語意。
空格 5This is OK This is OK / This is not fine / In other words / That is to say
語意語意：先與債務人溝通了解爭議或財務問題，作者認可此做法為「沒問題」，再用 but 轉折
✗ This is not fine 語意相反；In other words / That is to say 為換句話說，但前文非需改述的內容。
空格 6before undertaking any action Nevertheless / thus / for example / before undertaking any action
語意語意：在「採取任何行動之前」應聚焦追回款項，與下文 the focus should be... 銜接
詞性需填介系詞片語當時間狀語，搭配主句 the focus should be
✗ Nevertheless、thus、for example 皆為連接副詞，無法銜接後接子句的時間狀語結構。
39.United Nations (聯合國)4 格#080039
Founded after World War II by 51 "peace-loving states" combined to oppose future aggression, the Founded after World War II by 51 "peace-loving states" combined to oppose future aggression, the United Nations now counts 192 member nations, 1including its newest members, Nauru, Kiribati, and Tonga in 1999, Tuvalu and Yugoslavia in 2000, Switzerland and East Timor in 2002, and Montenegro in Tonga in 1999, Tuvalu and Yugoslavia in 2000, Switzerland and East Timor in 2002, and Montenegro in 2006. United Nations Day has been 2observed on October 24 since 1948 and celebrates the objectives and accomplishments of the organization, which was established on October 24, 1945. The UN and accomplishments of the organization, which was established on October 24, 1945. The UN 3engages in peacekeeping and humanitarian missions across the globe. Though some say its 4influence has declined in recent decades, the United Nations still plays a tremendous role in world politics. In has declined in recent decades, the United Nations still plays a tremendous role in world politics. In 2001 the United Nations and Kofi Annan, then Secretary-General of the UN, won the Nobel Peace Prize "for their work for a better organized and more peaceful world." Since 1948 there have been 63 UN "for their work for a better organized and more peaceful world." Since 1948 there have been 63 UN peacekeeping operations, 16 are currently underway. Thus far, close to 130 nations have contributed personnel at various times; 119 are currently providing peacekeepers. As of August 31, 2008, there personnel at various times; 119 are currently providing peacekeepers. As of August 31, 2008, there were 16 peacekeeping operations underway with a total of 88,230 personnel. The small island nation of Fiji has taken part in virtually every UN peacekeeping operation, as has Canada. of Fiji has taken part in virtually every UN peacekeeping operation, as has Canada. excluding containing including covering selected distributed observed determined engages unites encourages states
空格 1including excluding / containing / including / covering
語意192 member nations, ___ its newest members 列舉新成員用 including「包括」
搭配including 引導舉例，固定用法
✗ excluding(排除)語意相反；containing/covering 不搭「包括其最新成員」舉例語境
空格 2observed selected / distributed / observed / determined
搭配UN Day has been ___ on October 24 紀念日「被慶祝/紀念」，observe a day 固定搭配
時態has been ___ 被動完成式需過去分詞 observed
✗ selected/distributed/determined 皆不搭 observe（紀念節日）的固定用法
空格 3engages engages / unites / encourages / states
搭配engages in peacekeeping missions 從事維和任務，engage in 固定片語
單複數主詞 The UN 單數，現在式用 engages
✗ unites/encourages/states 皆不搭 ___ in missions 表「從事」
空格 4influence power / influence / significance / determination
語意its ___ has declined 其「影響力」下降，與後文 plays a tremendous role 對比
搭配influence has declined 影響力衰退，搭配自然
✗ power/significance/determination 雖近義，但與後句「角色」呼應 influence 最貼且原文用之

Organisations need to integrate their sales activities more both internally and with customers' needs according to a new book co-authored by an academic at the University of East Anglia. The book according to a new book co-authored by an academic at the University of East Anglia. The book 1addresses how sales can help organisations to become more customer oriented and considers how they are responding to challenges such as increasing competition, more 2demanding customers and a they are responding to challenges such as increasing competition, more demanding customers and a more complex selling environment. Many organisations are facing escalating costs and a growth in customer power, 3which makes it necessary to allocate resources more strategically. The sales function can provide critical customer and market knowledge to help inform both innovation and marketing. can provide critical customer and market knowledge to help inform both innovation and marketing. However, the authors say that within the industry 4there is still uncertainty about the shape a future sales team should take, how it should be managed, and how it 5fits into their organisations business sales team should take, how it should be managed, and how it fits into their organisations business
空格 1addresses determines / addresses / induces / alleges
語意The book ___ how sales can help 書「探討/論述」銷售如何助益，address an issue 表處理議題
搭配address how/the question 探討問題，固定搭配
✗ determines(決定)/induces(引發)/alleges(指控)皆不搭「書探討某主題」
空格 2demanding demanding / attractive / exhausting / considerable
搭配more demanding customers 要求更高的顧客，demanding customers 固定搭配
語意與 increasing competition 並列為挑戰，demanding 表苛求
✗ attractive/exhausting/considerable 皆不搭 ___ customers 表「要求高的」
空格 3which that / which / where
詞性前有逗號的非限定子句指代整句概念，且先行詞為物，用 which；逗號後不用 that
語意..., ___ makes it necessary 指前述情況「使得…」，which 引導非限定關係子句
✗ that 不用於逗號後非限定子句；where 指地點不合
空格 4there there / here / that / itit
搭配there is still uncertainty 仍有不確定性，there is 存在句固定句型
詞性後接 is uncertainty，需引導詞 there 構成存在句
✗ here/that/itit 皆無法構成 ___ is still uncertainty 的存在句（itit 為錯字）
空格 5fits adapts / flows / fits / moves
搭配how it fits into their business 如何「融入」企業，fit into 固定片語
單複數主詞 it 單數，現在式用 fits
✗ adapts/flows/moves 皆不搭 ___ into their business 表「契合融入」

They also need to make sure the Space 3Travel . 4Outside the craft, they can see how the seeds react in the space. Some seeds company send seeds to them to craft, they can see how the seeds react in the space. Some seeds company send seeds to them to 5investigate how seeds change their biological character. When outside the craft, they can set up experiments or clean up the space rubbish. experiments or clean up the space rubbish. kicked carried pointed set Substation Travel Trip Station Out Outward Outside Outer 6 carry_on kick_off put_aside set_up
空格 1outside outer / external / outside / inner
語意can be inside or ___ 在艙內或艙「外」，與 inside 對比用 outside
搭配inside or outside 內外對比，固定搭配
✗ outer/external 不與 inside 直接成對；inner(內)語意相反
空格 2carried kicked / carried / pointed / set
搭配work is carried out 工作被執行，carry out 被動固定片語
時態the work is ___ out 被動語態需過去分詞 carried
✗ kicked/pointed/set 皆無法與 out 構成「執行工作」的被動片語
空格 3Travel Substation / Travel / Trip / Station
搭配Space Travel 太空旅行，固定專名搭配（大寫）
✗ Substation/Trip/Station 皆不搭 Space ___ 構成慣用專名 Space Travel
空格 4Outside Out / Outward / Outside / Outer
語意___ the craft, they can see 在艙「外」可觀察種子反應，與後文 outside the craft 一致
詞性句首作介系詞引導地點片語 Outside the craft，Outside 兼具介系詞用法
✗ Out/Outward/Outer 不能直接接 the craft 構成「在艙外」介系詞片語
空格 5investigate presume / estimate / inspect / investigate
語意send seeds to investigate how seeds change 送種子來「研究」生物特性變化，investigate 表調查研究
✗ presume(臆測)/estimate(估算)/inspect(檢視)皆不如 investigate 貼合「研究種子變化」

The recipe for making any creature is written in its DNA. So last November when geneticists published the near-complete DNA sequence of the long-extinct woolly mammoth, there was much speculation the near-complete DNA sequence of the long-extinct woolly mammoth, there was much speculation about whether we could bring this behemoth back to life. Creating a living, breathing creature from a genome sequence that exists only in a computer's memory is not possible right now. But someone genome sequence that exists only in a computer's memory is not possible right now. 空格 1predicts predicts / contemplates / foresees / anticipates
語意someone someday is sure to try it, ___ Stephan Schuster 「預測」某天會有人嘗試，predict 表預言未來
單複數主詞 Stephan Schuster 單數，現在式用 predicts
✗ contemplates(沉思)/anticipates(預期)略弱；foresees 近義但原文用 predicts 表明確預測未來
空格 2molecular molecule / animal / molecular / organ
搭配molecular biologist 分子生物學家，固定職稱搭配
詞性修飾 biologist 需形容詞，molecular 為形容詞

The extent to which they are important, or whether they even exist, depends mainly 2on two factors. One, obviously, is the size of an identifiable peasantry, or the size of the rural relative to the urban population. The other is a matter of social integration: 3for agrarian parties to be relative to the urban population. The other is a matter of social integration: for agrarian parties to be important, the representation of countryside or peasantry must not be integrated with the other major sections of society. 4Thus , a country might possess a sizeable rural population, but have an economic system in which the interests of the voters were predominantly related to their incomes, 5rather than system in which the interests of the voters were predominantly related to their incomes, rather than their occupations or location; and in such a country the political system would be unlikely to include an on as to within for as even_if although Thus Moreover Nonetheless After_all
空格 1which which / whom / where / that
搭配The extent to which 在何種程度上，to which 固定關係子句結構
詞性先行詞 extent 為物，介系詞 to 後用 which 不用 that/whom
✗ whom 指人；where/that 不能用於 to ___ 結構（介系詞後不接 that）
空格 2on on / as / to / within
搭配depends on two factors 取決於兩個因素，depend on 固定片語
✗ as/to/within 皆不搭 depend ___ 構成「取決於」
空格 3for for / as / although
詞性for agrarian parties to be important 不定詞的意義主詞結構 for + 名詞 + to V
搭配for sb/sth to do 表「要使…」，固定句型
✗ as/although 為連接詞，無法引導 ___ + 名詞 + to be 的不定詞主詞結構
空格 4Thus Thus / Moreover / Nonetheless
語意承上推論「因此一國可能…」，Thus 表結論性因果
✗ Moreover(此外)為添加；Nonetheless(儘管如此)為轉折，皆不合此處推論語氣
空格 5rather rather / instead / more / apart
搭配rather than 而非，related to incomes rather than occupations，rather than 固定對比片語
✗ instead 須單獨或 instead of；more/apart 皆不能直接接 than 構成此對比

It helps to ensure that the nation’s published output intellectual record 1and future published heritage) is collected systematically, to 2preserve the output intellectual record and future published heritage) is collected systematically, to preserve the material for the use of future generations and to make it available for 3readers within the designated legal deposit libraries. The legal deposit system also has 4benefits for authors and publishers: Deposited legal deposit libraries. The legal deposit system also has benefits for authors and publishers: Deposited publications are made available to users of the deposit libraries on their premises, are preserved for the benefit of future generations, and become part of the nation’s heritage. Publications are recorded the benefit of future generations, and become part of the nation’s heritage. Publications are recorded in the online catalogues, and become an essential 5research resource for generations to come. reserve preserve protest protect customers stakeholders readers users drawbacks meanings usages benefits
空格 1and and / thereby / its / ignorant / memorable / considerate
詞性the nation's published output ___ intellectual record 連接兩名詞片語，用對等連接詞 and
語意出版產出「與」智識紀錄並列，and 表並列
✗ thereby/its 無法連接兩並列名詞；ignorant/memorable/considerate 為形容詞詞性不符
空格 2preserve reserve / preserve / protest / protect
語意to ___ the material for future generations 「保存」材料供後代，preserve 表保存
搭配preserve material for future generations 保存資料供後代，固定搭配
✗ reserve(預留)/protest(抗議)/protect(保護偏防禦)皆不如 preserve 貼合「典藏保存」
空格 3readers customers / stakeholders / readers / users
語意available for ___ within the legal deposit libraries 供圖書館內的「讀者」使用
✗ customers/stakeholders/users 較不貼圖書館語境，原文用 readers（讀者）
空格 4benefits drawbacks / meanings / usages / benefits
搭配has benefits for authors and publishers 對作者出版商有「益處」，have benefits for 固定搭配

✗ drawbacks(缺點)語意相反；meanings/usages 不搭「對…有益處」

空格 1medicine medicine / subscription / recommendation / description
語意句意「經營醫院的人不只需要懂醫學 (know medicine)」，與後文 balance budgets、make marketing/legal decisions 對比
✗ subscription 訂閱、recommendation 推薦、description 描述都與「醫院經營者該懂的本業」語意不合。
空格 2able able / professional / proficient / sensible
搭配固定搭配 be able to + 原形動詞 (must also be able to balance...)，後面接 to balance
✗ professional/proficient/sensible 後面不接 to do 不定式，無法構成 be ___ to 句型。

搭配固定搭配 a large and diverse staff，staff 作集合名詞指全體員工
語意motivate a ___「激勵...團隊」語意上要整體員工而非單一同事
✗ colleague/co_worker 指個別同事與 a large and diverse 不搭；volunteer 志工語意不合。
空格 4decisions decisions / propositions / perceptions / actions
搭配固定搭配 make decisions（做決定），與 marketing and legal 修飾相符
✗ make propositions/perceptions/actions 都非英語自然搭配，make decisions 才是慣用。

Equitable and sustainable management of water resources is a major global challenge. About one third of the world’s population lives in countries with moderate to high water stress, with of the world’s population lives in countries with moderate to high water stress, with 1disproportionately high impacts on the poor. With respect to the 2current projected human population growth, industrial development and the expansion of irrigated agriculture in the next two 3decades, growth, industrial development and the expansion of irrigated agriculture in the next two decades water demand is expected to rise to levels that will make the task of providing water for human 4sustenance more difficult. Since its establishment, the United Nations Environment Programme (UNEP) has worked to promote sustainable water resources management practices through 5collaborative has worked to promote sustainable water resources management practices through collaborative approaches at the national, regional and global levels. After more than 30 years, water resources management continues to be a strong pillar of UNEP’S work. UNEP is actively participating in management continues to be a strong pillar of UNEP’S work. UNEP is actively participating in addressing water issues together with partner UN 6agencies, agencies , other organisations and donors. the facilitate and catalyse water resource assessments in various developing countries; implement projects facilitate and catalyse water resource assessments in various developing countries; implement projects that assist countries in developing integrated water resource management plans; create awareness of innovative alternative technologies and assist the development. implementation and enforcement of innovative alternative technologies and assist the development. implementation and enforcement of water resource management policies, laws and regulations.
空格 1disproportionately disproportionately / reasonably / significantly / proportionately
語意句意「對窮人有不成比例 (disproportionately) 的高度衝擊」，強調影響落在弱勢身上不均
詞性副詞修飾形容詞 high，___ high impacts
✗ proportionately 成比例語意相反；reasonably/significantly 雖是副詞但缺「對窮人不公」的對比意味。
空格 2current temporary / outdated / past / current
語意與後文 projected... in the next two decades（未來預測）對照，指「當前的」人口增長
✗ temporary/outdated/past 都帶過去或暫時意味，與後接的「未來二十年預測」時間軸矛盾。
空格 3decades periods / decades / ages / stages
搭配固定搭配 the next two decades（未來二十年），decades 指「十年」單位
✗ periods 太籠統、ages 不作此時間單位、stages 指階段，皆不搭 next two。
空格 4sustenance substitution / substance / material / sustenance
搭配固定搭配 water for human sustenance（供人類生存所需的水），sustenance 指維生
✗ substitution 替代、substance 物質、material 材料皆與「供水維生」語意不合。
空格 5collaborative coordinative / proportional / collaborative / departed
語意後文 together with partner UN agencies, other organisations 點明合作，故為 collaborative approaches（協作方式）
詞性形容詞修飾名詞 approaches
✗ coordinative 較不自然、proportional 成比例、departed 離開皆與「協作」語意不符。
空格 6agencies entities / agencies / institutes / organisations
搭配固定搭配 partner UN agencies（聯合國夥伴機構），與下文 UN agencies 重複呼應
✗ entities/institutes/organisations 雖近義，但 UN ___ 慣用 agencies，且 organisations 在同句後段已出現避免重複。
47.Northern spotted owls (北方斑點貓頭鷹)4 格#080047
Our analysis of the genetic structure of northern spotted owls across most of the range of the Our analysis of the genetic structure of northern spotted owls across most of the range of the subspecies allowed us to test for genetic discontinuities and identify landscape features that influence the subspecies’ genetic structure. Although no 1distinct genetic breaks were found in northern the subspecies’ genetic structure. Although no distinct genetic breaks were found in northern spotted owls, 2several landscape features were important in structuring genetic variation. Dry, low elevation valleys and the high elevation Cascade and Olympic Mountains restricted gene flow, while elevation valleys and the high elevation Cascade and Olympic Mountains restricted gene flow, while the lower Oregon Coast Range 3facilitated gene flow, acting as a “genetic corridor.” The Columbia River did not act as a barrier, 4suggesting owls readily fly over this large river. Thus, even in taxa such as River did not act as a barrier, suggesting owls readily fly over this large river. Thus, even in taxa such as northern spotted owls with potential for long-distance dispersal, landscape features can have an important impact on gene flow and genetic structure. important impact on gene flow and genetic structure. vague identical distinct varied several numerous plenty much quitted facilitated prevented permitted
空格 1distinct vague / identical / distinct / varied
搭配固定搭配 distinct genetic breaks（明顯的基因斷層），distinct 指清楚可辨
語意Although no ___ breaks were found 表示未發現明顯區隔，與後文 several features were important 形成轉折
✗ vague 模糊、identical 完全相同、varied 多樣，都不修飾 breaks 表「明顯」之意。
空格 2several several / numerous / plenty / much
單複數後接可數複數 landscape features，several 修飾可數名詞
語意語意「好幾個」地景特徵，程度適中合理
✗ much 修飾不可數；plenty 須作 plenty of；numerous 雖可，但語境「好幾個」用 several 最貼切。
空格 3facilitated quitted / facilitated / prevented / permitted
語意與前句 restricted gene flow 對比，海岸低地「促進 (facilitated) 基因流動」，後接 acting as a genetic corridor 佐證
時態與前句 restricted 並列用過去式
✗ prevented 阻止與 corridor（通道）矛盾；quitted 停止不通；permitted 允許語氣弱於「促進」。
空格 4suggesting proved / suggesting / suggested / proving
時態分詞構句 ..., suggesting owls readily fly over，現在分詞接主句補充說明
詞性逗號後引導分詞片語，不可用 suggested(完成式語意)/proved
✗ suggested/proved 為過去式無法接續分詞構句；proving 雖為分詞但 prove 此處語意過強（證明 vs 暗示）。

The promotion marks the 3culmination of many years of hard work for these legal 4eagles who are the first to rise to this 5level from the firm's Cadet Lawyer program with these legal eagles who are the first to rise to this level from the firm's Cadet Lawyer program with
空格 1successfully absolutely / successfully / definitely / apparently
搭配固定搭配 successfully risen through the ranks（成功晉升），副詞修飾動詞
詞性副詞修飾現在完成式 have ___ risen
✗ absolutely/definitely/apparently 雖為副詞，但與「升遷晉升」搭配不自然，successfully 才切題。
空格 2appointed appointed / assigned / allocated / arranged
搭配固定搭配 be appointed (as) Associates（被任命為合夥人），appoint 用於職位任命
✗ assigned/allocated 多指分派任務或資源、arranged 安排，皆不用於「任命為某職位」。
空格 3culmination accumulation / culmination / possession / obsession
搭配固定搭配 the culmination of many years of hard work（多年努力的最終成果）
語意marks the ___ 指升遷標誌著努力的頂點
✗ accumulation 累積、possession 擁有、obsession 執念，皆不搭 the ___ of years of hard work 之「集大成」語意。
空格 4eagles hawks / pigeons / mammals / eagles
搭配固定說法 legal eagles（法律精英／能幹律師）的慣用語
✗ hawks/pigeons/mammals 皆非與 legal 連用的慣用語，legal eagles 才是固定俗語。
空格 5level bottom / level / ranking / situation
搭配固定搭配 rise to this level（升到這個層級），與前文 risen through the ranks 呼應
✗ bottom 底層語意相反；ranking/situation 不與 rise to this ___ 自然搭配。
49.Roman arena (羅馬競技場)5 格#080049
The Romans glorified the 1bravery shown in the arena, but 2trivialized the events and degraded the The Romans glorified the bravery shown in the arena, but trivialized the events and degraded the participants. Mosaic pictures of executions and combats, 3graphically violent to our eyes, were displayed in the public rooms and even dining rooms in the homes of wealthy Romans. How can the displayed in the public rooms and even dining rooms in the homes of wealthy Romans. How can the viewer today possibly understand such images? Until fairly recently, modern authors writing about the arena minimized its significance and 4represented the institutionalized violence as a sideline to Roman arena minimized its significance and represented the institutionalized violence as a sideline to Roman history. The 5tendency was also to view the events through our own eyes and to see them as pitiful or horrifying, although to most Romans empathy with victims of the arena was inconceivable. In the past horrifying, although to most Romans empathy with victims of the arena was inconceivable. In the past few decades, however, scholars have started to analyze the complex motivations for deadly public entertainments and for contradictory views of gladiators as despised, yet beloved hero-slaves. entertainments and for contradictory views of gladiators as despised, yet beloved hero-slaves. slandered trivialized lionized praised vividly graphically vaguely moderately rewarded represented presumed absented
空格 1bravery chivalry / bravery / bravado / scaramouch
搭配固定搭配 glorified the bravery shown in the arena（頌揚競技場展現的勇氣）
語意與後文 degraded the participants 對比，先褒勇氣再貶參與者
✗ chivalry 騎士精神、bravado 虛張聲勢（貶義）、scaramouch 懦夫小丑，皆不合「被頌揚的勇氣」。
空格 2trivialized slandered / trivialized / lionized / praised
語意與 glorified 形成 but 轉折，且與後並列 degraded，意為「輕視淡化 (trivialized) 事件」
時態與 glorified、degraded 並列用過去式
✗ lionized/praised 為褒義與轉折語氣 but 不合；slandered 誹謗對象通常是人不是 events。
空格 3graphically vividly / graphically / vaguely / moderately
搭配固定搭配 graphically violent（畫面血腥逼真），graphic 指描繪露骨
詞性副詞修飾形容詞 violent
✗ vividly 生動偏中性、vaguely 模糊與 violent 矛盾、moderately 適度語氣太弱。
空格 4represented rewarded / represented / presumed / absented
語意與 minimized its significance 並列，意為「將制度化暴力描繪 (represented) 成羅馬史的邊枝」
時態與 minimized 並列用過去式
✗ rewarded 獎賞、presumed 假定、absented 缺席皆與「描繪呈現為 a sideline」語意不合。
空格 5tendency movement / expectation / tendency / implication
搭配固定搭配 The tendency was also to view...（傾向也是去...），tendency + to do
語意指學界過去的「傾向」用自身眼光看待事件
✗ movement 運動、expectation 期待、implication 暗示，皆不搭 the ___ was to view 之「傾向」。
50.Definition of Country (國家的定義)5 格#080050
What is a country, and how is a country defined? When people ask how many countries there are in the world, they expect a simple answer. After all, we've explored the 1whole planet, we have the world, they expect a simple answer. After all, we've explored the whole planet, we have international travel, satellite navigation and plenty of global organizations like the United Nations, 2so we should really know how many countries there are! However, the answer to the question varies we should really know how many countries there are! However, the answer to the question varies according to whom you ask. 3Most people say there are 192 countries, but others point out that there could be more like 260 of them. 4So why isn't there a straightforward answer? The problem arises could be more like 260 of them. So why isn't there a straightforward answer? The problem arises because there isn't a universally agreed definition of 'country' and because, for political reasons, some countries find it convenient to recognize or not recognize 5other countries. countries find it convenient to recognize or not recognize other countries. so but although despite Most Plenty Less More So But Although Despite
空格 1whole whole / identical / each / unique
搭配固定搭配 the whole planet（整個地球），whole + 單數名詞
✗ identical/unique 修飾語意不合；each 須接單數且不與 the 連用，無法構成 the ___ planet。
空格 2so so / but / although / despite
語意前列舉探索成果，故用 so（因此）導出 we should really know 的結論
詞性連接詞引導結果子句
✗ but/although/despite 表轉折或讓步，與「因此我們應該知道」的順承因果不合。
空格 3Most Most / Plenty / Less / More
單複數後接複數動詞 ___ people say，Most people 表「大多數人」
語意與後句 others point out 的少數對比
✗ Plenty 須作 plenty of people；Less 修飾不可數；More 缺乏比較對象，皆不合 ___ people say 結構。
空格 4So So / But / Although / Despite
語意承上意見分歧，故問 So why isn't there a straightforward answer?（所以為何沒有明確答案）
詞性句首連接副詞引導疑問
✗ But/Although/Despite 表轉折讓步，與順承提問「所以為什麼」不合。
空格 5other many / other / those / these
搭配固定搭配 recognize other countries（承認其他國家），other + 複數名詞
✗ those/these 為指示詞需有特定指涉；many 數量詞語意偏離「其他」之意，other 才合 recognize ___ countries。
51.The Origin of Music (音樂的起源)6 格#080051
Music is an important part of our lives. We connect and interact with it daily and use it as a way of projecting our self-identities to the people around us. The music we enjoy – whether it’s country or projecting our self-identities to the people around us. The music we enjoy – whether it’s country or classical, rock n’ roll or rap – 1reflects who we are. But where did music, at its core, first come from? It’s a puzzling question that may not have a definitive answer. One 2leading researcher, however, has It’s a puzzling question that may not have a definitive answer. One leading researcher, however, has proposed that the key to understanding the origin of music is nestled snugly in the loving bond between mother and child. In a lecture at the University of Melbourne, Richard Parncutt, an Australian- between mother and child. In a lecture at the University of Melbourne, Richard Parncutt, an Australian- born professor of systematic musicology, endorsed the idea that music originally spawned from ‘motherese’ – the playful voices mothers 3adopt when speaking to 4infants and toddlers. As the ‘motherese’ – the playful voices mothers adopt when speaking to infants and toddlers. As the theory goes, increased human brain sizes caused by evolutionary changes occurring between one and 2,000,000 years ago resulted in earlier births, more fragile infants and a 5critical need for stronger 2,000,000 years ago resulted in earlier births, more fragile infants and a critical need for stronger relationships between mothers and their newborn babies. According to Parncutt, who is based at the University of Graz in Austria, ‘motherese’ arose as a way to strengthen this maternal bond and to help 6ensure an infant’s survival. help ensure an infant’s survival. junior leading major freelance adopt make accept discard adolescents children infants seniors
空格 1reflects ponders / reflects / convinces / deliberates
語意句意「我們喜愛的音樂反映 (reflects) 我們是誰」，後接 who we are
單複數主詞 The music 為單數，動詞用第三人稱單數 reflects
✗ ponders 沉思、deliberates 審慎考慮須有思考主體；convinces 說服語意不合「反映自我」。
空格 2leading junior / leading / major / freelance
搭配固定搭配 a leading researcher（頂尖／權威研究者）
詞性形容詞修飾名詞 researcher
✗ junior 資淺與後文「提出理論的權威」矛盾；major/freelance 不與 researcher 自然搭配表「頂尖」。
空格 3adopt adopt / make / accept / discard
搭配固定搭配 adopt voices（採用某種語氣），the voices mothers ___ when speaking
時態省略關代的定語從句，主詞 mothers 用原形 adopt
✗ make/accept/discard 與 voices 搭配不自然，adopt a voice/tone 才是慣用。
空格 4infants adolescents / children / infants / seniors
語意與 toddlers 並列，指母親對 infants and toddlers（嬰兒與幼兒）說話，後文亦反覆出現 infant
單複數複數名詞與 and toddlers 並列
✗ adolescents 青少年、seniors 長者與「母嬰互動」矛盾；children 太廣，與 toddlers 並列時 infants 更精確。
空格 5critical critical / insignificant / foundation / virtual
搭配固定搭配 a critical need（迫切／關鍵的需求）
詞性形容詞修飾名詞 need
✗ insignificant 不重要語意相反；foundation 為名詞不能修飾 need；virtual 虛擬語意不合。
空格 6ensure defend / ascertain / shield / ensure
搭配固定搭配 ensure an infant's survival（確保嬰兒存活），ensure + 受詞
時態to help ___ 不定式接原形動詞
✗ defend 防禦、shield 保護需接「對象 from 威脅」；ascertain 指查明確認事實，皆不如 ensure survival 自然。
52.Lure New Students (引誘新生)5 格#080052
In an attempt to 1lure new students, leading business schools-including Harvard, Stanford, the University of Chicago and Wharton – have moved away from the unofficial admissions and 2prerequisite University of Chicago and Wharton – have moved away from the unofficial admissions and prerequisite of four years’ work experience and 3instead have set their sights on recent college graduates and so- called ‘early career 4professionals with only a couple years of work under the 5belt. called ‘early career professionals with only a couple years of work under the belt lure motivate prevail seduce exclusion prerequisite prohibition retardation preferably despite instead nevertheless
空格 1lure lure / motivate / prevail / seduce
搭配固定搭配 lure new students（吸引／招攬新生），lure + 受詞
時態介系詞 to 後接原形動詞 to lure
✗ motivate 激勵現有對象、prevail 盛行不及物、seduce 引誘帶負面色彩，皆不如 lure students 自然。
空格 2prerequisite exclusion / prerequisite / prohibition / retardation
語意句意「四年工作經驗的先決條件 (prerequisite)」，指入學的必備要件
搭配prerequisite of four years' work experience 固定搭配
✗ exclusion 排除、prohibition 禁止、retardation 遲緩皆與「必備條件」語意相反或不合。
空格 3instead preferably / despite / instead / nevertheless
語意前句 moved away from... 放棄舊條件，故用 instead（取而代之）轉向招收應屆畢業生
✗ preferably 寧可、despite/nevertheless 表讓步轉折，皆不如 instead 表「改而採取」的替換關係。
空格 4professionals professionals / eagles / candidates / elites
搭配固定搭配 early career professionals（職涯初期的專業人士）
單複數複數名詞，前有 so-called 引號片語
✗ eagles/candidates/elites 與 early career 搭配不自然，professionals 才是慣用職場用語。
空格 5belt belt / contract / table / control
搭配固定俗語 under the belt（已具備的經驗），with only a couple years of work under the belt
✗ contract/table/control 皆無此俗語，under one's belt 才是「累積／到手」的慣用語。
53.Serving on a Jury (擔任陪審團成員)4 格#080053
Serving on a jury is normally compulsory for individuals who are 1qualified for jury service. A jury is 2intended to be an impartial panel capable of reaching a verdict. There are often 3procedures and intended to be an impartial panel capable of reaching a verdict. There are often procedures and requirements, including a fluent understanding of the language and the opportunity to test juror’s neutrality or otherwise exclude jurors who are perceived as likely to be less than 4neutral or partial to neutrality or otherwise exclude jurors who are perceived as likely to be less than neutral or partial to
空格 1qualified qualified / competent / practical / sensible
搭配固定搭配 qualified for jury service（具陪審資格），be qualified for
語意句意「合格 (qualified) 的人有服陪審義務」
✗ competent/practical/sensible 不與 for jury service 構成「具資格」固定搭配，qualified for 才正確。
空格 2intended able / intended / likely / qualified
搭配固定搭配 be intended to be（旨在成為），A jury is ___ to be an impartial panel
語意語意「陪審團旨在作為公正的審議小組」
✗ able/likely 後接 to do 但語意（能夠/可能）不合「旨在」；qualified to be 搭配生硬。
空格 3procedures needs / precedents / procedures / necessities
搭配固定搭配 procedures and requirements（程序與要求）
單複數與 requirements 並列用複數
✗ needs/necessities 指需求、precedents 指判例先例，皆不與 requirements 並列表「程序」。
空格 4neutral subjective / indifferent / supportive / neutral
語意前文 test juror's neutrality 已點明中立，故排除「不夠中立 less than neutral」的陪審員
搭配與 neutrality 同根呼應，less than neutral 固定搭配
✗ subjective 主觀、indifferent 冷漠、supportive 支持皆非與 neutrality 呼應的「中立」對應詞。
54.New Zealand (新西蘭)5 格#080054
Twelve hundred miles east of Australia 1lay the islands of New Zealand. Long before they were Twelve hundred miles east of Australia lay the islands of New Zealand. Long before they were 2discovered by Europeans, a Polynesian race of warriors, the Maoris, had sailed across the Pacific from the northeast and established a civilization 3notable for the brilliance of its art and the strength of its the northeast and established a civilization notable for the brilliance of its art and the strength of its military 4system . When Captain Cook visited these islands towards the end of the 18th century, he 5estimated that the population numbered about a hundred thousand. estimated that the population numbered about a hundred thousand. detected discovered conceded acknowledged
空格 1lay place / set / lay / locate
時態倒裝句 Twelve hundred miles east of Australia ___ the islands，地點副詞前置主詞後移，用不及物 lay（lie 的過去式）
詞性lie-lay-lain 不及物表「位於」，此處過去式 lay
✗ place/set/locate 為及物動詞需受詞，且須變化形；此倒裝結構主詞在後，須用不及物 lay。
空格 2discovered detected / discovered / conceded / acknowledged
搭配固定搭配 discovered by Europeans（被歐洲人發現）
時態被動語態 before they were ___ by 用過去分詞
✗ detected 偵測、conceded 承認(讓步)、acknowledged 認可皆與「發現新大陸／島嶼」語意不合。
空格 3notable fabulous / outstanding / evident / notable
搭配固定搭配 notable for（以...著稱），a civilization ___ for the brilliance of its art
詞性形容詞 + for 接原因
✗ fabulous/outstanding/evident 後接 for 不構成「以...著稱」慣用，notable for 才正確。
空格 4system system / configuration / edifice / structure
搭配固定搭配 military system（軍事制度／體系）
語意與 the strength of its ___ 連用指軍事體系的強大
✗ configuration/edifice/structure 雖近義，但 military system 為慣用搭配，其餘與 military 連用不自然。
空格 5estimated estimated / calculated / presumed / measured
搭配固定搭配 estimated that the population numbered about...（估計人口約為），estimate 用於概估數字
語意與 about a hundred thousand（約十萬，近似值）呼應
✗ calculated/measured 指精算或量測與 about（約略）矛盾；presumed 假定缺乏數字估算意味。
55.Standard English (標准英語)4 格#080055
At the beginning of the twenty-first century, the relationship between standard and nonstandard language is, evidently, still an uncertain one. We are at a 1transitional point between two eras. We seem to be leaving an era when the rules of Standard English, as elected and defined by prescriptive grammarians, totally conditioned our sense of 2acceptable usage, so that all other usages and varieties were considered to be inferior or corrupt, and excluded from serious consideration. And we seem to be approaching an era when nonstandard usages and varieties, previously denigrated or ignored, are achieving a new presence and 3respectability within society, reminiscent of that found in Middle English, when dialect variation in literature was widespread and uncontentious. But we are not there yet. The rise of Standard English has resulted in a confrontation between the standard and nonstandard dimensions of the language which has lasted for over 200 years, and this has had traumatic 4consequences which will take some years to eliminate. Once people have been given an inferiority complex about the way they speak or write, they find it difficult to shake off. transitional transactional transferable transient
空格 1transitional transitional / transactional / transferable / transient
搭配固定搭配 a transitional point（過渡點），後接 between two eras 佐證
語意語意「兩個時代之間的過渡階段」
✗ transactional 交易的、transferable 可轉讓的、transient 短暫的，皆不合「兩時代間的過渡」之意。
空格 2acceptable commendable / acceptable / eloquent / sufficient
搭配固定搭配 acceptable usage（可接受的用法），our sense of ___ usage
語意與後文 inferior or corrupt（低劣／敗壞）對比，指「可接受」的標準
✗ commendable 值得稱讚、eloquent 雄辯、sufficient 足夠，皆不修飾 usage 表「可接受性」。
空格 3respectability dependence / respectability / expectation / reliance
搭配固定搭配 a new presence and respectability（新的地位與受尊重），與 within society 連用
語意指非標準用法正獲得「尊重認可」
✗ dependence/reliance 依賴、expectation 期待，皆與「獲得社會尊重」語意不合。
空格 4consequences principles / controversies / quarrels / consequences
搭配固定搭配 traumatic consequences（創傷性後果），this has had ___
語意與後文 take some years to eliminate（需數年消除）呼應，指對立造成的後果
✗ principles 原則、controversies 爭議、quarrels 爭吵皆與 traumatic 及「需時間消除的後果」不合。
56.Joseph Engelberger (約瑟夫·恩格爾伯格)5 格#080056
Joseph Engelberger, a pioneer in industrial robotics, once remarked “I can't 1define a robot but I know one when I see one” If you consider all the different 2machines people 3call robots, you can see that it's nearly impossible to come up with a 4comprehensive definition. Everybody has a 5different idea of what clarify distinguish define simplify devices machines instruments equipments
空格 1define clarify / distinguish / define / simplify
搭配固定搭配 define a robot（定義機器人），I can't ___ a robot
語意與下文 come up with a comprehensive definition 呼應
✗ clarify 澄清、distinguish 區辨、simplify 簡化皆與「給出定義」語意不合。
空格 2machines devices / machines / instruments / equipments
搭配固定搭配 machines people call robots（人們稱為機器人的機器）
單複數複數可數名詞 different ___，後接 call robots
✗ equipments 不可數無複數形（文法錯）；devices/instruments 雖可，但 robots 屬 machines 的慣用上位詞。
空格 3call say / refine / define / call
搭配固定搭配 call X robots（把 X 稱為機器人），machines people ___ robots
時態定語從句主詞 people 用原形 call
✗ say 不接雙受詞；refine 精煉、define 此處重複且語意不合，call...robots 才是「稱為」結構。
空格 4comprehensive unrivalled / comprehensive / complicated / solitary
搭配固定搭配 a comprehensive definition（全面性的定義）
詞性形容詞修飾名詞 definition
✗ unrivalled 無與倫比、complicated 複雜、solitary 唯一皆不修飾 definition 表「周全」。
空格 5different different / identical / commensurate / perfective
搭配固定搭配 a different idea（不同的看法），Everybody has a ___ idea
語意呼應主題「人人看法不一，故難下定義」
✗ identical 完全相同語意相反；commensurate 相稱、perfective 完成貌皆不合「各有不同看法」。
57.A Dog (一只狗)5 格#080057
A DOG may be man's best friend. But man is not always a dog's. Over the centuries 1selective breeding has pulled at the canine body shape to produce what is often a grotesque distortion of the underlying wolf. Indeed, some of these distortions are, when found in people, regarded as 2pathologies . Dog breeding does, though, offer a chance to those who would like to understand how body shape is controlled. The ancestry of pedigree pooches is well recorded, their generation time is short and their 3litter size reasonably large, so there is plenty of material to work with. 4Moreover, Moreover , breeds are, by definition, inbred, and this simplifies genetic analysis. Those such as Elaine Ostrander, of America's National Human Genome Research Institute, who wish to identify the genetic basis of the features of particular pedigrees thus have an 5ideal experimental animal. pandemics epidemics pathologies medications brood household litter kin Hence However Moreover Nevertheless
空格 1selective exclusive / excessive / selective / scrupulous
搭配固定搭配 selective breeding（選擇性育種／選育）
詞性形容詞修飾名詞 breeding
✗ exclusive 獨家、excessive 過度、scrupulous 嚴謹皆不與 breeding 構成「選育」術語。
空格 2pathologies pandemics / epidemics / pathologies / medications
語意句意「這些變形在人身上被視為病理／病態 (pathologies)」，regarded as ___
單複數複數名詞對應前文 distortions（複數）
✗ pandemics/epidemics 指大規模流行病、medications 指藥物，皆與「個體身上的病態」語意不合。
空格 3litter brood / household / litter / kin
搭配固定搭配 litter size（一胎產仔數），their ___ size reasonably large
語意談犬隻繁殖，litter 指一窩幼崽
✗ brood 多指鳥類雛群、household 家庭、kin 親屬皆不用於犬隻「一窩幼崽」的 litter size。
空格 4Moreover Hence / However / Moreover / Nevertheless
語意前列舉育種研究的有利條件，故用 Moreover（此外）再加一條 inbred 的優勢，為遞進關係
✗ However/Nevertheless 表轉折、Hence 表因果，皆不合此處「再補充一項優點」的遞進語氣。
空格 5ideal representative / attainable / theoretical / ideal
搭配固定搭配 an ideal experimental animal（理想的實驗動物）
語意總結前述優勢，犬隻是「理想」研究對象
✗ representative 具代表性、attainable 可達成、theoretical 理論的皆不如 ideal 切合「總結為理想對象」。
58.Trinity Sport and Fitness (叁一運動與健身)5 格#080058
Whether you want to exercise and stay 1healthy , train professionally with like-minded people, or indulge your competitive streak, Trinity Sport and Fitness 2has it covered . We've got a dedicated indulge your competitive streak, Trinity Sport and Fitness has it covered . We've got a dedicated support development team on campus to support every student in taking part in sports. You might want to participate in sports competitions volunteer with a local sports class or simply play for 3fun with want to participate in sports competitions volunteer with a local sports class or simply play for fun with our social sport program. Trinity fitness members of our public-facing sports facility will also 4entitle you to discounts when you are booking a sports facility and fitness class. You will also get an you to discounts when you are booking a sports facility and fitness class. You will also get an opportunity to 5benefit from tailored personal training, free activities events, and lots more. 2 has_it_covered is_covered will_be_covered has_the_coverage
空格 1healthy healthy / jubilant / still / tranquil
搭配stay healthy 為固定搭配，指「保持健康」
✗ jubilant（歡欣）、still（靜止）、tranquil（寧靜）皆不與 exercise and stay 構成運動健身語境的慣用搭配。
空格 2has it covered has it covered / is covered / will be covered / has the coverage
搭配have it covered 為固定片語，意為「全都搞定、一手包辦」
時態主詞 Trinity 為單數第三人稱，用 has
✗ is covered / will be covered 為被動，主詞變成「被覆蓋」語意不通；has the coverage 不慣用。
空格 3fun work / cash / fun / life
搭配play for fun 為固定搭配，意為「為樂趣而玩」
✗ work、cash、life 皆不與 play for 構成「純為娛樂」的慣用片語。
空格 4entitle entitle / consume / supply / designate
搭配entitle you to discounts 為固定搭配，指「使你有資格享折扣」
✗ consume、supply、designate 皆無法構成 entitle sb to sth 的授權語意。
空格 5benefit benefit / learn / engage / participate
搭配benefit from 為固定搭配，意為「從…受益」，後接 tailored personal training
✗ learn/engage 不接 from 此語意；participate 須接 in，與後文 from 不符。
59.MBA Programmes (MBA課程)5 格#080059
Deciding to go to business school is perhaps the simplest part of what can be a complicated process. Deciding to go to business school is perhaps the simplest part of what can be a complicated process. With nearly 600 accredited MBA programmes on 1offer around the world, the choice of where to study can be overwhelming. Here we explain how to 2choose the right school and course for you and unravel can be overwhelming. Here we explain how to choose the right school and course for you and unravel the application and funding process. "Probably the 3majority of people applying to business school are at a point in their careers where they know they 4want to shake things up, but they don't know exactly at a point in their careers where they know they want to shake things up, but they don't know exactly what they want to do with their professional lives," says Stacy Blackman, an MBA admissions consultant based in Los Angeles. "If that's the case with you, look at other 5criteria : culture, teaching consultant based in Los Angeles. "If that's the case with you, look at other criteria : culture, teaching method, location, and then pick a place that’s a good fit for you with a strong general management programme. Super-defined career goals don’t have to be a part of this process." programme. Super-defined career goals don’t have to be a part of this process." accept choose designate locate adolescence contingent majority minority expect acquire want accept
空格 1offer offer / effect / availability / impact
搭配固定片語 on offer（提供中／可選），MBA programmes on ___ around the world
✗ effect/impact 影響、availability 可得性皆不與 on ___ 構成「提供中」片語，on offer 才正確。
空格 2choose accept / choose / designate / locate
搭配固定搭配 choose the right school（選擇合適的學校），how to ___ the right school and course
✗ accept 接受、designate 指派、locate 找出位置皆與「挑選合適學校」語意不合。
空格 3majority adolescence / contingent / majority / minority
搭配固定搭配 the majority of people（大多數人），Probably the ___ of people applying
語意指多數申請者處於職涯想轉變的階段
✗ minority 少數語意相反；adolescence 青春期、contingent 分隊皆不接 the ___ of people 表「大多數」。
空格 4want expect / acquire / want / accept
搭配固定搭配 want to do（想要做），they ___ to shake things up，與下句 want to do 呼應
時態want + to do 不定式
✗ expect/acquire/accept 後接 to do 語意不合「想要改變現狀」，且與下文 don't know what they want to do 平行用 want。
空格 5criteria standardization / guidelines / pinciples / criteria
語意句意「看其他標準 (criteria)：文化、教學法、地點」，後接冒號列舉佐證
搭配look at other ___ 指考量的「準則」
✗ standardization 標準化、guidelines 指南、pinciples(拼寫誤) 皆不如 criteria 切合「列舉多項評選標準」。
60.Roman army (羅馬軍隊)4 格#080060
Over many centuries and across many territories the Romans were able to win an astonishing number of military victories and their success was due to several important factors. Italy was a peninsula not of military victories and their success was due to several important factors. Italy was a peninsula not easily attacked. 1There was a huge pool of fighting men to draw upon, a disciplined and innovative army, a centralized command and line of supply, expert engineers, effective diplomacy 2through a army, a centralized command and line of supply, expert engineers, effective diplomacy through a network of allies, and an inclusive approach to conquer people, 3which allowed for strengthening and broadening of the Roman power and logistical bases. 4Further , her allies not only supplied, equipped and paid for additional men but they also supplied vital materials such as grain and ships. On top of all and paid for additional men but they also supplied vital materials such as grain and ships. On top of all this Rome was more or less in a continuous state of war or readiness for it and believed absolutely in the necessity of defending and imposing on others what she firmly believed was her cultural the necessity of defending and imposing on others what she firmly believed was her cultural 1 There_has There_is There_was There_been 5 On_top_of Even_if Even_though Nevertheless
空格 1There was There has / There is / There was / There been
時態全文敘述羅馬歷史用過去式（were able to、was due to），故用 was
詞性There + be 存在句，後接 a huge pool 為單數，且需限定動詞
✗ There has / There been 缺乏完整動詞形式或助動詞錯誤；There is 時態與全文過去式不符。
空格 2through towards / upon / through / under
搭配through a network of allies「透過盟友網絡」，介系詞 through 表手段/媒介
✗ towards、upon、under 皆無法表達「透過某網絡達成外交」的手段語意。
空格 3which what / which / whom / who
詞性非限定關係子句先行詞為前面整件事/做法（非人），用 which
語意which allowed for... 補述前述包容做法帶來的結果
✗ what 不引導關係子句；whom/who 指人，先行詞非人。
空格 4Further Instead / Further / Although / Despite
語意語意：承接前述優勢再「進一步」補充盟友供應物資，遞進關係
✗ Instead（反而）、Although/Despite 表轉折讓步，與遞進補充的語意不符。
61.Jean Piaget (讓·皮亞傑)5 格#080061
Jean Piaget, the pioneering Swiss philosopher and psychologist, spent much of his professional life Jean Piaget, the pioneering Swiss philosopher and psychologist, spent much of his professional life listening to children, watching children and 1poring over reports of researchers around the world who were doing the same. He found, to put it most succinctly, that children don't think like grownups. After were doing the same. He found, to put it most succinctly, that children don't think like grownups. After thousands of interactions with young people often barely old enough to talk, Piaget began to 2suspect that behind their cute and seemingly illogical utterances were thought processes that had their own that behind their cute and seemingly illogical utterances were thought processes that had their own kind of order and their own special logic. Einstein called it a 3discovery “so simple that only a genius could have thought of it.” Piaget's insight opened a new window into the inner workings of the mind. could have thought of it.” Piaget's insight opened a new window into the inner workings of the mind. By the end of a wide-ranging and remarkably 4prolific research career that spanned nearly 75 years, from his first scientific publication at age 10 to work still in progress when he died at 84, Piaget had from his first scientific publication at age 10 to work still in progress when he died at 84, Piaget had developed several new fields of science: developmental psychology, cognitive theory and what came to be called genetic epistemology. Although not an educational reformer, he 5fashioned a way of to be called genetic epistemology. Although not an educational reformer, he fashioned a way of thinking about children that provided the foundation for today’s education-reform movements. It was a shift comparable to the displacement of stories of "noble savages” and "cannibals” by modern was a shift comparable to the displacement of stories of "noble savages” and "cannibals” by modern anthropology. One might say that Piaget was the first to take children's thinking seriously.
空格 1poring considering / poring / mediating / investigating
搭配固定片語動詞 pore over（仔細研讀），___ over reports of researchers
時態與 listening、watching 並列用現在分詞 -ing
✗ considering/investigating 不與 over 搭配；mediating 調解語意不合，pore over 才是「埋首鑽研」慣用。
空格 2suspect affirm / suspect / investigate / negate
搭配固定搭配 suspect that（推測／懷疑），Piaget began to ___ that
語意後接 seemingly illogical... were thought processes，指他「開始推測」背後另有邏輯
✗ affirm 斷言、negate 否定語氣過強；investigate 不接 that 子句表「推測」，suspect that 才正確。
空格 3discovery workshop / mystery / invention / discovery
語意Einstein 形容它為 a ___ so simple that only a genius could have thought of it，指皮亞傑的「發現」
搭配與後文 Piaget's insight 呼應，a discovery 指洞見成果
✗ workshop 工作坊、mystery 謎團、invention 發明皆不合「天才才想得到的簡單發現」語意。
空格 4prolific prolific / renown / reachable / acceptable
搭配固定搭配 a prolific research career（著作豐碩的研究生涯）
語意與後文 from age 10 to 84（產出不輟）呼應，指成果豐富
✗ renown 為名詞非形容詞（renowned 才對）；reachable/acceptable 與「豐碩生涯」語意不合。
空格 5fashioned destined / discovered / guided / fashioned
搭配固定搭配 fashion a way of thinking（打造一套思維方式），he ___ a way of thinking
時態主句過去式，與上文 had developed 時間軸一致
✗ destined 注定、discovered 發現、guided 引導皆不接 a way of thinking 表「形塑打造」，fashion 才正確。
62.Father’s Books (父親的書)5 格#080062
None of the books in my father’s dusty old bookcase were 1forbidden . Yet while I was growing up, I None of the books in my father’s dusty old bookcase were forbidden . Yet while I was growing up, I never saw anyone take one down. Most were 2massive tomes – a comprehensive history of civilization, matching volumes of the great works of western literature, numerous others I can no longer 3recall – matching volumes of the great works of western literature, numerous others I can no longer recall – that seemed almost fused to 4shelves that bowed slightly from decades of 5steadfast support?
空格 1forbidden forbidden / permitted / read / banned
語意句意「父親書架上沒有一本是被禁讀 (forbidden) 的」，與後文 never saw anyone take one down 的轉折呼應
時態被動語態 None... were ___ 用過去分詞
✗ permitted 允許語意相反；read 已讀與 None were 結構矛盾；banned 雖近義但 forbidden 更貼「家中禁書」語氣且與後文 Yet 轉折最順。
空格 2massive massive / complicated / complex / laborious
搭配固定搭配 massive tomes（厚重的大部頭書），Most were ___ tomes
語意與後文 a comprehensive history、matching volumes 呼應書本之巨
✗ complicated/complex 複雜、laborious 費力皆形容內容或過程，不形容書本「厚重龐大」的體積。
空格 3recall recall / summon / retrieve / retell
搭配固定搭配 no longer recall（再也記不起來），numerous others I can no longer ___
語意指記憶中「想不起」其他書名
✗ summon 召喚、retrieve 取回（資料）、retell 複述皆不合「(從記憶中)想起」，recall 才正確。
空格 4shelves cupboards / joinerys / shelves / cabinets
語意句意「書幾乎與書架 (shelves) 融為一體」，後接 that bowed slightly（微微下彎）佐證為層板
搭配fused to ___ that bowed，書本黏在「層板」上
✗ cupboards/cabinets 櫥櫃為封閉收納、joinerys 拼寫與語意皆不合；書本壓彎的是 shelves（層板）。
空格 5steadfast courageous / rigid / adamant / steadfast
搭配固定搭配 steadfast support（堅定不移的支撐），decades of ___ support
詞性形容詞修飾名詞 support
✗ courageous 勇敢、adamant 固執多形容人；rigid 僵硬偏負面，皆不如 steadfast 修飾「長年穩固的支撐」。
63.Economic Character (經濟特征)4 格#080063
One distinguishing feature of business is its economic character. In the world of business, we interact One distinguishing feature of business is its economic character. In the world of business, we interact with each other not as family members, friends, or neighbors, but as buyers and 1sellers , employers and employees, and the like. Trading, for example, is often 2accompanied by hard bargaining, in which and employees, and the like. Trading, for example, is often accompanied by hard bargaining, in which both sides conceal their full hand and perhaps engage in some bluffing. And a skilled salesperson is 3versed in the art of arousing a customer's attention (sometimes by a bit of puffery) to 4clinch the sale. versed in the art of arousing a customer's attention (sometimes by a bit of puffery) to clinch the sale. Still, there is an "ethics of trading" that prohibits the use of false or deceptive claims and tricks such as accompanied attended supported guarded keen delicated considerable versed fasten reach clinch promote
空格 1sellers purchasers / sellers / suppliers / stakeholders
搭配固定搭配 buyers and sellers（買方與賣方），as buyers and ___
語意與 buyers 對舉，下文 a skilled salesperson 亦呼應賣方
✗ purchasers 與 buyers 重複；suppliers 供應商、stakeholders 利害關係人皆不與 buyers 構成「買賣雙方」對舉。
空格 2accompanied accompanied / attended / supported / guarded
搭配固定搭配 be accompanied by（伴隨著），Trading is often ___ by hard bargaining
時態被動語態 is ___ by 用過去分詞
✗ attended/supported/guarded by 皆不表「伴隨」，accompanied by 才是慣用被動搭配。
空格 3versed keen / delicated / considerable / versed
搭配固定搭配 be versed in（精通），a skilled salesperson is ___ in the art of
語意與 skilled 呼應，指「嫻熟於」吸引顧客之術
✗ keen/considerable 後接 in 不表「精通」；delicated 為拼寫誤（dedicated）且不接 in，versed in 才正確。
空格 4clinch fasten / reach / clinch / promote
搭配固定搭配 clinch the sale/deal（敲定交易／成交）
時態目的不定式 to ___ the sale 接原形
✗ fasten 繫緊、reach 達到、promote 促銷皆不與 the sale 構成「成交」慣用，clinch the sale 才正確。
64.Two siblings (兩個兄弟姐妹)5 格#080064
No two siblings are the same, not even 1identical twins. Parents often 2puzzle about why their children are so different from one another. They’ ll say, I 3brought them up all the same. They forget that what are so different from one another. They’ ll say, I brought them up all the same. They forget that what 4determines our behaviour isn't what happens to us but how we 5interpret what happens to us, and no two people ever see anything in exactly the same way. two people ever see anything in exactly the same way. developed fed brought raised determines leads contributes impacts interpret interrupt introvert interact
空格 1identical identical / same / as / alike / fraternal
搭配固定搭配 identical twins（同卵雙胞胎），not even ___ twins
語意前文 No two siblings are the same，連同卵雙胞胎也不同
✗ same 須作 the same 不接 twins；as/alike 為比較用法不修飾 twins；fraternal twins(異卵)與「連這也不同」的強調語氣不合。
空格 2puzzle persume / inquiry / puzzle / confuse
搭配固定片語 puzzle about（對...感到困惑），Parents often ___ about why
時態主詞 Parents 複數用原形 puzzle
✗ persume(拼寫誤)/inquiry(名詞) 文法不符；confuse 須作 be confused about 或及物，不接 about why，puzzle about 才正確。
空格 3brought developed / fed / brought / raised
搭配固定片語動詞 bring up（養育），I ___ them up all the same，與後文 They forget 呼應
時態搭配 up 構成 bring up，過去式 brought
✗ developed/fed/raised 雖近義，但只有 bring + up 構成 brought them up 片語動詞，其餘不接 up。
空格 4determines determines / leads / contributes / impacts
語意句意「決定 (determines) 我們行為的不是發生什麼，而是如何詮釋」，what ___ our behaviour
單複數關係子句主詞 what 視為單數，動詞用 determines
✗ leads/contributes 須接 to；impacts 衝擊語氣弱於「決定」，determines 才切合「決定行為的關鍵」。
空格 5interpret interpret / interrupt / introvert / interact
語意與前文 how we interpret what happens 呼應，指「如何詮釋 (interpret) 發生的事」
搭配interpret what happens 固定搭配，意為解讀
✗ interrupt 打斷、introvert 內向、interact 互動皆與「詮釋／解讀事件」語意不合。

The contemporary ministerial staffing system is large, active and partisan-far larger and further evolved than any Westminster equivalent. Ministers' demands for help to cope with the pressures of an than any Westminster equivalent. Ministers' demands for help to cope with the pressures of an increasingly competitive and professionalised political environment have been key drivers of the staffing system's development. But there has not been commensurate growth in 1arrangements to staffing system's development. But there has not been commensurate growth in arrangements to support and control it. The 2operating framework for ministerial staff is 3fragmented and ad hoc.
空格 1arrangements engagements / arrangements / assignations / stipulations
搭配固定搭配 arrangements to support and control（支援與管控的安排機制）
語意與後文 The operating framework 呼應，指制度性的「安排」
✗ engagements 約定、assignations 幽會、stipulations 規定條款皆不合「支援管控的配套安排」語意。
空格 2operating manipulating / opposing / operating / conducting
搭配固定搭配 operating framework（運作架構），The ___ framework for ministerial staff
詞性現在分詞作形容詞修飾 framework
✗ manipulating 操弄、opposing 對立、conducting 指揮皆不與 framework 構成「運作架構」慣用。
空格 3fragmented splitted / fragmented / integrated / merged
搭配固定搭配 fragmented and ad hoc（零碎且臨時拼湊），與 ad hoc 並列
語意前文 not been commensurate growth 暗示制度不健全，故架構「零散」
✗ integrated/merged 整合語意相反；splitted 為拼寫誤（split 過去分詞為 split），fragmented 才正確。

The most common 1reason for carrying out a detailed medical examination of a dead person – a post- mortem or autopsy – is when it is necessary to 2establish the cause of death. In some circumstances, a doctor may be allowed to perform a post-mortem in pursuit of medical 3knowledge . The examination is usually performed by a pathologist and 4involves dissection of the body, and tests were done on blood, tissues and internal organs, but sometimes it is performed by a doctor.
空格 1reason reason / excuse / situation / source
搭配固定搭配 the reason for（...的原因），The most common ___ for carrying out
語意後接 is when it is necessary to establish the cause，說明「原因」
✗ excuse 藉口帶負面、situation 情況、source 來源皆不與 the most common ___ for 構成「最常見的原因」。
空格 2establish affirm / testify / establish / investigate
搭配固定搭配 establish the cause of death（查明死因）
時態不定式 to ___ the cause 接原形
✗ affirm 肯定、testify 作證、investigate 調查皆不與 the cause of death 構成「查明確立」慣用，establish 才正確。
空格 3knowledge technology / knowledge / prescription / certificate
搭配固定搭配 in pursuit of medical knowledge（為追求醫學知識）
語意指為「增進醫學知識」而進行驗屍
✗ technology 技術、prescription 處方、certificate 證書皆不合 in pursuit of medical ___ 的「知識」語意。
空格 4involves integrated / included / involves / conducts
搭配固定搭配 involve dissection（涉及解剖），The examination... ___ dissection of the body
單複數主詞 The examination 單數，動詞用第三人稱單數 involves
✗ integrated/included 為過去式破壞時態一致；conducts 主詞應為人，involves（涉及）才合主詞 examination。

Lucy was a single hominid skeleton found in Ethopia. First, she was a bunch of broken fragments lying Lucy was a single hominid skeleton found in Ethopia. First, she was a bunch of broken fragments lying in Ethopia. She was found by Donald Johanson and Tom Gray, who headed out to the area looking for rocks, and then drove back. 1During that return journey, Johanson spotted a forearm bone, identified it rocks, and then drove back. During that return journey, Johanson spotted a forearm bone, identified it — and then kept looking, where the two found a huge set of bones that would eventually 2represent 40 per cent of the entire skeleton. The discovery was so important because it entirely 3upset our per cent of the entire skeleton. The discovery was so important because it entirely upset our understanding of the process of evolution. She showed that people had been wrong to think that we became intelligent before we stood up — Lucy and her contemporaries were better suited for walking became intelligent before we stood up — Lucy and her contemporaries were better suited for walking 4upright than we were, but appear to have been much less 5intellectually advanced. That was important because it changed our understanding of the story of evolution, implying that walking was one of the because it changed our understanding of the story of evolution, implying that walking was one of the most important things in moving us towards our current state, and that brainpower might not have been the most important thing. been the most important thing. upset agitate provoke compose upright straight vertical horizontal physically intellectually psychologically mannually
空格 1During During / Through / Via / Across
搭配搭配時間名詞 the return journey，表示「在…期間」用 During + 時段名詞
語意後面接 that return journey 是一段時間，語意需「在這段旅程中」
✗ Through/Via/Across 多表空間穿越或路徑，不能修飾「旅程這段時間」
空格 2represent represent / signify / nullify / validate
語意骨頭佔整副骨架的 40%，用 represent「代表/構成」最合上下文
✗ signify 指象徵意義、nullify 使無效、validate 證實，皆與「構成比例」不符
空格 3upset upset / agitate / provoke / compose
搭配upset our understanding 為固定搭配，指「顛覆/推翻認知」
語意下文說它改變了我們對演化的理解，需「顛覆」之意
✗ agitate 攪動/煽動、provoke 激起、compose 組成，皆不搭配 understanding
空格 4upright upright / straight / vertical / horizontal
搭配walking upright 為固定搭配，指「直立行走」
✗ straight/vertical/horizontal 不與 walking 搭配描述人直立姿態
空格 5intellectually physically / intellectually / psychologically / mannually
語意對比「行走能力強但智力較低」，需 intellectually「智力上」較不先進
搭配intellectually advanced 固定搭配，呼應前文 became intelligent
✗ physically 已由 walking 表達、psychologically 心理上、mannually(拼錯)皆不合智力對比

Fingerprints can 1prove that a suspect was actually at the scene of a crime. As long as a human entered a crime scene, there will be traces of DNA. DNA can help the police to 2identify an individual to crack a a crime scene, there will be traces of DNA. DNA can help the police to identify an individual to crack a case. An institute in London can help 3preserve DNA and be used to match with the 4samples taken from protect maintain forsake preserve collections results treasure samples
空格 1prove prove / affirm / disclose / reveal
語意指紋能「證明」嫌犯在現場，用 prove that 子句最直接
搭配prove that + 子句為標準搭配
✗ affirm 肯定陳述、disclose/reveal 揭露未知，皆不如 prove 表「證明事實」
空格 2identify figure / identify / distinguish / discriminate
搭配identify an individual 固定搭配，指「辨識出某人身分」
✗ figure 需 figure out、distinguish/discriminate 指區別兩者，非辨識單一身分
空格 3preserve protect / maintain / forsake / preserve
搭配preserve DNA 固定搭配，指「保存」樣本
語意後文 match with samples，需先「保存」DNA 以供比對
✗ protect 保護免受傷害、maintain 維持狀態、forsake 拋棄(反義)，皆不合保存樣本
空格 4samples collections / results / treasure / samples
語意與現場採集的 DNA 比對的對象是「樣本」samples
搭配match with samples 搭配自然，呼應前文 taken from
✗ collections 收藏、results 結果、treasure 珍寶，皆非可比對的 DNA 檢體
69.Underground Houses (地下房屋)4 格#080069
Underground houses have many advantages over conventional housing. Unlike conventional homes, they can be built on 1steep surfaces and can maximise space in small areas by going below the surface. In addition, the materials excavated in construction can be used in the building process. Underground houses have less surface area so fewer building materials are used, and 2maintenance costs are lower. They are also wind, fire and earthquake resistant, providing a secure and safe environment in extreme weather. One of the greatest benefits of underground living is energy 3efficiency . The earth’s subsurface temperature remains stable, so underground dwellings benefit from geothermal mass and heat exchange, staying cool in the summer and warm in the winter. This saves around 80% in energy heat exchange, staying cool in the summer and warm in the winter. This saves around 80% in energy costs. 4By incorporating solar design this energy bill can be reduced to zero, providing hot water and heat to the home all year round. heat to the home all year round. maintenance maintaining maintained maintainable efficiency efficacy proficiency facilities By In As IfIf 5 can_be_reduced cannot_be_reduced would_have_been_redu should_have_been_redu
空格 1steep strict / steep / plain / abrupt
搭配steep surfaces/slopes 固定搭配，指「陡峭的」地面
語意對比一般住宅，強調可建於「陡坡」上
✗ strict 嚴格、plain 平坦(反義)、abrupt 突然，皆不描述可建屋的陡峭地形
空格 2maintenance maintenance / maintaining / maintained / maintainable
詞性與 costs 構成名詞片語 maintenance costs「維護成本」，需名詞
搭配maintenance costs 固定複合名詞
✗ maintaining 動名詞、maintained 過去分詞、maintainable 形容詞，皆無法直接修飾 costs 成此複合名詞
空格 3efficiency efficiency / efficacy / proficiency / facilities
搭配energy efficiency 固定搭配，指「能源效率」
語意下文講地溫穩定、省能源，主題即「效率」
✗ efficacy 療效/功效、proficiency 精通、facilities 設施，皆不與 energy 搭配成此概念
空格 4By By / In / As
搭配By + V-ing(incorporating)表「藉由…方式」，搭配後句結果
詞性空格後接動名詞 incorporating，需介系詞 By 表手段
✗ In incorporating 不慣用、As 表身分/原因皆不合「藉由某做法達成結果」的句構

There were twenty-six freshmen 1majoring in English at Beijing Language Institute in the class of 1983. I was assigned to Group Two with another eleven boy and girls who has 2come from big cities in China. I was 3told that language study required smallness so that we would each get more attention from the was told that language study required smallness so that we would each get more attention from the skillful teachers. The better the school, the smaller the class. I realized that my classmates were ready all 4talking in English, simple sentences tossed out to each other in their red-faced introductions and all talking in English, simple sentences tossed out to each other in their red-faced introductions and carefree chatting. Their intonations were curving and dramatic and their pronunciation refined and accurate. But as I stretched to catch the drips and drops of their humming dialogue, I couldn’t accurate. But as I stretched to catch the drips and drops of their humming dialogue, I couldn’t 5understand it all, only that it was English. Those words now flying before me sounded a little familiar. I had read them and tried to speak them, but I had never heard them 6spoken back to me in such a had read them and tried to speak them, but I had never heard them spoken back to me in such a speedy, fluent manner. My big plan of beating the city folks was thawing before my eyes.

空格 2come derived / come / arised / emerged

搭配come from「來自」固定搭配，後接地點
✗ derived 需 from 但語意指衍生、arised(拼錯,應arisen)、emerged 浮現皆不表「來自某地」
空格 3told told / informed / guided / instructed
時態I was ___ that 被動句需過去分詞；tell 為 told

✗ informed 雖通但較正式且常接 of、guided 引導、instructed 指示，皆不如 be told that 自然

時態were ready all ___ in English 接進行式，需 V-ing

In 1955, it was adjusted by a mere 26 feet officially accepted height for more than one hundred years. In 1955, it was adjusted by a mere 26 feet to 29,028 '8,848 m'. The mountain received its official name in 1865 in honor of Sir George Everest, the British Surveyor General from 1830—1843 who had mapped the Indian subcontinent. 79.Kimbell (金貝爾)5 格#080079
The first section of the book covers new modes of assessment. In Chapter 1, Kimbell (Goldsmith College, London) responds to 1criticisms of design programs as formalistic and conventional, stating that a focus on risk-taking rather than hard work in design innovation is equally problematic. His research contains three parts that include preliminary exploration of design innovation qualities, investigation of resulting classroom practices, and development of evidence-based assessment. The assessment he describes is presented in the form of a structured worksheet, which includes a collaborative 2element and digital photographs, in story format. Such a device encourages stimulating ideas, but does not recognize students as design 3innovators . The assessment sheet includes holistic impressions as well as details about “having, growing, and proving” ideas. 4colloquial judgments are evident in terms such as “wow” and “yawn” and reward the quality and quantity of ideas with the term, “sparkiness”, which fittingly is a pun as the model project was to design light bulb packaging. In addition, the assessment focuses on the process of optimizing or complexity control as well as proving ideas with thoughtful criticism and not just generation of novel ideas. The definitions for qualities such as “technical” and “aesthetic” pertaining to users, are too narrow and ill-defined. The author provides 5examples of the project, its features and structures, students’ notes and judgments, and their sketches and photographs of finished light bulb packages, in the Appendix. adulation evaluation criticisms compliments level element factor ingredient
空格 1criticisms adulation / evaluation / criticisms / compliments
搭配respond to criticisms「回應批評」固定搭配
語意下文說設計課被批為形式化、傳統，故是「批評」criticisms
✗ adulation 諂媚、evaluation 評估、compliments 讚美，皆與下文負面批評不符
空格 2element level / element / factor / ingredient
搭配collaborative element「協作元素」固定搭配
語意工作表包含「協作」這一構成部分
✗ level 層級、factor 因素、ingredient 多指食材/要素，皆不如 collaborative element 慣用
空格 3innovators eagles / leaders / elites / innovators
語意前文反覆出現 design innovation/innovators，此處 recognize students as design ___ 呼應「創新者」
搭配design innovators 與前文一致搭配
✗ eagles 老鷹、leaders 領導者、elites 精英，皆不呼應全文 design innovation 主題
空格 4colloquial colloquial / systematic / objective / subjective
語意下文舉例 wow、yawn、sparkiness 等口語詞，故是「口語的」colloquial 判斷
✗ systematic 系統的、objective 客觀、subjective 主觀，皆不合 wow/yawn 這類口語用詞的描述
空格 5examples experiments / examples / themes / productions
語意provides ___ of the project, its features...，作者「舉例」說明專案，用 examples
搭配provide examples of 固定搭配
✗ experiments 實驗、themes 主題、productions 作品，皆不如 examples of the project 慣用

Although it is thought that music played a 1role throughout the history of Egypt, those that 2study the Egyptian writings have that music played a role throughout the history of Egypt, those that study the Egyptian writings have discovered that music 3seemed to become more important in what is called the ‘pharaonic’ 4period of their history. This was the 5time when the Egyptian dynasties of the pharaohs were 6established (around their history. This was the time when the Egyptian dynasties of the pharaohs were established (around 3100 BCE) and music was found in many parts of every day Egyptian life.
空格 1role role / component / section / situation
搭配play a role「扮演角色」固定搭配
語意音樂在埃及歷史中「發揮作用」
✗ component 組件、section 段落、situation 情況，皆不與 play a 構成「發揮作用」之意
空格 2study research / record / browse / study
搭配those that study the writings「研究著作的人」搭配自然
單複數those that ___ 主詞為複數，現在式用原形 study
✗ research 多作名詞或需受詞結構、record 記錄、browse 瀏覽，皆不如 study the writings 精準
空格 3seemed sounded / seemed / regarded / treated
搭配seemed to become「似乎變得」固定搭配，後接 to 不定詞
語意研究者「發現」音樂似乎在某時期變得更重要
✗ sounded 聽起來、regarded/treated 需被動或受詞，皆不接 to become 表「似乎」
空格 4period period / range / time / decade
搭配the pharaonic period「法老時期」固定搭配，指歷史「時期」
✗ range 範圍、time 此處與 n5 區隔(下文 the time when 用 time)、decade 十年，皆不合 pharaonic ___ 慣用
空格 5time period / range / time / decade
搭配This was the time when「這是…的時候」固定搭配，後接 when 子句
✗ period/range/decade 皆不與 the ___ when 此句構及指示語意自然搭配
空格 6established contributed / established / grew / raised
時態dynasties were ___ 被動句需過去分詞 established
搭配dynasties were established「王朝被建立」固定搭配
✗ contributed 貢獻、grew 生長、raised 提高，皆不合 dynasties were ___ 被動建立之意
81.Sociology (社會學)4 格#080081
Sociology is the study of human societies. It is usually 1classed as one of the social sciences and was Sociology is the study of human societies. It is usually classed as one of the social sciences and was 2established as a subject in the late 18th century. However, the subject has only really gained 3acceptance as an academic subject in the 20th century through the work of writers such as Emile acceptance as an academic subject in the 20th century through the work of writers such as Emile Durkheim, Max Weber and Talcott Parsons. One name that you may have heard of-Karl Marx-has probably done more to stimulate people's interest in the subject than anyone else, even though he probably done more to stimulate people's interest in the subject than anyone else, even though he lived and wrote in a period before Sociology became fully established as an academic discipline. Sociology, therefore, has a reasonably long history of development 4although in Britain it has only been Sociology, therefore, has a reasonably long history of development although in Britain it has only been in the last 30-40 years that Sociology as an examined subject in the education system has achieved a level of prominence equivalent to or above most of the other subjects it is possible to study. At level of prominence equivalent to or above most of the other subjects it is possible to study. At present, approximately 40,000 students sit an A-level Sociology exam, making it one of the most popular A-levels in our society. popular A-levels in our society. classed defined identified regarded refinded determined designed established acceptance popularity satisfaction reputation
空格 1classed classed / defined / identified / regarded
搭配be classed as「被歸類為」固定被動搭配
語意社會學「被歸類為」社會科學之一
✗ defined 定義、identified 辨識、regarded 需 as 但語意偏「被視為」，classed as 最精準表歸類
空格 2established refinded / determined / designed / established
時態was ___ as a subject 被動句需過去分詞 established
搭配be established as a subject「被確立為一門學科」固定搭配
✗ refinded(拼錯)、determined 決定、designed 設計，皆不合「確立為學科」之意
空格 3acceptance acceptance / popularity / satisfaction / reputation
搭配gain acceptance「獲得認可」固定搭配
語意下文 gained acceptance as an academic subject 重複出現
✗ popularity 受歡迎、satisfaction 滿意、reputation 名聲，皆不如 gain acceptance 慣用且呼應下文
空格 4although although / therefore / however / because
語意前句說發展史相當長，後句轉折說在英國只近30-40年才受重視，需讓步連接詞 although
詞性連接兩個對比子句，用從屬連接詞 although
✗ therefore/however 為副詞不能引導從屬子句、because 表原因不合對比語意
82.Peter Garrett (彼得·加勒特)5 格#080082
No one in Parliament would know better than Peter Garrett what largesse copyright can confer so it may seem right that he should announce a 1royalty for artists, amounting to 5 percent of all sales after may seem right that he should announce a royalty for artists, amounting to 5 percent of all sales after the original one, which can go on giving to their families for as much as 150 years. But that ignores the truth that copyright law is a 2scandal , recently exacerbated by the Free Trade Agreement with the US truth that copyright law is a scandal , recently exacerbated by the Free Trade Agreement with the US which 3required extension of copyright to 70 years after death. Is it scandalous that really valuable copyrights end up in the ownership of corporations (although Agatha Christie's no-doubt worthy great- copyrights end up in the ownership of corporations (although Agatha Christie's no-doubt worthy great- grandchildren are still reaping the benefits of West End success for her who dunnits and members of the Garrick Club enjoy the continuing fruits of A.A. Milne's Christopher Robin books)? No. The 4scandal the Garrick Club enjoy the continuing fruits of A.A. Milne's Christopher Robin books)? No. The scandal is that “bien pensant” politicians have attempted to appear cultured by creating private assets which depend on an act of Parliament for their existence and by giving away much more in value than any depend on an act of Parliament for their existence and by giving away much more in value than any public benefit could 5justify . In doing so they have betrayed our trust.
空格 1royalty loyalty / imperialism / royalty / commission
搭配announce a royalty for artists「宣布給藝術家版稅」，後接 5 percent of all sales，指「版稅」royalty
語意與 copyright、sales 主題一致，指版稅分成
✗ loyalty 忠誠(形近陷阱)、imperialism 帝國主義、commission 佣金，皆不合銷售版稅語意
空格 2scandal humiliation / slander / praise / scandal
語意下文 recently exacerbated、後段 The scandal is that 重複，指版權法是「醜聞」scandal
搭配copyright law is a scandal 呼應下文 The scandal
✗ humiliation 羞辱、slander 誹謗、praise 讚揚(反義)，皆不呼應下文 The scandal is that
空格 3required required / require / requires / requiring
時態which ___ extension，先行詞為 the Free Trade Agreement，敘述過去事實用過去式 required
單複數關係子句主詞單數 Agreement，若現在式應為 requires，但全句時態為過去，故 required
✗ require 原形不合單數/時態、requires 現在式與過去敘述衝突、requiring 分詞不能作主要動詞
空格 4scandal humiliation / slander / praise / scandal
搭配The scandal is that「醜聞在於…」固定句型，呼應第2格與前文
語意明確指出此「醜聞」的內容，用 scandal
✗ humiliation/slander/praise 皆不合 The ___ is that 的句型與前文主題
空格 5justify testify / justify / satisfy / certify
搭配than any public benefit could justify「超過任何公共利益所能justify(正當化)」固定搭配
語意給出的價值遠超公共利益所能「合理化」
✗ testify 作證、satisfy 滿足、certify 證明，皆不合「合理化/正當化」之意

There are just two primary 2sources for information on the Bard: his works, and various legal and 3church documents that have survived from Elizabethan times. Naturally, there are many 4gaps in this body of information, which tells us little about Shakespeare the man. equivocal mysterious ridiculous baffling
空格 1mysterious equivocal / mysterious / ridiculous / baffling
語意a ___ figure，下文說個人史資料稀少，指「神祕的」人物 mysterious
✗ equivocal 模稜兩可、ridiculous 荒謬、baffling 令人困惑(多形容事不形容人)，皆不如 mysterious figure 自然
空格 2sources sources / resources / procedures / origins
搭配primary sources「第一手來源/史料」固定搭配
語意後接 his works 與 documents，即兩項「來源」sources
✗ resources 資源、procedures 程序、origins 起源，皆不與 primary 構成「第一手史料」
空格 3church church / enigmatic / perplexing / clandestine
搭配legal and church documents「法律與教會文件」固定搭配
詞性與 legal 並列修飾 documents，需名詞作定語 church
✗ enigmatic 神祕的、perplexing 令人困惑、clandestine 祕密的，皆為形容詞且不合 legal and ___ documents
空格 4gaps passes / crevices / gaps / clefts
搭配gaps in this body of information「資訊中的空缺」固定搭配
語意資料有許多「缺口」，告訴我們很少
✗ passes 通道、crevices 裂縫、clefts 裂口，皆指實體裂縫，不合 gaps in information 抽象用法
84.Progressive enhancement (漸進式增強)4 格#080084
Progressive enhancement is a design practice based on the idea that instead of 1designing for the least capable browser, or mangling our code to make a site look the same in every browser, we should provide a core set of functionality and information to all users, and then 2progressively enhance the appearance and behavior of the site for users of more capable browsers. It's very productive development practice 3instead of spending hours working out how to add drop shadows to the borders of an element in every browser, we simply use the standards-based approach for browsers that support it and don't even attempt to implement it in browsers that don’t. After all, the users of older and less capable browsers wont know what they are missing. The 4challenge to progressive enhancement is the belief among developers and clients that websites should look the same in every browser. As a developer, you can simplify your life and dedicate your time to more interesting challenges if you let go of this outdated notion and embrace progressive enhancement. 1 designing_for that_be_designing to_be_designed for_designs_for 2 successfully_enhance progressively_enhance moderately_enhance suddenly_enhance 3 instead_of_spending relate_to with_taking to_take
空格 1designing for designing for / that be designing / to be designed / for designs for
時態instead of 後接動名詞，designing 為 V-ing 形式
搭配design for the least capable browser「為…而設計」，搭配 for
✗ that be designing、to be designed、for designs for 文法結構錯誤，無法接於 instead of 之後。
空格 2progressively enhance successfully enhance / progressively enhance / moderately enhance / suddenly enhance
語意呼應主題 progressive enhancement，「漸進式地增強」外觀與行為
✗ successfully、moderately、suddenly enhance 皆不符全文「漸進式增強」核心概念。
空格 3instead of spending instead of spending / relate to / with taking / to take
語意語意：與其「花數小時」研究陰影做法，不如用標準方案，對比結構
時態instead of 後接動名詞 spending
✗ relate to、with taking、to take 無法構成「與其花時間不如…」的對比語意與文法。
空格 4challenge venture / opportunity / challenge / possibility
語意語意：漸進式增強面臨的「挑戰」是開發者與客戶認為各瀏覽器應一致
✗ venture、opportunity、possibility 皆不符「面對的難題/挑戰」語意。

Leave space at the end of your answer and come back to minutes answering a part worth only 5 marks. Leave space at the end of your answer and come back to it if you have 3time to spare later. And if you can't think of an answer to some part, leave a space and move on to the next part. Don't write about something else if you don't know the correct answer--this move on to the next part. Don't write about something else if you don't know the correct answer--this is just a waste of your 4valuable time (and the examiner's).
空格 1available accessible / sensible / available / feasible

搭配time to spare「多餘的時間」固定搭配

空格 4valuable valuable / available / obtainable / beneficial

語意浪費你「寶貴」的時間
