First year student Zak Taylor Fray decided to submit his song demo to be included in Volume Two of the Lost Songs album which was released this year, after he demo to be included in Volume Two of the Lost Songs album which was released this year, after he saw 3how successful Volume One had been. Zak 24, said: “I found this competition when simply 4searching the internet for songwriting competitions one day, and was lucky that there was still 5time to searching the internet for songwriting competitions one day, and was lucky that there was still time to enter. It amazes me that people who have worked with huge pop stars thought my song was good and after before by as up about out into what that how why

搭配celebrating after being featured「在被收錄後慶祝」，after + V-ing 固定搭配

✗ before 之前(語意相反)、by 藉由、as 當…時，皆不合「事件之後慶祝」的時間關係

單複數Zak 24「24歲的Zak」此空格實為 set about；set about compiling「著手編輯」固定片語動詞
搭配set about + V-ing「開始著手做」固定搭配

The metal was probably discovered there 1by accident when some ore was dropped into a fire and cooled into wrought iron, historians think. The eureka moment didn't reach Europe for into a fire and cooled into wrought iron, historians think. The eureka moment didn't reach Europe for 2another 500 years, traveling slowly north and west through Greece, Italy, central Europe and finally to the British Isles 3with the spread of the famous Celtic tribes. The Celts diffused iron technology over the British Isles with the spread of the famous Celtic tribes. The Celts diffused iron technology over much of the continent through warfare, where their victory was assured due to the strength of iron weapons. Perhaps not the most peaceful of cultural exchanges, but where the technology did travel, it weapons. Perhaps not the most peaceful of cultural exchanges, but where the technology did travel, it caught on fast. Iron 4made life a lot easier in those days, when just living to the age of 45 was a feat. By that time, much of Europe had 5settled into small village life, toiling the soil with bronze and stone that time, much of Europe had settled into small village life, toiling the soil with bronze and stone
空格 1by in / by / via / at
搭配discovered by accident「偶然發現」固定搭配 by accident

✗ in/via/at accident 皆非標準搭配，唯 by accident 表「偶然」
空格 2another another / more / additionally
搭配another 500 years「另外500年」固定搭配，another + 數字 + 複數名詞
單複數another 可接複數時段名詞表「再…」
✗ more 需 500 more years 語序、additionally 為副詞不能直接修飾名詞片語
空格 3with for / under / with / at
搭配with the spread of「隨著…的傳播」固定搭配

✗ for/under/at 皆不與 the spread of 構成「伴隨…傳播」之意
空格 4made made / makes
時態Iron ___ life a lot easier，敘述過去歷史，與 was a feat 一致用過去式 made
✗ makes 現在式與全段過去敘述及 in those days 衝突
空格 5settled come / settled / transformed / led
搭配settled into small village life「定居於小村生活」固定搭配
語意歐洲大部分已「安頓」進小村生活，後接 toiling the soil
✗ come 需 come into 但語意弱、transformed 轉變需受詞、led 引領，皆不合 ___ into village life 的定居之意
88.Parasitic Plants (寄生植物)4 格#080088
That Sigmund Freud became a major intellectual presence in twentieth-century culture is not in doubt. That Sigmund Freud became a major intellectual presence in twentieth-century culture is not in doubt. 1Nor is there any doubt that at all times there was both fervent enthusiasm over and bitter hostility to his ideas and influence. But the exact means by 2which Freud became, despite this hostility, a master 3of his ideas and influence. But the exact means by which Freud became, despite this hostility, a master of intellectual life, on a par, already in the 1920s, with Karl Marx, Albert Einstein, Marie Curie and Bertrand Russell, has not been sufficiently explored. Strikingly, Freud emerged as a twentieth-century icon Russell, has not been sufficiently explored. Strikingly, Freud emerged as a twentieth-century icon without the endorsement and support of an institution or a profession (in contrast to Einstein, Curie and Russell). Where are we to look for the details of this story of an emergent-and new-figure of and Russell). Where are we to look for the details of this story of an emergent-and new-figure of immense cultural authority? One of the principal aims of this book is to show how this happened in one local, parochial yet privileged, site-Cambridge, then as now a university town stranded in the one local, parochial yet privileged, site-Cambridge, then as now a university town stranded in the English Fens with a relatively small 4fluctuating population.
空格 1Nor Nor / Or / Also / Either
搭配Nor is there any doubt「也毫無疑問」，Nor 引導倒裝句型，承接前句 not in doubt
詞性句首否定副詞 Nor 觸發主謂倒裝 is there
✗ Or/Also/Either 皆不引導此否定倒裝句，無法承接前文否定語氣
空格 2which which / what
搭配the means by which「藉以…的方式」固定關係子句搭配
詞性介系詞 by 後接關係代名詞 which，先行詞為 means(物)
✗ what 不能作關係代名詞接在介系詞後修飾先行詞 means
空格 3of with / of / in / by
搭配a master of intellectual life「智識生活的大師」，master of 固定搭配
詞性名詞 master 後接 of 表所屬領域
✗ with/in/by 皆不與 a master ___ 構成「…的大師」之意
空格 4fluctuating fluctuates / fluctuating / fluctuation / fluctuate
詞性a relatively small ___ population，需現在分詞作形容詞修飾 population
搭配fluctuating population「波動的人口」固定搭配
✗ fluctuates/fluctuate 為動詞、fluctuation 為名詞，皆不能作形容詞修飾 population
89.Katakana (片假名)5 格#080089
An eccentric mix of English, German and French has entered Japanese usage with grand abandon. A An eccentric mix of English, German and French has entered Japanese usage with grand abandon. A "kariya" woman is a career woman, and a "manshon" is an apartment. This increasing use of katakana, or unique Japanese versions of Western words, and the younger generation's more casual use of the or unique Japanese versions of Western words, and the younger generation's more casual use of the Japanese language have 1prompted Prime Minister Junichiro Koizumi to worry that these new words may not be understood by a wider audience. 2As a result , a government panel is proposing to publish a may not be understood by a wider audience. As a result , a government panel is proposing to publish a manual on how to speak proper Japanese. Foreign words became katakana Japanese 3because no existing Japanese words could quite capture a specific meaning or feeling. When the word "cool" existing Japanese words could quite capture a specific meaning or feeling. When the word "cool" traveled east, all of its English connotations did not make the journey. A kuru person in Japan is someone who is calm and never gets upset. 4On the other hand , someone who is kakkoii is hip, or in someone who is calm and never gets upset. On the other hand , someone who is kakkoii is hip, or in translation, "cool." 5Similarly , a hotto person is one who is easily excitable, perhaps passionate, but not necessarily a popular person or personality of the moment. necessarily a popular person or personality of the moment. 2 As_requested As_discussed As_a_result As_a_rule thus because while yet On_the_contrary On_the_other_hand However Nonetheless Fortunately Similarly Clearly Apparently
空格 1prompted leaded / prompted / promoted / approached
搭配prompt sb to do「促使某人做…」，後接 Koizumi to worry
✗ leaded（lead 過去式應為 led，且 lead sb to 語意可但拼字錯）、promoted（晉升/推廣）、approached 皆不符 prompt sb to worry 的搭配。
空格 2As a result As requested / As discussed / As a result / As a rule
語意語意：因擔憂新詞難懂，「因此」政府小組提議出版手冊，表因果結果
✗ As requested、As discussed、As a rule 皆不符前因後果的銜接語意。
空格 3because thus / because / while / yet
語意語意：外來語成為片假名日語「因為」沒有現成日語能捕捉特定意義，表原因
✗ thus（因此）因果方向相反；while（雖然/當）、yet（然而）不符此處原因關係。
空格 4On the other hand On the contrary / On the other hand / However / Nonetheless
語意語意：前句 kuru 指冷靜的人，「另一方面」kakkoii 指時髦，對比兩種詞義
✗ On the contrary 用於否定後更正；However/Nonetheless 偏轉折讓步，較不貼切此處並列對比。
空格 5Similarly Fortunately / Similarly / Clearly / Apparently
語意語意：承接前述外來語意義轉變的例子，「同樣地」再舉 hotto 之例，類比並列
✗ Fortunately、Clearly、Apparently 皆不表「同類舉例」的銜接關係。
90.Visual art (視覺藝術)6 格#080090
It is the assertion of this article that students who use visual art as a prewriting stimulus are composing their ideas both in images and in words. The result of the art creation process allows students the their ideas both in images and in words. The result of the art creation process allows students the distance to 1elaborate , add details, and create more coherent text. The process of writing is more than putting words on a piece of paper. Effective authors are able to create 2imagery and to communicate putting words on a piece of paper. Effective authors are able to create imagery and to communicate ideas using well-chosen words, phrases, and text structures. Emergent writers struggle with the 3mechanics of the writing process, i.e. fine motor control for printing legibly, recall of spelling patterns, mechanics of the writing process, i.e. fine motor control for printing legibly, recall of spelling patterns, and the use of syntax and grammar rules. As a result, texts written by young writers be simplistic and formulaic. The artwork 4facilitates the writing process, resulting in a text that is richer in sensory detail formulaic. The artwork facilitates the writing process, resulting in a text that is richer in sensory detail and more 5intricate than the more traditional writing-first crayon drawing-second 6approach .
空格 1elaborate elongate / elaborate / eradicate / evade
語意與 add details、create more coherent text 並列，elaborate「詳述、闡述」語意一致
時態the distance to ___ 為不定詞原形，三個並列動詞 elaborate/add/create
✗ elongate「拉長」、eradicate「根除」、evade「逃避」皆與寫作擴充細節語意不合
空格 2imagery imagery / picture / illusion / deception
搭配create imagery「營造意象」為固定搭配，與後文 well-chosen words 並列
語意全文談視覺藝術轉文字，imagery「意象」最貼題
✗ picture 太具體；illusion「錯覺」、deception「欺騙」帶負面義，不合創作語境
空格 3mechanics mechanics / machinists / methodologies / principles
搭配mechanics of the writing process「寫作過程的技術細節」為固定用法
單複數後接 i.e. fine motor control、spelling、syntax 等多項，用複數 mechanics
✗ machinists「機械工」指人；methodologies/principles 偏「方法論/原則」，不指運筆拼字等操作細節
空格 4facilitates dominates / facilitates / liquidates / accelerates
語意後文 resulting in richer text，藝術「促進」寫作，facilitate 正面助力義
單複數主詞 The artwork 單數，第三人稱單數動詞加 s
✗ dominates「支配」、liquidates「清算」、accelerates「加速」皆不合「幫助寫作」語意
空格 5intricate difficult / intricate / intriguing / perplexing
語意與 richer in sensory detail 並列、more ___ than，指文本「更精細複雜」
搭配more intricate「更錯綜精細」常形容結構/作品
✗ difficult「困難」、intriguing「引人入勝」、perplexing「令人困惑」皆非「精細複雜」之意
空格 6approach approach / methodology / procedure / process
搭配the writing-first drawing-second approach「先寫後畫的做法」approach 最自然
語意與本文 prewriting stimulus 對比，指一種整體「取向/方式」
✗ methodology/procedure/process 偏「方法論/程序/過程」，approach 更貼合「教學取向」的固定搭配
91.Women’s participation (婦女參與力)5 格#080091
With the increase in women 's 1participation in the labour force, many mothers have less time 2available to undertake domestic activities. At the same time, there has been increasing 3recognition that the to undertake domestic activities. At the same time, there has been increasing recognition that the father 's role and 4relationship with a child is important. A father can have many 5roles in the family, ranging from income provider to teacher, carer, playmate and role model. Therefore, balancing paid ranging from income provider to teacher, carer, playmate and role model. Therefore, balancing paid work and family responsibilities can be an important issue for both fathers and mothers in families.
空格 1participation anticipation / substitution / participation / departure
搭配participation in the labour force「勞動參與」為固定搭配
語意全文談婦女投入職場，participation「參與」最貼題
✗ anticipation「預期」、substitution「替代」、departure「離開」皆與「投入勞動力」語意不合
空格 2available available / accessible / consumable / obtainable
搭配have less time available「可用的時間變少」available 修飾 time 為固定用法
✗ accessible/obtainable 多指可取得的物件；consumable「可消耗的」皆不搭 time
空格 3recognition recognition / discrimination / perception / endorsement
搭配increasing recognition that...「越來越多人認識到」recognition 接同位語 that 從句
語意正面語境：肯定父親角色的重要，用 recognition「認可」
✗ discrimination「歧視」、perception「感知」、endorsement「背書」皆不搭 that 從句或語意偏
空格 4relationship connection / relationship / bond / employment
搭配relationship with a child「與孩子的關係」relationship with sb 固定搭配
語意與 father's role 並列談親子關係，relationship 最貼切
✗ connection/bond 雖近義但不及 relationship with a child 自然；employment「雇用」語意全錯
空格 5roles roles / positions / performances / activities
語意後接 ranging from income provider to teacher, carer...，列舉的是父親的多種「角色」roles
單複數many ___ 後須複數，roles 與下文多項身分對應
✗ positions「職位」、performances「表演」、activities「活動」皆無法涵蓋 provider/teacher/role model 這類身分
92.Experience the museum (體驗博物館)4 格#080092
The best way to experience the museum is from the top floor down. One emerges from the elevators The best way to experience the museum is from the top floor down. One emerges from the elevators into a spacious hallway. At some hours, museum staff members are giving small hands-on 1demonstrations of techniques such as quillwork. These activities take place near wall cases filled with demonstrations of techniques such as quillwork. These activities take place near wall cases filled with objects. These small surveys of the museum’s vast holdings are called “Windows on the Collection”. Appearing on every floor in the halls that 2overlook the rotunda, these display cases serve as a kind of Appearing on every floor in the halls that overlook the rotunda, these display cases serve as a kind of visible storage, presenting a panoply of objects and materials. Their arrangements are artistic, and their contents perhaps 3intentionally designed to jar the visitor. For example, the largest case on the fourth contents perhaps intentionally designed to jar the visitor. For example, the largest case on the fourth floor displays animal imagery of all sorts. Older sculptures of birds, mammals and sea creatures appear alongside witty contemporary works such as Larry Beck’s version of a Yup’ik mask made of rubber alongside witty contemporary works such as Larry Beck’s version of a Yup’ik mask made of rubber tire treads and metal tools, and Jim Schoppert’s “Walrus Loves Baby Clams” mask. Recently-made ivory carvings challenge the common distinction between so-called “authentic fine art” and ivory carvings challenge the common distinction between so-called “authentic fine art” and commodity holds strong among much of the general public). be passe in the
空格 1demonstrations demonstrations / illustrations / expositions / introduction
搭配hands-on demonstrations「動手示範」固定搭配，後接 of techniques such as quillwork
單複數giving small hands-on ___，可數複數指多場示範
✗ illustrations「插圖」、expositions「展覽/論述」、introduction(單數且不搭 hands-on)皆不合「現場示範技藝」
空格 2overlook overview / overlap / overlook / oversee
詞性the halls that ___ the rotunda，關係從句需動詞，overlook「俯瞰」作及物動詞
語意走廊「俯瞰」圓形大廳，overlook 表方位語意正確
✗ overview/overlap 為名詞或不合語意；oversee「監督」與走廊俯瞰大廳不符
空格 3intentionally unintentionally / intentionally / accidentally / considerably
語意perhaps ___ designed to jar the visitor「或許是刻意設計來衝擊訪客」intentionally 與 designed 呼應
詞性副詞修飾 designed，表「刻意地」
✗ unintentionally/accidentally 與 designed to jar(刻意製造衝擊)矛盾；considerably「相當地」語意不合
空格 4which需覆核 a / distinction / which / may / seems / believes / becomes
詞性重組題：challenge the common distinction ___ ... may seem to be passé，需關係代名詞 which 引導子句
語意which 指代前面的 distinction，承接後文「(這區別)或許已過時」
✗ a/distinction(已出現)為名詞片段；may/seems/believes/becomes 為從句內動詞而非引導詞，故首選關代 which

As the economic depression deepened in the early 30s, and as farmers had less and less money to spend in their town, banks began to fail at 1alarming rates. During the 20s, there was an average of 70 spend in their town, banks began to fail at alarming rates. During the 20s, there was an average of 70 banks failing each year nationally. After the crash during the first 10 months of 1930, 744 banks 2failed-10 times as many. In all, 9,000 banks failed during the decade of the 30s. It's estimated that failed-10 times as many. In all, 9,000 banks failed during the decade of the 30s. It's estimated that 4,000 banks failed during the one year of 1933. By 1933, depositors saw $140 billion 3disappear through
空格 1alarming alarming / scaring / appalling / outrageous
搭配at alarming rates「以驚人速度」固定搭配
語意銀行倒閉「令人警惕」用 alarming 中性偏警示，貼合經濟蕭條語境
✗ scaring 非標準形容詞(應 scary)；appalling/outrageous「駭人/離譜」語氣過強且不搭 rates
空格 2failed destroyed / failed / ruined / succeeded
搭配banks failed「銀行倒閉」為固定用法，全段反覆出現 banks failed
時態與上下文 744 banks failed 一致用過去式
✗ destroyed/ruined 需被動或受詞，不合「銀行自身倒閉」；succeeded「成功」語意相反
空格 3disappear appear / expire / fade / disappear
語意$140 billion ___「1400億存款消失」disappear 與 saw...disappear 呼應
時態saw + 受詞 + 原形動詞(disappear)，知覺動詞接原形
✗ appear「出現」語意相反；expire「到期」、fade「褪去」不搭金錢數額的消失
94.The Eiffel Tower (艾菲爾鐵塔)5 格#080095
The Eiffel Tower was the tallest building in the world when it was completed in 1889. It was built for the World's Fair to 1demonstrate that iron could be as strong as stone while being infinitely lighter. And in fact, the wrought-iron tower is twice as tall as the masonry Washington Monument and yet it weighs 70,000 tons less! It is repainted every seven years with 50 tons of dark brown paint. Called "the father of the skyscraper," the Home Insurance Building, 2constructed in Chicago in 1885 (and demolished in 1931), was 138 feet tall and 10 stories. It was the first building to effectively employ a supporting 3skeleton of steel beams and columns, allowing it to have many more windows than traditional masonry structures. But this new construction method made people worry that the building would fall down, leading the city to halt construction until they could investigate the structure's safety. In 1929, auto tycoon Walter Chrysler took part in an intense race with the Bank of Manhattan Trust Company to build the world's tallest skyscraper. Just when it looked like the bank had captured the 4coveted title, workers at the Chrysler Building 5jacked a thin spire hidden inside the building through the top of the roof to win the contest (subsequently losing the title four months later to the Empire State Building). Chrysler also decorated his building to mirror his cars, with hubcaps, mudguards, and hood ornaments. demonstrate illustrate implicate affirm
空格 1demonstrate demonstrate / illustrate / implicate / affirm
語意built to ___ that iron could be as strong as stone「為證明鐵可像石頭一樣強」demonstrate「證明、展示」
搭配demonstrate that 從句，表用事實證明
✗ illustrate「圖示說明」、implicate「牽連」、affirm「斷言肯定」皆不及 demonstrate 表「以實物證明」貼切
空格 2constructed renovated / constructed / framed / invented
搭配constructed in Chicago in 1885「1885年於芝加哥建造」construct a building 固定搭配
時態the Home Insurance Building, ___ in Chicago，過去分詞作後置定語
✗ renovated「翻新」、framed「裝框」、invented「發明」皆不合「建造一棟大樓」
空格 3skeleton frame / concrete / skeleton / form
搭配supporting skeleton of steel beams「鋼樑支撐骨架」skeleton 喻建築「骨架結構」
語意與摩天樓之父呼應，指鋼骨「骨架」
✗ frame/form「框架/形式」不如 skeleton 慣用於鋼骨結構；concrete「混凝土」與 steel beams 矛盾
空格 4coveted coveted / worthwhile / constructive / destructive
搭配the coveted title「夢寐以求的頭銜」coveted 修飾 title 為固定搭配
語意兩家競爭世界最高樓頭銜，coveted「令人垂涎的」貼合競逐語境
✗ worthwhile「值得的」、constructive「建設性的」、destructive「破壞性的」皆不修飾 title 表「夢寐以求」
空格 5jacked jacked / escalated / aggrandized / inserted
搭配jacked a spire through the roof「用千斤頂把尖塔頂出屋頂」jack 表「頂升」，後文同詞 jacked 重現
語意暗藏尖塔被「頂升」穿過屋頂以奪冠，jacked 動作貼切
✗ escalated「升級」、aggrandized「擴大」、inserted「插入」皆不表「以千斤頂頂升尖塔穿出屋頂」
95.Paris Opera (巴黎歌劇院)4 格#080096
Most important of all is the fact that for each new ballet-pantomime created at the Paris Opera during the July Monarchy, a new score was produced. The reason for this is simple: these ballet-pantomimes told stories-elaborate ones-and music was considered an indispensable tool in getting them across to the audience. 1Therefore , music had to be newly created to fit each story Music tailor-made for each new ballet-pantomime, however, was only one weapon in the Opera's explanatory arsenal. 2Another was the ballet-pantomime libretto, a printed booklet of fifteen to forty pages in length, which was sold in the Operas lobby (like the opera libretto), and which laid out the plot in painstaking detail, scene by scene. Critics also took it upon themselves to recount the plots (of both ballet-pantomimes and operas) in their 3reviews of premieres. So did the publishers of souvenir albums, which also featured pictures of famous 4performers and of scenes from favorite ballet-pantomimes and operas. In_brief Nevertheless In_reality Therefore
空格 1Therefore Nevertheless / Therefore
語意前句說音樂是傳達故事的必要工具，本句推論「因此」每個故事都要新作音樂，因果關係
✗ Nevertheless「儘管如此」表轉折，與前後因果推論不符
空格 2Another Another / Others / ItIt
語意前句 music was only one weapon，本句 ___ was the libretto「另一項是劇本」Another 接續列舉
單複數Another + 單數，後接 was the ballet-pantomime libretto
✗ Others 為複數代名詞不搭單數 was；ItIt 為輸入錯字，非有效選項
空格 3reviews views / reviews / overviews / summaries
搭配in their reviews of premieres「在他們的首演評論中」review of sth 固定搭配
語意評論家重述劇情於「評論」中，reviews 最貼切
✗ views「看法」、overviews「概覽」、summaries「摘要」皆非評論家撰寫的「評論文」
空格 4performers teachers / students / performers / directors
搭配famous performers「著名表演者」與後文 scenes from ballet-pantomimes 並列出現於紀念冊
語意紀念冊放的是演出者照片，performers 貼合芭蕾默劇/歌劇語境
✗ teachers/students/directors 皆非紀念冊上以照片呈現的舞台「表演者」
96.Technology and education (技術與教育)4 格#080097
While workers worry about whether robots will take their jobs, teachers are wondering how to use education to insulate the next generation from such a fate. This 1has worked before. When the last wave of automation swept the developed world at the start of the 20th century, policymakers decided wave of automation swept the developed world at the start of the 20th century, policymakers decided education was the answer. “If machines were going to substitute for brawn”, they 2reasoned , “more people would need to use their brains”. The US invested 3heavily in education, with good results. people would need to use their brains”. The US invested heavily in education, with good results. Workers reaped the benefits through better jobs and higher wages. Economists Andrew McAfee and Erik Brynjolfsson summed it up like this: “The industrial revolution 4started a race between technology Erik Brynjolfsson summed it up like this: “The industrial revolution started a race between technology and education — and, for most of the 20th century, humans won that race.” 1 was_new has_worked didn't_work hasn't_worked
空格 1has worked was new / has worked / didn't work / hasn't worked
時態現在完成式表「過去做法至今仍有效」，呼應後文 When the last wave... 的舉例
語意語意：用教育防範自動化失業「以前奏效過」
✗ was new 語意不符；didn't work / hasn't worked 為否定，與後文「投資教育有好結果」矛盾。
空格 2reasoned reasoned / supposed / thought / guessed
語意語意：政策制定者「推理論證」道，引號內為其推論，reason 強調邏輯推導
✗ supposed、thought、guessed 偏「猜想」，不如 reasoned 切合有依據的論證語氣。
空格 3heavily heavily / rarely / slightly / scarcely
搭配invest heavily「大量投資」為固定搭配
語意後文 with good results 顯示投資量大且有成效
✗ rarely、slightly、scarcely 表少量/幾乎不，與大量投資且有成果矛盾。
空格 4started quitted / started / ceased / paused
搭配start a race「展開一場競賽」，搭配 race
語意語意：工業革命「開啟」技術與教育的競賽
✗ quitted、ceased、paused 皆表停止/中斷，與「開啟競賽」語意相反。
97.Complementary Therapies (補充療法)5 格#080098
Complementary therapies-such as those 1practised by naturopaths, chiropractors and acupuncturists- Complementary therapies-such as those practised by naturopaths, chiropractors and acupuncturists- have become increasingly popular in Australia over the last few 2decades . Interest initially coincided with 3enthusiasm for alternative lifestyles, while immigration and increased contact and trade with with enthusiasm for alternative lifestyles, while immigration and increased contact and trade with China have also had an 4influence . The status of complementary therapies is being re-visited in a number of areas: legal regulation; the stances of doctors' associations; their inclusion in medical number of areas: legal regulation; the stances of doctors' associations; their inclusion in medical education; and scientific research into their 5efficacy .
空格 1practised conducted / executed / practised / performed
搭配therapies practised by naturopaths「由…施行的療法」practise a therapy 固定搭配
時態those ___ by...，過去分詞作後置定語表被動 practised
✗ conducted/executed/performed 雖近義但 practise(medicine/therapy)為慣用語，最貼合療法施行
空格 2decades periods / decades / centuries / generations
搭配over the last few decades「過去數十年」decades 與 increasingly popular 的時間跨度相符
單複數the last few ___ 須可數複數，decades
✗ periods 太籠統；centuries「世紀」時間過長不符近數十年興起；generations「世代」非標準時間刻度
空格 3enthusiasm destination / ambition / aspiration / enthusiasm
搭配enthusiasm for alternative lifestyles「對另類生活方式的熱情」enthusiasm for 固定搭配
語意與 Interest initially coincided 呼應，指對另類生活的「熱衷」
✗ destination「目的地」、ambition/aspiration「抱負」皆不搭 for alternative lifestyles 表「熱情」
空格 4influence resolution / influence / result / outcome
搭配have an influence「產生影響」固定搭配，主詞 immigration and trade with China
語意移民與貿易「也有影響」，influence 貼合
✗ resolution「決議」、result/outcome「結果」皆不搭 have an ___ 表「造成影響」
空格 5efficacy capacity / effigy / efficacy / efficiency
搭配research into their efficacy「研究其療效」efficacy「功效」指療法是否有效
語意科學研究補充療法的「療效」，efficacy 為醫學專用詞
✗ capacity「容量」、effigy「肖像」語意全錯；efficiency「效率」指投入產出比，非療法「療效」efficacy
98.Mechanical engineering (機械工程)5 格#080099
Mechanical engineering was at the heart of Taylor’s theorizing, providing the context for its Mechanical engineering was at the heart of Taylor’s theorizing, providing the context for its development, the world view by which it was sustained and, finally, the justification for its widespread application. Scientific management aimed to analyse and control the activities of people in the same application. Scientific management aimed to analyse and control the activities of people 1in the same way that engineers analysed and controlled machines. Central 2to Taylor’s system was the desire 3to rationalize and standardize production techniques in the interests of economy, efficiency and mutual rationalize and standardize production techniques in the interests of economy, efficiency and mutual prosperity. His primary point of interest was the individual worker 4pursuing individual goals and motivated by incentive payments. 5Undoubtedly Taylor’s view of human motivation was somewhat motivated by incentive payments. Undoubtedly Taylor’s view of human motivation was somewhat simplistic and his apprehension of the significance of groups was limited and generally negative. 1 in_the_same_way_which in_the_same_way_that with_the_same_way_whi with_the_same_way_of to_rationalize of_rationalize for_rationalizing to_rationalized 3 to_rationalize of_rationalize for_rationalizing to_rationalized pursue who_pursue who_pursuing pursuing Conversely Consequently Undoubtedly Particularly
空格 1in the same way that in the same way which / in the same way that / with the same way which / with the same way of ch
搭配in the same way that「以…相同的方式」為固定句型，that 引導方式子句
✗ in the same way which 用 which 不慣用；with the same way 介系詞錯誤。
空格 2to to / of / towards / within
搭配Central to Taylor's system「對泰勒系統而言核心的」，形容詞 central 搭配 to
✗ of、towards、within 皆不與 central 構成「對…而言核心」的慣用搭配。
空格 3to rationalize to rationalize / of rationalize / for rationalizing / to rationalized
時態the desire to rationalize「將…合理化的渴望」，desire 後接不定詞
詞性to + 原形動詞 rationalize
✗ of rationalize 文法錯；for rationalizing 不接 desire；to rationalized 動詞形式錯誤。
空格 4pursuing pursue / who pursue / who pursuing / pursuing
詞性現在分詞片語 pursuing individual goals 後位修飾 the individual worker
時態the worker 已有主句動詞 was，故用分詞而非限定動詞
✗ pursue/who pursue 會造成雙重動詞或須關係詞；who pursuing 文法錯誤。
空格 5Undoubtedly Conversely / Consequently / Undoubtedly / Particularly
語意語意：「無疑地」泰勒的人性動機觀過於簡化，表作者肯定的評斷語氣
✗ Conversely、Consequently、Particularly 皆不符此處「毋庸置疑」的評論語氣。
99.Burger King (漢堡王)5 格#080100
Drive down any highway，and you’ll see a proliferation of chain restaurants—most likely, if you travel long and far enough you’ll see McDonald's golden arches as well as signs for Burger King, long and far enough you’ll see McDonald's golden arches as well as signs for Burger King, Hardee’s，and Wendy’s the “big four” of burgers. Despite its name, though Burger King has fallen short of 1claiming the burger crown, unable to surpass market leader McDonald's No. 1 sales fallen short of claiming the burger crown, unable to surpass market leader McDonald's No. 1 sales status. Always the bridesmaid and never the bride, Burger King remains No. 2. Worse yet, Burger King has experienced a six-year 22 percent decline in customer traffic, with its overall quality rating has experienced a six-year 22 percent decline in customer traffic, with its overall quality rating dropping while ratings for the other three 2contenders have increased. The decline has been attributed to inconsistent product quality and poor customer service. Although the chain tends to throw to inconsistent product quality and poor customer service. Although the chain tends to throw advertising dollars at the problem, an understanding of Integrated Marketing Communication theory would suggest that internal management problems (nineteen CEOs in fifty years) need to be 3rectified would suggest that internal management problems (nineteen CEOs in fifty years) need to be rectified before a unified, long-term strategy can be put in place. The 4importance of consistency in brand image and messages, at all levels of communication, has become a basic tenet of IMC theory and practice. and messages, at all levels of communication, has become a basic tenet of IMC theory and practice. The person who takes the customer’s order must communicate the same message as Burger King's famous tagline, "Have it your way,” or the customer will just buzz up the highway to a chain famous tagline, "Have it your way,” or the customer will just buzz up the highway to a chain restaurant that seems more consistent and, therefore, more 5reliable .
空格 1claiming claiming / winning / remaining / gaining
搭配claim the crown/title「奪得王冠/頭銜」固定搭配，呼應 No.1 sales status
時態fallen short of ___，介系詞 of 後接動名詞 claiming
✗ winning 雖近義但不搭 the burger crown 慣用；remaining/gaining 與「奪冠」語意不合
空格 2contenders participants / candidates / contenders / attendances
語意指其他三家漢堡連鎖為競爭「對手」contenders，與前文 surpass market leader 競爭語境一致
單複數the other three ___ 須複數，contenders
✗ participants「參與者」、candidates「候選人」、attendances「出席(且不可數計人)」皆不合市場「競爭者」之意
空格 3rectified rectified / identified / recognized / ratified
語意internal management problems need to be ___「內部管理問題需被改正」rectify「糾正」最貼切
時態need to be + 過去分詞被動，rectified
✗ identified「辨識」、recognized「認出」未解決問題；ratified「批准」語意全錯
空格 4importance importance / principal / element / outcome
詞性句首主詞需名詞：The ___ of consistency「一致性的重要性」importance of 固定搭配
語意後接 has become a basic tenet，主詞為抽象名詞 importance
✗ principal(形容詞/校長)詞性不符；element/outcome 與 of consistency...has become a tenet 語意不通
空格 5reliable accessible / reputable / prestigious / reliable
搭配more consistent and, therefore, more reliable「更一致因而更可靠」consistent→reliable 因果呼應
✗ accessible「可接近」、reputable「有名望」、prestigious「有聲望」皆非由「一致性」直接推出的特質
100.Dictatorship (專政)5 格#080101
Dictatorship is not a modern concept. Two thousand years ago, during the period of the Roman Dictatorship is not a modern concept. Two thousand years ago, during the period of the Roman Republic, exceptional powers were sometimes given by the Senate to 1individual dictators such as Sulla and Julius Caesar. The 2intention was that the dictatorship would be temporary and that it would make and Julius Caesar. The intention was that the dictatorship would be temporary and that it would make it POSSIBLE to take swift and effective action to deal with an emergency. There is some 3disagreement as to how the term should be 4applied today. Should it be used in its original form to describe the as to how the term should be 5applied today. Should it be used in its original form to describe the temporary exercise of emergency powers? Or can it now be applied in a much broader sense-as intention innovation content intent concession disagreement assent admission using applied utilizing granted
空格 1individual individual / sole / exclusive / personal
搭配individual dictators「個別的獨裁者」後接 such as Sulla and Julius Caesar 點名個人
語意強調權力交給「個別」執政者，individual 最貼切
✗ sole「唯一」、exclusive「專屬」、personal「個人的」皆不及 individual 指「一個個獨裁者」自然
空格 2intention intention / innovation / content / intent
搭配The intention was that...「用意是…」intention + that 從句固定搭配
語意說明設立獨裁的「意圖」是暫時應急，intention 貼切
✗ innovation「創新」、content「內容」語意全錯；intent 雖近義但不常接 The intent was that 此句型，intention 更自然
空格 3disagreement concession / disagreement / assent / admission
搭配some disagreement as to how...「對於…有些分歧」disagreement as to 固定搭配
語意後文用 Should it...? Or...? 呈現兩種對立看法，呼應 disagreement「分歧」
✗ concession「讓步」、assent/admission「同意/承認」皆與後文呈現對立爭議的語意相反
空格 4applied using / applied / utilizing / granted
搭配be applied in its original form「以原始形式被應用」apply...in 固定搭配，呼應前句 applied today
時態Should it be ___，被動結構需過去分詞 applied
✗ using/utilizing 為主動分詞不合被動；granted「授予」語意不符「套用此術語」
空格 5applied availed / appreciated / applied / exploited
搭配be applied in a much broader sense「以更廣義被應用」與 n4 平行對照(original form vs broader sense)
時態can it now be ___，被動需過去分詞 applied
✗ availed/appreciated/exploited 皆不搭 in a broader sense，且與前句 applied 的平行結構不符
101.Mayan Civilisation (瑪雅文明)3 格#080102
The Classic era of Mayan 1civilisation came to an end around 900 AD. Why this happened is unclear; the cities were probably over-farming the land, so that a 2period of drought led to famine. Recent cities were probably over-farming the land, so that a period of drought led to famine. Recent geological 3research supports this, as there appears to have been a 200-year drought around this time.
空格 1civilisation civilisation / society / association / community
搭配Mayan civilisation「瑪雅文明」固定專名搭配
語意The Classic era of Mayan ___ 指文明的古典時期，civilisation 最貼題
✗ society/association/community 偏「社會/協會/社區」，無法表「文明」整體概念
空格 2period period / space / phase / span
搭配a period of drought「一段乾旱期」period of 固定搭配
語意後文 a 200-year drought 呼應一「時期」
✗ space「空間」不指時間；phase「階段」、span「跨度」皆不及 a period of drought 慣用
空格 3research research / expedition / interrogation / explore
搭配geological research「地質研究」固定搭配，後文 supports this
詞性Recent geological ___ 須名詞作主詞，research(不可數)正確
✗ expedition「探險」、interrogation「審訊」語意不符；explore 為動詞詞性錯誤
102.Copyright’s roles (版權的作用)4 格#080103
As demand for food and competition for land rises, it is vital that crop losses are limited. Chemical As demand for food and competition for land rises, it is vital that crop losses are limited. Chemical protection has 1provided effective control of crop losses in recent years. Alongside chemical fertilizers and improved crop genetics, it has helped to increase crop yields dramatically over the last six and improved crop genetics, it has helped to increase crop yields dramatically over the last six decades. 2However , there is now a need to develop complementary alternatives, and researchers from the Rural Economy and Land Use Program have been exploring the potential of--and barriers the Rural Economy and Land Use Program have been exploring the potential of--and barriers to--alternative pest management approaches. 'Alternatives to chemical pesticides are 3needed because overuse of them leads to pesticide resistance and affects biodiversity and water quality,' says Dr overuse of them leads to pesticide resistance and affects biodiversity and water quality,' says Dr Alastair Bailey. 'Heightened EU regulations are also leading to the withdrawal of many pesticide products. 4Hence , complementary approaches are required to reduce use and preserve the efficacy of products. Hence , complementary approaches are required to reduce use and preserve the efficacy of those valuable pesticides that are still available to sustain food production systems. 3 needed on_demand in_need upon_request
空格 1provided been provided / provided / be providing / providing
時態現在完成式 has provided，主句後文 it has helped 一致，provided 為過去分詞
✗ been provided 為被動，主詞 chemical protection 應主動提供；be providing、providing 動詞形式不符 has 之後。
空格 2However Thus / However / Alternatively / In lieu
語意語意：前述化學防治成效顯著，「然而」現在需發展替代方案，轉折
✗ Thus（因此）、Alternatively（或者）、In lieu 皆不符前後成效與需求之間的轉折關係。
空格 3needed needed / on demand / in need / upon request
詞性Alternatives... are needed「替代方案是被需要的」，be + 過去分詞被動
語意後文 because overuse... 解釋為何需要
✗ on demand、in need、upon request 為片語，無法構成 be 後的被動述語且語意不符。
空格 4Hence Hence / However / But / Anyway
語意語意：因法規導致農藥下架，「因此」需要互補方案，表因果結果
✗ However、But、Anyway 皆偏轉折，與此處由原因導出結論的因果不符。
103.Australian women novelist (澳大利亞女小說家)6 格#080104
In the literary world, it was an accepted assumption that the 1970s was a time of unprecedented In the literary world, it was an accepted assumption that the 1970s was a time of unprecedented growth in homegrown Australian fiction. And everybody was reading and talking about books by young Australian women. But it was 1not until recently that a researcher was able to measure just how young Australian women. But it was not until recently that a researcher was able to measure just how many novels were published in that decade, and she found that there 2had been a decline in novels by Australian writers overall, but confirmed an increase in women’s novels. It is this sort of research- Australian writers overall, but confirmed an increase in women’s novels. It is this sort of research- testing ideas about literary history – that is becoming possible with the spread of ‘Digital Humanities.’ The intersection of Humanities and digital technologies 3is opening up opportunities in Humanities.’ The intersection of Humanities and digital technologies is opening up opportunities in the fields of literature, linguistics, history and language that 4were not possible without computational methods and digitized resources to 5bring information together in an accessible way. Transcription methods and digitized resources to bring information together in an accessible way. Transcription software is being developed for turning scans of books and documents into text, as the field of digital humanities really takes 6off . humanities really takes off . 2 had_been will_be isis has_been is_opened_up is_opening_up is_opened_to is_opening_to 3 is_opened_up is_opening_up is_opened_to is_opening_to could_be_possible can_be_possible was_not_possible were_not_possible 4 could_be_possible can_be_possible was_not_possible were_not_possible bring access fetch utilize
空格 1not until not until / until / till / unless
搭配It was not until... that...「直到…才…」為強調句型固定搭配
✗ until/till 單用不構成此強調句型；unless（除非）語意不符。
空格 2had been had been / will be / is / has been
時態過去完成式 had been a decline，表在過去研究發現之前更早的衰退，時間早於主句過去式 found
✗ will be 未來式錯；is 現在式與過去敘述不符；has been 現在完成式不接更早的過去。
空格 3is opening up is opened up / is opening up / is opened to / is opening to
搭配open up opportunities「開創機會」為片語動詞，搭配 up
時態現在進行式描述數位人文正在帶來機會
✗ is opened up/to 為被動，主詞 intersection 應主動開創；is opening to 介系詞錯誤。
空格 4were not possible could be possible / can be possible / was not possible / were not possible
單複數先行詞 opportunities 為複數，關係子句動詞用 were
時態敘述過去（沒有運算方法時）不可能，用過去式 were
✗ could/can be possible 與 possible 語意重複且時態不符；was not possible 為單數，與複數先行詞不一致。
空格 5bring bring / access / fetch / utilize
搭配bring information together「把資訊匯整在一起」，搭配 together
詞性to + 原形動詞，bring 為原形
✗ access、fetch、utilize 皆不與 together 構成「匯整資訊」的慣用搭配。
空格 6off up / in / on / off
搭配take off「起飛、蓬勃發展」為片語動詞，搭配 off
✗ up、in、on 與 take 雖可搭配但語意不符「（領域）蓬勃興起」。
104.Primates (靈長類動物)4 格#080105
With their punk hairstyles and bright colors, marmosets and tamarins are among the most attractive primates on earth. These fast-moving, lightweight animals live in the rainforests of South America. primates on earth. These fast-moving, lightweight animals live in the rainforests of South America. Their small size 1makes it easy for them to dart about the trees, catching insects and small animals such as lizards, frogs, and snails. Marmosets have another unusual food 2source-they -they use their chisel-like as lizards, frogs, and snails. Marmosets have another unusual food source use their chisel-like incisor teeth to dig into tree bark and lap up the gummy sap that seeps out, leaving telltale, oval- shaped holes in the 3branches when they have finished. But as vast tracts of rainforest are cleared for shaped holes in the branches when they have finished. But as vast tracts of rainforest are cleared for plantations and cattle ranches marmosets and tamarins are in serious 4danger of extinction. derivation source originality provenance trims lawns branches roots circumstance occasion eagerness danger
空格 1makes fetches / makes / brings / claims
搭配makes it easy for them to...「使牠們容易…」make it + adj + for sb to do 固定句型
單複數主詞 Their small size 單數，第三人稱單數 makes
✗ fetches/brings/claims 皆不能構成 make it easy for sb to do 的使役句型
空格 2source derivation / source / originality / provenance
搭配food source「食物來源」固定搭配，another unusual food ___
✗ derivation「衍生」、originality「原創性」、provenance「出處(偏文物來源)」皆不搭 food
空格 3branches trims / lawns / branches / roots
語意leaving holes in the ___，狨猴咬樹皮留洞在「樹枝」上，後文 holes in the branches 同詞重現
單複數in the ___ 指多處樹枝，複數 branches
✗ trims/lawns/roots 語意為「修剪/草坪/樹根」，與咬樹皮取樹液留洞於枝幹不符
空格 4danger circumstance / occasion / eagerness / danger
搭配in serious danger of extinction「面臨絕種的嚴重危險」in danger of 固定搭配
✗ circumstance/occasion「情況/場合」、eagerness「渴望」皆不搭 of extinction 的危機語意
105.Mike’s Research (邁克的研究)6 格#080106
In 2001 he received the SIUC Outstanding Scholar Award. In 2003 he received the Carski Award for Distinguished Undergraduate Teaching from the American Society for Microbiology. Mike’s research Distinguished Undergraduate Teaching from the American Society for Microbiology. Mike’s research is 1focused on bacteria that inhabit 2extreme environments, and for the past 12 years he has studied the microbiology of permanently ice-covered lakes in the McMurdo Dry Valleys, Antarctica. In addition to microbiology of permanently ice-covered lakes in the McMurdo Dry Valleys, Antarctica. In addition to his research papers, he has edited a major 3treatise on phototrophic bacteria and served for over a decade as chief editor of the 4journal Archives of Microbiology. He currently serves on the editorial decade as chief editor of the journal Archives of Microbiology. He currently serves on the editorial board of Environmental Microbiology. Mike’s non-scientific 5interests include forestry, reading, and caring for his dogs and horses. He lives 6beside a peaceful and quiet lake with his wife, Nancy, five caring for his dogs and horses. He lives beside a peaceful and quiet lake with his wife, Nancy, five shelter dogs (Gaino, Snuffy, Pepto, Peanut, and Merry), and four horses (Springer, Feivel, Gwen, and tale consideration treatise press magazine review newspaper journal majors projects interests undertakings
空格 1focused shifted / adjusted / focused / altered
搭配research is focused on「研究聚焦於」be focused on 固定搭配，後接 bacteria
時態is ___ on 被動，過去分詞 focused
✗ shifted/adjusted/altered 偏「轉移/調整/改變」，不搭 be...on 表「專注於」
空格 2extreme stiff / chilly / extreme / rigid
搭配extreme environments「極端環境」固定搭配，呼應後文南極冰封湖泊
✗ stiff/rigid「僵硬」修飾物體；chilly「微寒」程度不足以形容南極極端環境
空格 3treatise tale / consideration / treatise / press
搭配edited a major treatise on...「主編一部關於…的專著」treatise on 固定搭配
語意學術語境中編輯的是「專著」treatise，與 research papers 並列
✗ tale「故事」、consideration「考量」、press「出版社/媒體」皆非可被 edit 的學術專著
空格 4journal magazine / review / newspaper / journal
搭配chief editor of the journal Archives of Microbiology「期刊主編」journal 指學術期刊
語意Archives of Microbiology 為學術期刊名，前用 journal
✗ magazine「雜誌」、review「評論」、newspaper「報紙」皆非學術期刊，與 Archives of Microbiology 不符
空格 5interests majors / projects / interests / undertakings
搭配non-scientific interests include...「非學術興趣包括」interests 後接 forestry, reading 等嗜好
單複數include 後列多項，複數 interests
✗ majors「主修」、projects「專案」、undertakings「事業」皆不指 forestry/reading/caring 這類個人「興趣」
空格 6beside along / approach / beside / remote
搭配lives beside a lake「住在湖邊」beside 表「在…旁邊」，後文 beside a peaceful lake 同詞重現
詞性需介系詞接 a lake，beside 正確
✗ along「沿著」不指定點居住；approach 為動詞/名詞詞性不符；remote「遙遠」非介系詞
106.Outer space affect human body (外層空間影響人體)4 格#080107
Researchers already know that spending long periods of time in a zero-gravity 1environment such as that inside the International Space Station (ISS)---result in loss of bone density and 2damage to the that inside the International Space Station (ISS)---result in loss of bone density and damage to the body’s muscles. That’s partly why stays aboard the ISS are 3limited at six months. And now, a number of NASA astronauts are reporting that their 2.0 /2.0 4vision faded after spending time in space, number of NASA astronauts are reporting that their 2.0 /2.0 vision faded after spending time in space, with many needing glasses once they returned to Earth.
空格 1environment environment / climate / atmosphere / circumstantial
搭配zero-gravity environment「零重力環境」environment 指太空生存環境
語意後文 inside the ISS 描述身處的「環境」
✗ climate「氣候」、atmosphere「大氣」偏地球氣候；circumstantial 為形容詞詞性錯誤
空格 2damage damage / obtain / recover / enhancement
搭配loss of bone density and ___ to muscles，damage to「對…的損害」與 loss 並列為名詞
語意與 loss of bone density 並列負面影響，damage 貼切
✗ obtain/recover「取得/恢復」為動詞且語意正面相反；enhancement「增強」與肌肉受損矛盾
空格 3limited allowed / limited / admitted / permitted
搭配stays...are limited at six months「停留期限定為六個月」be limited at/to 表上限
語意因健康風險而「限制」停留時間，limited 貼合
✗ allowed/admitted/permitted「允許」表開放而非設上限，與 partly why(因風險)語意不符
空格 4vision view / proportion / sight / vision
搭配2.0/2.0 vision faded「視力下降」vision 指視力，後文 needing glasses 呼應
語意太空人「視力」衰退，vision 最貼切
✗ view「景觀」、proportion「比例」語意不合；sight 雖近義但 2.0 vision(視力值)為固定用法
107.Children’s music choices (兒童音樂選擇)5 格#080108
The general perception is that children are surrounded by a variety of musical experiences. There are The general perception is that children are surrounded by a variety of musical experiences. There are often fewer and fewer opportunities for children to actively engage in music making themselves. They are 1inundated with music emitting from 2a wide array of electronic devices, toys, and computers are inundated with music emitting from a wide array of electronic devices, toys, and computers offering a limitless number of musical selections. However, much of the music in children’s lives is “unchosen,” in other words they are 3passive recipients in much of the music in their lives, and not “unchosen,” in other words they are passive recipients in much of the music in their lives, and not actively engaged in its selection. They experience background music in computer games, cartoons, TV shows, films, on iPads, radios, and ringtones. They listen to music choices of their parents or siblings, shows, films, on iPads, radios, and ringtones. They listen to music choices of their parents or siblings, and even the schools they attend often play music before the school day begins or in classrooms 4while students are working. Studies are being conducted on the effects of the ubiquitous pre-recorded students are working. Studies are being conducted on the effects of the ubiquitous pre-recorded music they encounter and whether or not it 5is intruding on their desire to make their own music or interact with each other on the playground. interact with each other on the playground. a_wide_array a_selection a_choice parts 2 a_wide_array a_selection a_choice parts passive pleasant pleased pessimistic as unless even_if while 5 has_interfered will_affect has_meddled is_intruding
空格 1inundated puzzled / inundated / furnished / worried
搭配be inundated with「被…淹沒、充斥」為固定搭配，後接 with music
✗ puzzled、furnished、worried 皆不與 with music 構成「被音樂充斥」的慣用語意。
空格 2a wide array a wide array / a selection / a choice / parts
搭配a wide array of「一大批、各式各樣的」固定搭配，後接 of devices
✗ a selection、a choice、parts 皆不如 a wide array 切合「種類繁多的電子裝置」語意。
空格 3passive passive / pleasant / pleased / pessimistic
語意語意：孩童是音樂的「被動」接收者（passive recipients），呼應 not actively engaged
✗ pleasant、pleased、pessimistic 皆不符與 not actively engaged 對應的「被動」語意。
空格 4while as / unless / even if / while
語意語意：學校在上課前或課堂上「同時/期間」播放音樂，while 表時間/同時
✗ as 雖可表時間但較不貼切；unless（除非）、even if（即使）語意不符。
空格 5is intruding has interfered / will affect / has meddled / is intruding
搭配intrude on「侵擾、干擾」為片語動詞，搭配 on their desire
時態現在進行式呼應前文 Studies are being conducted 的當下情境
✗ has interfered、has meddled 須接 with 而非 on；will affect 為及物不接 on，且時態與搭配不符。

Research by Monash University academic Bob Birrell has found a third of foreign students are graduating without a competent level of English. But Ms Bishop says Australian universities only enrol foreign students once they have achieved English. But Ms Bishop says Australian universities only enrol foreign students once they have achieved international standards of language 2proficiency . "This has been an extraordinary attack by Professor Birrell on our universities," she said. "International students must meet international 3benchmarks in Birrell on our universities," she said. "International students must meet international benchmarks in English language in order to get a place at a university in Australia and they can't get into university without reaching that international standard." University of Canberra vice chancellor Roger Dean also without reaching that international standard." University of Canberra vice chancellor Roger Dean also says international students are required to sit an English test before being admitted to nearly all Australian universities. "There are, of course, intercultural difficulties as well as language difficulties," he Australian universities. "There are, of course, intercultural difficulties as well as language difficulties," he said. "There are, of course, also many Australian students who don't speak such 4fantastically good English either. So we're trying to push the standard even higher than present but it's a very useful one English either. So we're trying to push the standard even higher than present but it's a very useful one already." Ms Bishop says Australia's university system has high standards. "I've seen no 5evidence to suggest that students are not able to complete their courses because they're failing in English yet suggest that students are not able to complete their courses because they're failing in English yet they're being passed by the universities," she said. "I've not seen any evidence to back that up. International education is one of our largest exports, it's our fourth largest export and it's in the International education is one of our largest exports, it's our fourth largest export and it's in the interest of our universities to maintain very high standards because their international 6recognition is at expertise proficiency technique communication demands benchmarks thresholds measure usually smoothly fantastically fluently
空格 1with to / with / for / on
搭配graduate from...with poor English skills「帶著差勁英語畢業」graduate with 固定搭配
✗ to/for/on 皆不能與 graduate 搭配表「以…(技能/學位)畢業」，唯 graduate with
空格 2proficiency expertise / proficiency / technique / communication
搭配language proficiency「語言能力/熟練度」固定搭配，呼應 competent level of English
✗ expertise「專業」、technique「技巧」、communication「溝通」皆不及 language proficiency 慣用且精準
空格 3benchmarks demands / benchmarks / thresholds / measure
搭配meet international benchmarks「達到國際標準」benchmark 指基準標準
語意與後文 international standard 同義替換，指須達到的「基準」
✗ demands「要求」、thresholds「門檻」雖近義但 meet benchmarks 最貼語境；measure(單數且偏「措施」)不合
空格 4fantastically usually / smoothly / fantastically / fluently
搭配fantastically good English「好得驚人的英語」fantastically 程度副詞修飾 good
語意對比本國學生英語也未必那麼好，fantastically good 帶口語誇張語氣
✗ usually/smoothly/fluently 皆不修飾 good 表「極好的程度」，唯 fantastically good 自然
空格 5evidence sustainer / evidence / sturdiness / resistance
搭配seen no evidence to suggest「沒看到證據顯示」呼應前後文 I've seen no evidence 重複
語意部長強調缺乏「證據」，evidence 貼合
✗ sustainer/sturdiness/resistance「支撐者/堅固/抵抗」皆與「證據」語意無關
空格 6recognition identification / recognition / status / situation
搭配international recognition「國際聲譽/認可」固定搭配，呼應大學維持高標準的動機
✗ identification「辨識」、status「地位」、situation「情況」皆不及 international recognition 表「國際認可聲譽」貼切
109.Snails (蝸牛)3 格#080110
Snails are not traditionally known for quick thinking, but new research shows they can make complex decisions using just two brain cells in 1findings that could help engineers design more efficient robots. decisions using just two brain cells in findings that could help engineers design more efficient robots. Scientists at the University of Sussex attached electrodes to the 2heads of freshwater snails as they searched for lettuce. They found that just one cell was used by the mollusc to tell if it was 3hungry or searched for lettuce. They found that just one cell was used by the mollusc to tell if it was hungry or not, while another let it know when food was present. Foodsearching is an example of goal-directed behaviour, during which an animal must integrate information about both its external environment behaviour, during which an animal must integrate information about both its external environment and internal state while using as little energy as possible. Lead researcher Professor George Kemenes, sai “This will eventually help us design the” brain “of robots based on the principle of using the sai “This will eventually help us design the” brain “of robots based on the principle of using the fewest possible components necessary to perform complex tasks.”What goes on in our brains when we make complex behavioural decisions and carry them out is poorly understood.”Our study reveals we make complex behavioural decisions and carry them out is poorly understood.”Our study reveals for the first time how just two neurons can create a mechanism in an animal's brain which drives and optimises complex decision-making tasks. optimises complex decision-making tasks. heads brains peak top empty hungry content satisfied
空格 1findings decisions / findings / outcomes / recommendations
搭配in findings that...「在…的研究發現中」與前文 new research shows 呼應
語意整合 new research 的結果，findings「研究發現」最貼切
✗ decisions「決定」、outcomes「結果」、recommendations「建議」皆不及「研究發現」搭配 research 自然
空格 2heads heads / brains / peak / top
搭配attached electrodes to the heads of snails「把電極接到蝸牛頭上」to the heads of 固定搭配
語意實驗在蝸牛「頭部」接電極，heads 符合生理位置
✗ brains 雖近但電極接於體表「頭部」而非腦內；peak/top「頂端」不指蝸牛頭
空格 3hungry empty / hungry / content / satisfied
語意one cell tell if it was ___ or not「判斷是否飢餓」與後文 when food was present 對應，hungry 貼切
✗ empty「空的」不形容生物飢餓狀態；content/satisfied「滿足」與 or not(判斷飢餓與否)語意不對應
110.Democratic government (民主政府)6 格#080111
The essential problem, as Rosenfeld sees it, is that democratic government is predicated on an aspiration to collective truth. 1Unlike older systems of aristocratic and monarchical rule, which excluded the people from power and stressed the need for administrative secrecy, the new republics of the late 18th century, and the more egalitarian mass democracies that 2succeeded them, depended on openness and trust between citizens and rulers. Through the free discussion and united wisdom of the educated and the masses, errors would be dispelled, “public knowledge” established and societies advanced. And yet, she points out, the reality has never 3lived up to this powerful idea. From the 4outset , 5democratic societies contained vast inequalities of power and education, and their media have always been driven by commercial and partisan imperatives. In 6practice , instead of a free civil marketplace of ideas, politics has always been a vicious fight over the truth and the power of determining it. 3 lived_up dreamed_bout arise livin_in offset outset compensate set_up autocratic dictatorial democratic monopolistic practice discipline preparation experience
空格 1Unlike These / Which / Unless / Unlike
詞性句首需介系詞引導對比片語 Unlike older systems...「不同於…」
語意對比舊制度排除人民與新共和國依賴開放信任
✗ These、Which 無法引導此對比片語；Unless（除非）語意不符。
空格 2succeeded successful / succeeded / succeeding / success
時態關係子句 that succeeded them「繼之而起的」，過去式 succeeded 接受詞 them
詞性succeed 作及物動詞「接續、繼…之後」
✗ successful、success 為形容詞/名詞無法作動詞；succeeding 分詞使結構不完整。
空格 3lived up lived up / dreamed bout / arise / livin in
搭配live up to「符合、不負（期望）」為片語動詞，後接 to this powerful idea
✗ dreamed bout、arise、livin in 拼字/結構錯誤，且不與 to 構成「達到理想」語意。
空格 4outset offset / outset / compensate / set up
搭配from the outset「從一開始」為固定片語
✗ offset（抵銷）、compensate、set up 皆不與 from the 構成「從一開始」的慣用語。
空格 5democratic autocratic / dictatorial / democratic / monopolistic
語意語意：呼應全文主題 democratic government/societies，民主社會內部仍存巨大不平等
✗ autocratic、dictatorial、monopolistic 與全文討論的「民主社會」主題不符。
空格 6practice practice / discipline / preparation / experience
搭配In practice「實際上、在實踐中」為固定片語，與前文 powerful idea 形成理想對實務的對比
✗ discipline、preparation、experience 皆不與 In 構成「實際上」的慣用片語。
111.Sustainable transportation system (可持續交通系統)6 格#080112
A sustainable transportation system is one in which people needs and desires for access to jobs, commerce, recreation, culture and home are accommodated using a minimum of resources. Applying commerce, recreation, culture and home are accommodated using a minimum of resources. Applying 1principles of sustainability to transportation will reduce pollution generated by gasoline-powered engines, noise, traffic congestion, land devaluation, urban sprawl, economic segregation, and injury to engines, noise, traffic congestion, land devaluation, urban sprawl, economic segregation, and injury to drivers, pedestrians and cyclists. In addition, the costs of commuting, shipping, housing and goods will be 2reduced . Ultimately in a sustainable San Francisco, almost all trips to and 3within the City will be on be reduced . Ultimately in a sustainable San Francisco, almost all trips to and within the City will be on public transit, foot or bicycle-as will a good part of trips to the larger Bay Region. Walking through streets designed for pedestrians and bicycles will be more pleasant than walking through those streets designed for pedestrians and bicycles will be more pleasant than walking through those designed for the automobile. Street-front retail and commercial establishments will 4prosper from the large 5volume of foot traffic drawn to an environment enhanced by trees, appropriately designed large volume of foot traffic drawn to an environment enhanced by trees, appropriately designed “street furniture,” (street lights, bicycle racks, benches, and the like) and other people. Rents and property costs will be lowered as land for off-street parking is no 6longer required or needed. property costs will be lowered as land for off-street parking is no longer required or needed. among within off beside prosper be_prospered prospering prosperous
空格 1principles laws / stipulations / principles / regulations
搭配固定搭配 principles of sustainability（永續的原則）
語意語意指「應用永續原則於交通」，非具體法條
✗ laws/regulations/stipulations 都偏「法律/法規條文」，太具體且不搭 of sustainability
空格 2reduced steadied / fluctuated / reduced / stablized
時態前面 the costs will be 後接過去分詞構成被動 will be reduced
語意語意：通勤、運輸等成本「被降低」
✗ steadied/stablized 是「穩定」、fluctuated 是「波動」，語意不符；且 fluctuated 為主動式不合被動結構
空格 3within among / within / off / beside
搭配trips to and within the City（到城市與在城市內的行程）固定搭配
語意與 to 並列，需表「在…之內」
✗ among 用於三者以上之間、off「離開」、beside「在旁邊」皆不合「市區範圍內」語意
空格 4prosper prosper / prospering / prosperous
時態助動詞 will 後須接原形動詞 prosper
詞性句子需要動詞當謂語，非分詞或形容詞
✗ prospering 是現在分詞、prosperous 是形容詞，皆不能直接接在 will 後當主要動詞
空格 5volume capacity / volume / content / quantity
搭配固定搭配 volume of foot traffic（人流量）
語意指「大量的人潮步行流量」
✗ capacity 是「容量上限」、content「內容物」、quantity 多指可數數量，皆不搭 foot traffic
空格 6longer further / furthermore / less / longer
搭配no longer required（不再被需要）固定搭配 no longer
語意停車空間「不再」被需要
✗ further/furthermore 表「進一步」、less 表程度減少，皆不構成 no longer 慣用語

Secondly, come from pollen, it is fine powdery substance in yellow, consisting of microscopic grains 2discharged from the male part of a flower or from a male cone. It contains a male gamete that can fertilize the female ovule, which is 3transferred by wind, insects or other animals. Let us go with the honeybee from her flower to the hive and see what happens. Most bees gather only pollen or nectar. As she sucks nectar from the flower, it is 4stored in her special honey stomach ready to be transferred to the honey- making bees in the live. fetch encourage urge push discharging discharged discharge charged
空格 1encourage fetch / encourage / urge / push
語意花蜜的目的是「鼓勵/促進」昆蟲授粉 encourage pollination
搭配encourage + 名詞表「促進某事」
✗ fetch「取回」、urge/push 帶強迫意味且不搭 pollination，語意偏激不自然
空格 2discharged discharging / discharged / discharge / charged
時態grains 與 discharge 是被動關係，用過去分詞 discharged 作後位修飾（被釋放的顆粒）
語意微小顆粒「被排放自」花的雄性部分

時態which is ___ by wind 為被動，需過去分詞
語意花粉「被傳遞/搬運」by 風、昆蟲
✗ transformed「轉變」、transcended「超越」、transitioned「過渡」皆非「搬運傳遞」之意
空格 4stored lay / discarded / stored / disposed
時態it is ___ in her honey stomach 為被動，需過去分詞
語意花蜜「被儲存」在蜜囊中待轉交
✗ lay 形式與時態不符、discarded「丟棄」與 disposed「處理掉」語意相反（蜜蜂是要存起來）
113.The new book on Kiwi (關于幾維鳥的新書)5 格#080114
A Massey ecologist has teamed up with a leading wildlife photographer to produce the definitive book on New Zealand’s national bird, the kiwi. Kiwi: A Natural History was written by Dr Isabel Castro and on New Zealand’s national bird, the kiwi. Kiwi: A Natural History was written by Dr Isabel Castro and 1features photographs by Rod Morris. Dr Castro has been working with kiwi 2since 1999, with a focus on their behaviour. “I’ve specifically been looking at the sense of smell that kiwi uses when foraging, their behaviour. “I’ve specifically been looking at the sense of smell that kiwi uses when foraging, but 3also in their interactions with their environment and other kiwi,” she says. The book covers all aspects of kiwi, from their evolution, prehistory and closest relatives to their feeding and breeding aspects of kiwi, from their evolution, prehistory and closest relatives to their feeding and breeding behaviour and current conservation issues, 4making this the perfect introduction for anyone with an interest in these fascinating birds. The book is the second title in a new 5series on New Zealand’s interest in these fascinating birds. The book is the second title in a new series on New Zealand’s wildlife, targeted at a family readership.
空格 1features features / featuring / has / featured / was / featured
時態and 連接前句 was written... 與本句並列，主詞 the book 需單數現在式動詞，features 表書中「收錄」照片
詞性此處需主要動詞，非分詞
✗ featuring/featured 為分詞不能單獨作謂語、has/was 後面缺接續成分，皆不成完整子句
空格 2since by / since / when / in
時態has been working 完成進行式搭配 since + 時間點（1999）
搭配since 1999 表「自1999以來」
✗ by/in 不搭完成進行式起點、when 引導子句後須接句子而非單一年份
空格 3also towards / within / also / to
搭配but also 與前文呼應，表「不只…也…」遞進
語意除嗅覺外「也」研究其與環境互動
✗ towards/within/to 為介系詞，無法銜接 but 引導的「也…」遞進語意
空格 4making making / made / make / to / make
時態用現在分詞 making 引導結果分詞構句（修飾整句）
詞性前已有主要動詞 covers，此處需非限定分詞
✗ made/make 無法構成結果分詞構句、to(make) 不定式表目的語意不如分詞自然
空格 5series succession / sequence / series / subsequence
搭配固定搭配 a new series on...（一個新系列）
語意本書是紐西蘭野生動物「系列」的第二本
✗ succession 重「接連順序」、sequence「次序」、subsequence「子序列」皆不指出版書系

There has always been 1considerable similarity between schools across context: the curriculum, for example has been shown to be divided between language, mathematics, context: the curriculum, for example has been shown to be divided between language, mathematics, science and the arts in a comparable way in schools around the world. Likewise, school buildings in terms of their architecture share remarkable similarities internationally, as a result of shared patterns of terms of their architecture share remarkable similarities internationally, as a result of shared patterns of teaching and learning (although facilities and resources differ significantly.) In recent years, globalization has created increased opportunities for the ‘borrowing’ of education policy and globalization has created increased opportunities for the ‘borrowing’ of education policy and practice, and generated further uniformity across national contexts. Nowhere has the internationalization of education been more apparent than in the higher education sector. The move internationalization of education been more apparent than in the higher education sector. The move to the internationalization of higher-education policy and practice was initially driven by increased student mobility, and the desire of universities to attract students from overseas. student mobility, and the desire of universities to attract students from overseas. to_be_divided dividing is_divided 2divides because as_a_result_of since 3as 4generated generating been_generated to_be_generated 6 has_initially_driven were_initially_driven initially_drove was_initially_driven
空格 1considerable considerable / considerate / less / fair

詞性需形容詞修飾 similarity

空格 2divides需覆核 dividing / divides

語意課程在語言、數學、科學、藝術「之間劃分」

✗ because 須接子句不接 a result of、since 雖表原因但不構成 as a result of 慣用語
空格 4generated generated / generating
時態與 has created 並列，省略 has 後接過去分詞 generated（現在完成式）
語意全球化已「創造」並「產生」更多一致性
✗ generating 為現在分詞，無法與 has created 並列構成完成式謂語
空格 5Nowhere Where / Whereabouts / Nowhere / Anywhere

語意「沒有任何地方」比高等教育部門更明顯
✗ Where/Whereabouts/Anywhere 皆不會引起此倒裝且不符「無處比…更明顯」的強調語意

Language comes so naturally to us that it is easy to forget what a strange and miraculous gift it is. All Language comes so naturally to us that it is easy to forget what a strange and miraculous gift it is. All over the world members of our 1species fashion their breath into hisses and hums and squeaks and pops and listen to others do the 2same . We do this, of course, not only because we like the sounds but because details of the sounds contain information about the 3intentions of the person making them. We humans are fitted with a means of 4sharing our ideas, in all their unfathomable vastness. When we We humans are fitted with a means of sharing our ideas, in all their unfathomable vastness. When we listen to speech, we can be led to think thoughts that have never been thought before and that never would have 5occurred to us on our own. Behold, the bush burned with fire, and the bush was not would have occurred to us on our own. Behold, the bush burned with fire, and the bush was not consumed. Man is born free, and everywhere he is in chains. Emma Woodhouse, handsome, clever, and rich, with a comfortable home and happy disposition, seemed to unite some of the best blessings and rich, with a comfortable home and happy disposition, seemed to unite some of the best blessings of existence. 空格 1species genre / category / group / species
搭配members of our species（我們這個物種的成員）固定說法
語意指人類這個「物種」

空格 2same same / so / liking / correspondence
搭配do the same（做同樣的事）固定搭配，且前有 the
語意聽別人做「同樣」的發聲
✗ so/liking/correspondence 皆不能接在 the 後構成 do the same 慣用語
空格 3intentions intentions / attempts / determinations / mind
搭配the intentions of the person（說話者的意圖）
語意聲音細節含說話者「意圖」的訊息
✗ attempts「嘗試」、determinations「決心」、mind 為單數不搭 the___of the person 複數結構與語意
空格 4sharing rendering / sharing / turning / loading
搭配a means of sharing our ideas（分享想法的方式）
語意人類有「分享」想法的工具
✗ rendering「呈現」、turning「轉動」、loading「裝載」皆不搭 our ideas 表交流
空格 5occurred opened / risen / occurred / emerge
搭配occur to us（浮現於腦中）固定搭配 occur to sb
時態would have ___ 需過去分詞
✗ opened/risen 語意不符、emerge 為原形不能用於 would have 後，且不搭 to us
117.C.S. Lewis (C.S.劉易斯)5 格#080118
C. S. Lewis, or Jack Lewis, as he preferred to be called, was born in Belfast, Ireland (now Northern C. S. Lewis, or Jack Lewis, as he preferred to be called, was born in Belfast, Ireland (now Northern Ireland) on November 29, 1898. He was the second son of Albert Lewis, a lawyer, and Flora Hamilton Lewis. His older brother, Warren Hamilton Lewis, who was known as Warnie, had been born three year Lewis. His older brother, Warren Hamilton Lewis, who was known as Warnie, had been born three year 1earlier in 1895. Lewis's early childhood was relatively happy and carefree. In those days Northern Ireland was not yet 2plagued by bitter civil strife, and the Lewises were comfortably off. The family home, called Little Lea, was a large, gabled house with dark, narrow passages and an overgrown home, called Little Lea, was a large, gabled house with dark, narrow passages and an overgrown garden, which Warnie and Jack played in and 3explored together. There was also a library that was crammed with books-two of Jack's favorites were Treasure Island by Robert Louis Stevenson and The crammed with books-two of Jack's favorites were Treasure Island by Robert Louis Stevenson and The Secret Garden by Frances Hodgson Burnett. This somewhat idyllic boyhood came to an end for Lewis when his mother became ill and died of cancer in 1908. Barely a month after her death the two boys when his mother became ill and died of cancer in 1908. Barely a month after her death the two boys were sent away from home to go to boarding school in England. Lewis hated the school, with its strict rules and hard, 4unsympathetic headmaster, and he missed Belfast terribly. Fortunately for him, the rules and hard, unsympathetic headmaster, and he missed Belfast terribly. Fortunately for him, the school closed in 1910, and he was able to return to Ireland. After a year, however, he was sent back to England to study. This time, the 5experience proved to be mostly positive. As a teenager, Lewis learned England to study. This time, the experience proved to be mostly positive. As a teenager, Lewis learned to love poetry, especially the works of Virgil and Homer. He also developed an interest in modern languages, mastering French, German, and Italian. languages, mastering French, German, and Italian. plagued occurred revived experienced quarreled investigated explored begged unsympathetic hospitable synchronized occupational

✗ later「晚」與事實相反、elder/early 為形容詞不能接在 three years 後表時間差

搭配be plagued by（飽受…困擾）固定被動搭配，後接 by civil strife

✗ occurred 不及物不接 by、revived「復興」experienced 不搭 by 表受困擾且語意偏

✗ quarreled「爭吵」、investigated 偏正式調查、begged「乞求」皆不符孩童在花園玩探索

詞性需形容詞修飾 headmaster

118.Edible insects (可食用昆蟲)6 格#080119
Fancy locust for lunch? Probably not, if you live in the west, but elsewhere it’s a different story. Edible insects – termites, stick insects, dragonflies, grasshoppers and giant water bugs – are on the menu for insects – termites, stick insects, dragonflies, grasshoppers and giant water bugs – are on the menu for an 1estimated 80 percent of the world’s population. More than 1000 species of insects are 2served up around the world. For example, “kungu cakes” – made from midges – are a delicacy in parts of around the world. For example, “kungu cakes” – made from midges – are a delicacy in parts of Africa. Mexico is an insect-eating – or entomophagous – hotspot, where more than 200 insect species are consumed. 3Demand is so high that 40 species are now under threat, including white agave worms. are consumed. Demand is so high that 40 species are now under threat, including white agave worms. These caterpillars of the tequila giant-skipper butterfly 4fetch around $250 a kilogram. Eating insects makes nutritional sense. Some contain more protein than meat or fish. The female gypsy moth, for makes nutritional sense. Some contain more protein than meat or fish. The female gypsy moth, for instance, is about 80 percent protein. Insects can be a good 5source of vitamins and minerals too: a type of caterpillar (Usta Terpsichore) eaten in Angola is rich in iron, zinc and thiamine. What do they taste of caterpillar (Usta Terpsichore) eaten in Angola is rich in iron, zinc and thiamine. What do they taste like? Ants have a lemon tang, apparently, whereas giant water bugs taste of mint and fire ant pupae of watermelon. You have probably, inadvertently, already tasted some of these things, as insects are often watermelon. You have probably, inadvertently, already tasted some of these things, as insects are often accidental tourists in other types of food. The US Food and Drug Administration even issues guidelines for the number of insect parts allowed in certain foods. For example, it is 6acceptable for 225 grams of for the number of insect parts allowed in certain foods. For example, it is acceptable for 225 grams of macaroni to contain up to 225 insect fragments.
空格 1estimated estimated / accumulated / approximately / about

✗ approximately/about 為副詞不搭 an___，accumulated「累積的」語意不符

搭配1000 species are served up（被端上桌）搭配後文 up
時態are ___ up 被動結構需過去分詞

空格 3Demand Demand / Supply / Passion / Desire

✗ Supply「供給」邏輯相反（供給高不會使物種受威脅）、Passion/Desire 不搭後文消費受威脅的因果

搭配fetch + 價格（賣得…價錢）固定用法 fetch $250 a kilogram

✗ catch/grasp「抓住」、set 皆不能搭金額表「賣得某價」

Usually language of the people with whom the Europeans were trading or whom they were colonizing. Usually one of the languages provided the majority of 2vocabulary items and the other provided the grammatical structure. When pidgins become learned as a mother tongue, they become 3known as grammatical structure. When pidgins become learned as a mother tongue, they become known as creoles. 122.Fossil fuels (化石燃料)5 格#080123
But look beyond fossil fuels for the most intriguing trends. One is that the energy intensity of the world economy-the amount of energy it takes to produce one dollar’s 1worth of income-keeps falling, at a rate of about 2 percent. What this means is that even without any change in the 2relative shares of fossil-based and fossil-free sources in the world’s energy mix, we could have 2 percent annual economic growth without increasing carbon emissions from energy use. Of course that is not enough to 3address climate change and we need more economic growth than that. It is 4nonetheless a stunning number, which refutes the claim by some environmentalists that permanent economic growth is number, which refutes the claim by some environmentalists that permanent economic growth is fundamentally incompatible 5with finite physical resources.

✗ cope 須接 with、determine「決定」、settle「解決(爭端)」皆不搭 climate change 表「應對」

語意前句說不足夠，本句轉折「儘管如此仍是驚人數字」，需轉折副詞

搭配incompatible with（與…不相容）固定搭配介系詞 with

✗ to/for/of 皆非 incompatible 的正確搭配介系詞

About 10,000 years ago, people learned how to make cloth. Wool, cotton, flax, or hemp was first spun About 10,000 years ago, people learned how to make cloth. Wool, cotton, flax, or hemp was first spun into a thin thread, using a spindle. The thread was then woven into a fabric. The earliest weaving machines 1probably consisted of little more than a pair of sticks that held a set of parallel threads, machines probably consisted of little more than a pair of sticks that held a set of parallel threads, called the wrap, while the cross-thread, called the weft was inserted Later machines called looms had roads that separated the threads to allow the weft to be inserted more 2easily . A piece of wood, called roads that separated the threads to allow the weft to be inserted more easily . A piece of wood, called the shuttle, holding a spool of thread, was passed between the separated threads. The basic 3principles of spinning and weaving have stayed the same until the present day though during the industrial of spinning and weaving have stayed the same until the present day though during the industrial revolution of the 18th century many ways were found of 4automating the processes. With new machines such as the spinning mule, many threads could be spun at the same time, and, with the help machines such as the spinning mule, many threads could be spun at the same time, and, with the help of devices like the flying shuttle, broad pieces of cloth could be woven at great speed.

搭配the richness of the experience（體驗的豐富性）固定搭配
