✗ poverty「貧乏」語意相反、enrichment「強化」、variety「多樣」皆不如 richness 搭 whole ___ of the experience
空格 3experience expertise / communication / experience / professionalism
搭配the richness of the experience（這段學習體驗）
語意錯過整個學習「體驗」
✗ expertise/professionalism「專業」、communication「溝通」皆不符 the whole richness of the ___ 指課堂體驗
空格 4engage engage / attend / access / comprise
搭配engage in debates（參與辯論）固定片語 engage in
時態you don't ___ in debates 需原形
✗ attend/access/comprise 皆不搭 in debates 表「投入參與」
空格 5transforming converting / transforming / reforming / shifting
搭配transform the way（改變方式）固定搭配
語意網路正「改變」學生取用資訊的方式
✗ converting「轉換」、reforming「改革」、shifting「轉移」皆不如 transforming the way 自然且為慣用搭配
127.Paraphrasing (釋義)5 格#080128
Paraphrasing is often defined as putting a passage from an author into your own words. However, what are your own words? How different must your paraphrase be from the original? The answer is it what are your own words? How different must your paraphrase be from the original? The answer is it should be 1considerably different. The whole point of paraphrasing is to show you have read and understood another person's ideas and can summarise them 2in your own writing style rather than understood another person's ideas and can summarise them in your own writing style rather than borrowing their phrases. If you just change a few words or add some bits in your own words to an otherwise reproduced passage, you will probably 3be penalised for plagiarism. You should aim to otherwise reproduced passage, you will probably be penalised for plagiarism. You should aim to 4condense and simplify a writer's ideas and describe them using different sentence structures and expressions. 5It is also important to credit the original writer by referencing. expressions. It is also important to credit the original writer by referencing. be_penalised be_penalty is_penalised been_penalised 3 be_penalised be_penalty is_penalised been_penalised condense shorten amplify retrench It_is There_are They_are Those_are 5 It_is There_are They_are Those_are
空格 1considerably considerable / considerably / considerate / considerately
詞性修飾形容詞 different 需用副詞 considerably「相當地」
✗ considerable（形容詞）不能修飾形容詞；considerate/considerately（體貼）語意不符。
空格 2in of / by / in / as
搭配in your own writing style「以你自己的寫作風格」，介系詞用 in
✗ of、by、as 皆不與 your own writing style 構成「以…風格」的慣用搭配。
空格 3be penalised be penalised / be penalty / is penalised / been penalised
時態will probably + 原形被動 be penalised「可能會被處罰」
詞性助動詞 will 後接原形 be
✗ be penalty 名詞錯置；is penalised 與 will 衝突；been penalised 缺助動詞。
空格 4condense condense / shorten / amplify / retrench
搭配condense and simplify「濃縮並簡化」並列，condense 搭配作者觀點的壓縮
✗ shorten 偏縮短長度；amplify（擴大）語意相反；retrench（裁減）不符改寫語境。
空格 5It is It is / There are / They are / Those are
詞性形式主詞句型 It is important to credit...，It 指代後面不定詞
單複數搭配單數 is 與形容詞 important
✗ There are、They are、Those are 為複數或存在句，與後接 to credit 的形式主詞結構不符。
128.Chemistry (化學)5 格#080129
Chemistry is an extremely important topic in physiology. Most physiological processes occur as the 1results of chemical changes that occur within the body. These changes include the influx /efflux of ions results of chemical changes that occur within the body. These changes include the influx /efflux of ions across a neuron’s membrane, causing a 2signal to pass from one end to the other. Other examples include the 3storage of oxygen in the blood by a protein as it 4passes through the lungs for 5usage include the storage of oxygen in the blood by a protein as it passes through the lungs for usage
空格 1results cause / results / reason / origin
搭配occur as the results of（因…而發生）固定搭配 as the result(s) of
語意生理過程因化學變化的「結果」而發生
✗ cause/reason/origin 皆指「原因」，與 as the ___ of chemical changes 表「結果」的方向相反
空格 2signal signal / movement / motion / vibration
搭配a signal to pass（讓訊號傳遞）神經傳導固定說法
語意離子進出膜使「訊號」從一端傳到另一端
✗ movement/motion/vibration「移動/運動/振動」皆不符神經傳導中「訊號」傳遞之意
空格 3storage consumption / storage / production / turnout
語意蛋白質在血液中「儲存」氧氣，後文 as it passes through the lungs 對應吸收儲存
搭配the storage of oxygen（氧氣的儲存）固定搭配
✗ consumption「消耗」、production「生產」、turnout「出席率」皆與血液攜帶並儲存氧氣不符
空格 4passes flowed / delivers / passes / went
時態as it ___ through the lungs，主詞 it 單數現在式用 passes
搭配pass through（通過）固定片語
✗ flowed/went 為過去式與現在式語境不符、delivers 不搭 through the lungs 表「通過」
空格 5usage storage / treatment / consumption / usage
搭配for usage（供使用）固定搭配 for + 名詞表目的
語意氧氣經肺部供身體「使用」
✗ storage「儲存」與前文重複、treatment「處理」、consumption 雖近義但 usage 最貼合 for ___「供使用」語意
129.Edo-Tokyo Architectural Museum (江戶東京建築博物館)4 格#080130
The Edo-Tokyo Tatemono En is an open-air architectural museum but could be better thought of as a The Edo-Tokyo Tatemono En is an open-air architectural museum but could be better thought of as a park. Thirty buildings from the 19th and early 20th centuries from 1all around Tokyo were restored and relocated to the space, where they can be explored by future generations to come. The buildings are a relocated to the space, where they can be explored by future generations to come. The buildings are a collection of houses and businesses, shops, and bathhouses, all of which would have been present on a typical middle-class street from Edoera to Showa-era Tokyo. The west section is 2residential , with typical middle-class street from Edoera to Showa-era Tokyo. The west section is residential , with traditional thatched roof bungalows of the 19th century. Meiji-era houses are also on view, constructed in a more Western style after Japan opened its borders in 1868. The Musashino Sabo Café occupies the in a more Western style after Japan opened its borders in 1868. The Musashino Sabo Café occupies the 3ground floor of one such house, where visitors can enjoy a cup of tea. Grand residences like that of Korekiyo Takahashi, an early 20th century politician assassinated over his controversial policies, Korekiyo Takahashi, an early 20th century politician assassinated over his controversial policies, demonstrate how the upper class lived during that time period. The east section is primarily businesses from the 1920s and ’30s, preserved with their wares on display. Visitors are free to 4wander through a from the 1920s and ’30s, preserved with their wares on display. Visitors are free to wander through a kitchenware shop, a florist’s, an umbrella store, a bar, a soy sauce shop, a tailor’s, a cosmetics shop, and an inn complete with an operational noodle shop. and an inn complete with an operational noodle shop. industrial commercial residential governmental base ground top basement to_wander wandering wander wandered
空格 1all part / all / throughout / entire
搭配all of which（其全部，引導關係子句）固定搭配 all of which
詞性後接 of which 需 all/some 等限定詞
✗ part 須作 part of which 但語意指全部、throughout 為副詞/介系詞、entire 不接 of which
空格 2residential industrial / commercial / residential / governmental
語意後文有 traditional bungalows、houses，西區是「住宅」區，與東區 businesses 對比
詞性需形容詞作補語 The west section is ___
✗ industrial/commercial/governmental「工業/商業/政府」皆與後文住宅平房不符（商業留給東區）
空格 3ground base / ground / top / basement
搭配ground floor（一樓/底層）固定搭配
語意咖啡館占用房子的「一樓」
✗ base/top/basement 皆不搭 floor 表英式「一樓」（ground floor）
空格 4wander需覆核 wandering / wander / wandered
時態be free to ___（可自由地…）to 後接原形動詞 wander
搭配free to wander through（自由漫步穿越）
✗ wandering 分詞、wandered 過去式皆不能接在 free to 不定式後；原形 wander 正確
130.Two types of genes (兩種類型的基因)3 格#080131
Recently, research into embryonic development has given us an even better insight into how major structural changes might occur in a given population of organisms. We now understand that there are structural changes might occur in a given population of organisms. We now understand that there are two major types of genes: developmental and “housekeeping” genes. Developmental genes are those that are expressed during embryonic development, and their proteins 1control the symmetry, those that are expressed during embryonic development, and their proteins control the symmetry, skeletal development, organ placement, and overall form of the developing animal. 2In contrast ,“housekeeping” genes are expressed during the animal's daily life to generate proteins which keep ,“housekeeping” genes are expressed during the animal's daily life to generate proteins which keep the cells, tissues, and organs in the body functioning properly. as you might suspect, mutations in developmental genes can have radical consequences for body form and function, whereas mutations developmental genes can have radical consequences for body form and function, whereas mutations in “housekeeping” genes tend to 3affect the health and reproductive success of the post-embryonic 2 Above_all In_brief Also In_contrast
空格 1control fetch / control / hold / elevate
單複數主詞 their proteins 為複數，原形動詞 control
語意語意：蛋白質「控制」對稱、骨骼發育等
✗ fetch（取來）、hold（持有）、elevate（提升）皆不符「控制發育形態」語意。
空格 2In contrast Above all / In brief / Also / In contrast
語意語意：前述發育基因，「相對地」家務基因在日常生活表現，對比兩類基因
✗ Above all（最重要的是）、In brief（簡言之）、Also（也）皆不符兩類基因的對比關係。
空格 3affect affect / damage / interrupt / destroy
語意語意：家務基因突變「影響」健康與繁殖，程度較溫和，呼應前文 radical 的對比
✗ damage、interrupt、destroy 語氣過強，與 whereas 對比下的「較溫和影響」不符。
131.Omniscience (綜合科學)5 格#080133
Omniscience may be a foible of men, but it is not so of books. Knowledge, as Johnson said, is of two 1kinds , you may know a thing yourself, and you may know where to find it. Now the amount which you kinds , you may know a thing yourself, and you may know where to find it. Now the amount which you may actually know yourself must, at its best, be limited, but what you may know of the 2sources of information may, with proper training, become almost boundless. And here come the 3value and use of information may, with proper training, become almost boundless. And here come the value and use of reference books—the working of one book in connexion with another—and applying your own 4intelligence to both. By this means we get as near to that omniscient volume which tells everything as intelligence to both. By this means we get as near to that omniscient volume which tells everything as ever we shall get, and although the single volume or work which tells everything does not exist, there is a vast number of reference books in existence, a knowledge and proper use of which is essential to is a vast number of reference books in existence, a knowledge and proper use of which is essential to every intelligent person. Necessary as I believe reference books to be, they can easily be made to be 5contributory to idleness, and too mechanical a use should not be made of them. contributory to idleness, and too mechanical a use should not be made of them. parts kinds sides approaches sources origins resources outcomes value expertise knowledge element
空格 1kinds parts / kinds / sides / approaches
搭配two kinds（兩種）固定搭配，後文 you may know... and you may know 列舉兩種
單複數two 後接複數 kinds
✗ parts/sides/approaches「部分/面向/方法」皆不如 kinds 搭 knowledge is of two ___「知識分兩種」
空格 2sources sources / origins / resources / outcomes
搭配sources of information（資訊來源）固定搭配
語意你能掌握的資訊「來源」幾乎無限
✗ origins/resources「起源/資源」、outcomes「結果」皆不如 sources of information 慣用且切題
空格 3value value / expertise / knowledge / element
搭配the value and use of（…的價值與用途）固定並列搭配
語意工具書的「價值」與用途
✗ expertise/knowledge「專業/知識」、element「要素」皆不搭 the ___ and use of 並列結構
空格 4intelligence intelligence / wit / techiques / skills
搭配applying your own intelligence（運用你自己的智慧）固定搭配
語意對兩者運用自己的「智慧/思辨」
✗ wit「機智」、techniques/skills「技巧」皆不如 your own intelligence 表運用判斷力之意
空格 5contributory advantageous / contributory / beneficial / impossible
搭配contributory to（助長…的）固定搭配，後接 idleness
語意工具書易「助長」懶惰
✗ advantageous/beneficial「有益的」語意正面相反、impossible「不可能的」不搭 to idleness
132.Flower Attract Insects (花朵吸引昆蟲)4 格#080134
According to a research conducted by Cambridge University, flowers can use their own ways to attract insects to help them pollinate. Flowers will release an 1irresistible smell. Beverley Glover from the insects to help them pollinate. Flowers will release an irresistible smell. Beverley Glover from the University of Cambridge and her 2colleagues did an experiment in which they use fake flowers to attract bees and insects. In their experiments, they freed many bumblebees from their 3origins repeatedly, and bees and insects. In their experiments, they freed many bumblebees from their origins repeatedly, and got the same 4results .
空格 1irresistible uncomfortable / irresistible / resistant / strange
語意花釋放「令人無法抗拒的」香味以吸引昆蟲
詞性需形容詞修飾 smell
✗ uncomfortable「令人不適」、resistant「有抵抗力的」、strange「奇怪」皆與吸引昆蟲的誘人香味不符
空格 2colleagues managers / colleagues / staff / employees
語意Beverley Glover「和她的同事們」做實驗，學術合作脈絡
搭配her colleagues（她的同事）研究團隊常用
✗ managers「主管」、staff「員工」、employees「受雇者」皆不符與研究者平等合作的「同事」關係
空格 3origins origins / originals / organisms / organics
語意把大黃蜂從其「起點/原處」反覆釋放，搭配 freed...from
搭配from their origins 表「自原處」
✗ originals「原件」、organisms「生物體」、organics「有機物」皆與「釋放自原處」語意不符
空格 4results hypotheses / procedures / assertions / results
搭配the same results（相同的結果）固定搭配，實驗脈絡
語意重複實驗得到相同「結果」
✗ hypotheses「假設」、procedures「程序」、assertions「主張」皆不符實驗「得到結果」之意
133.Colonial Era (殖民時代)4 格#080135
At the end of the colonial era, as many new nations gained independence, relative levels of economic At the end of the colonial era, as many new nations gained independence, relative levels of economic development became an important criterion by which to distinguish between countries. The former colonial powers and 1wealthier parts of the world generally became known as advanced industrial, or colonial powers and wealthier parts of the world generally became known as advanced industrial, or developed countries, 2while former colonies and poorer nations became known as less developed, or more positively, developing countries. Critics of the 3uneven distribution of wealth across the globe more positively, developing countries. Critics of the uneven distribution of wealth across the globe highlighted the role which wealth creation in some places had played in impoverishing poorer nations and, rather, described them as actively underdeveloped. The question as to 4whether economic change and, rather, described them as actively underdeveloped. The question as to whether economic change is developing or underdeveloping countries remains a vital issue, as the debate over sweatshops
空格 1wealthier wealthier / poorer / destitute / affluent
語意與 former colonial powers 並列、後接 became advanced industrial / developed countries，語意需「較富裕的」地區
搭配後文 uneven distribution of wealth、wealth creation 對照，wealthier 與 poorer nations 形成貧富對比
✗ poorer/destitute 語意相反；affluent 雖近義但全文以 wealthier↔poorer 成對，比較級語感更貼合 generally became known
空格 2while while / whether / because / which
詞性連接兩個對比子句（developed countries ... ／ former colonies became less developed），需對比連接詞 while「然而、相對地」
✗ whether 引導名詞子句、because 表原因、which 為關係代名詞，均無法表達兩類國家的對比
空格 3uneven uneven / even / disparate / balanced
搭配固定搭配 uneven distribution of wealth（財富分配不均）
語意批評者所指責的是分配「不均」並使窮國更窮（impoverishing），語意需負面
✗ even/balanced 表「平均、平衡」與批評語境矛盾；disparate 修飾 distribution 搭配不自然
空格 4whether whether / what / which / when
搭配the question as to whether ... 固定句型，引導 yes/no 名詞子句「是否」
詞性後接完整子句且有 developing or underdeveloping 對比，需 whether
✗ what/which 需子句缺主受詞（此處完整）；when 表時間，皆不合 as to ___ 的「是否」語意
134.Language Deficit of UK Students (英國學生的語言缺陷)4 格#080136
This is a challenging time for UK students, and we should be making their transition from university to the globalized world easier, not harder. The British Academy has voiced its 1concern over the growing language deficit for some years, and the gloomy statistics speak for themselves. We need 2decisive action if we are to remedy this worsening situation. The 3roots of the problem lie within schools, but Vice-Chancellors have the power to drive change and help their students recognize the importance of learning languages, and about the countries where they are spoken and the cultures they sustain. We 4urge them to act and protect this country’s long term economic, social and cultural standing. provoke encourage claim urge
空格 1concern aim / issue / concern / intention
搭配固定搭配 voice/express concern over...（對…表達關切）
語意後文 gloomy statistics、worsening situation 屬負面，需「擔憂」而非中性的 aim/intention
✗ aim/intention 表「目標、意圖」與 over 搭配不通；issue 雖指「議題」但 voice concern over 才是慣用語且貼合語氣
空格 2decisive decisive / conclusive / irresolute / hesitating
語意if we are to remedy this worsening situation 需「果斷的」行動才能補救
搭配decisive action（果斷行動）為常見搭配
✗ irresolute/hesitating 意為「猶豫」與補救情境相反；conclusive 指「決定性/確鑿的」修飾 action 語意不合
空格 3roots sources / roots / origins / foundation
搭配固定搭配 the roots of the problem lie within...（問題的根源在於）
語意後接 lie within schools，roots 與 lie 的「位於」語意最貼合
✗ sources/origins/foundation 語意相近，但 the roots of the problem lie 為最道地慣用語
空格 4urge provoke / encourage / claim / urge
搭配句型 urge sb to do（敦促某人做某事），後接 them to act
語意結尾呼籲 Vice-Chancellors 採取行動，語氣需「強烈敦促」
✗ provoke 多帶負面「激起」；claim 不接 sb to do；encourage 語氣較弱，全文呼籲調性偏向 urge
135.Seminars (研討會)5 格#080137
Seminars are not designed to be mini-lectures. Their educational 1role is to provide an opportunity for you to discuss interesting and /or difficult aspects of the course. This is founded on the 2assumption that it is only by actively trying to use the knowledge that you have acquired from lectures and texts that you can achieve an adequate understanding of the subject. If you do not understand a point it is highly 3unlikely that you will be the only person in the group in that position; you will invariably be undertaking a 4service for the entire group if you come to the seminar equipped with questions on matters which you feel you did not fully understand. The seminar is to 5provoke discussion. method ranking role approach dedication resolution consolation assumption
空格 1role method / ranking / role / approach
搭配搭配 their educational role is to provide（教育角色在於）
語意全句說明研討會「扮演的功能」，role 最貼合
✗ method/approach 指「方法」與 is to provide an opportunity 語意錯位；ranking 表「排名」無關
空格 2assumption dedication / resolution / consolation / assumption
搭配固定搭配 founded on the assumption that...（建立在…的假設上）
詞性後接 that 同位語子句，assumption that 為慣用結構
✗ dedication/resolution/consolation（奉獻／決心／安慰）均不接 that 同位語、語意也不通
空格 3unlikely similarly / likely / possibly / unlikely
搭配句型 it is highly unlikely that...（極不可能）
語意you will be the only person 的語意需「極不可能是唯一一個」，安慰讀者不孤單
✗ likely 語意相反；similarly 為副詞語意不合；possibly 無法與 highly 構成此慣用語且語氣不對
空格 4service service / investigation / reservation / research
搭配搭配 undertaking a service for...（為…提供服務／貢獻）
語意帶問題來上課是「對全組的貢獻」，service 貼合
✗ investigation/research/reservation（調查／研究／保留）與 undertake ... for the group 的「貢獻」語意不符
空格 5provoke hinder / provoke / raise / create
搭配固定搭配 provoke discussion（激發討論）
語意研討會目的在「引發」討論，此處 provoke 取中性「激起」義
✗ hinder 表「阻礙」相反；raise 多接 question/issue；create discussion 搭配不道地
136.English is changing (英語正在改變)4 格#080138
English has been changing throughout its lifetime and it's still changing today. For most of us, these changes are fine as long as they’re well and truly in the past. Paradoxically, we can be 1curious about word origins and the stories behind the structures we find in our language, but we 2experience a queasy distaste for any change that might be happening right under our noses. There are even language critics who are 3convinced that English is dying, or if not dying at least being progressively 4damaged through long years of mistreatment. worried concerned indifferent curious practice experience cope possess
空格 1curious worried / concerned / indifferent / curious
搭配固定搭配 be curious about...，後接 about word origins
語意Paradoxically 與後句 queasy distaste 形成對比，前半需正面的「好奇」
✗ worried/concerned 語意為「擔憂」（負面），與 distaste 構不成 paradox；indifferent「冷漠」與 curious about 矛盾
空格 2experience practice / experience / cope / possess
搭配搭配 experience a distaste for...（感受到一種厭惡）
詞性及物動詞直接接受詞 a queasy distaste
✗ cope 為不及物需 cope with；practice/possess（練習／擁有）接 distaste 語意不通
空格 3convinced persuaded / convinced / satisfied / reassured
搭配固定搭配 be convinced that...（深信），後接 that English is dying
語意語境是「堅信」英語正在消亡，convinced 表內在確信
✗ persuaded 多指被他人說服且常接 to do；satisfied/reassured（滿意／安心）與 dying 的負面論斷不合
空格 4damaged unable / disabled / impaired / damaged
搭配搭配 damaged through ... mistreatment（因虐待而受損）
語意與前 dying 並列遞減語氣 if not dying at least ... damaged，需「受損」
✗ unable/disabled 用於主體無能力，主詞 English 不適用；impaired 雖近義但 progressively damaged through mistreatment 更道地
137.Arabic Student (阿拉伯語學生)5 格#080139
HERIOT-WATT University in Edinburgh has become the first in Europe to offer an MBA in Arabic. Arab students will be able to sign up to study at a 1distance for the business courses in their own language. students will be able to sign up to study at a distance for the business courses in their own language. The Edinburgh Business School 2announced the project at a reception in Cairo on Saturday. It is hoped the course will improve links between the university and the Arab business world. A university the course will improve links between the university and the Arab business world. A university spokeswoman said: "The Arabic MBA will 3raise the profile of Heriot-Watt University and the Edinburgh Business School among businesses in the Arabic speaking world and will create a strong network of Business School among businesses in the Arabic speaking world and will create a strong network of graduates in the 4region ." The first 5intake of students is expected later this year. Professor Keith Lumsden, director of Edinburgh Business School, said: "Arabic is a major global language and the Arab Lumsden, director of Edinburgh Business School, said: "Arabic is a major global language and the Arab world is a center for business and industrial development. We are proud to work with Arab International Education to meet the demands of the region." International Education to meet the demands of the region." distance result distribution level announced convinced supposed suggested raise rise enhance strengthen 6 meet_the_demands increase_the_profile improve_the_economy promote_the_language
空格 1distance distance / result / distribution / level
搭配固定搭配 study at a distance（遠距學習）
語意可在自己國家以自己語言修課，指「遠距」
✗ result/distribution/level 接 at a ___ 無此慣用語，且語意不合遠距學習情境
空格 2announced announced / convinced / supposed / suggested
搭配搭配 announced the project at a reception（在招待會上宣布計畫）
語意Business School 在開羅招待會上「宣布」此計畫
✗ convinced/supposed/suggested（說服／認為／建議）接 the project at a reception 語意不通
空格 3raise raise / rise / enhance / strengthen
搭配固定搭配 raise the profile（提升知名度）
時態前有 will，需原形動詞 raise
✗ rise 為不及物不可接 the profile；enhance/strengthen 雖近義，但 raise the profile 為固定搭配
空格 4region local / region / space / area
搭配固定搭配 in the region（在該地區），呼應後文 demands of the region
詞性the ___ 需可數名詞單數，network of graduates in the region
✗ local 為形容詞不可接 the；space/area 雖可指區域，但全文反覆用 region 保持一致
空格 5intake enroll / outlet / intake / income
搭配固定搭配 the first intake of students（首批招收的學生）
語意The first ___ of students is expected later this year 指「招生批次」
✗ enroll 為動詞不可接 the first ___ of；outlet（出口）、income（收入）語意完全不符
138.Migrating birds (候鳥)3 格#080140
For birdwatchers in southern New Mexico, September can be highly entertaining. Good numbers of many diverse 1species are on the move during this time, 2traveling southward from northern breeding grounds to places they will spend the winter, and there’s always a chance that some rare or unusual bird will turn 3up . ranges species classics animals traveling traveled have_traveled being_traveling
空格 1species ranges / species / classics / animals
搭配搭配 diverse species（多樣的物種）
語意賞鳥情境，many diverse ___ are on the move 指鳥類「物種」
✗ ranges（範圍）、classics（經典）、animals（動物，過於籠統且不接 diverse 描述鳥類）皆不如 species 精準
空格 2traveling traveling / traveled
時態are on the move during this time, ___ southward，需現在分詞 -ing 作伴隨狀態
詞性與 on the move 的進行語意一致，用現在分詞 traveling
✗ traveled 為過去式/過去分詞，與 are on the move 的現在進行情境不符
空格 3up out / up / to / down
搭配固定片語動詞 turn up（出現、現身）
語意some rare bird will turn ___，罕見鳥「現身」用 turn up
✗ turn out（結果是）、turn to（轉向）、turn down（拒絕/調低）語意均不符「出現」
139.Opportunity Cost (機會成本)6 格#080141
Opportunity cost incorporates the 1notion of scarcity: No matter what we do, there is always a trade-off. We must trade off one thing for another because resources are limited and can be used in different We must trade off one thing for another because resources are limited and can be used in different ways. By acquiring something, we use up resources that could have been used to acquire something else. The notion of opportunity cost allows us to measure this trade-off. Most decisions 2involve several else. The notion of opportunity cost allows us to measure this trade-off. Most decisions involve several alternatives. For example, if you spend an hour studying for an economics exam, you have one fewer hour to 3pursue other activities. To 4determine the opportunity cost of an activity, we look at what you hour to pursue other activities. To determine the opportunity cost of an activity, we look at what you consider the best of these “other” activities. For example, suppose the 5alternatives to studying economics are studying for a history exam or working in a job that pays $10 per hour. If you consider economics are studying for a history exam or working in a job that pays $10 per hour. If you consider studying for history a 6better use of your time than working, then the opportunity cost of studying economics is the four extra points you could have received on a history exam if you studied history economics is the four extra points you could have received on a history exam if you studied history instead of economics. Alternatively, if working is the best alternative, the opportunity cost of studying economics is the $10 you could have earned instead. economics is the $10 you could have earned instead. 2 involve have_involved are_involved have_been_involving
空格 1notion notion / sentiment / perception / assumption
搭配the notion of opportunity cost「機會成本的概念」，與後文重複出現的 The notion 一致
✗ sentiment（情感）、perception（知覺）、assumption（假設）皆不如 notion 切合「概念」且不呼應後文用詞。
空格 2involve involve / have involved / are involved / have been involving
單複數主詞 Most decisions 為複數，用原形 involve
時態陳述普遍事實用現在簡單式主動
✗ are involved 為被動語意不通；have involved/have been involving 完成式與普遍事實陳述不符。
空格 3pursue engage / pursue / are involved / proceed
搭配pursue other activities「從事其他活動」，pursue 搭配 activities
詞性to + 原形動詞 pursue
✗ engage 須接 in；are involved 為被動結構錯誤；proceed 不及物不接 activities。
空格 4determine elaborate / affirm / eliminate / determine
搭配determine the opportunity cost「判定機會成本」，呼應前文 measure this trade-off
詞性To + 原形 determine，引導目的不定詞
✗ elaborate、affirm、eliminate 皆不符「確定/算出成本」語意。
空格 5alternatives options / selections / alternatives / opportunities
語意語意：呼應前文 several alternatives 與後文 best alternative，指可替代選項
✗ options、selections、opportunities 語意相近但未呼應全文反覆使用的 alternative 一詞。
空格 6better best / worse / better / less
搭配a better use of your time「更好地運用時間」，比較級 better 搭配 than working
詞性後接 than，需比較級形式
✗ best 為最高級不接 than；worse 語意相反；less 不與 use 構成此比較。
140.History of Vaccination (疫苗接種史)6 格#080142
According to the literature, the history of 1vaccination can be traced back to as early as the 7th century According to the literature, the history of vaccination can be traced back to as early as the 7th century when the monks in India tried to immunize themselves by drinking snake 2venom . The first vaccination was inoculation with human smallpox, a practice widely 3carried out in ancient India, Arabia, and China. was inoculation with human smallpox, a practice widely carried out in ancient India, Arabia, and China. This method of vaccination consisted of collecting pus from a patient suffering from a mild form of smallpox virus infection and 4inoculating the sample to a healthy human, which later led to a minor smallpox virus infection and inoculating the sample to a healthy human, which later led to a minor infection. This method was first introduced in England by a Greek named E. Timoni. However, this method had a risk of spreading smallpox in the community and even worsening the health condition method had a risk of spreading smallpox in the community and even worsening the health condition of the person who received the inoculation. While the use of human smallpox vaccine was 5controversial , E. Jenner came up with bovine smallpox vaccine in 1796; this new method also faced controversial , E. Jenner came up with bovine smallpox vaccine in 1796; this new method also faced controversy but continued to be 6universalized . Smallpox became a preventable disease by injecting pus extracted from a human infected with cowpox virus. Jenner named the substance "vaccine" after pus extracted from a human infected with cowpox virus. Jenner named the substance "vaccine" after the Latin word "vacca" which means "cow," and thus the process of giving vaccine became vaccination prescription medication medicine blood venom fluid hemoglobin practiced sorted carried conducted
空格 1vaccination vaccination / prescription / medication / medicine
語意全文主題 the history of vaccination（疫苗接種史），標題與後文一致
搭配history of vaccination 為主題詞，後文 first vaccination was inoculation 呼應
✗ prescription/medication/medicine（處方／用藥／藥物）非可被追溯至 7th century 的接種行為
空格 2venom blood / venom / fluid / hemoglobin
搭配固定搭配 snake venom（蛇毒）
語意monks ... immunize themselves by drinking snake ___，飲「蛇毒」以求免疫
✗ blood/fluid/hemoglobin（血液／體液／血紅素）與 snake 搭配不指毒液，無法呼應 immunize
空格 3carried practiced / sorted / carried / conducted
搭配固定片語 carry out（執行、進行），此處被動 widely carried out
時態a practice widely ___ out 為過去分詞後位修飾，carried out 構成片語動詞被動
✗ conducted 雖近義但不接 out；practiced/sorted（實行／分類）無 out 此片語結構
空格 4inoculating inoculating / inoculate / inoculation / inoculated
詞性與前 collecting pus ... and ___ the sample 並列，需動名詞 -ing 維持平行
時態consisted of + V-ing，介系詞 of 後接動名詞
✗ inoculate（原形）、inoculation（名詞）、inoculated（過去式）均破壞 collecting ... and ___ 的並列分詞結構
空格 5controversial controversial / accepted / acknowledged / contributory
語意前文人痘有 risk of spreading smallpox，故其使用「有爭議」；後文 also faced controversy 呼應
搭配While the use ... was ___，與後句 controversy 同根對照
✗ accepted/acknowledged（被接受／被認可）與 risk、While 讓步語氣矛盾；contributory（促成的）語意不合
空格 6universalized prohibited / abandoned / universalized / discarded
語意but continued to be ___ 與前 faced controversy 轉折，需正面「被普及」，呼應 became a preventable disease
時態continued to be + 過去分詞（被動），且 but 後須正向結果
✗ prohibited/abandoned/discarded（被禁止／放棄／丟棄）皆負面，與 but 及牛痘成功普及矛盾

Both farms were by far the largest, most prosperous, most technologically advanced farms in their 1respective districts. In particular, each was centred around a magnificent state-of-the-art barn for 2sheltering and milking cows. Those structures, both neatly 3divided into oppositefacing rows of cow stalls, dwarfed all other barns in the district. Both farms let their cows 4graze outdoors in lush pastures during the summer, produced their own hay to harvest in the late summer for feeding the cows through the winter, and 5increased their production of summer fodder and winter hay by irrigating their declined increased reduced widened
空格 1respective prospective / retrospective / respective / restrictive
搭配固定搭配 their respective districts（各自的地區）
語意兩農場分屬不同地區，需「各自的」
✗ prospective（未來的）、retrospective（回顧的）、restrictive（限制性的）語意均不合「各自所屬地區」
空格 2sheltering keeping / growing / sheltering / gathering
搭配搭配 barn for sheltering and milking cows（用以遮蔽與擠奶的牛舍）
語意牛舍功能是「庇護／圈養」牛隻，與 milking 並列
✗ growing（種植）用於作物；keeping 雖通但 sheltering cows 在牛舍語境更精準；gathering（聚集）語意不合
空格 3divided discarded / allocated / divided / broken
搭配搭配 divided into rows（分成…排），neatly divided into ... rows of cow stalls
詞性過去分詞作修飾，divided into 為固定結構
✗ broken into 多指「闖入／破碎」；allocated/discarded（分配／丟棄）與 into rows 搭配不通
空格 4graze eat / mow / feed / graze
搭配固定搭配 graze outdoors in pastures（在牧場放牧吃草）
語意let their cows ___ outdoors in lush pastures，牛在草地「吃草」
✗ eat 太籠統且不接 in pastures；mow（割草）主詞應為人；feed 在此需 feed on，單用不貼合放牧
空格 5increased declined / increased / reduced / widened
語意by irrigating（透過灌溉）→ 提升產量，需正面的「增加」production
搭配increased their production of ... hay（增加…產量）
✗ declined（不及物，不可接受詞 production）；reduced 表「減少」與灌溉增產矛盾；widened（拓寬）與 production 搭配不通
142.DNA is a molecule (DNA是一種分子)3 格#080144
DNA is a molecule that does two things. First, it acts as the 1hereditary material, which is passed down from generation to generation. Second, it directs, to a considerable extent, the construction of our from generation to generation. Second, it directs, to a considerable extent, the construction of our bodies, telling our cells what kinds of molecules to make and 2guiding our development from a single- celled zygote to a fully formed adult. These two things are of course connected. The DNA sequences celled zygote to a fully formed adult. These two things are of course connected. The DNA sequences that construct the best bodies are more likely to get passed down to the next generation because well- constructed bodies are more likely to survive and 3thus to reproduce. This is Darwin’s theory of natural constructed bodies are more likely to survive and thus to reproduce. This is Darwin’s theory of natural selection stated in the language of DNA.
空格 1hereditary hereditary / gene / inherent / acquired
搭配固定搭配 hereditary material（遺傳物質）
語意後接 passed down from generation to generation，需「遺傳的」
✗ gene 為名詞不可作形容詞修飾 material；inherent（固有的）、acquired（後天的）與「世代相傳」不符
空格 2guiding guiding / routing / producing / generating
詞性與前 telling our cells 並列，需 V-ing 分詞，guiding our development
語意guiding our development from a zygote to an adult（引導發育過程）
✗ routing（路由）過於技術化；producing/generating（生產／產生）development 搭配不自然，引導發育用 guide
空格 3thus thus / yet / but / not
詞性more likely to survive and ___ to reproduce，需表結果的連接副詞「因此」
語意存活下來「因而」得以繁殖，前後為因果關係
✗ yet/but 表轉折與此因果相反；not 語意不通，破壞 survive and ___ to reproduce 結構
143.Good looks win votes (漂亮的外表贏得選票)4 格#080145
It is tempting to try to prove that good looks win votes, and many academics have tried. The 1difficulty is that beauty is in the eye of the 2beholder , and you cannot behold a politician’s face without a veil of extraneous prejudice getting in the way. Does George Bush possess a disarming grin, or a facetious 3smirk ? It’s hard to find anyone who can look at the president without assessing him politically as well 4physically subjectively objectively relatively
空格 1difficulty key / difficulty / explication / benefit
搭配固定句型 The difficulty is that...（難處在於），後接 that 子句
語意承接前句 many academics have tried，此處「困難在於」beauty 主觀
✗ key 多用 the key is to/that 語氣正面；difficulty 與後文 you cannot behold ... without prejudice 的障礙一致；explication/benefit 不合
空格 2beholder audience / viewer / turnout / beholder
搭配諺語 beauty is in the eye of the beholder（情人眼裡出西施）
語意固定諺語結構，後文 you cannot behold a face 同根呼應
✗ audience/viewer/turnout（觀眾／觀看者／投票率）皆非此諺語固定用字，唯 beholder 正確
空格 3smirk smile / face / smirk / eye
語意與前 disarming grin（迷人微笑）形成正反對比，需負面的「得意冷笑/假笑」
搭配a facetious smirk（輕浮的假笑），facetious 修飾需負面名詞
✗ smile（中性微笑）與 facetious 的貶意不搭；face/eye 非「表情」名詞，無法與 grin 對比
空格 4physically physically / subjectively / objectively / relatively
語意assessing him politically as well as ___，與 politically 對舉，需「外貌上」評斷
搭配as well as 連接對等副詞，politically ↔ physically（政治面 vs 外表面）
✗ subjectively/objectively/relatively（主觀／客觀／相對地）無法與 politically 構成「評政治也評外貌」的對比

SpaceX’s Falcon 9 rocket lifted off from Cape Canaveral, Florida, on Friday at 18:45 GMT (14:45 EDT), reaching orbit 9 minutes later. The rocket lofted an uncrewed 1mockup of SpaceX’s Dragon capsule, which is designed to one-day carry both crew and cargo to orbit. “This has been a good day for SpaceX and a 2promising development for the US human space flight programme,” said Robyn Ringuette of SpaceX in a webcast of the launch. In a teleconference with the media on Thursday, SpaceX’s CEO, Paypal co-founder Elon Musk, said he would consider the flight 100 percent successful if it reached 3orbit . “Even if we prove out just that the first stage functions correctly, I’d still say that’s a good day for a test,” he said. “It’s a great day if both stages work correctly.” SpaceX hopes to win a NASA 4contract to launch astronauts to the International Space Station using the Falcon 9. US government space shuttles, which currently make these trips, are scheduled to 5retire for safety reasons at the end of 2010. frame structure mockup base encouraging promising disappointing considering

語意與前 a good day 並列正面語氣，需「有希望的」
✗ disappointing（令人失望）與 good day 矛盾；considering 為介系詞/分詞語意不合；encouraging 雖近義但 promising development 更道地

語意前文 reaching orbit 9 minutes later 已出現，successful if it reached ___ 呼應

語意to launch astronauts ... 是承攬發射任務的「合約」
✗ arrangement/bargain/trust（安排／交易／信託）與 win ... to launch astronauts 的正式承包語意不符

語意space shuttles ... scheduled to ___ at the end of 2010 for safety reasons，太空梭「退役」

✗ resign（人辭職）主詞須為人；launch（發射）與退役語境相反；decelerate（減速）語意不合

Moreover, for Professor David Phoenix, the dean of the faculty of science and technology, the return of single-honors chemistry is a matter of 1credibility and pride. "If you say you're a science faculty, you single-honors chemistry is a matter of credibility and pride. Phoenix is adamant that the new course will teach solid Masters and PhD students in chemistry." Phoenix is adamant that the new course will teach solid chemistry, but he thinks that an 2attraction for students will be a teaching approach that 3differs significantly from his days as an undergraduate. This takes real-life issues as the starting point of significantly from his days as an undergraduate. This takes real-life issues as the starting point of lectures and modules, such as how drugs are made or the science behind green issues. Out of this study, he says, students will be exposed to the same core chemistry unchanged over decades, but they study, he says, students will be exposed to the same core chemistry unchanged over decades, but they will be doing it in a way that is more 4engaging and more likely to lead to more fundamental learning. It is an approach that 5symbolizes chemistry's recent success story: moving with the times, while holding is an approach that symbolizes chemistry's recent success story: moving with the times, while holding fast to the subject's essential role as a building block of science and technological advance.
空格 1credibility credibility / credit / responsibility / obligation
搭配搭配 a matter of credibility and pride（攸關公信力與榮譽）
語意後文「若稱自己是科學院就該有全部核心學科」指學院的「公信力」
✗ credit（功勞/學分）語意偏狹；responsibility/obligation（責任／義務）與 pride 並列、與該論點不合
空格 2attraction approach / attraction / exception / intention
搭配搭配 an attraction for students will be...（對學生的吸引力在於）
語意前文 attract a new supply，學生會被新教法吸引，需「吸引力」
✗ approach 雖後文出現但此處 an ___ for students 需「吸引點」；exception/intention（例外／意圖）語意不合
空格 3differs differs / coincides / distracts / corresponds

✗ coincides/corresponds（相符／一致）與 differ from 相反且搭配 with；distracts（分心）語意不通
空格 4engaging traditional / engaging / orthodox / conventional
語意a way that is more ___ and more likely to lead to ... learning，需正面的「引人入勝」
搭配more engaging（更吸引人的）與 more likely 並列遞進
✗ traditional/orthodox/conventional（傳統／正統／常規）與前文「不同於以往、以 real-life issues 為起點」的創新教法矛盾

146.The Lumière Brothers (盧米埃爾兄弟)6 格#080148
Our sense of cinema as a site of commercial entertainment can be traced back to the Lumière brothers. Our sense of cinema as a site of commercial entertainment can be traced back to the Lumière brothers. In December 1895 they 1attracted a fee-paying public in Paris to sit and watch flickering images on an illuminated screen. The commercial Pandora’s Box they opened was to 2blossom in a few years into a illuminated screen. The commercial Pandora’s Box they opened was to blossom in a few years into a world cinema 3industry and, at its peak, the fantastical Hollywood. Yet in the 30 years in which this miraculous construction was accomplished, audiences rarely 4had to listen to films, only watch them. miraculous construction was accomplished, audiences rarely had to listen to films, only watch them. Hence, the early decades of cinema were characterised by the title ‘silent’. 5In fact , there was a lot of noise, machinery, audiences, musicians and commentators. Even so, the absence of the human voice noise, machinery, audiences, musicians and commentators. Even so, the absence of the human voice and 6dialogue make the films seem rather strange when viewed by a modern audience. 5 In_brief In_fact As_a_result Nevertheless
空格 1attracted attracted / sponsored / witnessed / committed
搭配attract a public「吸引（付費）觀眾」，attract 搭配 fee-paying public
✗ sponsored（贊助）、witnessed（目睹）、committed（承諾）皆不符「吸引付費觀眾」語意。
空格 2blossom peak / stable / blossom / apex
時態was to + 原形 blossom「注定將蓬勃發展」，blossom 為原形動詞
語意語意：商業潘朵拉盒子「綻放/蓬勃」成世界電影產業
✗ peak、stable、apex 為名詞/形容詞，無法接於 was to 之後作動詞。
空格 3industry section / session / production / industry
搭配world cinema industry「世界電影產業」為固定搭配
✗ section、session、production 皆不與 world cinema 構成「電影產業」的慣用搭配。
空格 4had to listen had to listen / listened / listening / have to listen
時態過去式 had to「必須」呼應全文過去敘述，與後文 only watch them 並列
語意語意：觀眾「鮮少必須聽」電影，只是看，引出 silent 默片
✗ listened/listening 缺「必須」語意且時態結構不齊；have to listen 為現在式與過去敘述不符。
空格 5In fact In brief / In fact / As a result / Nevertheless
語意語意：稱默片，「事實上」現場其實很吵，with In fact 修正前述「無聲」印象
✗ In brief、As a result、Nevertheless 皆不符「實際上正好相反」的補充修正語氣。
空格 6dialogue subtitle / phase / dialogue / paragraph
搭配the human voice and dialogue「人聲與對白」並列，dialogue 指影片對白
✗ subtitle（字幕）、phase（階段）、paragraph（段落）皆不與 human voice 並列構成「人聲對白」語意。
147.Gender Equality Campaign (性別平等運動)5 格#080149
In many areas of expertise, ranging from music, dance, art, and literature to sports, chess, mathematics, In many areas of expertise, ranging from music, dance, art, and literature to sports, chess, mathematics, science, and foreign-language acquisition, there is abundant evidence that young people differ from one another in their attainments and in the apparent ease with which they achieve them. 1Even within a one another in their attainments and in the apparent ease with which they achieve them. Even within a family there may be marked differences: for example, a child who struggles at a musical instrument without 2much success may be overtaken by a younger sibling. It is widely believed that the likelihood without much success may be overtaken by a younger sibling. It is widely believed that the likelihood 3of becoming exceptionally competent in certain fields depends on the presence or absence of inborn attributes variously labelled “talents” or “gifts” or, less often, “natural aptitudes.” According to attributes variously labelled “talents” or “gifts” or, less often, “natural aptitudes.” According to an informal British survey, more than threequarters of music educators who decide 4which young people are to receive instruction believe that children cannot do well unless they have special innate people are to receive instruction believe that children cannot do well unless they have special innate gifts (Davis 1994). The judgement that someone is talented is believed to 5help explain as distinct from merely describing that person’s success. It is also widely assumed that the innate talent that makes it merely describing that person’s success. It is also widely assumed that the innate talent that makes it possible for an individual to excel can be detected in early childhood. 3 to_become of_becoming to_becoming about_becoming
空格 1Even Even / Nonetheless / However / Although
搭配Even within a family「即使在一個家庭內」，Even 強調連…也，搭配介系詞片語 within
✗ Nonetheless、However 為連接副詞不直接修飾 within 片語；Although 須接子句而非僅介系詞片語。
空格 2much many / much / no / few
單複數修飾不可數名詞 success，用 much
語意without much success「沒太大成就」
✗ many/few 修飾可數名詞，與不可數 success 不符；no 語意過絕對。
空格 3of becoming to become / of becoming / to becoming / about becoming
搭配the likelihood of becoming「成為…的可能性」，likelihood 搭配 of + 動名詞
詞性of + V-ing 動名詞
✗ to become、to becoming、about becoming 皆不與 likelihood 構成 likelihood of doing 的固定搭配。
空格 4which what / which / who / whose
詞性非限定關係子句先行詞為前述整件事（非人），用 which 補述
✗ what 不引導關係子句；who/whose 指人，先行詞非人。
空格 5help facilitate / help / do / assist
搭配help (to) explain「有助於解釋」，help 後可直接接原形動詞 explain
語意語意：判定有天賦「有助於解釋」而非僅描述成功
✗ facilitate、assist 不慣用直接接原形動詞 explain；do 語意不符此處「有助於解釋」。
148.Circular tables (圓形表格)4 格#080150
UMN's ALCs feature large 1circular tables that seat nine students and can accommodate laptop UMN's ALCs feature large circular tables that seat nine students and can accommodate laptop computers for 2collaborative work. Typically, students bring their own computers to class and use the building's ubiquitous wireless capability. The classrooms are designed to 3facilitate hands-on activities building's ubiquitous wireless capability. The classrooms are designed to facilitate hands-on activities and problems that require students to interact with each other to reach a solution. Students can display their work on large LCD screens mounted around the room to promote small-and large-group display their work on large LCD screens mounted around the room to promote small-and large-group discussion. Each table is allotted three gooseneck microphones so that students can make themselves heard without shouting during group discussions. Additionally, students can press a button on their heard without shouting during group discussions. Additionally, students can press a button on their table console to light a signal lamp to 4indicate when they need help or wish to speak. To facilitate brainstorming and group reporting, the room is also lined with erasable marker-boards. brainstorming and group reporting, the room is also lined with erasable marker-boards. separate collaborative individual respective facilitate develop hinder advocate define signal claim indicate
空格 1circular solid / circular / cycle / square
搭配搭配 large circular tables that seat nine（可坐九人的大圓桌）
語意標題 Circular tables，且圓桌利於圍坐協作
✗ square（方桌）與標題/協作圍坐不符；solid（實心的）、cycle（名詞「循環」）語意/詞性不合
空格 2collaborative separate / collaborative / individual / respective
語意accommodate laptops for ___ work，後文 interact with each other to reach a solution，需「協作的」
搭配collaborative work（協作工作）為固定搭配
✗ separate/individual/respective（各自的／個別的）與圍圓桌「互動協作」的全文主旨相反
空格 3facilitate facilitate / develop / hinder / advocate
語意designed to ___ hands-on activities（旨在「促進」實作活動）
搭配facilitate activities（促進活動）為常見搭配，呼應協作教室設計目的
✗ hinder（阻礙）語意相反；develop activities 偏「開發」；advocate（倡導）接活動語意不通
空格 4indicate define / signal / claim / indicate
語意light a signal lamp to ___ when they need help（亮燈以「示意」需要協助）
搭配indicate when/that...（表明、示意），後接 when 子句
✗ define（定義）語意不合；signal 與前 signal lamp 重複生硬；claim（聲稱）語氣不符示意需求情境
149."Black" Diamonds (“黑色”鑽石)6 格#080151
An 1exotic type of diamond may have come to Earth from outer space, scientists say. Called carbonado or "black" diamonds, the mysterious stones are found in Brazil and the Central African Republic. They or "black" diamonds, the mysterious stones are found in Brazil and the Central African Republic. They are 2unusual for being the color of charcoal and full of frothy bubbles. The diamonds, which can 3weigh at more than 3,600 carats, can also have a face that looks like melted glass. Because of their odd at more than 3,600 carats, can also have a face that looks like melted glass. Because of their odd appearance, the diamonds are 4unsuitable as gemstones. But they do have industrial applications and were used in the drill bits that helped dig the Panama Canal. Now a team led by Stephen Haggerty of were used in the drill bits that helped dig the Panama Canal. Now a team led by Stephen Haggerty of Florida International University in Miami has presented a new study suggesting that the odd stones were brought to Earth by an asteroid billions of years ago. The findings were published online in the were brought to Earth by an asteroid billions of years ago. The findings were published online in the journal Astrophysical Journal Letters on December 20. The scientists exposed polished pieces of carbonado to extremely intense infrared light. The test revealed the presence of many hydrogen- carbonado to extremely intense infrared light. The test revealed the presence of many hydrogen- carbon bonds, indicating that the diamonds probably formed in a hydrogen-rich environment—such as that found in space. The diamonds also showed strong 5similarities to tiny Nano diamonds, which are as that found in space. The diamonds also showed strong similarities to tiny Nano diamonds, which are frequently found in meteorites. "They're not identical," Haggerty said, "but they're very similar." Astrophysicists, he added, have developed theories predicting that Nano diamonds form easily in the Astrophysicists, he added, have developed theories predicting that Nano diamonds form easily in the titanic stellar explosions called supernovas, which scatter debris through interstellar space. The deposits in the Central African Republic and Brazil, he said, 6probably come from the impact of a deposits in the Central African Republic and Brazil, he said, probably come from the impact of a diamond-rich asteroid billions of years ago, when South America and Africa were joined.
空格 1exotic eccentric / exotic / indigenous / native
搭配搭配 an exotic type of diamond，呼應後文 may have come from outer space
語意標題與下文 mysterious、odd appearance 一致，需「外來/奇特的」
✗ indigenous/native（本土的）與「來自外太空」矛盾；eccentric 多形容人/行為「古怪」，修飾 diamond 不道地
空格 2unusual common / ordinary / abnormal / unusual
搭配搭配 unusual for being...（因…而與眾不同）
語意the color of charcoal and full of bubbles 屬「不尋常」特徵
✗ common/ordinary（普通的）與 mysterious、odd 矛盾；abnormal（多含病態貶意）修飾鑽石語感不佳
空格 3weigh count / weigh / value / weight
時態which can ___ more than 3,600 carats，情態 can 後接原形動詞 weigh
詞性weigh 作不及物「重達」接重量，weight 為名詞不可置此
✗ weight 為名詞詞性錯；count/value（計數／估值）與 more than 3,600 carats 的「重達」語意不符
空格 4unsuitable conspicuous / unsuitable / remarkable / suitable
語意Because of their odd appearance ... are ___ as gemstones，外觀怪異故「不適合」作寶石
搭配unsuitable as...（不適合作為），與 But they do have industrial applications 形成轉折
✗ suitable 與 odd appearance、But 轉折矛盾；conspicuous/remarkable（顯眼／出色）與「不宜作寶石」的因果不合
空格 5similarities similarities / connections / conjugation / consanguinity
搭配搭配 showed strong similarities to...（與…有強烈相似性）
語意後文 very similar、frequently found in meteorites，需「相似性」
✗ connections（關聯）搭配 to 偏「連結」非相似；conjugation/consanguinity（共軛／血緣）語意完全不符
空格 6probably probably / definitely / absolutely / usually
語意全文用 suggesting、theories predicting 等推測語氣，故 ___ formed 需「可能」而非斷定
搭配probably formed in a hydrogen-rich environment，呼應後文 probably come from the impact
✗ definitely/absolutely（一定／絕對）與 suggesting、theories 推測語氣矛盾；usually（通常）語意不合單一形成事件
150.Love of Reading (熱愛閱讀)3 格#080152
Many parents want their children to grow up with a love of reading. However, recent research 1has shown that children nowadays spend far more of their time using their phones or computers than reading books. Of course, technology brings children many advantages, but books are as important as computers. For instance, when children read storybooks, they imagine the characters and practise their language skills, too. Many British schools run an event called World Book Day. This event 2aims to promote reading to pupils using various fun activities. Some pupils come to school in costumes inspired by their favourite book. Other schools organise World Book Day activities where pupils create music, art or plays about books. But it's also important for children to read at home, too. At the moment, 3very few parents spend time reading with their children regularly. Unfortunately, this means that these children are missing an opportunity to develop the reading habit at an early age. have_shown has_shown will_show are_shown 1 have_shown has_shown will_show are_shown 3 almost_all nearly_every quite_often very_few
空格 1has shown have shown / has shown / will show / are shown
單複數主詞 recent research 為不可數單數，用 has
時態現在完成式 has shown「研究已顯示」
✗ have shown 主謂不一致（research 單數）；will show 未來式不符已有結果；are shown 被動且數不符。
空格 2aims supposes / aims / dedicates / directs
搭配aim to promote「旨在推廣」，aim 搭配 to + 原形
單複數主詞 This event 單數，用 aims
✗ supposes、dedicates、directs 皆不與 to promote 構成「旨在…」的慣用搭配。
空格 3very few almost all / nearly every / quite often / very few
語意語意：「極少」家長定期陪讀，呼應後文孩子錯失培養閱讀習慣的機會（負面）
單複數修飾可數複數 parents，very few 表「極少數」
✗ almost all、nearly every、quite often 表多數/常發生，與後文「孩子因此錯失機會」的負面結論矛盾。
151.Investment (投資)5 格#080153
One city will start to attract the 1majority of public or private investment. This could be due to 2natural advantage or political decisions. This in turn will 3stimulate further investment due to the multiplier advantage or political decisions. This in turn will stimulate further investment due to the multiplier effect and 4significant rural to urban migration. The investment in this city will be at the 5expense of bulk majority density cohesiveness natural absolute artificial prominent deaden evoke simulate stimulate
空格 1majority bulk / majority / density / cohesiveness
搭配固定搭配 the majority of investment（大部分投資）
語意attract the ___ of public or private investment，吸引「大多數」投資
✗ bulk 雖近義但 the bulk of 後多接整體不可數；density/cohesiveness（密度／凝聚力）與 of investment 搭配不通
空格 2natural natural / absolute / artificial / prominent
搭配搭配 natural advantage（天然優勢），與後文 or political decisions 並列
語意城市吸引投資的原因：天然優勢或政治決策
✗ artificial（人造的）與 advantage 並列、和 political decisions 對舉時語意不順；absolute/prominent 非「天然」之義
空格 3stimulate deaden / evoke / simulate / stimulate
搭配搭配 stimulate further investment（刺激更多投資），呼應 multiplier effect
時態will ___ further investment，will 後接原形動詞
✗ simulate（模擬）為形近混淆字、語意不同；deaden（使遲鈍）相反；evoke（喚起情感/記憶）不接 investment
空格 4significant prominent / significant / remarkable / conspicuous
搭配搭配 significant rural to urban migration（顯著的城鄉移民）
語意與 further investment 並列，描述「大規模」人口遷移
✗ prominent/remarkable/conspicuous 多形容引人注目之物，修飾 migration 規模時 significant 最自然道地
空格 5expense advantages / benefit / expense / effectiveness
搭配固定片語 at the expense of...（以…為代價）
語意對該城市的投資是「犧牲」其他地區為代價
✗ advantages/benefit/effectiveness（優勢／利益／效益）無 at the ___ of 此固定片語，語意亦與「代價」相反
152.What will make you happy? (什麽會讓你快樂？)4 格#080154
Want to know what will make you happy? Then ask a total stranger — or so says a new study from Harvard University, which shows that another person’s experience is often more 1informative than Harvard University, which shows that another person’s experience is often more informative than your own best guess. The study, which appears in the current issue of Science, was led by Daniel Gilbert, professor of psychology at Harvard and author of the 2007 bestseller “Stumbling on Gilbert, professor of psychology at Harvard and author of the 2007 bestseller “Stumbling on Happiness,” along with Matthew Killingsworth and Rebecca Eyre, also of Harvard, and Timothy Wilson of the University of Virginia. If you want to know how much you will enjoy an experience, you are of the University of Virginia. If you want to know how much you will enjoy an experience, you are better off knowing how much someone else enjoyed it than knowing anything about the experience itself,” says Gilbert. “Rather than closing our eyes and 2imagining the future, we should examine the itself,” says Gilbert. “Rather than closing our eyes and imagining the future, we should examine the experience of those who have been there. Previous research in psychology, neuroscience, and behavioral economics has shown that people have difficulty predicting what they will like and how behavioral economics has shown that people have difficulty predicting what they will like and how much they will like it, which 3leads them to make a wide variety of poor decisions. Interventions aimed at 4improving the accuracy with which people imagine future events have been generally unsuccessful. at improving the accuracy with which people imagine future events have been generally unsuccessful. imagining estimating predicting guessing leads forces urges compels commanding improving advancing controlling
空格 1informative communicative / informative / positive / predictable
語意another person's experience is often more ___ than your own best guess，他人經驗更具「參考價值」
搭配more informative than（更有參考價值），呼應全文 know what will make you happy
✗ communicative（善溝通的）形容人；positive/predictable（正面的／可預測的）與「比自己猜測更有用」的比較語意不符
空格 2imagining imagining / estimating / predicting / guessing
搭配呼應後文 closing our eyes and imagining the future、imagine future events，主題為「想像」未來
詞性與 closing 並列，介系詞後接動名詞 -ing
✗ estimating/predicting/guessing（估計／預測／猜測）雖近義，但全文反覆用 imagine/imagining 保持一致
空格 3leads leads / forces / urges / compels
搭配搭配 leads them to make ... poor decisions（導致他們做出…決定），lead sb to do
時態which ___ them，關係子句主詞為前述情況（單數），用 leads
✗ forces/compels（強迫）語氣過強；urges（敦促）含勸說意味，皆與「自然導致做出差勁決定」的中性因果不符
空格 4improving commanding / improving / advancing / controlling
搭配搭配 improving the accuracy（提高準確度）
語意Interventions aimed at ___ the accuracy with which people imagine，介入旨在「提升」準確度
✗ commanding/controlling（指揮／控制）與 accuracy 搭配不通；advancing 雖近義但 improve accuracy 為固定道地搭配
153.Hard work (艱苦的工作)5 格#080155
It is important to 1emphasize the need for hard work as an essential part of studying law, because far too many students are tempted to think that they can succeed by relying on what they imagine to be too many students are tempted to think that they can succeed by relying on what they imagine to be their natural ability, without bothering to add the expenditure of effort. To take an analogy some people prefer the more or less instant 2gratification which comes from watching television adaptation people prefer the more or less instant gratification which comes from watching television adaptation of a classic novel to the rather more 3laborious process of reading the novel itself. Those who 4prefer watching television to reading the book are less likely to study law successfully, unless they rapidly watching television to reading the book are less likely to study law successfully, unless they rapidly acquire a 5taste for text-based materials.
空格 1emphasize appoint / emphasize / undermine / weaken
搭配搭配 emphasize the need for...（強調…的必要性）
語意全句主旨在「強調」努力的重要，後文 too many students 忽視此點
✗ undermine/weaken（削弱）與「強調必要性」相反；appoint（任命）語意完全不符 the need
空格 2gratification gratification / relaxation / moderation / expectation
搭配固定搭配 instant gratification（即時滿足）
語意watching television 帶來的「即時快感」，與 laborious reading 對比
✗ relaxation/moderation/expectation（放鬆／節制／期待）與 instant 搭配不成固定片語，語意也不及 gratification 貼切
空格 3laborious labor / laborious / laboriously / laboratory
詞性the rather more ___ process，需形容詞修飾 process，故用 laborious
語意與 instant gratification 對比，閱讀原著是「費力的」過程
✗ labor（名詞/動詞）、laboriously（副詞）、laboratory（名詞「實驗室」）詞性或詞義皆不可修飾 process
空格 4prefer prefer / hope / intend / wish
搭配句型 prefer A to B（偏好 A 勝於 B），呼應 prefer watching television to reading
詞性Those who ___ watching television to reading，唯 prefer 可接 A to B 結構
✗ hope/intend/wish 後不接 to + N（不構成 A to B 比較）；前文已用 prefer ... to，此處平行呼應
空格 5taste taste / smell / look / feeling
搭配固定搭配 acquire a taste for...（培養對…的興趣/喜好）
語意rapidly acquire a ___ for text-based materials，培養對文字材料的「品味/喜好」
✗ smell/look/feeling（氣味／外觀／感覺）無 acquire a ___ for 此固定片語，語意亦不符「養成喜好」
154.Conservancy (保護)5 格#080156
To qualify as a conservancy, a committee must define the conservancy’s boundary, elect a To qualify as a conservancy, a committee must define the conservancy’s boundary, elect a 1representative conservancy committee, negotiate a legal constitution, prove the committee’s ability to 2manage funds, and produce an acceptable plan for 3equitable distribution of wildliferelated benefits. to manage funds, and produce an acceptable plan for equitable distribution of wildliferelated benefits. Once approved, 4registered conservancies acquire the 5rights to a sustainable wildlife quota set by the stable equal established equitable registered identified qualified logged agreement rights obligations integrity
空格 1representative parliamentary / governmental / representative / indicative
搭配搭配 elect a representative committee（選出有代表性的委員會）
語意需「選舉」產生，故委員會須具「代表性」
✗ parliamentary/governmental（國會的／政府的）層級不符社區保育委員會；indicative（指示性的）語意不通
空格 2manage manage / attract / operate / borrow
搭配搭配 manage funds（管理資金）
語意prove the committee's ability to ___ funds，需證明「管理」資金能力
✗ attract/borrow（吸引／借入）資金與「證明管理能力」語意不符；operate funds 搭配不道地
空格 3equitable stable / equal / established / equitable
搭配搭配 equitable distribution（公平分配）
語意an acceptable plan for ___ distribution of benefits，需「公平的」利益分配
✗ stable/established（穩定的／既定的）非「公平」之義；equal 雖近義但 equitable distribution（合理公平）為此語境固定搭配
空格 4registered registered / identified / qualified / logged
搭配搭配 registered conservancies（已登記的保育區）
語意Once approved, ___ conservancies acquire the rights，核准後須「登記」才取得權利
✗ identified/qualified/logged（被辨識／合格／記錄）與「正式登記後取得法定權利」的官方程序語意不符
空格 5rights agreement / rights / obligations / integrity
搭配搭配 acquire the rights to...（取得…的權利）
語意acquire the ___ to a sustainable wildlife quota，取得野生動物配額的「權利」
✗ agreement/obligations/integrity（協議／義務／誠信）與 acquire the ___ to a quota 的「權利」語意不符
155.Experience of Crime (犯罪經驗)6 格#080157
Crime is an integral part of everyday life. It is a prominent 1feature in the news and is a popular subject for frictional portrayal. Most students commencing legal studies will have some 2experience of crime, for frictional portrayal. Most students commencing legal studies will have some experience of crime, whether directly, as a victim of crime or indirectly through exposure to media coverage. This means that most offenses 3covered on the syllabus, such as murder, theft and rape will be familiar terms. This that most offenses covered on the syllabus, such as murder, theft and rape will be familiar terms. This tends to give students the impression that they know more about criminal law than they do about other subjects on the syllabus. This can be a real disadvantage 4in terms of the academic study of other subjects on the syllabus. This can be a real disadvantage in terms of the academic study of criminal law because it tends to lead students to rely on preconceived 5notions of the nature and scope of the offenses and to reach instinctive, but often legally inaccurate, conclusions. It is absolutely of the offenses and to reach instinctive, but often legally inaccurate, conclusions. It is absolutely 6essential to success in criminal law that you put aside any prior knowledge of the offenses and focus on the principles of law derived from statutes and cases. By doing this you will soon appreciate just on the principles of law derived from statutes and cases. By doing this you will soon appreciate just how much difference there is between everyday conceptions of crime and its actuality. 4 subject_to up_to in_terms_to in_terms_of

✗ disclosed、revealed、illustrated 皆不符「課綱所涵蓋」的慣用語意。

搭配in terms of「就…而言」為固定片語，後接 the academic study
✗ subject to、up to 語意不符；in terms to 介系詞錯誤。

搭配preconceived notions「先入為主的觀念」為固定搭配
✗ knowledge（不可數）、concept（單數無 s）、perception 皆不與 preconceived 構成此慣用複數搭配。

搭配absolutely essential to success「對成功絕對必要」，essential 搭配 absolutely 與 to
✗ constitutional、superficial、decisive 皆不符「絕對必要」且不與 absolutely...to 慣用搭配。
156.An abstract (摘要)3 格#080158
An abstract is an original work, not an excerpted passage. An abstract must be fully self-contained and An abstract is an original work, not an excerpted passage. An abstract must be fully self-contained and 1make sense by itself, without further reference to outside sources or to the actual paper. It highlights key content areas, your research purpose, the relevance or importance of your work, and the main key content areas, your research purpose, the relevance or importance of your work, and the main outcomes. It is a well-developed single paragraph of approximately 250 words in length, which is indented and single spaced. The function of the abstract is to outline briefly all parts of the paper. indented and single spaced. The function of the abstract is to outline briefly all parts of the paper. Although 2placed at the beginning of your paper, immediately following the title page, the abstract should be the last thing that you write, 3once you are sure of the conclusions you will reach. should be the last thing that you write, once you are sure of the conclusions you will reach. produce make generate demonstrate placed placing be_placed is_placed once even although as
空格 1make produce / make / generate / demonstrate
搭配「make sense」固定片語，指說得通／有意義
語意abstract must be self-contained and ___ sense by itself，要求摘要能獨立成立
✗ produce/generate/demonstrate 都不能與 sense 構成慣用語
空格 2placed placed / placing
時態「Although placed at the beginning」過去分詞被動省略，主詞 abstract 是被放置
詞性Although 引導讓步分詞構句，需過去分詞 placed 非現在分詞
✗ placing 為主動現在分詞，但摘要是被放在開頭，語態不對
空格 3once once / even / although / as
搭配once 引導時間副詞子句，意為一旦／當…之後
語意the last thing you write, ___ you are sure of the conclusions，指確定結論後才寫
✗ even/although 為讓步語意不合、as 引導不出「一旦確定」的時間條件
157.A Novel Device (一種新型設備)4 格#080159
A novel invention for helping farmers to dry out hay more quickly has won a University of Glasgow graduate a prestigious design award. Gavin Armstrong, 23, from Kippen, Stirlingshire 1scooped the graduate a prestigious design award. Gavin Armstrong, 23, from Kippen, Stirlingshire scooped the Glasgow 1999 Design Medal for his design for a swath inverter— a 2device for flipping over a hay crop to help dry out the damp underside. Dry hay is an essential farmyard food source for sheep and cows. to help dry out the damp underside. Dry hay is an essential farmyard food source for sheep and cows. Gavin came up with the design as part of his Product Design Engineering degree course, run in 3conjunction with Glasgow School of Art. He built a working prototype of the device which is powered conjunction with Glasgow School of Art. He built a working prototype of the device which is powered and towed by a tractor and uses a pair of parallel belts to invert the swath. The rollers are driven from one hydraulic motor and are geared so as to spin at the same speed and in opposite directions one hydraulic motor and are geared so as to spin at the same speed and in opposite directions 4ensuring that the touching inner two faces of the belt that perform the inversion move rearwards at conjunction injunction junction conjuncture ensuring insuring pledging defending
空格 1scooped gouged / scooped / scratched / stretched
搭配「scoop an award/medal」固定講法，指奪得獎項
語意受詞為 the Glasgow 1999 Design Medal，指贏得獎牌
✗ gouged 挖鑿、scratched 抓刮、stretched 伸展，皆不能搭配贏得獎牌
空格 2device facility / hypothesis / device / assumption
搭配「a device for + V-ing」固定講法，表示用於某功能的器具
語意a swath inverter—a ___ for flipping over a hay crop，指翻草的裝置
✗ facility 指設施場所、hypothesis 假設、assumption 假定，皆非實體翻草器具
空格 3conjunction conjunction / injunction / junction / conjuncture
搭配「in conjunction with」固定片語，意為與…合作／結合
語意run ___ with Glasgow School of Art，指與藝術學院合辦
✗ injunction 禁制令、junction 交叉口、conjuncture 時局，皆無 in ___ with 此搭配
空格 4ensuring ensuring / insuring / pledging / defending
搭配「ensure that...」固定搭配，後接 that 子句表確保某結果
語意ensuring that 內外兩面向後移動，符合機械運作描述
✗ insuring 指投保、pledging 承諾、defending 防衛，皆與確保某結果不合
158.Leadership (領導)4 格#080160
Leadership is all about being granted permission by others to lead their thinking. It is a bestowed moral authority that gives the right to organise and direct the efforts of others. But moral authority does not come from simply managing people effectively or communicating better or being able to motivate. It comes from many 1sources , including being authentic and genuine, having integrity, and showing a real and deep understanding of the business in question. All these 2factors build confidence. Leaders lose moral authority for three reasons: they behave 3unethically ; they become plagued by self- Leaders lose moral authority for three reasons: they behave unethically ; they become plagued by self- doubt and lose their conviction; or they are blinded by power lose self-awareness and thus lose 4connection with those they lead as the context around them changes. Having said all this, it has to be connection with those they lead as the context around them changes. Having said all this, it has to be assumed that if someone becomes a leader, at some point they understood the difference between right and wrong. It is up to them to abide by a moral code and up to us to ensure that the moment we right and wrong. It is up to them to abide by a moral code and up to us to ensure that the moment we suspect they do not, we fire them or vote them out. 5 carry_out abide_by stand_by take_on
空格 1sources sources / origins / perceptions / supports
搭配「come from many sources」固定講法，指來自多種來源

✗ origins 偏起源、perceptions 認知、supports 支撐，皆不搭 come from many

語意「All these ___ build confidence」回指前句列出的真誠、正直等要素
單複數these 後接複數，factors 指多項因素
✗ properties 屬性、responses 回應、parts 部分，皆不如 factors 精準回指促成因素
空格 3unethically unusably / unethically / considerably / unevenly
詞性「they behave ___」需副詞修飾動詞 behave
語意與下文 lose moral authority 呼應，指行為不道德
✗ unusably 不可用地、considerably 相當地、unevenly 不平均地，皆與失去道德權威不合

搭配「lose connection with」固定搭配，指失去與他人的連結

The ocean floor is home to many unique communities of plants and animals. Most of these marine The ocean floor is home to many unique communities of plants and animals. Most of these marine ecosystems are near the water surface, such as the Great Barrier Reef, a 2,000-km long coral 1formation off the northeastern coast of Australia. Coral reefs, like nearly all complex living communities, depend off the northeastern coast of Australia. Coral reefs, like nearly all complex living communities, depend on solar energy for growth (photosynthesis). The sun's energy, however, penetrates at most only about 300 m below the surface of the water. The relatively shallow penetration of solar energy and the 300 m below the surface of the water. The relatively shallow penetration of solar energy and the sinking of cold, subpolar water combine to make most of the deep ocean floor a 2frigid environment with few life forms. In 1977, scientists discovered hot springs at a depth of 2.5 km, on the Galapagos with few life forms. In 1977, scientists discovered hot springs at a depth of 2.5 km, on the Galapagos Rift (spreading ridge) off the coast of Ecuador. This exciting discovery was not really a 3surprise . Since the early 1970s, scientists had predicted that hot springs (geothermal vents) should be found at the the early 1970s, scientists had predicted that hot springs (geothermal vents) should be found at the active spreading centers along the mid-oceanic ridges, where magma, at temperatures over 1,000 °Presumably was being erupted to form new oceanic crust. More exciting, because it was totally °Presumably was being erupted to form new oceanic crust. More exciting, because it was totally 4unexpected , was the discovery of abundant and unusual sea life-giant tube worms, huge clams, and mussels-that 5thrived around the hot springs. mussels-that thrived around the hot springs. frigid torrid versatile broiling shock awe surprise climax usual undermined predictable unexpected

搭配「not really a surprise」固定講法，呼應後文 had predicted

✗ usual/predictable 與 totally + exciting 矛盾、undermined 削弱語意不合

160.Proto-Indo-European (原始印歐語系)3 格#080162
No matter whether you speak English or Urdu, Waloon or Waziri, Portuguese or Persian, the roots of your language are the same. Proto-Indo-European (PIE) is the mother tongue – shared by several your language are the same. Proto-Indo-European (PIE) is the mother tongue – shared by several hundred contemporary languages, as well as many now extinct, and spoken by people who lived from about 6,000 to 3,500 BC on the steppes to the north of the Caspian Sea. They left no written texts and about 6,000 to 3,500 BC on the steppes to the north of the Caspian Sea. They left no written texts and 1although historical linguists have, since the 19th century, painstakingly reconstructed the language from daughter languages, the question of how it actually sounded was assumed to be permanently from daughter languages, the question of how it actually sounded was assumed to be permanently out of reach. Now, researchers at the Universities of Cambridge and Oxford have developed a sound- based method to move back through the family tree of languages that stem from PIE. They can based method to move back through the family tree of languages that stem from PIE. They can simulate how certain words 2would have sounded when they were spoken 8,000 years ago. Remarkably, at the 3heart of the technology is the statistics of shape. “Sounds have shape,” explains Professor at the heart of the technology is the statistics of shape. “Sounds have shape,” explains Professor John Aston, from Cambridge’s Statistical Laboratory. “As a word is uttered it vibrates air, and the shape of this soundwave can be measured and turned into a series of numbers. Once we have these stats, and the stats of another spoken word, we can start asking how similar they are and what it would stats, and the stats of another spoken word, we can start asking how similar they are and what it would take to shift from one to another.” 2 would_sound sounded were_sounded would_have_sounded
空格 1although however / therefore / although / thus
語意語意：「雖然」語言學家已重建語言，發音問題仍被認為無解，讓步轉折
詞性although 引導讓步子句，後接 the question... was assumed 主句
✗ however、thus、therefore 為連接副詞，無法引導從屬讓步子句。
空格 2would have sounded would sound / sounded / were sounded / would have sounded
時態對過去的推測 would have sounded「（當年）會是怎樣的聲音」，呼應 8,000 years ago
✗ would sound 指現在/假設；sounded 純過去事實；were sounded 被動且不符對過去推測語氣。
空格 3heart stone / heart / foundation / climax
搭配at the heart of「在…的核心」為固定片語
✗ stone、foundation、climax 皆不與 at the...of 構成「位於核心」的慣用片語。
161.Bones and joints (骨骼和關節)3 格#080163
Bones are extremely strong. One of their 1main functions is to protect organs. For example, 2the skull protects the brain and forms the shape of the face. The spinal cord, a pathway for messages between the brain and the body, is protected by the backbone, or spinal column. The ribs form a cage that shelters the heart and lungs, and the pelvis helps protect the bladder, part of the intestines, and in women, the reproductive organs. Joints make the skeleton flexible – without them, movement would be impossible. 3Three kinds of freely movable joints play a big part in voluntary movement: Hinge joints allow movement in one direction, as seen in the knees and elbows. Pivot joints allow a rotating or twisting motion, like that of the head moving from side to side. Ball-and-socket joints allow the greatest freedom of movement. The hips and shoulders have this type of joint, in which the round end of a long bone fits into the hollow of another bone. obsolete main subjective base
空格 1main obsolete / main / subjective / base
語意「one of their main functions is to protect organs」指骨骼的主要功能之一
詞性one of their ___ functions 需形容詞修飾 functions
✗ obsolete 過時、subjective 主觀、base 卑劣或基底，皆與主要功能不合
空格 2the the / a / these / those
語意protected by ___ backbone，前文已知脊椎為特指唯一，用定冠詞 the
單複數backbone 為單數可數特指，用 the 不用 these/those
✗ a 表泛指首次出現不合特指、these/those 為複數指示詞與單數 backbone 不符
空格 3Three Two / Three / Four / First
單複數後文列出 Hinge / Pivot / Ball-and-socket 三種關節，故為 Three
語意「Three kinds of freely movable joints」對應下文三項分述
✗ Two/Four 與下文所列三類不符、First 為序數語意不合

Fans of biographical criticism have a luxurious source in the works of Hans Christian Andersen. Like Lewis Carroll (and, to a lesser extent, Kenneth Grahame), Andersen was near-pathologically Lewis Carroll (and, to a lesser extent, Kenneth Grahame), Andersen was near-pathologically uncomfortable in the company of adults. Of course, all three had to work and 1interact with adults, but all three really 2related well to children and their simpler worlds. Andersen, for a time, ran a puppet all three really related well to children and their simpler worlds. Andersen, for a time, ran a puppet theater and was incredibly popular with children, and, of course, he wrote an impressive body of fairy tales which have been produced in thousands of editions since the 19th century. Most everyone has tales which have been produced in thousands of editions since the 19th century. Most everyone has read or at least knows the titles of many of Andersen’s works: “The Ugly Duckling,” “The Emperor’s New Clothes,” “The Nightingale,” “The Little Mermaid,” “The Match Girl,” and Emperor’s New Clothes,” “The Nightingale,” “The Little Mermaid,” “The Match Girl,” and many others. Though, as with most folk and fairy tales, they 3strike adult rereaders much differently than they do young first-time readers. Charming tales of ducks who feel 4awkward because they don’t than they do young first-time readers. Charming tales of ducks who feel awkward because they don’t fit in, only to exult in the discovery that they are majestic swans, gives child readers clearly-identifiable messages: don’t tease people because they’re different; don’t fret about your being different messages: don’t tease people because they’re different; don’t fret about your being different because some day you’ll discover what special 5gifts you have. A closer, deeper look at many of Andersen’s tales (including “The Ugly Duckling,” which is not on our reading list), reveals a darker, Andersen’s tales (including “The Ugly Duckling,” which is not on our reading list), reveals a darker, harder, more 6painful thread. People are often cruel and unfeeling, love is torturous–in general, the things of the material world cause suffering. There is often a happy ending, but it’s not things of the material world cause suffering. There is often a happy ending, but it’s not conventionally happy. Characters are rewarded, but only after they manage (often through death) to transcend the rigors of the mortal world. transcend the rigors of the mortal world. react interact perform respond similar connected related concerned strike hit punch smash
空格 1interact react / interact / perform / respond
搭配「interact with」固定搭配，指與人互動往來

空格 2related similar / connected / related / concerned

語意really ___ well to children，指他與孩童相處得好
✗ similar/connected/concerned 皆無 ___ well to 表「相處融洽」的慣用語
空格 3strike strike / hit / punch / smash
搭配「strike sb. differently」固定講法，指給人不同的感受／印象
語意they ___ adult rereaders much differently，指成人重讀者的感受不同
✗ hit/punch/smash 為實體擊打，無「給某種印象」的引申義

✗ wealth/treasures 偏財富珍寶、ability 不搭 special 複數，皆不如 special gifts 自然

✗ delightful/pleasant 為正面與 darker 矛盾、detrimental 偏有害不搭情感色彩

Her bridge was open to passengers virtually 24 hours a day. Experts on 2board presented on topics including climate change, wildlife, Inuit culture and history, and early European explorers. UBC professor Michael Byers presented on the issue of Arctic sovereignty, a 3growing cause of debate as ice melts, new shipping routes open, and natural resources 4become accessible. Recommended pre-trip reading was late UBC alumnus Pierre Bertons book, The became becoming has_become become

✗ indoors 室內與探險矛盾、outside/outward 不構成 the great ___ 慣用語

搭配「on board」固定片語，指在船上
語意Experts on ___ presented on topics，指船上的專家
✗ aboard 本身已含 on 不再接 on、trip/ship 不構成 on ___ 此搭配
空格 3growing grow / grown / growth / growing
詞性a ___ cause of debate 需形容詞性現在分詞修飾 cause
