Choices must similarly be made about which aspects of the past should be formally taught to the next generation in similarly be made about which aspects of the past should be formally taught to the next generation in the shape of school history lessons. So, 2for example , when a national school curriculum for England and Wales was first discussed at the end of the 1980s, the history curriculum was the subject of and Wales was first discussed at the end of the 1980s, the history curriculum was the subject of considerable public and media 3interest . Politicians argued about it; people wrote letters to the press about it; the Prime Minister of the time, Margaret Thatcher, 4intervened in the debate. Let us think first about it; the Prime Minister of the time, Margaret Thatcher, intervened in the debate. Let us think first about the question of content. There were two main camps on this issue – those who thought the history of Britain should take pride of 5place , and those who favored what was referred to as 'world history of Britain should take pride of place , and those who favored what was referred to as 'world 1 have_selected have_been_selected be_selected select 2 as_a_result for_example in_brief subjectively 4 was_intervened was_intervening intervened had_intervened
空格 1have selected have selected / have been selected / be selected / select
時態主詞 historians + 現在完成式 have selected，表「歷史學家所挑選的」主動完成。
語意對比前文 not everything that happened，強調人為「主動挑選」，須用主動式。
✗ have been selected 為被動、be selected/select 時態或語態不合主詞 historians 的主動完成語意。
空格 2for example as a result / for example / in brief / subjectively
語意後文以英格蘭威爾斯課綱為具體例子，for example（舉例來說）引出例證。
✗ as a result 表結果、in brief 表總結、subjectively（主觀地）皆不符「舉例」語境。
空格 3interest interest / findings / preference / traces
搭配public and media interest（公眾與媒體關注），interest 與 public/media 搭配自然。
語意後文政客爭論、民眾投書、首相介入，皆顯示「引發關注」，interest 切題。
✗ findings（發現）、preference（偏好）、traces（痕跡）皆不符「成為關注焦點」之意。
空格 4intervened was intervened / was intervening / intervened / had intervened
時態敘述過去事件（柴契爾介入辯論），intervene 為不及物動詞，用過去簡單式主動 intervened。
詞性intervene 不及物，不可用被動 was intervened。
✗ was intervened 被動不通、was intervening 進行式不必要、had intervened 過去完成無對應更早時間點。
空格 5place opportunity / position / location / place
搭配固定片語 take pride of place（居最重要/顯著地位）。
✗ opportunity、position、location 皆無法構成 take pride of ___ 這個慣用語。
205.Fresh Water (淡水)4 格#080208
Everybody needs fresh water. 1Without water, people, animals and plants cannot live. Although a few Everybody needs fresh water. Without water, people, animals and plants cannot live. Although a few plants and animals can make do with saltwater, all humans need a constant supply of fresh water if they are to stay 2fit and healthy. Of the total supply of water on the Earth, only about 3 percent of it is they are to stay fit and healthy. Of the total supply of water on the Earth, only about 3 percent of it is fresh, and most of that is stored as ice and snow at the poles, or is so 3deep under the surface of the Earth that we cannot get to it. Despite so much of the water being out of reach, we still have a million Earth that we cannot get to it. Despite so much of the water being out of reach, we still have a million cubic miles of it that we 4can use. That's about 4,300,000 cubic kilometers of fresh water to share out between most of the plants, animals and people on the planet. between most of the plants, animals and people on the planet.
空格 1Without Although / Without / Within / As
搭配Without + 名詞 開頭表「若無…」
語意Without water 沒有水…無法生存，符合條件語意
✗ Although 後須接子句；Within(在內)、As(當/作為)語意不合「沒有水就不能活」
空格 2fit unwell / better / fit / up
搭配stay fit and healthy 保持健康強健，固定搭配
語意須正面詞與 healthy 並列
✗ unwell(不適)為負面與 healthy 矛盾；better/up 與 stay...and healthy 搭配不成立
空格 3deep deep / steep / wide / strong
搭配deep under the surface 深埋地表之下，固定搭配
語意與 cannot get to it 呼應，因太深而取不到
✗ steep(陡)、wide(寬)、strong(強)無法搭 under the surface 表「深」
空格 4can cannot / can
語意前 Despite(儘管取不到)轉折，仍有 a million cubic miles 可用，故用 can
搭配still have ... that we can use 仍有可用的水
✗ cannot 與前文 Despite 轉折及「仍有可用的水」語意矛盾
206.Essays (論文)5 格#080209
Essays are used as an assessment tool to 1evaluate , as well as your understanding of subject content. This does not mean that essays are a 'regurgitation' of everything your lecturer has said argument the course. Essays are your opportunity to explore aspects of the course in greater 2throughout -theories, issues, texts, etc. and in some cases relate these aspects to a 3depth context. It is your opportunity to articulate your ideas, but in a 4particular way: using formal academic style. research a topic and research a topic and particular special superficial ordinary same common 5certain usual
空格 1evaluate escalate / evaluate / elaborate / eradicate / your / ability / to / ar
搭配assessment tool to evaluate 評量工具用以評估，搭配自然
語意essays 作為評量工具去 evaluate(評估)你的理解，語意最合
✗ escalate(升高)、elaborate(詳述)、eradicate(根除)語意皆不符評量目的(your/ability/to/ar 為干擾片段非完整詞)
空格 2throughout pass / via / through / throughout
搭配throughout + 期間名詞，表「貫穿整個…」
語意throughout the course 整個課程期間，講師全程說過的話
✗ pass 非介系詞不合；via(經由)、through 表穿越/方式，不如 throughout 表「全程」
空格 3depth depth / width / fields / length
搭配in greater depth 更深入，固定搭配
語意探討課程面向「更深入」，depth 最貼切
✗ width/length 不搭 in greater 探討；fields 為複數名詞且不搭 greater
空格 4particular需覆核 particular / special / superficial / ordinary
搭配in a particular way 以某種特定方式，固定搭配；後文 using formal academic style 即此特定方式
詞性修飾 way 須形容詞，particular 為形容詞
✗ special 語氣偏「特殊」較弱；superficial(膚淺)為負面、ordinary(普通)與「特定學術方式」矛盾
空格 5certain需覆核 same / common / certain / usual
詞性修飾 context 須形容詞，certain(某一的)合宜
語意relate these aspects to a certain context 連結到某個特定脈絡
✗ same(相同)、common(共同)、usual(通常)與「連結到某特定脈絡」語意不如 certain 自然
207.Internet Use (互聯網使用)3 格#080210
People are spending twice as much time online compared to 10 years ago, fuelled by increasing use of tablets and smartphones. The biggest 1increase has been among young adults, with time spent online almost tripling from 10 hours and 24 minutes each week in 2005 to 27 hours and 36 minutes in 2014. In total, the average adult spends more than 20 hours online a week, which includes time spent on the internet 2at work. 3Meanwhile the average person spends 2.5 hours every week “online while on the move”-away from their home, work or place of study. This is a five-fold increase from 2005, when the figure was just 30 minutes. Overall, the proportion of adults using the internet has risen by half-from six in ten in 2005 to almost nine in ten today, according to Ofcom’s Media Use and Attitudes 2015 report, which questioned 1,890 adults aged 16 and over about their internet consumption habits. decline increase balance reduction 4 according_to responding_to in_regards_to related_to
空格 1increase decline / increase / balance / reduction
語意The biggest increase has been among young adults 最大增幅，呼應前文上網時間加倍
搭配the biggest increase 最大增幅，搭配自然
✗ decline/reduction(下降/減少)與「翻倍成長」相反；balance(平衡)語意不合
空格 2at with / on / at / towards
搭配time spent on the internet at work 在工作時上網，at work 固定片語
詞性at + work 表「在工作場合/工作時」
✗ with/on/towards 都無法與 work 構成「在工作時」的 at work 慣用語
空格 3Meanwhile However / Nevertheless / Meanwhile
語意Meanwhile(同時)銜接前後並列數據，引出另一項統計
搭配Meanwhile 作句首連接副詞表「與此同時」
✗ However/Nevertheless 表轉折對比，此處為並列補充非轉折，故不合
208.Computational thinking (計算思維)5 格#080211
Developing computational thinking helps students to better understand the world around them. Many of us happily drive a car without 1understanding what goes on under the bonnet. So is it necessary for children to 2learn how to program computers? After all, some experts say coding is one of the human skills that will become 3obsolete as artificial intelligence grows. Nevertheless, governments believe coding is an essential skill. Since 2014, the principles of computer programming have 4featured on England's curriculum for children from the age of five or six, when they start primary school. While not all children will become programmers, Mark Martin, a computing teacher at Sydenham High School, London, argues that they should learn to understand what 5makes computers work and try to solve problems as a computer might. learn investigate master acknowledge temporary obsolete fashionable contemporary featured attributed allocated designated
空格 1understanding elaborating / pondering / considering / understanding
語意helps students to better understanding the world 助學生更理解世界，呼應主題 computational thinking
搭配better understanding the world around them 更理解周遭世界
✗ elaborating(詳述)、pondering/considering(思索)與「理解世界」語意不如 understand 直接
空格 2learn learn / investigate / master / acknowledge
搭配learn how to program computers 學習如何寫程式，learn how to 固定搭配
語意後文 children...learn to understand 呼應「學習」
✗ investigate/master/acknowledge 與 how to program 的「學會」語意不如 learn 自然
空格 3obsolete temporary / obsolete / fashionable / contemporary
語意become obsolete as AI grows 隨 AI 成長而過時/淘汰
搭配become obsolete 變得過時，固定搭配
✗ temporary(暫時)、fashionable(流行)、contemporary(當代)與「隨AI被淘汰」語意不合
空格 4featured featured / attributed / allocated / designated
搭配featured on the curriculum 列入課綱，feature on 固定搭配
時態Since 2014... have featured 現在完成式，featured 為過去分詞
✗ attributed/allocated/designated 皆不接 on 構成「列入課綱」之意
空格 5makes guides / leads / drives / makes
搭配what makes computers work 是什麼讓電腦運作，make + 受詞 + 原形動詞
詞性makes 後接 work 原形，使役動詞用法
✗ guides/leads/drives 不符 make sb/sth do 的使役結構，語意也不合
209.Poverty (貧窮)4 格#080212
Measuring poverty on a global scale 1requires establishing a uniform poverty level across extremely divergent economies, which can result in only rough comparisons. The World Bank has defined the divergent economies, which can result in only rough comparisons. The World Bank has defined the international poverty line as U.S. $1 and $2 per day in 1993 Purchasing Power Parity (PPP), which adjusts for differences in the 2prices of goods and services between countries. The $1 per day level is adjusts for differences in the prices of goods and services between countries. The $1 per day level is generally used for the 3least 4developed countries, primarily African; the $2-per-day level is used for middle-income economies such as those of East Asia and Latin America. middle-income economies such as those of East Asia and Latin America. qualities prices costs amount worst best most least developed middle income high income developing
空格 1requires requires / rejects / permits / allows
語意Measuring poverty requires establishing a uniform line 衡量貧窮需要建立統一標準
單複數動名詞主詞 Measuring 視為單數，requires 加 s 一致
✗ rejects(拒絕)語意相反；permits/allows(允許)與「需要建立」的必要語意不合
空格 2prices qualities / prices / costs / amount
搭配differences in the prices of goods and services 商品服務的價格差異，PPP 主題搭配
語意PPP 即購買力平價，調整的是各國「價格」差異
✗ qualities(品質)、costs(成本)、amount(數量,且不可數不合 the...of) 與 PPP 的「價格」不合
空格 3least worst / best / most / least
搭配the least developed countries 最低度開發國家，固定術語
語意$1/day 用於最貧窮國家，least developed 最貼切
✗ worst/best/most 與 developed 不構成標準術語；語意也不合「最不發達」
空格 4developed需覆核 developed / middle / income / high / income / developing
搭配least developed countries 最低度開發國家，固定搭配(干擾選項含 middle/income/high/developing 為詞庫雜詞)
語意與後文 middle-income economies 對比，此處指最不發達國家
✗ middle/high/income 屬另一組 middle-income 用語；developing(開發中)程度不如 least developed
210.Gunpowder and fireworks (火藥和煙花)4 格#080213
Gunpowder and fireworks might have been invented independently in Europe, but they probably reached Europe via the Mongols, who spread west from China as far as central Europe by the mid-13th reached Europe via the Mongols, who spread west from China as far as central Europe by the mid-13th century. In 1267, the English monk Roger Bacon 1recorded seeing what were very likely firecrackers, which he compared with the flash of lightning and growl of thunder. In 1377 fireworks accompanied a which he compared with the flash of lightning and growl of thunder. In 1377 fireworks accompanied a religious mystery play by the bishop's palace in Vicenza, and were soon used to add sparks to figures of doves, representing the Holy Spirit, or angels, made to ascend and descend from the heavens on of doves, representing the Holy Spirit, or angels, made to ascend and descend from the heavens on ropes. By the 15th century, rockets were being used in Europe for military and peaceful purposes. Italian and Spanish cities in particular 2began to use fireworks for outdoor celebrations. The Italian Italian and Spanish cities in particular began to use fireworks for outdoor celebrations. The Italian metallurgist Vannoccio Biringuccio described festivities in Florence and Siena for feast days. These included 'girandoles' or whirling decorated wheels packed with fireworks which were 3suspended from included 'girandoles' or whirling decorated wheels packed with fireworks which were suspended from a rope hung across a street or square. Fireworks were also used in the German lands. An elaborate colour-painted book 4commemorates the Schembart carnival of Nuremberg, which saw men dressed in colour-painted book commemorates the Schembart carnival of Nuremberg, which saw men dressed in brightly-coloured costumes parading through the town. Often these included some kind of pyrotechnics. One image shows a man wearing a hat in the form of a castle with fireworks and smoke pyrotechnics. One image shows a man wearing a hat in the form of a castle with fireworks and smoke shooting up from the towers, and interestingly, what looks like a smoking artichoke. 1 recording_to_see recorded_seeing was_recorded_seen recorded_to_seen 2 began_to_use begin_to_use were_begin_to_use were_begun_using 3 suspending_from suspended_with suspended_from suspending_with
空格 1recorded seeing recording to see / recorded seeing / was recorded seen / recorded to seen
時態主詞 Roger Bacon + 過去式 recorded（記錄），動詞 record 後接動名詞 seeing。
搭配record + V-ing（記錄看到⋯），動名詞作受詞。
✗ recording to see 非限定動詞、was recorded seen 被動不通、recorded to seen 文法錯誤。
空格 2began to use began to use / begin to use / were begin to use / were begun using
單複數主詞 Italian and Spanish cities（複數）配過去式 began，且 began to use 主動正確。
時態敘述過去史實用過去簡單式 began。
✗ begin to use 為原形時態不合、were begin to use 與 were begun using 文法/語態皆錯誤。
空格 3suspended from suspending from / suspended with / suspended from / suspending with
搭配be suspended from（懸掛於），固定搭配介系詞 from。
時態輪盤被懸掛屬被動，which were suspended from a rope，過去分詞表被動。
✗ suspending 為主動進行語態錯誤、suspended with 介系詞錯誤。
空格 4commemorates commemorates / memorizes / celebrates / remembers
語意「book commemorates the Schembart carnival」指書籍紀念該嘉年華，commemorate（紀念）符合書記載事件之意。
✗ memorizes 是「背誦記憶」、celebrates 是「慶祝」、remembers 是「記得」，皆不如 commemorate 精準表「（書）紀念某事件」。
211.Trip to Germany (德國之行)5 格#080214
Last year I went to Germany. It was a 1trip to Germany not for leisure but for exchange. This was the worst trip that I have 2been on. We transferred via Amsterdam. We arrived half an hour ahead of the time that plane was supposed to take off, but the plane was late, so we took another flight which was flying to a wrong destination. It 3landed at another airport, hundreds of miles away from where I flying to a wrong destination. It landed at another airport, hundreds of miles away from where I supposed to be. All we could do was waiting for the next 4connecting flight to take us. So, we waited for 5another hour and a half. Everyone was exhausted. No wonder we all hope to go home straight for another hour and a half. Everyone was exhausted. No wonder we all hope to go home straight
空格 1trip trip / destination / terminal / exploration
語意a trip to Germany 去德國的旅程，與前句 went to Germany 呼應
搭配a trip not for leisure but for exchange 旅程非為休閒而是交流
✗ destination(目的地)、terminal(航廈)、exploration(探勘)與「旅程」語意不合
空格 2been been / gone / taken / got
搭配the trip that I have been on，been on a trip 參加過旅行的固定說法
時態現在完成式 have been，最高級 worst 後常接完成式經驗
✗ gone on 不慣用於 that I have...on；taken/got 與 been on a trip 搭配不合
空格 3landed landed / carried
語意It landed at another airport 班機降落在另一機場，主詞為飛機
搭配plane/flight + landed 飛機降落，固定搭配
✗ carried(運送)需受詞，主詞為飛機時不合「降落」語意
空格 4connecting connecting / conjunction / associating / adjacent
搭配connecting flight 轉接班機，固定名詞搭配
詞性修飾 flight 須形容詞性，connecting 合宜
✗ conjunction/associating/adjacent 都無法與 flight 構成「轉機」慣用語
空格 5another another / two / others
單複數後接單數 hour，用 another 不用 others
搭配another hour and a half 再一個半小時，another + 單數時段固定用法
✗ two 與 hour and a half 不合；others 為代名詞不可直接修飾名詞
212.Platypus (鴨嘴獸)4 格#080215
The platypus looks like no other creature on Earth. Physically, it appears to be a hybrid blend of a bird, The platypus looks like no other creature on Earth. Physically, it appears to be a hybrid blend of a bird, beaver, reptile and otter, with additional characteristics not contained in any of these four. On cursory examination, the platypus has a bill that most 1resembles that of a waterfowl, not the mouth of any examination, the platypus has a bill that most resembles that of a waterfowl, not the mouth of any known mammal. Yet it is not an ordinary bill. It is actually a well-designed sensory organ. Not a nose, but a highly sensitive electro-location sensor, detecting miniscule electrical impulses generated by its but a highly sensitive electro-location sensor, detecting miniscule electrical impulses generated by its food source of small crustaceans and worms. No other mammal has a sensor so highly 2developed--- developed --- in fact; only one other mammal has this ability at all. Then 3there are the webbed feet, similar to those fact; only one other mammal has this ability at all. Then there are the webbed feet, similar to those found on otters. Unlike an otter, however, the webbing is far more pronounced on the front feet of the platypus, which it uses like paddles for swimming. 4While in the water, the back feet are tucked into its platypus, which it uses like paddles for swimming. While in the water, the back feet are tucked into its body and hardly used at all.
空格 1resembles alike / resembles / parallel / duplicates
時態主詞 a bill 單數，動詞 resembles 加 s；resemble 為及物動詞直接接受詞
語意bill most resembles that of a waterfowl 嘴最像水禽的嘴
✗ alike/parallel 為形容詞不可作此動詞；duplicates(複製)語意不合「相像」
空格 2developed recognized / dispersed / developed / blossomed
搭配highly developed 高度發達的，固定搭配，形容 sensor
語意後文 only one other mammal has this ability 呼應這感測器「發達」
✗ recognized/dispersed/blossomed 與 highly + sensor 的「發達」語意不合
空格 3there there / here / which / those
詞性後接 are，須 there 引導存在句
搭配Then there are the webbed feet 倒裝存在句 there are，固定句型
✗ here 語意指向不合；which/those 無法構成 there are 存在句
空格 4While Thus / Whereas / While
搭配While + 介系詞片語(in the water)省略主詞 be，固定用法
語意While in the water 當在水中時，與後文 back feet are tucked 呼應
✗ Thus 為副詞不引導子句；Whereas 表對比，不合此處的「當…時」
213.Arlington Springs woman (阿靈頓斯普林斯女子)3 格#080216
In 1959, the partial skeletal remains of an ancient woman estimated to be 10,000 years old were In 1959, the partial skeletal remains of an ancient woman estimated to be 10,000 years old were unearthed in Arlington Springs on Santa Rosa Island, one of the eight Channel Islands off the southern California coast. They were discovered by Phil C. Orr, curator of anthropology and natural history at the California coast. They were discovered by Phil C. Orr, curator of anthropology and natural history at the Santa Barbara Museum of Natural History. The remains of the so-called Arlington Springs woman were recently re-analyzed by the 1latest radiocarbon dating techniques and were found to be approximately recently re-analyzed by the latest radiocarbon dating techniques and were found to be approximately 13,000 years old. The new date makes her remains older than any other known human skeleton found 2so far in North America. The discovery 3challenges the popular belief that the first colonists to North so far in North America. The discovery challenges the popular belief that the first colonists to North America arrived at the end of the last ice age about 11,500 years ago by crossing a Bering land bridge that connected Siberia to Alaska and northwestern Canada. The earlier date and the location of the that connected Siberia to Alaska and northwestern Canada. The earlier date and the location of the woman’s remains on the island adds weight to an alternative theory that some early settlers may have constructed boats and migrated from Asia by sailing down the Pacific coast. have constructed boats and migrated from Asia by sailing down the Pacific coast. 2 just_now in_the_future so_far until_now challenges proves consents coordinates
空格 1latest last / latest / oldest / traditional
語意「latest radiocarbon dating techniques」指最新的放射性碳定年技術，latest（最新的）符合「重新分析用新技術」語意。
✗ last（上一個）、oldest（最舊）、traditional（傳統）皆與「最新技術」相反或不合。
空格 2so far just now / in the future / so far / until now
搭配「older than any other known human skeleton found so far」，so far（至今為止）與完成意味的 found 搭配。
✗ just now 指「剛才」、in the future 指未來、until now 語氣稍異且不如 so far 自然搭配「目前已發現」。
空格 3challenges challenges / proves / consents / coordinates
語意新發現年代更早，與「第一批殖民者約11500年前抵達」的普遍看法相牴觸，challenge（挑戰/質疑）正確。
✗ proves（證明）方向相反、consents（同意）、coordinates（協調）皆不符「挑戰既有看法」。
214.Two sentiments (兩種情緒)5 格#080217
Over the last ten thousand years there seem to have been two separate and conflicting building Over the last ten thousand years there seem to have been two separate and conflicting building sentiments throughout the history of towns and cities. 1One is the desire to start again, for a variety of reasons: an earthquake or a tidal wave may have demolished the settlement, or fire destroyed it, or the reasons: an earthquake or a tidal wave may have demolished the settlement, or fire destroyed it, or the new city 2marks a new political beginning. The other can be likened to the effect of a magnet: established settlements attract people, who 3tend to come whether or not there is any planning for established settlements attract people, who tend to come whether or not there is any planning for their arrival. The clash between these two sentiments is evident in every established city 4unless its development has been almost completely accidental or is lost in history. Incidentally, many settlements development has been almost completely accidental or is lost in history. Incidentally, many settlements have been planned from the beginning but, for a variety of reasons, no settlement followed the plan. A good example is Currowan, on the Clyde River in New South Wales, which 5was surveyed in the second good example is Currowan, on the Clyde River in New South Wales, which was surveyed in the second half of the 19th century, in expectation that people would come to establish agriculture and a small port. But no one came. Most country towns in New South Wales started with an original survey whose port. But no one came. Most country towns in New South Wales started with an original survey whose grid lines are still there today in the pattern of the original streets. 3 used_to tend_to are_scheduled_to would_like_to 5 was_innovated was_surveyed was_established was_built
空格 1One One / Another / That / First
搭配後文有「The other can be likened to...」，前後構成 One... The other... 的對應結構。
✗ Another、That、First 皆無法與後文 The other 形成標準的「One... the other...」二分配對。
空格 2marks supposes / guesses / marks / symbolize
單複數主詞 the new city（單數）配第三人稱單數動詞 marks。
語意「the new city marks a new political beginning」指新城市標誌新政治開端，mark（標誌）切題。
✗ symbolize 為複數動詞與單數主詞不合、supposes（假定）、guesses（猜測）語意不通。
空格 3tend to used to / tend to / are scheduled to / would like to
語意「people, who tend to come whether or not there is any planning」指人們傾向前來，tend to（傾向於）符合磁鐵吸引人的語意。
✗ used to 表過去習慣、are scheduled to 表排定、would like to 表意願，皆不符「自然傾向前來」。
空格 4unless whenever / whereas / unless / wherever
語意「衝突在每座城市都明顯，除非其發展完全偶然或已湮沒於歷史」，unless（除非）引導例外條件。
✗ whenever（每當）、whereas（然而）、wherever（無論何處）皆不符此「除非」的例外邏輯。
空格 5was surveyed was innovated / was surveyed / was established / was built
語意後文「started with an original survey」與 Currowan「was surveyed in the second half of the 19th century」呼應，was surveyed（被測繪勘查）切題。
時態城鎮被勘測屬被動，過去事件用 was + 過去分詞。
✗ was innovated 語意不通、was established（被建立）與後文「no one came」矛盾、was built（被建造）與「勘測但無人來」不符。
215.Mass Communications (大衆傳播)5 格#080218
Traditionally, mass-communications research has conceptualized the process of communication in Traditionally, mass-communications research has conceptualized the process of communication in terms of a circulation circuit or loop. This 1model has been criticized for its linearity — sender /message /receiver — for its concentration on the level of message exchange and for the absence of a structured /receiver — for its concentration on the level of message exchange and for the absence of a structured conception of the different moments as a complex structure of relations. But it is also possible and 2useful to think of this process in terms of a structure produced and sustained through the articulation useful to think of this process in terms of a structure produced and sustained through the articulation of linked 3but distinctive moments — production, circulation, distribution /consumption, reproduction. This would be to think of the 4process as a ‘complex structure in dominance’, sustained through the This would be to think of the process as a ‘complex structure in dominance’, sustained through the articulation of connected practices, each of which, however, retains its distinctiveness and has its own 5specific modality, its own forms and conditions of existence. specific modality, its own forms and conditions of existence. meaningless useful ineffectual accessible unless or but ifif progress practices production process
空格 1model model / modal / novel / personnel
語意This model has been criticized 此模型受批評，指前述溝通模型
搭配communication model 溝通模型，學術慣用搭配
✗ modal(情態的)、novel(小說/新奇)、personnel(人員)皆與「模型」語意不合(易與 model 混淆)
空格 2useful meaningless / useful / ineffectual / accessible
詞性與 possible 並列須形容詞，useful 合宜
語意possible and useful to think of 既可行又有用，正面語氣轉折前述批評
✗ meaningless(無意義)、ineffectual(無效)為負面與「有用」矛盾；accessible(易取得)語意不合
空格 3but unless / or / but
搭配linked but distinctive 連接兩個對比形容詞，用 but
語意相連但各具特色，but 表對比
✗ unless(除非)、or(或)無法連接「相連」與「各具特色」的對比關係
空格 4process progress / practices / production / process
單複數the ___ as a 'complex structure'，須單數可數名詞，process 單數
語意think of the process 把它想成一個過程，呼應全文 process of communication
✗ progress(進展)不可數語意不合；practices/production 不如 process 呼應全文「過程」主題
空格 5specific specific / common / ordinary / particular
搭配its own specific modality 它自己特有的型態，own + specific 強調獨特
語意與 retains its distinctiveness 呼應，各環節有特定型態
✗ common/ordinary(普通)與「保有獨特性」矛盾；particular 雖近義但 specific 更搭 own...modality
216.Trigger Points (觸發點)5 格#080219
All approaches aim to increase blood flow to areas 1of tension and 2to release painful knots of muscle known as "trigger points". "Trigger points are tense areas of muscle that are almost constantly known as "trigger points". "Trigger points are tense areas of muscle that are almost constantly contracting," says Kippen. "The contraction causes pain, which in turn causes contraction, so you have a vicious circle. This is what deep tissue massage aims to break. "The way to do this, as I found out a vicious circle. This is what deep tissue massage aims to break. "The way to do this, as I found out under Ogedengbe's elbow, is to apply pressure to the point, stopping the blood flow, and then to release, which causes the brain to flood the affected area 3with blood, encouraging the muscle to relax. release, which causes the brain to flood the affected area with blood, encouraging the muscle to relax. At the same time, says Kippen, you can fool the tensed muscle into relaxing 4by applying pressure to a complementary one nearby. "If you cause any muscle to contract, its opposite will expand. So you try to trick the body 5into relaxing the muscle that is in spasm." to trick the body into relaxing the muscle that is in spasm." in with to on with towards throughout on by with in throughout
空格 1of of / in / to / on
搭配areas of tension 緊張部位，of 表性質的固定搭配
詞性blood flow to areas of tension，名詞間用 of 連接
✗ in/to/on 無法與 areas + tension 構成「緊張的部位」名詞片語
空格 2to in / with / to / on
搭配apply pressure to the point 對該點施壓，apply...to 固定搭配
詞性apply pressure to + 受詞，介系詞用 to
✗ in/with/on 不符 apply pressure to 的固定介系詞用法
空格 3with with / towards / throughout / on
搭配flood the area with blood 用血液灌注該區，flood...with 固定搭配
詞性flood + 受詞 + with + 物質
✗ towards/throughout/on 不符 flood...with(以…灌注)的固定介系詞
空格 4by by / with / in / throughout
時態by + 動名詞 applying，表「藉由…的方法」
搭配by applying pressure 藉由施壓，by + V-ing 表方法
✗ with/in/throughout 後接 applying 不符「藉由…方法」的 by + V-ing 結構
空格 5into into / with / on / at
搭配trick the body into relaxing 誘騙身體放鬆，trick...into V-ing 固定搭配
詞性與前文 fool...into relaxing 平行，into + 動名詞
✗ with/on/at 不符 trick...into doing 的固定片語
217.High-Protein Diet (高蛋白飲食)4 格#080220
Our studies, showed that those people on a higher protein diet lost the same amount of weight as those on a higher carbohydrate diet, since the two diets 1offered an equal amount of kilojoules and the those on a higher carbohydrate diet, since the two diets offered an equal amount of kilojoules and the same amount of fat. However, body composition (that is, the ratio of fat to muscle) showed greater improvement among those people on the higher protein diet. When the 2participants in our studies improvement among those people on the higher protein diet. When the participants in our studies were allowed to eat until they were no longer hungry, those on the higher protein diet lost more weight than those on the higher carbohydrate diet, even after more than a year. The reduction in weight than those on the higher carbohydrate diet, even after more than a year. The reduction in hunger and the beneficial effect on muscle provided by the higher protein diet is mostly related to its protein content.The diet is healthy because its protein comes from lean red meat, fish, chicken and low- protein content.The diet is healthy because its protein comes from lean red meat, fish, chicken and low- fat dairy products, all of which 3provide good nutrition. A high-protein diet in which the protein comes from protein powders and supplements is unlikely to be healthy, unless the supplements are 4fortified from protein powders and supplements is unlikely to be healthy, unless the supplements are fortified with vitamins and minerals.
空格 1offered composed / offered / supplemented / substituted
語意the two diets offered an equal amount 兩種飲食提供同等熱量
搭配offered an equal amount of kilojoules 提供同等千焦，搭配自然
✗ composed(組成)需 of；supplemented/substituted(補充/替代)與「提供同等熱量」語意不合
空格 2participants participants / candidates / percentage / proportions
搭配the participants in our studies 研究參與者，固定搭配，呼應 those people
語意指接受飲食實驗的受試者
✗ candidates(候選人)、percentage/proportions(比例)與「研究參與者」語意不合
空格 3provide compose / provide / exclude / enclose
搭配provide good nutrition 提供良好營養，固定搭配
語意all of which provide good nutrition 這些食物都提供營養
✗ compose 語意不合；exclude/enclose(排除/封入)與「提供營養」相反或不合
空格 4fortified supplied / fortified / substituted / replaced
搭配fortified with vitamins and minerals 添加強化維生素礦物質，固定搭配
語意unless the supplements are fortified 除非補充品經強化，才會健康
✗ supplied/substituted/replaced 與 with vitamins 不構成「強化添加」之意
218.Estée Lauder (雅詩蘭黛)6 格#080221
Leonard Lauder, chief executive of the company his mother founded, says she always thought she "was Leonard Lauder, chief executive of the company his mother founded, says she always thought she "was growing a nice little business." And that it is. A little business that 1controls 45% of the cosmetics market in U.S. department stores. A little business that sells in 118 countries and last year grew to be market in U.S. department stores. A little business that sells in 118 countries and last year grew to be $3.6 billion big in sales. The Lauder family's shares are worth more than $6 billion. But early on, there wasn't a burgeoning business, there weren't houses in New York, Palm Beach, Fla., or the south of wasn't a burgeoning business, there weren't houses in New York, Palm Beach, Fla., or the south of France. It is said that at one point there was one person to answer the telephones who 2changed her voice to become the shipping or billing department as needed. You more or less know the Estée voice to become the shipping or billing department as needed. You more or less know the Estée Lauder story because it's a chapter from the book of American business folklore. In short, Josephine Esther Mentzer, daughter of immigrants, lived above her father's hardware store in Corona, a section Esther Mentzer, daughter of immigrants, lived above her father's hardware store in Corona, a section of Queens in New York City. She started her 3enterprise by selling skin creams concocted by her uncle, a chemist, in beauty shops, beach clubs and resorts. No doubt the portions were good — Estée Lauder chemist, in beauty shops, beach clubs and resorts. No doubt the portions were good — Estée Lauder was a quality fanatic — but the saleslady was better. Much better. And she simply outworked everyone else in the cosmetics industry. She 4stalked the bosses of New York City department stores until she got else in the cosmetics industry. She stalked the bosses of New York City department stores until she got some counter space at Saks Fifth Avenue in 1948. And once in that space, she utilized a personal selling approach that proved as 5potent as the promise of her skin 6regimens and perfumes. selling approach that proved as potent as the promise of her skin regimens and perfumes.
空格 1controls supplies / conquers / leads / controls
單複數主詞 A little business 單數，動詞 controls 加 s 一致
語意controls 45% of the cosmetics market 掌控45%市場，搭配市占率
✗ supplies(供應)、conquers(征服)、leads(領導)與「掌控市占率」語意不如 control 精準
空格 2changed lowered / hoisted / raised / changed
搭配change one's voice 改變聲音，固定搭配
語意changed her voice 改變嗓音以假冒不同部門，呼應 become the shipping or billing department
✗ lowered/hoisted/raised 只描述音量高低，不合「變換聲音假冒部門」語意
空格 3enterprise enterprise / entity / production / company
搭配started her enterprise 開創她的事業，搭配自然
語意指 Estée Lauder 白手起家的事業
✗ entity(實體)、production(生產)語意不合；company 雖近義但 enterprise 更指「創業事業」
空格 4stalked stalked / smacked / stroked / switched
語意stalked the bosses... until she got counter space 緊盯/纏著百貨主管直到拿到櫃位
時態過去式敘事，stalked 與全段時態一致
✗ smacked(打)、stroked(撫摸)、switched(切換)與「死纏爛打爭取櫃位」語意不合
空格 5potent prominent / potent / attractive / patent
搭配as potent as 與…一樣有力，as...as 比較結構
語意selling approach proved as potent as the promise 銷售手法和產品承諾一樣有效
✗ prominent(顯著)、attractive(吸引)、patent(專利/明顯)與「同樣有效有力」語意不如 potent
空格 6regimens regimens / tones / care / tins
單複數與 perfumes 並列，regimens 複數一致
語意skin regimens 護膚療程/方案，與 perfumes 並列指其產品
✗ tones(色調)、care(不可數不搭 her...and)、tins(罐)與「護膚療程」語意不合
219.Papal reform (教皇改革)4 格#080222
Since the last papal reform, several 1proposals have been 2offered to make the Western calendar more Since the last papal reform, several proposals have been offered to make the Western calendar more useful or 3regular .Very few reforms, such as the rather different decimal French Republican and Soviet calendars, had gained official 4acceptance , but each was put out of use shortly after its introduction. calendars, had gained official acceptance , but each was put out of use shortly after its introduction. abnormal respective regular portable agreement acquiescence acknowledgement acceptance
空格 1proposals arguments / correspondences / proposals / assumptions
單複數several + 複數名詞，proposals 複數
語意several proposals have been offered 提出數項提案，呼應後文 reforms
✗ arguments/correspondences/assumptions 與「提出改曆提案」語意不合
空格 2offered accepted / offered / denied / accomplished
時態have been + p.p. 現在完成被動，offered 為過去分詞
搭配proposals have been offered 提案被提出，固定被動搭配
✗ accepted 與後文「很少獲官方接受」矛盾；denied/accomplished 與「被提出」語意不合
空格 3regular abnormal / respective / regular / portable
詞性more useful or ___ 須形容詞並列，regular 為形容詞
語意make the calendar more useful or regular 讓曆法更實用或更規律
✗ abnormal(異常)與目的相反；respective(各自)、portable(可攜)語意不合曆法改良
空格 4acceptance agreement / acquiescence / acknowledgement / acceptance
搭配gained official acceptance 獲得官方認可/接受，固定搭配
語意後文 put out of use 呼應，雖獲接受卻很快停用
✗ agreement(協議)、acquiescence(默許)、acknowledgement(承認)不如 official acceptance 慣用
220.Sales Representatives (銷售代表)0 格#080223
Sales jobs allow for a great deal of discretionary time and effort on the part of the sales representatives- especially when compared with managerial, manufacturing, and service jobs. Most sales representatives work independently and outside the immediate presence of their sales managers. Therefore, some form of goals needs to be in place to motivate and guide their performance. Sales personnel are not the only professionals with performance goals or quotas. Health care professionals operating in clinics have daily, weekly, and monthly goals in terms of patient visits. Service personnel are assigned a number of service calls they must perform during a set time period. Production workers in manufacturing have output goals. So, why are achieving sales goals or quotas such a big deal? The answer to this question can be found by examining how a firm's other departments are affected by how well the company's salespeople achieve their performance goals. The success of the business hinges on the successful sales of its products and services. Consider all the planning, the financial, production and marketing efforts that go into producing what the sales force sells. Everyone depends on the sales force to sell the company's products and services and they eagerly anticipate knowing 1 to_motivate_and_guide to_blame_and_mislead to_teach_and_form to_serve_and_entertain 2 would_perform must_perform want_to_perform will_perform 3 hinges_on contributes_to leads_to attracts_to producing_what imaging_how supposing_why stimulating_how 4 producing_what imaging_how supposing_why stimulating_how
221.Online campus (在線校園)6 格#080224
Remember when universities were bursting at the seams with students sitting in the aisles, balancing books on their knees? No more, it seems. E-learning is as likely to stand for empty lecture theatres as for the internet 1revolution , which has greatly increased the 2volume and range of course materials available online in the past five years. "The 3temptation now is to simply think, 'Everything will be online so I don't need to go to class'," said Dr Kerri-Lee Krause, of the Centre for the Study of Higher Education at the University of Melbourne. The nation's universities are in the process of opening the doors for the new academic year and, while classes are generally well 4attended for the early weeks, it often does not last. "There is concern at the university level about student 5attendance dropping and why students are not coming to lectures," Dr Krause said. But lecturers' pride-and 6fierce competition among universities for students-mean few are willing to acknowledge publicly how poorly attended among universities for students-mean few are willing to acknowledge publicly how poorly attended
空格 1revolution rebellion / insurrection / revolution / change
搭配固定詞組 the internet revolution（網路革命），指劃時代的技術變革
語意語意中性偏正面，指巨大轉變，不是叛亂或起義
✗ rebellion/insurrection 是「叛亂、起義」帶政治對抗意味；change 太弱且不搭 the internet __
空格 2volume amount / number / volume / deepth
搭配the volume and range of materials（材料的數量與範圍）為固定搭配
語意指線上課程材料的「總量」，volume 強調分量
✗ amount/number 雖近義但與 range 並列時 volume 最自然；deepth 是 depth 的錯拼且語意不合
空格 3temptation contempt / temptation / attraction / attempt
搭配The temptation now is to...（現在的誘惑是去…）固定句型
語意後接「以為什麼都在線上就不用上課」，是一種「誘惑」
✗ contempt 輕蔑、attraction 吸引力、attempt 嘗試，皆不搭 The __ is to think 句型語意
空格 4attended participated / attended / positioned / involved
搭配classes are well attended（課堂出席率高）為固定被動搭配
時態be + p.p. 被動語態，主詞 classes 被出席
✗ participated/involved 需接 in 不能直接被動帶受詞；positioned 語意不合
空格 5attendance appearance / identitification / attendance / participation
搭配student attendance dropping（學生出席率下降）為固定搭配
語意下文談 students not coming to lectures，指出席率
✗ appearance 外觀、identitification(錯拼) 辨識、participation 參與感皆不如 attendance 精準對應出席
空格 6fierce fierce / brutal / savage / intensive
搭配fierce competition（激烈競爭）為高頻固定搭配
語意形容大學間搶學生的競爭激烈
✗ brutal/savage 偏「殘暴」用於暴力；intensive 多指密集投入，不修飾 competition
222.How fish travel (魚是如何旅行的)5 格#080225
Small lakes with a surface area of less than 100 square meters represent the majority of global Small lakes with a surface area of less than 100 square meters represent the majority of global freshwater ecosystems. Many of these lakes 1are found in remote, often mountainous areas with no inflow and outflow. Yet in most of these lakes, there are fish. So 2how do fish reach lakes and ponds inflow and outflow. Yet in most of these lakes, there are fish. So how do fish reach lakes and ponds that are not connected to other bodies of water? This question 3was already addressed by some of the leading natural scientists of the 19th century such as Charles Darwin, Alfred Russel Wallace and Charles leading natural scientists of the 19th century such as Charles Darwin, Alfred Russel Wallace and Charles Lyell, who all came to the same conclusion—water birds must be 4responsible for fish dispersal. And they had a plausible explanation for this: fish eggs of some species are sticky and can survive for some they had a plausible explanation for this: fish eggs of some species are sticky and can survive for some time out of water. The theory is thus that the fish eggs 5stick to water birds' feathers or feet; the birds then fly from one body of water to the next, where the fish hatch from their eggs. then fly from one body of water to the next, where the fish hatch from their eggs. were_found are_found found find what whereas how whether has_already was_already was_been isis 3 has_already was_already was_been 4 responsible_to responsible_for responsibility_for responsibility_to
空格 1are found were found / are found / found / find
時態陳述普遍事實用現在式被動，many of these lakes are found（被發現/分布於）。
單複數主詞 many of these lakes（複數）配 are。
✗ were found 過去式不合普遍陳述、found/find 主動語態不通（湖泊是被發現的）。
空格 2how what / whereas / how / whether
語意句子問魚如何到達湖泊，how do fish reach（魚如何到達），how 引導方式疑問。
✗ what、whereas、whether 皆不符「以何種方式到達」的疑問語意。
空格 3was already has already / was already / was been / is
時態後文舉19世紀達爾文等人，敘述過去 This question was already addressed，被動過去式配 was。
單複數主詞 This question（單數）配 was。
✗ has already 為現在完成與19世紀過去時間衝突、was been 文法錯誤、is 為現在式不合過去敘事。
空格 4responsible for responsible to / responsible for / responsibility for / responsibility to
搭配固定搭配 be responsible for（為⋯負責/造成），介系詞用 for。
詞性前有 must be，須接形容詞 responsible 而非名詞 responsibility。
✗ responsible to 介系詞錯、responsibility for/to 為名詞無法接在 be 之後當主詞補語於此結構。
空格 5stick stuck / stick / have been stuck / were sticky
時態陳述普遍機制用現在式，the fish eggs stick to feathers（魚卵黏附羽毛），主動現在式。
單複數主詞 the fish eggs（複數）配原形 stick。
✗ stuck 為過去式、have been stuck 完成被動、were sticky 為形容詞語態，皆不符普遍現在主動。
223.Paris is very old (巴黎很古老)4 格#080226
Paris is very old—there has been a settlement there for at least 6000 years and its shape has been determined in part by the River Seine, and in part by the edicts of France’s rulers. But the great determined in part by the River Seine, and in part by the edicts of France’s rulers. But the great boulevards we admire today are relatively new and were constructed to prevent any more barricades 1being created by the rebellious population; that work was carried out in the middle 19th century. The being created by the rebellious population; that work was carried out in the middle 19th century. The earlier Paris had been 2in part a maze of narrow streets and alleyways. But you can imagine that the work was not only highly expensive, but caused great distress among the half a million or so residents work was not only highly expensive, but caused great distress among the half a million or so residents whose houses were 3simply razed, and whose neighbourhoods disappeared. What is done cannot usually be undone, especially when buildings are torn 4down . usually be undone, especially when buildings are torn down . being_created to_be_created creating was_created 1 being_created to_be_created creating was_created as_if in_part even_if whereas 2 as_if in_part even_if whereas merely simply hardly rarely
空格 1being created being created / to be created / creating / was created
時態prevent + 受詞 + from being created，動名詞被動式表「防止更多路障被製造」。
搭配prevent ... barricades being created，barricades 是被造的，須用被動 V-ing。
✗ to be created 不符 prevent 句型、creating 為主動、was created 為限定動詞無法接於此非限定位置。
空格 2in part as if / in part / even if / whereas
搭配呼應前文 in part by the River Seine、in part by the edicts，in part（部分地）構成並列。
語意「the earlier Paris had been in part a maze of narrow streets」指部分是迷宮般街道，in part 切題。
✗ as if（彷彿）、even if（即使）、whereas（然而）皆不符「部分地」的並列語意。
空格 3simply merely / simply / hardly / rarely
語意「houses were simply razed」指房屋就這樣被夷平，simply（就這樣/僅僅）強調直接被拆。
✗ merely 偏「只不過」、hardly（幾乎不）、rarely（很少）語意與「房屋被夷平」不合。
空格 4down up / off / on / down
搭配片語動詞 tear down（拆除/拆毀），buildings are torn down 表建築被拆除。
✗ tear up（撕碎）、tear off（扯掉）、tear on 皆不符「拆除建築」之意。
224.Petrified Forest (石化森林)4 格#080227
The Petrified Forest is home to some of the most impressive fossils ever found and more are being discovered each year as continuing erosion is 1exposing new evidence. Fossils found here show the discovered each year as continuing erosion is exposing new evidence. Fossils found here show the Forest was once a tropical region, 2filled with towering trees and extraordinary creatures. More than 150 different species of fossilized plants have been discovered by paleontologists and evidence 3indicating different species of fossilized plants have been discovered by paleontologists and evidence indicating ancient native people who inhabited this region about 10,000 years ago have been 4confirmed by associated filled full compounded indicating supposing demonstrating assuming anticipated rejected confirmed doubted
空格 1exposing exposing / elaborating / indicating / expecting
時態erosion is __ 進行式，需現在分詞；is exposing new evidence（侵蝕正暴露新證據）
搭配expose evidence（使證據顯露）語意搭配
✗ elaborating 闡述、indicating 指出、expecting 期待，皆與 erosion（侵蝕）使化石顯露的物理意義不合
空格 2filled associated / filled / full / compounded
搭配filled with（充滿）固定搭配，後接 towering trees and creatures
時態the Forest was once a tropical region, __ with...，過去分詞作後位修飾
✗ full 是形容詞不能直接接 with 作此分詞結構；associated/compounded with 語意為「關聯/混合」不合「充滿」
空格 3indicating indicating / supposing / demonstrating / assuming
搭配evidence indicating（顯示…的證據）evidence + indicating 固定搭配
時態現在分詞作後位修飾，修飾 evidence
✗ supposing/assuming 是「假設」表條件、demonstrating 偏「示範展示」，evidence 搭 indicating 最自然
空格 4confirmed anticipated / rejected / confirmed / doubted
時態have been __ by 為現在完成被動，需過去分詞 confirmed
語意證據經研究而被「證實」
✗ rejected 否決、doubted 質疑與「證據被證實」矛盾；anticipated 預期語意不合 by paleontologists
225.Mini Helicopter (迷你直升機)6 格#080228
A mini helicopter modelled on flying tree seeds could soon be flying overhead. Evan Ulrich and colleagues at the University of Maryland in College Park 1turned to the biological world for inspiration colleagues at the University of Maryland in College Park turned to the biological world for inspiration to build a scaled-down helicopter that could mimic the properties of full-size aircraft. The complex 2design of full-size helicopters gets less efficient when shrunk, 3meaning that standard mini helicopters design of full-size helicopters gets less efficient when shrunk, meaning that standard mini helicopters expend most of their power simply fighting to stay stable in the air. The researchers realised that a simpler aircraft designed to stay stable passively would use much less power and reduce simpler aircraft designed to stay stable passively would use much less power and reduce manufacturing costs to boot. It turns out that nature 4had beaten them to it. The seeds of trees such as the maple have a single-blade structure that 5allows them to fly far away and drift safely to the ground. the maple have a single-blade structure that allows them to fly far away and drift safely to the ground. These seeds, known as samaras, need no engine to 6spin through the air, thanks to a process called autorotation. By analysing the behaviour of the samara with high-speed cameras, Ulrich and his team autorotation. By analysing the behaviour of the samara with high-speed cameras, Ulrich and his team were able to copy its design. 1 turned_to turned_off turned_out turned_on 4 had_been_beaten had_beaten beats will_be_beaten
空格 1turned to turned to / turned off / turned out / turned on
搭配片語動詞 turn to（求助於/轉向），turned to the biological world for inspiration（向生物界尋求靈感）。
✗ turned off（關閉）、turned out（結果是）、turned on（打開）皆不符「向⋯尋求靈感」之意。
空格 2design initiative / design / ambition / theory
語意「The complex design of full-size helicopters」指全尺寸直升機的複雜設計，design（設計）切題。
✗ initiative（倡議）、ambition（野心）、theory（理論）皆不符「直升機的複雜結構設計」。
空格 3meaning meaning / means / indicates / supported
詞性此處為分詞片語修飾前句，meaning that...（意味著），現在分詞引導補述。
✗ means/indicates 為限定動詞會造成句子結構錯誤、supported 時態語意不合。
空格 4had beaten had been beaten / had beaten / beats / will be beaten
時態「nature had beaten them to it」表自然早在研究者之前就辦到了，過去完成主動式表更早發生。
✗ had been beaten 為被動方向相反、beats 現在式不合、will be beaten 未來被動皆不通。
空格 5allows gets / permits / allows / makes
搭配allow + 受詞 + to V（allows them to fly），固定句型搭配不定詞。
單複數主詞 a single-blade structure（單數）配第三人稱單數 allows。
✗ permits 雖也接 to V 但較正式且 structure 主詞較不自然、gets/makes 後接不定詞句型不合（make 接原形不加 to）。
空格 6spin spin / curve / work / twist
語意種子靠 autorotation（自旋）穿過空氣，spin（旋轉）呼應後文 autorotation 與旋翼概念。
✗ curve（彎曲）、work（運作）、twist（扭轉）皆不如 spin 精準表「旋轉穿越空氣」。
226.Scientist’s Job (科學家的工作)5 格#080229
Scientists make observations, have 1assumptions and do 2experiments . After these have been done, he Scientists make observations, have assumptions and do experiments . After these have been done, he got his 3results . Then there are a lot of 4data from scientists. The scientists around the world have a experiments investigations thesis articles evidence figures reality results data statistics static chart
空格 1assumptions hypotheses / assumptions / regulations / principles
搭配make observations, have assumptions（做觀察、提出假設）have assumptions 搭配
語意科學流程：觀察、假設、實驗
✗ hypotheses 雖也指假設但慣搭 form/test 而非 have；regulations 法規、principles 原則皆不合科學流程
空格 2experiments experiments / investigations / thesis / articles
搭配do experiments（做實驗）do + experiments 固定搭配
語意假設後接做實驗的步驟
✗ investigations 須搭 conduct、thesis 論文（單複數不合）、articles 文章皆不搭 do __
空格 3results evidence / figures / reality / results
搭配got his results（得到結果）get results 固定搭配
語意做完實驗後得到結果
✗ evidence 證據、figures 數字、reality 現實皆不如 results 對應「實驗後得出的結果」
空格 4data data / statistics / static / chart
搭配a lot of data（大量數據）a lot of data 搭配
語意結果產生大量數據
✗ statistics 統計學/統計數字、static 靜止的、chart 圖表皆不如 data 泛指「資料數據」
空格 5picture view / proof / picture / idea
搭配have a picture（形成整體圖像/全貌）get the picture 慣用搭配
語意全球科學家彙整資料形成整體「圖像」
✗ view 看法、proof 證明、idea 想法皆不如 picture 表「綜觀全貌」（語意推斷）
227.The speech of alchemy (煉金術演講)4 格#080230
To learn the speech of alchemy, an early form of chemistry in which people attempted to turn metals into gold, it helps to think back to a time when there was no science: no atomic number or weight, no into gold, it helps to think back to a time when there was no science: no atomic number or weight, no periodic chart no list of elements. to the alchemists the 1universe was not made of leptons, bosons, gluons, and quarks. Instead it was made of substances, and one substance-say, walnut oil-could be just gluons, and quarks. Instead it was made of substances, and one substance-say, walnut oil-could be just as 2pure as another-say, silver-even though modern 3scientists would say one is heterogeneous and the other homogeneous. Without knowledge of atomic structures, how would it be 4possible to tell other homogeneous. Without knowledge of atomic structures, how would it be possible to tell
空格 1universe universe / planet / worldwide / world
搭配the universe was not made of leptons...（宇宙並非由輕子組成）the universe 搭配基本粒子
語意煉金術士眼中的「宇宙」由物質構成
✗ planet 行星、world 世界範圍太小、worldwide 是副詞/形容詞不能作主詞名詞
空格 2pure rotten / contaminated / pure / wholesome
搭配just as pure as another（與另一物一樣純）as __ as 同級比較，需形容詞
語意下文 heterogeneous/homogeneous 對比，談物質的「純」
✗ rotten 腐敗、contaminated 受污染與「純」相反；wholesome 健康有益語意不合
空格 3scientists affidavit / confidant / scientists / researchers
搭配modern scientists would say（現代科學家會說）
語意對比煉金術士，指現代「科學家」
✗ affidavit 宣誓書、confidant 知己皆語意不合；researchers 雖近義但全文對比 alchemists 用 scientists 較精準
空格 4possible imperious / compelling / available / possible
搭配how would it be possible to tell（如何可能分辨）it be possible to do 固定句型
語意問在無原子知識下是否可能分辨
✗ imperious 專橫、compelling 引人入勝、available 可取得皆不搭 it be __ to tell 句型
228.Supply and demand (供應和需求)4 格#080231
The supply of a thing, in the phrase "supply and demand," is the amount that will be offered for sale at The supply of a thing, in the phrase "supply and demand," is the amount that will be offered for sale at each of a series of prices; the demand is the amount that will be bought at each of a series of prices. The principle that value depends on supply and demand means that in the case of nearly every The principle that value depends on supply and demand means that in the case of nearly every commodity, more will be bought if the price is lowered, less will be bought if the price is 1raised . Therefore sellers, if they wish to induce buyers to take more of a commodity than they are already Therefore sellers, if they wish to induce buyers to take more of a commodity than they are already doing, must 2reduce its price; if they raise its price, they will sell less. If there is a general falling off if in demand--due, say, to trade depression--sellers will either have to reduce prices or put less on the demand--due, say, to trade depression--sellers will either have to reduce prices or put less on the 3market ; they will not be able to sell the same 4amount at the same price.
空格 1raised raised / deepen / adjusted / tighten
搭配if the price is raised（若價格被提高）raise the price 固定搭配，被動 is raised
語意對比 lowered，需「提高」
✗ deepen/tighten 不搭 price；adjusted 中性「調整」未表明升降，與對比 lowered 不合
空格 2reduce reduce / raise / sharpen / amend
搭配must reduce its price（必須降價）reduce the price 固定搭配
語意要誘使買家多買就得降價
✗ raise 提高與「誘使多買」矛盾；sharpen 使尖銳、amend 修訂皆不搭 price
空格 3market supply / market / demand / way
搭配put less on the market（減少市場供應量）put on the market 固定片語
語意需求下降，賣家降價或減少上市量
✗ supply/demand/way 皆不搭 put less on the __ 這個「投放市場」固定片語
空格 4amount amount / value / quality / cost
搭配sell the same amount at the same price（以同價賣出同量）the same amount 搭配
語意指賣出的「數量」
✗ value 價值、quality 品質、cost 成本皆不合「賣出同樣的數量」
229.Impressionism (印象主義)5 格#080232
Impressionism was a nineteenth century art movement that began as a loose association of Paris- based artists who started publicly exhibiting their art in the 1860s. Characteristics of Impressionist painting include visible brush strokes, light colours, open composition, 1emphasis on light in its changing qualities (often accentuating the effects of the passage of time), ordinary subject matter, and unusual visual angles. The name of the movement is 2derived from Claude Monet's Impression, Sunrise (Impression, soleil levant). Critic Louis Leroy inadvertently coined the term in a satiric review published in Le Charivari. Radicals in their time, early Impressionists broke the rules of academic painting. They began by giving colours, freely brushed, primacy over line, drawing 3inspiration from the work of painters such as Eugene Delacroix. They also took the 4act of painting out of the studio and into the world. Previously, not only still-lives and portraits, but also landscapes had been painted indoors, but the Impressionists found that they could 5capture the momentary and transient effects of sunlight by painting air in plain air. consequence emphasis reliance dependence
空格 1emphasis consequence / emphasis / reliance / dependence
搭配emphasis on light（對光線的強調）emphasis on 固定搭配
語意列舉印象派特徵，指「強調」光的變化
✗ consequence 結果、reliance/dependence on 是「依賴」，與描述繪畫特徵的「強調」不合
空格 2derived derived / sourced / attributed / related
搭配is derived from（源自）固定被動搭配
語意運動名稱源自 Monet 的畫作
✗ sourced/attributed/related 雖可接 from/to，但 name __ from 慣用 derived 表「衍生自」
空格 3inspiration inspire / inspired / inspiration / inspiring
搭配drawing inspiration from（從…汲取靈感）固定搭配 draw inspiration from
詞性draw 後需名詞作受詞，故用名詞 inspiration
✗ inspire/inspired/inspiring 為動詞或形容詞，無法作 drawing 的受詞名詞
空格 4act movement / act / reaction / motion
搭配the act of painting（繪畫這個行為）the act of + V-ing 固定結構
語意指把「繪畫的動作」移到戶外
✗ movement 運動/動作、reaction 反應、motion 移動皆不搭 the __ of painting 表「行為」
空格 5capture record / capture / memorize / retain
搭配capture the momentary effects of sunlight（捕捉瞬間光影）capture effects 搭配
語意印象派捕捉轉瞬即逝的光線效果
✗ record 記錄較中性、memorize 記憶、retain 保留皆不如 capture 表藝術「捕捉」瞬間
230.A big, bad idea? (一個大的壞主意？)5 格#080233
The two researchers showed that 1reintroducing the wolves was correlated with 2increased growth of willow and cottonwood in the park. Why? Because grazing animals such as elk were 3avoiding sites willow and cottonwood in the park. Why? Because grazing animals such as elk were avoiding sites from which they couldn't easily 4escape , the scientist 5claimed . And as the woody plants and trees grew taller and thicker, beaver colonies expanded. taller and thicker, beaver colonies expanded. reintroducing reinforcing recommending reforming abnormal decreased increased balanced preferring avoiding escaping hiding
空格 1reintroducing reintroducing / reinforcing / recommending / reforming
語意reintroducing the wolves（重新引入狼群）呼應狼被放回公園的主題
時態showed that __ was correlated，動名詞作主詞
✗ reinforcing 強化、recommending 推薦、reforming 改革皆不符「重新引入狼」的生態語境
空格 2increased abnormal / decreased / increased / balanced
搭配increased growth of willow（柳樹增長）correlated with increased growth
語意下文 grew taller and thicker 證明是增長
✗ decreased 減少與後文增長矛盾；abnormal 反常、balanced 平衡語意不合 growth
空格 3avoiding preferring / avoiding / escaping / hiding
語意elk were avoiding sites from which they couldn't escape（麋鹿避開難逃脫之處）
時態were __ 過去進行式，需現在分詞
✗ preferring 偏好與「難逃脫之處」矛盾；escaping/hiding 雖 -ing 合文法但語意不合「避開」
空格 4escape escape / grow / hunt / evolve
搭配couldn't easily escape（無法輕易逃脫）couldn't + 原形動詞
語意指麋鹿怕被狼捕、避開難逃處
✗ grow/hunt/evolve 與「逃離掠食者」語意不合；且 escape 最貼合避開危險地點
空格 5claimed affirmed / denied / claimed / blamed
搭配the scientist claimed（科學家聲稱）轉述研究主張的常用動詞
語意陳述科學家提出的論點
✗ affirmed 偏強烈肯定、denied 否認矛盾、blamed 責怪語意不合此處轉述研究結論
231.Population Change (人口變化)5 格#080234
Populations can change through three processes: fertility, mortality, and migration. Fertility 1involves the number of children that women have and is to be contrasted with fecundity (a woman's the number of children that women have and is to be contrasted with fecundity (a woman's childbearing potential). Mortality is the study of the causes, consequences, and measurement of processes affecting death to members of the population. Demographers most commonly study processes affecting death to members of the population. Demographers most commonly study mortality using the Life Table, a statistical 2device that provides information about the mortality conditions (most notably the life expectancy) in the population. Migration refers to the movement of conditions (most notably the life expectancy) in the population. Migration refers to the movement of persons from a locality of origin to a destination place across some predefined, political boundary. Migration researchers do not designate movements 'migrations' 3unless they are somewhat permanent. Migration researchers do not designate movements 'migrations' unless they are somewhat permanent. Thus demographers do not consider tourists and travellers to be migrating. While demographers who study migration typically do so through census data on place of 4residence , indirect sources of data study migration typically do so through census data on place of residence , indirect sources of data including tax forms, and labour force surveys are also important. Demography is today widely taught in many universities across the world, 5attracting students with initial training in social sciences, in many universities across the world, attracting students with initial training in social sciences, statistics or health studies.
空格 1involves concludes / involves / consists / introduces
搭配Fertility involves the number of children（生育率涉及孩子數量）involve 表「牽涉」
單複數主詞 Fertility 單數，用 involves
✗ concludes 總結、introduces 引入語意不合；consists 須接 of 不能直接帶受詞
空格 2device device / theory / summary / data
搭配a statistical device（統計工具）the Life Table 同位語
語意生命表是提供死亡率資訊的統計裝置
✗ theory 理論、summary 摘要、data 資料皆不如 device 表「方法工具」貼合 statistical __
空格 3unless because / unless / however / despite
詞性do not designate movements 'migrations' __ they are permanent，需連接詞 unless（除非）
語意除非是永久性移動，否則不算遷徙
✗ because 表原因、however 副詞不引導從句、despite 介詞接名詞，皆不合此條件子句
空格 4residence life / home / residence / family
搭配place of residence（居住地）census data on place of residence 固定搭配
語意人口普查記錄居住地點
✗ life/home/family 雖相關但 place of residence 為人口統計學固定術語
空格 5attracting attracting / referring / seducing / grabing
搭配attracting students（吸引學生）attract students 固定搭配
時態taught..., __ students，現在分詞作伴隨狀況
✗ referring 指涉、seducing 引誘帶貶意、grabing(錯拼) 皆不合「吸引學生就讀」
232.Significance of instinct (本能的意義)6 格#080235
What is the significance of instinct in business? Does a reliable gut feeling separate winners from What is the significance of instinct in business? Does a reliable gut feeling separate winners from losers? And is it the most valuable emotional tool any entrepreneur can possess? My 1observation of successful company owners lead me to believe that a highly analytical attitude can be a drawback. At successful company owners lead me to believe that a highly analytical attitude can be a drawback. At critical junctures in commercial life, risk-taking is more an 2act of faith than a carefully balanced choice. Frequently, such moments require 3decisiveness and absolute conviction above all else. There is simply Frequently, such moments require decisiveness and absolute conviction above all else. There is simply no time to wait for all the facts, or room for doubt. A computer program cannot tell you how to invent and launch a new 4product . That 5journey involves too many unknowns, too much luck-and too much and launch a new product . That journey involves too many unknowns, too much luck-and too much sheer intuition, rather than the infallible logic that machines deliver so well. As Chekhov said: “An artist’s flair is sometimes worth a scientist’s brains”-entrepreneurs need right-brain thinking. When artist’s flair is sometimes worth a scientist’s brains”-entrepreneurs need right-brain thinking. When I have been considering whether to buy a company and what price to offer, I have been 6blinded too often by reams of due diligence from the accountants and lawyers. Usually it pays to stand back from often by reams of due diligence from the accountants and lawyers. Usually it pays to stand back from such mountains of grey data and weigh up the really important issues-and decide how you feel about act significance performance emphasis decisiveness patience fortitude gallantry project product procurement progress
空格 1observation assumption / initiative / observation / suspicion
搭配My observation of successful owners（我對成功業主的觀察）observation of 搭配
語意下文 lead me to believe，是觀察後得出信念
✗ assumption 假設、initiative 倡議、suspicion 懷疑皆不搭「觀察後相信」的語意
空格 2act act / significance / performance / emphasis
搭配an act of faith（一種信念之舉）固定片語
語意對比 carefully balanced choice，risk-taking 是憑信念的行為
✗ significance 意義、performance 表現、emphasis 強調皆不搭 an __ of faith 固定詞組
空格 3decisiveness decisiveness / patience / fortitude / gallantry
搭配require decisiveness and absolute conviction（需要果斷與絕對信念）
語意下文 no time to wait, no room for doubt 呼應「果斷」
✗ patience 耐心與「沒時間等」矛盾；fortitude 堅忍、gallantry 英勇皆不貼合決策果斷
空格 4product project / product / procurement / progress
搭配launch a new product（推出新產品）launch a product 固定搭配
語意談發明並推出新產品
✗ project 計畫、procurement 採購、progress 進展皆不搭 invent and launch a new __
空格 5journey journey / decade / cycle / pathway
搭配That journey involves too many unknowns（這趟旅程充滿未知）
語意比喻創業發明過程為一段 journey
✗ decade 十年、cycle 週期、pathway 路徑皆不如 journey 比喻創業歷程
空格 6blinded blinded / seduced / allured / deceived
搭配blinded by reams of due diligence（被大量盡職調查蒙蔽）blinded by 固定搭配
時態have been __ too often by，現在完成被動需過去分詞
✗ seduced/allured 引誘、deceived 欺騙皆不如 blinded by data 表「被資料蒙蔽判斷」
233.Interior design (室內設計)3 格#080236
Interior design is a professionally conducted, practice-based process of planning and realization of interior spaces and the elements within. Interior design is 1concerned with the function and operation interior spaces and the elements within. Interior design is concerned with the function and operation of the aesthetics and its 2sustainability . The work of an interior designer draws upon many other 3disciplines , such as environmental psychology, architecture, product design and, aesthetics, in relation disciplines , such as environmental psychology, architecture, product design and, aesthetics, in relation to a wide range of building spaces including hotels corporate and public spaces, schools, hospitals, private residences, shopping malls, restaurants, theaters and airport terminals. private residences, shopping malls, restaurants, theaters and airport terminals. concerned attached combined corresponded capability competency sustainability deniability disciplines principles rules functions
空格 1concerned concerned / attached / combined / corresponded
搭配is concerned with（關注、涉及）固定被動搭配
語意室內設計關注機能與運作
✗ attached/combined/corresponded 雖可接介詞，但表「涉及關注」須用 concerned with
空格 2sustainability capability / competency / sustainability / deniability
語意the function and operation of the aesthetics and its sustainability（美學及其永續性）
搭配設計領域常談 sustainability 永續性
✗ capability 能力、competency 勝任、deniability 否認可能性皆與設計永續主題不合
空格 3disciplines disciplines / principles / rules / functions
搭配draws upon many other disciplines（汲取自其他學科）draw upon disciplines 搭配
語意下文舉 psychology, architecture 等學科為例
✗ principles 原則、rules 規則、functions 功能皆不對應後文所列的「學科」
234.Bizarre Universe (奇異的宇宙)5 格#080237
It seems we live in a bizarre Universe. One of the greatest mysteries in the whole of science is the prospect that 75% of the Universe is made up from a mysterious 1substance known as ‘Dark Energy’, prospect that 75% of the Universe is made up from a mysterious substance known as ‘Dark Energy’, which causes an acceleration of the cosmic expansion. Since a further 21% of the Universe is made up from invisible ‘Cold Dark Matter’ that can only be 2detected through its gravitational effects, the from invisible ‘Cold Dark Matter’ that can only be detected through its gravitational effects, the ordinary atomic matter making up the rest is apparently only 4% of the total cosmic budget. These 3discoveries require a shift in our perception as great as that made after Copernicus’ 4revelation that discoveries require a shift in our perception as great as that made after Copernicus’ revelation that the Earth moves around the Sun. This lecture will start by reviewing the chequered history of Dark Energy, not only since Einstein’s proposal for a similar entity in 1917, but by tracing the concept back Energy, not only since Einstein’s proposal for a similar entity in 1917, but by tracing the concept back to Newton’s ideas. This lecture will 5summarize the current evidence for Dark Energy and future surveys in which UCL is heavily involved: the “Dark Energy Survey”, the Hubble Space Telescope and surveys in which UCL is heavily involved: the “Dark Energy Survey”, the Hubble Space Telescope and the proposed Euclid space mission.
空格 1substance substance / material / matter / stuff
搭配a mysterious substance known as Dark Energy（稱為暗能量的神秘物質）
語意後文 known as 'Dark Energy' 指一種物質
✗ material/matter/stuff 雖近義，但與 mysterious 及科普語境搭配 substance 最正式自然
空格 2detected deducted / detected / located / observed
搭配detected through its gravitational effects（透過重力效應偵測）detect 搭配
時態can only be __ 被動，需過去分詞
✗ deducted 扣除、located 定位、observed 觀察皆不如 detected 表「偵測到不可見物質」
空格 3discoveries theories / discernments / discoveries / perceptions
語意These discoveries require a shift in perception（這些發現需要認知轉變）
單複數These __ 需複數名詞，呼應前述暗能量暗物質的發現
✗ theories 理論、perceptions 認知、discernments 辨識皆不如 discoveries 對應前述科學發現
空格 4revelation revelation / condemnation / conviction / suspicion
搭配Copernicus' revelation that the Earth moves（哥白尼地球繞日的揭示）revelation that 搭配
語意指哥白尼的重大發現/揭示
✗ condemnation 譴責、conviction 定罪/信念、suspicion 懷疑皆不合「重大科學揭示」
空格 5summarize acknowledge / confess / admit / summarize
搭配summarize the current evidence（總結現有證據）summarize evidence 搭配
語意演講將總結暗能量的現有證據
✗ acknowledge/confess/admit 皆表「承認」帶坦白意味，與「總結證據」的講座語境不合
235.DNA Barcoding (DNA條形碼)5 格#080238
DNA barcoding was invented by Paul Hebert of the University of Guelph, in Ontario, Canada, in 2003. His idea was to 1generate a unique identification tag for each species based on a short stretch of DNA. His idea was to generate a unique identification tag for each species based on a short stretch of DNA. Separating species would then be a simple task of sequencing this tiny bit of DNA. Dr Hebert proposed part of a gene called cytochrome c oxidase I (COI) as suitable to the task. All animals have it. It seems part of a gene called cytochrome c oxidase I (COI) as suitable to the task. All animals have it. It seems to vary enough, but not too much, to act as a reliable marker. And it is easily 2extracted , because it is one of a handful of genes found outside the cell nucleus, in structures called mitochondria. Barcoding one of a handful of genes found outside the cell nucleus, in structures called mitochondria. Barcoding has taken off rapidly since Dr Hebert invented it. When the idea was proposed, it was expected to be a 3boon to taxonomists trying to name the world's millions of species. It has, however, proved to have a boon to taxonomists trying to name the world's millions of species. It has, however, proved to have a far wider range of uses than the merely academic—most promisingly in the realm of public health. One health-related project is the Mosquito Barcoding Initiative being run by Yvonne-Marie Linton of the health-related project is the Mosquito Barcoding Initiative being run by Yvonne-Marie Linton of the Natural History Museum in London. This aims to barcode 80% of the world's mosquitoes within the next two years, to help control mosquito-borne diseases. Mosquitoes are 4responsible for half a billion next two years, to help control mosquito-borne diseases. Mosquitoes are responsible for half a billion malarial infections and 1m deaths every year. They also transmit devastating diseases such as yellow fever, West Nile fever and dengue. However, efforts to control them are consistently 5undermined by fever, West Nile fever and dengue. However, efforts to control them are consistently undermined by the difficulty and expense of identifying mosquitoes—of which there are at least 3,500 species, many of them hard to tell apart. of them hard to tell apart. incorporated extracted comprised disposed present talent boon custorm compulsory reasonable responsible reckless
空格 1generate invent / create / generate / compose
搭配generate a unique identification tag（產生獨特識別標籤）generate a tag 搭配
語意為每物種生成 DNA 識別標籤
✗ invent 發明（無中生有）、create 創造、compose 組成皆不如 generate 表「產生標籤」
空格 2extracted incorporated / extracted / comprised / disposed
搭配easily extracted（易於提取）DNA/基因 extract 固定搭配
時態it is easily __ 被動，需過去分詞
✗ incorporated 納入、comprised 組成、disposed 處置皆不合「基因易被提取」
空格 3boon present / talent / boon / custorm
搭配a boon to taxonomists（對分類學家是一大福音）a boon to 固定搭配
語意對命名物種有極大幫助
✗ present 禮物、talent 才能、custorm(錯拼) 皆不搭 a __ to sb 表「福音、好處」
空格 4responsible compulsory / reasonable / responsible / reckless
搭配responsible for half a billion infections（造成五億感染）be responsible for 固定搭配
語意蚊子是瘧疾感染的元兇
✗ compulsory 強制、reasonable 合理、reckless 魯莽皆不搭 __ for 表「導致、要為…負責」
空格 5undermined underwriten / undermined / undertaken / underlined
搭配undermined by the difficulty（因困難而受阻）undermine efforts 搭配
時態are consistently __ by 被動，需過去分詞
✗ underwriten(錯拼)、undertaken 承擔、underlined 強調皆不合「防治努力被削弱」
236.Dendrochronology (樹木年譜)5 格#080239
A bonus of dendrochronology is that the width and substructure of each ring 1reflect the amount of rain and the 2season at which the rain fell during that particular year. Thus, tree ring studies also allow rain and the season at which the rain fell during that particular year. Thus, tree ring studies also allow one to reconstruct 3past climate; e.g., a 4series of wide rings means a wet period, and a series of narrow rings means a 5drought . rings means a drought . season course quarter term ongoing future underway past class group series part
空格 1reflect reflect / reflected
單複數主詞 the width and substructure（兩者並列）為複數，動詞用原形 reflect
時態陳述普遍事實用現在式
✗ reflected 是過去式/分詞，與複數主詞的現在式陳述不合
空格 2season season / course / quarter / term
搭配the season at which the rain fell（降雨的季節）
語意年輪反映降雨量與降雨季節
✗ course 課程/進程、quarter 季度、term 學期皆不如 season 對應自然降雨「季節」
空格 3past ongoing / future / underway / past
搭配reconstruct past climate（重建過去氣候）past climate 固定搭配
語意藉年輪重建過往氣候
✗ ongoing/future/underway 指當前或未來，與「重建已發生的歷史氣候」矛盾
空格 4series class / group / series / part
搭配a series of wide rings（一系列寬年輪）a series of 固定片語
語意連續多圈年輪代表一段時期
✗ class/group/part 皆不搭 a __ of rings 表「一連串」這個固定量詞片語
空格 5drought humidity / drought / wet / vapor
語意narrow rings means a drought（窄年輪代表乾旱），對比前句 wide rings 對應 wet period
詞性a __ 需可數名詞，drought 可數
✗ wet 是形容詞、humidity/vapor 是「濕氣」與窄年輪代表的「乾旱」相反
237.Clean water in Rome (羅馬的清潔水)4 格#080240
Clean water was very important to the Romans. Cities, towns and forts were built near springs. However, as Roman cities and towns grew, they needed to bring in water from 1further afield . As the However, as Roman cities and towns grew, they needed to bring in water from further afield . As the population grew, 2so did the need for clean water. Trying to shift large 3volumes of water underground in pipes was not possible as lead pipes would be too weak and bronze pipes would be too expensive. in pipes was not possible as lead pipes would be too weak and bronze pipes would be too expensive. The Romans could not make cast iron pipes as the 4techniques for doing this were not known to them. If water could not be brought via pipes, the Romans decided to bring it overland in what were If water could not be brought via pipes, the Romans decided to bring it overland in what were conduits. When the water got to the city, it was fed off into smaller bronze or ceramic pipes. To get the water to flow at an even (and slow) pace, conduits were built on a slight slope. Valleys were crossed by water to flow at an even (and slow) pace, conduits were built on a slight slope. Valleys were crossed by using aqueducts. One of the most famous of these is the Pont du Gard aqueduct at Nimes in southern France. Where possible, the Romans did take water through tunnels but the hills needed to be France. Where possible, the Romans did take water through tunnels but the hills needed to be relatively small for this to be successful. 1 springs_closed further_afield the_soil their_houses so as itit whereas sizes volumes numbers liters techniques problems obstacles responsibilities
空格 1further afield springs closed / further afield / the soil / their houses
搭配片語 from further afield（從更遠的地方），固定用法表「更遠處」。
語意城鎮成長後需從更遠引水，further afield 切題。
✗ springs closed、the soil、their houses 皆不符「從更遠地方引水」之意。
空格 2so so / as / it / whereas
搭配倒裝句型「As the population grew, so did the need...」，so + 助動詞倒裝表「也隨之」。
✗ as、it、whereas 皆無法構成「so did the need」這個對應倒裝結構。
空格 3volumes sizes / volumes / numbers / liters
搭配large volumes of water（大量的水），volume 與不可數液體搭配表「量」。
✗ sizes（尺寸）、numbers（數目，配可數）、liters（公升，過於具體）皆不如 volumes 搭配水之「大量」。
空格 4techniques techniques / problems / obstacles / responsibilities
語意「the techniques for doing this were not known to them」指做這件事的技術他們不懂，techniques（技術）切題。
✗ problems（問題）、obstacles（障礙）、responsibilities（責任）皆不符「鑄鐵管的製造技術」語意。

In The Origin of Species, Darwin provided abundant evidence that life on Earth has evolved over time, and he proposed natural selection as the primary mechanism for that change. He observed that individuals 1differ in their inherited traits and that selection acts on such differences, leading to 2evolutionary change. Although Darwin realised that variation in heritable traits is a prerequisite for evolutionary change. Although Darwin realised that variation in heritable traits is a prerequisite for 3evolution , he did not know precisely how organisms pass heritable traits to their offspring. Just a few years after Darwin published The Origin of Species, Gregor Mendel wrote a ground breaking paper on years after Darwin published The Origin of Species, Gregor Mendel wrote a ground breaking paper on inheritance 4in pea plants in that paper, Mendel proposed a model of inheritance in which organisms transmit discrete heritable units (now called genes) to their offspring. Although Darwin did not know transmit discrete heritable units (now called genes) to their offspring. Although Darwin did not know about genes, Mendel’s paper set the stage 5for understanding the genetic differences on which evolution development transformation revolution on in throughout within for as in on
空格 1differ differ / discriminate / distinguish / differentiate

✗ tremendous/sensational/immense 皆表「巨大」，但全文談天擇導致的「演化性」改變

語意可遺傳性狀的變異是演化前提
✗ development 發展、transformation 轉變、revolution 革命皆偏離達爾文「演化」核心詞
空格 4in on / in / throughout / within
搭配a paper on inheritance in pea plants（豌豆遺傳的論文）in pea plants 表「在…之中」
語意指豌豆植株體內的遺傳
✗ on 表主題、throughout 遍及、within 在…內部範圍，皆不如 in 表「豌豆中的遺傳現象」

At that time, it had a population of as many was at its most powerful around the early first century CE. It was the 3heart of the Mayan civilization, and naturally needed some major pyramids in the world. It was the heart of the Mayan civilization, and naturally needed some major roadways. The roads of El Mirador have been known about since 1967, but scientists had no idea how extensive they were until now. 241.Gas Drilling (天然氣鑽井)5 格#080244
Gas drilling on the Indonesian of java has 1triggered a “mud volcano” that has killed 13 people and may render four square miles (ten square kilometers) of countryside uninhabitable for years. In a report released on January 23, a team of British researchers says the deadly 2upwelling began when an exploratory gas well punched through a layer of rock 9300 feet (2800 meters) below the surface, 3allowing hot, high pressure water to escape. The water carried mud to the surface, where it has spread across a region 2.5 miles (4 kilometers) in 4diameter in the eight months since the eruption began. The mud volcano is similar to a gusher or blowout, which occur in oil drilling when oil or gas squirt to the surface, team says. This upwelling, however, spews out a volume of mud equivalent to a dozen Olympic swimming pools each day. Although the eruption isn't as violent as a 5conventional volcano, more than a dozen people died when a natural gas pipeline ruptured. The research team, who published their findings in the February issue of GSA Today, also estimate that the volcano, called Lusi, will leave more than 11,000 people permanently displaced. triggered connected motivated introduced

✗ distance 距離、field 範圍、length 長度皆不搭 X miles in __ 表「直徑」

The rest of Taylor’s restaurant is student-run. Students in quantity food production and service management 1classes make the articulate and detailed dishes. Skeptics might doubt the 2quality of a student-run restaurant, but one visit to Taylor's will immediately change their outlook. Dishes such as orecchiette and butternut squash, pappardelle with duck and bistro chicken will please any appetite while imparting the need to 3return for a second taste. Students are taught to use ratios and proportions rather than recipes when creating dishes. "Understanding ratios and proportions when creating dishes instead of recipes makes students think and 4actually teaches them how to cook, rather than just reading a recipe and not learning from it," Garmy said.
