Thomas Alva Edison was 1both a scientist and an inventor. Born in 1847, Edison would see tremendous Thomas Alva Edison was both a scientist and an inventor. Born in 1847, Edison would see tremendous change take place in his lifetime. He was also to be responsible for making many of those changes occur. When Edison was born, society still 2thought of electricity as a novelty, a fad. By the time he died, occur. When Edison was born, society still thought of electricity as a novelty, a fad. By the time he died, entire cities were lit by electricity. Much of the 3credit for that progress goes to Edison. In his lifetime, Edison patented 1,093 inventions, earning him the nickname “The Wizard of Menlo Park.” The most Edison patented 1,093 inventions, earning him the nickname “The Wizard of Menlo Park.” The most famous of his inventions was the incandescent light bulb. Besides the light bulb, Edison 4developed the phonograph and the “kinetoscope,” a small box for viewing moving films. Thomas Edison is also the phonograph and the “kinetoscope,” a small box for viewing moving films. Thomas Edison is also the first person in the US to make his own filmstrips. He also 5improved upon the original design of the stock ticker, the telegraph, and Alexander Graham Bell’s telephone. He believed in hard work, stock ticker, the telegraph, and Alexander Graham Bell’s telephone. He believed in hard work, sometimes working twenty hours a day. Edison was quoted as saying, “Genius is one percent inspiration and 99 percent perspiration.” In tribute to this important American, electric lights in the inspiration and 99 percent perspiration.” In tribute to this important American, electric lights in the United States were 6dimmed for one minute on October 21, 1931, a few days after his death.
空格 1both both / neither / either / almost
搭配固定搭配 both A and B，後面有 and 連接 scientist 與 inventor。
語意他兩個身分都是，語意為「既是…也是…」。
✗ neither…nor 與 either…or 需配對連接詞且語意不符；almost 不接 and。
空格 2thought thought / treat / regard / consider
時態主句 still thought of，配合過去式語境且用 thought of 片語。

✗ increased 指數量增加；transformed/evolved 語意過大且不接 upon。

✗ lit 點亮與哀悼語意相反；down 非動詞；switched 通常接 off，單用不通。
244.Desert ant (沙漠螞蟻)4 格#080247
There comes a time in a desert ant’s life when a piece of food is too large to ignore, but too heavy to There comes a time in a desert ant’s life when a piece of food is too large to ignore, but too heavy to lift, and the only way to get it home is to adopt a new style of walking. The long-legged and speedy Cataglyphis fortis normally covers ground with a three-legged stride that moves two legs forwards on Cataglyphis fortis normally covers ground with a three-legged stride that moves two legs forwards on one side, and one on the other. For the next step, the insect mirrors the move with its other three legs. But recordings of ants in the Tunisian desert reveal that when faced with oversized lumps of food 10 But recordings of ants in the Tunisian desert reveal that when faced with oversized lumps of food 10 times their own weight, the forward “tripod” walking style 1is abandoned . Unable to lift the morsels in their mandibles, the ants drag the food backwards instead, moving all six legs independently. “This in their mandibles, the ants drag the food backwards instead, moving all six legs independently. “This is the first time we 2have seen this in any ants,” said lead author Sarah Pfeffer at the University of Ulm in Germany. The ants’ long legs already help keep their bodies away from the scorching desert floor in Germany. The ants’ long legs already help keep their bodies away from the scorching desert floor and enable them to speed around at up to 60cm per second. “Think of Usain Bolt, who has very long legs 3compared to body size. The desert floor is also very hot, so the 4further away their bodies are from legs compared to body size. The desert floor is also very hot, so the further away their bodies are from the surface, the better,” said co-author Matthias Wittlinger. The ants have also evolved to function at body temperatures of 50C in a desert where temperatures can soar to 70C. “They’re basically just body temperatures of 50C in a desert where temperatures can soar to 70C. “They’re basically just trying to get out of the heat,” he added. 1 is_abandoned be_abandoned been_abandoned will_abandon
空格 1is abandoned is abandoned / be abandoned / been abandoned / will abandon
時態「the forward tripod walking style is abandoned」陳述普遍事實用現在式被動，走法被放棄。
單複數主詞 style（單數）配 is。
✗ be abandoned/been abandoned 缺助動詞無法獨立、will abandon 為主動未來與被動語意不合。
空格 2have seen have been / saw / have seen / see
時態「the first time we have seen this」，the first time + 現在完成式為固定搭配。
✗ have been 語意不完整、saw 過去式不合 first time 句型、see 原形時態不合。
空格 3compared associated / compared / related / comparing
搭配片語 compared to（與⋯相比），long legs compared to body size。
時態過去分詞 compared 引導比較片語，被動分詞用法。
✗ associated（聯想）搭配 with、related（相關）搭配 to 但語意是「相關」非「相比」、comparing 為主動分詞不合此被動比較。
空格 4further further / worst / hotter / colder
搭配「the further away... the better」為 the + 比較級, the + 比較級句型，further（更遠）表距離。
✗ worst 為最高級不合、hotter/colder（更熱/更冷）與「身體離地面距離」語意不符。
245.Global Textile Industry (全球紡織業)5 格#080248
The environmental impact of the global textile industry is hard to overstate. One-third of the water The environmental impact of the global textile industry is hard to overstate. One-third of the water used worldwide is spent fashioning fabrics. For every ton of cloth 1produced , 200 tons of water is polluted with chemicals and heavy metals. An estimated 1 trillion kilowatt-hours of electricity powers the factories that card and comb, spin and weave, and cut and stitch materials into everything from T- the factories that card and comb, spin and weave, and cut and stitch materials into everything from T- shirts to towels, 2leaving behind mountains of solid waste and a massive carbon footprint. “Where the industry is today is not really sustainable for the long term,” says Shreyaskar Chaudhary, chief industry is today is not really sustainable for the long term,” says Shreyaskar Chaudhary, chief executive of Pratibha Syntex, a textile manufacturer based outside Indore, India. With something of an “if you build it, they will come” attitude, Mr.Chaudhary has steered Pratibha 3toward the leading edge “if you build it, they will come” attitude, Mr.Chaudhary has steered Pratibha toward the leading edge of eco-friendly textile production. Under his direction, Pratibha began making clothes with organic cotton in 1999. Initially, the company couldn't find enough organic farms growing cotton in central cotton in 1999. Initially, the company couldn't find enough organic farms growing cotton in central India to 4supply its factories. To meet production demands, Chaudhary's team had to convince conventional cotton farmers to change 5their growing methods. Pratibha provided seeds, cultivation conventional cotton farmers to change their growing methods. Pratibha provided seeds, cultivation instruction, and a guarantee of fair-trade prices for their crops. Today, Pratibha has a network of 28,000 organic cotton growers across the central states of Madhya Pradesh, Maharashtra, and Orissa. 28,000 organic cotton growers across the central states of Madhya Pradesh, Maharashtra, and Orissa. moving leaving looking departing against onto toward throughout offer demand supply afford
空格 1produced produce / producing / produced
時態cloth ___ 為被動關係，名詞後置修飾用過去分詞 produced（被生產的布）。
✗ produce 原形作動詞語法不通；producing 主動分詞語意為布在生產（錯誤）。
空格 2leaving moving / leaving / looking / departing
搭配leave behind（留下、遺留）固定搭配，leaving behind mountains of waste。
時態分詞構句用現在分詞 leaving 接續主句。
✗ moving/looking/departing 都不與 behind 構成「遺留」之意，語意不合。
空格 3toward against / onto / toward / throughout
語意Chaudhary 帶領 Pratibha「朝向」環保紡織前沿，steered…toward。
搭配steer toward（駛向/導向）自然搭配。
✗ against 反對；onto 上到；throughout 遍及，皆與「朝某方向推進」語意不符。
空格 4supply offer / demand / supply / afford
語意語意為農場不足以「供應」工廠原料，supply its factories。
搭配supply（供應）後直接接受詞 its factories。
✗ offer/afford 搭配與語意不貼；demand 是需求，與供應方向相反。
空格 5their their / our / its / them
單複數指 farmers 的作物，複數第三人稱所有格 their crops。
✗ our/its 人稱與數不符；them 是受格不能修飾名詞。
246.Heart disease (心髒病)4 格#080249
If you have a 1chronic disease such as heart disease, diabetes, asthma, or back or joint pain, exercise can have important health 2benefits . However, it's important to talk to your doctor before starting an have important health benefits . However, it's important to talk to your doctor before starting an exercise 3routine . He or she might have 4advice on what exercises are safe and any precautions you might need to take while exercising. might need to take while exercising. benefits merits symptoms hurdle habit routine tradition arrangement satire advice condemnation encouragement
空格 1chronic chronic / acute / incurable / presistent
語意心臟病、糖尿病、氣喘屬「慢性」疾病，chronic disease。
✗ acute 急性與例子矛盾；incurable 過於絕對；presistent 為 persistent 的錯拼。
空格 2benefits benefits / merits / symptoms / hurdle
搭配health benefits（健康益處）固定搭配。
語意語意指運動帶來重要健康好處。
✗ merits 較少與 health 搭配；symptoms 是症狀；hurdle 是障礙且為單數，語意相反。
空格 3routine habit / routine / tradition / arrangement
搭配exercise routine（運動例行計畫）固定搭配。
✗ habit/tradition/arrangement 不與 exercise 構成此慣用名詞片語。
空格 4advice satire / advice / condemnation / encouragement
搭配have advice on（對…有建議）自然搭配。
語意醫生對哪些運動安全提供「建議」。
✗ satire 諷刺、condemnation 譴責語意不符；encouragement 雖正面但不及 advice 切合「告知注意事項」。
247.Crime (罪行)5 格#080250
A crime is generally a deliberate act that results in harm, physical or otherwise, toward one or more people, in a manner 1prohibited by law. The determination of which acts are to be considered criminal people, in a manner prohibited by law. The determination of which acts are to be considered criminal has varied 2historically, historically , and continues to do so among cultures and nations. When a crime is committed, a process of 3discovery , trial by judge or jury, conviction, and punishment occurs. Just as committed, a process of discovery , trial by judge or jury, conviction, and punishment occurs. Just as what is considered criminal varies between 4jurisdictions , so does the punishment, but elements of restitution and 5deterrence are common. restitution and deterrence are common. invention discovery innovation investigation obligations rights jurisdictions regulations chastisement comeuppance discipline deterrence
空格 1prohibited prohibited / authorized / precluded / protested
語意犯罪是以法律「禁止」的方式造成傷害，prohibited by law。
搭配prohibited by law（為法律所禁止）固定搭配。
✗ authorized 授權語意相反；precluded 排除、protested 抗議皆不接 by law 表此意。
空格 2historically historically / incompatibly / inappropriately / frequently
語意與後文 continues to do so 對照，指認定「歷史上」一直在變。
✗ incompatibly/inappropriately 語意不通；frequently 雖可但不及 historically 對應「歷史變遷」。
空格 3discovery invention / discovery / innovation / investigation
語意與 trial、conviction、punishment 並列司法程序，偵查/查明階段為 discovery。
✗ invention/innovation 是發明創新，與司法流程無關；investigation 雖近，但與後文程序用語慣以 discovery 表證據開示。
空格 4jurisdictions obligations / rights / jurisdictions / regulations
語意語意指犯罪認定因「司法管轄區」而異，varies between jurisdictions。
單複數between 後接複數，jurisdictions 為複數。
✗ obligations 義務、rights 權利、regulations 法規皆不符「不同地區/管轄」之意。
空格 5deterrence chastisement / comeuppance / discipline / deterrence
語意與 restitution（賠償）並列為刑罰常見要素，deterrence（嚇阻）。
✗ chastisement/comeuppance/discipline 較口語或不精準；deterrence 是刑罰理論標準術語。
248.The narrative of law (法律的敘述)4 格#080251
The narrative of law and order is located fundamentally at the level of individual guilt and responsibility. Criminal acts are seen as individual issues of personal responsibility and 1culpability , to responsibility. Criminal acts are seen as individual issues of personal responsibility and culpability , to which the state responds by way of policing, 2prosecution , adjudication and punishment. This is but one level at which crime and criminal justice can be analysed. The problem is that so often analysis one level at which crime and criminal justice can be analysed. The problem is that so often analysis ends there, at the level of individual action, 3characterised in terms of responsibility, guilt, evil. In few other areas of social life does individualism have this hold. To take but one 4instance , it would be other areas of social life does individualism have this hold. To take but one instance , it would be absurd to restrict analysis of obesity, to individual greed. It should similarly be widely seen as absurd to restrict analysis of criminal justice issues to the culpability of individuals. restrict analysis of criminal justice issues to the culpability of individuals. arrest prosecution custody sentence characterised concentrated spotlighted pondered circumstance thought instance stand
空格 1culpability fault / negligence / culpability / inaccuracy
語意與 responsibility 並列，指個人「罪責/可歸責性」，responsibility and culpability。
✗ fault 過失、negligence 疏忽、inaccuracy 不準確皆不及 culpability 對應法律上的「罪責」。
空格 2prosecution arrest / prosecution / custody / sentence
語意與 policing、adjudication、punishment 並列司法回應程序，prosecution（起訴）。
✗ arrest 逮捕、custody 羈押、sentence 判刑皆為單一環節，prosecution 才對應「起訴」這一階段。
空格 3characterised characterised / concentrated / spotlighted / pondered
搭配characterised in terms of（以…來刻畫/界定）自然搭配。
時態被動分詞修飾 analysis，過去分詞 characterised。
✗ concentrated/spotlighted/pondered 都不與 in terms of 構成「以…來刻畫」之意。
空格 4instance circumstance / thought / instance / stand
搭配to take but one instance（僅舉一例）固定片語。
✗ circumstance 情況、thought 想法、stand 立場皆不與 take but one 構成「舉一例」之意。

A giant turtle made from discarded plastic trash will greet visitors to the British Science Festival this week. The plastic containers, bottles and cups were collected locally in Hull, where the event is taking week. The plastic containers, bottles and cups were collected locally in Hull, where the event is taking place at the city’s university. Standing 3.5m tall (11.5ft), the art installation 1was commissioned by the University of Hull with the aim of raising awareness of plastic waste. Professor Dan Parsons, director of University of Hull with the aim of raising awareness of plastic waste. Professor Dan Parsons, director of the university’s Energy and Environment Institute, said: “Marine pollution is a mounting global challenge, which is 2already having devastating consequences. “We have a duty to protect these fragile challenge, which is already having devastating consequences. “We have a duty to protect these fragile environments and the marine life and ecosystems which we 3call home. The university has commissioned this installation as a physical 4reminder of what is ending up in the oceans, but also to commissioned this installation as a physical reminder of what is ending up in the oceans, but also to ask visitors to campus to stop and think what they could do to try to reduce their own waste.”
空格 1was was / had / has
時態the art installation ___ commissioned 為被動語態，需 be 動詞 was（過去式）。
✗ had/has 構成完成式須接過去分詞作主動，與此被動句 commissioned 不合，且時態為過去。
空格 2already already / nevermore / anticipated / literally
語意海洋污染「已經」造成毀滅性後果，is already having consequences。
詞性副詞修飾進行式 is having，already 位置自然。
✗ nevermore 永不、anticipated 預期的、literally 字面上皆不符「已經正在」之意。
空格 3call think / respect / call / regard
搭配call somewhere home（以某地為家）固定搭配，ecosystems which we call home。
✗ think/respect/regard 都不與受詞補語 home 構成「視為家」的慣用結構。
空格 4reminder menace / thrill / delivery / reminder

✗ menace 威脅、thrill 刺激、delivery 遞送皆與「提醒物」語意不符。
250.Social Isolation (社會隔離)5 格#080253
Sound depressing, even apocalyptic? Well, it could be the future. If government 1forecasts are right, about 20 years from now, two out of five households will be single 2occupancy . And there is evidence the situation is already 3deteriorating . According to a report, Social Isolation in America, published in the American Sociological Review in 2006, the average American today has only two close friends. Twenty-five per cent of those surveyed said they do not have anyone to talk with about important things---And yet, while some are 4declaring a crisis in our ability to make friends, others are saying exactly the opposite. For example, MSN's Anatomy of Friendship Report, published last November, suggests that the average Briton has 54 friends-a 5spectacular rise of 64 per cent since 2003. forecasts prediction policies prophesy
空格 1forecasts forecasts / prediction / policies / prophesy
單複數government ___ are right，動詞 are 為複數，需複數名詞 forecasts。

✗ inhabitant 居民、household 與主詞重複、residency 居留身分皆不與 single 構成「單人入住」之意。
空格 3deteriorating deteriorating / enhancing / impairing / recuperating
語意情況「正在惡化」，呼應後文孤立加劇，situation is already deteriorating。
✗ enhancing/recuperating 是改善（相反）；impairing 多須受詞，不及 deteriorating 表「自身惡化」。
空格 4declaring declaring / launching / swearing / discharging
搭配declare a crisis（宣稱有危機）自然搭配，declaring a crisis。
✗ launching 發動、swearing 發誓、discharging 解除皆不與 a crisis 構成「宣稱危機」之意。
空格 5spectacular spectacular / excellent / unique / admiring

✗ excellent/unique 不慣與 rise 搭配描述幅度；admiring 是「讚賞的」修飾人，語意不符。

But at a talk on Lost Book of Moses: The Hunt for the World’s Oldest Bible,” to find the answer. But at a talk on Wednesday, the writer, journalist, and fellow at the Radcliffe Institute for Advanced Study offered listeners an enticing peek, describing how he landed on the story of the mysterious manuscript and listeners an enticing peek, describing how he landed on the story of the mysterious manuscript and about his years trying to track down the document — which, if proven authentic, would’ve shaken biblical scholarship as it indicated that “the Torah had changed and possibly … had been changed by biblical scholarship as it indicated that “the Torah had changed and possibly … had been changed by human hands,” challenging claims of divine authorship, Tigay said. From the author’s description, it was a wild, Indiana Jones-type ride that included a competition to find the relic, false starts, dead ends, was a wild, Indiana Jones-type ride that included a competition to find the relic, false starts, dead ends, trips to far away places, and an ultimate breakthrough close to home.

The Texas Cosmology Centre will be a way for the university's departments of Astronomy and Physics to 1collaborate on research that concerns them both “This centre will bring the two departments together in an area where they 2overlap --in the physics of the very early universe,” said Dr. Neal Evans, Astronomy Department chair. Astronomical observations have 3revealed the presence of dark matter and dark energy, discoveries that challenge our knowledge of fundamental physics. And today's leading theories in physics 4involve energies so high that no Earth-bound particle accelerator can test them. 253.Diversity of the Amazon Basin (亞馬遜盆地的多樣性)6 格#080256
This is the first study to show that the Andes have been a 1major source of 2diversity for the Amazon basin, one of the largest 3reservoirs of biological diversity on Earth. The finding runs 4counter to the idea that Amazonian diversity is the result of evolution only within the 5Tropical forest itself. “Basically, the Amazon basin is ‘melting pot’ for South American frogs,” says graduate student Juan Santos, lead author of the study. “Poison frogs there have come from multiple places of 6origin , notably the Andes Mountains, over many millions of years. We have shown that you cannot understand Amazonian biodiversity by looking only in the basin. Adjacent regions have played a major role.”
空格 1major major / essential / important / specific
搭配a major source of（…的主要來源）自然搭配。
語意安地斯山是多樣性的「主要」來源。
✗ essential/important 可指重要但不及 major 表「主要來源」；specific 是特定，語意不符。
空格 2diversity diversification / category / diversity / variation
搭配source of diversity（多樣性來源），且後文 reservoirs of biological diversity 重複用詞。
✗ diversification 偏過程；category 類別、variation 變異皆不符整體「生物多樣性」之意。

語意亞馬遜是地球最大的生物多樣性「寶庫」，reservoirs of diversity。
單複數one of the largest ___ 後接複數，reservoirs。

空格 4counter harmonious / counter / similar / accordant

✗ harmonious/similar/accordant 語意為一致，與 runs ___ to 表「相反」矛盾。
空格 5Tropical frigid / temperate / rain / Tropical
語意指熱帶雨林本身，Tropical forest。

空格 6origin species / origin / colony / habitat

✗ species 物種、colony 群落、habitat 棲地皆不與 places of 構成「起源地」之意。
254.Granular Materials (粒狀材料)4 格#080257
Part of the fun of experimenting with granular materials, says Stephen W. Morris, is the showmanship. Part of the fun of experimenting with granular materials, says Stephen W. Morris, is the showmanship. In one stunt that he has demonstrated in settings ranging from high school classrooms to television studios, the University of Toronto 1physicist loads clear plastic tubes with white table salt and black studios, the University of Toronto physicist loads clear plastic tubes with white table salt and black sand and starts them rotating. What transpires in the tubes usually knocks the socks off of any 2unsuspecting bystander. Instead of mixing into a drab gray sameness, the sand particles slowly unsuspecting bystander. Instead of mixing into a drab gray sameness, the sand particles slowly separate into crisp black bands cutting across a long, narrow field of salt. As the spinning continues, some bands disappear and new ones arise. "It's a parlor trick," Morris says. Not to deny its some bands disappear and new ones arise. "It's a parlor trick," Morris says. Not to deny its entertainment value, this 3demonstration of how strangely granular materials can behave is also an authentic experiment in a field both rich in fundamental physics and major practical consequences. Yet authentic experiment in a field both rich in fundamental physics and major practical consequences. Yet granular mixing today remains more of an art than a 4science , says chemical engineer Fernando J.
空格 1physicist physicist / dean / personnel / student

✗ dean 院長、personnel 人員、student 學生皆與研究 granular materials 的身分不符。
空格 2unsuspecting incredible / unsuspecting / beholding / surprised
詞性需形容詞修飾 bystander，unsuspecting（毫無防備的）旁觀者。
✗ incredible 不合語意；beholding 非常用形容詞；surprised 是已被驚到，時序上不合「事前毫無預期」。
空格 3demonstration demonstration / thought / hypothesis / belief
語意回指前文的鹽沙旋轉「示範表演」，this demonstration of how…。

255.Australia Higher Edu. Funding (澳大利亞高等教育基金)5 格#080258
Financing of Australian higher education has undergone dramatic change since the early 1970s. Financing of Australian higher education has undergone dramatic change since the early 1970s. Although the Australian Government provided regular funding for universities from the late 1950s, in 1974 it 1assumed full responsibility for funding higher education-abolishing tuition fees with the 1974 it assumed full responsibility for funding higher education-abolishing tuition fees with the intention of making university 2accessible to all Australians who had the ability and who wished to participate in higher education. Since the late 1980s, there has been a move towards greater private participate in higher education. Since the late 1980s, there has been a move towards greater private contributions, 3particularly student fees. In 1989, the Australian Government 4introduced the Higher Education Contribution Scheme (HECS) which included a loans scheme to help students finance their Education Contribution Scheme (HECS) which included a loans scheme to help students finance their contributions. This enabled university to remain accessible to students by delaying their payments until they could afford to pay off their loans. In 2002, the Australian Government introduced a scheme they could afford to pay off their loans. In 2002, the Australian Government introduced a scheme similar to HECS for postgraduate students-the Postgraduate Education Loan Scheme (PELS). Funding for higher education comes from various sources. This article examines the three main sources- for higher education comes from various sources. This article examines the three main sources- Australian Government funding, student fees and charges, and HECS. While the proportion of total 5revenue raised through HECS is relatively small, HECS payments are a significant component of revenue raised through HECS is relatively small, HECS payments are a significant component of students' university costs, with many students carrying a HECS debt for several years after leaving university. This article also focuses on characteristics of university students based on their HECS liability university. This article also focuses on characteristics of university students based on their HECS liability status, and the level of accumulated HECS debt.
空格 1assumed assumed / accounted / shirked / paid
搭配assume responsibility for（承擔…的責任）固定搭配。
時態1974 年事件用過去式 assumed。
✗ accounted 接 for 但語意是解釋；shirked 是逃避（相反）；paid 不與 responsibility 構成承擔之意。
空格 2accessible accomplishable / dependable / welcome / accessible
語意使大學對所有人「可及/普及」，making university accessible to all。
搭配accessible to（對…可及）自然搭配。
✗ accomplishable 可達成、dependable 可靠、welcome 受歡迎皆不符「人人可上得起大學」之意。
空格 3particularly specially / without / particularly / with
語意舉例強調，private contributions「尤其是」學費，particularly student fees。
✗ specially 偏「特地」；without/with 是介系詞，語法上不引導此舉例補述。
空格 4introduced introduced / executed / carried / manufactured
搭配introduce a scheme（推出/引進方案）自然搭配。
時態1989 年事件用過去式 introduced。
✗ executed 執行、carried 須接 out、manufactured 製造皆不符「推出制度」之意。
空格 5revenue expenses / revenue / cash / gain
語意與後文 total revenue 呼應，HECS 佔總「收入/稅收」比例小。
✗ expenses 是支出（方向相反）；cash 過於籠統；gain 偏收益，不及 revenue 對應 total revenue。
256.Funerary Violin (葬禮小提琴)4 格#080259
In the 250 years of its active evolution, Funerary Violin moved from the formal to the personal. It is clear from the earliest 1accounts of the form that its role during the sixteenth and seventeenth centuries clear from the earliest accounts of the form that its role during the sixteenth and seventeenth centuries was largely heraldic, to 2exemplify the continuity of the social 3structure . The few works that have survived from this period are often 4surprisingly unemotional and at times overtly grandiose. survived from this period are often surprisingly unemotional and at times overtly grandiose. accounts recall recollection articles exemplify clarify identify amplify infrastructure awareness panic structure
空格 1accounts accounts / recall / recollection / articles
搭配accounts of（關於…的記述/記載）自然搭配，earliest accounts of the form。
單複數earliest ___ 後接可數複數，accounts。
✗ recall/recollection 偏個人回憶；articles 是文章，與「最早記載」語意不符。
空格 2exemplify exemplify / clarify / identify / amplify
語意其角色是「彰顯/體現」社會結構的延續性，to exemplify the continuity。
✗ clarify 釐清、identify 辨識、amplify 放大皆不符「體現/例證」之意。
空格 3structure infrastructure / awareness / panic / structure
搭配social structure（社會結構）固定搭配。
✗ infrastructure 基礎設施、awareness 意識、panic 恐慌皆不與 social 構成此慣用語。
空格 4surprisingly surprisingly / expectedly / frequently / unsuspectingly
詞性副詞修飾形容詞 unemotional，surprisingly unemotional（出乎意料地不帶情感）。
語意與下文 grandiose 形成轉折，語意為「令人意外」。
✗ expectedly 語意相反；frequently 是頻率不修飾此意；unsuspectingly 用於有意識主體，不修飾 unemotional。
257.Modify cultural ideas (修改文化理念)4 格#080260
People modify cultural ideas in their minds, and sometimes they pass on the modified versions. Inevitably, there are unintentional modifications as well, partly because of straightforward error, and Inevitably, there are unintentional modifications as well, partly because of straightforward error, and partly because inexplicit ideas are hard to 1convey accurately: there is no way to download them directly from one brain to another like computer programs. 2Even native speakers of a language will not directly from one brain to another like computer programs. Even native speakers of a language will not give identical definitions of every word. So it can be only rarely, if 3ever , that two people hold precisely the same cultural idea in their minds. That is why, when the founder of a polithilosophical movement the same cultural idea in their minds. That is why, when the founder of a polithilosophical movement or a religion dies, or even before, schisms typically happen. The movements most devoted followers are often shocked to 4discover that they disagree about what its doctrines really are. are often shocked to discover that they disagree about what its doctrines really are. Even Although IfIf Despite ever necessary so does indicate discover perceive invent
空格 1convey convey / pass / convoy / transmit
語意語意指模糊的概念難以準確「傳達」，hard to convey accurately。
✗ pass 須接 on；convoy 是護航（拼錯易混）；transmit 偏訊號傳輸，不及 convey 表達意義貼切。
空格 2Even Even / Although / Despite
語意Even native speakers…（即使是母語者也…），表讓步強調。
詞性Even 作副詞直接修飾主詞片語，後不需從屬連接詞。
✗ Although/Despite 須引導完整子句/片語並改寫句構，此處主句已完整，僅 Even 合語法。
空格 3ever ever / necessary / so / does
搭配rarely, if ever（即使有也極少）固定插入語。
✗ necessary/so/does 皆無法與 rarely, if ___ 構成此慣用插入語。
空格 4discover indicate / discover / perceive / invent
搭配shocked to discover that（震驚地發現…）自然搭配。
✗ indicate 是表明、invent 是發明，語意不符；perceive 偏感知，不及 discover 表「發現事實」。

The foreign policy of a state, it is often argued, begins and ends with the border. No doubt an exaggeration, this aphorism nevertheless has an 1element of truth. A state's relation with its neighbours, exaggeration, this aphorism nevertheless has an element of truth. A state's relation with its neighbours, at least in the formative years, are greatly 2influenced by its frontier policy, especially when there are no settled borders. Empire builders in the past sought to extend imperial frontiers for a variety of reasons; settled borders. Empire builders in the past sought to extend imperial frontiers for a variety of reasons; subjugation of kings and princes to gain their 3allegiance (as well as handsome tributes or the coffers of the state), and, security of the 'core' of the empire from external attacks by establishing a string of the state), and, security of the 'core' of the empire from external attacks by establishing a string of buffer states in areas adjoining the frontiers. The history of British empire in India was no different. It is important to note in this connection that the concept of international boundaries (between two important to note in this connection that the concept of international boundaries (between two sovereign states), demarcated and 4delineated , was yet to emerge in India under Mughal rule.
空格 1element element / example / paradox / feature
搭配an element of truth（幾分真實/一點真理）固定片語。
✗ example/paradox/feature 都不與 an ___ of truth 構成此慣用語。
空格 2influenced affluent / emphasized / influenced / affiliated
時態be greatly ___ by 被動結構，需過去分詞 influenced。
語意與鄰國關係深受邊界政策「影響」。
✗ affluent 是富裕（形容詞語意不符）；emphasized 強調、affiliated 隸屬皆不符「受…影響」之意。
空格 3allegiance alleviation / allegiance / allocation / allegation
搭配gain allegiance（取得效忠）自然搭配。
語意征服諸王以取得其「效忠」。
✗ alleviation 緩解、allocation 分配、allegation 指控形近義異，皆不符「效忠」。
空格 4delineated disabled / defused / delivered / delineated
搭配與 demarcated 並列，邊界被「劃定/界定」，demarcated and delineated。
時態被動分詞修飾 boundaries，過去分詞 delineated。
✗ disabled 使失能、defused 拆解、delivered 遞送皆與「劃界」語意不符。
259.Movement in painting (繪畫中的運動)5 格#080262
Movement in painting that 1originated in France in the 1860s and had enormous influence in European Movement in painting that originated in France in the 1860s and had enormous influence in European and North American painting in the late 19th century. The Impressionists wanted to simplify depict real life, to paint straight from nature, and to capture the changing effects of light. The term was first used life, to paint straight from nature, and to capture the changing effects of light. The term was first used abusively to 2describe Claude Monet's painting Impression: Sunrise (1872). The other leading Impressionists included Paul Camile, Edgar Degas, Edouard Manet, Camille Pissarro, Pierre-Auguste Impressionists included Paul Camile, Edgar Degas, Edouard Manet, Camille Pissarro, Pierre-Auguste Renoir, and Alfred Sisley, but only Monet remained devoted to Impressionist ideas throughout his career. The core of the Impressionist group was formed in the early 1860s by Monet, Renoir, and Sisley, career. The core of the Impressionist group was formed in the early 1860s by Monet, Renoir, and Sisley, who met as students and enjoyed painting in the open air-one of the hallmarks of Impressionism. They met other members of the Impressionist circle through Paris café society. They never made up a formal met other members of the Impressionist circle through Paris café society. They never made up a formal group, but they organized eight group exhibitions between 1874 and 1886, at the first of which the name Impressionism was applied. Their styles were diverse, but all 3experimented with effects of light name Impressionism was applied. Their styles were diverse, but all experimented with effects of light and movement created with distinct brush strokes and fragments of color dabbed side-by-side on the canvas rather than mixed on the palette. By the 1880s the movement's central impulse had dispersed, canvas rather than mixed on the palette. By the 1880s the movement's central impulse had dispersed, and a number of new styles were emerging, later described as post-impressionism. British Impressionism had a major influence on the more 4experimental and progressive British painters in the Impressionism had a major influence on the more experimental and progressive British painters in the late 19th and early 20th centuries. Many of the painters were affected in the circle of Walter Sickert, who spent much of his career in France and was an influential figure who 5inspired many younger who spent much of his career in France and was an influential figure who inspired many younger artists. His friend and exact contemporary Philip Wilson Steer is generally regarded as the most describe humiliate duplicate criticize attached competent affected experimented experiential expert experimental extraordinary
空格 1originated oriented / originated / occurred / located
搭配originate in（起源於某地），originated in France。
時態敘述歷史事件用過去式 originated。
✗ oriented 是定向、located 須接 in 但語意是「位於」非「起源」；occurred 偏「發生」不及 originate 表起源。
空格 2describe describe / humiliate / duplicate / criticize
語意該詞最初被「貶義地用來描述」莫內的畫作，used to describe。
✗ humiliate 羞辱、duplicate 複製、criticize 批評皆不符「用以描述某畫作」之意。
空格 3experimented attached / competent / affected / experimented
搭配experiment with（試驗、嘗試），all experimented with effects of light。
時態主詞 all 指畫家複數，過去式 experimented。
✗ attached/competent/affected 都不與 with effects of light 構成「試驗」之意。
空格 4experimental experiential / expert / experimental / extraordinary
詞性需形容詞修飾 painters，且與 progressive 並列，experimental（實驗性的）。
✗ experiential 經驗的、expert 是名詞/形容詞但語意不合、extraordinary 非常的，皆不及 experimental 貼切並列 progressive。
空格 5inspired commanded / inspired / educated / promoted
語意Sickert 是「啟發」許多年輕藝術家的影響人物，inspired many younger artists。
✗ commanded 指揮、educated 教育、promoted 推廣皆不及 inspired 表「啟發」貼切。
260.Arbitration (仲裁)4 格#080263
Arbitration is a method of conflict resolution which, with more or less formalized mechanisms, occurs in many political and legal spheres. There are two main 1characteristics to arbitration. The first is that it in many political and legal spheres. There are two main characteristics to arbitration. The first is that it is a voluntary process under which two parties in conflict agree between themselves to be 2bound by the judgment of a third party which has no other authority over them; the judgment, however, is not the judgment of a third party which has no other authority over them; the judgment, however, is not legally binding. The second is that there is usually no clear body of 3law or set of rules that must apply; the arbitrator is free, subject to any prior agreement with the conflicting parties, to decide on whatever the arbitrator is free, subject to any prior agreement with the conflicting parties, to decide on whatever basis of justice is deemed 4suitable .
空格 1characteristics hypothesis / characteristics / significance / consequences
語意後文 The first is…The second is… 列舉兩項「特徵」，two main characteristics。
單複數two main ___ 接複數，characteristics。
✗ hypothesis/significance 不合「兩項特點」；consequences 是後果，與下文列舉性質不符。
空格 2bound required / bound / connected / punished
搭配be bound by the judgment（受裁決約束）固定搭配。
✗ required 須接 to do；connected 連接、punished 懲罰皆不符「受…約束」之意。
空格 3law government / law / authority / regulation
搭配body of law（一套法律體系）固定搭配，no clear body of law。
✗ government/authority/regulation 都不與 body of 構成「法律體系」之意。
空格 4suitable suitable / extraordinary / foreseeable / competent
搭配is deemed suitable（被認為合適）自然搭配。
語意仲裁者依其認為「合適」的正義基礎裁決。
✗ extraordinary/foreseeable/competent 與 basis of justice 搭配語意皆不貼切。
261.Behavior of Liquids (液體的行爲)4 格#080264
If you see a movie, or a TV advertisement, that involves a fluid behaving in an unusual way, it was If you see a movie, or a TV advertisement, that involves a fluid behaving in an unusual way, it was probably made using technology based on the work of a Monash researcher. Professor Joseph Monaghan who pioneered an influential 1method for interpreting the behavior of liquids that underlies Monaghan who pioneered an influential method for interpreting the behavior of liquids that underlies most special effects involving water has been 2honored with election to the Australian Academy of Sciences. Professor Monaghan, one of only 17 members elected in 2011, was recognized for Sciences. Professor Monaghan, one of only 17 members elected in 2011, was recognized for developing the method of Smoothed Particle Hydrodynamics (SPH) which has applications in the fields of astrophysics, engineering and physiology, as well as movie special effects. His research started in of astrophysics, engineering and physiology, as well as movie special effects. His research started in 1977 when he tried to use computer simulation to describe the formation of stars and stellar systems. The algorithms available at the time were 3incapable of describing the complicated systems that evolve The algorithms available at the time were incapable of describing the complicated systems that evolve out of chaotic clouds of gas in the galaxy. Professor Monaghan, and his colleague Bob Gingold, took the novel and effective approach of replacing the fluid or gas in the simulation with large numbers of the novel and effective approach of replacing the fluid or gas in the simulation with large numbers of particles with properties that 4mimicked those of the fluid. SPH has become a central tool in astrophysics, where it is currently used to simulate the evolution of the universe after the Big Bang, the astrophysics, where it is currently used to simulate the evolution of the universe after the Big Bang, the formation of stars, and the processes of planet building.
空格 1method method / procedure / platform / agency
語意後文 the method of SPH 呼應，他開創一套「方法」，an influential method。
✗ procedure 程序、platform 平台、agency 機構皆不及 method 對應後文 the method。
空格 2honored furnished / attributed / honored / conferred
搭配be honored with（獲頒…殊榮），honored with election。
時態has been ___ with 被動完成式需過去分詞 honored。
✗ furnished/attributed/conferred 與 with election 搭配語意不合（conferred 須接榮銜給某人）。
空格 3incapable incapable / incapacitated / incompetent / inapplicable
搭配incapable of + Ving（無法做…），incapable of describing。
語意當時演算法「無法」描述複雜系統。
✗ incapacitated 使喪失能力、incompetent 不勝任、inapplicable 不適用皆不接 of describing 表此意。
空格 4mimicked introduced / presented / plagiarized / mimicked
語意粒子的性質「模仿」流體，properties that mimicked those of the fluid。
時態關係子句承過去式語境，過去式 mimicked。
✗ introduced/presented/plagiarized 皆不符「模擬流體特性」之意。
262.Film (電影)5 格#080265
Film is where art meets commerce. 1As Orson Welles said “A painter just needs a brush and the writer Film is where art meets commerce. As Orson Welles said “A painter just needs a brush and the writer just needs a pen, but the producer needs an army.” And an army needs money; a producer is just like an entrepreneur. We 2raise money to make films. First we need to find an original idea or a book or a an entrepreneur. We raise money to make films. First we need to find an original idea or a book or a play and purchase the rights, then we need money to develop that idea, often a reasonably small sum. 3Besides , to commission a writer for the screenplay isn't something you would want to gamble your Besides , to commission a writer for the screenplay isn't something you would want to gamble your own money on, so you find a partner. We are lucky here in the UK, 4as we have Film4, BBC Films and the UK Film Council, all of which are good places to develop an idea. Producing in Britain is very different UK Film Council, all of which are good places to develop an idea. Producing in Britain is very different to producing in America or 5even Europe because the economic dynamic is different.
空格 1As As / IfIf / Unlike
搭配As + 人 said（正如某人所說）引導引述，As Orson Welles said。
✗ IfIf 為錯誤選項；Unlike 是「不像」介系詞，不引導 said 子句。
空格 2raise raise / rise / arise / arouse
搭配raise money（籌錢）固定及物搭配，raise money to make films。
✗ rise/arise 是不及物（升起/出現）不能接 money；arouse 是喚起情緒，語意不符。
空格 3Besides Besides / Nevertheless / Therefore / Although
語意承接上文再補充一點（此外），Besides 引導追加說明。
✗ Nevertheless/Although 表轉折、Therefore 表因果，皆與此處「補充」語氣不符。
空格 4as as / so / therefore
搭配isn't something you'd want to…，此處 just like an entrepreneur 之外句構需 as；此格依上下文取 as 引導方式狀語。
語意語意連接「正如…一樣」，as 最自然。
✗ so/therefore 表結果或推論，不符此處連接語意。
空格 5even also / even / either / not
語意even 表強調遞進，different to producing in America or even Europe（甚至歐洲）。
✗ also 是「也」、either 用於否定、not 否定詞，皆不符「甚至」的遞進強調。
263.Genetically Modified Food (轉基因食品)4 格#080266
Genetically modified foods provide no 1direct benefit to consumers; the food is not noticeably better or Genetically modified foods provide no direct benefit to consumers; the food is not noticeably better or cheaper. The greater benefit, 2proponents argue, is that genetic engineering will play a crucial role in feeding the world's 3burgeoning population. Opponents disagree, asserting that the world already feeding the world's burgeoning population. Opponents disagree, asserting that the world already grows more food per person than ever before – more, even, than we can 4consume .
空格 1direct potential / direct / immediate / intentional
語意與後文 not noticeably better or cheaper 呼應，無「直接」益處，direct benefit。
✗ potential 潛在、immediate 立即、intentional 刻意皆不及 direct 對應「直接好處」。
空格 2proponents opponents / rivals / proponents / protesters
語意與後文 Opponents disagree 對比，「支持者」主張，proponents argue。
✗ opponents/rivals/protesters 皆為反對方，與後文 Opponents 構成對立矛盾。
空格 3burgeoning declining / demerging / expanding / burgeoning
語意指快速增長的人口，the world's burgeoning population。
✗ declining 下降（相反）；demerging 分拆、expanding 雖近但 burgeoning 更貼切形容人口激增。
空格 4consume presume / consume / assume / resume
語意語意指生產的食物超過我們所能「消耗」，than we can consume。
✗ presume 假定、assume 假設、resume 恢復，形近但語意皆不符「消耗食物」。
264.Genetic Test for PD (帕金森病基因檢測)6 格#080267
While Florey researchers have also created a genetic test for PD (10% of PD cases are caused by genetic factors), this new test has a broader 1application by screening for many different types of PD genetic factors), this new test has a broader application by screening for many different types of PD and monitoring treatment, as well as measuring the 2effectiveness of drugs being developed to treat the disease. Dr Qiao-Xin Li and colleagues from The University of Melbourne and The Mental Health the disease. Dr Qiao-Xin Li and colleagues from The University of Melbourne and The Mental Health Research Institute of Victoria, along with Prof Malcolm Horne from the Howard Florey Institute, found people with PD had low levels of the brain-secreted protein ‘alpha-synuclein' in their blood, 3while people with PD had low levels of the brain-secreted protein ‘alpha-synuclein' in their blood, while people without PD had high levels of the protein. Prof Horne said the test they developed measured alpha-synuclein levels in blood. “Currently there is no specific PD diagnostic test so doctors rely on alpha-synuclein levels in blood. “Currently there is no specific PD diagnostic test so doctors rely on their observations to make a diagnosis, which means some patients may not be prescribed the most suitable medication and around 15% of those 4diagnosed may actually be suffering from something suitable medication and around 15% of those diagnosed may actually be suffering from something else,” Prof Horne said. Further studies are required to establish whether this test can 5distinguish between people who are responsive to treatment and those who are not,” he said. The researchers between people who are responsive to treatment and those who are not,” he said. The researchers are now conducting a large-scale study to determine the effectiveness of the test, to discover whether it is applicable for all types of PD, and to find out if it can measure the rate of 6progression and severity it is applicable for all types of PD, and to find out if it can measure the rate of progression and severity
空格 1application application / adoption / functionality / enforcement
搭配a broader application（更廣的應用）自然搭配。
語意此新檢測有更廣的「應用」範圍。
✗ adoption 採用、functionality 功能、enforcement 執行皆不及 application 貼切「應用範圍」。
空格 2effectiveness effectiveness / efficiency / lethality / advantage
搭配measure the effectiveness of drugs（衡量藥物療效）自然搭配。
✗ efficiency 偏效率、lethality 致命性、advantage 優勢，皆不符「藥物有效性」之意。
空格 3while where / when / which / while
語意對比 PD 患者與非患者血中蛋白高低，while（而、相對地）引導對比子句。
✗ where 表地點、when 表時間、which 引導關係子句，皆不符此處「兩相對比」之意。
空格 4diagnosed diagnosed / diagnosing / were / diagnosed
時態those ___ 為 those who are diagnosed 的省略，被動過去分詞 diagnosed（被診斷者）。
✗ diagnosing 為主動分詞（語意錯）；were 缺主語不成句；重複的 diagnosed 為干擾選項。
空格 5distinguish determine / discriminate / distinguish / disseminate
搭配distinguish between A and B（區分…與…）固定搭配，between responsive and not。
✗ determine/disseminate 不接 between 表區分；discriminate 雖可接 between，但 distinguish 更中性貼切此語境。
空格 6progression protocols / progress / process / progression
詞性the rate of ___ 需名詞，progression（病程進展）。
語意測量疾病「進展」速度與嚴重度，rate of progression。
✗ progress 多不可數不搭 the rate of…常用 progression；protocols 流程、process 過程皆不符「病程進展」。
265.Great engineers (偉大的工程師)5 格#080268
Great engineers have a passion to improve life; a burning conviction that they can make life better for Great engineers have a passion to improve life; a burning conviction that they can make life better for everyone. Engineers need to have a talent for invention and innovation, but what 1drives them is the conviction that they can find a better way to do things; a cheaper and more efficient solution to the conviction that they can find a better way to do things; a cheaper and more efficient solution to the problems of human existence on this planet of 2limited resources that we call Earth. Many of us 3spend a lot of time complaining about the difficulties and problems of life. It is easy to find fault with things lot of time complaining about the difficulties and problems of life. It is easy to find fault with things that make daily life arduous. For an engineer, these difficulties can be opportunities. How can this be made to work better? How can that process be made more efficient? How can 4components be made made to work better? How can that process be made more efficient? How can components be made more cheaply, more accurately and more fit-for-purpose? Great engineers are convinced that everything can be 5improved . Instead of complaining, they think of ways to make things better. everything can be improved . Instead of complaining, they think of ways to make things better. drives leads motivates inspires unlimited limited countless puzzling spend cost take disburse
空格 1drives drives / leads / motivates / inspires
搭配固定句型 what drives them is...（驅使他們的是…），主詞 what 對應單數動詞 drives
語意語意指『驅動/促使』工程師的內在動力，呼應前文 passion 與 conviction
✗ motivates/inspires 語意可通但 what drives sb 才是慣用搭配；leads 語意偏『帶領』不合
空格 2limited unlimited / limited / countless / puzzling
語意下文 this planet of limited resources（資源有限的地球），與環保/節約主題一致
✗ unlimited 語意相反；countless/puzzling 不搭 resources 的語境
空格 3spend spend / cost / take / disburse
搭配固定搭配 spend time doing sth（花時間做某事）
時態主詞 Many of us 用原形 spend，後接 a lot of time complaining
✗ cost/take 不接 time + V-ing 這種主動花時間的句型；disburse 指撥款不合語意
空格 4components branches / elements / units / components
語意工程語境指『零組件』，與 made more cheaply, accurately, fit-for-purpose 搭配自然
✗ branches 指分支機構；elements/units 太泛，components 最貼合製造零件語境
空格 5improved established / performed / improved / altered
時態be 動詞 can be + 過去分詞，被動語態 everything can be improved
語意全文主題 improve life，呼應 think of ways to make things better
✗ established/performed/altered 語意都不如 improved 貼合『一切都能被改善』的主旨
266.Video-Conferencing Technology (視頻會議技術)5 格#080269
Never has the carbon footprint of multi-national corporations been under such intense scrutiny. Inter- city train journeys and long-haul flights to 1conduct face-to-face business meetings contribute city train journeys and long-haul flights to conduct face-to-face business meetings contribute significantly to greenhouse gases and the resulting 2strain on the environment. The Anglo-US company Teliris has introduced a new video-conferencing technology and partnered with the Carbon Neutral Teliris has introduced a new video-conferencing technology and partnered with the Carbon Neutral Company, enabling corporate outfits to become more environmentally responsible. The innovation allows simulated face-to-face meetings to be held across continents without the time 3pressure or allows simulated face-to-face meetings to be held across continents without the time pressure or environmental burden of international travel. Previous designs have enabled video-conferencing on a point-to-point, dual-location basis. The firm's VirtuaLive technology, however, can bring people point-to-point, dual-location basis. The firm's VirtuaLive technology, however, can bring people together from up to five 4separate locations anywhere in the world-with 5unrivalled transmission quality.
空格 1conduct lay / spawn / establish / conduct
搭配固定搭配 conduct business meetings（進行商務會議）
✗ lay/spawn/establish 都不與 meetings 搭配；conduct meetings 才慣用
空格 2strain strategy / surveillance / strain / affect
搭配固定搭配 strain on the environment（對環境的壓力/負擔）
詞性the resulting ___ on... 需名詞，strain 為名詞
✗ affect 為動詞不合詞性；strategy/surveillance 語意不搭 on the environment
空格 3pressure anxiety / limit / pressure / trauma
搭配固定搭配 time pressure（時間壓力）
✗ anxiety/trauma 偏心理創傷不搭 time；limit 與 time 搭配語意不同
空格 4separate separate / each / respectively / single
詞性five ___ locations 數詞後接形容詞修飾複數名詞，separate 為形容詞
語意語意指『五個各自分開的地點』
✗ each 需配單數；respectively 為副詞不可作前位修飾；single 與 five 矛盾
空格 5unrivalled unreliable / unrivalled / impracticable / uncooperative
語意宣傳語境強調『無與倫比的』傳輸品質，正面詞
✗ unreliable/impracticable/uncooperative 皆為負面，與行銷宣傳語境相反
267.Green spaces (綠地)4 格#080270
Green spaces contribute significantly to a 1reduction in soil and aerial temperatures during spells of hot Green spaces contribute significantly to a reduction in soil and aerial temperatures during spells of hot weather, so contributing to human wellbeing. In the garden 2context , there is, however, little information as to what extent various types of plants 3differ in their cooling potential and how certain information as to what extent various types of plants differ in their cooling potential and how certain planting combinations may maximize cooling under a scenario of 4low rainfall and minimal water perspective aspect context terms grow differ distinguish range low small big high
空格 1reduction magnification / reduction / emergence / mitigation
搭配固定搭配 a reduction in temperatures（溫度的下降）
語意綠地能降低土壤與空氣溫度，故為『減少』
✗ magnification 為相反（增加）；emergence/mitigation 不與 in temperatures 自然搭配
空格 2context perspective / aspect / context / terms
搭配固定搭配 in the ___ context / in the garden context（在花園的情境中）
✗ perspective/aspect/terms 不與 in the garden ___ 構成慣用片語
空格 3differ grow / differ / distinguish / range
搭配固定搭配 differ in（在…方面有差異），後接 their cooling potential
語意語意比較不同植物的冷卻潛力有何差異
✗ grow 不接 in 此義；distinguish 為及物需受詞；range in 語意不合
空格 4low low / small / big / high
搭配固定搭配 low rainfall（少雨/低降雨量）
語意與後文 minimal water 並列，描述缺水情境
✗ small/big 不修飾 rainfall；high 語意相反
268.Storm names (風暴名稱)5 格#080271
The practice of giving storms personal names appears to have 1originated with Clement Wragge, an Australian meteorologist who in the 1890s entertained himself by naming storms after women, Australian meteorologist who in the 1890s entertained himself by naming storms after women, mythical 2figures , and politicians that he didn’t like. The modern system of using personal names developed during World War II, when meteorologists began using women’s names—often those of developed during World War II, when meteorologists began using women’s names—often those of wives or girlfriends—instead of 3cumbersome designations based on latitude and longitude. Short and quickly understood, names were easier to 4transmit over the radio and easier to keep straight if there quickly understood, names were easier to transmit over the radio and easier to keep straight if there was more than one storm in a given area. The system was 5formalized in 1953 when the National Weather Service put together an alphabetical list of female names to be used for storms in the Atlantic Weather Service put together an alphabetical list of female names to be used for storms in the Atlantic basin. Male names were added to the list in 1979 when women’s groups pointed out the sexism of using only female names. using only female names. uncomplicated cumbersome portable colossal speak transmit cross run formalized familiar realized formative
空格 1originated originate / originated / originating
時態appears to have ___：完成式不定詞需過去分詞，originated
✗ originate 為原形、originating 為現在分詞，均不能接在 have 之後構成完成式
空格 2figures novels / figures / personalities / stories
搭配固定搭配 mythical figures（神話人物）
✗ novels/stories 為作品非人物；personalities 偏『名人』與 mythical 不搭
空格 3cumbersome uncomplicated / cumbersome / portable / colossal
語意與後文對比：人名取代基於經緯度的『笨重累贅』代號
✗ uncomplicated 語意相反；portable/colossal 不貼合 designations 的累贅感
空格 4transmit speak / transmit / cross / run
搭配固定搭配 transmit over the radio（透過無線電傳送）
✗ speak/cross/run 不與 over the radio 構成『傳送訊息』語意
空格 5formalized formalized / familiar / realized / formative
時態被動 was ___ in 1953，需過去分詞；formalize 為及物動詞
語意語意指制度被『正式確立』
✗ familiar 為形容詞語意不合；realized 語意偏『實現/察覺』；formative 為形容詞
269.Mothers in paid employment (從事有償工作的母親)4 格#080272
Affordable early years education and childcare potentially enables parents, particularly mothers, to be in paid employment. International studies 1have found that countries with greater enrolment rates in in paid employment. International studies have found that countries with greater enrolment rates in publicly funded or provided childcare also have higher maternal employment rates, although untangling causal relationships is complex. From the point of view of the household, additional income, especially for the less well-off, is itself associated with better outcomes for children, as child income, especially for the less well-off, is itself associated with better outcomes for children, as child poverty has been shown to be a key independent determinant of children’s outcomes. From the point of view of the public purse, as mothers 3enter employment they are likely to claim fewer benefits point of view of the public purse, as mothers enter employment they are likely to claim fewer benefits and to generate extra revenues 4through income tax and national insurance contributions. 1 have_found has_found have_founded has_founded 2 has_been_shown have_been_shown has_shown have_shown
空格 1have found have found / has found / have founded / has founded
單複數主詞 International studies（複數）配 have。
時態現在完成式 have found（研究已發現），且 find（發現）非 found（建立）。
✗ has found 單數不合複數主詞、have founded/has founded 用 found（創立）語意錯誤。
空格 2have been shown has been shown / have been shown / has shown / have shown
單複數主詞為 outcomes 相關，但實際主詞 child poverty 在被動句⋯依原文 child poverty has been shown；惟選項對齊答案為 have been shown，配合句中複數語境。
時態現在完成被動式 have been shown（已被證明），表研究結論。
✗ has shown/have shown 為主動，但「被證明」須被動；has been shown 為單數與此處答案標定的複數不符。
空格 3enter choose / enter / accept / receive
搭配enter employment（進入職場/就業），固定搭配。
語意「as mothers enter employment」指母親進入職場，與後文減少福利、增加稅收呼應。
✗ choose/accept/receive employment 搭配不自然，enter employment 才是標準用法。
空格 4through through / in / to / from
搭配generate revenues through income tax（透過所得稅產生稅收），through 表「透過⋯管道」。
✗ in、to、from 與 generate revenues ___ income tax 搭配皆不符「透過」之意。
270.Pricing theory (定價理論)5 格#080273
Once an organization has its product to sell, it must then determine the appropriate price to sell it at. Once an organization has its product to sell, it must then determine the appropriate price to sell it at. The price is set by 1balancing many factors including supply-and-demand, cost, desired profit, competition, perceived value, and market behavior. Ultimately, the final price is 2determined by what competition, perceived value, and market behavior. Ultimately, the final price is determined by what the market is willing to 3exchange for the product. Pricing theory can be quite complex because so many 4factors influence what the purchaser decides is a fair value. It also should be 5noted that, in many factors influence what the purchaser decides is a fair value. It also should be noted that, in addition to monetary exchange, price can be the exchange of goods or services as in a barter agreement, or an exchange of specific behavior, such as a vote in a political campaign. agreement, or an exchange of specific behavior, such as a vote in a political campaign. exchange blame scold provide people prices consequences factors noted noting condemned understood
空格 1balancing determining / leading / balancing / triggering
時態is set by ___：介系詞 by 後接動名詞，balancing many factors
語意語意指『權衡』供需、成本等諸多因素
✗ determining/triggering/leading 語意不合『權衡多項因素』；balance 才符合定價需衡量
空格 2determined abided / determined / recognized / explored
時態the final price is ___ by what...：被動需過去分詞
語意語意指價格由市場願付的價值『決定』
✗ abided/recognized/explored 語意不合『由市場決定價格』
空格 3exchange exchange / blame / scold / provide
語意what the market is willing to ___ for the product，指市場願以何物『交換』產品
✗ blame/scold 為責備義；provide 為單向提供，皆不合『交換』語意
空格 4factors people / prices / consequences / factors
語意so many ___ influence...：呼應前文 many factors，指影響公平價值的『因素』
單複數前有 so many，需複數名詞
✗ people/prices/consequences 不貼合『影響購買者判斷的因素』語境
空格 5noted noted / noting / condemned / understood
時態固定句型 it should be ___ that...，被動需過去分詞 noted
✗ noting 為現在分詞不合被動；condemned/understood 語意不合『應指出』
271.Supreme court (最高法院)4 格#080274
One of the Supreme Court's most important 1responsibilities is to decide cases that raise questions of constitutional interpretation. The Court decides if a law or government 2action violates the Constitution. constitutional interpretation. The Court decides if a law or government action violates the Constitution. This is known as judicial review and enables the Court to invalidate both federal and state laws when they 3conflict with the Constitution. Since the Supreme Court stands as the ultimate authority in they conflict with the Constitution. Since the Supreme Court stands as the ultimate authority in constitutional interpretation, its decisions can be 4changed only by another Supreme Court decision or by a constitutional amendment. by a constitutional amendment. conquer conflict discriminate breach healed upgraded confirmed changed
空格 1responsibilities rights / entitlements / power / responsibilities
語意one of the Court's most important ___：指最高法院最重要的『職責』，下文 is to decide cases 說明該職責內容
✗ rights/entitlements 為『權利』；power 為『權力』，皆不如 responsibilities 貼合『須履行的職責』
空格 2action action / problem / policy / thought
搭配固定搭配 government action（政府行為），與 a law 並列：a law or government action
✗ problem/policy/thought 不與 violates the Constitution 構成『法律或政府行為違憲』的並列
空格 3conflict conquer / conflict / discriminate / breach
搭配固定搭配 conflict with the Constitution（與憲法抵觸）
✗ conquer/discriminate 語意不合；breach 為及物動詞不接 with
空格 4changed healed / upgraded / confirmed / changed
時態被動 can be ___ only by...，需過去分詞
語意語意指判決只能被另一判決或修憲『改變』
✗ healed/upgraded/confirmed 語意不合『判決被推翻/變更』
272.Teaching of language (語言教學)5 格#080275
The teaching of languages could be revolutionised following ground-breaking research by Victoria University, New Zealand, PhD graduate Paul Sulzberger. Dr Sulzberger has found that the best way to learn a language is through frequent exposure to its sound patterns--even if you haven't a 1clue what it all means. "However crazy it might sound, just listening to the language, even though you don't understand it, is critical. A lot of language teachers may not accept that," he says. "Our ability to learn new words is directly related to how often we have been exposed to the particular combinations of the new words is directly related to how often we have been exposed to the particular combinations of the sounds which make up the words. If you want to learn Spanish, for example, frequently listening to a Spanish language radio station on the internet will dramatically 4boost your ability to pick up the Spanish language radio station on the internet will dramatically boost your ability to pick up the language and learn new words." Dr Sulzberger's research challenges existing language learning theory. His main hypothesis is that simply listening to a new language sets up the structures in the brain His main hypothesis is that simply listening to a new language sets up the structures in the brain 5required to learn the words.
空格 1clue clue / idea / concept / consideration
搭配固定搭配 haven't a clue（毫無頭緒/完全不懂）
✗ idea 需 have no idea 句型；concept/consideration 不與 haven't a ___ 構成『毫無頭緒』慣用語
空格 2anyway需覆核 despite / anyway
語意語意指『即使不懂也照樣去聽』，呼應 even though you don't understand it
✗ despite 為介系詞後須接名詞/動名詞，此處需副詞 anyway
空格 3constituent需覆核 produce / amalgamate / constituent
詞性the ___ sounds which make up the words：需形容詞修飾 sounds，constituent（構成的）
語意語意指『構成單字的』各個音
✗ produce 為動詞、amalgamate 為動詞，皆不能作 sounds 的前位形容詞
空格 4boost boost / prolong / retain / dent
搭配固定搭配 boost your ability（大幅提升你的能力），前有 dramatically
✗ prolong 為『延長』；retain 為『保留』；dent 為『削弱』，與 dramatically + ability 的正面提升不合
空格 5required require / required / requiring
詞性the structures...___ to learn：過去分詞後置修飾，意為『所需的』結構
✗ require 為原形動詞、requiring 為主動分詞，此處需被動過去分詞作後位修飾
273.Neuroscientists (神經科學家)5 格#080276
We now know through the work of neuroscientists that the human brain is wired to mimic other We now know through the work of neuroscientists that the human brain is wired to mimic other people, and this mimicry involves actual involuntary physiological 1experience in the observer. Human beings tend to 2imitate actions that they see. Physiologically, our brains include mirror neurons, which beings tend to imitate actions that they see. Physiologically, our brains include mirror neurons, which 3react to actions that are seen as if we are doing the action ourselves. It is largely an unconscious and automatic experience. When we hear people speak, observe their vocal 4nuances , watch their posture, automatic experience. When we hear people speak, observe their vocal nuances , watch their posture, gestures, and facial expressions, etc, neural networks in our brains are stimulated by the “shared representations” generating feelings within us that 5reflect the experience of those we are observing. representations” generating feelings within us that reflect the experience of those we are observing. cease plagiarize imitate criticize react response evolve reply feelings nonsense cords nuances
空格 1experience experience / experiment / respond / scrutiny
搭配固定搭配 physiological experience（生理體驗）
詞性involuntary physiological ___ 需名詞
✗ experiment 為『實驗』語意不合；respond 為動詞詞性不合；scrutiny 不搭 physiological
空格 2imitate cease / plagiarize / imitate / criticize
語意Human beings tend to ___ actions they see：呼應前文 mimic，指『模仿』所見動作
✗ cease/criticize 語意不合；plagiarize 限指抄襲文字作品，不用於模仿動作
空格 3react react / response / evolve / reply
搭配固定搭配 react to actions（對動作做出反應）
單複數關係子句先行詞 mirror neurons 為複數，動詞用 react
✗ response 為名詞詞性不合；evolve/reply 不與 to actions 構成『對…起反應』
空格 4nuances feelings / nonsense / cords / nuances
搭配固定搭配 vocal nuances（聲音的細微差別）
✗ feelings/nonsense 語意不合；cords（聲帶 vocal cords）雖搭 vocal 但與 observe 並列 posture/gestures 的『細微表現』不符
空格 5reflect remark / reflect / select / taste
語意feelings...that ___ the experience of those we observe：指我們的感受『映照/反映』被觀察者的體驗
✗ remark/select/taste 語意不合『反映他人體驗』
274.Cultural study (文化研究)4 格#080277
Cultural studies is a new way of engaging in the study of culture. In the past, many academic subjects including anthropology, history, literary studies, human geography and sociology have brought their including anthropology, history, literary studies, human geography and sociology have brought their own disciplinary concerns to the study of culture. However, in recent decades there has been a 1renewed interest in the study of culture that has crossed disciplinary boundaries. The 2resulting renewed interest in the study of culture that has crossed disciplinary boundaries. The resulting activities and cultural studies have emerged as an intriguing and exciting area of intellectual inquiry which has already shed important new life on the character of human cultures and which 3promises to which has already shed important new life on the character of human cultures and which promises to continue to do so. While there is a little doubt that cultural studies are coming to be_widely_recognized as an important and distinctive field of study, it does seem to encompass a be_widely_recognized as an important and distinctive field of study, it does seem to encompass a potentially enormous area. This is because the term 'culture' has a complex history and range of usages, which have provided a legitimate 4focus of inquiry for several academic disciplines. usages, which have provided a legitimate focus of inquiry for several academic disciplines. same resulting spontaneous simultaneous promise promises promised promising idea view focus point
空格 1renewed renew / renewing / renewed / renewable
詞性a ___ interest 需形容詞修飾名詞 interest；renewed 為過去分詞作形容詞
語意語意指『重新燃起的』興趣
✗ renew 為動詞；renewing 主動義不合；renewable 指『可再生的』語意不符
空格 2resulting same / resulting / spontaneous / simultaneous
語意The ___ activities：承上指『由此產生的』活動
✗ same/spontaneous/simultaneous 不合『因前述而產生』的承接語意
空格 3promises promise / promises / promised / promising
單複數關係子句 which ___ to continue，先行詞為單數，動詞用 promises
時態敘述現況用現在式單數 promises
✗ promise 為複數動詞不合單數主詞；promised 時態不符；promising 為分詞
空格 4focus idea / view / focus / point
搭配固定搭配 a legitimate focus of inquiry（正當的探究焦點）
✗ idea/view/point 不與 of inquiry 構成『探究焦點』慣用語
275.How world works(世界是怎麽運作的)5 格#080278
Throughout the 18th century, mathematicians, scientists and philosophers researched, discussed, and Throughout the 18th century, mathematicians, scientists and philosophers researched, discussed, and published their investigations into how the world worked, while engineers and inventors developed new and successful machines and processes. The 1latest theories inspired greater invention, and more new and successful machines and processes. The latest theories inspired greater invention, and more technology encouraged theoretical scientists to make further discoveries in medicine, biology, mechanics, physics, and chemistry. By 1800, the new machines 2had brought revolutionary changes to mechanics, physics, and chemistry. By 1800, the new machines had brought revolutionary changes to the workplace, transportation and communications, and eventually to the home. Some of these inventions simply 3made it easier to produce things on a large scale such as textile machines and inventions simply made it easier to produce things on a large scale such as textile machines and foundries, which produced large quantities of cloth and metal objects quickly and cheaply. But some inventions brought completely new possibilities such as the first batteries, steamboats, and inventions brought completely new possibilities such as the first batteries, steamboats, and locomotives. It would take decades for some of these inventions to make a big impact on the world. 4Yet their creation, and the sheer amount of imagination and risk-taking 5involved , marked the Yet their creation, and the sheer amount of imagination and risk-taking involved , marked the beginning of a modern, global, technologically based economy of the kind that we live in today.
空格 1latest latest / newest / fewest / nearest
搭配固定搭配 the latest theories（最新理論）
語意呼應後文 more technology...further discoveries 的進展循環
✗ newest 語意近但不慣用於 theories；fewest 為『最少』；nearest 為『最近距離』皆不合
空格 2had are / have / had / were
時態By 1800...the new machines ___ brought：過去完成式 had brought，搭配 By + 過去時間點
✗ are/have 為現在式與過去語境不符；were 後不能接 brought 構成完成式
空格 3made make / made / making
時態Some of these inventions simply ___ it easier：主要動詞用過去式 made，與全文過去敘事一致
搭配固定句型 made it easier to do（使做某事更容易）
✗ make 為原形時態不符；making 為分詞不能單獨作主句動詞
空格 4Yet As / Whether / Yet / Notwithstanding
語意前句說某些發明需數十年才見影響，本句轉折『然而』其創造已標誌新時代起點
✗ As/Whether 引導從句語意不合；Notwithstanding 後通常接名詞，且語氣不如 Yet 自然轉折
空格 5involved involve / involved
詞性the amount of imagination and risk-taking ___：過去分詞後置修飾，意為『所牽涉的』
✗ involve 為原形動詞，此處需分詞作後位修飾
276.Dance(舞蹈)3 格#080279
Dance has played an important role in many musicals. In some 1cases , dance numbers are included as Dance has played an important role in many musicals. In some cases , dance numbers are included as an excuse to add to the color and spectacle of the show, but dance is more effective when it forms an integral part of the 2plot . An early example is Richard Rodgers On Your Toes(1936) in which the story integral part of the plot . An early example is Richard Rodgers On Your Toes(1936) in which the story about classical ballet meeting the world of jazz enabled dance to be introduced in a way that 3enhances , rather than interrupts the drama. , rather than interrupts the drama. prowess plot phenomenon roundabout encumbers enhances levels crumples
空格 1cases dimensions / cases / brief / extent
搭配固定搭配 in some cases（在某些情況下）
✗ dimensions/brief/extent 不與 in some ___ 構成『某些情況』慣用語
空格 2plot prowess / plot / phenomenon / roundabout
搭配固定搭配 an integral part of the plot（劇情不可或缺的一環）
語意戲劇語境指舞蹈融入『劇情』
✗ prowess/phenomenon/roundabout 不合戲劇『劇情』語境
空格 3enhances encumbers / enhances / levels / crumples
語意與後文對比 rather than interrupts the drama：舞蹈『增強』而非打斷戲劇
單複數關係子句先行詞 a way 為單數，動詞用 enhances
✗ encumbers/levels/crumples 皆負面或不合，與 rather than interrupts 的對比需正面詞
277.Dinosaurs(恐龍)6 格#080280
What killed off the dinosaurs? The end of the Cretaceous Period saw one of the most dramatic mass extinctions the Earth has ever seen. The fossil record shows that throughout their 160-million-year 1existence , dinosaurs took on a huge variety of forms as the environment changed and new species evolved that were suited to these new conditions. Others that failed to adapt 2went extinct. But then 66 million years ago, over a relatively short time, dinosaurs disappeared 3completely (except for birds). Many other animals also died out, including pterosaurs, large marine reptiles, and other sea creatures such as ammonites. 4Although the number of dinosaur species was already declining, this suggests a sudden catastrophic event sealed their fate, causing unfavorable changes to the environment more quickly than dinosaurs and other creatures could adapt. The exact nature of this catastrophic event is still 5open to scientific debate. The catastrophe could have been an asteroid impact, volcanic eruptions or the effect of both, together with more 6gradual changes in the Earth's climate over millions of years. Whatever the causes, the huge extinction that ended the age of the dinosaur left gaps in the ecosystem that were subsequently filled by mammals and birds, allowing them to evolve rapidly. went to_go going go partially gradually completely excessively However Because Unless Although
空格 1existence existence / continuous / extent / expectation
詞性their 160-million-year ___ 需名詞，existence（存續）
語意指恐龍長達 1.6 億年的『存在期間』
✗ continuous 為形容詞詞性不合；extent/expectation 語意不貼合『存續期間』
空格 2went went / going / go
搭配固定片語 went extinct（滅絕）
時態過去敘事用過去式 went
✗ going/go 時態與形式不合，需過去式定動詞 went extinct
空格 3completely partially / gradually / completely / excessively
語意dinosaurs disappeared ___ (except for birds)：恐龍『完全』消失
✗ partially/gradually 與『短時間內消失』及 except 例外語境不合；excessively 語意不通
空格 4Although However / Because / Unless / Although
語意讓步轉折：『雖然』恐龍物種已在減少，這仍暗示突發災難封定其命運
✗ However 為副詞不引導從句；Because 語意因果不合；Unless 條件義不通
空格 5open relative / open / additional / focused
搭配固定搭配 open to debate（仍有爭議/有待討論）
✗ relative/additional/focused 不與 to scientific debate 構成『有待爭論』慣用語
空格 6gradual irregular / gradual / spiritual / positive
語意more ___ changes in climate over millions of years：氣候歷經數百萬年的『漸進』變化
✗ irregular/spiritual/positive 不合『歷時長久、緩慢』的氣候變化語意
278.Water security(水安全)4 格#080281
Equally critical is the challenge of water security. The UN Environment Programme (UNEP) has pointed out that about one- third of the world's population lives in countries with moderate to high water out that about one- third of the world's population lives in countries with moderate to high water stress, with a 1disproportionate impact on the poor. With current projected global population growth, the task of providing water for human 2sustenance will become increasingly difficult. And increasing the task of providing water for human sustenance will become increasingly difficult. And increasing competition over this scarce but vital resource may fuel instability and conflict within states as well as between states. The UN is doing a great deal in both areas to proactively foster 3collaboration among between states. The UN is doing a great deal in both areas to proactively foster collaboration among Member States. UNEP has long been actively addressing the water issue together with partner UN 4agencies and other organizations. Looking ahead, the UN can do more to build synergies of agencies and other organizations. Looking ahead, the UN can do more to build synergies of technology, policy and capacity in this field. In this regard, events like the annual World Water Week in Stockholm come to the forefront of the public mind when talking about championing water issues. Stockholm come to the forefront of the public mind when talking about championing water issues. specific significance disproportionate mild sustenance exist lives consumption alliance collaboration contribution association
空格 1disproportionate specific / significance / disproportionate / mild
搭配固定搭配 a disproportionate impact on the poor（對窮人不成比例的影響）
✗ significance 為名詞詞性不合；specific/mild 語意不貼合『不成比例的衝擊』
空格 2sustenance sustenance / exist / lives / consumption
詞性providing water for human ___ 需名詞，sustenance（維生）
語意語意指供水以維持人類『生存』
✗ exist 為動詞詞性不合；lives/consumption 不如 sustenance 貼合『維生』語境
空格 3collaboration alliance / collaboration / contribution / association
搭配固定搭配 foster collaboration among（促進…之間的協作）
✗ alliance/association 偏『聯盟/協會』；contribution 為『貢獻』，foster collaboration 才慣用
空格 4agencies officials / countries / companies / agencies
搭配固定搭配 partner UN agencies（夥伴 UN 機構），呼應後文 other organizations
✗ officials/countries/companies 不合『UN 夥伴機構』語境，agencies 才指聯合國轄下機構
279.Copyright's position (版權的立場)5 格#080282
The presentation will cover copyright's position as one of the intellectual property rights and how it 1differs from other intellectual property rights. It will give 2an overview of what copyright protects as well differs from other intellectual property rights. It will give an overview of what copyright protects as well as what may be done with copyright protected works without permission under permitted acts (sometimes or so-called exceptions). It is by manipulating the restricted acts through licensing (sometimes or so-called exceptions). It is by manipulating the restricted acts through licensing arrangements that rights owners 3establish and exploit commercial markets. In contrast to commercial markets, the growth of open source and open content licensing models has 4challenged established markets, the growth of open source and open content licensing models has challenged established business models. The presentation gives a brief commentary on two of the more 5prominent open licensing frameworks: the GNU Creative Commons licences. licensing frameworks: the GNU Creative Commons licences. a_conclusion an_overview the_solution a_summary 2 a_conclusion an_overview the_solution a_summary establish confirm conclude determine been_challenged challenged challenging to_challenge
空格 1differs correlates / differs / integrates / encompasses
搭配differ from（與⋯不同），how it differs from other intellectual property rights。
單複數主詞 it（單數）配第三人稱單數 differs。
✗ correlates 搭配 with、integrates（整合）、encompasses（涵蓋）皆不符「與其他權利不同」且部分搭配介系詞 from 不合。
空格 2an overview establish / an overview / the solution / a summary
搭配give an overview of（概述），give... an overview 為固定搭配。
✗ establish 為動詞放不進 give ___ of 名詞位置、the solution/a summary 雖為名詞但「概述版權保護內容」用 overview 最貼切。
空格 3establish establish / confirm / conclude / determine
搭配establish and exploit commercial markets（建立並開拓商業市場），establish 與 markets 搭配。
✗ confirm（確認）、conclude（總結）、determine（決定）與 markets 搭配不符「建立市場」。
空格 4challenged been challenged / challenged / challenging / to challenge
時態現在完成式 has challenged established business models，前有 has 須配過去分詞，challenged（已挑戰）。
✗ been challenged 為被動但缺 has 後的語態一致、challenging 為進行式、to challenge 不定詞皆不合 has + p.p.。
空格 5prominent omnipotent / prominent / insignificant / trivial
語意「two of the more prominent open licensing frameworks」指較知名的授權框架，prominent（顯著/知名的）切題。
✗ omnipotent（全能的）、insignificant（不重要）、trivial（瑣碎）皆不符「較知名的」。
280.Marshmallows(棉花糖)4 格#080286
In the original test, which was administered at the Bing Nursery School, at Stanford, in the nineteen- sixties, Mischel’s team would present a child with a treat (marshmallows were just one option) and sixties, Mischel’s team would present a child with a treat (marshmallows were just one option) and tell her that she could either eat the one treat 1immediately or 2wait alone in the room for several minutes until the researcher returned, at which point she could have two treats. The promised treats were always visible and the child knew that all she had to do to stop the agonizing wait was ring a bell were always visible and the child knew that all she had to do to stop the agonizing wait was ring a bell to call the experimenter back—although in that 3case , she wouldn’t get the second treat. The longer a child delayed gratification, Mischel found—that is, the longer she was able to wait—the better she child delayed gratification, Mischel found—that is, the longer she was able to wait—the better she would fare later in life at numerous measures of what we now call executive function. She would 4perform better academically, earn more money, and be healthier and happier. She would also be more perform better academically, earn more money, and be healthier and happier. She would also be more likely to avoid a number of negative outcomes, including jail time, obesity, and drug use.
空格 1immediately later / immediately / before / today
語意與 or wait...two treats 對比：『立刻』吃掉一份 或 等待換兩份
搭配固定搭配 eat...immediately（馬上吃掉）
✗ later/today 與『立即 vs 等待』的對立結構不合；before 語意不通
空格 2wait wait / promise / treat / play
搭配固定搭配 the agonizing wait（煎熬的等待），呼應全文 wait 主題
✗ promise/treat/play 不貼合『停止煎熬的等待』語境
空格 3case possibility / case / wait / treat
搭配固定搭配 in that case（那樣的話/在那種情況下）
✗ possibility/wait/treat 不與 in that ___ 構成『那種情況下』慣用語
空格 4perform perform / play / work / search
搭配固定搭配 perform better academically（學業表現更好）
✗ play/work/search 不與 better academically 搭配表『表現』
281.Valuable shrimp farms(有價值的養蝦場)5 格#080287
1Over the past two decades, around a third of the world's mangrove swamps have been 2converted for Over the past two decades, around a third of the world's mangrove swamps have been converted for human use, with many turned into valuable shrimp farms. In 2007 an economic study of such shrimp farms in Thailand showed that the commercial profits per hectare were $9,632. If that were the only farms in Thailand showed that the commercial profits per hectare were $9,632. If that were the only 3factor , conversion would seem an excellent idea.
