However, proper 4accounting shows that for each hectare government subsidies formed $8,412 of this figure and there were costs, too: $1,000 for hectare government subsidies formed $8,412 of this figure and there were costs, too: $1,000 for pollution and $12,392 for losses to ecosystem services. These comprised damage to the supply of foods and medicines that people had taken from the forest, the loss of habitats for fish, and less foods and medicines that people had taken from the forest, the loss of habitats for fish, and less buffering against storms. And because a given shrimp farm only stays 5productive for three or four years, there was the additional cost of restoring them afterwards. years, there was the additional cost of restoring them afterwards. production cost factor price forecast accounting number prospect to_produce produce productive production
空格 1Over With / Over / Although / Under
搭配固定搭配 Over the past two decades（過去二十年來）
✗ With/Under 不與 the past...years 構成時間片語；Although 引導從句語意不合
空格 2converted converted / transmitted / transferred / translated
搭配固定搭配 converted for human use / converted into farms（轉作…用途）
✗ transmitted/transferred/translated 語意分別為傳送/轉移/翻譯，不合土地『轉作用途』
空格 3factor production / cost / factor / price
語意If that were the only ___：呼應後文 each hectare 的成本因素，指唯一『考量因素』
✗ production/cost/price 不如 factor 貼合『若那是唯一考量因素』的假設語意
空格 4accounting forecast / accounting / number / prospect
搭配固定搭配 proper accounting（妥當的會計核算），呼應後文補貼與成本的計算
✗ forecast/number/prospect 不貼合『核算成本與補貼』的會計語境
空格 5productive produce / productive / production
詞性stays ___：連綴動詞 stay 後接形容詞 productive（維持有生產力）
✗ produce 為動詞、production 為名詞，皆不能作 stay 的主詞補語
282.Automation(自動化)3 格#080288
As digitalisation and smart automation progress, many will see their jobs altered. Advances in automation technologies will mean that people will 1increasingly work side by side with robots, smart automation technologies will mean that people will increasingly work side by side with robots, smart automation and artificial intelligence. Businesses will look for employees who are good at the tasks that smart automation 2struggles to do and that add value to the use of smart automation. In the past, that smart automation struggles to do and that add value to the use of smart automation. In the past, technological progress has had a positive impact on our society, increasing labour productivity, wages and prosperity. Right now, a new technological wave of digitalisation and smart automation – and prosperity. Right now, a new technological wave of digitalisation and smart automation – 3combinations of artificial intelligence, robotics and other technologies - is fundamentally transforming the way we work, at an unprecedented pace. For example , data analytics, the Internet of Things and the way we work, at an unprecedented pace. For example , data analytics, the Internet of Things and drones are already used in many industries to make production processes better, faster, and cheaper. We already see shifts in the structure of employment: in industries, tasks, educational levels and skills. We already see shifts in the structure of employment: in industries, tasks, educational levels and skills. combine combining combinations combines For_example No_wonder Instead Of_course 4 For_example No_wonder Instead Of_course
空格 1increasingly increased / increasingly / increase / increasing
詞性will ___ work：修飾動詞 work 需副詞，increasingly（日益）
✗ increased/increase/increasing 為過去分詞/原形/分詞，無法在此修飾動詞 work
空格 2struggles struggling / struggled / struggles
單複數關係子句 that smart automation ___ to do：主詞 smart automation 單數，動詞用 struggles
時態陳述現況用現在式單數
✗ struggling/struggled 為分詞形式，不能作該從句的主要動詞
空格 3combinations combine / combining / combinations / combines
詞性破折號後同位語需名詞：___ of artificial intelligence, robotics...（…的組合）
單複數後接 of AI, robotics and other technologies 多項，用複數 combinations
✗ combine/combines 為動詞；combining 為動名詞，此處需與前 wave 同位的名詞 combinations
283.Climate change(氣候變化)4 格#080289
First, the scientific community that studies climate change is quietly panic-stricken, because things are moving much faster than they expected. Greenhouse gas emissions are going up faster than 1predicted moving much faster than they expected. Greenhouse gas emissions are going up faster than predicted both from industrialising countries in Asia and from melting permafrost in Siberia and Canada. The Arctic Sea ice is melting so fast that the whole ocean may be ice-free in late summer in five years' time. Arctic Sea ice is melting so fast that the whole ocean may be ice-free in late summer in five years' time. Most climate scientists now see last year's report of the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change, whose forecasts are used by most governments for planning purposes, as a 2purely historical whose forecasts are used by most governments for planning purposes, as a purely historical document. Second, the biggest early impact of global warming will be on the food supply, both locally and globally. When the global average temperature hits one and a half degrees hotter - and it will, the and globally. When the global average temperature hits one and a half degrees hotter - and it will, the carbon dioxide already in the atmosphere 3commits us to that much warming - some countries will no longer be able to feed their people. Others, further from the equator, will still have enough food for longer be able to feed their people. Others, further from the equator, will still have enough food for themselves, but none to 4spare .
空格 1predicted predicting / predicted / predicts / predict
時態going up faster than ___：被動省略 than (was) predicted，需過去分詞
✗ predicting 為主動分詞；predicts/predict 為定動詞，不合『比預測的更快』的被動比較
空格 2purely pure / purely / just / only
詞性a ___ historical document：修飾形容詞 historical 需副詞，purely（純粹）
✗ pure 為形容詞詞性不合；just/only 通常不置於 a 與形容詞之間修飾，purely 最自然
空格 3commits commits / committing / commission
單複數主詞 the carbon dioxide 單數，動詞用 commits
搭配固定搭配 commit us to（使我們注定…），後接 that much warming
✗ committing 為分詞不能作主句動詞；commission 為名詞/不同義動詞，語意與形態不合
空格 4spare eat / have / spare / consume
搭配固定搭配 none to spare（沒有多餘的可分給別人）
語意與前 enough food for themselves 對比：自給有餘但無餘糧外援
✗ eat/have/consume 不與 none to ___ 構成『沒有多餘可分』的慣用語
284.Marriage and Divorce in Australia(澳大利亞的婚姻與離婚)4 格#080290
In 2005, 109,000 new marriages were registered in Australia. This was equivalent to 5.4 marriages for In 2005, 109,000 new marriages were registered in Australia. This was equivalent to 5.4 marriages for every 1,000 people in the population. This rate has been in overall 1decline since 1986 when there were 7.2 marriages per 1,000 people. Over the same period, the 2crude divorce rate has remained relatively 7.2 marriages per 1,000 people. Over the same period, the crude divorce rate has remained relatively unchanged with 2.6 divorces for every 1,000 people in 2005 and 2.5 divorces per 1,000 people in 1986. The 3greatest annual number of divorces occurred in 2001 when there were 55,300 divorces recorded. The greatest annual number of divorces occurred in 2001 when there were 55,300 divorces recorded. This peak has been followed by recent declines, with 52,400 divorces in 2005. As well as marrying less, Australians are 4tending to marry later than in the past. In 1986, the median age at first marriage for Australians are tending to marry later than in the past. In 1986, the median age at first marriage for men was 25.6 years, increasing to 30.0 years in 2005. For women, the median age at first marriage increased from 23.5 years in 1986 to 28.0 years in 2005. increased from 23.5 years in 1986 to 28.0 years in 2005. great greatest least small tend tended tending tends
空格 1decline increase / decline / decreasing / increasing
搭配固定搭配 in overall decline（整體呈下降趨勢）
語意下文 7.2 降到 5.4，呼應結婚率『下降』
✗ increase/increasing 與數據下降矛盾；decreasing 為分詞不合 in overall ___ 名詞位
空格 2crude crude / crush / cruel / rude
搭配統計術語固定搭配 crude divorce rate（粗離婚率）
✗ crush/cruel/rude 為形近混淆詞，與 divorce rate 無搭配關係
空格 3greatest great / greatest / least / small
單複數The ___ annual number：定冠詞 The + 最高級，greatest（最多的）
語意下文 55,300 為高峰，指『最大』年度離婚數
✗ great 為原級；least/small 語意相反或不合『最高峰』
空格 4tending tend / tended / tending / tends
時態are ___ to marry later：現在進行式 be + V-ing，tending
搭配固定句型 tend to do（傾向做某事）
✗ tend/tends 為定動詞、tended 為過去式，皆不能接在 are 之後構成進行式
285.Quiet or noisy study space(安靜或嘈雜的學習空間)4 格#080291
Some students say that they need complete quiet to read and study. Others study best in a crowded, noisy room because the noise actually 1helps them concentrate. Some students like quiet music playing; others 2do not. The point is, you should know the level of noise that is optimal for your own studying. However, one general rule for all students is that the television seems to be more of a distraction than music or other background noise, so 3leave the TV off when you are reading or studying. 4Also , don’t let yourself become distracted by computer games, email, or Internet surfing.
空格 1helps distracts / helps / facilitates / reduces
單複數主詞 the noise 單數，動詞用 helps
語意noise actually ___ them concentrate：噪音『幫助』他們專注
✗ distracts/reduces 語意相反；facilitates 後不接 sb + 原形，help sb do 才合句型
空格 2do do / are / like
時態others ___ not：代動詞替代前句 like，否定用 do not
✗ are 對應 be 動詞、like 為原型重複，皆不能與 not 構成替代前述 like 的代動詞
空格 3leave make / leave / let / maintain
搭配固定搭配 leave the TV off（讓電視保持關閉），leave + 受詞 + off
✗ make/let 接受詞後需原形動詞非 off；maintain 不與 the TV off 搭配
空格 4Also Therefore / However / Even / Also
語意承接前句叮嚀，再補充一項建議『此外』，don't let yourself...distracted
✗ Therefore 表因果、However 表轉折、Even 語意不合此處『再補一項』的並列補述
286.Speed of sound (音速)4 格#080292
The speed of sound (otherwise known as Mach 1) varies with temperature. At sea level on a “standard day,” the temperature is 59°F, and Mach 1 is approximately 761 mph. As the altitude increases, the temperature and speed of sound 1both decrease until about 36,000 feet, after which the temperature 2remains steady until about 60,000 feet. Within that 36,000–60,000 foot range, Mach 1 is about 661 mph. Because of the 3variation , it is possible for an airplane flying supersonic at high altitude to be slower than a subsonic flight at sea level. The transonic band (the “sound barrier”) extends 4from around Mach .8—when the first supersonic shock waves from on the wing—to Mach 1.2, when the entire wing has gone supersonic. not both none yet remains mutates opposes plots
空格 1both not / both / none / yet
語意the temperature and speed of sound ___ decrease：兩者『都』下降
搭配固定搭配 both...decrease 呼應兩個並列主詞
✗ not/none 語意相反或否定；yet 為副詞不合此並列『兩者皆』語意
空格 2remains remains / mutates / opposes / plots
單複數主詞 the temperature 單數，動詞用 remains
語意語意指溫度『維持』穩定 until about 60,000 feet
✗ mutates/opposes/plots 語意不合『保持穩定』
空格 3variation variety / variation / ventilation / similarity
語意Because of the ___：指前述溫度與音速隨高度『變化』，故同高度音速不同
✗ variety 偏『種類多樣』；ventilation 為通風；similarity 語意相反
空格 4from in / from / near / with
搭配固定搭配 extends from...to...（從…延伸到…），後文有 to Mach 1.2
✗ in/near/with 不與 extends...to 構成『從…到…』的範圍搭配
287.Facial appearance(面部外觀)5 格#080293
Research demonstrates that facial appearance affects social perceptions. The current research investigates the reverse 1possibility : Can social perceptions influence facial appearance? We examine a investigates the reverse possibility : Can social perceptions influence facial appearance? We examine a social tag that is associated with us early in life — our given name. The hypothesis is that name stereotypes can be manifested in facial appearance, producing a face-name matching effect, 2whereby stereotypes can be manifested in facial appearance, producing a face-name matching effect, whereby both a social perceiver and a computer are able to accurately match a person’s name to his or her face. In 8 studies we demonstrate the 3existence of this effect, as participants examining an unfamiliar face. In 8 studies we demonstrate the existence of this effect, as participants examining an unfamiliar face accurately select the person’s true name from a list of several names, significantly above chance level. We replicate the effect in 2 countries and find that it extends 4beyond the limits of socioeconomic level. We replicate the effect in 2 countries and find that it extends beyond the limits of socioeconomic cues. We also find the effect using a computer-based paradigm and 94,000 faces. In our exploration of the underlying mechanism, we show that existing name stereotypes produce the effect, as its the underlying mechanism, we show that existing name stereotypes produce the effect, as its occurrence is culture-dependent. A self-fulfilling prophecy seems to be at work, as initial evidence shows that facial appearance regions that are controlled by the individual (e.g., hairstyle) are 5sufficient shows that facial appearance regions that are controlled by the individual (e.g., hairstyle) are sufficient to produce the effect, and socially using one’s given name is necessary to generate the effect. Together, these studies suggest that facial appearance represents social expectations of how a person Together, these studies suggest that facial appearance represents social expectations of how a person with a specific name should look. In this way a social tag may influence one’s facial appearance.
空格 1possibility chance / opportunity / possibility / reliability
搭配the reverse possibility「相反的可能性」固定搭配，指反過來探討的假設
語意前句講外表影響知覺，本句 investigates the reverse __，語意要「可能性」
✗ chance/opportunity 多指機遇，reliability(可靠度)不搭 the reverse 與此語意
空格 2whereby whereby / there / here / which
搭配關係副詞 whereby = by which，引導「藉此…」子句，後接完整句
詞性空格後 both a perceiver and a computer are able to match 為完整子句，需關係副詞
✗ which 須接缺主詞/受詞的子句而此子句完整；there/here 是副詞不能引導關係子句
空格 3existence existence / resistance / existing / indolence
詞性the ___ of this effect，the…of 之間要名詞，existence 名詞；existing 是形容詞/動名詞
語意demonstrate the existence of this effect「證實此效應的存在」語意最通
✗ existing 非名詞不合 the…of；resistance(抗拒)、indolence(懶惰)語意不合
空格 4beyond within / into / beyond / on
搭配extend beyond the limits of「超出…的界線」固定搭配
語意效應「超越」社經線索的限制，語意要 beyond
✗ within(在內)、into(進入)、on(在上)皆不符 extend…the limits of 的「超越」語意
空格 5sufficient insufficient / sufficient / relative / real
搭配be sufficient to + 原形「足以…」固定搭配，後接 to produce the effect
語意個人可控的外表區域「足以」產生此效應，肯定語氣用 sufficient
✗ insufficient(不足)與「足以產生效應」矛盾；relative/real 不搭此 to 不定詞結構
288.Superintelligence(超級智能)3 格#080294
A superintelligence is any intellect that vastly outperforms the best human brains in practically every A superintelligence is any intellect that vastly outperforms the best human brains in practically every field, including scientific creativity, general wisdom, and social skills. This definition leaves open how the superintelligence 1is implemented : it could be in a digital computer, an ensemble of networked the superintelligence is implemented : it could be in a digital computer, an ensemble of networked computers, cultured cortical tissue, or something else. On this definition, Deep Blue is not a superintelligence, since it is only smart within one narrow domain (chess), and even there it is not superintelligence, since it is only smart within one narrow domain (chess), and even there it is not vastly superior 2to the best humans. Entities such as corporations or the scientific community are not superintelligences either. Although they can perform a number of intellectual feats of which no superintelligences either. Although they can perform a number of intellectual feats of which no individual human is capable, they are not 3sufficiently integrated to count as intellects, and there are many fields in which they perform much worse than single humans. For example, you cannot have a many fields in which they perform much worse than single humans. For example, you cannot have a real-time conversation with the scientific community. 1 is_implemented has_implemented be_implemented implemented
空格 1is implemented is implemented / has implemented / be implemented / implemented
時態陳述定義用現在式被動，how the superintelligence is implemented（如何被實現），主詞 superintelligence 是被實現的。
單複數主詞 the superintelligence（單數）配 is。
✗ has implemented 為主動完成（超智能是被實現非主動實現）、be implemented 缺助動詞、implemented 缺 be 動詞無法構成被動。
空格 2to of / to / with / for
搭配be superior to（優於），not vastly superior to the best humans，superior 固定搭配介系詞 to。
✗ of、with、for 與 superior 搭配皆不符，superior 只接 to。
空格 3sufficiently sufficiently / barely / sparsely / regularly
詞性修飾形容詞 integrated 須用副詞，sufficiently integrated（充分整合）。
語意「not sufficiently integrated to count as intellects」指整合不足以算作智能體，sufficiently 切題。
✗ barely（幾乎不）、sparsely（稀疏地）、regularly（規律地）皆不符「充分整合」之語意。
289.Skip School (逃學)4 格#080295
Children who skip school are increasingly on family holidays, government figures revealed today. 1Fewer children played truant this spring term compared with the spring term last year. Children missed 3m unauthorized days of school last term, compared with 3.7m days of school in the same period last year. But a 2hardcore group of truants - 6% of the school population - who account for more than three- quarters of all those on unauthorized absence, are more likely to be on a family holiday than they were in the same 3period last year. Some 1.2% of all absence was for family holidays not 4agreed by their school last term, compared with 0.9% for the same term last year. More than 60% of all absences were for illness, the same figure as last year. Smaller Larger A_few Fewer
空格 1Fewer Smaller / Larger / Fewer
單複數children 為可數複數，須用 Fewer 不用 Smaller/Larger
語意下文 missed 3m vs 3.7m last year，逃學人數變少，用 Fewer children played truant
✗ Smaller/Larger 修飾尺寸或數量級不修飾可數人數；Larger 也與減少趨勢相反
空格 2hardcore hardcore / small / real / new
語意a hardcore group of truants「死硬派逃學群」，呼應後文 6% 卻佔四分之三曠課
搭配hardcore group 常見搭配，指頑固核心的一群
✗ small/new/real 無法表達「頑固核心」之意，與後文佔多數曠課的描述不符
空格 3period period / duration / time / span
搭配the same period last year「去年同期」固定搭配，全文重複出現
語意與前文 compared with…last year 對比同一期間，用 period
✗ duration/time/span 雖近義，但 the same period 才是慣用「同期」搭配
空格 4agreed disagreed / agreed / canceled / recommended
語意family holidays not ___ by their school「未經學校同意的家庭假期」，用 agreed
搭配holidays (not) agreed by the school 為原文慣用，指核准與否
✗ disagreed 不用於此被動搭配；canceled(取消)、recommended(推薦)不合「未獲准」
290.Disadvantage in early childhood(兒童早期的劣勢)5 格#080296
Disadvantage in early childhood poses multiple risks to children's development. Factors such as low socioeconomic status, long-term unemployment of parents, and social isolation may have lasting 1impacts on a child's chance of reaching their full potential. Whilst not eliminating disadvantage, preschool education can help to 2lessen the effects of these risk factors and can provide children with a better start to school. However, some of these factors may also be 3barriers to preschool attendance for groups that would benefit most from preschool education. In Australia, the early years of children's education is the responsibility of many government and non-government agencies and it occurs in a range of settings. Preschool is aimed at children around four years of age to 4prepare them for compulsory schooling from the age of six years. In most states and territories, children can start full- time schooling at five years of age, when they enrol in a kindergarten or preparatory year. In 2001, just over half of five-year olds (57%) were at school with about a third (34%) attending preschool. While in some states and territories children can 5commence preschool before they turn four, participation rates for three-year olds are much lower than four-year olds (24% compared with 56% for four-year olds in 2001). The preschool participation rate of four-year olds in 2001 (56%) was similar to the rate in 1991
空格 1impacts impressions / impacts / affects / variations
搭配have lasting impacts on「對…有持久影響」，impact 作名詞搭 have…on
詞性may have lasting ___ on 之間要名詞，impacts 名詞；affects 是動詞
✗ affects 為動詞不合名詞位；impressions(印象)、variations(變化)不符「影響」
空格 2lessen lessen / hold / hoist / promote
時態can help to ___ 後接原形，lessen「減輕」
語意preschool 可「減輕」風險因子的影響，用 lessen the effects
✗ hold/hoist(舉起)語意不合；promote(促進)與「減輕負面影響」方向相反
空格 3barriers accesses / factors / barriers / roundabouts
搭配barriers to attendance「就讀的障礙」，barrier to + 名詞固定搭配
語意前文 may also be ___ to preschool attendance，指這些因子反成「阻礙」
✗ accesses/factors 與 to attendance 不成「阻礙」；roundabouts(環島)不合語境
空格 4prepare prepare / undo / tie / fix
搭配prepare them for compulsory schooling「為就學做準備」，prepare…for 固定搭配
語意preschool 目的是為強制教育做準備，用 prepare
✗ undo(撤銷)、tie(綁)、fix(修)不搭 for schooling 且不合「準備就學」
空格 5commence alter / commence / delay / escape
語意children can ___ preschool before they turn four「四歲前開始上幼兒園」，commence=begin
搭配commence preschool/schooling「開始就學」正式用法，呼應後句 participation rates
✗ alter(改變)、delay(延遲)、escape(逃避)皆與「開始就讀」相反或不合
291.The 18th century(18世紀)7 格#080297
Throughout the 18th century, mathematicians, scientists and philosophers researched, discussed, and published their investigations into how the world worked, while engineers and inventors developed new and successful machines and processes. The 1latest theories inspired greater invention, and more technology encouraged theoretical scientists to make further discoveries in medicine, biology, mechanics, physics, and chemistry. By 1800, the new machines 2had brought revolutionary changes to the workplace transportation and communications, and eventually to the home. Some of these inventions simply made it easier to produce things on a large scale such as textile machines and foundries, 3which produced large quantities of cloth and metal objects quickly and cheaply. But some inventions 4brought completely new possibilities such as the first batteries, steamboats, and locomotives. It would take decades for some of these inventions to 5make a big impact on the world. 6Yet their creation, and the sheer amount of imagination and risk-taking involved, 7marked the beginning of a modern, global, technologically-based economy of the kind that we live in today. newest fewest nearest latest
空格 1latest newest / fewest / nearest / latest
搭配the latest theories「最新理論」固定搭配
語意前文講研究發表，最新理論啟發更多發明，用 latest
✗ newest 較少修飾 theories；fewest(最少)、nearest(最近距離)語意不合
空格 2had are / have / were / had
時態By 1800, the new machines ___ brought…，過去完成式 had brought 表 1800 前已完成
詞性後接過去分詞 brought，助動詞用 had
✗ are/have 為現在式與 By 1800 矛盾；were 為過去簡單式不接過去分詞構成此完成式
空格 3which those / that / what / which
詞性前有逗號的非限定關係子句，先行詞 textile machines and foundries 為物用 which
單複數which produced large quantities…，引導關係子句修飾複數物先行詞
✗ those 為指示代名詞不引導關係子句；that 不用於逗號後非限定子句；what 不可有先行詞
空格 4brought brought / enforced / took / necessitated
搭配bring new possibilities「帶來新的可能」固定搭配，過去式 brought
語意some inventions ___ completely new possibilities，指「帶來」全新可能
✗ enforced(強制執行)、necessitated(使必要)語意不合；took 不搭 possibilities
空格 5make make / making / made
時態It would take decades for some inventions to ___ a big impact，for…to + 原形，用 make
搭配make a big impact「造成大影響」固定搭配，動詞原形 make
✗ making/made 非原形，不合 for…to 不定詞結構
空格 6Yet Whether / As / Yet / Notwishstanding
搭配句首 Yet「然而」作連接副詞，承上句轉折
語意前句說要花數十年才見成效，本句轉折強調創造的意義，用 Yet
✗ Whether(是否)、As(當/因為)不合句首轉折；Notwithstanding 拼字錯且後須接名詞
空格 7marked marked / marking / making / made
詞性主詞 their creation…需主要動詞，marked 過去式當謂語；marking/making 為分詞不能作謂語
時態全文敘述過去，their creation…marked the beginning 用過去式 marked
✗ marking/making 是分詞無法作謂語；made 語意不合 the beginning
292.Pop Art(流行藝術)1 格#080298
Emerging in the mid 1950s in Britain and late 1950s in America, pop art reached its peak in the 1960s. Emerging in the mid 1950s in Britain and late 1950s in America, pop art reached its peak in the 1960s. It began as a revolt 1against the dominant approaches to art and culture and traditional views on what art should be . Young artists felt that what they were taught at art school and what they saw in art should be . Young artists felt that what they were taught at art school and what they saw in museums did not have anything to do with their lives or the things they saw around them every day. Instead they turned to sources such as Hollywood movies, advertising, product packaging, pop music Instead they turned to sources such as Hollywood movies, advertising, product packaging, pop music and comic books for their imagery. 2 be should_be has_been would_be 3 doing_with with to_do_with to_do 4 mustered_up relevant_in turned_to reckoned_on
空格 1against against / along / with / within
搭配a revolt against「對…的反抗」固定搭配，revolt 後接 against
語意pop art began as a revolt ___ the dominant approaches，指「反抗」主流
✗ along/with/within 皆不搭 revolt，且無「反抗」對立語意
293.Nissan(尼桑)4 格#080299
Nissan will overhaul the 1inspection process for its Japan-destined vehicles for the first time in decades Nissan will overhaul the inspection process for its Japan-destined vehicles for the first time in decades as the carmaker seeks to address a widening inspection scandal that has forced it to suspend production for the domestic market. The company said on Thursday that unauthorized workers had production for the domestic market. The company said on Thursday that unauthorized workers had been 2certifying vehicles set for sale in the Japanese market, even after the company announced the recall of nearly 1.2m cars earlier this month over the same issue. With investors increasingly concerned recall of nearly 1.2m cars earlier this month over the same issue. With investors increasingly concerned about Japan Inc’s adherence to standards — concerns that were most recently 3inflamed by the Kobe Steel data falsification scandal — the news pushed Nissan shares down 1.6 per cent on Friday, and also Steel data falsification scandal — the news pushed Nissan shares down 1.6 per cent on Friday, and also weighed on the prices of its suppliers. HirotoSaikawa, Nissan’s chief executive, pledged “drastic measures” to deal with the problem, namely the 4suspension of vehicle production for the home measures” to deal with the problem, namely the suspension of vehicle production for the home market at all six factories in Japan run by the company and its affiliate, Nissan Shatai.
空格 1inspection section / inspection / financial / taxation
搭配the inspection process「檢驗流程」，呼應後文 inspection scandal
語意全文圍繞 inspection scandal、certifying vehicles，故指「檢驗」流程
✗ section/financial/taxation 與後文 inspection scandal 主題不符
空格 2certifying certifying / exposing / piling / purchasing
時態had been ___ vehicles，過去完成進行式需現在分詞，用 certifying
語意unauthorized workers had been certifying vehicles「無資格員工一直在認證車輛」是醜聞核心
✗ exposing(揭露)、piling(堆積)、purchasing(購買)都不合「認證車輛」的醜聞情節
空格 3inflamed underestimated / cured / overlooked / inflamed
時態concerns that were most recently ___ by…，被動語態用過去分詞 inflamed
語意concerns inflamed by the Kobe Steel scandal「疑慮被…加劇」語意通
✗ underestimated(低估)、cured(治癒)、overlooked(忽視)與「加劇疑慮」相反或不合
空格 4suspension suspension / expenditure / resume / delay
詞性namely the ___ of vehicle production，the…of 之間要名詞，suspension 名詞
語意呼應前文 forced it to suspend production，名詞 suspension「停產」
✗ resume(恢復)為動詞且語意相反；expenditure(支出)、delay(延遲)不合「停產措施」
294.Forces of Globalization(全球化的力量)5 格#080300
Forces of globalization have acted on education internationally, creating greater standardization in Forces of globalization have acted on education internationally, creating greater standardization in norms of teaching and learning. There has always been 1considerable similarity between schools across context: the curriculum, for example has been shown to be divided between language, mathematics, context: the curriculum, for example has been shown to be divided between language, mathematics, science and the arts in a comparable way in schools around the world. Likewise, school buildings in terms of their architecture share remarkable similarities internationally, 3as a result of shared patterns of terms of their architecture share remarkable similarities internationally, as a result of shared patterns of teaching and learning (although facilities and resources differ significantly.) In recent years, globalization has created increased opportunities for the 'borrowing' of education policy and practice, globalization has created increased opportunities for the 'borrowing' of education policy and practice, and 4generated further uniformity across national contexts. 5Nowhere has the internationalization of education been more apparent than in the higher education sector. The move to the education been more apparent than in the higher education sector. The move to the internationalization of higher-education policy and practice was initially driven by increased student mobility, and the desire of universities to attract students from overseas. mobility, and the desire of universities to attract students from overseas. 2 being_divided to_divide to_be_dividing to_be_divided for_a_result without_a_result as_a_result resulted_as 3 for_a_result without_a_result as_a_result resulted_as duplicated exempted generated dispensed Anywhere Somewhere Everywhere Nowhere 6 was_initially_driving had_initially_driven was_initially_driven initially_drove
空格 1considerable considerable / countable / unforeseeable / unstable
詞性修飾名詞 similarity 須用形容詞，considerable similarity（相當大的相似性）。
語意全文談全球教育標準化的高度相似，considerable（相當大的）切題。
✗ countable（可數的）、unforeseeable（不可預見）、unstable（不穩定）皆不符「相當大的相似性」。
空格 2being divided being divided / to divide / to be dividing / to be divided
時態has been shown to be divided⋯依原文 has been shown to be divided；惟此空格答案標為 being divided，作被動分詞補語表課程「被劃分」。
搭配divided between language, mathematics（被劃分為語言、數學⋯），被動形式表分割。
✗ to divide 為主動、to be dividing 進行式不通、to be divided 雖被動但答案依輸入標為 being divided。
空格 3as a result for a result / without a result / as a result / resulted as
搭配as a result of（由於⋯的結果），as a result of shared patterns。
✗ for a result、without a result、resulted as 皆非標準片語，文法錯誤。
空格 4generated duplicated / exempted / generated / dispersed
語意「generated further uniformity across national contexts」指產生更多一致性，generate（產生）切題。
時態與並列 created 同為過去分詞/過去式，has created... and generated 時態一致。
✗ duplicated（複製）、exempted（豁免）、dispersed（驅散）皆不符「產生一致性」。
空格 5Nowhere Anywhere / Somewhere / Everywhere / Nowhere
搭配否定副詞置句首引導倒裝：Nowhere has the internationalization... been more apparent than，Nowhere + 倒裝。
語意「沒有任何地方比高等教育部門更明顯」，Nowhere 表最高級語氣。
✗ Anywhere、Somewhere、Everywhere 皆非否定詞，無法引導此倒裝且語意不符「莫過於」。
295.Managing Performance(管理績效)5 格#080301
Managing performance is about getting people into action so that they achieve planned and agreed results. It focuses on what has to be done, how it should be done and what 1isis to be achieved. But it is results. It focuses on what has to be done, how it should be done and what to be achieved. But it is equally concerned with 2developing people - helping them to learn - and providing them with the support they need to do well, now and in the future. The framework for performance management is support they need to do well, now and in the future. The framework for performance management is provided by the performance agreement, 3which is the outcome of performance planning. The agreement provides the basis for managing performance throughout the year and for 4guiding agreement provides the basis for managing performance throughout the year and for guiding improvement and development activities. It is used as a reference point 5when reviewing performance and the achievement of improvement and development plans. and the achievement of improvement and development plans. developing evaluating recruiting alerting what this which of_which guiding reassuring heralding concluding
空格 1isis isis / need / must / requires
時態原文為 what is to be achieved「該達成什麼」，be + to 表預定，需 is
詞性選項 isis 為 is 的 OCR 重複，對應正確 be 動詞 is
✗ need/must/requires 無法構成 what is to be achieved 的 be + to 結構
空格 2developing developing / evaluating / recruiting / alerting
時態concerned with ___ people，介系詞 with 後接動名詞 developing
語意後接 helping them to learn 解釋，故為 developing people「培育員工」
✗ evaluating(評估)、recruiting(招募)、alerting(警示)與下文 helping them learn 不呼應
空格 3which what / this / which
詞性前有逗號的非限定關係子句修飾 the performance agreement，先行詞為物用 which
語意which is the outcome of performance planning，先行詞 agreement 為物用 which
✗ what 不可帶先行詞；this 為指示詞不引導關係子句
空格 4guiding guiding / reassuring / heralding / concluding
時態for managing…and for ___ improvement，介系詞 for 後接動名詞，與 managing 並列用 guiding
語意the basis for guiding improvement「引導改善的依據」語意通
✗ reassuring(安撫)、heralding(預示)、concluding(總結)不合「引導改善」
空格 5when when / as / until / since
搭配used as a reference point when reviewing「檢視時作為參考」，when + 動名詞表時間
語意語意是「當檢視績效時」用作參考點，用 when reviewing
✗ as(當/因)、until(直到)、since(自從)在此時間語意不如 when 貼切
296.Looking Trustworthy(看起來值得信賴)4 格#080302
It would be reassuring to think that the electorate choose who to vote for based on the candidates' track records and future policy promises. 1In truth , many of us are swayed simply by the way that track records and future policy promises. In truth , many of us are swayed simply by the way that politicians look. Consider a 2009 study that asked Swiss students to look at multiple pairs of unfamiliar French political candidates and in each case to select the one who looked most competent. Most of French political candidates and in each case to select the one who looked most competent. Most of the time, the candidate selected by students 2as looking the most competent was also the one who'd had real life electoral success, the implication 3being that voters too had been swayed by the had real life electoral success, the implication being that voters too had been swayed by the candidates' appearance correlate . Unsurprisingly, being attractive also helps win votes, especially in war time (in peace time, looking trustworthy is more of an advantage). Other research has shown that war time (in peace time, looking trustworthy is more of an advantage). Other research has shown that we're more likely to vote for male and female candidates with deeper voices. 1 For_example In_truth In_addition In_return
空格 1In truth For example / In truth / In addition / In return
語意前句說選民理應看政績，後句轉折說其實多被外表左右，In truth（事實上）表轉折揭露真相。
✗ For example（舉例）、In addition（此外）、In return（作為回報）皆不符此「事實上卻⋯」的轉折語氣。
空格 2as through / at / by / as
搭配the candidate selected by students as looking the most competent，select... as（選為），as 引導身分/狀態。
✗ through、at、by 與 selected ___ looking 搭配不符「被選為看起來最⋯」之意。
空格 3being being / is / was / having
時態獨立分詞構句 the implication being that...（其含意即⋯），being 引導分詞補述。
✗ is/was 為限定動詞會造成兩個主要動詞、having 語意不合此補述結構。
空格 4there's little evidence that appearance and competence actually correlate there's little evidence that appearance and competence actually correlate / overlap / cooperate / diverge
語意前文說選民被外表左右，此處補充「幾乎沒有證據顯示外表與能力實際相關」，形成對比轉折，語意最完整。
✗ overlap、cooperate、diverge 皆為單一動詞，無法接續前文的子句結構，且語意不如整句完整呼應「外表≠能力」。
297.Modern technology (近代科技)5 格#080303
Modern technology has enhanced the study of language by making its sounds observable in greater detail and with greater accuracy than ever before, but the thoughts associated with those sounds detail and with greater accuracy than ever before, but the thoughts associated with those sounds remain problematic. Currently developing 1techniques of brain imaging are allowing us to observe for the first time which parts of the brain are active in different circumstances. They do not, however, show the first time which parts of the brain are active in different circumstances. They do not, however, show experiences themselves, which may always remain 2hidden from public observation. There is a sense in which each of us knows what we are thinking, 3although we may not always have a good way of which each of us knows what we are thinking, although we may not always have a good way of verbalizing it. But the only way we can know what someone else is thinking is through what that person says, or through some other overt action 4a facial expression or gesture, perhaps from which person says, or through some other overt action a facial expression or gesture, perhaps from which that person's thoughts may be inferred, or from imagining what we ourselves would be thinking 5in although even_though whereas but a_facial_expression an_emotion a_movement an_action 4 a_facial_expression an_emotion a_movement an_action in under during for
空格 1techniques techniques / methods / strategies / tools
語意「developing techniques of brain imaging」指發展中的腦造影技術，technique（技術）與後文觀察腦部活動呼應。
✗ methods/strategies/tools 雖近義，但 brain imaging techniques 為標準搭配，最貼切。
空格 2hidden hidden / concealed / invisible / obscured
搭配remain hidden from public observation（仍隱而不顯），hidden from 固定搭配。
✗ concealed（被隱瞞）含人為意圖、invisible（不可見）、obscured（被遮蔽）搭配 from observation 不如 hidden 自然。
空格 3although although / even though / whereas / but
語意「each of us knows what we are thinking, although we may not always have a good way of verbalizing it」，although（雖然）引導讓步子句。
✗ even though 語氣可但 although 更通用、whereas（對比）、but（並列連接詞不可置子句首接於此結構）皆不如 although。
空格 4a facial expression a facial expression / an emotion / a movement / an action
語意「some other overt action a facial expression or gesture」指外顯動作如臉部表情或手勢，a facial expression（臉部表情）與 gesture 並列。
✗ an emotion（情緒，非外顯動作）、a movement/an action 過於籠統，與 gesture 並列不如 facial expression 具體。
空格 5in in / under / during / for
搭配imagining what we ourselves would be thinking in（在某情境中思考），in 引導情境，搭配後文語境。
✗ under、during、for 與「想像我們自己會在⋯中想什麼」搭配不符。
298.Jeremy Bentham(傑裏米·邊沁)5 格#080304
By the 1820s Bentham had become a well-known figure, both in Britain and in other parts of the world. His ideas were to 1influence the reforms of public administration 2made during the nineteenth century, His ideas were to influence the reforms of public administration made during the nineteenth century, and his writings are still at the centre of academic debate, especially 3regarding social policy, legal positivism, and welfare economics. Bentham died on 6 June 1832, a day before the first Reform Act positivism, and welfare economics. Bentham died on 6 June 1832, a day before the first Reform Act was given Royal Assent. As per the 4directions in his will, Bentham's body was dissected by his friend, the surgeon Thomas Southwood Smith, and his skeleton preserved as the Auto-icon. Research into the surgeon Thomas Southwood Smith, and his skeleton preserved as the Auto-icon. Research into Bentham's thought and life continues today at UCL's Bentham Project, set up in the early 1960s with the aim 5of producing the first scholarly edition of his works and correspondence. This edition is the aim of producing the first scholarly edition of his works and correspondence. This edition is projected to run to some eighty volumes. Members of the public are invited to assist in this massive editorial task by helping to transcribe Bentham's manuscripts via Transcribe Bentham. editorial task by helping to transcribe Bentham's manuscripts via Transcribe Bentham. make making made to_make regarding discussing talking_about considering ways route directions guidance 6 flee_from run_to chase_after go_to
空格 1influence hinder / influence / disturb / disregard
時態His ideas were to ___ the reforms，be + to + 原形，用 influence
語意his ideas influence the reforms「他的思想影響改革」，正面語意用 influence
✗ hinder(阻礙)、disturb(擾亂)、disregard(無視)語意負面或不合「影響改革」
空格 2made make / making / made
詞性reforms of public administration ___ during the 19th century，過去分詞 made 作後位修飾「於…進行的改革」
時態the reforms (which were) made during…，被動分詞用 made
✗ make/to make 不能作後位被動修飾；making 為主動分詞語意不合 reforms 被進行
空格 3regarding regarding / discussing / considering
搭配especially regarding social policy「尤其關於社會政策」，regarding = concerning 作介系詞
詞性此處需介系詞引出主題，regarding 後接名詞 social policy
✗ discussing/considering 為及物動詞動名詞，在此句構作介系詞用不如 regarding 自然
空格 4directions ways / route / directions / guidance
搭配as per the directions in his will「依其遺囑指示」，directions「指示」固定搭配
語意下文 his body was dissected「依遺囑指示解剖」，用 directions
✗ ways/route(路線)、guidance(指導)不搭 as per the…in his will 的「指示」語意
空格 5of to / for / on / of
搭配with the aim of producing「目的是製作…」，the aim of + 動名詞固定搭配
詞性the aim ___ producing，aim of doing 慣用介系詞 of
✗ to/for/on 皆不搭 the aim ___ doing 的固定介系詞 of
299.Kodak and Fuji(柯達和富士)5 格#080305
Kodak held between 7 and 10 percent of the Japanese market in the mid-90s, while Fuji had a dominant position. In fact, each of the companies held a rather dominant market 1share on their home dominant position. In fact, each of the companies held a rather dominant market share on their home turf, with Fuji 2representing 17 percent of the U.S. market. But distribution channels in the two countries were very different. While Kodak and Fuji were selling their products directly to retailers here in the were very different. While Kodak and Fuji were selling their products directly to retailers here in the States, distributors played middle-man over in Japan. Fuji, not surprisingly, surprisingly , had strong ties with the four major distributors in Japan, and Kodak... well, they didn't like it. four major distributors in Japan, and Kodak... well, they didn't like it. share division part sector representing embracing taking seizing distribution_channels 3networks systems links
空格 1share share / division / part / sector
搭配market share「市占率」固定搭配，held a dominant market share
語意全文談 7-10% / 17% 市場佔有，用 share
✗ division/part/sector 不與 market 構成「市占率」慣用語
空格 2representing representing / embracing / taking / seizing
語意with Fuji ___ 17 percent of the U.S. market「富士佔美國市場 17%」，representing「佔/相當於」
詞性with + 名詞 + 現在分詞的附帶狀況結構，用 representing
✗ embracing(擁抱)、taking/seizing(奪取)語意不合「佔有市場比例」的中性陳述
空格 3networks需覆核 networks / systems / links
語意原句為 distribution channels「通路」，空格與 channels 同義，distribution networks「通路網」最貼切
搭配distribution networks「配銷網路」常見搭配，呼應後文 distributors played middle-man
✗ systems(系統)、links(連結)較少與配銷搭配；networks 最切「通路網」語意
空格 4retailers retailers / stores / merchants / shops
語意selling their products directly to ___「直接賣給零售商」，與後文 distributors(中間商)對比，用 retailers
搭配sell directly to retailers「直接賣給零售商」是通路慣用語
✗ stores/merchants/shops 雖近義，但 retailers 與 distributors 對比最精準且為原文用字
空格 5surprisingly surprisingly / astonishingly / unexpectedly / shockingly
搭配not surprisingly「不出所料」固定搭配，插入語修飾全句
語意Fuji, not surprisingly, had strong ties「富士不意外地與經銷商關係好」
✗ astonishingly/unexpectedly/shockingly 與 not 連用語氣過強或不合 not surprisingly 慣用語
300.cofee nap(咖啡時間)5 格#080306
1To understand how a coffee nap might work, we need to look at how the body processes caffeine. When you drink a coffee, the caffeine stays in the stomach for a while before moving to the small When you drink a coffee, the caffeine stays in the stomach for a while before moving to the small intestine, It is from here that caffeine is absorbed and distributed throughout the body. 2This process , from drinking to absorption, takes 45 minutes. But caffeine's alerting effect kicks in sooner, about 30 from drinking to absorption, takes 45 minutes. But caffeine's alerting effect kicks in sooner, about 30 minutes after drinking. 3So , drinking a coffee just before a short nap of less than 15 minutes doesn't affect the nap as your body hasn't yet experienced the caffeine hit. Once you wake up from your nap, affect the nap as your body hasn't yet experienced the caffeine hit. Once you wake up from your nap, not only do you experience the you’re your body feels the effects of the caffeine hours later, Although caffeine is brokendown in the liver, half of it remains in the blood for 4-5 hours after drinking Although caffeine is brokendown in the liver, half of it remains in the blood for 4-5 hours after drinking a moderate amount (equivalent to two large cups of brewed coffee). It takes more time to eliminate greater amounts of caffeine from the body. greater amounts of caffeine from the body. Avoid Ignore Confuse To_understand This_product This_project That_process This_process 2 This_product This_project That_process This_process But However 4So Because 5 is_brokendown has_been_repaired remains_intact will_be_fixed
空格 1To understand Avoid / Ignore / Confuse / To understand
時態句首目的不定詞 To understand how... we need to...（為了理解⋯，我們需要⋯），不定詞表目的。
✗ Avoid/Ignore/Confuse 為祈使動詞，與後文 we need to 主句結構不合，無法構成「為了理解」之目的句。
空格 2This process This product / This project / That process / This process
語意「This process, from drinking to absorption, takes 45 minutes」回指前述吸收過程，This process（這個過程）切題。
✗ This product/This project 語意不合（談的是過程非產品/專案）、That process 指示詞用 This 更貼近上文。
空格 3So But / However / So / Because
語意前句說咖啡因約30分鐘才起效，故喝完咖啡立刻小睡不受影響，So（所以）表結果推論。
✗ But/However 表轉折、Because 表原因（順序相反），皆不符此「所以⋯」的結果推論。
空格 4So需覆核 But / As / In addition to this / So
語意承接前文邏輯，醒來後身體才感受到咖啡因效果，So（因此）表結果連接。
✗ But/As/In addition to this 皆不符此處「因此醒來後⋯」的結果推論語意。
空格 5is brokendown is brokendown / has been repaired / remains intact / will be fixed
時態陳述普遍事實用現在式被動，caffeine is broken down in the liver（咖啡因在肝臟被分解）。
語意後文 half of it remains in the blood 呼應「被分解」，is broken down 切題。
✗ has been repaired（被修復）、remains intact（保持完整）、will be fixed（將被修復）皆與「被分解」語意相反或不合。
301.Mercury(水銀)4 格#080307
Mercury is not found in many common products that we buy because it can be very dangerous. The most common products that 1contain mercury are batteries, powerful outdoor lights, disinfectants and most common products that contain mercury are batteries, powerful outdoor lights, disinfectants and thermometers, which are used to 2measure our body's temperature. It can also be found in barometers, which are used to measure air pressure and 3show changes in weather, and thermostats, which 4regulate which are used to measure air pressure and show changes in weather, and thermostats, which regulate the temperature of buildings. Mercury can also be found in printer and photocopy toners. 3 show_changes conceal_alterations hide_modifications mask_differences
空格 1contain overflow / scatter / leak / contain
語意「products that contain mercury」指含汞的產品，contain（含有）切題。
單複數關係子句先行詞 products（複數）配原形 contain。
✗ overflow（溢出）、scatter（散布）、leak（洩漏）皆不符「產品含有汞」之意。
空格 2measure measure / estimate / guess / speculate
語意「thermometers, which are used to measure our body's temperature」指溫度計用來測量體溫，measure（測量）精準。
✗ estimate（估計）、guess（猜測）、speculate（推測）皆不如 measure 表「精確測量」。
空格 3show changes show changes / conceal alterations / hide modifications / mask differences
語意「barometers... show changes in weather」指氣壓計顯示天氣變化，show changes（顯示變化）符合正面功能描述。
✗ conceal alterations、hide modifications、mask differences 皆含「隱藏」之意，與儀器「顯示」變化的功能相反。
空格 4regulate regulate / deregulate / ignore / overlook
語意「thermostats, which regulate the temperature of buildings」指恆溫器調節建築溫度，regulate（調節）切題。
✗ deregulate（解除管制）、ignore（忽略）、overlook（忽視）皆與「調節溫度」相反或不合。

Experts say brain scans could soon be used to detect lies, vulnerability to mental illness and even Experts say brain scans could soon be used to detect lies, vulnerability to mental illness and even criminal behaviour. But how far can, and should we 1allow research to go? Should we be worried? Come and discuss these 2controversial issues at a special Café Scienti fique tonight, 18 March, with and discuss these controversial issues at a special Café Scienti fique tonight, 18 March, with neurologist Stefano Canna, psychiatrist BelindaLennox, philosopher Stephan Schleim and moderator Marjan Slob. The evening will introduce some of the new applications of brain imaging in discovering Marjan Slob. The evening will introduce some of the new applications of brain imaging in discovering more about brain disorders, from Alzheimer's to psychiatric conditions, while 4analysing the scope and limits, as well as the ethical, legal and social implications of these technologies. After a brief limits, as well as the ethical, legal and social implications of these technologies. After a brief introduction from each of the speakers the debate will be open to the audience to share their experiences and thoughts. The discussions could touch upon lie detection, the early detection of experiences and thoughts. The discussions could touch upon lie detection, the early detection of diseases and the experiences of those who have a brain scan. It may also explore recent research that has shown that a person's thoughts can be decoded from a brain scan by using functional magnetic has shown that a person's thoughts can be decoded from a brain scan by using functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRl) or other studies that 5have seen certain patterns of brainshrinkage that precede the development of Alzheimer's disease. precede the development of Alzheimer's disease. of_the_new_application of_the_outdated_applic of_the_old_software of_the_obsolete_progra 3 of_the_new_application of_the_outdated_applic of_the_old_software of_the_obsolete_progra
空格 1allow allow / disallow / prohibit / forbid
搭配allow + 受詞 + to do 固定句型，allow research to go
語意句意「該不該讓研究走那麼遠」，放行語氣用 allow
✗ disallow/prohibit/forbid 皆「禁止」，與 should we allow research to go 的放行語氣相反
空格 2controversial controversial / uncontentious / agreed / consensual
語意腦造影偵測說謊、犯罪傾向引發爭議，是 controversial issues 爭議議題
✗ uncontentious/agreed/consensual 皆「無爭議、有共識」，與拿來辯論的議題矛盾
空格 3of the new application of the new application / of the outdated applications / of the old software / of the obsolete programms
語意緊接介紹 new applications of brain imaging 的新應用
搭配application of (something) 固定搭配，主題是腦造影非軟體
✗ outdated/old/obsolete 皆「過時」與 new 矛盾；old software/obsolete programms 主題錯(非軟體)
空格 4analysing speculating / guessing / assuming / analysing
時態while ___ the scope 後接 V-ing 表伴隨，analysing 形式正確
語意分析範疇與限制 scope and limits，用 analysing
✗ speculating/guessing/assuming 皆「臆測、假設」，語意是客觀分析非猜測
空格 5have seen have seen / were / are / had
單複數主詞 studies 複數，搭配 have(非 has)
時態現在完成式 have seen 且及物，後接 certain patterns
✗ were/are 為 be 動詞無法直接接受詞 patterns；had 在此無過去完成參照點且語意不合

However, the sign didn't to wait between 2 and 3 minutes to cross after the barrier had gone down. However, the sign didn't seem to be convincing 3the majority of drivers to switch off their engines. “Although some research suggests that signs alone can change behaviour the message on this sign was designed simply to be suggests that signs alone can change behaviour the message on this sign was designed simply to be an informational request and was not guided by any particular behavioural theory,” the researchers explain. So the research team, led by Rose Mellady of the University of East Anglia,designed an explain. So the research team, led by Rose Mellady of the University of East Anglia,designed an 1 turn_off_their_engines stop_their_engines shut_down_their_engine deactivate_their_engine 3 the_majority_of a_minority_of a_few a_small_portion_of
空格 1turn off their engines turn off their engines / stop their engines / shut down their engine / deactivate their engine

✗ In general/Typically/Usually 偏「通常」，搭配明確平均數字不如 On average 精準
空格 3the majority of the majority of / a minority of / a few / a small portion of
