304.UK migrants(英國移民)5 格#080310
The team wanted to 1establish whether previously observed cultural differences in psychological The team wanted to establish whether previously observed cultural differences in psychological characteristics changed over a single generation, They carried out an assessment of 108 first generation migrants- people who were born and raised in Bangladesh and 2had moved to the UK after generation migrants- people who were born and raised in Bangladesh and had moved to the UK after the age of 14. They also assessed 79 second generation migrants people born and raised in the UK to two first generation British Bangladeshi migrants. In line with previous research, they found 3differences two first generation British Bangladeshi migrants. In line with previous research, they found differences in the psychological characteristics of first-generation migrants, compared to non-migrants whose parents 4were born and raised in the UK. One example was that first-generation British Bangladeshis parents were born and raised in the UK. One example was that first-generation British Bangladeshis tended towards collectivism, meaning they were more family-orientated and community-centered, and motivated by teamwork, much like people from other non-Western societies. Non-migrants 5living in motivated by teamwork, much like people from other non-Western societies. Non-migrants living in the same area of East London tended to be less collectivistic, on average. 4 were_born born has_born had_born
空格 1establish establish / build / dismantle / demolish
搭配establish whether... 「查明是否」固定搭配，常用於研究目的
✗ build/dismantle/demolish 指建造/拆除實體，不接 whether 子句也不合探究語意
空格 2had moved had moved / moved / move / moving
時態與 were born and raised(過去)相比，搬到英國更早完成，用過去完成 had moved
✗ moved 缺先後對比；move/moving 與 who 子句時態不合
空格 3differences similarities / variances / disparities / differences
語意呼應前文 cultural differences，後句舉 collectivism 列舉的是差異
搭配differences in the psychological characteristics 搭配自然
✗ similarities 語意相反；variances/disparities 雖近義但全文用 differences，且 In line with previous research 指向既有差異研究
空格 4were born were born / born / has born / had born
時態被動「被生下」固定為 be born，主詞 parents 過去用 were born
單複數主詞 parents 複數，搭配 were
✗ born 缺 be 動詞；has born 單複數與被動皆錯；had born 為主動「生下」且時態不合
空格 5living live / lives / lived / living
詞性Non-migrants ___ in the same area 為後位修飾名詞的分詞片語，用 living
時態主要動詞已是 tended to be，此處需分詞而非另一個限定動詞
✗ live/lives/lived 皆限定動詞，會使句子出現兩個主要動詞而結構錯誤
305.Mars and Earth(火星和地球)2 格#080311
On Tuesday, the red planet will come the closest to Earth that it will be until2035,NASA reported - but On Tuesday, the red planet will come the closest to Earth that it will be until2035,NASA reported - but that distance is rather relative as the planets will be a whopping 38.6 million miles away from each other. 1Known as the Mars Close Approach, this event happens every two years and follows Mars and other. Known as the Mars Close Approach, this event happens every two years and follows Mars and Earth which are normally at least 33.9 million miles away-as they come closer to and farther away from each other in their elliptical orbits around the sun, according to the space agency. When Mars, Earth each other in their elliptical orbits around the sun, according to the space agency. When Mars, Earth and the sun become aligned, the red planet will be "visible for much of the night in the southern sky and is at its highest point at about midnight," NASA wrote. Mars will also appear "very bright" in and is at its highest point at about midnight," NASA wrote. Mars will also appear "very bright" in Earth's sky, according to NASA making it "easier to see with 2telescopes or the naked eye" and providing exceptional viewing that only comes around once every 15-17 years. "Simply go outside and providing exceptional viewing that only comes around once every 15-17 years. "Simply go outside and look up and, depending on your local weather and lighting conditions, you should be able to see Mars," NASA wrote."...Mars is at its brightest, so go out and take a look!" Mars," NASA wrote."...Mars is at its brightest, so go out and take a look!" microscope binoculars magnifying_glass telescopes ordinary_observation average_sight typical_spectacle exceptional_viewing 3 ordinary_observation average_sight typical_spectacle exceptional_viewing
空格 1Known Known / Observed / Recognized / Identified
搭配Known as「被稱為…」分詞片語置句首，Known as the Mars Close Approach
詞性過去分詞 Known 引導被動分詞構句修飾主句 this event
✗ Observed/Recognized/Identified 雖近義，但 known as 才是「被稱為」的慣用搭配
空格 2telescopes microscope / binoculars / telescopes
語意easier to see with ___ or the naked eye「用望遠鏡或肉眼更易看見」，與肉眼並列指 telescopes
單複數原文用複數 telescopes，與 the naked eye 並列為觀星工具
✗ microscope(顯微鏡)用於微觀；binoculars 雖可但原文用 telescopes 觀測火星
306.UK universities(英國大學)5 格#080312
The research, commissioned by HEDOF, asked 1,000 students from UK universities for their views on the quality of their university campus and sheds new light on how students make decisions as they go through the application process. When asked what the most important factors were when deciding where tostudy, 76% of students 1ranks campus facilities as either 'quite or very important, with only 8% saying it was not very or not at all important in their choice. This was the fourth most important factor after course, location and reputation. Estate quality increases in importance once a student has chosen a university with 86% of students saying that it is quite or very, important in their first year of studies. a university with 86% of students saying that it is quite or very, important in their first year of studies. However, the importance students 2attach to estates decreases to 79% for third years students. The research also highlighted how factors such as demographics, region and type of university attended research also highlighted how factors such as demographics, region and type of university attended have an impact on how students view the university buildings. Students in Russell Group universities are much more likely to describe their buildings as 3inspiring, , closely followed by students in newer are much more likely to describe their buildings as inspiring closely followed by students in newer universities such as Lincoln, Gloucestershire and Ravensbourne College. This pattern was repeated when students were asked to rate the overall quality and design of estate, with Russell Group students, when students were asked to rate the overall quality and design of estate, with Russell Group students, and students from newer universities, more likely to rate the estates as excellent. Existing data shows capital expenditure on estates 4has been the highest amongst the Russell Group universities during capital expenditure on estates has been the highest amongst the Russell Group universities during 2001-2011. When asked where they would invest money in their universities, the top three areas in order of preference were: smaller class sizes, bursaries for poorer students and new buildings and order of preference were: smaller class sizes, bursaries for poorer students and new buildings and facilities. When their expenditure options were restricted to estates-only items, the 5repair and maintenance of existing buildings came out top with 77%,which suggests that new buildings should maintenance of existing buildings came out top with 77%,which suggests that new buildings should not be at the expense of the rest of the estate, and may even highlight the deficiencies of tired and attach detach disconnect separate inspiring boring discouraging unmotivating have_been has_been will_be was 4 have_been has_been will_be was
空格 1ranks positions / statuses / levels / ranks
搭配rank A as B「把A評為B」句型，後接 as either quite or very important
詞性後接 campus facilities as... 需動詞，ranks 為動詞
✗ positions/statuses/levels 為名詞，無法構成 ___ campus facilities as... 的動詞句型
空格 2attach attach / detach / disconnect / separate
搭配attach importance to「重視」固定搭配，the importance students attach to estates
✗ detach/disconnect/separate 皆「分離」，破壞 attach importance to 慣用語
空格 3inspiring inspiring / boring / discouraging / unmotivating
語意後文 rate the estates as excellent 為正評，describe buildings as inspiring 同為正面
✗ boring/discouraging/unmotivating 皆負面，與後文 excellent 正評矛盾
空格 4has been have been / has been / will be / was
單複數主詞 capital expenditure 不可數單數，搭配 has been
時態during 2001-2011 配現在完成式 has been the highest 表延續結果
✗ have been 單複數錯；will be 未來與過去期間矛盾；was 與完成式語氣不一致
空格 5repair repair / damage / impair / destroy
語意the repair and maintenance of existing buildings 修繕與維護，repair 正向搭配 maintenance
✗ damage/impair/destroy 皆「損壞」，與 maintenance 並列矛盾
307.SWOT analysis(四點分析)4 格#080313
In your organisation there are some things that are under your control and other things that are not. We usually think of those elements you can directly influence that push you 1forward as strengths and We usually think of those elements you can directly influence that push you forward as strengths and those that hold you back as weaknesses. What lies outside your control but could be used 2to your advantage are opportunities, and what you can't control but which could 3restrict you are threats. These advantage are opportunities, and what you can't control but which could restrict you are threats. These are the components of a SWOT analysis. SWOT came out of the failure of long-range corporate planning in the US in the 1960s and 1970s and 4still typifies the sort of framework applied to strategic planning in the US in the 1960s and 1970s and still typifies the sort of framework applied to strategic decision and policy making today.
空格 1forward forward / backward / reverse / advance
搭配push you forward「推你前進」固定搭配，對應 strengths 優勢
語意與後文 hold you back(拖後腿)的 weaknesses 相對，優勢是推你向前
✗ backward/reverse 與「優勢推進」相反；advance 不搭 push you 此片語
空格 2to to / of / as / for
搭配used to your advantage「為你所用/對你有利」固定搭配，介系詞用 to
語意could be used ___ your advantage，to one's advantage 慣用
✗ of/as/for 皆不構成 to one's advantage 的慣用片語
空格 3restrict restrict / liberate / permit / allow
語意what you can't control but which could ___ you are threats「會限制你的是威脅」，用 restrict
搭配threats 定義為會「限制」你的外部因素，用 restrict
✗ liberate(解放)、permit/allow(允許)語意與 threats(威脅)相反
空格 4still still / continue / nolonger / without
詞性and ___ typifies the…framework，副詞修飾動詞 typifies，用 still「仍然」
語意SWOT 源自 1960-70 年代但「仍」是今日策略框架，用 still
✗ continue 為動詞不合副詞位；no longer 語意相反；without 為介系詞不合
308.Mercury (水星)2 格#080314
Mercury puts up with more crap than anyone else, so I stayed quiet while others incorrectly suggested Mercury puts up with more crap than anyone else, so I stayed quiet while others incorrectly suggested that Venus, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, or Uranus were any better. Few pay any attention to it: Astronomers researching the tiny rock often see 1their results smothered by the hype 2surrounding far lamer bodies researching the tiny rock often see their results smothered by the hype surrounding far lamer bodies like Pluto and Europa. And Mercury fans have to put up with shade like this quote from Ross Andersen: “Tiny thing, Sun-blasted and crater-pocked, more moon than planet.” But Mercury's been the best “Tiny thing, Sun-blasted and crater-pocked, more moon than planet.” But Mercury's been the best planet all along. You just haven't been paying any attention. 1 their_results their_process their_procedure their_method
空格 1their results their results / their process / their procedure / their method
語意天文學家研究成果被炒作淹沒(smothered by the hype)，results 貼合被忽視的研究發現
✗ process/procedure/method 指過程/方法，被淹沒的應是研究「成果」
空格 2surrounding apart / distant / away / surrounding
搭配the hype surrounding (something)「圍繞...的炒作」固定搭配，分詞後位修飾 hype
詞性需可後接 far lamer bodies 的分詞，surrounding 兼具分詞功能
✗ apart/distant/away 為副詞或形容詞，無法後接 bodies 構成修飾結構
309.Victorians readers(維多利亞時代的讀者)3 格#080315
Victorians were avid readers. Just as we bury our faces in our mobile devices on the morning commute, so too did Victorians with the latest penny fiction. Perhaps the best know serialized novels were the so too did Victorians with the latest penny fiction. Perhaps the best know serialized novels were the “Penny Dreadfuls”. 2Costing just one old penny, they focused on the exploits of detectives, criminals, or supernatural entities. The price of new books often only available as a set of three was out of reach or supernatural entities. The price of new books often only available as a set of three was out of reach for most working-class people, so they borrowed from circulating libraries such as Mudie's (founded 1842), which dispatched books all over Britain for a modest subscription fee. For the wealthier classes 1842), which dispatched books all over Britain for a modest subscription fee. For the wealthier classes who could afford first editions, reading from their own collection would be an everyday occurrence. 4 could_afford couldn't_afford could_buy could_manage
空格 1also需覆核 also / certainly
搭配句型 just as... so too did Victorians，平行對等結構需要 also 表「同樣也」
語意語意是「我們埋首手機，維多利亞人也一樣埋首小說」，also 表並列同類
✗ certainly 是「確實」表強調語氣，無法呼應 just as...so too 的對等並列結構
空格 2Costing Costing / worth / having / selling
時態句首分詞構句，主詞 they(Penny Dreadfuls)，用現在分詞 Costing 表伴隨狀態「售價只要一便士」
搭配cost 後直接接金額 cost one old penny，固定用法不需介系詞
✗ worth/selling 後接金額與句構不合；having 無「值多少錢」之意
空格 3similarly需覆核 differently / similarly / comparably
語意前文談大眾借書，此處轉向富人「同樣地」從自家藏書閱讀，similarly 表類比延續
詞性副詞修飾整句，與 reading from their own collection 形成相似情境對照
✗ differently 表「不同地」語意相反；comparably 重點在「程度相當」而非情境類比，不如 similarly 自然
310.The public health movement(公共衛生運動)4 格#080316
The public health movement was one of the most important agents for change, even before the 1870s. The public health movement was one of the most important agents for change, even before the 1870s. It was connected to developments in science 1as well as to the local government and health administration systems that operated in the large towns. Edwin Chadwick's 1848 Public Health Act has administration systems that operated in the large towns. Edwin Chadwick's 1848 Public Health Act 2has been widely recognized as a milestone, while medical advances and trustworthy dispensaries aided many patients. Cholera epidemics were prevented in Britain from the 1860s, 3which reflected progress many patients. Cholera epidemics were prevented in Britain from the 1860s, which reflected progress in both sewerage systems and in the water supply. Yet, 4although the infrastructure of modern urban life was being created at this time, it was not available for all and many public or private bath and life was being created at this time, it was not available for all and many public or private bath and washhouse facilities remained poor. Slum areas certainly remained in central London long after the Public Health Act of 1875 and it was still difficult to say that sanitary reforms had made British towns Public Health Act of 1875 and it was still difficult to say that sanitary reforms had made British towns 2 has_been_widely_recog have_been_widely_reco had_been_widely_recog has_been_narrowly_rec nized gnized nized ognized nized gnized nized ognized which who whom what while though notwithstanding although
空格 1as well as unlike / instead / rather / as well as
搭配connected to A as well as to B 並列兩項，連接 developments in science 與 local government
詞性需連接詞並列兩個 to 介系詞片語
✗ unlike/instead/rather 表對比或替代，無法平行並列兩個並存對象
空格 2has been widely recognized has been widely recognized / have been widely recognized / had been widely recognized / has been narrowly recognized
單複數主詞 Public Health Act 單數，被動完成式用 has been
語意後文稱其為 milestone，故 widely 而非 narrowly 被認可
✗ have been 單複數錯；had been 無過去完成參照點；narrowly recognized 與 milestone 正評矛盾
空格 3which which / who / whom / what
詞性先行詞為前面整件事(疫病被防止)非人，用 which 引導非限定子句
✗ who/whom 指人不合；what 不可作關係代名詞修飾先行詞
空格 4although while / though / notwithstanding / although
詞性後接主詞+動詞完整子句 it was not available，需連接詞 although
搭配Yet, although... 引導讓步子句後接主句
✗ while 雖可讓步但此處 although 最標準；notwithstanding 多接名詞片語；though 可但 although 較合此書面語
311.Mona Lisa(蒙娜麗莎)4 格#080317
Leonardo da Vinci's Mona Lisa is the most famous painting in the world. Sitting behind bullet-proof glass at the Musée du Louvre in Paris, the small portrait attracts around six million visitors 1per year . glass at the Musée du Louvre in Paris, the small portrait attracts around six million visitors per year . But why is the painting so renowned? While da Vinci is praised for his art 2as well as his inventions, he is hardly the most prolific artist of the period. Only fifteen works can be assuredly attributed to the hardly the most prolific artist of the period. Only fifteen works can be assuredly attributed to the master, while there are just ten or so that are lost or disputed. And although he epitomizes the term Renaissance man, is he arguably 3the best artist of the period. Michelangelo was better at capturing the Renaissance man, is he arguably the best artist of the period. Michelangelo was better at capturing the human form, Botticelli better with color and theme, and Raphael feasibly a more artful painter. The reason everyone cites for the Mona Lisa's popularity is her smile. Often 4described as enigmatic, her half- reason everyone cites for the Mona Lisa's popularity is her smile. Often described as enigmatic, her half- smile has puzzled people from Sigmund Freud and Harvard professors to countless observers. 1 per_year per_day per_hour per_second 3 the_finest not_the_greatest the_best the_worst 4 described_by described_in described_with described_as
空格 1per year per year / per day / per hour / per second
語意六百萬訪客的合理單位是每年，符合知名博物館年參觀人次量級
✗ per day/hour/second 使六百萬訪客數量級不合常理
空格 2as well as despite / although / because of / as well as
搭配praised for his art as well as his inventions 並列兩項，連接兩名詞片語
✗ despite/although 為讓步連接詞語意不合；because of 表原因，皆破壞並列關係
空格 3the best the finest / not the greatest / the best / the worst
語意後文舉各畫家所長反駁，is he arguably the best 才被推翻，呼應後段比較
✗ the finest 同義但 the best 直接呼應後段比較；not the greatest 破壞反問語氣；the worst 語意相反
空格 4described as described by / described in / described with / described as
搭配describe A as B 固定句型，Often described as enigmatic
✗ described by 指被某人描述；described in/with 搭配錯，唯 describe...as 接形容詞 enigmatic
312.Children's Games(兒童遊戲)4 格#080318
Until quite recently, little research had focused on children's own perceptions of their play. Studies that Until quite recently, little research had focused on children's own perceptions of their play. Studies that have investigated what play means to children have been fruitful and have led to 1much deeper insight as to what separates play from other types of activity. Research demonstrates that preschool children as to what separates play from other types of activity. Research demonstrates that preschool children define play as activity that is freely chosen and self-directed. 2Surprisingly , children do not often define play as being something that is necessarily fun (Robson,2000). 3In addition to choice and control, play as being something that is necessarily fun (Robson,2000). In addition to choice and control, activities that occur on the floor, rather than at a table, and outside, rather than inside, are more likely to be seen as play (Howard, 2002; Parker, 2007). The nature and degree of adult involvement are also to be seen as play (Howard, 2002; Parker, 2007). The nature and degree of adult involvement are also important Bundy (1993) argues that the way that children 4approach an activity may be far more important than the actual activity itself. The same activity might be described by children as play or not important than the actual activity itself. The same activity might be described by children as play or not play, depending on the freedom, choice and control they are afforded. 3 despite except_for instead_of In_addition_to
空格 1much little / none / few / much
單複數後接不可數 insight，much deeper insight，much 修飾比較級且搭配不可數
語意have led to much deeper insight 帶來更深洞見，語意正向遞進
✗ little/none 語意為「少/沒有」與 deeper insight 矛盾；few 接可數複數不合 insight
空格 2Surprisingly Surprisingly / predictably / obviously / expectedly
語意孩子竟不把遊戲定義為有趣，與直覺相反，Surprisingly 引導反預期事實
✗ predictably/obviously/expectedly 皆「如預期」，與違反常識的發現矛盾
空格 3In addition to despite / except for / instead of / In addition to
搭配In addition to choice and control「除...之外還」引導附加項，後接名詞且呼應前文已提的 choice/control
✗ despite/except for/instead of 表讓步、排除或替代，與累加一項因素的語意相反
空格 4approach avoid / retreat / depart / approach
搭配the way children approach an activity「孩子著手活動的方式」，approach an activity 固定搭配
✗ avoid/retreat/depart 皆「逃避、離開」，與探討如何投入活動的語意相反
313.4D-Printing(4D打印)4 格#080319
A new 4D-printing technique that creates complex structures in minutes could be used to make temperature-activated cardiac stents, drug capsules and flat-pack furniture. 4D printing creates 3D obiects that change their shape over time in response to 1stimuli such as heat, moisture or light, It is useful for making structures that can adapt to their environment but is often a 2laborious process. The most common materials used in 4D printing, shape-memory polymers normally 3require at least five steps to make them into adaptable objects. Hydrogels are simpler to use, but too soft to 4fashion into trendy old fashioned function fashion
空格 1stimuli response / effects / outcomes / stimuli
搭配固定搭配 in response to stimuli such as heat...「對刺激作出反應」，stimuli 為 stimulus 複數
語意後接 such as heat, moisture or light 都是外界刺激，語意指 stimuli
✗ response 與前文 change shape 重複且不搭 such as 例子；effects/outcomes 是「結果」非「引發改變的刺激」
空格 2laborious laborious / easy / effortless / simple
語意前有 but 轉折，後句說需至少五步驟，呼應「費工費力」用 laborious
搭配a laborious process 固定搭配「繁瑣費力的過程」
✗ easy/effortless/simple 皆「輕鬆簡單」，與 but 轉折及「至少五步驟」的下文矛盾
空格 3require offer / refuse / neglect / require
時態主詞 shape-memory polymers 為複數，動詞用原形 require（normally 表習慣現在式）
語意require at least five steps「需要至少五個步驟」，符合製作繁瑣的語意
✗ offer/refuse/neglect 語意不通，無法搭配「五個步驟」；refuse/neglect 帶負面拒絕意不合
空格 4fashion trendy / old / fashioned / function / fashion
詞性too soft to fashion into...，fashion 作動詞「塑造成型」，配 too...to 不定式
搭配fashion something into 固定搭配「把…塑造成…」
✗ trendy/old/fashioned 為形容詞、function 是名詞「功能」，皆無法作此處的及物動詞 fashion into
314.Elizabeth(伊麗莎白)4 格#080320
Portraiture played an important role in the Elizabethan era. Queen Elizabeth's portraits conveyed the regal image of a powerful monarch thesteadfast, ageless force 1behind England. Owning paintings of the Oueen was viewed as a status symbol. Robert Dudley, Earl of Leicester, displayed over 50 paintings at his Castle in Kenilworth,Warwickshire a bold 2reminder to guests that he was the man closest to the Oueen. Although Elizabethan artists drewinspiration from the European Renaissance, itit was Elizabeth herself who was the national preoccupation. Invoking her image in paintings and literature had the effect of elevating them to a higher level. Today, we like to think of art as an expression of feelings and beliefs. But in Elizabethan England, flattery was the order of the day-a time when most artists needed wealthy sponsors 4to survive . 2 room_reservations event_agenda welcom_message reminder_to_guests 4 to_survive to_thrive to_perish to_conquer
空格 1behind ahead / alongside / above / behind
語意the steadfast, ageless force behind England「英格蘭背後堅定的力量」，behind 表幕後支撐
✗ ahead/alongside/above 指前方/並肩/上方，不符女王作為國家幕後支柱的意象
空格 2reminder to guests room reservations / event agenda / welcom message / reminder to guests
語意展示50幅畫是 a bold reminder to guests 提醒賓客他與女王關係親近，呼應 the man closest to the Queen
✗ room reservations/event agenda/welcom message 為訂房、議程、歡迎詞等無關語境
空格 3it whom / where / what / it
搭配強調句 it was Elizabeth herself who... 用 it 作形式主詞搭配 who
詞性原文 itit 為重複贅字，正解是強調句的 it
✗ whom/where/what 無法構成 ___ was Elizabeth herself who 的分裂強調句
空格 4to survive to survive / to thrive / to perish / to conquer
語意藝術家需富有贊助者才能 survive(維生)，呼應 flattery was the order of the day 須奉承謀生
✗ to thrive(興盛)語氣過強；to perish(滅亡)/to conquer(征服)語意相反或不合靠贊助維生的情境
315.Social Science(社會科學)3 格#080321
Social science is, in its broadest sense, the study of society and the manner in which people behave Social science is, in its broadest sense, the study of society and the manner in which people behave and influence the world around us. Social science tells us about the world beyond our immediate 1experience and can help explain how our own society works - from the causes of 2unemployment or experience and can help explain how our own society works - from the causes of unemployment or what helps economic growth, to how and why people vote, or what makes people happy. It provides vital 3information for governments and policymakers, local authorities, non-governmental organisations vital information for governments and policymakers, local authorities, non-governmental organisations
空格 1experience encounter / knowledge / journey / experience
搭配固定片語 beyond our immediate experience「超出我們直接經驗之外」
語意語意指社會科學告訴我們親身體驗之外的世界，experience 切題
✗ encounter/journey/knowledge 皆不搭 immediate 形成此片語，語意亦不如 experience 精準
空格 2unemployment job / career / profession / unemployment
搭配the causes of unemployment「失業的成因」固定搭配，與後文 economic growth 並列為社會議題
語意對照 what helps economic growth，這裡談負面議題的成因，unemployment 對應
✗ job/career/profession 是「工作/職業」，談「成因」語意不通，無 the causes of job 這種搭配
空格 3information data / knowledge / details / information
搭配provides vital information for...「為…提供重要資訊」固定搭配
語意為政府與政策制定者提供的是 information，呼應資訊提供
✗ data 偏原始數據、details 偏細節、knowledge 偏知識體系，皆不如 vital information 與 provide for 的標準搭配
316.Helping Deaf People(幫助聾人)4 格#080323
According to Professor Brian Mak, Associate Professor in HKUST's Department of Computer Science and Engineering, a recent survey indicated that Hong Kong is home to around 50,000 people who are either totally deaf or are hearing-impaired. 1However , the kind of support this community requires is not currently available. “The number of professional sign language interpreters [in Hong Kong] is low - only about 54 in total," Professor Mak explained. For their final year project, three Computer Science and Engineering undergraduates decided to use the skills they 2had developed at HKUST to tackle this problem. The app developed by Ken Ka-wai Lai, Mary Ming- fong Leung and Kelvin Wai-chiu Yung translates Chinese sentences keyed into a phone into video sequences ilustrating how to sign the words. Professor Mak sees the app being of great use to those training to be interpreters, 3as well as to the general public.“This project is a good example of our passion to serve," he said. One of the main challenges the students 4faced arose from the differing sentence structures in sign language and Chinese. “In sign language, adjectives, adverbs, numbers and question words are normally placed after the noun, which is not the case in Chinese," Lai pointed out. 3 along_with together_with coupled_with as_well_as
空格 1However需覆核 However / Nevertheless / Nonetheless / Yet
語意前文香港有五萬聾人，後文支援不足，需轉折詞 However
✗ Nevertheless/Nonetheless/Yet 雖同為轉折近義，但 However 為此書面語境最標準通用的轉折詞
空格 2had developed have developed / developed / develop / had developed
時態use the skills they ___ at HKUST，使用技能(過去)之前已培養好，用過去完成 had developed
✗ have developed 現在完成與過去主句不合；developed 缺先後對比；develop 時態錯
空格 3as well as需覆核 along with / together with / coupled with / as well as
搭配of great use to A as well as to B 並列兩受益對象，連接 interpreters 與 the general public
✗ along with/together with/coupled with 雖近義，但 as well as 連接兩個 to 片語最自然，且與後文 as well as 用法一致
空格 4faced facing / faces / confront / faced
時態challenges the students ___「學生面臨的挑戰」，過去式 faced 後位修飾
詞性省略關係代名詞 that 的修飾，需過去分詞/過去式 faced
✗ facing 主動進行式語意不合；faces 時態與單複數錯；confront 為原形時態錯
317.Desert Tortoises(沙漠龜)3 格#080324
The study 1originated in 2008 with a planned expansion of Fort Irwin National Training Center in the The study originated in 2008 with a planned expansion of Fort Irwin National Training Center in the Mojave Desert. But the expansion area included a swath of prime habitat for the endangered desert tortoise. So the U.S. Department of Defense funded relocation of the tortoises to an area adjacent to tortoise. So the U.S. Department of Defense funded relocation of the tortoises to an area adjacent to the base that is less than 10 miles south of their previous home. The Smithsonian Institute's National Zoo and Conservation Biology Institute has completed parentage analysis after the relocation and has found that 2none of the transported males had sired any offspring. In contrast , all the moved females found that none of the transported males had sired any offspring. In contrast , all the moved females and the resident tortoises had adjusted well and reproduced. Kevin Mulder, a graduate student at the Smithsonian Conservation Biology Institute and first author on the paper, said more research is Smithsonian Conservation Biology Institute and first author on the paper, said more research is necessary to identify what may have happened . 4 may_happen may_had_happened may_happened may_have_happened
空格 1originated originating / origin / originate / originated
時態The study originated in 2008，明確過去時間點 in 2008，用過去式 originated
詞性主詞 The study 需限定動詞，originating 分詞、origin 名詞、originate 原形皆不合
✗ originating 為分詞無法作主動詞；origin 是名詞；originate 原形時態不合 in 2008
空格 2none any / all / little / none
搭配none of the transported males had sired「沒有任何被移地的公龜繁殖後代」，none of + the 複數固定否定結構
語意與後文 In contrast, all the moved females...reproduced 形成「公龜全無、母龜全有」對比
✗ any of...had sired 語意不通需配否定；all 與後文對比矛盾；little 修飾不可數不合 males
空格 3Whereas需覆核 Whereas / Nevertheless
語意前句公龜全無後代、後句母龜全部繁殖，強烈對比用 Whereas「然而/反觀」
搭配Whereas 引導對比子句，與原文 In contrast 的對照功能一致
✗ Nevertheless 偏「儘管如此」表讓步，此處為純對比非讓步，Whereas 更精準
318.Benjamin Banneker(班納克)4 格#080325
Benjamin Banneker, a mathematician, astronomer, and surveyor, has been called the first African Benjamin Banneker, a mathematician, astronomer, and surveyor, has been called the first African American intellectual. Self-taught, after studying the inner workings of a friend's watch, he made one of wood that accurately 1kept time for more than 40 years. Banneker taught himself astronomy well of wood that accurately kept time for more than 40 years. Banneker taught himself astronomy well enough to correctly 2predict a solar eclipse in 1789. From 1791 to 1802 he published the Pennsylvania, Delaware, Maryland, and Virginia Almanac and Ephemeris, which contained tide tables, future eclipses, Delaware, Maryland, and Virginia Almanac and Ephemeris, which contained tide tables, future eclipses, and medicinal formulas. It is believed to be the first scientific book published by an African American. Also, a surveyor and mathematician, Banneker was appointed by President George Washington to the Also, a surveyor and mathematician, Banneker was appointed by President George Washington to the District of Columbia Commission, which was responsible for the survey work that established the city's original 3boundaries . When committee chairman Pierre Charles LEnfant suddenly resigned and left, original boundaries . When committee chairman Pierre Charles LEnfant suddenly resigned and left, taking the plans with him, Banneker 4reproduced the plans from memory, saving valuable time. A staunch opponent of slavery, Banneker sent a copy of his first almanac to then- Secretary of State staunch opponent of slavery, Banneker sent a copy of his first almanac to then- Secretary of State Thomas Jefferson to counter Jefferson's belief in the intellectual inferiority of blacks.
空格 1kept hold / lost / release / kept
搭配accurately kept time「準確走時」，keep time 固定搭配指鐘錶走時
時態敘述過去事蹟 for more than 40 years，用過去式 kept
✗ hold/release 不搭 time 表走時；lost time 雖搭但語意是「走慢」與 accurately 矛盾
空格 2predict predict / guess / create / explain
搭配predict a solar eclipse「預測日蝕」固定搭配，與 correctly 呼應
語意自學天文到能正確「預測」1789年日蝕，predict 切題
✗ guess 偏「猜測」與 correctly 嚴謹預測不合；create/explain 無法與 eclipse 構成「預測天象」之意
空格 3boundaries boundaries / limits / edges / borders
搭配the city's original boundaries「城市原始邊界」，與勘測委員會劃界工作呼應
語意委員會負責確立城市疆界，boundaries 切題
✗ limits/edges/borders 雖近義，但 city boundaries 為行政疆界慣用詞，borders 多指國界、edges 偏物理邊緣
空格 4reproduced reproduced / copied / replicated / duplicated
搭配reproduced the plans from memory「憑記憶重現圖紙」，reproduce from memory 固定搭配
時態敘述過去事蹟用過去式 reproduced
✗ copied/replicated/duplicated 雖近義，但 reproduce...from memory「憑記憶還原」最自然慣用，copy/duplicate 偏「複印」需原件在手
319.Subsidies(補貼)6 格#080326
Governments also frequently subsidize local industries to help them compete in the global market. Subsidies come 1in the form of tax credits or direct payments. The most commonly used are farm subsidies. That allows producers to lower the price of local goods and services. This 2makes the products cheaper even when shipped overseas. Subsidies work even better than tariffs. This method works best for countries that rely mainly on exports. 3But sometimes subsidies can have the opposite effect. The Agricultural Adjustment Act of 1933 4allowed the government to pay farmers 5not to grow crops or livestock. The government wanted to control supply and increase prices. Farmers could also let their fields rest and regain nutrients due to overproduction. It helped the agriculture industry but 6raised food costs during the Depression. 1 as_the_form as_a_form with_the_form in_the_form_of prohibited denied blocked allowed deny enable allow not
空格 1in the form of as the form / as a form / with the form / in the form of
搭配come in the form of「以...形式呈現」固定搭配，Subsidies come in the form of tax credits
✗ as the form/as a form/with the form 皆非慣用搭配，唯 in the form of 正確接 tax credits or direct payments
空格 2makes made / making / have made / makes
單複數主詞 This 單數，動詞用第三人稱單數 makes
時態全段陳述普遍事實用現在簡單式 makes
✗ made/have made 時態與單數主詞 This 的一般現在式不合；making 為分詞不能當主要動詞
空格 3But But / However / Also / Moreover
語意前文補貼有效，後文 the opposite effect(反效果)，需轉折詞 But
詞性句首連接前後兩句的轉折
✗ However 也可但較正式常需逗號，此口語語境 But 更貼切；Also/Moreover 表累加與轉折相反
空格 4allowed prohibited / denied / blocked / allowed
搭配allowed the government to pay「允許政府...」，allow + 受詞 + to do 句型
時態1933 法案為過去事件，用過去式 allowed
✗ prohibited/denied/blocked 皆「禁止」，與法案授權政府付錢給農民的內容矛盾
空格 5not deny / enable / allow / not
搭配pay farmers not to grow crops「付錢叫農民不要種」，否定不定詞用 not to do
語意後文 wanted to control supply 想控制供給，故付錢使農民「不」種植
✗ deny/enable/allow 皆動詞，無法填入 pay farmers ___ to grow 的否定不定詞位置(需 not)
空格 6raised lowered / erected / escalated / raised
語意減少種植控制供給以 increase prices，故 raised food costs(推高糧價)呼應 increase prices
時態蕭條時期過去事件，過去式 raised
✗ lowered 語意相反(壓低)；erected 多指豎立建物不搭 costs；escalated 雖近義但 raised 與前文 increase prices 直接呼應
320.Public Archaeology(公衆考古學)5 格#080327
The aim of this book is to give the reader an overview of study and practice in the field of public archaeology. It offers a series of snapshots of important ideas and areas of work brought together as archaeology. It offers a series of snapshots of important ideas and areas of work brought together as an introduction, 1albeit an inevitably brief and incomplete one, to one of the most challenging and rewarding parts of the wider archaeological discipline. Read the book from cover to cover and you will rewarding parts of the wider archaeological discipline. Read the book from cover to cover and you will have a good working understanding of public archaeology as a complicated , rich and diverse field, as well as knowledge of some of the most significant and iconic examples of public archaeology in action. well as knowledge of some of the most significant and iconic examples of public archaeology in action. Dip into a specific chapter and you will find a concise and insightful introduction to one aspect of public archaeology with case studies and a list of readings to develop your understanding. However public archaeology with case studies and a list of readings to develop your understanding. However you use this book I am confident that you will emerge with a better understanding of what public archaeology is, why it matters and what you can do about it. First, it is necessary and useful, drawing archaeology is, why it matters and what you can do about it. First, it is necessary and useful, drawing on the quotes above, to ask what we mean by public archaeology, and to examine some of the different ways it has been defined. different ways it has been defined. although despite hence albeit as_a_complicated complexly as_a_complex 2intricately Dip_into Sip_from Brush_against Wade_through 3 Dip_into Sip_from Brush_against Wade_through 4 facet_of_society dimension_of_communi element_of_governance aspect_of_public
空格 1albeit although / despite / hence / albeit
搭配an introduction, albeit an inevitably brief and incomplete one「儘管簡短不完整」，albeit 後接名詞片語表讓步
詞性後接名詞片語 an...one 而非完整子句，需 albeit 而非 although
✗ although/despite 後接子句或須 of；hence 表結果語意相反，唯 albeit 可直接讓步接名詞片語
空格 2intricately需覆核 as a complicated / complexly / as a complex / intricately
詞性a ___, rich and diverse field 與 rich/diverse 並列，依答案欄為 intricately
語意形容公眾考古學是錯綜複雜、豐富多元的領域，intricately 表錯綜
✗ as a complicated/as a complex 帶冠詞破壞並列結構；complexly 雖副詞但 intricately 為答案欄判定
空格 3Wade through Dip into / Sip from / Brush against / Wade through
語意與前文 Read the book from cover to cover 對比另一種讀法，wade through(費力讀完)指通讀
搭配wade through (a book)「費力讀完」慣用語
✗ Dip into 雖也常見且題幹出現，但答案欄為 Wade through；Sip from/Brush against 與閱讀書本不搭
空格 4aspect of public facet of society / dimension of community / element of governance / aspect of public
搭配one aspect of public archaeology「公眾考古學的一個面向」，aspect of 搭配且主題為 public archaeology
✗ facet of society/dimension of community/element of governance 主題錯(社會/社區/治理)，與 public archaeology 不符
空格 5However In addition / But / Moreover / However
搭配However you use this book「無論你怎麼用這本書」，However + 主詞+動詞表「無論如何」
語意前文分通讀與挑章兩種讀法，此處 However 統括「不管哪種方式」
✗ In addition/Moreover 表累加語意不合；But 為對比連接詞無法構成 However you use 的讓步句型

More developed countries are now sending e-waste to less developed countries. Toxic substances from e- waste can get into soil and water 2supplies . All digital devices use electricity. Large computers need waste can get into soil and water supplies . All digital devices use electricity. Large computers need even 3more electricity to keep them cool. The traditional generation 4of electricity produces greenhouse gases that can cause global warming. Some of the elements used to create digital devices are in short gases that can cause global warming. Some of the elements used to create digital devices are in short supply so will run out one day. Electricity often comes from non-renewable resources such as coal and oil(fossil fuels),which will also run out in the future. oil(fossil fuels),which will also run out in the future. sends trends blends ends supports replies occupies supplies significantly_fewer much_less even_more more 3 significantly_fewer much_less even_more more
空格 1ends sends / trends / blends / ends

✗ off/at/on 皆無法與 run out 構成「用盡」慣用片語，唯 run out of 正確

Mauritius had lost more than 95% of its biodiversity by the late 1970s and with only four Mauritius kestrels left in the wild, making them the rarest bird in the world, Professor Jones began his work to kestrels left in the wild, making them the rarest bird in the world, Professor Jones began his work to save the species. He was the sixth biologist to work with the species' restoration, but where others failed, he persisted. One decade later, he had successfully reared and 1released 333 Mauritius kestrels in failed, he persisted. One decade later, he had successfully reared and released 333 Mauritius kestrels in the wild. The professor noted that all Mauritian species have a distinctly important ecological function while nurturing the Mauritius kestrels. From the echo parakeet to the giant tortoises, Professor Jones while nurturing the Mauritius kestrels. From the echo parakeet to the giant tortoises, Professor Jones found that to save one species, you have to save them all. He 2became a pioneer for population 3management techniques and reversed the decline of the island's most endangered species. Carl Jones Ph.D has driven recoveries in seven birds, seven reptiles and two mammal species which are - or were - Ph.D has driven recoveries in seven birds, seven reptiles and two mammal species which are - or were -
空格 1released reversed / relieved / related / released
搭配reared and released 333 kestrels「飼育並野放333隻隼」，release into the wild 固定搭配野放
語意後接 in the wild，指繁殖後野放，released 切題

空格 2became becomes / became
時態He became a pioneer，全文敘述過去事蹟(noted, found, persisted)用過去式 became
單複數主詞 He 第三人稱，過去式 became 與通篇過去時態一致

空格 3management magnetism / investment / replacement / management

✗ magnetism/investment/replacement 與 population...techniques 語意不合，無此保育術語搭配
空格 4drove需覆核 drives / drove
時態全文過去敘事(became, reversed)且與 are - or were 的回顧對照，依過去事蹟取 drove
語意描述他過去主導七種鳥類等的復育，drove 表已完成的過去動作
✗ drives 為現在式，與通篇過去敘事及 were 的回顧語氣不一致

✗ perplex(使困惑)/perform(執行)/pertain(有關)皆動詞，無法填入 the ___ environment 的形容詞位置
324.Early Humans&Water Resources(早期人類與水資源)4 格#080331
Early humans were hunter-gatherers, roaming from place to place, but their movements were controlled by the need for water. When humans 1started to grow food, establishing permanent controlled by the need for water. When humans started to grow food, establishing permanent settlements, water was needed for crops and animals as well as for people, 2so settlements have always grown up near reliable sources of water. Most major towns lie on the banks of rivers, or, where there grown up near reliable sources of water. Most major towns lie on the banks of rivers, or, where there are no streams or rivers, settlements exist where underground water can be reached by digging wells. The management of water resources has a long history . The oldest known dam in the world was The management of water resources has a long history . The oldest known dam in the world was constructed in Egypt about 5000 years ago, and was used for storing drinking and irrigation water. Farmers in Arabia at this time used the craters of extinct volcanoes as storage tanks for irigation water Farmers in Arabia at this time used the craters of extinct volcanoes as storage tanks for irigation water and dug deep wells for their drinking water. Excavated ruins in India of similar antiquity retain the remains of water supply and drainage systems, 4which included baths and swimming pools. remains of water supply and drainage systems, which included baths and swimming pools. long_history short_notice big_change strong_possibility 3 long_history short_notice big_change strong_possibility what itit while which
空格 1started start / starting / have started / started
時態When humans ___ to grow food 過去敘述歷史，過去式 started
搭配start to do 句型，started to grow food
✗ start/starting 時態與形式不合過去敘事；have started 現在完成與全句過去語境不一致
空格 2so but / however / nevertheless / so
語意前句「水為作物、動物、人所需」是因，後句「聚落總建在水源旁」是果，用 so 表結果
✗ but/however/nevertheless 皆轉折，與前後句因果順承相反
空格 3strong possibility需覆核 long history / short notice / big change / strong possibility
語意The management of water resources has a ___，依答案欄為 strong possibility(原檔判定)
✗ long history/short notice/big change 雖 long history 與句意更直觀，但依答案欄填 strong possibility
空格 4which what / it / while / which
詞性drainage systems, ___ included baths「排水系統，其中包含浴池」，which 引導非限定子句指物
✗ what 不可修飾先行詞；it 非關係代名詞無法引導子句；while 為連接詞語意不合
325.Canada(加拿大)4 格#080332
Canada is a country of enormous natural resources. It is the world's largest exporter of forest products and a 1top exporter of fish, furs, and wheat. Minerals 2have played a key role in Canada's transformation and a top exporter of fish, furs, and wheat. Minerals have played a key role in Canada's transformation into an urban-industrial economy. Alberta, British Columbia, Quebec, and Saskatchewan are the principal mining regions. Ontario and the Northwest (NWT) and Yukon Territories are also 3significant principal mining regions. Ontario and the Northwest (NWT) and Yukon Territories are also significant producers. Canada is the world's largest producer of uranium and potash, the third-largest of asbestos, gypsum, and nickel, and the fourth-largest of zinc. Oil and gas are exploited in Alberta, off the Atlantic gypsum, and nickel, and the fourth-largest of zinc. Oil and gas are exploited in Alberta, off the Atlantic coast, and in the northwest - huge additional reserves are thought to exist in the high Arctic; oil price isis making extraction profitable at a growing number of the country's deposits. Canada is also one of the making extraction profitable at a growing number of the country's deposits. Canada is also one of the world's top hydroelectricity producers. 2 had_produced have_had have_produced have_played 4 were_making was_making is_making are_making
空格 1top top / smallest / largest / significant
搭配a top exporter of「頂尖出口國」固定搭配，呼應前句 the world's largest exporter
語意全句誇耀加拿大出口實力，top 表頂尖
✗ smallest 語意相反；largest 已用於前句且 a largest 不自然；significant 程度不如 top 呼應 largest
空格 2have played had produced / have had / have produced / have played
搭配play a key role in「扮演關鍵角色」固定搭配
時態主詞 Minerals 複數，現在完成式 have played 表至今作用
✗ had produced/have produced 與 a key role 不慣用(應 play a role)；have had 雖通但 play a role 為標準慣用語
空格 3significant general / minor / trivial / significant
語意Ontario...are also ___ producers「也是重要的生產地」，significant 呼應前文 principal mining regions
✗ general/minor/trivial 皆「一般/次要/微不足道」，與「也是重要產地」的肯定語意矛盾
空格 4is making were making / was making / is making / are making
單複數主詞 oil price 單數，現在進行式用 is making
時態描述當前情勢用現在進行式，oil price is making extraction profitable
✗ were/was making 為過去式與全段現在語境不合；are making 單複數錯(主詞 oil price 單數)
326.Salt Mountain (鹽山)3 格#080333
One of the largest salt domes in the world, the Cardona Salt Mountain would 1have been almost One of the largest salt domes in the world, the Cardona Salt Mountain would have been almost transparent if it wasn't covered with a bit of laterite on the outside. Back in the Middle Ages, the 2significance of this salt mountain to the 3economy of Cardona cannot be overstated. With the invention significance of this salt mountain to the economy of Cardona cannot be overstated. With the invention of industrial mining technology, in addition to mineral exports, the locals of Cardona started making salt sculptures for sale and invented some unique hard, salty pastries. salt sculptures for sale and invented some unique hard, salty pastries. industry economy environment market aside_from along_with except_for in_addition_to 4 aside_from along_with except_for in_addition_to
空格 1have was / have / had
時態would have been almost transparent 假設語氣的虛擬完成式，與 if it wasn't covered 呼應
搭配would have been 固定構成與現實相反的假設結果
✗ was/had 無法構成 would + have + been 的假設完成結構
空格 2significance significance / significantly / signified / significant
詞性the significance of this salt mountain...，定冠詞 the 後接名詞作主詞，用名詞 significance
單複數後接 cannot be overstated 需名詞主詞，significance 為不可數名詞
✗ significantly 副詞、significant 形容詞皆不能作主詞；signified 為動詞過去式不合此名詞位置
空格 3economy industry / economy / environment / market
搭配the significance...to the economy of Cardona「對卡多納經濟的重要性」，economy 與 significance to 搭配
語意下文談礦業出口、製鹽販售，皆屬經濟層面，economy 統括
✗ industry/market 範圍偏窄、environment 是「環境」皆不如 economy 統括後文的經濟活動
327.Electrons (電子)5 格#080334
The electrons closest to the nucleus in the orbit are 1strongly attracted . They are called bound electrons. And bound electrons are necessary for the production of electric currents 2conditions . In a 3normal atom, if this atom loses electrons, it becomes positively charged. lt attracts more electrons, makes them balanced and should 4overlap pairs of electron orbitals. Having obtained an electric current, we also need to have a conductor, which is any 5material that allows electrons to flow smoothly and conduct an electric current. 1 mildly_interested weakly_drawn strongly_attracted slightly_repelled overlap cover intersect converge content substance material matter
空格 1strongly attracted mildly interested / weakly drawn / strongly attracted / slightly repelled
語意最靠近原子核的電子受強烈吸引，後文稱其 bound electrons(束縛電子)
✗ mildly interested/weakly drawn 程度太弱與 bound 矛盾；slightly repelled(被排斥)語意相反
空格 2conditions需覆核 situations / conditions / environments / circumstances
語意the production of electric currents conditions 產生電流的條件，conditions 貼合物理「條件」
✗ situations/environments/circumstances 雖近義，但 conditions 在科學語境指必要條件最精準
空格 3normal typical / usual / regular / normal
搭配a normal atom「正常原子」物理慣用語，後接失去電子帶正電的常態
✗ typical/usual/regular 雖近義，但 a normal atom 為固定科普用法，描述未受擾動的標準原子
空格 4overlap overlap / cover / intersect / converge
搭配overlap pairs of electron orbitals「軌域重疊」化學固定說法 orbital overlap
✗ cover/intersect/converge 皆「覆蓋/相交/匯聚」，不如 overlap 精準描述電子軌域重疊
空格 5material content / substance / material / matter
語意conductor is any material that allows electrons to flow 導體是讓電子流動的材料
✗ content/substance/matter 雖近義，但定義導體標準說法為 any material，後接 that allows... 最自然
328.Spanish (西班牙語)6 格#080335
Suenos World Spanish Course is the most popular 1choices for adults learning Spanish, in order to 2meet their different needs, 3whether they are learning at home or in class. Through the use of an extensive 4range of resources, such as course books, audio CDs, TV series and online 5activities , the course allows learners to practice listening, speaking and reading skills to reach the level of an 6equivalent native learners to practice listening, speaking and reading skills to reach the level of an equivalent native
空格 1choices makings / decisions / choices / selections
單複數the most popular choices，most popular 與複數 choices 搭配
語意指最受歡迎的選擇之一，choices 語意切題
✗ makings 語意不合；decisions 偏「決定」；selections 雖近義但 popular choices 為慣用搭配
空格 2meet satisfy / encounter / meet / fulfill
搭配meet their different needs「滿足不同需求」固定動詞搭配 meet needs
時態in order to + 原形 meet，不定式表目的
✗ satisfy 雖近義但 meet needs 才是最標準搭配；encounter 是「遭遇」；fulfill 在此 PTE 設定解為 meet
空格 3whether whether / weather / whichever / wherever
搭配whether they are learning at home or in class「無論在家或課堂」，whether...or 固定句型
詞性引導讓步條件子句需連接詞 whether
✗ weather 是「天氣」拼字陷阱；whichever/wherever 無法構成 whether...or... 的二擇對照
空格 4range array / scope / range / extent
搭配an extensive range of resources「一系列廣泛的資源」固定搭配 a range of
語意後接 such as course books, audio CDs... 列舉多種資源，range of 統括
✗ array 雖可 an array of 但不搭 extensive；scope/extent 偏「範圍/程度」不接 of resources 列舉
空格 5activities activities / actions / tasks / events
單複數與 course books, audio CDs, TV series 並列，需複數名詞 activities
搭配online activities「線上活動」固定搭配，為學習資源之一
✗ actions/tasks/events 語意不如 online activities 貼合線上學習資源的慣用說法
空格 6equivalent similar / equal / equivalent / identical
搭配the level of an equivalent native (speaker)「相當於母語者的程度」，equivalent 表水準相當
語意達到與母語人士同等的程度，equivalent 切題
✗ similar/equal 語意相近但 an equivalent native 為慣用搭配；identical 過強表完全相同不合
329.Globalization (全球化)4 格#080336
As economic globalization can 1raise people's living standards, its main advantage is that 2abolish tariffs As economic globalization can raise people's living standards, its main advantage is that abolish tariffs that hinder the flow of goods across borders and enhance the flow of goods between countries. On the other hand, because of economic globalization, transnational outsourcing enables some developed the other hand, because of economic globalization, transnational outsourcing enables some developed country firms to 3exploit people in developing countries as cheap labor. In many industries, there is also a trend toward the 4consolidation of businesses in many industries, and some local companies are a trend toward the consolidation of businesses in many industries, and some local companies are subsumed by foreign companies, which is actually detrimental to the development of the local raze rise raise rais abolish abandon abate absolve exploit misuse utilize abuse
空格 1raise raze / rise / raise / rais
詞性can raise people's living standards，情態動詞 can 後接原形及物動詞 raise，後接受詞 standards
搭配raise living standards「提高生活水準」固定搭配
✗ raze 是「夷平」語意相反；rise 為不及物不接受詞；rais 為拼字錯誤非單字
空格 2abolish abolish / abandon / abate / absolve
搭配abolish tariffs「廢除關稅」固定搭配，與後文 hinder the flow of goods 呼應
語意全球化優點在於廢除阻礙貨物流通的關稅
✗ abandon 偏「放棄」、abate 偏「減輕」、absolve 偏「免責」，皆不搭 tariffs 的「廢除」語意
空格 3exploit exploit / misuse / utilize / abuse
搭配exploit people...as cheap labor「剝削人民當廉價勞力」固定搭配 exploit as
語意語境批評跨國外包剝削開發中國家人民
✗ utilize 中性「利用」無剝削義；misuse/abuse 雖負面但不搭 exploit...as cheap labor 的定型批判語
空格 4consolidation merger / fusion / combination / consolidation
搭配the consolidation of businesses「企業整併」固定搭配，與後文 subsumed by foreign companies 呼應
語意指企業合併集中化的趨勢，consolidation 為產業整併專用詞
✗ merger/fusion/combination 雖近義，但 consolidation of businesses 才是「整併趨勢」的慣用學術搭配
330.Contexts (上下文)5 格#080337
Context is the American Sociological Association's quarterly journal on sociology, available online to 1anyone interested in social thought, designed to apply new knowledge, stimulate new thinking, and anyone interested in social thought, designed to apply new knowledge, stimulate new thinking, and disseminate important information produced by the discipline. Weaving 3together diverse research, it is not, by design, a technical journal, 4but a journal for a diverse audience that wants to keep them not, by design, a technical journal, but a journal for a diverse audience that wants to keep them informed, 5those who want to understand social science knowledge, emerging trends, and their produced_by created_by made_by manufactured_by 2 produced_by created_by made_by manufactured_by along together apart separate although however but besides
空格 1anyone some one / somebody / anyone / nobody
搭配anyone interested in「任何對...有興趣的人」固定搭配
語意available online to ___ 開放給任何對社會思想有興趣者，anyone 表全面開放
✗ some one/somebody 指某人範圍太窄；nobody 語意相反，皆與開放給大眾矛盾
空格 2made by需覆核 produced by / created by / made by / manufactured by
搭配important information made by the discipline，過去分詞片語後位修飾 information
✗ produced/created by 雖近義但此處為原文指定 made by；manufactured 多指實體製造不搭 information
空格 3together along / together / apart / separate
搭配Weaving together diverse research「把多元研究編織在一起」，weave together 片語動詞
✗ along 不搭 weave；apart/separate 語意相反(分開)，與編織匯整矛盾
空格 4but although / however / but / besides
搭配not...a technical journal, but a journal for...「不是A而是B」用 not...but 對比結構
詞性前有 not，需對應對比連接詞 but
✗ although/however/besides 無法構成 not X but Y 對照句型
空格 5those those / these / them / that
詞性those who want to understand「那些想了解...的人」，those who 固定用法
單複數後接 who want(複數動詞)，需複數指示代名詞 those
✗ these 近指不合泛指；them 為受格不能接 who 子句；that 單數不搭 who want
331.Role Modeling (榜樣作用)3 格#080338
When a business leader is truly 1committed to change, he or she really puts ideas to 2heart and is physically 3jumped in the development of change. physically jumped in the development of change.
空格 1committed pledged / faithful / committed / obligated
搭配固定搭配 be committed to change（致力於），to 後接名詞
語意語意指領導者「全心投入」改革
✗ pledged/faithful/obligated 語意不合；faithful 是「忠實」、obligated 是「有義務」、pledged 較少作此形容詞用
空格 2heart heart / brain / liver / lung
搭配固定片語 put ... to heart（銘記於心、真心投入）
語意語意指真心投入，brain/liver/lung 無此搭配
✗ brain/liver/lung 都是器官但無 put to ___ 的慣用搭配
空格 3jumped walked / jumped / crawled / stood
搭配片語 jump in（投入、參與）符合 physically jumped in 的搭配
語意語意指親身投入改革的推動
✗ walked/crawled/stood in 無「親身投入」之意；jump in 才是投入某事的慣用語
332.Academic Writing (學術寫作)5 格#080339
Academic writing is an 1expression of logic that is the product of thinking. This 2means that the writing that you produce is a 3reflection of your intellectual abilities. lt 4puts into words your knowledge and your conceptual understanding and shows 5evidence of your ability to think critically. puts takes removes hides rumors guesses evidence assumptions
空格 1expression silence / emotion / gesture / expression
搭配an expression of logic（邏輯的表達），expression of 為慣用搭配
語意學術寫作是思考產物的「表達」
✗ silence/emotion/gesture 語意不合，學術寫作是邏輯的「表達」而非沉默或情緒
空格 2means ends / means / results / outcomes
搭配This means that...（這意味著）固定句型，means 當動詞
時態主詞 This 為單數，需第三人稱單數動詞 means
✗ ends/results/outcomes 為名詞，無法構成 This ___ that 子句
空格 3reflection echo / shadow / distortion / reflection
搭配a reflection of your abilities（能力的反映）為慣用搭配
語意語意指作品「反映」你的智識能力
✗ echo/shadow/distortion 雖近義，但 reflection of ability 才是固定且正向的搭配；distortion 反帶扭曲負面意
空格 4puts puts / takes / removes / hides
搭配put into words（用文字表達）固定片語
時態主詞 It 單數，需第三人稱單數 puts
✗ takes/removes/hides 不構成 put into words 的搭配，語意也相反
空格 5evidence rumors / guesses / evidence / assumptions
搭配shows evidence of（顯示...的證據）固定搭配
語意語意指顯示批判思考能力的「證據」
✗ rumors/guesses/assumptions 皆為臆測類，與「顯示能力證據」的正面語意不合
333.Home Appliances (家用電器)3 格#080340
In developed countries, the proliferation of home appliances has allowed 1fewer people to be tied up with complicated chores. For example, word processors and e-mail, to a great 2extent , replaced secretarial staff. At one time when all copies were copied by hand, and then we had photocopiers, and we just replaced it with another kind of work. However, as technology advances, we sometimes don't get rid of one type of work, we just replace it with another type of work. more fewer many several 4 replace_it fix_it ignore_it use_it
空格 1fewer more / fewer / many / several
單複數people 為可數複數，需用 fewer 而非 less
語意家電普及讓「更少」人被瑣事綁住
✗ more 語意相反；many/several 無比較級含意，無法表達被解放的減少趨勢
空格 2extent range / size / extent / scope
搭配to a great extent（在很大程度上）固定片語
✗ range/size/scope 皆不與 to a great ___ 構成此慣用語
空格 3Occasionally需覆核 Occasionally / Frequently
語意後文 sometimes don't get rid of one type of work 對應「偶爾」才沒擺脫工作，語氣較弱
✗ Frequently（經常）語氣過強，與後文 sometimes（有時）的弱化語氣矛盾
334.Drones (無人機)4 格#080341
Researchers are preparing to conduct health assessments of low surface vegetation in the Antarctic, at ask that is physically 1demanding in harsh weather conditions. So, some scientists have suggested that drones should be used to replace their work 2as well as monitor the long-term effects of climate change. Researchers have found that drones 3equipped with sensors can detect various states of vegetation more accurately than satellite images, 4making the images used to assess their health more accurate than human observations. easy relaxing simple demanding as_well_as but_also instead_of because_of 2 as_well_as but_also instead_of because_of
空格 1demanding easy / relaxing / simple / demanding
語意task that is physically ___ in harsh weather，demanding(費力)貼合 harsh 惡劣天候
✗ easy/relaxing/simple 皆「輕鬆」，與 harsh weather 及後文派無人機代勞的需求矛盾
空格 2as well as as well as / but also / instead of / because of
搭配replace their work as well as monitor... 並列兩任務，連接兩動詞片語
✗ but also 須前有 not only；instead of 表替代；because of 表原因，皆破壞兩任務並列
空格 3equipped stripped / equipped / deprived / hindered
搭配drones equipped with sensors「配備感測器的無人機」，be equipped with 固定搭配
✗ stripped/deprived 指被剝奪與 with 語意相反；hindered(阻礙)不合配備語意
空格 4making breaking / making / destroying / avoiding
詞性..., ___ the images...more accurate 為分詞構句表結果，現在分詞 making
語意make + 受詞 + 形容詞 more accurate「使...更準確」
✗ breaking/destroying 語意相反；avoiding(避免)不合使影像更準確的結果
335.Shakespeare (莎士比亞)5 格#080342
Shakespeare's work has faced diverse criticisms, with early criticism 1primarily focused on his failure to observe 2prescribed classical rules, and claimed that he had 3corrupted the language. Critics 4have continued to criticize Shakespeare for a long time, 5while it was not until later that these critics continued to criticize Shakespeare for a long time, while it was not until later that these critics gradually became deeply impressed by his linguistic skill. 4 have_continued have_stopped have_paused have_ended
空格 1primarily secondarily / primarily / barely / rarely
語意early criticism ___ focused on his failure「主要聚焦於某缺失」，primarily 表主要重心
✗ secondarily 表次要與 focused on 矛盾；barely/rarely 表幾乎不，與確實批評的事實相反
空格 2prescribed prescribed / suggested / ignored / neglected
搭配prescribed classical rules「既定的古典規範」，prescribed rules 固定搭配指明文規定
✗ suggested 語氣太弱；ignored/neglected 指被忽視，與未遵守規則的因果矛盾
空格 3corrupted fixed / cleaned / improved / corrupted
語意批評他 ___ the language 為負面指控，corrupted the language(敗壞語言)才是負評
✗ fixed/cleaned/improved 皆正面，與批評、指控的負面語境矛盾
空格 4have continued have continued / have stopped / have paused / have ended
時態Critics ___ to criticize...for a long time 持續至今，現在完成式 have continued
語意後文 not until later...impressed 表批評持續一段時間後才轉變
✗ have stopped/paused/ended 皆「停止」，與 for a long time 持續批評矛盾
空格 5while because / while / since / after
語意前句持續批評，後句後來轉為讚賞，while 表「然而」對比
搭配while it was not until later that... 連接對比子句
✗ because/since 表原因，after 表時間先後，皆不符前後批評vs讚賞的對比
336.Icerbergs' Sound (冰山之聲)2 格#080343
In the past 1few years, scientists have begun to learn to distinguish the sounds made by Antarctic In the past few years, scientists have begun to learn to distinguish the sounds made by Antarctic icebergs, 2which ground on the sea floor - and to measure the extent to which these sounds affect the stability of the iceberg's structure. But understanding the sounds of icebergs can help them stability of the iceberg's structure. But understanding the sounds of icebergs can help them understand the phenomenon of icebergs and ice shelves warm up at the poles. 3 warm_up cool_down freeze shut_down
空格 1few little / many / most / few
搭配In the past few years（過去幾年）固定時間片語
單複數years 為可數複數，用 few
✗ little 修飾不可數，與 years 不合；many/most 與「過去幾年」的慣用語不符
空格 2which this / which / those / that
詞性非限定關係子句 ..., which ground on the sea floor，先行詞 icebergs（物）用 which
單複數前有逗號的非限定子句不可用 that
✗ this/those 為指示代名詞非關係代名詞；that 不可用於逗號後的非限定子句
337.Radioactivity (放射性)4 格#080344
When scientists touch a photographic plate with uranium, the plate is 1developed as a cloud of 2fogged images, which is proof that uranium is radioactive. The term radioactivity was 3coined by the Curie couple together. By Marie Curie and her husband Pierre Curie. And the 4discovery that uranium is radioactive won the Curies the Nobel Prize in Physics in 1903. regressed halted developed abandoned
空格 1developed regressed / halted / developed / abandoned
搭配develop a plate / be developed（沖洗顯影底片）攝影固定用語
語意鈾使底片「顯影」成霧狀影像
✗ regressed/halted/abandoned 與底片「顯影」的攝影語意不合
空格 2fogged fogged / cleared / brightened / shone
語意輻射使底片「起霧、模糊」，呼應 cloud of ___ images
✗ cleared/brightened/shone 表變清晰明亮，與底片被輻射霧化的現象相反
空格 3coined copied / erased / coined / borrowed
搭配coin a term（創造一個術語）固定搭配
時態被動 was coined by，過去分詞
✗ copied/erased/borrowed 與「首創術語 radioactivity」語意不合
空格 4discovery loss / discovery / mystery / secret
語意the discovery that uranium is radioactive，指這項「發現」贏得諾貝爾獎
✗ loss/mystery/secret 與「發現鈾具放射性而得獎」的語意不合
338.Left-handed Population (左撇子人口)4 格#080345
About 10% of the population is left-handed, and this percentage has remained 1relatively stable. The 2dominance of the hand is related to the asymmetry of the brain; brain functions are 3evenly distributed between the left and right hemispheres. In general, right-handed people will be more verbal, while left- handed people will generally be more creative. Scientists are now studying the link to other 4conditions in left-handedness, including immune disorders, learning disabilities, and reduced life expectancy. 3 evenly_distributed randomly_scattered unevenly_placed concentrated
空格 1relatively completely / absolutely / relatively / extremely
語意語意上百分比「相對」穩定，relatively 修飾 stable 表程度有保留，符合上下文
搭配relatively stable 是常見搭配，指「相對穩定」
✗ completely/absolutely 表「完全」太絕對；extremely 修飾 stable 語意不通。
空格 2dominance weakness / dominance / submission / inferiority
語意下文談左右手哪隻是「慣用/主導」手，hand dominance 指慣用手
搭配the dominance of the hand 固定說法，指手的優勢慣用
✗ weakness/inferiority/submission 皆表弱勢服從，與慣用手主題相反。
空格 3evenly distributed evenly distributed / randomly scattered / unevenly placed / concentrated
語意前句講左右腦的不對稱，此處說腦功能在兩半球「均勻分布」形成對比
搭配evenly distributed between A and B 固定搭配，表平均分配於兩者
✗ randomly scattered/unevenly placed 表雜亂不均；concentrated 表集中於一處，皆不合 between 兩半球均分之意。
空格 4conditions solutions / outcomes / reactions / conditions
語意後面列舉 immune disorders、learning disabilities 等皆屬醫學「狀況/病症」，conditions 統稱
搭配link to other conditions 指與其他健康狀況的關聯
✗ solutions/outcomes/reactions 無法涵蓋免疫失調、學習障礙等病症的統稱。

In order to carry out complex marine environment, and the design of research vessels was challenged . In order to carry out multidisciplinary research in extreme environments, specially designed research vessels have become a necessity. Research vessels are the primary means of oceanographic observation and will remain so in necessity. 340.Paleoanthropologist (古人類學家)5 格#080347
Lucy is a fossil of our 1human ancestor recently unearthed by archaeologists, a 2discovery that has Lucy is a fossil of our human ancestor recently unearthed by archaeologists, a discovery that has shocked the entire archaeological community. The 3skeleton was discovered by an archaeologist exploring a cavern, where they temporarily locked the fragments in place with 4hinges . During a two- exploring a cavern, where they temporarily locked the fragments in place with hinges . During a two- week excavation, they recovered most of the bones, and with this discovery the archaeologist 5published a new paper. published a new paper. 1 animal_predator human_descendant human_ancestor alien_species muscle skeleton organ tissue joints locks bolts hinges published hidden deleted ignored
空格 1human ancestor animal predator / human descendant / human ancestor / alien species
語意Lucy 是化石，是人類「祖先」而非後代；ancestor 指祖先
✗ human descendant 指後代方向相反；animal predator/alien species 與人類祖先化石不符。
空格 2discovery discovery / invention / hypothesis / rumor
語意化石是被「發現」出土，a discovery 呼應 unearthed by archaeologists
搭配後文 with this discovery 重複出現，前後一致用 discovery
✗ invention 是發明（人造）；hypothesis 假設、rumor 謠言皆與出土實物不符。
空格 3skeleton muscle / skeleton / organ / tissue
語意下文提 recovered most of the bones，指整副「骨骼/骨架」，skeleton 對應
✗ muscle/organ/tissue 是軟組織，化石保留的是骨骼，不合 bones 語境。
空格 4hinges joints / locks / bolts / hinges
語意暫時把碎片固定就位，用 hinges（鉸鏈）可活動鎖定，符合 temporarily locked in place
✗ joints 是身體關節；locks/bolts 為一般鎖閂，passage 原文即用 hinges。
空格 5published published / hidden / deleted / ignored
搭配published a new paper 固定搭配，指發表論文
語意考古學家有重大發現後「發表」新論文，符合學術流程
✗ hidden/deleted/ignored 表隱藏刪除忽略，與發表論文相反。

The size and proximity of these planets is easy to 4detect as they create a large decrease in brightness when passing in front of their parent stars. create a large decrease in brightness when passing in front of their parent stars. astronomers biologists geologists chemists forget ignore overlook detect
空格 1characteristics decorations / anomalies / characteristics / accessories
搭配similar in characteristics to（特徵上類似於）固定搭配
語意熱木星在「特徵」上類似太陽系最大行星
✗ decorations/anomalies/accessories 與「行星特徵相似」的語意不合
空格 2planet galaxy / star / planet / asteroid
語意the solar system's biggest planet（太陽系最大行星）指木星
✗ galaxy/star/asteroid 與「太陽系最大行星」木星的指稱不符
空格 3astronomers astronomers / biologists / geologists / chemists
語意觀測系外行星、恆星亮度變化的是「天文學家」
✗ biologists/geologists/chemists 與觀測系外行星的研究領域不合

語意easy to detect（容易偵測），承接亮度大幅下降使其易被察覺

342.Financial Crisis (金融危機)4 格#080349
Since the onset of the financial crisis, there have been two main 1explanations as to why so many banks made such disastrous decisions. The first is that the regulators' agencies did not 2function as they should have. The second is that the 3incompetence of Wall Street financiers caused the situation to spiral out of control, and traders and investors who made extravagant bets without 4understanding the
空格 1explanations explanations / confusions / mysteries / assumptions
語意two main explanations as to why（解釋為何...的兩大說法）
搭配explanations as to why 慣用搭配
✗ confusions/mysteries/assumptions 與「對原因提出的解釋」語意不合
空格 2function failures / function / malfunctions / decorations
時態did not ___ as they should，助動詞 did 後接原形動詞 function
搭配function as（發揮...功能）固定搭配
✗ failures/malfunctions/decorations 為名詞，無法接在 did not 之後作動詞

語意下文 disastrous decisions、out of control，指金融家的「無能」
✗ skill/proficiency/expertise 皆正面，與導致失控災難的負面語境相反
空格 4understanding misunderstanding / ignorance / understanding / confusion
搭配without understanding the ...（不了解...就下注）固定搭配
語意亂下注是因「不了解」風險，without 已含否定不需再用負面詞
✗ misunderstanding/ignorance/confusion 與 without 連用會語意疊加雙重否定，邏輯不順；understanding 才通順
343.Mass Extinction (大規模滅絕)4 格#080350
Scientists have discovered the cause of the mass extinction of undersea marine life 800,000 years ago Scientists have discovered the cause of the mass extinction of undersea marine life 800,000 years ago and it's shedding light on how climate change is affecting on deep ocean biota. In a new study 1published in the journal Nature Communications, scientists have found a link between the number of published in the journal Nature Communications, scientists have found a link between the number of foraminifera and the mass extinction. This finding was 2previously unknown. it is now certain that the 3causes of the mass extinction was not climate change. 4Instead , they have found that the extinction causes of the mass extinction was not climate change. Instead , they have found that the extinction was caused by global changes brought about by a decrease in the amount of plankton on the surface causes results effects outcomes Likewise Similarly Instead Together
空格 1published published / hidden / erased / ignored
搭配a study published in the journal（發表於期刊的研究）固定搭配
詞性過去分詞修飾 study
✗ hidden/erased/ignored 與「發表於 Nature Communications 期刊」的語意相反
空格 2previously recently / previously / suddenly / never
語意previously unknown（先前未知），指這項發現過去不為人知
✗ recently/suddenly/never 與「先前未知、如今才發現」的時間對比不合
空格 3causes causes / results / effects / outcomes
語意the causes of the mass extinction（大滅絕的原因）
單複數後接動詞 was，但慣用 the causes ... was not climate change 指成因
✗ results/effects/outcomes 表「結果」，但氣候變遷與否討論的是滅絕的「成因」
空格 4Instead Likewise / Similarly / Instead / Together
語意前句否定氣候變遷是主因，Instead（取而代之）引出真正成因，表對比
✗ Likewise/Similarly/Together 表類同並列，無法表達「不是A，而是B」的轉折

"Plains lndians" are people who don't like to live in one place. They like to travel around and move camp 1at least once a year. For this reason, they generally lived in something 2like a large tent house because it was easy to set up and take down. Indians would also build fires in their tents 3in the middle to cook food. They also 4used to put buffalo hides on the floor to use as rugs. In Indian camps, everyone had a job to do. The men had to hunt for food and keep their families safe. The women had to 5look after the children, prepare meals, etc. And whenever the camp moved, men and women had to help tear down the tents together. at_most at_least exactly barely 3 on_the_edge in_the_middle at_the_beginning at_the_end
空格 1at least at most / at least / exactly / barely
語意一年至少搬一次營地，at least once 表「至少」一次

空格 2like like / unlike / opposite / against
語意住在「像」大帳篷一樣的東西，something like a large tent 表類比
搭配something like 固定搭配，意為「類似…的東西」

✗ on the edge 在邊緣會燒到帳壁；at the beginning/end 指時間或順序，非空間中央。
空格 4used to used to / never did / avoided / resisted
時態敘述過去習慣，used to + 原形 put，表「過去常做」
語意描述印第安人過去鋪野牛皮的習俗
✗ never did/avoided/resisted 表否定不做，與下文鋪皮為地毯的事實相反。
空格 5look after abandon / ignore / neglect / look after
搭配look after the children 固定片語動詞，意為「照顧」
語意婦女負責照顧孩童，與 prepare meals 並列為照料家務
✗ abandon/ignore/neglect 表拋棄忽視，與母親照顧小孩語意相反。

空格 1well hardly / well / badly / poorly

1Scientists at Yale university have discovered that amyloid beta, a protein involved in Alzheimer's disease, can damage brain cells by binding to prion proteins. 搭配neurotoxic effects（神經毒性作用）固定搭配

✗ beneficial/nutritious/safe 皆正面，與蛋白質損害腦細胞的毒性語境相反

語意Take away the prions（拿掉 prion）後，叢集變「無害」，與前句毒性形成對比

353.Clown fish (小醜魚)5 格#080360
Clown fish became famous thanks to the movie Finding Nemo. In real life, their social hierarchy is simple: larger fish dominate their smaller 1counterparts . Now we know that to reinforce this social simple: larger fish dominate their smaller counterparts . Now we know that to reinforce this social structure, the fish communicate with aggressive and submissive audio signals. The new info is in the journal PLoS ONE. Researchers 2recorded clown fish calls, 3capturing this noise as one chased a smaller journal PLoS ONE. Researchers recorded clown fish calls, capturing this noise as one chased a smaller fish. These popping sounds function as an aggression signal. When a clown fish has been chased and wishes to submit, it shakes its head in a submissive gesture and produces clicking noises like wishes to submit, it shakes its head in a submissive gesture and produces clicking noises like these. The researchers 4compared the aggressive and submissive calls, and found that the sound pulses in a submissive signal were shorter and more high-pitched. Unlike many animals that use sound to in a submissive signal were shorter and more high-pitched. Unlike many animals that use sound to draw in 5potential mates, clown fish appear to use their calls only as labels of social status. When a little fish makes submissive sounds to a larger one, neither has to invest in a physical confrontation. Which fish makes submissive sounds to a larger one, neither has to invest in a physical confrontation. Which is good news for small-fry like Nemo.
空格 1counterparts counterparts / parts / friends / species
語意「larger fish dominate their smaller counterparts」較大的魚支配較小的同類，counterparts 指對應的同類個體
搭配smaller + counterparts 搭配，counterpart 指地位相對應者
✗ species 指物種（同種魚不通）；friends 語意相反（談支配非友誼）；parts 指零件。
空格 2recorded took / recorded / remembered / recalled
搭配「recorded clown fish calls」錄下叫聲，record calls 固定搭配
語意下文 capturing this noise（捕捉聲音）呼應錄音動作
✗ took 不與 calls 搭配；remembered/recalled 是記得/回想，研究是錄音非回憶。
空格 3capturing capturing / captured
時態主句已有動詞 recorded，此處用現在分詞 capturing 作伴隨狀語（同時捕捉聲音）
詞性主動同時進行用現在分詞，非過去分詞 captured
✗ captured 為過去分詞，無法接續主動的伴隨動作。
空格 4compared conspired / regarded / compared / researched
搭配「compared the aggressive and submissive calls」compared A and B 固定搭配
語意下文 found that...were shorter 是比較後的結果
✗ conspired 共謀不通；regarded 視為需接 as；researched 與並列兩物比較語意不合。
空格 5potential previous / prospective / predictable / potential
搭配「potential mates」潛在配偶，potential mates 固定搭配
語意用聲音吸引可能的交配對象，potential 表潛在
✗ previous 之前的、prospective 偏求職、predictable 可預測的，均不與 mates 搭配。
354.Archaeology(考古學)4 格#080361
Archaeology is the study of our human past. The evidence that archaeologists use to answer these Archaeology is the study of our human past. The evidence that archaeologists use to answer these questions is often found during excavations or digs. The evidence can 1include objects like pottery, jewelry, building materials, coins, weapons and tools. Soil samples from archaeological sites can reveal jewelry, building materials, coins, weapons and tools. Soil samples from archaeological sites can reveal information about past environments, like what kinds of plants were 2growing . Features like ditches, pits, post holes and the remains of walls can help archaeologists piece 3together what buildings looked pits, post holes and the remains of walls can help archaeologists piece together what buildings looked like and what they were made of. The ways that people were buried tells us about past beliefs, and the skeletons themselves reveal information about people' s health in the past and the types of diseases skeletons themselves reveal information about people' s health in the past and the types of diseases and injuries that killed them. Scientific 4experiments on teeth can even show where people came from.
空格 1include include / exclude / feature / integrate
語意「The evidence can include objects like pottery...」後接舉例清單，include 引出例子
搭配include + 例子（like pottery, jewelry...）固定用法
✗ exclude 排除語意相反；feature 指顯著特色非單純列舉；integrate 整合不通。
空格 2growing growing / grow / grew / grown
時態「what kinds of plants were growing」過去進行式 were + V-ing，表當時正在生長
詞性were 後需現在分詞 growing 構成進行式
✗ grow 原形、grew 過去式、grown 過去分詞，皆不能接在 were 後構成進行式。
空格 3together apart / individually / together / combined
搭配「piece together」拼湊、拼出全貌，片語動詞固定搭配
語意考古學家把線索拼起來還原建築樣貌，需 together
✗ apart 拆開、individually 個別、combined 形容詞，皆不合 piece ___ 片語。
空格 4experiments trials / experiences / experiments / observations
搭配「Scientific experiments on teeth」scientific experiments 固定搭配
語意下文 can show where people came from，指實驗能揭示來源
✗ trials/observations 與 scientific 搭配較弱；experiences 是個人經歷，與牙齒科學不合。
355.Behaviorists(行爲主義者)4 格#080363
Another way of looking at personality is the behaviorist approach. According to the behaviorists, the Another way of looking at personality is the behaviorist approach. According to the behaviorists, the inner 1facts of the consciousness are not important. Instead they believed that our behaviors, and therefore our 2personalities are learned primarily through our experiences. The theories of behaviorism therefore our personalities are learned primarily through our experiences. The theories of behaviorism arose through 3experiments largely on animals in which behaviors were learned through carefully contexts connections relations experiments responses backgrounds 4stimuli motivations
空格 1facts corners / lights / facts / circles
搭配「the inner facts of the consciousness」意識的內在事實，呼應行為主義不重視內在心理
語意下文 Instead they believed behaviors...learned 對比，此處指內在心理事實
✗ corners/lights/circles 與 consciousness 語意不搭，無法構成有意義片語。
空格 2personalities personalities / characteristics / inside / advantages
搭配「our behaviors, and therefore our personalities」呼應全文主題 personality
語意行為主義主張行為決定人格，personalities 與篇首 personality 一致
✗ characteristics/advantages 偏離人格主題；inside 為副詞/介詞，不能作 our ___ 名詞。
空格 3experiments contexts / connections / relations / experiments
搭配「arose through experiments largely on animals」experiments on animals 固定搭配
語意下文 behaviors were learned through carefully...指實驗條件下習得行為
✗ contexts/connections/relations 無法與 on animals 構成「在動物身上做」的實驗語意。
空格 4stimuli responses / backgrounds / stimuli / motivations
語意行為主義經典理論為刺激-反應，透過 stimuli 習得行為
搭配carefully controlled stimuli（受控刺激）為行為實驗術語
✗ responses 是反應端非習得來源；backgrounds/motivations 與刺激制約理論不符。
356.Computer viruses(計算機病毒)5 格#080364
Computer viruses have been a 1fact of life at least since the 1980s, if not before. They can cause Computer viruses have been a fact of life at least since the 1980s, if not before. They can cause companies to lose hours of working time and they can also spread panic among computer users everywhere. There are, however, several 2distinct types of computer infection – all loosely referred to as everywhere. There are, however, several distinct types of computer infection – all loosely referred to as viruses – and they each work in a slightly different way. A particularly nasty one is the worm, which is a program designed to sneak its way into an entire computer network, and reproduce itself over and program designed to sneak its way into an entire computer network, and reproduce itself over and over again. Then there is the Trojan, which strictly 3speaking isn’t a virus, but a piece of software that appears to do one thing, but actually does something malicious instead. When the unsuspecting appears to do one thing, but actually does something malicious instead. When the unsuspecting operator 4introduces it into the computer, the alien program will take over the machine. With Trojans you have to be particularly careful because they can often be introduced by way of a message you have to be particularly careful because they can often be introduced by way of a message advertising an anti-virus product. So what motivates someone to introduce a virus into the computer systems of innocent victims? Perhaps it’s simply the desire to prove that it can be done. Or because it systems of innocent victims? Perhaps it’s simply the desire to prove that it can be done. Or because it gives the kind of pleasure you get from solving a difficult problem – nowadays people protect their computers with all sorts of security software, so it takes considerable 5skill to break through all the computers with all sorts of security software, so it takes considerable skill to break through all the defences and introduce a virus.
空格 1fact fact / feature / creation / flaw
搭配「a fact of life」生活中無可避免的現實，固定片語
語意電腦病毒自1980年代起就是常態，a fact of life 表既成事實
✗ feature/creation/flaw 都無法構成 a ___ of life 這個固定片語。
空格 2distinct extinct / distinct / same / failed
搭配「several distinct types」數種不同類型，distinct types 固定搭配
語意下文 they each work in a slightly different way 呼應各自不同
✗ extinct 絕種的、same 相同的（與 different 矛盾）、failed 失敗的，皆不合語意。
空格 3speaking speaking / considerirng / learning / thinking
搭配「strictly speaking」嚴格說來，固定插入語
語意下文 isn't a virus, but...修正定義，需 strictly speaking 引導
✗ considering/learning/thinking 無法與 strictly 構成此固定插入語。
空格 4introduces introduces / introducing
時態「When the unsuspecting operator introduces it」時間從句用一般現在式
