單複數主詞 operator 第三人稱單數，動詞 introduces 加 -s
✗ introducing 為分詞，無法在 When 引導的從句中作主要動詞。
空格 5skill concept / skill / degree / sense
搭配「considerable skill to break through」considerable skill 固定搭配
語意突破各種安全防護需要技術，skill 對應 break through defences
✗ concept/degree/sense 與 considerable + to break through 的能力語意不合。
357.Australian families(澳大利亞家庭)5 格#080365
Families provide emotional, physical, and financial care and support to their members, and are often Families provide emotional, physical, and financial care and support to their members, and are often the basis on which government assistance is determined and administered. Australians have 1traditionally experienced three main living arrangements over a life cycle: living with parents, living traditionally experienced three main living arrangements over a life cycle: living with parents, living with a partner (for some of this period was children), and living alone in old age if that partner died. Now and into the future, living arrangements 2throughout a life cycle may also include living alone or in Now and into the future, living arrangements throughout a life cycle may also include living alone or in a group household before perhaps forming a long-term partnership, or living as a 3lone parent or alone after divorce or separation. These changes in living arrangements and family 4characteristics are the after divorce or separation. These changes in living arrangements and family characteristics are the outcome of various demographic and social trends, such as declining fertility, increased rates of divorce and longer life 5expectancy . divorce and longer life expectancy . throughout from between to alone lone lonely own characters arrangements characteristics contributions
空格 1traditionally tradition / traditional / traditionally / traditions
詞性「have traditionally experienced」修飾動詞 experienced 需副詞 traditionally
時態夾在助動詞 have 與過去分詞 experienced 之間，只能放副詞
✗ tradition/traditions 名詞、traditional 形容詞，皆不能修飾動詞。
空格 2throughout throughout / from / between / to
搭配「throughout a life cycle」貫穿整個生命週期，throughout + 期間 固定搭配
語意前文 over a life cycle 同義，表整個生命歷程
✗ from/between/to 需成對或搭配特定結構，單用接 a life cycle 不通。
空格 3lone alone / lone / lonely / own
詞性「a lone parent」lone 為形容詞修飾名詞 parent
搭配lone parent 固定搭配（=single parent）
✗ alone 是副詞/表語不可直接修飾名詞；lonely 指孤獨感；own 須接所有格。
空格 4characteristics characters / arrangements / characteristics / contributions
搭配「living arrangements and family characteristics」前文已出現同片語，family characteristics 固定搭配
語意指家庭的特徵變化，對應前段 family characteristics
✗ characters 指人物/性格、arrangements 與前面重複、contributions 貢獻語意不合。
空格 5expectancy expectancy / age / experience / quality
搭配「longer life expectancy」較長的預期壽命，life expectancy 固定術語
語意與 declining fertility、divorce 並列為人口趨勢，需 life expectancy
✗ age/experience/quality 與 life 搭配不構成「壽命」這個人口統計術語。
358.Copyright in digital media(數字媒體版權)4 格#080366
Digital media and the internet have made the sharing of texts, music and images easier than ever, and the 1enforcement of copyright restriction harder. This situation has encouraged the growth of IP law, the enforcement of copyright restriction harder. This situation has encouraged the growth of IP law, and 2prompted increased industrial concentration on extending and 'policing' IP protection, while also leading to the growth of an 'open access', or 'creative commons' movement which 3challenges such leading to the growth of an 'open access', or 'creative commons' movement which challenges such control of knowledge and 4creativity .
空格 1enforcement reinforcement / enforcement / engagement / entitlement
搭配「the enforcement of copyright restriction」版權限制的執行，enforcement of 固定搭配
語意數位媒體讓分享更易、讓版權執行更難（harder），需 enforcement
✗ reinforcement 強化、engagement 參與、entitlement 權利，皆不合執行版權限制語意。
空格 2prompted prompted / impromptu / prompt / prompting
時態與前面 has encouraged 並列，省略 has 後接過去分詞 prompted
詞性and 連接 encouraged...and prompted...，需與 encouraged 同為過去分詞形
✗ impromptu 形容詞、prompt 原形、prompting 現在分詞，皆不與並列結構一致。
空格 3challenges challenge / challenging / challenges
單複數關係子句「which challenges such control」先行詞為單數 movement，動詞加 -s
時態which 引導關係子句用一般現在式 challenges
✗ challenge 原形與單數先行詞不符；challenging 分詞無法在 which 後作主要動詞。
空格 4creativity creation / creativity / creative / creating
詞性「control of knowledge and creativity」與名詞 knowledge 並列，需名詞 creativity
搭配knowledge and creativity 抽象名詞並列搭配
✗ creative 形容詞、creating 動名詞、creation 偏作品，與抽象 knowledge 並列不如 creativity 對稱。
359.Noble Gas(惰性氣體)5 格#080367
Uniquely stable, they 1seemed to participate in no chemical reactions. But by understanding the Uniquely stable, they seemed to participate in no chemical reactions. But by understanding the stability of the noble gases, physicists discovered the key to chemical bonding 2itself . Dmitri Mendeleev added the noble gases to his periodic table in 1902, where he arranged the elements in rows and added the noble gases to his periodic table in 1902, where he arranged the elements in rows and columns 3according to their atomic weight. Mendeleev was able to see repeating 4or periodic patterns in their properties. The noble gases appeared 5regularly in the periodic table, occurring in every eighth their properties. The noble gases appeared regularly in the periodic table, occurring in every eighth position, at least amongst the lighter elements. 4 or_regular and_periodic and_irregular or_periodic
空格 1seemed are likely / seemed / thought / given
時態全句過去式敘述，seemed to participate 表「似乎」參與，主詞 they 後接過去式動詞
詞性需動詞且後接 to participate，seemed to V 合語法
✗ are likely 時態為現在且與過去敘述衝突；thought/given 後接 to participate 語法不通。
空格 2itself itself / themselves / ourselves / self
單複數先行詞 chemical bonding 為單數不可數，反身代名詞用 itself
語意the key to chemical bonding itself 強調「化學鍵結本身」
✗ themselves 須複數先行詞；ourselves 須第一人稱；self 非標準反身代名詞用法。
空格 3according sticking / according / due / basing
搭配according to 固定片語，意為「依據」，後接 their atomic weight
✗ sticking/basing 須改用其他介系詞（to 不搭）；due to 表原因，不合「依原子量排列」之意。
空格 4or periodic or regular / and periodic / and irregular / or periodic
語意repeating or periodic patterns，periodic（週期性）與 repeating 同義並列，呼應 periodic table
搭配repeating or periodic 用 or 連接同義詞補充說明
✗ and irregular 與 repeating 矛盾；or regular 語意較弱；and periodic 用 and 不如 or 表同義替換自然。
空格 5regularly periodically / regularly / irregularly / similarly
詞性修飾動詞 appeared 需副詞，regularly 表「規律地」
語意下文 occurring in every eighth position 即規律出現，regularly 對應
✗ irregularly 表不規律與下文矛盾；periodically 雖近義但與後句重複；similarly 表相似非規律。
360.Feature films are narratives(故事片是敘事)4 格#080368
Feature films are narratives - they tell stories. Even films based on 1true events will fictionalize them in Feature films are narratives - they tell stories. Even films based on true events will fictionalize them in order to produce drama, to telescope time, to avoid being filled up with too many 2minor characters ,or simply to be more entertaining. Even in the current welter of special-effect movies, feature films are simply to be more entertaining. Even in the current welter of special-effect movies, feature films are usually summarized by their plots - in their first 'treatment' (or outline of the script idea), in the advance publicity, in the TV guide, in reviews, and in conversations. Films may differ from other 3kinds advance publicity, in the TV guide, in reviews, and in conversations. Films may differ from other kinds of narrative - literary fiction or television drama, for instance - in the medium used and the representational conventions. They do, however, 4share with literary fiction and television drama the representational conventions. They do, however, share with literary fiction and television drama the basic structure and functions of narrative. Much work has been done by researchers in the field known as 'narratology' on exactly what constitutes the structures and functions of the narrative. Their as 'narratology' on exactly what constitutes the structures and functions of the narrative. Their conclusions are of great use to students of the feature film.
空格 1true true / new / artificial / fairy
搭配「films based on true events」根據真實事件改編，true events 固定搭配
語意下文 will fictionalize them（將其虛構化）對比真實事件
✗ new/artificial/fairy 與 events 搭配不合，且與「虛構化真實事件」對比邏輯不符。
空格 2minor major / minor / important / key
搭配「too many minor characters」太多次要角色，minor characters 固定搭配
語意為避免塞滿太多不重要角色而濃縮，需 minor
✗ major/important/key 均指重要，與「避免塞太多」的減化邏輯矛盾。
空格 3kinds kinds / films / realities / nations
搭配「other kinds of narrative」其他種類的敘事，kinds of 固定搭配
語意下文舉例 literary fiction or television drama 為敘事的不同種類
✗ films/realities/nations 與 of narrative 搭配語意不合。
空格 4share differ / realize / share / integrate
搭配「share with...the basic structure」與...共有，share with 固定搭配
語意however 轉折後指電影與文學/電視共有敘事的基本結構
✗ differ 與前句重複且須接 from；realize/integrate 與 with...structure 搭配不合共有語意。
361.Iphone (蘋果手機)4 格#080369
The iPhone is a line of touchscreen-based smartphones designed and marketed by Apple Inc. that use Apple's iOS mobile operating system. The first-generation iPhone was 1announced by Apple co-founder Steve Jobs on January 9, 2007. Since then Apple has periodically released new iPhone models and iOS updates. of November 1, 2018, more than 2.2 billion iPhones had been sold. The iPhone's user interface is built around a multi-touch screen with a 2virtual keyboard. The iPhone connects to cellular networks or Wi-Fi. An iPhone can make calls, browse the web, take pictures, play music and send and receive emails and text messages. Since the iPhone's launch further features have been added, including larger screen sizes, shooting video, waterproofing and the ability to install third-party mobile apps through an app store, 3as well as accessibility support. Up to 2017, iPhones used a layout with a single button on the front panel that returns the user to the home screen. Since 2017, more expensive single button on the front panel that returns the user to the home screen. Since 2017, more expensive iPhone models have switched to a nearly bezel-less front screen design with app switching activated by gesture 4recognition . by gesture recognition . fictitious virtual fake invisible as_well_as as_same_as as_clear_as as_long_as 3 as_well_as as_same_as as_clear_as as_long_as recognition realization comprehension awareness
空格 1announced published / declared / announced / pronounced
搭配be announced by 固定搭配，產品/消息「由…宣布」
語意第一代 iPhone 由 Steve Jobs「發表宣布」，announced 合語境
✗ published 多指出版刊物；declared/pronounced 偏宣告判定，不如 announced 適用於產品發表。
空格 2virtual fictitious / virtual / fake / invisible
搭配virtual keyboard 固定術語，指螢幕上的「虛擬鍵盤」
✗ fictitious/fake 表虛假；invisible 表隱形，皆非觸控螢幕鍵盤的正確說法。
空格 3as well as as well as / as same as / as clear as / as long as
搭配as well as 固定片語，意為「以及/還有」連接並列項
語意列舉新增功能後再加 accessibility support，as well as 補充並列
✗ as same as 非正確片語；as clear as/as long as 表比較或條件，不合並列舉例。
空格 4recognition recognition / realization / comprehension / awareness
搭配gesture recognition 固定術語，指「手勢辨識」
語意切換 app 由手勢辨識啟動，recognition 對應 gesture
✗ realization/comprehension/awareness 表領悟認知，與「手勢辨識」技術用語不符。
362.Health and Fitness(健康與健身)4 格#080370
A renewed interest in well-being, especially among baby boomers, as well as rising personal incomes, led to more spending on health and fitness in 2005. This prompted an 1expansion in the number of led to more spending on health and fitness in 2005. This prompted an expansion in the number of fitness and recreation centres across the country. Golf courses also 2enjoyed renewed success, as the sport increased in popularity, possibly the result of retiring baby boomers heading to the links. In 2005, sport increased in popularity, possibly the result of retiring baby boomers heading to the links. In 2005, 3households spent an average $3,918 on recreation, up slightly from $3,678 in 2004. Items included in the 2005 figure are: an average $166 on sports and athletic equipment; $665 to buy and 4operate the 2005 figure are: an average $166 on sports and athletic equipment; $665 to buy and operate recreational vehicles such as snowmobiles, bicycles and trailers; and $299 for the use of sports and communities households individuals babies operate repair renovate process
空格 1expansion inflation / omission / addition / expansion
搭配「an expansion in the number of...centres」數量的擴增，expansion in the number 固定搭配
語意更多健身支出促使健身中心「增加」，需 expansion
✗ inflation 偏通膨、omission 遺漏、addition 須 in addition，皆不合「數量擴增」語意。
空格 2enjoyed enjoyed / endured / suffered / liked
搭配「enjoyed renewed success」享有再度的成功，enjoy success 固定搭配
語意高爾夫運動人氣回升，故球場「享有」成功，需正面 enjoyed
✗ endured/suffered 表忍受負面、liked 不與 success 搭配，皆不合正面語意。
空格 3households communities / households / individuals / babies
搭配「households spent an average $3,918 on recreation」以家戶為消費統計單位，household spending 固定搭配
語意下文 average...on recreation 為家庭年均消費，需 households
✗ communities/individuals/babies 與 spent average on recreation 的家戶消費統計不符。
空格 4operate operate / repair / renovate / process
搭配「buy and operate recreational vehicles」購買並使用/操作休閒車輛，buy and operate 並列搭配
語意與 buy 並列描述對交通工具的支出，operate 指使用維運
✗ repair 修理、renovate 翻新、process 處理，與 buy and ___ vehicles 並列語意不如 operate 自然。
363.Economists' Views(經濟學家的觀點)4 格#080371
An economist sees the world basically through a typical micro-economic 1toolkit . That involves things like thinking at the margin, rationality, opportunity cost, trade-offs. Economics like any other 2discipline , or dogma has its own jargon and its own rules, and its own way of seeing the world. So basically economics, or economists in general tend to apply micro-economic 3concepts like that to explain the way humans behave and to make 4predictions about the future. methodology toolkit subject source
空格 1toolkit methodology / toolkit / subject / source
語意「a typical micro-economic toolkit」下文 thinking at the margin、opportunity cost 等是分析工具，故為工具箱
搭配micro-economic toolkit 指一套分析工具
✗ methodology 偏方法論、subject 科目、source 來源，皆不如 toolkit 對應後列的分析工具集。
空格 2discipline profession / specialization / branch / discipline
搭配「any other discipline」其他學科，discipline 指學術領域
語意把經濟學比作其他學科，與 dogma、jargon、rules 並列，需 discipline
✗ profession 職業、specialization 專精、branch 分支，皆不如 discipline 表「學科」精準。
空格 3concepts principles / theories / beliefs / concepts
搭配「apply micro-economic concepts」套用個體經濟概念，前文 toolkit 內容即這些 concepts
語意經濟學家套用 concepts 來解釋人類行為，呼應前述工具
✗ principles/theories/beliefs 偏理論/信念；concepts 最對應 thinking at the margin 等具體概念工具。
空格 4predictions predictions / assumptions / foresight / anticipations
搭配「make predictions about the future」對未來做預測，make predictions 固定搭配
語意about the future 明示為對未來的預測，需 predictions
✗ assumptions 假設、foresight 不可數且不搭 make、anticipations 不自然，皆不如 make predictions。
364.Power Mix(電源組合)5 格#080372
Imagine a time in the not too distant future when your power comes from a seamless mix of renewable energy and traditional sources. It is delivered by a grid that manages thousands of windmills and hundreds of thousands of customers. Computer 1controlled , the grid is able to manage instant variations 2in supply and demand and provides a real time power balance. Far more complex than anything in existence today, it is called a smart grid. This technology is a new frontier in power supply and seen as a green solution to current outdated management systems. When introduced smart grids will result in energy savings and will allow consumers a choice in their electricity charges and to be able to select the cheapest time 3slots . The difficulty for the energy industry is that smart and to be able to select the cheapest time slots . The difficulty for the energy industry is that smart grids do not exist in reality and the power companies cannot experiment with existing supplies. Without an actual grid to conduct research on Professor Wu has had to design a simulated laboratory Without an actual grid to conduct research on Professor Wu has had to design a simulated laboratory including input from theoretical wind generators and solar panels to feed 5into a constantly operating system. For an authentic approach researchers built various types of equipment failures into the grid to system. For an authentic approach researchers built various types of equipment failures into the grid to test the system. And it works. 4 are_widespread have_been_developed have_appeared do_not_exist
空格 1controlled controls / controlled / controlling / control
時態分詞構句作後位修飾，Computer controlled 為過去分詞表被動「由電腦控制」
詞性the grid 被電腦控制，須被動形式 controlled
✗ controls/control 為主動現在式；controlling 為主動現在分詞，皆不合「電網被控制」的被動語意。
空格 2in by / with / in / at
搭配in existence 固定片語，意為「現存的」，anything in existence today 指現今存在之物
✗ by/with/at existence 皆非正確搭配，唯 in existence 為慣用片語。
空格 3slots slots / hours / intervals / duration
搭配time slots 固定搭配，指「時段」
語意選擇最便宜的時段用電，cheapest time slots 合語境
✗ hours/intervals/duration 雖與時間有關，但 time slots 才是「可選時段」的慣用語。
空格 4have appeared are widespread / have been developed / have appeared / do not exist
語意前文說智慧電網現實中不存在，此處談其在現實中尚未「出現」，have appeared 配合語境
時態現在完成式 have appeared，與電網現況相關的存在性陳述
✗ 答案欄填 have appeared；are widespread/have been developed 表已普及或已開發，與後文「現實中不存在」矛盾；do not exist 雖近文意但非此格選項答案。
空格 5into inserted / built / into / included
搭配build X into Y 固定片語，把故障「植入」電網，built failures into the grid
✗ inserted/built/included 須搭配不同介系詞或造成重複，唯 into 完成 build...into 片語結構。
365.French Lord(法國勳爵)4 格#080373
France was still essentially a feudal nation with lords, due to a range of ancient and modern rights from France was still essentially a feudal nation with lords, due to a range of ancient and modern rights from their peasants who comprised about 80 percent of the population and the majority lived in rural contexts. France was a predominantly agricultural nation, even though this agriculture was low in contexts. France was a predominantly agricultural nation, even though this agriculture was low in productivity, wasteful, and using out of date methods. An attempt to introduce modern techniques from Britain had not succeeded. Inheritance laws, 1whereby estates were divided up among all the heirs, from Britain had not succeeded. Inheritance laws, whereby estates were divided up among all the heirs, had 2left France divided into many tiny farms; 3even the large estates were small when compared to other European nations. The only major region 4of large-scale farming was around Paris, where the other European nations. The only major region of large-scale farming was around Paris, where the always hungry capital city provided a convenient market. Harvests were critical but fluctuating, causing famine, high prices, and riots. famine, high prices, and riots. lead left leaving lent ever even since SO in within of with
空格 1whereby thereof / whereas / whereby / thereby
搭配「Inheritance laws, whereby estates were divided up」whereby=by which，引導關係子句說明法律機制
語意繼承法「藉此」遺產被均分給繼承人，需 whereby
✗ thereof/thereby 為副詞不引導關係子句；whereas 表對比（然而）語意不合。
空格 2left lead / left / leaving / lent
時態「had left France divided」過去完成式 had + 過去分詞 left
搭配leave + 受詞 + 過去分詞（left France divided）使...處於某狀態
✗ lead 原形/現在式、leaving 分詞、lent（借出）語意與時態皆不合 had ___ 結構。
空格 3even ever / even / since / SO
語意「even the large estates were small」連大莊園都算小，even 表「甚至」強調
搭配even + 名詞 表讓步強調
✗ ever 曾經、since 自從、so 因此/如此，皆不合「甚至連...都」的強調語意。
空格 4of in / within / of / with
搭配「the only major region of large-scale farming」region of + 名詞 表「...的地區」
語意唯一大規模農業的地區，需 region of large-scale farming
✗ in/within/with 與 region 搭配不如 of 表所屬「...的地區」自然。
366.Shakespeare(莎士比亞)6 格#080375
There has been a great variety of critical approach to Shakespeare's work since his death. During the 17th 1and 18th centuries, Shakespeare was both admired and condemned. Since then, much of the 17th and 18th centuries, Shakespeare was both admired and condemned. Since then, much of the adverse criticism 2has not been considered relevant, although certain issues have continued to interest critics throughout the years. For instance, charges against his moral propriety were made by Samuel critics throughout the years. For instance, charges against his moral propriety were made by Samuel Johnson in the 18th century and by George Bernard Shaw in the 20th. Early criticism was directed 3primarily at questions of form. Shakespeare was criticized for mixing comedy and tragedy and failing primarily at questions of form. Shakespeare was criticized for mixing comedy and tragedy and failing to observe the unities of time and place 4prescribed by the rules of classical drama. Dryden and Johnson were among the critics claiming that he had 5corrupted the language with false wit, puns, and Johnson were among the critics claiming that he had corrupted the language with false wit, puns, and ambiguity. 6While some of his early plays might justly be charged with a frivolous use of such devices, 20th-century criticism has tended to praise their use in later plays as adding depth and resonance of 20th-century criticism has tended to praise their use in later plays as adding depth and resonance of 2 has_been was_not is_not has_not_been
空格 1and and / or / with / also
搭配both A and B 固定相關連接詞，both admired and condemned
詞性前有 both，須搭配 and 連接兩個過去分詞
✗ or/with/also 皆無法與 both 構成相關連接詞對。
空格 2has not been has been / was not / is not / has not been
時態Since then 引導現在完成式，has not been considered 表「一直未被認為」
語意自那以後許多負面批評「未被視為」相關，否定完成式合語境
✗ has been 缺否定與後文 not... relevant 矛盾；was not/is not 時態與 Since then 引導的完成式不符。
空格 3primarily principally / primarily / fundamentally / occasionally
語意早期批評「主要」針對形式問題，primarily 表「主要地」
詞性修飾 directed at 需副詞，primarily 合語法語意
✗ occasionally 表偶爾與「主要」相反；principally/fundamentally 雖近義但 primarily 與後文 form 重點最契合（且原文用此）。
空格 4prescribed recommended / described / prescribed / suggested
搭配rules prescribed by 固定搭配，指規則所「規定」的
語意古典戲劇規則「規定」的時間地點統一律，prescribed 表明文規定
✗ recommended/suggested 表建議非強制；described 表描述，皆不如 prescribed 表規則的強制規定。
空格 5corrupted disrupted / erupted / corrupted / contaminated
語意用雙關歧義「敗壞」了語言，corrupted the language 表使語言墮落
搭配corrupt the language 固定搭配，指敗壞/汙染語言
✗ disrupted 表打斷；erupted 為爆發不及物；contaminated 雖近義但 corrupt language 才是慣用搭配。
空格 6While When / While / Which / With
語意讓步對比：雖然早期劇作可被指責濫用手法，但20世紀批評卻讚賞，While 引導讓步
詞性句首引導從屬子句需連接詞，While 表「儘管/雖然」
✗ When 表時間非對比；Which 為關係代名詞不可引導此句；With 為介系詞不能接子句。
367.Good Information (信息)5 格#080377
One of the characteristics of 'good' information identified earlier was that it should be 'balanced'. In an ideal world, ' 1objective ' or 'balanced' information would present all the 2evidence for and against, and leave you to weigh this up and draw conclusions. In the real world, however, we recognize that all information presents a position of 3interest , although this may not necessarily be intentional. Objectivity may therefore be an unachievable ideal. This means that the onus is on you as the reader and user of the information to 4develop a critical awareness of the positions represented in what you read, and to take account of this when you interpret the information. In some cases, authors may explicitly express a particular viewpoint — this is perfectly valid as long as they are open about the perspective they represent. Hidden bias, whether or not it is 5deliberate , can be misleading. This could be particularly important in a subject area where there is controversy. subjective objective proper appropriate
空格 1objective subjective / objective / proper / appropriate
搭配「'objective' or 'balanced' information」客觀的資訊，與 balanced 並列同義
語意理想中呈現正反證據的資訊即客觀的，需 objective
✗ subjective 主觀（相反）；proper/appropriate 偏「適當」與 balanced 並列不對等。
空格 2evidence evidence / information / facts / stories
搭配「all the evidence for and against」正反兩面的證據，evidence for and against 固定搭配
語意下文 weigh this up and draw conclusions 指權衡證據下結論，需 evidence
✗ information 與主詞 information 重複、facts/stories 不與 for and against 自然搭配權衡。
空格 3interest interesting / interested / interest
搭配「a position of interest」立場/利害關係，a position of interest 固定搭配
詞性介系詞 of 後需名詞 interest（不可用形容詞 interesting/interested）
✗ interesting/interested 為形容詞，不能接在 a position of 之後作名詞。
空格 4develop produce / make / develop / form
搭配「develop a critical awareness」培養批判意識，develop awareness 固定搭配
語意讀者需「培養」批判意識，需 develop
✗ produce/make/form 與 a critical awareness 搭配不如 develop（培養意識）慣用。
空格 5deliberate biased / deliberate / unintentional / ignored
搭配「whether or not it is deliberate」是否刻意的，呼應前文 may not be intentional
語意隱性偏見不論是否「刻意」都會誤導，需 deliberate（蓄意）
✗ biased 與主詞 bias 重複、unintentional 與 whether or not 的對比邏輯衝突、ignored 語意不合。
368.Honorary Degree(榮譽學位)3 格#080378
Victoria University of Wellington has conferred an honorary degree on a distinguished astrophysicist in a recent graduation ceremony. Professor Warrick Couch 1received the honorary degree of Doctor of Science for his remarkable contribution to our knowledge of galaxies and dark energy. Professor Couch is a distinguished astrophysicist who has 2played a crucial role in the discovery that the Universe is expanding at an accelerating rate, a finding 3which led to the lead scientists being awarded a Nobel Prize in Physics in 2011, which he attended in recognition of his contribution. In his research, Professor Couch uses large ground-based and space-based telescopes to observe galaxy clusters, which are the largest Structures in the Universe. He is also involved in a number of national and international committees overseeing the management of these telescopes. In addition to his own research activities, Professor Couch has worked to support young researchers and provide public comment on astronomy In_addition_to Attached_to Because_of Evidently_as 4 In_addition_to Attached_to Because_of Evidently_as
空格 1received received / receives
時態「Professor Couch received the honorary degree」描述已發生的頒授，過去式 received
語意前文 in a recent graduation ceremony 指已完成的典禮，需過去式
✗ receives 一般現在式與「最近典禮已頒授」的過去時間不符。
空格 2played played / playing
時態「who has played a crucial role」現在完成式 has + 過去分詞 played
搭配play a crucial role 固定搭配，此處需過去分詞配合 has
✗ playing 現在分詞無法接在 has 後構成完成式謂語。
空格 3which that / which / those / whom
詞性「a finding which led to...」先行詞為事物 finding，且為非限定子句，用 which
語意關係代名詞指前面整個發現，led to 主詞需 which
✗ that 不用於逗號後非限定子句；those 為複數指示詞；whom 指人作受詞，皆不合。
369.Great Barrier Reef(大堡礁)4 格#080379
One of Australia's most remarkable natural gifts, the Great Barrier Reef is blessed with the breathtaking beauty of the world's largest coral reef. The reef contains an 1abundance of marine life and comprises of over 3000 individual reef systems and coral cays and literally hundreds of 2picturesque tropical islands with some of the world's most beautiful sun-soaked, golden beaches. Because of its natural beauty, the Great Barrier Reef has become one of the world's most 3sought -after tourist destinations. A visitor to the Great Barrier Reef can enjoy many 4experiences including snorkeling, scuba diving, aircraft visitor to the Great Barrier Reef can enjoy many experiences including snorkeling, scuba diving, aircraft or helicopter tours, bare boats (self- sail) glass-bottomed boat viewing, semi-submersibles and educational trips, cruise ship tours, whale watching and swimming with dolphins. educational trips, cruise ship tours, whale watching and swimming with dolphins. picturesque scarce endangered various sought explored looked drought experiences exercises adventures trips
空格 1abundance abundance / scarcity / ecosystem / enrichment
搭配「an abundance of marine life」豐富的海洋生物，an abundance of 固定搭配
語意讚美大堡礁生物豐富，需 abundance（充沛）
✗ scarcity 稀少語意相反；ecosystem/enrichment 不與 an ___ of marine life 表「大量」。
空格 2picturesque picturesque / scarce / endangered / various
搭配「picturesque tropical islands」風景如畫的熱帶島嶼，picturesque 形容美景
語意全段讚美自然之美（breathtaking beauty、golden beaches），需正面 picturesque
✗ scarce 稀少、endangered 瀕危、various 各種，皆不合讚美美景的語境。
空格 3sought sought / explored / looked / drought
搭配「most sought-after tourist destinations」sought-after 最受追捧，固定複合形容詞
語意因自然美景成為最受追捧的旅遊勝地
✗ explored/looked 不構成 ___-after 複合形容詞；drought（乾旱）為名詞且語意全錯。
空格 4experiences experiences / exercises / adventures / trips
搭配「enjoy many experiences including snorkeling...」enjoy experiences 搭配
語意後接 including 列舉浮潛、潛水等活動，統稱 experiences
✗ exercises 偏運動、adventures 偏冒險、trips 偏行程，不如 experiences 涵蓋整串活動。
370.Brain(腦)5 格#080380
For decades, scientists have used an imaging technique called functional magnetic resonance imaging, or fMRI, to 1chronicle the brain in action. But a study in the January 22nd issue of Nature suggests that or fMRI, to chronicle the brain in action. But a study in the January 22nd issue of Nature suggests that fMRI might show more than what the brain is doing—it might reveal what the brain's about to do. FMRI studies assume that blood flow in the brain 2correlates with neuronal 3activity . Active brain cells FMRI studies assume that blood flow in the brain correlates with neuronal activity . Active brain cells need 4nutrients , which are brought to the cells by freshly oxygenated blood. But in the new study, scientists found that fMRI also detects 5increased blood flow in brain regions that aren't active—but scientists found that fMRI also detects increased blood flow in brain regions that aren't active—but that may be in the near future. The researchers trained monkeys to perform a specific visual task. And they found that, even when the animals were sitting in the dark waiting for the test to begin, fMRI they found that, even when the animals were sitting in the dark waiting for the test to begin, fMRI nevertheless revealed an increased blood flow to the monkeys' visual cortex. The study suggests that fMRI data may be a lot more interesting than we thought. Scientists may be looking at their imaging fMRI data may be a lot more interesting than we thought. Scientists may be looking at their imaging data in a way that's too simplistic. And fMRI may not be measuring exactly what we thought it did. What will they think of next? Maybe fMRI can tell. What will they think of next? Maybe fMRI can tell. activity contour circuit flow nutrients proteins sugar carbohydrate increased decreased faster slower
空格 1chronicle chronicle / mimic / intercept / improve
搭配「chronicle the brain in action」記錄運作中的大腦，chronicle 表詳實記錄
語意fMRI 用來記錄大腦活動，下文 show what the brain is doing 呼應
✗ mimic 模仿、intercept 攔截、improve 改善，皆不合 fMRI「記錄/觀察」功能。
空格 2correlates activities / correlates / clashes / collided
搭配「blood flow correlates with neuronal activity」correlate with 固定搭配
單複數主詞 blood flow 單數，動詞 correlates 加 -s
✗ activities 名詞非動詞；clashes/collided 衝突語意不合，且 collided 為過去式。
空格 3activity activity / contour / circuit / flow
搭配「neuronal activity」神經元活動，固定術語
語意下文 Active brain cells 呼應神經活動，需 activity
✗ contour 輪廓、circuit 電路、flow 流動，與 neuronal 搭配不構成「神經活動」術語。
空格 4nutrients nutrients / proteins / sugar / carbohydrate
搭配「need nutrients, which are brought...by blood」需要養分，由血液輸送
語意活躍腦細胞需養分，由含氧血帶來，nutrients 為總稱
✗ proteins/sugar/carbohydrate 為具體種類，但下句泛指由血液輸送的總稱，nutrients 較貼切。
空格 5increased increased / decreased / faster / slower
搭配「increased blood flow」血流增加，後文同片語重複出現
語意fMRI 偵測到不活躍區域也有血流增加，需 increased
✗ decreased 減少語意相反；faster/slower 形容速度非增量，與 blood flow 搭配不如 increased。
371.Distance Learning（B）(遠程教育（B）)4 格#080381
If you are interested in studying but have other 1commitments , our online and distance learning courses offer an alternative flexible 2mode of study. Teaching is conducted through a mixture of audio- courses offer an alternative flexible mode of study. Teaching is conducted through a mixture of audio- visual, written and interactive materials. There are also 3opportunities for online discussion and collaborative projects with tutors and other students. Some programs include residential 4modules collaborative projects with tutors and other students. Some programs include residential modules taught on campus, giving you the chance to meet and work alongside your tutors and fellow students face-to-face. Our Graduate School provides comprehensive support for distance and part-time face-to-face. Our Graduate School provides comprehensive support for distance and part-time researchers, many of whom study for up to six years or more.
空格 1commitments enthusiasms / commitments / employments / commissions
搭配「have other commitments」有其他要事/責任，have commitments 固定搭配
語意指有其他事務佔用時間故選遠距課程，commitments 表責任承諾
✗ enthusiasms 熱情、employments 受雇、commissions 佣金，均不合「其他要忙的事」語意。
空格 2mode mode / range / method / field
搭配「flexible mode of study」彈性的學習方式，mode of study 固定搭配
語意下文 Teaching is conducted through... 描述學習模式，需 mode
✗ range/method/field 與 of study 搭配時，mode of study（修課模式）最符遠距學習語境。
空格 3opportunities capacities / opportunities / promises / scheduling
搭配「opportunities for online discussion」線上討論的機會，opportunities for 固定搭配
語意提供線上討論與協作機會，需 opportunities
✗ capacities 容量、promises 承諾、scheduling 排程，與 for online discussion 搭配不合。
空格 4modules segments / tutorials / modules / fieldworks
搭配「residential modules taught on campus」駐校課程單元，residential modules 為學制術語
語意指在校園上的課程模組，與遠距並存
✗ segments/tutorials/fieldworks 不如 modules 對應大學「課程單元」這個固定學制用語。
372.Willful Blindness(故意視而不見)3 格#080382
Willful blindness had started life as a legal concept in the nineteenth century. A judge in Regina v. Sleep ruled that an accused could not be convicted for possession of government property 1unless the Sleep ruled that an accused could not be convicted for possession of government property unless the jury found that he either knew the goods came from government stores or had "willfully shut his eyes to the fact." Thereafter, English judicial authorities referred to the state of mind that accompanied one to the fact." Thereafter, English judicial authorities referred to the state of mind that accompanied one who "willfully shut his eyes" as "connivance" or "constructive knowledge." Over time, lots of other phrases came into play-"deliberate or willful ignorance,""conscious avoidance," and "deliberate phrases came into play-"deliberate or willful ignorance,""conscious avoidance," and "deliberate indifference." What they all have in 2common is the idea that there is an opportunity for knowledge and a responsibility to be informed, but it is shirked. Nowadays, the law is 3most often applied in cases of a responsibility to be informed, but it is shirked. Nowadays, the law is most often applied in cases of money laundering and drug trafficking: if you've been paid a large amount of money to carry a suitcase, then you are being willfully blind if you don't check what is inside. suitcase, then you are being willfully blind if you don't check what is inside. common nature conjunction collective most frequently least invariably
空格 1unless because / since / unless / until
語意「could not be convicted...unless the jury found...」除非陪審團認定否則不能定罪，unless 表唯一例外條件
搭配not...unless 固定條件句型
✗ because/since 表原因不合；until 表時間，與「定罪條件」邏輯不符。
空格 2common common / nature / conjunction / collective
搭配「have in common」共同點，have...in common 固定片語
語意列舉多個同義詞後指出共通概念，需 in common
✗ nature/conjunction/collective 無法構成 have ___ in common 固定片語。
空格 3most most / frequently / least / invariably
搭配「most often applied」最常被應用，most often 固定副詞搭配
詞性修飾 often 構成最高級副詞片語，most + often
✗ frequently 與 often 語意重複；least 相反；invariably（總是）與 often 搭配不合。
373.Wrist watch(手表)4 格#080383
The wrist watch works by 1tracking information such as a person's pulse or movement. When it 2detects a change in a person's health, the watch sends information to a touchscreen hub 3located in the home. The hub then 4alerts pre-determined contacts and calls for help immediately. collecting tracking analyzing regulating
空格 1tracking collecting / tracking / analyzing / regulating
搭配「works by tracking information」藉由追蹤資訊運作，track information 搭配
語意下文 detects a change（偵測變化）需先持續追蹤脈搏/動作
✗ collecting 偏一次性收集、analyzing 是後續分析、regulating 是調節，不如 tracking 表持續監測。
空格 2detects detecting / detects / detected
時態「When it detects a change」時間從句一般現在式
單複數主詞 it 第三人稱單數，動詞 detects 加 -s
✗ detecting 分詞、detected 過去式，皆不符 When it ___ 從句需單數現在式謂語。
空格 3located located / locating / locates / hidden
時態「a hub located in the home」過去分詞作後位修飾（被動，=which is located）
詞性hub 是被定位，被動用過去分詞 located
✗ locating 主動分詞不合；locates 為謂語動詞會造成結構錯誤；hidden（隱藏）語意不合。
空格 4alerts reaches / alerts / connects / calls
搭配「alerts pre-determined contacts」通知預設聯絡人，alert sb 固定搭配
單複數主詞 The hub 單數，動詞 alerts 加 -s
✗ reaches/connects 與 contacts 搭配不如 alert 精準；calls 與後句 calls for help 重複。
374.Antarctic plants(南極植物)4 格#080384
Antarctic plants can be important indicators of subtle changes in environmental conditions, including climate change. Traditional ground-based assessments of vegetation health are, however, not ideal in Antarctica, as they can destroy the vegetation and are physically 1demanding in the harsh weather conditions. Co-author Professor Sharon Robinson from UOW’s School of Biological Sciences said the study found drone-based monitoring of vegetation health produced similar results to traditional techniques, but with much greater efficiency and with no damage to the vegetation. “Drones are a powerful tool for monitoring fragile Antarctic vegetation,” Professor Robinson said. “They could be used to provide timely warnings about specific environmental stress events, 2as well as to monitor the longer-term impacts of climate change. “These methods could also be adapted to monitor the health of other small-stature, patchy plant communities, including in alpine or desert regions.” The researchers found that drones 3equipped with sensors were able to detect vegetation health indicators more accurately than satellite imagery. Mosses are one of the key Antarctic vegetation types that need to be monitored. However, they tend to occur in patches among rocks, ice and soil, 4making it important that the imagery used to assess their health is as accurate and spatially detailed as possible. being_demanded demanding demand demanded as_well_as besides but including
空格 1demanding demanding / demand / demanded
搭配「physically demanding」體力吃重的，physically demanding 固定形容詞搭配
詞性are 後接表語形容詞 demanding（=費力的）
✗ demand 原形、demanded 過去分詞（被動「被要求」語意不合），皆不能作 physically ___ 形容詞表語。
空格 2as well as需覆核 besides / but / including
搭配「provide timely warnings...as well as to monitor...」連接兩個並列不定詞 to provide / to monitor，as well as 表「以及」
語意前後皆為無人機用途（即時預警、長期監測），需並列連接詞
✗ besides 多作副詞、but 表轉折與並列語意不合、including 引出例子而非並列兩個 to 不定詞，故依上下文判定為 as well as（原檔 answer 缺漏）。
空格 3equipped set / installed / equipped / furnished
搭配「drones equipped with sensors」配備感測器的無人機，equipped with 固定搭配
時態過去分詞作後位修飾 drones（=which were equipped with）
✗ set/installed/furnished 不與 with sensors 構成「配備」固定搭配，equipped with 才標準。
空格 4making making / made / make / makes
時態「...among rocks, ice and soil, making it important...」現在分詞作結果狀語（導致...）
詞性前有逗號連接主句，需分詞 making 引導結果，非主要動詞
✗ made 過去分詞、make 原形、makes 單數現在式，皆無法在逗號後作結果狀語分詞。
375.International Journal(國際期刊)4 格#080385
The international journal of design is a peer-reviewed, open access journal devoted to publishing The international journal of design is a peer-reviewed, open access journal devoted to publishing research papers in all fields of design, including industrial design, visual communication design, interface design, animation and game design, architectural design, urban design, and other design interface design, animation and game design, architectural design, urban design, and other design related fields. It aims to provide an international forum for the 1exchange of ideas and findings from researchers across different cultures and encourages research 2on the impact of cultural factors on researchers across different cultures and encourages research on the impact of cultural factors on design theory and practice. It also seeks to promote the 3transfer of knowledge between professionals in academia and industry by emphasizing research in 4which results are of interest or applicable to in academia and industry by emphasizing research in which results are of interest or applicable to
空格 1exchange change / exchange / changing / exchanging
詞性介系詞 for 後接名詞，the exchange of ideas 用名詞 exchange
搭配固定搭配 the exchange of ideas（思想交流）
✗ changing/exchanging 是 V-ing、change 雖也是名詞但語意是「改變」不符「交流」
空格 2on in / on / at / onto
搭配research on（針對…的研究）固定搭配，research on the impact
✗ research in 指領域、at/onto 不與 research 搭配
空格 3transfer transfer / change / difference / category
搭配the transfer of knowledge（知識的移轉）固定搭配
語意下文 between professionals in academia and industry 指知識在學界與業界間流通，語意為移轉
✗ change/difference/category 與 of knowledge between A and B 語意不合
空格 4which that / which / the / this
詞性先行詞 research 為非人事物，且為非限定/補述用法引導關係子句，用 which
語意research in which results are of interest，介系詞 in 提前接關係代名詞 which
✗ that 不可接在介系詞 in 之後、the/this 非關係代名詞
376.Exams Looming (考試迫在眉睫)5 格#080386
It's that time again! Exams looming, essays or reports outstanding and you wonder where the years It's that time again! Exams looming, essays or reports outstanding and you wonder where the years gone already. You start 1wondering how you're going to cope with it all. A limited amount of 2anxiety can help you to be more motivated and more 3purposeful. . It can help you to plan your work and to can help you to be more motivated and more purposeful It can help you to plan your work and to think more clearly and 4logically about it. In other words, it can help you stay on top of things. Sit down at your desk and make a start on writing down all the things you have to do to 5prepare for the exams. at your desk and make a start on writing down all the things you have to do to prepare for the exams. purposeful hopeful comfortable peaceful simply logically stably greatly arrange prepare finish complete
空格 1wondering asking / looking / wondering / believing
搭配wonder where…（納悶…）固定搭配，you wonder where the years have gone
語意語意為「納悶時間都去哪了」，wondering 最貼切
✗ asking/looking/believing 不與 where the years gone 的「感嘆時間流逝」語意搭配
空格 2anxiety anxiety / happiness / sadness
語意上下文 can help you to be more motivated，指「適量焦慮」有助於激勵，anxiety 切題
✗ happiness/sadness（快樂/悲傷）的「適量」並不會讓人更有動力，語意不合考試壓力情境
空格 3purposeful purposeful / hopeful / comfortable / peaceful
語意與前面 more motivated 並列，purposeful（有目標的）語意一致
✗ hopeful/comfortable/peaceful 與「激勵、有動力」的並列語意不搭
空格 4logically simply / logically / stably / greatly
搭配與後文 think more clearly 並列，clearly and logically 為常見搭配
✗ simply/stably/greatly 無法與 think clearly 形成「清晰且有邏輯地思考」的並列
空格 5prepare arrange / prepare / finish / complete
搭配prepare for the exams（為考試做準備）固定搭配，後接 for
✗ arrange/finish/complete 不與 for the exams 搭配，且 finish/complete 語意是「完成」非「準備」
377.Psychology(心理)6 格#080387
Psychology as a subject of study has largely developed in the West since the late nineteenth century. During this period there has been an 1emphasis on scientific thinking. Because of this, there have been During this period there has been an emphasis on scientific thinking. Because of this, there have been many scientific studies in psychology which 2explore different aspects of human nature. These include studies into how biology (physical factors) influences human experience, how people use their 3senses studies into how biology (physical factors) influences human experience, how people use their senses (touch, taste, smell, sight and hearing) to get to know the world, how people develop, why people behave in certain ways, how memory works, how people develop language, how people understand behave in certain ways, how memory works, how people develop language, how people understand and think about the world, what motivates people, why people have emotions and how personality develops. These scientific 4investigations all contribute to an 5understanding of human nature. What do develops. These scientific investigations all contribute to an understanding of human nature. What do we mean by the practical applications of these studies? An understanding of psychology is useful in many different areas in life, such as education, the workplace, social services and medicine. This means many different areas in life, such as education, the workplace, social services and medicine. This means that people who have knowledge of psychology can 6use or apply that knowledge in areas such as the
空格 1emphasis essential / analysis / point / emphasis
搭配an emphasis on（對…的重視）固定搭配，an emphasis on scientific thinking
✗ essential 是形容詞、analysis/point 不與 an…on scientific thinking 搭配且語意不合「重視」
空格 2explore explore / explores / exploring
單複數先行詞 studies 為複數，關係子句動詞用原形 explore（studies which explore）
✗ explores 為單數動詞（主詞為複數 studies 不合）、exploring 為分詞無法當關係子句主要動詞
空格 3senses feelings / senses / sensations / consciousness
語意後文括號 (touch, taste, smell, sight and hearing) 即五感，對應 senses
✗ feelings/sensations/consciousness 無法對應「觸味嗅視聽」五種感官的列舉
空格 4investigations inspection / investigations / research / survey
單複數後接 all contribute（複數動詞），主詞需複數可數名詞，investigations 合
搭配scientific investigations（科學調查）常見搭配，呼應前文 scientific studies
✗ research 為不可數無法搭 all…contribute 的複數、inspection/survey 較不符通篇「科學探究」語意
空格 5understanding understanding / acknowledge / awareness / intuition
搭配contribute to an understanding of（有助於對…的理解）固定搭配
✗ acknowledge 為動詞、awareness/intuition 不與 an…of human nature 搭且語意不如 understanding 貼切
空格 6use get / acquire / use / avail
搭配與後文 or apply that knowledge 並列，use or apply 為自然搭配
✗ get/acquire 語意是「取得」非「運用」、avail 須用 avail oneself of 不合句構
378.Chemicals(化學品)4 格#080388
Chemicals used to control weeds in crops such as corn and soybeans may sometimes run off farmland Chemicals used to control weeds in crops such as corn and soybeans may sometimes run off farmland and enter surface water bodies such as lakes and streams. If a surface water body that is used as a 1drinking water supply receives excess amounts of these herbicides, then the municipal water treatment drinking water supply receives excess amounts of these herbicides, then the municipal water treatment plant must 2filter them out in order for the water to be safe to drink. This added filtration process can be expensive. Farmers can help control excess herbicides in runoff by choosing chemicals that bind be expensive. Farmers can help control excess herbicides in runoff by choosing chemicals that bind with 3soil more readily, are less toxic, or degrade more quickly. Additionally, selecting the best tillage practice can help minimize herbicide 4pollution . practice can help minimize herbicide pollution . water soil crops agriculture damages impairment harm pollution
空格 1drinking fishing / dietary / drinking / agricultural
搭配drinking water supply（飲用水供應）固定搭配
語意下文 safe to drink、water treatment plant 指飲用水，drinking 切題
✗ fishing/dietary/agricultural 與 water supply 接「安全飲用」的語意不合
空格 2filter filter / purify / distill / exclude
搭配filter…out（過濾掉）片語動詞，must filter them out
時態助動詞 must 後接原形動詞，filter 為原形
✗ purify/distill/exclude 不與 out 構成「過濾掉雜質」的片語動詞語意
空格 3soil water / soil / crops / agriculture
搭配bind with soil（與土壤結合）語意搭配，chemicals that bind with soil more readily
語意化學物質與土壤結合可減少逕流污染，soil 符合農地情境
✗ water/crops/agriculture 與 bind with…more readily 的「易與之結合」語意不合
空格 4pollution damages / impairment / harm / pollution
搭配herbicide pollution（除草劑污染）名詞搭配，minimize herbicide pollution
單複數minimize 後接不可數名詞 pollution 最自然
✗ damages/harm 語意偏「傷害」、impairment 偏「損害/減損」，皆不如 pollution 對應前文 runoff 污染主題
379.Babies(嬰兒)4 格#080389
How can you tell the difference between a French baby and a German baby? No, it's not that one is wearing a saucy little beret while the other is tucked into tiny pair of lederhosen. Well, maybe that's part of it. But a new study in the journal Current Biology shows that the babies actually sound different. Because the melody of an infant's cry matches its mother tongue. We all know that babies start 1eavesdropping while they're still in the womb. So when they come out, they know their mother's voice. When they're older, they start to imitate the sounds they hear. Eventually they babble, and then start to speak, and then you never hear the end of it. But long before that first burble or coo, babies are learning the 2elements of language. A team of scientists recorded the cries of 60 newborns: 30 born into 3French speaking families and 30 that heard German. And they found that French infants wail on a rising note while the Germans favor a falling melody . Those 4patterns match the rhythms of their native languages. So next time you hear a baby cry, listen closely. He could be telling you where he's from. eavesdropping overhearing snooping crying 3 French_speaking German_speaking French_spoken German_spoken
空格 1eavesdropping eavesdropping / overhearing / snooping / crying
語意嬰兒在子宮內「偷聽」，eavesdropping while still in the womb 帶趣味語氣，後文重述此字
✗ overhearing 偏無意聽到；snooping 偏窺探打探；crying 哭與「在子宮聆聽語言」主題不符。
空格 2elements ingredients / factors / elements / components
語意嬰兒學習語言的「要素/基本元素」，elements of language 為慣用說法
搭配elements of language 固定搭配，指語言要素
✗ ingredients 多指食材；factors 指因素；components 偏零件，皆不如 elements of language 自然。
空格 3French speaking French speaking / German speaking / French spoken / German spoken
搭配French-speaking families 固定複合形容詞，指「說法語的」家庭，用主動 -speaking
語意與下文 heard German 對比，指法語家庭
✗ French spoken/German spoken 用被動 -spoken 修飾 families 語法不當；German speaking 與下文 German 重複且與法語嬰兒對比不符。
空格 4patterns habits / patterns / routines / behaviors
語意哭聲的升降「模式」對應母語節奏，those patterns match the rhythms，patterns 指規律模式
搭配patterns match the rhythms 表模式契合節奏
✗ habits/routines 偏個人習慣作息；behaviors 偏行為，皆不如 patterns 表哭聲的旋律規律。
380.Drinking Water(生活飲用水)5 格#080390
Water involves in almost all the 1processes in our body such as digestion, elimination, assimilation, respiration, maintaining body temperature, etc. It is required to 2remove the thirst of our body. We can live for days without food, however, cannot imagine living without water more than a day. The level of useful drinking water on the earth is very less and other water is salty and not useful to the living beings. Water is 3required by everything like plants, animals, microorganisms, human being, etc, to fulfill the body requirements. Do we imagine what will 4happen if the drinking water gets 5finished a day or gets polluted? Yes, it is the main question which has opened the eyes of everyone and starts saving water at every place we belong like home, surrounding area, office, school, college, etc.
空格 1processes operations / processes / work / procedures
語意後接 such as digestion, respiration（消化、呼吸）等身體運作，processes（過程）切題
✗ operations/work/procedures 與「消化、呼吸等生理運作」語意不如 processes 自然
空格 2remove shift / strengthen / remove / eradicate
搭配remove the thirst（解渴）語意搭配，required to remove the thirst
✗ shift/strengthen 語意不合（移動/強化）、eradicate 語氣過強且不與 thirst 搭
空格 3required requiring / required / necessary / essential
時態被動語態 is ___ by everything，需用過去分詞，Water is required by…
搭配be required by（被…所需）固定被動結構
✗ requiring 為現在分詞不合被動、necessary/essential 為形容詞無法接 by 形成被動
空格 4happen generate / proceed / happen
搭配what will happen if…（如果…會發生什麼）固定搭配
時態what will ___ 後接原形動詞，happen 為不及物原形
✗ generate/proceed 語意不合、且 generate 為及物需受詞，what will happen 才自然
空格 5finished disappeared / ended / finished / finalized
時態gets ___ 被動結構需過去分詞，the drinking water gets finished
語意與後文 or gets polluted 並列，gets finished（用盡）語意對應「水用完」
✗ disappeared 為不及物分詞不合 gets+pp 被動、ended/finalized 與「飲用水用盡」語意不貼
381.Competent Skills(勝任技能)4 格#080391
The skills you will develop on this course will help you become more confident and competent in The skills you will develop on this course will help you become more confident and competent in managing written and social aspects in your current career. It will 1prepare you for further study in your area of interest. We plan to provide you with the opportunity to hear about the work of professors area of interest. We plan to provide you with the opportunity to hear about the work of professors who have been involved in the past. We have had confirmation that they will give talks on their subjects 2especially to your group, and help you to clarify potential future directions you might take in subjects especially to your group, and help you to clarify potential future directions you might take in your study and career. There are also dedicated careers services available at the University, 3which you will be entitled to use. The assessments for the first part of the program are designed to develop key will be entitled to use. The assessments for the first part of the program are designed to develop key study skills and to provide you with the opportunity to brush up on skills you haven't used for a long time, or feel you do not have. This will include some written work essays, as well as group work (short time, or feel you do not have. This will include some written work essays, as well as group work (short presentations) and you will be taught how to do these. 4Details of the assessment for each module will be explained in your first session. be explained in your first session. randomly exclusively occasionally especially that where which whom Details Aspects Parts Respects
空格 1prepare arrange / prepare / complete / improve
搭配prepare you for further study（為進一步學習做準備）固定搭配，prepare sb for sth
✗ arrange/complete 不與 you for further study 搭、improve 語意是「改善」不合 for sth 結構
空格 2especially randomly / exclusively / occasionally / especially
語意give talks on their subjects especially to your group，especially（特別地）強調對象，語意切題
✗ randomly/exclusively/occasionally（隨機/獨家/偶爾）與「特別為你們這組演講」語意不合
空格 3which that / where / which / whom
詞性先行詞 careers services 為事物且為補述用法，用關係代名詞 which 引導
語意which you will be entitled to use，which 代指 services 當 use 的受詞
✗ that 不用於補述（逗號後）用法、where 須先行詞為地點、whom 須先行詞為人
空格 4Details Details / Aspects / Parts / Respects
搭配Details of…will be explained（…的細節將被說明）固定搭配，呼應 the assessment
單複數後接 will be explained，Details 複數作主詞自然
✗ Aspects/Parts/Respects 與 of the assessment…will be explained 的「細節將被說明」語意不如 Details 貼切
382.Learning from History(從曆史中學習)4 格#080392
The prospect of learning something from history is what makes sociologists tick. It is through 1developing a systematic understanding of the forces which shape our lives that we 2can exercise control developing a systematic understanding of the forces which shape our lives that we can exercise control over them. The founding thinkers of sociology, who 3came to prominence during the development of what we are pleased to call modernity, thought so. It Is the intimate relationship between the what we are pleased to call modernity, thought so. It Is the intimate relationship between the development of sociology and the development of modernity that the course begins with. This relationship is an intimate one, because it is 4only with the social change instituted in the development relationship is an intimate one, because it is only with the social change instituted in the development of the modern world that a discipline such as sociology and social science in general could either exist or have anything to study. or have anything to study. appeared emerged arrived came only also truly always
空格 1developing evolving / progressing / nurturing / developing
時態介系詞 through 後接動名詞，through developing a systematic understanding
搭配develop an understanding（建立理解）固定搭配
✗ evolving/progressing 多為不及物不接 understanding、nurturing 語意偏「培育」不如 developing 貼切
空格 2can may / can / must
語意we ___ exercise control over them，語意為「能夠」掌控，can（能夠）切題
✗ may 偏「也許/許可」、must 偏「必須」，與「藉由理解而能掌控」的語意不合
空格 3came appeared / emerged / arrived / came
搭配come to prominence（嶄露頭角/成名）固定搭配，who came to prominence
時態敘述過去事件用過去式 came
✗ appeared/emerged/arrived 皆不與 to prominence 構成固定搭配
空格 4only only / also / truly / always
搭配it is only with…that…（唯有透過…才…）強調句型，it is only with the social change…that
✗ also/truly/always 無法構成 it is only…that 的「唯有…才」強調句構
383.Heart Functions(心髒功能)5 格#080393
The heart functions as a pump at the centre of the circulatory system. In humans it is located in the chest cavity, between the lungs, a bit to the left. The heart consists of four chambers surrounded by a very strong muscular wall, the myocardium. The upper chambers, the right and left atria, 2receive blood entering the heart, and the lower chambers, the right and left ventricles pump the blood out of the entering the heart, and the lower chambers, the right and left ventricles pump the blood out of the heart, via the pulmonary and the systemic circulatory systems. The two systems work as 3follows . Blood from the body enters the right atrium, 4isis passed into the right ventricle and from there is propelled from the body enters the right atrium, passed into the right ventricle and from there is propelled through the pulmonary artery to the lungs. In the lungs the blood releases carbon dioxide and absorbs oxygen and is then 5transported back to the heart into the left atrium. From here it passes into the left oxygen and is then transported back to the heart into the left atrium. From here it passes into the left ventricle, which pumps the oxygenated blood around the body.
空格 1far需覆核 far / directly / entirely
語意located between the lungs, a bit ___ to the left，描述心臟位置「稍微偏左」，far to the left（偏左）語意最合
✗ directly to the left（正左方）與前面 a bit（稍微）矛盾、entirely（完全）更與「between the lungs 偏一點」相牴觸
空格 2receive receive / received / obtaining / expel
單複數主詞 The upper chambers…atria 為複數，動詞用原形 receive
語意上心房接收進入心臟的血液，receive blood entering the heart 語意正確
✗ received 為過去式/分詞不合主動現在敘述、obtaining 為分詞、expel（排出）與「接收血液」語意相反
空格 3follows contradicts / follows / interrupts / precedes
搭配work as follows（運作如下）固定搭配，The two systems work as follows
時態as follows 為固定用法，動詞恆用第三人稱單數 follows
✗ contradicts/interrupts/precedes 不與 as 構成「如下所述」的固定用法
空格 4isis has / was / isis
時態依原文比對為被動 is passed into the right ventricle，選項 isis 對應該被動 is（輸入檔保留原始拼字）
✗ has/was 與後文 passed into…and is propelled 的現在被動時態不一致
空格 5transported transporting / stored / transported
時態被動語態 is then ___ back to the heart，需過去分詞，is transported
搭配be transported back（被運送回）固定被動搭配
✗ transporting 為現在分詞不合被動、stored（儲存）與「運回心臟」語意不合
384.Iphone (蘋果手機)3 格#080394
All of this suggests that our relationship to our phones might not be sufficiently intellectualized, which All of this suggests that our relationship to our phones might not be sufficiently intellectualized, which is why Brian Merchant’s book comes as a 1relief . Like the best historians, Merchant, an American journalist and editor of Vice Media’s technology blog, Motherboard, 2unpacks the history of the journalist and editor of Vice Media’s technology blog, Motherboard, unpacks the history of the iPhone in a way that makes it seem both inevitable in its outline and 3surprising in its details.
空格 1relief shock / relief / revolution / recession
搭配come as a relief（讓人鬆一口氣）固定搭配，his book comes as a relief
語意前文 might not be sufficiently intellectualized，這本書補足空缺故為 relief
✗ shock/revolution/recession 與「來得正是時候、令人寬慰」語意不合 come as a ___
空格 2unpacks unpacking / unpacked / unpacks
單複數主詞 Merchant（單數人名）為第三人稱單數，動詞加 s 用 unpacks
時態敘述書中內容用現在式，unpacks the history
✗ unpacking 為分詞無法當主要動詞、unpacked 為過去式與全句現在式不一致
空格 3surprising surprising / surprised / smooth / smoothing
詞性與前面 inevitable 並列修飾，surprising in its details，描述事物特性用現在分詞形容詞
語意both inevitable…and surprising，意「結果意料之外」用 surprising（令人驚訝的）
✗ surprised 形容人的感受不合主詞、smooth/smoothing 語意（平滑）與 inevitable 的並列不合
385.Steven Pinker(史蒂文·平克)6 格#080395
Steven Pinker, a cognitive psychologist best known for his book "The Language Instinct", has called music "auditory cheesecake, an exquisite confection crafted to tickle the sensitive spots of at least six of our mental faculties." If it 1vanished from our species, he said, "the rest of our lifestyle would be 2virtually unchanged." Others have argued that, on the 3contrary , music, along with art and literature, is part of what makes people human; its absence would have a brutalising effect. Philip Ball, a British science writer and an 4avid music enthusiast, comes down somewhere in the middle. He says that music is 5ingrained in our auditory, cognitive and motor functions. We have a music 6instinct as much as a language instinct, and could not rid ourselves of it if we tried. faded decreased dissolved vanished
空格 1vanished faded / decreased / dissolved / vanished
語意If it ___ from our species（若音樂從人類消失），vanished（消失）語意最強且切題
搭配vanish from（從…消失）固定搭配
✗ faded（淡去）/decreased（減少）/dissolved（溶解）語意較弱或不合「整體消失」
空格 2virtually actually / completely / virtually / practically
搭配virtually unchanged（幾乎沒變）常見搭配，the rest…would be virtually unchanged
✗ actually（實際上）語意轉折不合、completely unchanged 過於絕對、practically 雖近義但 virtually unchanged 為更慣用搭配
空格 3contrary contrary / reverse / conflict / counter
搭配on the contrary（相反地）固定片語，Others have argued that, on the contrary
✗ reverse/conflict/counter 無法與 on the ___ 構成「相反地」的固定片語
空格 4avid great / amazing / avid / ordinary
搭配an avid…enthusiast（狂熱愛好者）常見搭配，an avid music enthusiast
✗ great/amazing/ordinary 與 enthusiast 搭配不如 avid 自然，ordinary 更與「熱愛」語意相反
空格 5ingrained increased / ingrained / implanted / intrigued
搭配ingrained in（根深蒂固於）固定搭配，music is ingrained in our…functions
✗ increased 語意不合、implanted/intrigued 不與 in our functions 構成「深植於」的搭配
空格 6instinct impulse / intuition / instinct / tendency
語意呼應後文 as much as a language instinct，a music instinct（音樂本能）對應平行結構
✗ impulse/intuition/tendency 無法與後文 a language instinct 形成「音樂本能 vs 語言本能」的對應
386.Keith Haring(基思·哈林)4 格#080396
Keith Haring began as an underground artist, literally. His first famous projects were pieces of stylized Keith Haring began as an underground artist, literally. His first famous projects were pieces of stylized graffiti 1drawn in New York subway stations. Haring travelled from station to station, drawing with chalk and chatting with commuters about his work. These doodles helped him develop his classic style and he grew so 2prolific , doing up to 40 drawings a day, that it was not long before fame and a measure of he grew so prolific , doing up to 40 drawings a day, that it was not long before fame and a measure of fortune followed. Soon, galleries and collectors from the art establishment wanted to buy full-sized pieces by Haring. The paintings skyrocketed in price but this did not sit well with Haring's philosophy. pieces by Haring. The paintings skyrocketed in price but this did not sit well with Haring's philosophy. He believed that art, or 3at least his art, was for everyone. Soon, Haring opened a store which he called the Pop Shop, which he hoped would attract a broad range of people. While somewhat controversial the Pop Shop, which he hoped would attract a broad range of people. While somewhat controversial among street artists, some of 4whom accused Haring of 'selling out', the Pop Shop changed the way people thought about the relationship between art and business. people thought about the relationship between art and business. rapid prolific slow random even more_than at_least away_from 3 even more_than at_least away_from them which whom what
空格 1drawn draw / drawn / are drawn / is drawn
時態後位修飾 pieces of graffiti 的被動分詞，graffiti drawn in subway 表「被畫在」地鐵站
詞性塗鴉是被畫的，須過去分詞 drawn 作被動修飾
✗ draw 為原形；are drawn/is drawn 為完整被動式不能作後位分詞片語；且 pieces 為複數 is 不合數。
空格 2prolific rapid / prolific / slow / random
語意一天畫多達40幅，so prolific 指「多產的」，呼應 up to 40 drawings a day
✗ rapid 表快速非多產；slow 表慢相反；random 表隨機，皆不合「產量高」之意。
空格 3at least even / more than / at least / away from
語意藝術屬於每個人，或「至少」屬於他的藝術，or at least his art 為語氣保留修正
搭配or at least 固定插入語，表「或至少」退一步
✗ even/more than/away from 皆無法構成 or...修正語氣，at least 表退讓最合語境。
空格 4whom them / which / whom / what
詞性介系詞 of 後接關係代名詞作受詞須用 whom，some of whom accused
搭配some of whom 固定結構，指人且作 of 的受詞
✗ them 不能引導關係子句；which/what 指物不指人，不合 street artists（人）先行詞。
387.Language Extinct(語言滅絕)5 格#080397
At the moment, there are between six and seven thousand languages in the world. According to linguists, fifty percent of these are in danger 1of becoming extinct. The speed of language loss has linguists, fifty percent of these are in danger of becoming extinct. The speed of language loss has accelerated over the past few decades because businesses that need to communicate with a range of people from other cultures 2prefer to employ more widely used languages, such as English, Chinese, or people from other cultures prefer to employ more widely used languages, such as English, Chinese, or Spanish. This attitude is understandable, but it means that many local languages are dying out before anyone 3has had the opportunity to study them. According to linguists, some of these languages could anyone has had the opportunity to study them. According to linguists, some of these languages could reveal a great 4deal of useful information about language learning and cognitive development. In addition, a local language that has been built on the local culture contains words and phrases that addition, a local language that has been built on the local culture contains words and phrases that express that culture; lose the language and you arguably may lose the culture, too. And finally, historians will 5argue that a language contains evidence of a region's history and should, for that reason historians will argue that a language contains evidence of a region's history and should, for that reason 1 to_become of_become of_becoming in_becoming 3 has_had has_not will_not has_lost
空格 1of becoming to become / of become / of becoming / in becoming
搭配in danger of + V-ing 固定搭配，in danger of becoming extinct 表「有…的危險」
詞性介系詞 of 後須接動名詞 becoming
✗ to become/in becoming 介系詞錯誤；of become 後須接動名詞非原形。
空格 2prefer focus / prefer / rather / ought
語意企業「偏好」雇用通用語言，prefer to employ 表偏好
搭配prefer to + 原形 固定搭配，表寧願/偏好做某事
✗ focus 須接 on；rather/ought 須接其他結構（rather than/ought to），語法不合此處 prefer to employ。
空格 3has had has had / has not / will not / has lost
時態before anyone has had the opportunity，現在完成式表「尚未有人有過機會」
搭配have had the opportunity to 固定搭配，表曾有機會
✗ has not/will not 後須接原形或破壞句意；has lost 表失去機會與「在研究前消失」語意偏差。
空格 4deal deal / account / number / plenty
搭配a great deal of + 不可數名詞 固定搭配，a great deal of useful information 表大量
✗ account/number/plenty 皆不能構成 a great ___ of 的固定量詞片語（number 須 a great number of 接複數，information 不可數）。
空格 5argue reject / argue / object / lie
語意歷史學家會「主張」語言含區域歷史證據，historians will argue that 表論證主張
搭配argue that + 子句 固定搭配，表主張
✗ reject/object 表反對與後文正面論點矛盾；lie 表說謊不合學者論證語境。
388.Icebergs' Sound(冰山之聲)4 格#080399
Twenty years ago, not so long before B-15 broke off from Antarctica, 'we didn't even know that Twenty years ago, not so long before B-15 broke off from Antarctica, 'we didn't even know that icebergs made noise,' says Haru Matsumoto, an ocean engineer at NOAA who has studied these sounds. But in the past 1few years, scientists have started to learn to distinguish the eerie, haunting sounds. But in the past few years, scientists have started to learn to distinguish the eerie, haunting sounds of iceberg life — ice cracking, icebergs grinding 2against each other, an iceberg grounding on the seafloor — and measure the extent to 3which those sounds contribute to the noise of the ocean. the seafloor — and measure the extent to which those sounds contribute to the noise of the ocean. While they're just now learning to listen, the sounds of ice could help them understand the behavior and breakup of icebergs and ice shelves as the poles warm 4up. and breakup of icebergs and ice shelves as the poles warm up that where which whom on up in off
空格 1few lots / few
語意in the past ___ years（過去幾年），few years（這幾年）為時間表達，呼應 scientists have started to learn
✗ lots 須用 lots of，且 in the past few years 才是慣用時間片語
空格 2against for / against / towards / with
搭配grind against（相互摩擦）片語搭配，icebergs grinding against each other
✗ for/towards/with 與 grinding…each other 的「彼此摩擦」語意不合（against 表相互抵著）
空格 3which that / where / which / whom
詞性the extent to which（…的程度）固定關係結構，介系詞 to 後接 which
✗ that 不接於介系詞 to 之後、where 須先行詞為地點、whom 須指人
空格 4up on / up / in / off
搭配warm up（變暖）片語動詞，as the poles warm up
✗ on/in/off 不與 warm 構成「暖化」的片語動詞語意
389.Academic Writing (學術寫作)5 格#080400
Academic writing addresses complex issues that require high-order thinking skills to comprehend (e.g., critical reflective logical and creative thinking). Think of your writing 1this way: one of the most critical reflective logical and creative thinking). Think of your writing this way: one of the most important attributes of a good teacher is the ability to explain complex ideas in a way that is understandable and relatable to the topic being 2presented . This is also one of the main functions of understandable and relatable to the topic being presented . This is also one of the main functions of academic writing - describing and explaining the significance of complex ideas as clearly as possible. Often 3referred to as higher-order thinking skills, these include cognitive processes that are used to Often referred to as higher-order thinking skills, these include cognitive processes that are used to comprehend solve problems and express concepts or that describe abstract ideas that cannot be easily acted out pointed to or shown with images. As a writer you must take 4on the role of a good teacher by acted out pointed to or shown with images. As a writer you must take on the role of a good teacher by summarizing a lot of complex information into a well-organized synthesis of ideas concepts and recommendations that 5contribute to a better understanding of the research problem. recommendations that contribute to a better understanding of the research problem. discussed discussing presented presenting Referring referred relating related on up off with
空格 1this your / its / this / that
詞性Think of your writing ___ way，指示形容詞修飾 way，this way（這樣地）
搭配in this way / think of…this way（這樣思考）慣用表達
✗ your/its 為所有格不合 ___ way 的指示語意、that way 指「那樣」較不合緊接說明的語境
空格 2presented discussed / discussing / presented / presenting
時態the topic being ___，被動進行式需過去分詞，the topic being presented（正被呈現的主題）
✗ discussing/presenting 為現在分詞不合 being+pp 被動、discussed 語意可通但 presented 對應 a way that is…relatable to the topic 較貼切
空格 3referred Referring / referred / relating / related
搭配Often referred to as（常被稱為）固定被動分詞片語，Often referred to as higher-order thinking skills
✗ Referring/relating 為主動分詞語意不合、related to as 不成固定用法
空格 4on on / up / off / with
搭配take on the role of（擔任…角色）片語動詞，you must take on the role of a good teacher
✗ up/off/with 不與 take…the role of 構成「擔任角色」的片語動詞
空格 5contribute lead / add / contribute / serve
搭配contribute to（有助於）固定搭配，recommendations that contribute to a better understanding
✗ lead/add 須接 to 但語意（導致/添加）不貼、serve 不接 to 表「有助於」
390.Longevity(延年益壽)5 格#080401
People are living longer and this longevity is good news for sales teams. It results in a much more 1precise customer base for them to work from. Why we are living longer is not the issue for anyone precise customer base for them to work from. Why we are living longer is not the issue for anyone 2involved in drawing up plans to market a product. What they focus on is the fact that there are now more age groups to target, which means that a sales pitch can be re-worked a number of times to more age groups to target, which means that a sales pitch can be re-worked a number of times to more exactly fit each one. For example, 3rather than referring simply to 'adults', there are now 'starting adults', 'young adults' and 'established adults'. 4Similarly , markets no longer talk about 'children', but adults', 'young adults' and 'established adults'. Similarly , markets no longer talk about 'children', but tend to refer to a fuller range of categories that includes 'kids', 'tweens', 'pre-teens' and 'teenagers'. We now have a very diverse population in terms of age, and that can only be a 5bonus for business. We now have a very diverse population in terms of age, and that can only be a bonus for business. interested involved specific realized ifif not rather_than other_than 3 not rather_than other_than However Fortunately Hence Similarly
空格 1precise large / precious / precise / preliminary
語意更「精確」的客群，precise customer base 呼應後文 more exactly fit each one
詞性形容詞修飾 customer base，precise 表精準
✗ precious 表珍貴；preliminary 表初步；large 表大量，皆不合「精準鎖定客群」之意。
空格 2involved interested / involved / specific / realized
搭配anyone involved in 固定搭配，指「參與…的任何人」，後接 drawing up plans
詞性後位修飾 anyone 需過去分詞 involved in
✗ interested 須接 in 但語意偏興趣；specific/realized 無法構成 anyone ___ in plans 的慣用後位修飾。
空格 3rather than if / not / rather than / other than
語意「而非」只稱 adults，rather than referring simply to 'adults' 表取捨對比
搭配rather than + V-ing 固定搭配，表「而不是」
✗ if/not 無法構成對比片語；other than 表「除了」語意不合此處取代對比。
空格 4Similarly However / Fortunately / Hence / Similarly
語意前段談 adults 細分，此段同理談 children 細分，Similarly 表「同樣地」承接平行論述
詞性句首連接副詞引導類比，Similarly 對應
✗ However 表轉折；Fortunately 表慶幸；Hence 表因果，皆不合兩段平行類比的語氣。
空格 5bonus news / bonus / reality / dream
語意多元年齡層對商業是個「額外好處」，a bonus for business 表利多
搭配a bonus for 固定搭配，指對…而言的紅利好處
✗ news/reality/dream 皆無法表達「對商業而言的額外利多」之意。
