It would be very hard to imagine life without electricity. Most of the appliances and machines that are used in homes, offices and factories are powered by electricity and this equipment 1helps to improve used in homes, offices and factories are powered by electricity and this equipment helps to improve people's overall quality of life. For that reason, the wider provision of electricity supplies is a critical factor in reducing global poverty 2levels . To meet the needs of users around the world, the global factor in reducing global poverty levels . To meet the needs of users around the world, the global consumption of coal has risen more quickly 3since 2000 than any other fuel. For countries that do not have their own supply of natural energy resources, coal has become an essential 4means of producing have their own supply of natural energy resources, coal has become an essential means of producing power. On a global scale, coal is currently used to fire power stations and produces 40% of global electricity. This 5figure is very likely to increase, and predictions are that by 2030 coal will fuel 44% of electricity. This figure is very likely to increase, and predictions are that by 2030 coal will fuel 44% of 1 cannot_improve helps_to_improve to_improving had_improved population levels regions areas to since between until ways means methods reasons
空格 1helps to improve cannot improve / helps to improve / to improving / had improved
時態主詞 this equipment 為單數現在式，helps to improve 表「有助於改善」
單複數this equipment 單數，動詞用第三人稱 helps
✗ cannot improve 否定與正面語意矛盾；to improving 非完整謂語；had improved 過去完成式不合現在事實陳述。
空格 2levels population / levels / regions / areas
搭配poverty levels 固定搭配，指「貧窮程度/水平」
語意降低全球貧窮水平，reducing global poverty levels 合語境
✗ population/regions/areas 與 poverty 搭配後語意不通（非降低人口/區域）。
空格 3since to / since / between / until
時態has risen 現在完成式須搭配 since 表「自2000年以來」，since 2000
搭配since + 時間點 與現在完成式固定連用
✗ to/until 表終點；between 須接兩端點，皆不合 has risen since 2000 的完成式時間起點。
空格 4means ways / means / methods / reasons
搭配a means of + V-ing 固定搭配，an essential means of producing power 表「手段/方法」
語意煤成為發電的重要「手段」
✗ ways/methods 雖近義但 a means of producing 為慣用且單複數同形；reasons 表原因語意不符。
空格 5figure prediction / figure / evidence / fact
語意指前文40%這個「數字」，This figure is very likely to increase，figure 指數據
搭配this figure 指代前面提及的數字百分比
✗ prediction/evidence/fact 無法指代前句的 40% 這個具體數字。
392.Great Listeners(優秀的聽衆)5 格#080403
Dogs make great listeners. And that may be because man and man's best friend use analogous brain regions to process voices. Researchers 1collected almost 200 sound samples, including human and regions to process voices. Researchers collected almost 200 sound samples, including human and canine 2vocalizations , as well as environmental noises and silence. They played these clips to 22 people and 11 dogs while the subjects' brains were 3undergoing functional MRI scans. Human brains tuned in and 11 dogs while the subjects' brains were undergoing functional MRI scans. Human brains tuned in most to vocal sounds. Dog brains were most sensitive to environmental noises. But they still had a lot in common. A dedicated brain area reacted 4strongly to the vocalizations of their own species. And that in common. A dedicated brain area reacted strongly to the vocalizations of their own species. And that area also 5responded to the voices of the other species. Meanwhile, a different brain region noted emotion in a voice, with a strong response to cheery sounds like laughter and a weaker reaction to emotion in a voice, with a strong response to cheery sounds like laughter and a weaker reaction to unhappy noises like canine whining. The study is in the journal Current Biology. Seems that thousands of years of domestication have made our furry friends sensitive to the same vocal cues we are. You can of years of domestication have made our furry friends sensitive to the same vocal cues we are. You can
空格 1collected collect / collected
時態敘述研究過去動作用過去式，Researchers collected almost 200 sound samples
✗ collect 為原形與過去敘述時態不合
空格 2vocalizations vocals / soundings / noises / vocalizations
搭配human and canine vocalizations（人與犬的發聲）名詞搭配，呼應後文 the vocalizations of their own species
✗ vocals 多指歌唱人聲、soundings 語意（測深）不合、noises 後文已另列 environmental noises 區分
空格 3undergoing experiencing / performing / undergoing / going
搭配undergo…scans（接受掃描）固定搭配，brains were undergoing functional MRI scans
時態were ___ 過去進行式需現在分詞 undergoing
✗ experiencing/performing/going 不與 MRI scans 構成「接受掃描」的自然搭配
空格 4strongly slightly / sensitively / creatively / strongly
搭配reacted strongly to（強烈反應）副詞搭配，呼應後文 a strong response
✗ slightly/sensitively/creatively 與「對同種發聲強烈反應」語意不合
空格 5responded responded / replied / listened / corresponded
搭配respond to（對…反應）固定搭配，that area also responded to the voices
時態與前文 reacted 並列用過去式 responded
✗ replied/listened/corresponded 不與 to the voices 構成「對…產生反應」的腦區語意
393.Life Expectancy(預期壽命)3 格#080404
People are generally living longer than previous generations across most parts of the world. Rising life People are generally living longer than previous generations across most parts of the world. Rising life expectancy is a result of advances in medicine as well as improving living standards and healthier lifestyles. But while this should be 1celebrated for social reasons, is it beneficial in economic terms? lifestyles. But while this should be celebrated for social reasons, is it beneficial in economic terms? Does the increase in the older population create an economic burden on society or can older people be mobilized to 2enhance the productivity of communities in which they work and live? New analysis of be mobilized to enhance the productivity of communities in which they work and live? New analysis of international data from 35 countries, published by the International Longevity Centre, provides more evidence in favor of a 'longevity dividend'. The authors found that as life expectancy increases, so evidence in favor of a 'longevity dividend'. The authors found that as life expectancy increases, so 3does'output does 'output per hour worked, per worker and per capita'.
空格 1celebrated celebrated / tributed / selected / seen
時態被動語態 should be ___ for social reasons，需過去分詞，should be celebrated
語意與後文 is it beneficial 對比，celebrated（值得慶賀）語意切題
✗ tributed 非標準用字、selected/seen 與「為社會理由值得慶賀」語意不合
空格 2enhance extend / enhance / produce / decrease
搭配enhance the productivity（提升生產力）固定搭配，mobilized to enhance the productivity
✗ extend/produce 語意不合、decrease（降低）與「提升生產力」語意相反
空格 3does do / does / isis / are
單複數倒裝 so ___ 'output per hour'，主詞 output 為單數，助動詞用 does
搭配as…increases, so does…（…增加，…也隨之）倒裝呼應前句 increases 的單數動詞
✗ do/are 為複數不合單數主詞 output、isis 非標準助動詞且不用於 so 倒裝
394.Sci-fi Movie(科幻電影)4 格#080405
It's like the publishing version of one of those scenes from a sci-fi movie where an alien invasion impels traditional adversaries to join together to face their larger, common threat. Today 56 newspapers, in Pakistan and India, in Israel and Lebanon, in China, in Greece and Turkey, in Africa and in North, South and Central America are publishing an unprecedented joint editorial calling for meaningful action to face the threat posed by climate change. The editorial, 1published in 45 countries in 20 different languages, appears on this first day of the Copenhagen climate conference. The British in 20 different languages, appears on this first day of the Copenhagen climate conference. The British paper the Guardian led the effort, which involved weeks of negotiations to reach a final version. The editorial notes that "the science is complex but the facts are clear. The world needs to take steps to editorial notes that "the science is complex but the facts are clear. The world needs to take steps to limit temperature rises to 2 degrees C. A bigger rise of 3 to 4 degrees C would parch continents, turning farmland into desert. Half of all species could become extinct, untold millions of people would turning farmland into desert. Half of all species could become extinct, untold millions of people would be displaced, whole nations drowned by the sea. The controversy over emails by British researchers that suggest they tried to suppress inconvenient data has muddied the waters but failed to dent the that suggest they tried to suppress inconvenient data has muddied the waters but failed to dent the mass of evidence on which these predictions are based." The editorial 2recognized that "the shift to a low-carbon society holds out the prospect of more opportunity than sacrifice. Already some countries low-carbon society holds out the prospect of more opportunity than sacrifice. Already some countries have recognized that embracing the transformation can bring growth, jobs and better quality lives. The flow of capital tells its own story: last year for the first time more was invested in renewable forms of flow of capital tells its own story: last year for the first time more was invested in renewable forms of energy than producing 3electricity from fossil fuels." So while gleeful anarchists like Oklahoma Senator James Inhofe go to Copenhagen to try to sabotage the proceedings, the worldwide array of James Inhofe go to Copenhagen to try to sabotage the proceedings, the worldwide array of newspapers attempts to remind the conference participants and the people they represent to keep their eye on the ball—the ball in this case being an oblate spheroid with almost seven billion human their eye on the ball—the ball in this case being an oblate spheroid with almost seven billion human inhabitants and a fever that 4desperately needs to be treated. As the Guardian's editor in chief, Alan Rusbridger, said, "Newspapers have never done anything like this before but they have never had to Rusbridger, said, "Newspapers have never done anything like this before but they have never had to cover a story like this before."
空格 1published edited / spreaded / copyrighted / published
時態被動分詞修飾 editorial，The editorial, published in 45 countries（被刊登於…的社論）
搭配published in…countries/languages（刊登於…）固定搭配
✗ edited/copyrighted 語意（編輯/版權）不合、spreaded 非標準過去分詞
空格 2recognized recognized / reaffirmed / announced / warned
語意The editorial ___ that the shift…holds out the prospect，recognized（認知到）後接 that 子句，語意切題
時態與通篇過去敘述一致用過去式 recognized
✗ reaffirmed/announced/warned 與「社論認知到轉型帶來機會」的語意不如 recognized 貼切
空格 3electricity resources / materials / electricity / substances
搭配producing electricity from fossil fuels（用化石燃料發電）搭配，對比 renewable forms of energy
語意與前文 renewable forms of energy 對比，electricity（電力）為產出標的
✗ resources/materials/substances 與 producing…from fossil fuels 的「發電」對比語意不合
空格 4desperately pathetically / impatiently / desperately / surprisingly
搭配desperately needs to（迫切需要）副詞搭配，a fever that desperately needs to be treated
✗ pathetically/impatiently/surprisingly 與「迫切需要被治療」的急切語意不合
395.Financial Institutions(金融機構)5 格#080406
The economic 1dimension of globalization involves international financial institutions i.e. the IMF & WB. The economic dimension of globalization involves international financial institutions i.e. the IMF & WB. Stabilization and adjustment are sponsored by the two respectively and are rooted in the ideology of the free market. At the other end of the spectrum, protesters see globalization in a very different light the free market. At the other end of the spectrum, protesters see globalization in a very different light than the treasury secretary of the United States, or the finance or trade ministers of most of the advanced industrial countries. The difference in 2views is so great that one wonders, are the protesters advanced industrial countries. The difference in views is so great that one wonders, are the protesters and the policy makers talking about the same 3phenomenon ? Are they looking at the same data? Are the visions of those in 4power so clouded by special and particular 5interests ? the visions of those in power so clouded by special and particular interests ? phenomenon problem hypothesis dilemma stage place power office benefits advantages interests wages
空格 1dimension sphere / field / dimension / atmosphere
搭配the economic dimension of（…的經濟面向）固定搭配
✗ sphere/field/atmosphere 與 the economic ___ of globalization 的「面向」語意不如 dimension 貼切
空格 2views ideas / views / view / opinion
單複數The difference in ___ is so great，後文 Are they looking at the same data 暗示多方觀點，views（複數）合
搭配difference in views（觀點上的差異）搭配，呼應前文 see globalization in a very different light
✗ ideas 語意偏「點子」、view/opinion 為單數不如 views 對應「雙方觀點差異」
空格 3phenomenon phenomenon / problem / hypothesis / dilemma
語意talking about the same ___（談論同一件事），phenomenon（現象）指 globalization，語意切題
✗ problem/hypothesis/dilemma（問題/假設/兩難）與「全球化這同一現象」語意不合
空格 4power stage / place / power / office
搭配those in power（當權者）固定搭配，the visions of those in power
✗ stage/place/office 不與 those in ___ 構成「掌權者」的慣用語
空格 5interests benefits / advantages / interests / wages
搭配special and particular interests（特殊利益）搭配，clouded by special and particular interests
✗ benefits/advantages（好處/優勢）語意偏正面、wages（工資）與「被特殊利益蒙蔽」語意不合
396.Food Choices(食物選擇)5 格#080407
Everybody eats. And consumers increasingly try to consider the 1environmental effects of their food choices. For example, if you want to eat meat, how do your choices compare? That's what a group of choices. For example, if you want to eat meat, how do your choices compare? That's what a group of researchers set out to 2discover . And they found that raising one animal is dramatically more environmentally draining than all the others: cows. The research is in the Proceedings of the National environmentally draining than all the others: cows. The research is in the Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences. The scientists noted the challenge in accessing data and creating metrics that can be compared across livestock and to potato, wheat and rice 3production . They settled on national can be compared across livestock and to potato, wheat and rice production . They settled on national data from the U·S· Departments of Agriculture, the Interior and Energy. The team calculated the production costs by assessing land area, water needs and fertilizer. They also analyzed greenhouse gas production costs by assessing land area, water needs and fertilizer. They also analyzed greenhouse gas 4emissions . Producing pork, poultry, eggs and dairy were between two and six times less efficient than growing potatoes, wheat and rice. And in the current 5agricultural system, beef uses 28 times more growing potatoes, wheat and rice. And in the current agricultural system, beef uses 28 times more land, 11 times more water and six times more fertilizer than the average of the other categories of livestock. Cattle ranching also creates five times more greenhouse gas emissions. The researchers hope livestock. Cattle ranching also creates five times more greenhouse gas emissions. The researchers hope this data will help consumers make informed choices and policy makers create systems that can reduce the environmental costs of what we eat. the environmental costs of what we eat. find discover search observe preparation production product plantation emissions exhausts eliminations efficiency
空格 1environmental healthy / physical / environmental / psychological
搭配environmental effects（環境影響）固定搭配，the environmental effects of their food choices
語意通篇談 greenhouse gas、land、water，environmental（環境的）切題
✗ healthy/physical/psychological 與「食物選擇對環境的影響」的主題不合
空格 2discover find / discover / search / observe
時態set out to ___，不定詞後接原形，a group of researchers set out to discover
語意set out to discover（著手探究）語意切題，呼應後文 they found that
✗ find 雖近義但 set out to discover 為更慣用搭配、search 須接 for、observe 偏「觀察」不合「探究發現」
空格 3production preparation / production / product / plantation
搭配rice production（稻米生產）名詞搭配，potato, wheat and rice production
✗ preparation/product/plantation 與「馬鈴薯、小麥、稻米的生產」語意不合（product 為產品、plantation 為種植園）
空格 4emissions emissions / exhausts / eliminations / efficiency
搭配greenhouse gas emissions（溫室氣體排放）固定搭配
✗ exhausts/eliminations/efficiency 不與 greenhouse gas 構成「排放量」的固定搭配
空格 5agricultural architectural / agricultural / biological / systematic
搭配the current agricultural system（現行農業體系）搭配，in the current agricultural system
✗ architectural/biological/systematic 與「農業生產體系」的主題語意不合
397.Guide Stick (導向杆)5 格#080408
Foldable white canes help the 1visually impaired navigate their surroundings. But the guide stick's tactile nature offers only so much information. The cane's user must manually find and avoid tactile nature offers only so much information. The cane's user must manually find and avoid obstructions. But new high-tech canes are on the horizon. Last year researchers in India tried to fill in some of the missing info with their experimental SmartCane. The device uses an attached ultrasonic some of the missing info with their experimental SmartCane. The device uses an attached ultrasonic transmitter and a sensor that vibrates the cane to warn its users when an obstacle is within three meters. Students at the U·K·'s Birmingham City University are developing a cane that can even identify meters. Students at the U·K·'s Birmingham City University are developing a cane that can even identify acquaintances as they 2approach . Called the 'XploR' mobility cane, it includes an 3embedded digital camera that analyzes the faces of people walking by and compares their images against a database camera that analyzes the faces of people walking by and compares their images against a database stored on a memory card in the cane's handle. If there's a facial recognition match, the cane alerts the user's 4smartphone via Bluetooth. The phone then identifies the approaching person to the user via its user's smartphone via Bluetooth. The phone then identifies the approaching person to the user via its speaker or earbuds. The 5students are building a prototype they'll test later this year. The hurdles are significant: facial recognition is a tough problem, especially outdoors. But if the XploR works, it could significant: facial recognition is a tough problem, especially outdoors. But if the XploR works, it could actually give the visually impaired a leg up on everyone else — especially those of us who never come walk talk approach instilled embedded enabled fitted smartphone speaker laptop telephone
空格 1visually mentally / bodily / visually / horizontally
搭配visually impaired 固定搭配，指視力障礙者
語意全文談白手杖協助看不見的人，搭配 impaired 指視覺受損
✗ mentally/bodily/horizontally impaired 語意不合，白手杖是給視障者用的
空格 2approach come / walk / talk / approach
搭配前文 as they approach 重複出現，描述熟人靠近時被辨識
語意XploR 在人 approach（接近）時辨識臉孔，approach 最精準
✗ come/walk/talk 太泛，未扣住「臉部辨識需對方走近」的情境
空格 3embedded instilled / embedded / enabled / fitted
搭配embedded digital camera 固定搭配，指內嵌的數位相機
詞性空格需過去分詞當形容詞修飾 camera，embedded 表嵌入式
✗ instilled(灌輸觀念)、enabled(使能夠)、fitted(裝配)語意不如 embedded 貼切相機內建
空格 4smartphone smartphone / speaker / laptop / telephone
語意下文 The phone then identifies... 呼應前面 alerts the user's smartphone
搭配via Bluetooth 連線對象通常是 smartphone
✗ speaker/laptop/telephone 與後文 The phone 指代不一致，只有 smartphone 對應 phone
空格 5students students / universities / researchers / scientists
語意前文 Students at Birmingham City University，後句主詞延續為 The students
單複數搭配 are building 複數動詞，且指前述同一群學生
✗ universities/researchers/scientists 與前文具體點名的 students 指代不符
398.Dictionary(詞典)5 格#080409
The famous dictionary of Samuel Johnson, published in London in 1755; its principles dominated English 1lexicography for more than a century. This two-volume work surpassed earlier dictionaries not English lexicography for more than a century. This two-volume work surpassed earlier dictionaries not in 2bulk but in the precision of definition. Its strength lay in two features: the original carefully divided and ordered, elegantly formulated definitions of the main word stock of the language; and the copious and ordered, elegantly formulated definitions of the main word stock of the language; and the copious citation of quotations from the entire range of English literature, which served in support and illustration and which 3exemplified the different shades of meaning of a particular word. A Dictionary of illustration and which exemplified the different shades of meaning of a particular word. A Dictionary of the English Language included a history of the language, a grammar, and an extensive list of words representing basic general vocabulary, based on the best conversation of 4contemporary London and representing basic general vocabulary, based on the best conversation of contemporary London and the normal usage of respected writers. The original was followed in 1756 by an abbreviated one- volume version that was widely used far into the 20th century. Johnson's accomplishment was to provide for the English language a dictionary that incorporated with skill and intellectual power the provide for the English language a dictionary that incorporated with skill and intellectual power the 5prevailing ideals and resources and the best available techniques of European lexicography. It was the standard English dictionary until Noah Webster's. standard English dictionary until Noah Webster's. accuracy amount bulk novelty exemplified simplified multiplied solidified ancient contemporary modern historical
空格 1lexicography bibliography / chronology / lexicography / calligraphy
搭配English lexicography 固定搭配，lexicography=辭典編纂學
語意談 Johnson 字典支配英語辭典編纂一個多世紀
✗ bibliography(書目)、chronology(年代學)、calligraphy(書法)皆與字典編纂無關
空格 2bulk accuracy / amount / bulk / novelty
搭配not in bulk but in the precision 對比句型，bulk(篇幅)對比 precision(精確)
語意勝過前作不在份量而在定義精確，bulk 表體積/份量
✗ accuracy/novelty 與後面 precision 語意重疊或不成對比；amount 不如 bulk 自然搭配此語境
空格 3exemplified exemplified / simplified / multiplied / solidified
時態which 引導子句，與前並列的 served 同為過去式，需動詞 exemplified
語意引文 exemplified the different shades of meaning，例示詞義細微差別
✗ simplified/multiplied/solidified 語意不符「舉例說明詞義」
空格 4contemporary ancient / contemporary / modern / historical
搭配contemporary London 指與作者同時代的倫敦
語意based on the best conversation of contemporary London，當時的倫敦口語
✗ ancient/historical 指古代，與字典取材當代用語矛盾；modern 為現代，時間錯置
空格 5prevailing prevailed / prevailing / new / prosperous
詞性空格需形容詞修飾 ideals，prevailing(主流的)當分詞形容詞
搭配the prevailing ideals 固定搭配，指當時盛行的理念
✗ prevailed 是過去式動詞，文法不合；new/prosperous 語意不如 prevailing 貼切
399.Melting Ice(融冰)5 格#080410
At the end of the last ice age, the melting ice disrupted the ocean currents in the North Atlantic and 1caused a drop in temperature of almost 5 degrees. 2Even though the rest of the planet was warming 3up caused a drop in temperature of almost 5 degrees. Even though the rest of the planet was warming up , the North Atlantic region remained in a cold period for 1300 years. The same thing happened 4around 8000 years ago, when the cooling lasted about a hundred years, and it 5could happen again today. Even 8000 years ago, when the cooling lasted about a hundred years, and it could happen again today. Even a short period of cooling in the North Atlantic could have a dramatic effect on the wildlife, and the human populations, living there. human populations, living there. Let_alone In_spite_of Despite Even_though 2 Let_alone In_spite_of Despite Even_though in up along on surrounding around approximate closely
空格 1caused caused / made / gave / led
搭配cause a drop in 固定搭配，caused a drop in temperature 表「導致下降」
語意融冰擾亂洋流並「造成」溫度下降
✗ made/gave 不與 a drop in 搭配；led 須接 to（led to a drop）才正確，此處無 to。
空格 2Even though Let alone / In spite of / Despite / Even though
詞性後接完整子句 the rest of the planet was warming up，須連接詞，Even though 引導讓步子句
語意儘管地球其他地方在暖化，北大西洋卻維持冷期，讓步對比
✗ Despite/In spite of 為介系詞片語須接名詞非子句；Let alone 表「更不用說」語意不符。
空格 3up in / up / along / on
搭配warm up 片語動詞，was warming up 表「暖化/變暖」
✗ in/along/on 皆無法與 warming 構成「變暖」的片語動詞。
空格 4around surrounding / around / approximate / closely
語意大約8000年前，happened around 8000 years ago，around 表「大約」
搭配around + 時間 表概數「大約」
✗ surrounding 表環繞空間；approximate 為形容詞/動詞非此用法；closely 表緊密，皆不合「約…年前」。
空格 5could must / should / could / will
語意表示「可能」再度發生，it could happen again，could 表推測可能性
時態情態動詞表未來可能性，could happen 語氣較不確定
✗ must 表必然；should 表應該；will 表確定，皆比 could 過於肯定，不合「可能再發生」的推測語氣。
400.Graphene(石墨烯)3 格#080411
Fascination with this material stems from its remarkable physical properties and the potential applications these properties offer for the future. 1Although scientists knew one atom thick, two- applications these properties offer for the future. Although scientists knew one atom thick, two- dimensional crystal graphene existed, no-one 2had worked out how to extract it from graphite. That was until it was isolated in 2004 by two researchers at The University of Manchester, Professor Andre was until it was isolated in 2004 by two researchers at The University of Manchester, Professor Andre Geim and Professor Kostya Novoselov. This is the story of how that stunning scientific feat came about and why Andre and Kostya won the Nobel Prize in Physics for their pioneering work. Andre and Kostya and why Andre and Kostya won the Nobel Prize in Physics for their pioneering work. Andre and Kostya frequently held 'Friday night experiments' - sessions where they would try out experimental science that wasn’t 3necessarily linked to their day jobs. that wasn’t necessarily linked to their day jobs. has_worked worked had_worked has_been_worked 2 has_worked worked had_worked has_been_worked essentially necessarily completely totally
空格 1Although Because / Although / While / When
語意雖然科學家知道石墨烯存在，卻沒人能萃取，Although 引導讓步對比
詞性句首引導從屬子句，Although + 子句表「儘管」
✗ Because 表原因；When 表時間；While 雖可表讓步但 Although 與後文 no-one had worked out 的轉折最契合（原文用此）。
空格 2had worked has worked / worked / had worked / has been worked
時態在2004分離出來之前的更早動作，no-one had worked out 用過去完成式表「在此之前尚未想出」
搭配work out how to 固定搭配，表「想出…的方法」
✗ has worked 為現在完成式與過去敘述衝突；worked 一般過去式無法表更早的先後；has been worked 被動不合主動語意。
空格 3necessarily essentially / necessarily / completely / totally
搭配not necessarily 固定搭配，wasn't necessarily linked 表「未必/不一定」
語意週五夜實驗未必與本職工作相關，necessarily 表「必然地」配 not
✗ essentially/completely/totally 與 not 連用語意為「並非完全/根本」與此處「未必相關」語氣不符。
401.Culturomics(文化經濟學)5 格#080412
They call it culturomics: the obvious play on the word "genomics" looks at trends in human thought and culture. But scientists say culturomics has been hampered by a lack of quantitative data. So researchers at Harvard, along with Google, Encyclopedia Britannica, and the 1American Heritage Dictionary, have come up with a new tool. It's a database of 5·2 million books, published since the year 1500. That's four percent of all the books ever published, with a total of 500 billion words. The focus is on English language culture, so three quarters of the books are in English. Among the first findings of on English language culture, so three quarters of the books are in English. Among the first findings of the research, published in the journal Science : about, 8500 new words enter the English language annually. But many of them don't end up in 2dictionaries . And about fame — actors become famous annually. But many of them don't end up in dictionaries . And about fame — actors become famous around age 30, writers around 40, and politicians around 50. But the fame of politicians can 3eventually exceed that of actors. A Google tool called the Books Ngram Viewer is 4available based on this data — exceed that of actors. A Google tool called the Books Ngram Viewer is available based on this data — users can track the usage and 5frequency of a word or phrase over the past few centuries. Thus, we can watch the fall and rise of Melville. And soon the rise and fall of Snooki. watch the fall and rise of Melville. And soon the rise and fall of Snooki. dictionaries documentaries documents books inevitably successfully undoubtedly eventually applicable available accessible advisable
空格 1American America / American / Americans
詞性空格需形容詞修飾 Heritage Dictionary，American 為形容詞
搭配the American Heritage Dictionary 是專有名詞（美國傳統辭典）
✗ America 是名詞、Americans 是複數名詞，皆不能直接修飾後面的名詞片語
空格 2dictionaries dictionaries / documentaries / documents / books
搭配end up in dictionaries 固定搭配，指收錄入辭典
語意新詞 don't end up in dictionaries，多數沒被收進辭典
✗ documentaries(紀錄片)、documents(文件)、books 與「新詞被收錄」語意不合
空格 3eventually inevitably / successfully / undoubtedly / eventually
語意fame of politicians can eventually exceed，最終可超越，eventually=最終
搭配can eventually exceed 表終究會超過的時間推移
✗ inevitably(必然)、successfully(成功地)、undoubtedly(無疑)語氣與「隨時間最終」不符
空格 4available applicable / available / accessible / advisable
詞性is available 形容詞當主詞補語，工具可取得
搭配a tool is available 固定搭配，指工具上線可用
✗ applicable(適用)、accessible(可進入)、advisable(明智)語意不如 available 貼切「可使用」
空格 5frequency frequency / fluctuation / popularity / length
搭配usage and frequency 並列，frequency 指出現頻率
語意track the usage and frequency of a word，追蹤詞的使用與頻率
✗ fluctuation(波動)、popularity(受歡迎度)、length(長度)與 Ngram 追蹤詞頻的功能不符
402.Drugs(藥物)5 格#080413
When that happens, staff will help the person — 1strung out and now a little stressed — fish their drugs out of the rubbish. On their way out, they might have a blood test, their first 2dental check-up in years, out of the rubbish. On their way out, they might have a blood test, their first dental check-up in years, or just a hot cup of Milo. 'We enable people to inject in the centre because that's what they do,' the medical director, Nico Clark, tells Guardian Australia during a recent visit to the North Richmond medical director, Nico Clark, tells Guardian Australia during a recent visit to the North Richmond Community Health Centre. 'The majority are dependent on their 3substances . The purpose is not to be a place that 4facilitates injection per se, the 5purpose is to keep people alive.' The center is a response to a place that facilitates injection per se, the purpose is to keep people alive.' The center is a response to a coroner’s report that noted the heroin-relate deaths in the area in 2016.
空格 1strung strung / string / shocked / struck
搭配strung out 片語，指(吸毒後)精神恍惚/虛脫
時態the person — strung out... 為過去分詞當形容詞，strung 是 string 的分詞
✗ string 是原形動詞不合；shocked/struck 不與 out 構成此義片語
空格 2dental dentist / dental / dentals / tooth
詞性空格需形容詞修飾 check-up，dental(牙科的)為形容詞
搭配dental check-up 固定搭配，指牙齒檢查
✗ dentist(牙醫,名詞)、dentals(非標準)、tooth(名詞)皆不能正確修飾 check-up
空格 3substances subjects / substances / substantials / submissions
搭配be dependent on+substances，指依賴毒品/物質
語意戒毒語境，substances 婉指成癮物質
✗ subjects(主題)、substantials(非詞)、submissions(提交)語意不合「依賴的物質」
空格 4facilitates solicits / facilitates / assists / advocates
時態a place that facilitates injection，關係子句主詞 place 為單數，動詞加 s
語意facilitates injection，促成/方便注射，facilitate 最貼切
✗ solicits(招攬)、assists(協助人)、advocates(倡導)語意不如 facilitate 表「使更便利」
空格 5purpose reason / responsibility / purpose / result
語意the purpose is to keep people alive，與前句 The purpose is not to... 呼應
搭配the purpose is to+動詞，固定句型表目的是
✗ reason/responsibility/result 與後句重複出現的 purpose 不一致，且語意不合「目的」
403.Low-cost Housing(低成本住房)4 格#080414
When it comes to low-cost housing, architects are hardly ever 1involved . About 98% of the market is When it comes to low-cost housing, architects are hardly ever involved . About 98% of the market is built without architects and the result is usually rows of clones of a building, regardless of whether they are 2practical for an area or not. Developers alone, without the 3input of an architect, do not see the they are practical for an area or not. Developers alone, without the input of an architect, do not see the big picture needed to make housing part of a safe, vibrant community. A little more thought could instantly improve community 4safety as well as lead to building houses that are both comfortable and instantly improve community safety as well as lead to building houses that are both comfortable and
空格 1involved related / relevant / joined / involved
搭配be involved=參與，固定搭配 architects are hardly ever involved
語意低成本住房很少有建築師參與，involved 最貼切
✗ related/relevant 須接 to；joined 語意不對，只有 involved 通順表參與
空格 2practical beautiful / practical / theoretical / safe
搭配practical for an area，practical 表切合實際需求
語意whether they are practical for an area，是否實用/合適於某地區
✗ beautiful/theoretical/safe 不如 practical 貼合「是否適合該地區」的判斷
空格 3input join / use / input / introduction
搭配the input of an architect 固定搭配，input 指專業投入
語意without the input of an architect，缺少建築師的投入/意見
✗ join(動詞)、use、introduction 語意不合「建築師的專業意見投入」
空格 4safety comfort / safety / convenience / advance
搭配community safety 固定搭配，指社區安全
語意improve community safety，呼應後文與社區安全相關
✗ comfort/convenience/advance 與前文 community safety 主題不一致
404.Invasive Species5 格#080415
Invasive species can 1decrease biodiversity and drive resident species to the brink of extinction. But how do these interlopers fare so well in unfamiliar territory? One idea is that they've escaped their enemies, do these interlopers fare so well in unfamiliar territory? One idea is that they've escaped their enemies, for example, the 2parasites that keep them in check on their home turf. But a study in the journal Biology Letters suggests that notion doesn't always stand up. Because at least one kind of invasive Biology Letters suggests that notion doesn't always stand up. Because at least one kind of invasive shrimp is an even bigger pest when it has a parasite on board. The scientists were studying a 3freshwater shrimp commonly found in England. Fishermen brought the shrimp to Northern Ireland in freshwater shrimp commonly found in England. Fishermen brought the shrimp to Northern Ireland in the 1950s as a tasty treat for local trout. Well, the shrimp liked the new digs. So much that they've all but eliminated the native shrimp species. The strange thing is, they may have parasites to thank. In but eliminated the native shrimp species. The strange thing is, they may have parasites to thank. In some streams, 70 percent of the invaders are 4infected with an intestinal worm that doesn't go for the native shrimp. But this gut worm doesn't slow them down. In fact, infected shrimp eat 30 percent more native shrimp. But this gut worm doesn't slow them down. In fact, infected shrimp eat 30 percent more prey than those that are parasite-free. Which perhaps is not surprising. If you had a worm that 5constituted a quarter of your body weight, you'd eat more too. constituted a quarter of your body weight, you'd eat more too. viruses parasites bacteria creatures freshwater common special local influenced affected infected impacted
空格 1decrease decrease / increase / affect / benefit
語意Invasive species can decrease biodiversity，外來種降低生物多樣性
搭配後接 drive species to extinction，與 decrease 邏輯一致（減少→滅絕）
✗ increase/benefit 與「逼物種瀕臨滅絕」矛盾；affect 太中性，不如 decrease 明確負面
空格 2parasites viruses / parasites / bacteria / creatures
語意for example, the parasites that keep them in check，全文反覆談 parasite/worm
搭配後文 has a parasite on board、infected with worm 均指寄生蟲
✗ viruses/bacteria/creatures 與全文聚焦 parasite(寄生蟲)的主軸不符
空格 3freshwater freshwater / common / special / local
搭配a freshwater shrimp 固定搭配，指淡水蝦
語意後文 The scientists were studying a freshwater shrimp 重複出現
✗ common/special/local 不如 freshwater 與後句重複的 freshwater shrimp 一致
空格 4infected influenced / affected / infected / impacted
搭配be infected with=感染，固定搭配 infected with an intestinal worm
語意70% 的入侵者被感染腸道寄生蟲，infected 最貼切
✗ influenced/affected/impacted 語意泛，唯 infected 搭配 with a worm 表「感染」
空格 5constituted constituting / constituted
時態a worm that constituted a quarter，關係子句配 you'd eat 的假設過去式，用 constituted
語意假設佔體重四分之一的蟲，constituted 表構成/佔比
✗ constituting 為現在分詞，不符 that 引導的關係子句需限定動詞且配合過去假設語氣

The Department of Fine Arts is a vibrant department comprising active art professionals housed in a modern, well-equipped facility. The faculty enjoys collaborative relationships with local museums, numerous galleries and a variety of other art organizations. Fine Arts students benefit from studying with artistically 2active mentors who exhibit and research regionally, nationally and internationally. The with artistically active mentors who exhibit and research regionally, nationally and internationally. The department provides students with many opportunities for artistic and personal 3growth through daily contact with full-time faculty members who are noted artists and researchers. Classes are small to contact with full-time faculty members who are noted artists and researchers. Classes are small to allow for personalized feedback and guidance. Well-appointed studios on campus 4facilitate the daily practice of art in combination with the study of liberal arts. During their studies, students gain practice of art in combination with the study of liberal arts. During their studies, students gain exposure to world-class visiting artists and exhibitions, and also have local and international travel interesting kind cool active promotion growth benefit life facilitate make affect hinder
空格 1collaborative friendly / collaborative / beneficial / general

✗ friendly/beneficial/general 不如 collaborative 精準表達跨機構協作

✗ interesting/kind/cool 語意太泛，不如 active 點出導師創作活躍
空格 3growth promotion / growth / benefit / life
搭配artistic and personal growth 固定搭配，指藝術與個人成長
語意系所提供成長機會，growth 表發展
✗ promotion(升遷)、benefit(益處)、life 不如 growth 搭配 personal growth(個人成長)
空格 4facilitate facilitate / make / affect / hinder

406.Footprints (腳印)4 格#080417
The discovery of a set of what look like ancient hominin footprints on the island of Crete could throw our understanding of human evolution into disarray. Received wisdom is that after 1splitting from the our understanding of human evolution into disarray. Received wisdom is that after splitting from the chimp lineage, our hominin ancestors were confined to Africa until around 1·5 million years ago. The prints found in Crete, however, 2belonged to a creature that appears to have lived 5·7 million years ago prints found in Crete, however, belonged to a creature that appears to have lived 5·7 million years ago — suggesting a more complex story. More research is needed to confirm what kind of animal 3made them. However, the prints seem to have been made by a creature that walked upright, on the soles of them. However, the prints seem to have been made by a creature that walked upright, on the soles of clawless feet (rather than on its toes), with a big toe positioned like our own, rather than sticking out sideways like an ape's. It may yet turn out to have been a 4previously unknown non-hominin that had sideways like an ape's. It may yet turn out to have been a previously unknown non-hominin that had evolved with a human-like foot; but the explanatory paper, in the Proceedings of the Geologists' Association, is not the first to suggest that hominins could have originated in Europe. A few months Association, is not the first to suggest that hominins could have originated in Europe. A few months ago, a team put forward evidence, gleaned from fossils found in Greece and Bulgaria that a 7·2 million- year old ape known as Graecopithecus was in fact a hominin. year old ape known as Graecopithecus was in fact a hominin. used belonged supposed invited took let brought made precisely previously preciously preferably
空格 1splitting splitting / separating / dividing / setting
搭配splitting from the chimp lineage，split from=從...分支出來，固定搭配
語意人族祖先從黑猩猩譜系分化，splitting 表演化分支
✗ separating/dividing/setting 與 from the lineage 不如 split from 自然表「演化分家」
空格 2belonged used / belonged / supposed / invited
搭配belonged to a creature，belong to=屬於，固定搭配
語意腳印屬於一種 5.7 百萬年前的生物，belonged to 最貼切
✗ used/supposed/invited 不與 to a creature 構成「屬於某生物」之意
空格 3made took / let / brought / made
搭配the animal made them，made footprints/prints=留下腳印，固定搭配
語意確認何種動物製造這些腳印，made 表造成/留下
✗ took/let/brought 不與 prints 構成「留下腳印」之意
空格 4previously precisely / previously / preciously / preferably
搭配a previously unknown non-hominin，previously unknown=先前未知的
語意可能是一種先前未知的非人族生物，previously 表先前
✗ precisely(精確地)、preciously(珍貴地)、preferably(寧可)語意皆不合「先前未知」
407.Drama(戲劇)5 格#080418
I do not think I am twisting the usual meaning of drama if I define it as a presentation before spectators by performers who take on roles and who interact with each other to further a story or a spectators by performers who take on roles and who interact with each other to further a story or a text intended for such presentations. This is intended as a 1working definition simple enough to be recalled easily. Indeed, it is so simple that I should point out that it makes one or two 2distinctions that recalled easily. Indeed, it is so simple that I should point out that it makes one or two distinctions that are perhaps not immediately obvious. First, to say that performers "take on roles" leaves 3open the possibility that they are not within the roles to other performances as such alternative phrases as possibility that they are not within the roles to other performances as such alternative phrases as "performers in character" or "characters represented by actors" do not. To say that the performers "interact with each other" might seem 4unnecessary , but is in fact important, for in traditional societies "interact with each other" might seem unnecessary , but is in fact important, for in traditional societies there are many performances in which different characters appear successively and simultaneously but, 5nevertheless , do not interact. And I say "to further a story" because a progression of the story may not nevertheless , do not interact. And I say "to further a story" because a progression of the story may not provide the structure of the performance. so and allin_all nevertheless
空格 1working works / worked / work / working
搭配a working definition 固定搭配，working 當形容詞表暫用/可操作的
詞性冠詞 a 與名詞 definition 之間需形容詞，working 為分詞形容詞
✗ works/worked/work 詞性不合，無法構成 a working definition 此名詞片語
空格 2distinctions classifications / distinctions / dissatisfactions / differences
搭配make distinctions 固定搭配，指作出區別
語意makes one or two distinctions，定義做出一兩個微妙區分
✗ classifications(分類)、dissatisfactions(不滿)、differences 不如 distinctions 搭配 make 並切合「微妙區分」
空格 3open open / upon / on / up
搭配leave open the possibility，leave open=保留(可能性)，固定片語
語意保留「他們不在角色中」的可能性，open 表敞開未定
✗ upon/on/up 無法與 leave...the possibility 構成此「保留可能性」固定搭配
空格 4unnecessary underst / andable / unnecessary / unconsciousuncomforta
語意might seem unnecessary, but is in fact important，看似多餘卻重要的轉折對比
詞性空格需形容詞當補語，unnecessary(不必要的)合適
✗ underst/andable/unconsciousuncomforta 為被切斷的亂碼選項，非完整正確詞
空格 5nevertheless so / and / nevertheless
語意appear successively... but, nevertheless, do not interact，表雖如此卻不互動的讓步轉折
搭配but, nevertheless 連用加強轉折語氣
✗ so(因此)表結果、and(並列)皆不合此處「雖出現卻不互動」的轉折邏輯

The scheme optimizes the use of existing 3educational facilities and has been had little or no education. School and university students are engaged in and helping to maintain physical and mental wellbeing. The morality of the welfare state depends on contribution and responsibility. Since some people don't contribute and many are irresponsible, the choices of those who do contribute and are responsible are contribute and many are irresponsible, the choices of those who do contribute and are responsible are either to 1tolerate the free riders, refuse to pay for the 2effects of their irresponsibility or trust the state to 3educate them. Hence the government campaigns against smoking, alcoholism, obesity and gas to educate them. Hence the government campaigns against smoking, alcoholism, obesity and gas guzzling ‐ the first two solidly in place, the other two ramping up. But the British state now goes further: it acts in favor of sexual and racial minorities. In the case of gay men and women this means further: it acts in favor of sexual and racial minorities. In the case of gay men and women this means progressively removing the legal disadvantages under which they have lived, and ensuring that society as a whole observes the new order. as a whole observes the new order. effects consequences results outcomes punish encourage educate teach
空格 1tolerate prefer / tolerate / accept / receive
搭配tolerate the free riders，tolerate=容忍，搭配後文 free riders(搭便車者)
語意三選項之一是容忍搭便車者，tolerate 表勉強接受/容忍
✗ prefer(偏好)語氣不合；accept/receive 不如 tolerate 表「對白吃白喝者的容忍」
空格 2effects effects / consequences / results / outcomes
搭配pay for the effects of their irresponsibility，the effects of=...的後果
語意為他人不負責任的後果買單，effects 指影響/後果
✗ consequences/results/outcomes 雖近義，但 pay for the effects of 為此語境最自然搭配
空格 3educate punish / encourage / educate / teach
語意trust the state to educate them，信任國家去教育他們，呼應後文政府宣導
搭配the state to educate them，educate=教化，後文 campaigns against smoking 即教化手段
✗ punish(懲罰)語氣過強；encourage(鼓勵)語意相反；teach 不如 educate 表政府「教化民眾」
410.Gauss(高斯)3 格#080422
Gauss was a child prodigy. There are many 1anecdotes concerning his precocity as a child, and he made his first ground-breaking mathematical 2discoveries while still a teenager. At just three years old, he 3corrected an error in his father's payroll calculations, and he was looking after his father's accounts on a regular basis by the age of 5. At the age of 7, he is reported to have amazed his teachers by summing the integers from 1 to 100 almost instantly (having quickly spotted that the sum was actually 50 pairs of numbers, with each pair summing to 101, total 5,050). By the age of 12, he was already attending gymnasium and criticizing Euclid's geometry. anecdotes stories books experiences
空格 1anecdotes anecdotes / stories / books / experiences
搭配anecdotes concerning 固定搭配，指趣聞軼事
語意many anecdotes concerning his precocity，談他早慧的軼事
✗ stories 太泛、books(書)、experiences(經歷)不如 anecdotes 精準表「名人軼事」
空格 2discoveries inventions / creation / innovations / discoveries
搭配mathematical discoveries 固定搭配，指數學發現
語意ground-breaking mathematical discoveries，開創性的數學發現
✗ inventions/innovations 偏發明創新；creation 單數且不搭，唯 discoveries 切合數學發現
空格 3corrected corrected / amend / delete / mend
時態he corrected an error，主句過去式敘事，需動詞過去式 corrected
搭配corrected an error 固定搭配，指改正錯誤
✗ amend/mend 為原形，時態不合；delete(刪除)語意不對「改正計算錯誤」
411.Salmon(鲑魚)6 格#080423
Each fall, thousands of coho salmon flock to 1Northwest rivers to spawn. But many never get the chance, especially near big cities like Seattle. "And in some of these urban areas, up to 90 percent of chance, especially near big cities like Seattle. "And in some of these urban areas, up to 90 percent of the females were dying before they spawned, which is not a good thing for a population long term." Julann Spromberg , a toxicologist affiliated with the Northwest Fisheries Science Center. Researchers Julann Spromberg , a toxicologist affiliated with the Northwest Fisheries Science Center. Researchers suspected these deaths were partly a matter of bad timing. The fish often reach streams during the first showers of the rainy season, which flush chemicals from roads and parking lots into the water. first showers of the rainy season, which flush chemicals from roads and parking lots into the water. Now, Spromberg and her colleagues have produced the first direct evidence that this runoff kills coho salmon. Their study is in the Journal of Applied Ecology. The researchers found that fish exposed to salmon. Their study is in the Journal of Applied Ecology. The researchers found that fish exposed to storm water from Seattle-area highways quickly grew sick and died. Surprisingly, though, the salmon did not seem to mind taking a dip in a cocktail of common road pollutants, including 2hydrocarbons did not seem to mind taking a dip in a cocktail of common road pollutants, including hydrocarbons and metals. That detail suggests the killer ingredient in runoff may be a different kind of chemical or a lethal combination of several 3compounds . "There's a whole lot of stuff in here that we haven't been lethal combination of several compounds . "There's a whole lot of stuff in here that we haven't been able to measure or don't have the capabilities of 4measuring at this point." However, Spromberg says there's a way to help the fish even before scientists hunt down the culprit. Her team also found that there's a way to help the fish even before scientists hunt down the culprit. Her team also found that 5filtering runoff through just a few feet of soil made storm water safe for salmon. Cities can 6implement this simple form of clean water technology by building more systems, including roadside rain gardens, this simple form of clean water technology by building more systems, including roadside rain gardens, to collect runoff from paved areas and pass it through soil before it enters urban waterways. Literally a quick and dirty solution. quick and dirty solution. Southeast Southwest Northeast Northwest
空格 1Northwest Southeast / Southwest / Northeast / Northwest
語意the Northwest Fisheries Science Center 後文出現，呼應 Northwest rivers
搭配Northwest rivers 指美國西北部河流(coho salmon 棲地)
✗ Southeast/Southwest/Northeast 與後文 Northwest Fisheries Science Center 不一致
空格 2hydrocarbons hydrocarbons / hyperoxide / hydrogen / carbohydrate
語意common road pollutants, including hydrocarbons and metals，道路污染物含碳氫化合物
搭配hydrocarbons and metals 並列，指常見路面污染物
✗ hyperoxide/hydrogen/carbohydrate 非道路污染物，語意不合
空格 3compounds compounds / materials / metals / composition
搭配combination of compounds 固定搭配，指化合物的混合
語意a lethal combination of several compounds，數種化合物的致命組合
✗ materials/metals/composition 不如 compounds 搭配 several 並表「多種化合物」
空格 4measuring examining / measuring / assessing / evaluating
時態介系詞 of 後接動名詞 measuring
搭配capabilities of measuring，與前句 haven't been able to measure 呼應
✗ examining/assessing/evaluating 不如 measuring 與前文 measure 重複一致
空格 5filtering fleeing / filtering / fitering / fling
搭配filtering...through soil 固定搭配，指過濾
語意filtering runoff through soil，透過土壤過濾逕流
✗ fleeing(逃離)、fitering/fling 為拼字錯誤或語意不合，唯 filtering 正確
空格 6implement realize / utilize / implement / apply
搭配implement this form of technology，implement=實施(技術/方案)
語意城市可推行此淨水技術，implement 最貼切
✗ realize(實現/領悟)、utilize(利用)、apply 不如 implement 搭配 technology/system 表「實施」
412.Paraphrasing (B)(釋義（B）)7 格#080424
We define paraphrasing as putting a passage from an author into your own words. However, what are We define paraphrasing as putting a passage from an author into your own words. However, what are your own words? How different must your paraphrase be from the 1original ? The answer is it should be considerably different. The 2whole point of paraphrasing is to show you have read and understood considerably different. The whole point of paraphrasing is to show you have read and understood another person's ideas, and can summarize them in your own writing style rather than 3borrowing their phrases. If you just change a few words, or add some bits of your own to an 4otherwise reproduced phrases. If you just change a few words, or add some bits of your own to an otherwise reproduced passage, you will probably be penalized for 5plagiarism . You should aim to condense and 6simplify a writer's ideas and describe them 7using different sentence structures and expressions. writer's ideas and describe them using different sentence structures and expressions. all whole complete total using lending fixing borrowing additional otherwise another other
空格 1original used / beginning / original / modified
搭配different from the original，the original=原文，固定搭配
語意改寫須與原文不同，original 指原始文本
✗ used/beginning/modified 不如 the original 表「原文」對應 paraphrase
空格 2whole all / whole / complete / total
搭配the whole point 固定搭配，指「重點/關鍵就在於」
詞性the+whole+point 用 whole 修飾單數可數名詞 point
✗ all 不接單數 point；complete/total 不與 the...point of 構成 the whole point 慣用語
空格 3borrowing using / lending / fixing / borrowing
搭配borrowing phrases 固定搭配，指照搬借用詞句
語意rather than borrowing their phrases，而非借用他人措辭
✗ using/lending/fixing 不如 borrowing 表「(不當)借用他人原句」之負面語意
空格 4otherwise additional / otherwise / another / other
詞性an otherwise reproduced passage，otherwise 當副詞修飾分詞，表「在其他方面/原本」
語意一段原本照抄的文字，otherwise 表除你改的幾字外其餘照搬
✗ additional/another/other 為形容詞或語意不合，無法表「otherwise+過去分詞」此用法
空格 5plagiarism plagiarism / monotheism / aboriginalism / interactionism
搭配penalized for plagiarism 固定搭配，plagiarism=抄襲
語意be penalized for plagiarism，因抄襲受罰
✗ monotheism/aboriginalism/interactionism 與「改寫不當受罰」毫無關聯
空格 6simplify simplify / complicate / purify / difficulty
搭配condense and simplify 並列，simplify 表簡化
語意condense and simplify a writer's ideas，濃縮並簡化作者觀點
✗ complicate(使複雜)語意相反；purify(淨化)、difficulty(名詞)詞性或語意不合
空格 7using using / filling / applying / adopting
時態describe them using different structures，分詞構句 using 表方式
搭配using different sentence structures，using 表運用不同句構
✗ filling/applying/adopting 不如 using 自然搭配 different sentence structures 表方式
413.Bees and Flowers(蜜蜂和花)5 格#080425
Bees and flowers have evolved together for millions of years. It is a mutual relationship where the bee is provided with food (nectar or pollen) and the stationary plant gets to 1disperse its pollen (sperm cells) to other plants of the same species. For the plant this is much more 2efficient than using wind to reach the goal. Consequently, over millions of years plants have developed flowers with increasingly specialized features to attract 3visiting bees who, in turn, would distribute pollen grains and optimize the plant's reproductive 4capabilities . Simultaneously, bees underwent physiological, behavioral and structural adaptations to take advantage of the nutritional benefits offered by flowering plants. This is an example of a 5co-evolutionary relationship. transfer spread disperse deliver efficient effective easy convenient
空格 1disperse transfer / spread / disperse / deliver
搭配disperse pollen 固定搭配，指花粉的擴散傳播
語意the plant gets to disperse its pollen，植物得以散播花粉
✗ transfer/spread/deliver 雖近義，但 disperse 最精準表花粉四散傳播之生物用法
空格 2efficient efficient / effective / easy / convenient
搭配more efficient than，efficient=有效率，固定比較句型
語意靠蜜蜂比靠風更有效率傳粉，efficient 表效率
✗ effective/easy/convenient 不如 efficient 在 more...than 比較中強調效率
空格 3visiting visited / visiting
詞性visiting bees，現在分詞當形容詞，表來訪的蜜蜂(主動)
語意吸引前來造訪的蜜蜂，bees 主動 visit，用現在分詞 visiting
✗ visited 為過去分詞表被動「被造訪」，蜜蜂是主動來訪，語意不合
空格 4capabilities abilities / talents / capacities / capabilities
搭配reproductive capabilities 固定搭配，指繁殖能力
單複數前無冠詞且泛指多種能力，用複數 capabilities
✗ abilities/talents/capacities 雖近義，但 reproductive capabilities 為慣用搭配最自然
空格 5co-evolutionary需覆核 coagulate / co / production / co / evolutionary / cooperation
語意末句 This is an example of a co-evolutionary relationship，全文總結為共同演化關係
搭配選項碎片含 co/evolutionary，組合為 co-evolutionary 修飾 relationship
✗ 選項被切成碎片(coagulate/co/production/cooperation)，唯 co+evolutionary 拼成 co-evolutionary 符合主旨；answer 原為 null 故標記不確定
414.Sandra Lousada(桑德拉·洛薩達)6 格#080426
London's National Portrait Gallery is currently celebrating the fifty-year 1career of photographer Sandra Lousada. The twenty one portraits on 2display depict key 3figures in literature, film and fashion from the early 1960s. 4Subsequent to the acquisition of forty portraits by Lousada, the display at the National Portrait Gallery highlights shots taken between 1960 and 1964, many of which 5feature in Lousada's book Public Faces Private Places(2008). Formal commissioned portraits are shown alongside behind- the-scenes photographs taken on film 6sets and unguarded portraits of sitters captured at home. the-scenes photographs taken on film sets and unguarded portraits of sitters captured at home. gallery display publish visual roles characters figures persons Following Subsequent Previous Former
空格 1career career / anniversary / period / relationship
搭配the fifty-year career of photographer，career 指攝影師的職業生涯
語意畫廊慶祝攝影師五十年的職涯，career 最貼切
✗ anniversary(週年)、period(時期)、relationship 不如 career 搭配 fifty-year of a photographer
空格 2display gallery / display / publish / visual
搭配on display 固定搭配，on display=展出中
語意21 幅肖像展出，後文 the display 重複呼應
✗ gallery/publish/visual 不能與 on 構成 on display；publish 為動詞詞性不合
空格 3figures roles / characters / figures / persons
搭配key figures in literature, film and fashion，key figures=重要人物
語意描繪文學、電影、時尚界重要人物，figures 指名人
✗ roles(角色)、characters(虛構角色)、persons 不如 key figures 表各界「要角/名人」
空格 4Subsequent Following / Subsequent / Previous / Former
搭配subsequent to=在...之後，固定搭配 Subsequent to the acquisition
語意在收購四十幅肖像之後，展覽呈現相關作品，表時間順序
✗ Following 雖可但須直接接名詞無 to；Previous/Former 表先前，時序相反
空格 5feature focus / feature / centralize / gather
搭配feature in a book 固定搭配，指收錄/登載
語意many of which feature in Lousada's book，許多作品收錄於書中
✗ focus/centralize/gather 不與 in a book 構成「收錄於」之意；feature 最貼切
空格 6sets set / sets / option / options
單複數on film sets，泛指多個電影片場，用複數 sets
搭配film sets 固定搭配，指拍攝現場
✗ set(單數)語境需複數；option/options 語意完全不合「片場」
415.Life Science(生命科學)4 格#080427
The Life Science Institute at the University of Michigan achieves excellence in biomedical research by bringing together the world's 1leading scientists from a variety of life science disciplines to accelerate bringing together the world's leading scientists from a variety of life science disciplines to accelerate 2breakthroughs and discoveries that will improve human health. With close to 400 scientific staff members, the LSI is exploiting the power of a collaborative and interdisciplinary 3approach to members, the LSI is exploiting the power of a collaborative and interdisciplinary approach to biomedical research in an open-laboratory 4facility .
空格 1leading important / smartest / leading / guiding
搭配the world's leading scientists 固定搭配，leading=頂尖的
語意匯聚全球頂尖科學家，leading 表領先
✗ important/smartest/guiding 不如 leading 搭配 world's...scientists 表「頂尖」
空格 2breakthroughs improvements / breakthroughs / advancements / excesses
搭配accelerate breakthroughs and discoveries，breakthroughs 與 discoveries 並列
語意加速突破與發現以改善健康，breakthroughs 最貼切
✗ improvements/advancements 偏漸進改善；excesses(過量)語意不合「重大突破」
空格 3approach path / approach / way / method
搭配a collaborative and interdisciplinary approach，approach=研究取徑，固定搭配
語意協作跨領域的研究取徑，approach 最貼切
✗ path/way/method 不如 approach 在 a collaborative...approach 此學術慣用語自然
空格 4facility setting / facility / installation / appliance
搭配an open-laboratory facility 固定搭配，facility=設施/場所
語意在開放式實驗室設施中進行研究，facility 最貼切
✗ setting/installation/appliance 不如 facility 表「研究設施場所」
416.Newspapers(報紙)5 格#080428
Who won the World Cup 1994 football game? What happened at the United Nations? How did the Who won the World Cup 1994 football game? What happened at the United Nations? How did the critics like the new play? Just when an event takes place, newspapers are on the streets to give the details. Wherever anything happens in the world, reporters are on the spot to 2gather the news. details. Wherever anything happens in the world, reporters are on the spot to gather the news. Newspapers have one basic purpose, to get the news as quickly as possible from its source, from those who make it to those who want to know it. Radio, telegraph, television, and other inventions brought who make it to those who want to know it. Radio, telegraph, television, and other inventions brought competition for newspapers. So did the development of magazines and other means of communication. However, this competition merely spurred the newspapers on. They quickly made use communication. However, this competition merely spurred the newspapers on. They quickly made use of the newer and faster means of communication to improve the 3speed and thus the efficiency of their own operations. Today more newspapers are printed and read than ever before. Competition also led own operations. Today more newspapers are printed and read than ever before. Competition also led newspapers to branch out into so many other fields. Besides keeping readers 4informed of the latest news, today's newspapers educate and influence readers about politics and other important and news, today's newspapers educate and influence readers about politics and other important and serious matters.Newspapers influence readers' economic choices through advertising. Most newspapers depend on advertising for their very existence. Newspapers are sold at a price that fails to newspapers depend on advertising for their very existence. Newspapers are sold at a price that fails to cover even a small fraction of the cost of production.The main source of income for most newspapers is commercial advertising. The success in selling advertising depends on a newspaper's value to is commercial advertising. The success in selling advertising depends on a newspaper's value to advertisers. This is 5measured in terms of circulation.How many people read the newspaper? Circulation depends much on the work of the circulation department and on the services or entertainment offered depends much on the work of the circulation department and on the services or entertainment offered in a newspaper's pages. But for the most part, circulation depends on a newspaper's value to readers as a source of information about the community, city, country, state, nation, and world--and even as a source of information about the community, city, country, state, nation, and world--and even
空格 1given需覆核 giving / given
詞性兩選項為 giving/given；此處需過去分詞 given 表「被提供的」細節(被動)
時態細節是被報紙提供出去的，過去分詞 given 表被動意義
✗ giving 為現在分詞表主動，與細節被提供的被動語意不合；故選 given（answer 原為 null）
空格 2gather gather / focus / concentrate / keep
搭配gather the news 固定搭配，指蒐集新聞
語意記者到現場採集新聞，gather 最貼切
✗ focus/concentrate 需接 on；keep 語意不合「蒐集新聞」
空格 3speed range / quantity / quality / speed
語意improve the speed and thus the efficiency，提升速度進而效率
搭配the speed of operations 固定搭配，指運作速度
✗ range/quantity/quality 與後文 thus the efficiency 因果鏈不合，唯 speed→efficiency 通順
空格 4informed informed / taught / acknowledged / noticed
搭配keep sb informed of=使...知悉，固定搭配
語意讓讀者獲知最新消息，informed 最貼切
✗ taught/acknowledged/noticed 不與 keep...of 構成「使知悉」此固定用法
空格 5measured studied / measured / tested / searched
搭配be measured in terms of=以...衡量，固定搭配
語意報紙價值以發行量衡量，measured 最貼切
✗ studied/tested/searched 不與 in terms of 構成「以...衡量」此固定搭配
417.Cell Template(單元格模板)4 格#080429
One of the great promises of stem-cell biology is to use a patient's own cells as a template to build a real, working organ or tissue in the lab. One prime example: a 1treatment for diabetes by turning stem cells into working pancreatic beta cells, which release insulin. "The existing beta cells that our lab and others had created were 90 percent of the way there. But 90 percent still means not functional." Ron Evans, a molecular 2biologist at the Salk Institute. Evans compares the stem-cell-derived beta cells they first made to a darkened room. "If you walk into that room, there may be everything in it that you need to be a complete room, with furniture and chairs and everything else. But it's dark. And the key is: what do you need to turn on the light?" That light switch, Evans discovered, is a gene—called estrogen- related receptor gamma. Flip it on, and it 3activates a genetic circuit that ramps up mitochondria production, powers up the cell, and endows the almost-functional beta cells with the ability to sense glucose and release insulin in 4response . Evans's team recently used that trick to transform stem cells into beta cells that worked just like they would in a healthy pancreas. When they transplanted those cells into mice with a mouse version of diabetes, blood glucose fell to normal levels in half the rodents. The results are in the journal Cell Metabolism. Next, Evans says he'll replicate the test in diabetic primates. "Primates get diabetes in a fashion that's very similar to people. So if it works in a primate, very high probability that it's going to work in people." If it does, we might someday replace a shot of insulin with a shot of cells. reply reflection response return
空格 1treatment treatment / cure / therapy / heal
搭配a treatment for diabetes，treatment for=...的療法，固定搭配
語意針對糖尿病的治療法，treatment 最貼切
✗ cure/therapy 雖近義但搭配不如 treatment for 自然；heal 為動詞詞性不合
空格 2biologist scientist / biologist / doctor / researcher
搭配molecular biologist 固定搭配，指分子生物學家
語意a molecular biologist at the Salk Institute，Ron Evans 是分子生物學家
✗ scientist/doctor/researcher 不如 biologist 搭配 molecular 構成 molecular biologist
空格 3activates stimulate / motivate / energize / activates
時態it activates a genetic circuit，主詞 it 單數，現在式動詞加 s
搭配activates a circuit 固定搭配，指啟動基因迴路
✗ stimulate/motivate/energize 為原形且時態不合；activates 形式與語意俱合(啟動迴路)
空格 4response reply / reflection / response / return
搭配in response=作為回應，固定片語 release insulin in response
語意感測葡萄糖並回應性地釋放胰島素，response 最貼切
✗ reply(口頭答覆)、reflection(反射/反思)、return(返回)不與 in 構成 in response 此生理回應用語
418.WorldWide Telescope(微軟天文望遠鏡)5 格#080430
If you've ever wanted to explore the universe, your dream is now as close as your keyboard. Because last week, Microsoft unveiled its online WorldWide Telescope. The program was developed in partnership with NASA and research institutions such as the California Institute of Technology. The WorldWide Telescope uses the best high-resolution imagery that's been 1generated both here on earth and in space. The images are joined together to put celestial objects in the correct perspective and in their actual 2positions in the sky. From your computer, you can peer through telescopes such as the Hubble or the Chandra X-Ray Observatory. You can roam on your own through the galaxies, get up close and 3personal with the planets, or take tours 4guided by astronomers and professors. You can choose to look through different wavelengths of light to reveal hidden structures. And you can explore the heavens not only as they are today, but as they were in the past or will be in the future. The late Jim Gray, a Microsoft computer scientist, conceived of this effort as a way to make the universe accessible to everyone. The free program can be 5downloaded at worldwide telescope·org. downloaded uploaded downgraded upgraded
空格 1generated given / turned / generated / manufactured
時態imagery that's been generated，been+過去分詞被動完成式，需 generated
語意在地球與太空產生的影像，generated 表生成
✗ given/turned 語意不合；manufactured(製造實體物)不如 generated 搭配影像資料
空格 2positions situations / postures / places / positions
搭配their actual positions in the sky，positions in the sky=天空中的位置
語意把天體放在正確位置，positions 最貼切
✗ situations(情況)、postures(姿勢)、places 不如 positions 表天體實際方位
空格 3personal personal / individual / alone / solo
搭配get up close and personal，固定片語，指近距離親身接觸
語意與行星親密近距接觸，personal 為此慣用語成分
✗ individual/alone/solo 不構成 up close and personal 此固定片語
空格 4guided guided / followed / taught / learned
搭配guided by=由...導覽，固定搭配 tours guided by astronomers
時態過去分詞 guided 當形容詞修飾 tours，表被...帶領的
✗ followed/taught/learned 不與 tours...by 構成「導覽行程」之意
空格 5downloaded downloaded / uploaded / downgraded / upgraded
搭配downloaded at a website 固定搭配，指自網站下載
語意free program can be downloaded，免費程式可下載
✗ uploaded(上傳)、downgraded(降級)、upgraded(升級)與「使用者取得程式」語意不合
419.English Colonies(英國殖民地)2 格#080431
English colonies 1emerged along the eastern seaboard for a variety of reasons. People, primarily men, originally migrated to Virginia to find gold and silver to make a quick profit. 2After it became evident originally migrated to Virginia to find gold and silver to make a quick profit. After it became evident that there were no precious metals in the area, men came to Virginia to start cultivating cash crops like Because When After As
空格 1emerged arose / emerged / appeared / turned
語意主詞 colonies「殖民地」沿東岸出現，emerge 指「（逐漸）形成、興起」最貼合歷史敘述語境
搭配emerge along the eastern seaboard 為自然搭配，描述事物在某區域興起
✗ arose/appeared 偏「突然出現」，turned 須接補語(turn into)語法不通
空格 2After Because / When / After / As
語意前句「發現沒有貴金屬」與後句「改種經濟作物」為先後時序，After 表「在…之後」
時態從句 it became evident 為過去式表已完成事件，主句 men came 隨之發生，符合 After 的前後關係
✗ Because 表因果語意偏弱、When 重點在同時、As 雖可表原因但時序對比不如 After 明確
420.Hibernation(冬眠)4 格#080432
Hibernation is a way for many creatures - from butterflies to bats - to survive cold, dark winters without having to forage for food or migrate to somewhere warmer. 1Instead , they turn down their metabolisms to save energy. Animals in hot climates also 2undergo a form of hibernation called aestivation. This works in a similar way and enables them to survive extreme heat, drought or lack of food. Hibernating is much more 3profound than simply sleeping, though. Depending on the species, it can vary from long, deep unconsciousness to light spells of inactivity. But hibernation carries risks as the dormant animal is 4vulnerable to predators and the unpredictable climate. However But Whereas Instead undergo stand experience bear
空格 1Instead However / But / Whereas / Instead
語意前句講不必覓食或遷徙，後句講「改為調降代謝」，Instead 表「取而代之」的替代關係
搭配Instead, + 子句 為句首副詞用法，後接逗號獨立成句，文法成立
✗ However/But 表轉折而非替代、Whereas 為連接詞須連接兩子句不能單獨領句
空格 2undergo undergo / stand / experience / bear
搭配undergo a form of hibernation 為固定搭配，undergo 指「經歷（過程/變化）」
語意受詞為 aestivation 這種生理過程，undergo 最貼切
✗ stand/bear 偏「忍受」、experience 雖通但搭配 a form of 不如 undergo 自然
空格 3profound profound / deep / lasting / remote
語意句意「冬眠遠比單純睡覺更___」，profound 指「程度深刻、根本」對比 simply sleeping
搭配much more profound than 為慣用比較結構
✗ deep 與後文 deep unconsciousness 重複且太字面、lasting 重「持久」、remote 語意不合
空格 4vulnerable vulnerable / weak / fragile / delicate
搭配vulnerable to predators 為固定搭配，vulnerable to 表「易受…侵害」
語意描述沉睡動物易遭掠食者與氣候威脅，vulnerable 強調「易受攻擊」
✗ weak/fragile/delicate 指本身脆弱，無法接 to predators 表達「易受外部威脅」之意
421.Ants(螞蟻)6 格#080433
Ants are known for working together, operating as a unit for the good of the colony. But not so fast, say researchers from the Universities of Leeds and Copenhagen. It turns out that ants can scheme like say researchers from the Universities of Leeds and Copenhagen. It turns out that ants can scheme like a stage mom. 1Scientists say that some ants hide out to ensure that their offspring become child- bearing queens instead of barren workers. The 2accepted hypothesis had been that random ants were bearing queens instead of barren workers. The accepted hypothesis had been that random ants were fed certain foods that would allow them to develop into queens. But DNA tests on five 3colonies of leaf- cutting ants 4revealed that certain males have a better genetic chance of producing royal progeny. cutting ants revealed that certain males have a better genetic chance of producing royal progeny. Scientists believe these rare males stay anonymous, and thus avoid any problems with other ants that might otherwise lose their "one-for-all, all-for-one" attitude. In fact, the number of males 5carrying royal might otherwise lose their "one-for-all, all-for-one" attitude. In fact, the number of males carrying royal genes to those who aren't may have settled at a low ratio through 6evolution —which cobbled together the best way for the ant gene pool to expand, while at the same time keeping the lucky males hidden the best way for the ant gene pool to expand, while at the same time keeping the lucky males hidden from their possibly jealous rivals. advancement development evolution progression
空格 1Scientists Scholars / Academics / Scientists / Professors
語意下文提到 DNA tests、基因研究，Scientists 泛指做此類科學研究者，最切合
✗ Scholars/Academics/Professors 偏人文學者或職稱，不符做基因實驗的科學語境
空格 2accepted approved / recognized / acknowledged / accepted
搭配the accepted hypothesis 為固定搭配，accepted 作形容詞表「公認的、被普遍接受的」
語意指先前被廣泛接受的假說，accepted 最貼合
✗ approved/recognized/acknowledged 雖近義，但 accepted hypothesis 才是慣用搭配
空格 3colonies colonies / communities / groups / societies
搭配five colonies of leaf-cutting ants 為固定搭配，螞蟻群體稱 colony
語意全文以 colony 指螞蟻群，此處承接同一用詞
✗ communities/groups/societies 泛指群體，但螞蟻群的專用詞是 colony
空格 4revealed unveiled / exemplified / exposed / revealed
語意DNA tests ___ that... 句意「檢測揭示出」，reveal 指研究結果「揭露」事實
搭配tests/research revealed that 為慣用搭配，後接 that 子句
✗ unveiled 偏正式揭幕、exposed 多帶負面揭發、exemplified 表「舉例說明」語意不合
空格 5carrying carry / carries / carrying
詞性the number of males ___ royal genes 中須用現在分詞作後位修飾 males，carrying 等於 who carry
單複數若用限定動詞主詞 the number 為單數，carry/carries 都無法正確接續，故取分詞 carrying
✗ carry/carries 為限定動詞，此處無連接詞無法接子句，只能用分詞 carrying 作修飾
空格 6evolution advancement / development / evolution / progression
搭配settled at a low ratio through evolution 指「透過演化」，生物基因庫語境用 evolution
語意全文談螞蟻基因庫與物種延續，evolution「演化」最切合生物學脈絡
✗ advancement/development/progression 泛指進展，缺生物演化的精準語意
422.Motorcyclist Accident(摩托車事故)4 格#080434
May 15, 2008 When motorcyclists have an accident they roll a dice, with escaping 1unscathed on one May 15, 2008 When motorcyclists have an accident they roll a dice, with escaping unscathed on one side and very severe consequences on the other. And for those unlucky enough to 2sustain severe and permanent injuries like paraplegia, there's often one huge regret - that they may never ride again on a permanent injuries like paraplegia, there's often one huge regret - that they may never ride again on a real bike. A chance encounter with a paraplegic ex-motorcross champion in a hospital carpark inspired West Australian Darren Lomman to put together an audacious project: a motorcycle for paraplegic West Australian Darren Lomman to put together an audacious project: a motorcycle for paraplegic riders - and his working prototype, a heavily modified Honda CBR250RR, is now road licensed and 3operational .With the right investment and profile, Lomman believes the Dreamfit bike isn't too far operational .With the right investment and profile, Lomman believes the Dreamfit bike isn't too far away from production potential - and after around 150 enquiries from all around the world, he would love to be able to put the bikes in the hands of more people for whom riding has become an love to be able to put the bikes in the hands of more people for whom riding has become an impossible dream. Started as a university project, the Dreamfit CBR250RR has been modified to 4suit riders paralyzed from the chest down, with thumb-activated pneumatic rams for foot-free gear riders paralyzed from the chest down, with thumb-activated pneumatic rams for foot-free gear shifting, a combined braking system, custom-moulded ergonomic cups to hold the rider in place without any lower body strength, and a set of steel-braced "landing gear" wheels that drop to provide without any lower body strength, and a set of steel-braced "landing gear" wheels that drop to provide stability at very low speeds.
空格 1unscathed injured / unrivaled / unscathed / harmed
語意與另一面 very severe consequences 形成對比，unscathed「毫髮無傷」是擲骰兩面之一的好結果
搭配escape unscathed 為固定搭配，表「全身而退、安然無恙」
✗ injured/harmed 與「逃過一劫」矛盾、unrivaled「無與倫比」語意不合
空格 2sustain retain / endure / sustain / maintain
搭配sustain injuries 為固定搭配，sustain 表「遭受（傷害）」
語意受詞為 severe and permanent injuries，sustain 專指承受傷害
✗ retain/maintain 表「保有/維持」、endure 偏「忍受」，皆不與 injuries 搭配表「受傷」
空格 3operational functional / working / operative / operational
搭配road licensed and operational 並列，operational 指機器「可運作、運行中」
語意描述原型機已合法上路且能實際運作，operational 最貼切
✗ functional/working/operative 義近，但與 road licensed 並列且描述車輛運轉狀態時 operational 最自然慣用
空格 4suit fit / suit / equal / adapt
搭配modified to suit riders 為固定搭配，suit 表「適合（某人需求）」
詞性to ___ riders 須及物動詞直接接受詞，suit 可直接接 riders
✗ fit 多指尺寸合身、adapt 須用 adapt to、equal 語意不合
423.Plastic Pollution(塑料汙染)4 格#080435
The problem caused by plastic pollution is getting out of hand, but public 1awareness and intervention The problem caused by plastic pollution is getting out of hand, but public awareness and intervention are about to change that. About 9 billion kilograms of plastic waste reaches the world's ocean from coastal areas annually. This plastic causes 2stress and harm to the marine creatures such as turtles, coastal areas annually. This plastic causes stress and harm to the marine creatures such as turtles, whales, and seabirds that starve because their bellies are full of plastic particles leaving no room for real food. A 3recent study about the potential adverse impacts of tiny pieces of plastic in the marine real food. A recent study about the potential adverse impacts of tiny pieces of plastic in the marine food chain says that it might adversely 4affect human health and food security.
空格 1awareness recognition / awareness / ideas / knowledge
搭配public awareness 為固定搭配，指「公眾意識」
語意與 intervention 並列作為扭轉污染的力量，awareness「意識」最切合
✗ recognition/ideas/knowledge 雖近義，但 public awareness 才是慣用搭配且最貼合語境
空格 2stress stress / tension / strain / pressure
搭配causes stress and harm to 為自然搭配，stress 指對生物造成的「壓力、緊迫」
語意與 harm 並列描述塑膠對海洋生物的影響，stress 最常用於生態學語境
✗ tension/strain/pressure 偏物理或抽象壓力，生物所受的環境壓力慣用 stress
空格 3recent modern / current / recent / contemporary
搭配a recent study 為固定搭配，指「近期一項研究」
時態後文 says 與研究內容呼應，recent 表時間上「最近的」最自然
✗ modern/current/contemporary 偏「現代的/當前的」狀態，描述單一已完成研究用 recent
空格 4affect affect / effect / modify / strike
詞性it might adversely ___ human health 須用動詞，affect 為動詞「影響」
搭配adversely affect 為慣用搭配，effect 為名詞不可置於副詞後當謂語
✗ effect 是名詞（易混淆）、modify「修改」與 strike「打擊」語意不合
424.Basic Organisms(基礎生物)4 格#080436
Some of the most basic organisms are smarter than we thought. Rather than moving about randomly, amoebas and plankton employ sophisticated 1strategies to look for food and might travel in a way that their foraging.Biophysicists have long tried to explain how creatures of all sizes search for food. However, single-celled organisms such as bacteria seem to move in no particular 2direction in their search.To investigate, Liang Li and Edward Cox at Princeton University studied the movements of amoebas (Dictyostelium) in a Petri dish, recording the paths travelled by 12 amoebas, including every turn and movement straight ahead, for 8 to 10 hours per amoeba.Immediately after an amoeba turned right, it was twice as 3likely to turn left as right again, and vice versa, they told a meeting of the American Physical Society meeting in Denver, Colorado, last week. This suggests that the cells have a 4rudimentary memory, being able to remember the last direction they had just turned in, says Robert Austin, a biophysicist at Princeton who was not involved in the study.
空格 1strategies techniques / strategies / methods / approaches
搭配sophisticated strategies to look for food 搭配自然，strategy 強調「策略」呼應 smarter/sophisticated
語意全文主旨是這些生物採取「複雜策略」覓食，strategies 最切合
✗ techniques/methods/approaches 偏具體手法，與 sophisticated 及「比想像聰明」的語境不如 strategies 契合
空格 2direction path / direction / route / trajectory
搭配move in no particular direction 為固定搭配，direction 指「方向」
語意句意「細菌的覓食似乎沒有特定方向」，direction 最貼合
✗ path/route/trajectory 偏具體路徑，no particular direction 才是慣用片語
空格 3likely likely / plausible / trusted / unlikely
搭配twice as likely to ... as 為固定比較結構，likely 表「可能性」
語意句意「向左的可能性是再向右的兩倍」，likely 最切合
✗ plausible/trusted 不入 as...as 機率結構、unlikely 與「twice as」矛盾使語意相反
空格 4rudimentary mature / developed / advanced / rudimentary
搭配a rudimentary memory 為固定搭配，rudimentary 指「初步、基本的」
語意對單細胞生物而言記憶只是「雛形、初級」，rudimentary 最貼合
✗ mature/developed/advanced 表「成熟、先進」，與單細胞的初級記憶語意相反
425.Symbiosis(共生)4 格#080437
Symbiosis is a general term for interspecific interactions in which two species live together in a long- Symbiosis is a general term for interspecific interactions in which two species live together in a long- term, intimate association. In everyday life, we sometimes use the term symbiosis to mean a 1relationship that benefits 2both parties. However, in ecologist-speak, symbiosis is a broader concept relationship that benefits both parties. However, in ecologist-speak, symbiosis is a broader concept and can include 3close , lasting relationships with a 4variety of positive or negative effects on the close distant remote intimate kind variety plenty selection
空格 1relationship connection / collaboration / relationship / interaction
語意a ___ that benefits both parties，承接前句 symbiosis to mean a relationship，relationship「關係」最貼合
搭配a relationship that benefits both parties 為自然搭配
✗ connection/collaboration/interaction 雖近義，但全文以 relationship 指共生關係，前後一致
空格 2both each / either / neither / both
搭配benefits both parties 為固定搭配，both 修飾 parties（複數兩方）
單複數parties 為複數兩方，both 表「兩者皆」最合，each 後須接單數
✗ each 後須接單數名詞、either/neither 表「兩者之一/皆非」與「互利雙方」語意不合
空格 3close close / distant / remote / intimate
語意呼應前文 intimate association，close, lasting relationships 指「緊密、持久的關係」
搭配close relationship 為固定搭配，表「親密的關係」
✗ distant/remote 表「疏遠」與共生矛盾、intimate 雖近義但前文已用過且 close 更與 lasting 並列自然
空格 4variety kind / variety / plenty / selection
搭配a variety of 為固定片語，表「各式各樣的」，後接 positive or negative effects
語意句意「帶有各種正面或負面影響」，a variety of 最貼合
✗ kind/plenty/selection 皆無法構成 a ___ of 表「多樣」的慣用片語，唯 a variety of 成立
426.Poetry(詩)4 格#080438
Throughout history poetry has often been created to celebrate a wedding.
