This article will examine the ways in 1which this has happened at different periods of time and in many widely differing societies. It will look at some examples of wedding poems from a 2range of eras and cultures, and will set them in their specific context, drawing out the particular features that 3reflect that context. Other writers on this topic have tended to focus on more personal wedding poems, 4those dedicated to the bride or the groom. Here, however, the intention is to consider poems that were written with more of a social where which that when
空格 1which where / which / that / when
詞性the ways in which 為固定關係結構，介系詞 in 後接關係代名詞 which
搭配the way(s) in which 表「以…的方式」，慣用 which 不可用 that
✗ that 不可緊跟介系詞 in、where/when 為關係副詞無法作 in 的受詞
空格 2range range / array / diversity / type
搭配a range of eras and cultures 為固定片語，a range of 表「一系列、各種」
語意句意「來自各種時代與文化的範例」，a range of 最貼合
✗ array 須 an array of、diversity 不接 a...of 此構、type 語意與數量不合
空格 3reflect forecast / reflect / create / fit
語意features that ___ that context 句意「反映該脈絡的特徵」，reflect「反映」最貼合
搭配features reflect context 為自然搭配
✗ forecast「預測」、create「創造」、fit「適合」皆與「特徵反映脈絡」語意不合
空格 4those those / other / such / these
詞性___ dedicated to the bride 須用代名詞代替前面的 personal wedding poems，those 指代複數先行詞
單複數先行詞 poems 為複數，those 後接過去分詞 dedicated 作修飾，數一致
✗ other/such 不作代名詞接 dedicated、these 多指「近指」此處須泛指類別用 those
427.Breast-feeding(母乳餵養)6 格#080441
While many mothers-to-be are advised about the 1benefits of breastfeeding, what they may not be told is that the effects go well beyond physical health. A new study finds babies breastfed for long periods have better performance on intelligence tests, greater school achievement, and higher monthly incomes as 30-year-olds. While past research has found higher intelligence 2scores among breastfed babies, what is so significant about this study is that the researchers were able to collect more complete information on breastfeeding duration and also followed for a longer period. And, by using a population-based birth 3cohort , the breast feeding practices had no association 4with income level. Most of the evidence of higher intelligence test scores among breastfed babies comes from high- income countries, where middle-class and higher-class mothers are more likely to breastfeed their babies than lower income mothers- certainly in the United States, breastfeeding rates 5reflect this trend. With evidence coming from first-world countries 'Where breastfeeding is positively associated with higher socioeconomic status'. Horta explained, 'There is always a question of whether the effect that higher socioeconomic status'. Horta explained, 'There is always a question of whether the effect that has been observed in other studies is a consequence of breastfeeding by itself or has the result been 6confounded by socioeconomic status.' Specifically, higher income babies are most likely eating better confounded by socioeconomic status.' Specifically, higher income babies are most likely eating better quality food and this could be impacting IQ test scores.
空格 1benefits consequences / outcomes / benefits
搭配the benefits of breastfeeding 為固定搭配，benefits「好處」最貼合
語意孕婦被告知哺乳的「益處」，後文也接 effects go beyond physical health 正面語境
✗ consequences/outcomes 為中性「結果」，advised about the benefits 才符合鼓勵哺乳的正面語意
空格 2scores scores / points / ratings / gradesscores
搭配intelligence scores / test scores 為固定搭配，scores 指「測驗分數」
語意呼應前文 intelligence tests，higher intelligence scores 最貼合
✗ points/ratings 偏「點數/評等」、gradesscores 為拼字錯誤選項，scores 才慣用
空格 3cohort team / set / group / cohort
搭配a population-based birth cohort 為流行病學固定術語，cohort 指「世代/同期群」
語意研究方法語境中 birth cohort「出生世代研究」為專業用語
✗ team/set/group 為一般群體，研究設計的專業術語是 cohort
空格 4with between / and / against / with
搭配association with 為固定搭配，association 後固定接介系詞 with
語意句意「哺乳與收入水準無關聯」，no association with 最貼合
✗ between 須接 A and B 雙方、and/against 不與 association 搭配構成「與…關聯」
空格 5reflect mirror / reflect / ilustrates / represent
語意breastfeeding rates ___ this trend 句意「哺乳率反映此趨勢」，reflect「反映」最貼合
搭配rates reflect a trend 為自然搭配
✗ mirror 偏精確映照稍重、represent「代表」語意稍偏、ilustrates 拼字錯誤，reflect 最自然慣用
空格 6confounded affected / effected / confounded / complicated
搭配confounded by socioeconomic status 為統計學固定術語，confound 指「混淆（變項干擾）」
語意前句 whether... is a consequence of breastfeeding 在討論干擾因子，confounded 為專業對應詞
✗ affected/complicated 為一般「影響/複雜化」、effected 是動詞「促成」語意錯，統計干擾慣用 confounded
428.Flexibility(靈活性)6 格#080442
Engineers would love to embed flexible 1electronics into things like paper, or surgical gloves or Engineers would love to embed flexible electronics into things like paper, or surgical gloves or conventional clothing. But the wiring usually gets twisted and damaged. Now M·I·T· 2researchers have found inspiration in an 3unlikely place—the annoying air pockets that pop up in parking pass stickers found inspiration in an unlikely place—the annoying air pockets that pop up in parking pass stickers on car windows. Those bubbles arise because the thin sticker film expands at a different rate than the window glass when they both heat up. And the opposite is also true—the material can compress window glass when they both heat up. And the opposite is also true—the material can compress differently than the glass until it separates and blisters form. The scientists were 4studying this kind of wrinkling behavior. They developed a model that predicted the formation, size and evolution of the wrinkling behavior. They developed a model that predicted the formation, size and evolution of the bubbles that depends on three things: the elasticity of the film and the glass, and the strength of the bond between them. Then they realized that carefully controlled delamination could be applied to bond between them. Then they realized that carefully controlled delamination could be applied to make elastic electronics. Wires in the bubbly elastic material would start out only partially attached to a surface. So there'd be some slack allowing for safe stretching and 5twisting . The work appears in the surface. So there'd be some slack allowing for safe stretching and twisting . The work appears in the Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences, and shows that a different 6approach can make a tough problem less sticky. tough problem less sticky. machinery electronics technology batteries inventors engineers scholars researchers unlikely certain predicable probable
空格 1electronics machinery / electronics / technology / batteries
搭配flexible electronics 為固定搭配，指「軟性電子元件」
語意全文談把電子元件嵌入紙張、手套，electronics「電子產品/元件」最貼合，後文 elastic electronics 呼應
✗ machinery/technology/batteries 偏機械/技術/電池，flexible electronics 才是文章主題用詞
空格 2researchers inventors / engineers / scholars / researchers
搭配MIT researchers 為固定搭配，指「MIT 研究人員」
語意後文以 The scientists / They developed a model 指同一批人，researchers 最切合
✗ inventors/engineers/scholars 偏發明家/工程師/學者，MIT researchers 才是慣用且與下文一致
空格 3unlikely unlikely / certain / predicable / probable
語意an ___ place—the annoying air pockets 句意「在意想不到的地方找到靈感」，unlikely「不太可能的、意外的」最貼合
搭配an unlikely place 為慣用搭配，表「意想不到之處」
✗ certain/predicable/probable 表「確定/可預期」與「靈感來自意外處」語意相反
空格 4studying analyzing / investigating / studying / discovering
時態were ___ this kind of wrinkling behavior 須用現在分詞構成過去進行式，were studying
語意句意「科學家當時正在研究這種起皺現象」，study 最貼合，後文 They developed a model 呼應
✗ analyzing/investigating 雖文法可，但 study this kind of behavior 最自然且呼應後文研究脈絡；discovering 語意偏「發現」不合
空格 5twisting folding / damaging / arising / twisting
搭配stretching and twisting 為固定並列搭配，指「拉伸與扭轉」
語意描述軟性材料容許安全的「拉伸與扭轉」，呼應前文 wires get twisted
✗ folding/damaging/arising 與 stretching 並列不自然，safe stretching and twisting 才是慣用配對
空格 6approach technique / approach / material / strategy
搭配a different approach 為固定搭配，approach 指「方法、途徑」
語意句意「不同的方法能讓棘手問題不那麼麻煩」，approach 最貼合
✗ technique/material/strategy 雖近義，a different approach 在「解決問題的途徑」語境最自然慣用
429.Crustaceans' Pain(甲殼動物的疼痛)5 格#080443
The last time you 1splurged on a live lobster for dinner, you might not have given any thought to how much the little guy was going to suffer as he boiled to death. Until recently many researchers 2believed the crustacean nervous system too primitive to process pain. But scientists at Queen's University in Belfast now think that crustaceans may be more sensitive to pain than 3previously thought. The researchers used crabs as their test animals. And they found that crabs that 4experienced an electric shock when they hid under a safe, dark rock would 5eventually learn to avoid the hiding place. And that avoidance is key: the animals' ability to remember the unpleasant shock and avoid it is consistent with the ability to feel and remember pain. If the behavior was merely a reflex, the critters would continue to visit the shelter. The study is in the Journal of Experimental Biology. [Also see Nicola Stead, Painful Feelings in Crabs] The situation is likely the same with lobsters. So before you break out the bibs and melted butter, it might be nice to put your future dinner on a little anesthetic ice. believed speculated doubted assumed initially eventually previously ultimately survived experienced practiced handled
空格 1splurged spent / indulged / splurged / consumed
搭配splurge on something 為固定搭配，splurge 指「（衝動）大手筆花錢買」
語意句意「上次你奢侈地買了一隻活龍蝦」，splurged on 最貼合
✗ spent/consumed 不接 splurge on 的揮霍語氣、indulged 須 indulge in，splurge on 才是固定搭配
空格 2believed believed / speculated / doubted / assumed
搭配believed the crustacean nervous system too primitive 為 believe + 受詞 + 補語 結構，believe 最自然
語意句意「許多研究者相信甲殼類神經系統太原始而無法處理疼痛」，believed 最貼合
✗ speculated/doubted/assumed 接此「受詞+too...to」結構不自然，believe 最慣用
空格 3previously initially / eventually / previously / ultimately
搭配than previously thought 為固定搭配，指「比先前所認為的」
語意句意「比過去認為的更敏感」，previously 最貼合
✗ initially/eventually/ultimately 表「起初/最終」，與「比先前認為」的對比語意不合，慣用 previously thought
空格 4experienced survived / experienced / practiced / handled
搭配experienced an electric shock 為固定搭配，experience 指「經歷（電擊）」
語意句意「螃蟹遭受電擊後會學會避開」，experienced 最貼合
✗ survived/practiced/handled 與 an electric shock 搭配語意不合，experience a shock 才慣用
空格 5eventually eventually / initially / previously / spontaneously
語意would ___ learn to avoid 句意「最終學會避開」，描述經反覆後的結果，eventually「最終」最貼合
搭配eventually learn to 為自然搭配，表逐漸習得
✗ initially「起初」與「學會」結果矛盾、previously 表先前、spontaneously「自發地」與「學習而來」語意相反
430.Favorable Traits(有利特征)4 格#080444
New favorable traits evolve when genetic mutations arise that offer a survival edge. As the survivors of each generation pass on those beneficial mutations, the mutations and 1their adaptive traits become each generation pass on those beneficial mutations, the mutations and their adaptive traits become more common in the general population. Though it may take millions of years for complex traits to evolve , say allowing humans to walk on two legs, evolution itself happens with each generation as evolve , say allowing humans to walk on two legs, evolution itself happens with each generation as adaptive mutations become more frequent in the population. The genomic revolution has allowed biologists to see the natural selection process in action by making the genetic blueprint of hundreds of biologists to see the natural selection process in action by making the genetic blueprint of hundreds of thousands of people available for comparison. By tracking the relative rise and fall of specific mutations across generations of people, researchers can infer which traits are spreading or dwindling. mutations across generations of people, researchers can infer which traits are spreading or dwindling. to_evolve 2evolving updating to_update in_activity inactive in_action 3action over along throughout 4across
空格 1their their / our / its / his
詞性the mutations and ___ adaptive traits 須用所有格代名詞，their 指代複數 mutations
單複數先行詞 the mutations 為複數，所有格用 their 數一致
✗ our/his 為人稱不合語境、its 為單數無法指代複數 mutations
空格 2evolving需覆核 evolving / updating
詞性for complex traits to ___ 須用原形動詞構成不定詞，evolving/updating 中取 evolve 系（此題只給 -ing 形，依語意選 evolving）
語意全文主題為演化，complex traits to evolve「複雜性狀演化形成」最貼合，後文 evolution itself happens 呼應
✗ updating「更新」與生物演化語境不合，文章核心動詞是 evolve
空格 3action需覆核 inactive / action
搭配see the natural selection process in action 為固定片語，in action 表「實際運作中」
語意句意「親眼看到天擇過程實際運作」，in action 最貼合
✗ inactive 表「不活動」與「看到過程運作」語意相反，且 in action 才是慣用片語
空格 4across over / along / throughout / across
搭配across generations 為固定搭配，across 表「橫跨（世代）」
語意句意「追蹤特定突變在世代間的興衰」，across generations 最貼合
✗ over 偏時間長度、along 偏沿線、throughout 偏「貫穿整個」，追蹤跨世代變化慣用 across generations
431.Fire(火)4 格#080445
Some scientists say the use of fire helped make us modern humans—it dramatically changed what and how we eat and may have even altered our anatomy. But University of Utah anthropologist Polly how we eat and may have even altered our anatomy. But University of Utah anthropologist Polly Wielder thinks that fire was also important in shaping human social interactions and cultural 1traditions . Her conclusions are in the Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences. Wiessner evaluated day . Her conclusions are in the Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences. Wiessner evaluated day and night activities and 2conversations of Bushmen from Botswana and Namibia. These communities still live by hunting and gathering, as most humans did over 3evolutionary history. During the day, still live by hunting and gathering, as most humans did over evolutionary history. During the day, nearly a third of the conversations dealt with economic issues such as hunting strategies and foraging plans. Another third covered complaints, criticisms and gossip. But at night around the fire, more than plans. Another third covered complaints, criticisms and gossip. But at night around the fire, more than 80 percent of group conversations were storytelling, often about people living far away or in the spirit world. Weissner says that humans are unique in that we create ties to others outside of our immediate world. Weissner says that humans are unique in that we create ties to others outside of our immediate group. Gathering at the fire 4expanded listeners' imaginations and allowed for the development of cognitive processes that made it possible to form those links to distant communities. Which makes fire cognitive processes that made it possible to form those links to distant communities. Which makes fire the precursor to Facebook.
空格 1traditions innovations / traditions / rituals / heritages
搭配cultural traditions 為固定搭配，指「文化傳統」
語意與 social interactions 並列，火塑造了人類的社會互動與「文化傳統」，traditions 最貼合
✗ innovations/rituals/heritages 偏創新/儀式/遺產，cultural traditions 才是慣用搭配且最切語境
空格 2conversations interviews / dialogue / debates / conversations
搭配activities and conversations 並列，且後文反覆出現 conversations dealt with...，前後一致
語意研究分析白天與夜晚的「對話」內容，conversations 最貼合
✗ interviews/debates 偏正式訪談/辯論、dialogue 多不可數，描述日常談話用 conversations 且與後文一致
空格 3evolutionary historical / developmental / evolutionary / progressive
搭配over evolutionary history 為固定搭配，指「在演化史中」
語意句意「正如大多數人類在演化史上所做的」，evolutionary 最貼合
✗ historical/developmental/progressive 偏歷史/發展/漸進，evolutionary history 才是慣用且切合人類學語境
空格 4expanded expanded / enlarged / intensified / diminished
語意Gathering at the fire ___ listeners' imaginations 句意「擴展聽者的想像力」，expand「擴展」最貼合正面語境
搭配expand imaginations 為自然搭配，表「拓展想像」
✗ enlarged 偏物理放大、intensified「加強」語意稍偏、diminished「減少」與正面語境矛盾
432.Flower Color(花色)4 格#080446
A flower's color, however, isn't a full-proof guide to a good lunch. That's because the color can change depending on the angle at which sunlight hits its petals. A yellow flower, for example, may look somewhat blue from one angle and red from another. Scientists call this kind of color change 1iridescence. 'It's the same phenomenon that makes a rainbow appear in a soap bubble or on a CD,' iridescence. 'It's the same phenomenon that makes a rainbow appear in a soap bubble or on a CD,' says Beverley Glover. She studies plants at the University of Cambridge in England. In 2009, Glover and her colleagues showed that even when petals look shimmery, bees can still tell which flowers likely her colleagues showed that even when petals look shimmery, bees can still tell which flowers likely hold food. But she and others noticed something odd about iridescence . It's not quite as flashy in plants as in other life forms, Glover says. The backs of jewel, beetles, or the wings of certain butterflies, plants as in other life forms, Glover says. The backs of jewel, beetles, or the wings of certain butterflies, for instance, shine and shimmer a lot more. The researchers 2tested their hypothesis in the lab. They trained a group of bees to associate fake purple flowers with getting more nectar. Then the team trained a group of bees to associate fake purple flowers with getting more nectar. Then the team tested the bees. They added non-shimmery fake flowers with purple-blue and purple-red hues to the bees' flight path. The bees passed the test, ignoring flowers that weren't 3perfectly purple. The second bees' flight path. The bees passed the test, ignoring flowers that weren't perfectly purple. The second group of bees was 4trained to drink from fully flashy, 'perfectly iridescent' purple flowers. But when the team added perfectly iridescent flowers in different hues, the insects checked them for nectar too. team added perfectly iridescent flowers in different hues, the insects checked them for nectar too. tested measured monitoring checked bright perfectly slight incompletely persuaded trained mentored supervised
空格 1iridescence flowers / food / iridescence / color
搭配something odd about iridescence 承接前文 Scientists call this... iridescence，前後一致
語意句意「注意到關於虹彩有些奇怪之處」，iridescence「虹彩」為全文核心詞
✗ flowers/food/color 雖出現於文中，但此處 odd about ___ 接的是被研究的現象 iridescence
空格 2tested tested / measured / monitoring / checked
搭配tested their hypothesis 為固定搭配，test「檢驗（假設）」
時態全段為過去式，The researchers ___ their hypothesis 須用過去式 tested
✗ monitoring 為 -ing 形不合時態、measured/checked 與 hypothesis 搭配不如 test 慣用
空格 3perfectly bright / perfectly / slight / incompletely
詞性weren't ___ purple 須用副詞修飾形容詞 purple，perfectly「完全地」為副詞
語意句意「忽略那些不是完全純紫色的花」，呼應後文 perfectly purple / perfectly iridescent
✗ bright 為形容詞不能修飾 purple 作副詞、slight 為形容詞、incompletely 與「passed the test 嚴格挑色」語意相反
空格 4trained persuaded / trained / mentored / supervised
搭配trained a group of bees to associate 為固定搭配，train... to do 表「訓練…去做」
時態過去式敘述實驗，且後文 The second group of bees was trained 呼應同一動詞
✗ persuaded/mentored/supervised 不與「訓練蜜蜂建立連結」搭配，train bees to 才慣用且與下文一致
433.Bach(度假小屋)3 格#080447
Those were his halcyon days, when his music was heard constantly in Venice and his influence 1blanketed Europe. He spent much of his time on the road, 2performing and overseeing productions of blanketed Europe. He spent much of his time on the road, performing and overseeing productions of his music. In Germany, Bach studied Vivaldi's scores, copied them for performance and 3arranged some translated plagiarized organized arranged
空格 1blanketed blanketed / covered
語意his influence ___ Europe 句意「影響力遍布全歐」，blanket 作動詞指「全面覆蓋、籠罩」更具文采
搭配blanketed Europe 為生動搭配，強調影響力廣泛覆蓋
✗ covered 雖通，但 blanketed 更強調「全面籠罩」，與 halcyon days 音樂影響力遍及全歐的語境更貼切
空格 2performing performing / composing / conducting / travelling
搭配performing and overseeing productions 並列現在分詞，performing「演出」與監督製作並列自然
語意句意「他大半時間在路上演出並監督其音樂製作」，performing 最貼合
✗ composing/conducting/travelling 與 overseeing productions 並列時 performing 最切合「巡演」語境，且 travelling 與前文 on the road 重複
空格 3arranged translated / plagiarized / organized / arranged
搭配arranged（music）為音樂術語，指「改編、編曲」，呼應 studied scores、copied them
語意句意「Bach 研究、抄寫並改編 Vivaldi 的部分作品」，arranged 為中性的編曲行為最貼合
✗ plagiarized「抄襲」帶負面、translated「翻譯」、organized「組織」皆不符音樂改編語意
434.ICU(重症監護室)5 格#080448
Having a loved one in the hospital, especially the Intensive Care Unit, or ICU, can be a 1harrowing experience. And it's even more traumatic for the families of those who pass away. Or so you'd think. But according to a study published in the November issue of the journal Chest, families whose loved ones die in the ICU tend to be more satisfied with the 2care they received than those whose loved ones survive. Although the results seem paradoxical, when you look more closely at how people define "quality of care," they do make sense. All patients who 3wind up in the ICU, whether or not they walk out, receive a similar standard of care from a 4strictly medical point of view. But doctors, nurses, and other hospital staff may devote extra time and attention to the needs of families whose loved ones are near the end. That compassion is what families who lose a loved one are responding to when they report a more satisfactory ICU experience. Just having someone who'll explain what's going on, answer their questions and offer 5emotional support makes all the difference. An observation that, in the end, is maybe not so surprising.
空格 1harrowing harrowing / happy / conforming / routine
語意句意「摯愛住進 ICU 是一段令人煎熬的經歷」，harrowing「令人痛苦/折磨的」最貼合
搭配a harrowing experience 為固定搭配，表「痛苦難熬的經驗」
✗ happy 與 ICU 痛苦語境相反、conforming/routine 偏「順從/例行」語意不合
空格 2care medication / care / attention / treatment
搭配satisfied with the care they received 為固定搭配，且後文反覆出現 quality of care / standard of care，前後一致
語意句意「對所受的照護更滿意」，care「照護」最貼合
✗ medication/attention/treatment 偏藥物/關注/治療，全文核心詞與 quality of care 一致用 care
空格 3wind turn / end / finish / wind
搭配wind up in 為片語動詞，表「最終落得/淪落到（某處）」
語意句意「所有最後進到 ICU 的病人」，wind up in the ICU 最貼合
✗ turn/end/finish 皆無法構成 ___ up in 表「最終淪落到某處」的片語，唯 wind up 成立
空格 4strictly entirely / strictly / solely / generally
搭配from a strictly medical point of view 為固定搭配，strictly「純粹就…而言」
語意句意「純就醫療角度而言照護水準相近」，strictly 最貼合
✗ entirely/solely/generally 雖近義，但 strictly medical point of view 才是慣用搭配且語氣最精準
空格 5emotional financial / medical / practical / emotional
搭配offer emotional support 為固定搭配，emotional support「情感支持」
語意前文講 compassion、explain、answer questions，呼應「提供情感支持」，emotional 最貼合
✗ financial/medical/practical 偏財務/醫療/實務，與「同理、陪伴」的語境不合，慣用 emotional support
435.Behavior Segments(行爲細分)5 格#080449
One of the most 1eminent of psychologists, Clark Hull, claimed that the essence of reasoning lies in the putting together of two 'behavior segments' in some 2novel way, never actually performed before, so as putting together of two 'behavior segments' in some novel way, never actually performed before, so as to reach a 3goal . Two followers of Clark Hull, Howard and Tracey Kendler, devised a test for children that was 4explicitly based on Clark Hull's principles. The children were given the 5task of learning to that was explicitly based on Clark Hull's principles. The children were given the task of learning to operate a machine so as to get a toy. In order to succeed they had to go through a two-stage obvious eminent unusual noticeable initial previous strange novel result success goal number
空格 1eminent obvious / eminent / unusual / noticeable
語意one of the most ___ of psychologists 句意「最傑出的心理學家之一」，eminent「卓越、著名的」最貼合
搭配an eminent psychologist 為固定搭配，指「傑出學者」
✗ obvious/unusual/noticeable 偏「明顯/不尋常/顯眼」，形容學者地位崇高慣用 eminent
空格 2novel initial / previous / strange / novel
語意in some ___ way, never actually performed before 句意「以從未做過的新穎方式」，novel「新穎的」最貼合且與 never...before 呼應
搭配a novel way 為固定搭配，表「新穎的方式」
✗ initial/previous 表「最初/先前」與 never before 矛盾、strange「奇怪」語意偏負面不合
空格 3goal result / success / goal / number
搭配reach a goal 為固定搭配，goal「目標」，後文 so as to get a toy 呼應達成目標
語意句意「以達成某個目標」，reach a goal 最貼合
✗ result/success/number 不與 reach 構成「達成目標」的慣用搭配，reach a goal 才成立
空格 4explicitly explicitly / implicitly / partially / indirectly
詞性was ___ based on 須用副詞修飾 based，explicitly「明確地」為副詞
語意句意「明確地以 Hull 的原則為基礎」，explicitly 最貼合
✗ implicitly「含蓄地」與「明確設計的測驗」相反、partially/indirectly 語意偏弱，explicitly based on 最切合
空格 5task job / task / assignment / responsibility
搭配the task of learning to 為固定搭配，task「任務」後接 of doing
語意句意「孩子被賦予學習操作機器的任務」，task 最貼合
✗ job/assignment/responsibility 雖近義，the task of doing 才是此處最自然慣用搭配
436.Conservationists (自然保護主義者)6 格#080450
Conservationists have long debated whether the koala should go on the Australian national threatened species list. 1While the koala is clearly in trouble in some parts of the country – in Queensland, for species list. While the koala is clearly in trouble in some parts of the country – in Queensland, for example, high numbers 2are afflicted by disease – in other parts such as Victoria and South Australia the problem is not that koala populations 3are falling , but that they have grown to the point where they problem is not that koala populations are falling , but that they have grown to the point where they are almost too numerous. For a species to be classed as vulnerable, its population 4must have decreased by more than 30 percent over the last three generations or 10 years. The problem is that decreased by more than 30 percent over the last three generations or 10 years. The problem is that when such a stipulation is applied to koalas, the Victorian boom offsets the Queensland bust, and the species stays off the list. This has repercussions because northern koalas are different to southern ones. species stays off the list. This has repercussions because northern koalas are different to southern ones. They are smaller, for example, and they contain a genetic 5variation not represented in the South. 6For this reason , a split listing has been devised koalas from New South Wales, the ACT and Queensland this reason , a split listing has been devised koalas from New South Wales, the ACT and Queensland are now officially 'Vulnerable'; those from Victoria and South Australia are not considered threatened. 2 are_damaged are_broken_down are_afflicted are_isolated 3 are_increasing are_falling are_stable are_low 4 must_have_decreased has_increased could_have_declined must_have_grown However For_this_reason In_other_words In_spite_of 6 However For_this_reason In_other_words In_spite_of
空格 1While Because / While / But / However
語意雖然某些地區無尾熊有麻煩，其他地區卻過多，While 引導讓步對比
詞性句首連接詞引導對比子句，While 表「雖然/儘管」
✗ Because 表原因；However 為連接副詞不可直接引導從屬子句；But 為對等連接詞不宜置句首引導從句。
空格 2are afflicted are damaged / are broken down / are afflicted / are isolated
搭配be afflicted by disease 固定搭配，指「受…疾病所苦」
語意高比例無尾熊受疾病侵襲，are afflicted by disease 合語境
✗ are damaged 多指物品損壞；are broken down 表故障分解；are isolated 表被隔離，皆不合「受疾病侵害」。
空格 3are falling are increasing / are falling / are stable / are low
語意與 but that they have grown 對比，此處說問題不是族群「在下降」，are falling 表數量減少
單複數主詞 populations 複數，are falling 配複數
✗ are increasing/are stable 與 but 後的對比邏輯衝突（應先否定下降）；are low 表已低，非「正在下降」的進行語意。
空格 4must have decreased must have decreased / has increased / could have declined / must have grown
時態對過去的必然推論，population must have decreased by more than 30%，must have + 過去分詞
語意被列為易危須符合族群「必定已減少」超過30%的條件
✗ has increased/must have grown 表增加與「易危=減少」條件矛盾；could have declined 表可能性太弱，不合分類門檻的必要條件。
空格 5variation similarity / variation / trait / distortion
語意北方無尾熊含有南方沒有的「遺傳變異」，genetic variation 為固定術語
搭配genetic variation 固定搭配，指基因變異
✗ similarity 表相似與「南方沒有」矛盾；trait 偏單一性狀；distortion 表扭曲，皆不如 genetic variation 精準。
空格 6For this reason However / For this reason / In other words / In spite of
語意因南北無尾熊不同，「因此」採分開列名，For this reason 表因果承接前句
詞性句首連接片語引導結果，呼應後文 this reason 重述
✗ However 表轉折；In other words 表換句話說；In spite of 表讓步，皆不合「基於此原因而採分列」的因果。
437.Learning by Doing(邊學邊做)4 格#080451
An analysis of more than 500 graduates found no significant difference between business schools that offered traditional courses and those that emphasise a 'learning-by-doing' approach to entrepreneurship education. The research challenges the ongoing trend across higher education institutes (HEIs) of 1focusing on experiential learning, and suggests that universities need to reconsider their approach if they 2are to increase entrepreneurship among their students. Ms Inna Kozlinska, research associate at Aston Business School and author of the study, said: 'Entrepreneurship education 3is seen as a major force capable of generating long-term socio-economic changes through developing entrepreneurial, creative, flexible and wise individuals. There is an ongoing shift towards experiential learning in business schools, 4yet there is little empirical evidence to suggest this approach has better impact than traditional learning.' impact than traditional learning.' have_to had_to are_to were_to 2 have_to had_to are_to were_to is_remained is_remaining is_seen is_seeing 3 is_remained is_remaining is_seen is_seeing yet so therefore hence
空格 1focusing emphasizing / focusing / ignoring / specializing
語意高教趨勢「聚焦於」體驗式學習，focusing on experiential learning，focus on 表專注
搭配focus on 固定片語動詞，後接 experiential learning
✗ emphasizing 須直接接受詞不接 on；ignoring 表忽視語意相反；specializing 偏專精，皆不如 focusing on 自然。
空格 2are to have to / had to / are to / were to
時態if they are to + 原形 表「若要…」的目的條件，配合現在式主句 need to reconsider
搭配be to + V 表預定/意圖，if they are to increase 表「若想提升」
✗ have to/had to 表必須且時態語氣不合；were to 為假設語氣與現在式建議的語境不符。
空格 3is seen is remained / is remaining / is seen / is seeing
搭配be seen as 固定被動搭配，is seen as a major force 表「被視為」
時態主詞 education 被動，現在式 is seen 表普遍看法
✗ is remained/is remaining 為不及物動詞不可被動或進行語意不通；is seeing 為主動進行，與「被視為」的被動矛盾。
空格 4yet yet / so / therefore / hence
語意雖被視為重要力量，「然而」缺乏實證，yet 表轉折對比
搭配yet 作連接副詞表「然而」，引出與前句相反的事實
✗ so/therefore/hence 表因果結果，與此處「卻缺乏證據」的轉折語氣相反。
438.Noise Control(噪聲控制)4 格#080452
At the local and state level, demanding funding for repairs and improvement to outdated transit infrastructure will greatly reduce the noise caused by trains, cars, and trucks. Urban-planning infrastructure will greatly reduce the noise caused by trains, cars, and trucks. Urban-planning approaches to 1eliminating noise on a city-by-city basis can be as simple as taking a single lane away from cars and giving it to bicycles, people, or green space. Improving, expanding, and properly funding from cars and giving it to bicycles, people, or green space. Improving, expanding, and properly funding public transit removes cars from the road, both reducing the sound they 2produce and replacing it with quieter options like trams and high-speed light-rail. In architecture, acoustics should play a greater 3role quieter options like trams and high-speed light-rail. In architecture, acoustics should play a greater role in all structures, from mundane apartment buildings to the grandest art museums. Noise control should be a consideration from the very first planning stage, 4rather than tacked on as an afterthought. should be a consideration from the very first planning stage, rather than tacked on as an afterthought. role function importance position more rather other another
空格 1eliminating eliminate / eliminating / decrease / decreasing
詞性approaches to ___ noise 中 to 為介系詞，後須接動名詞，eliminating「消除」為動名詞
語意句意「逐城消除噪音的都市規劃方法」，eliminate 比 decrease「減少」更徹底貼合 approaches to 的目標
✗ eliminate/decrease 為原形不能接介系詞 to 後、decreasing 雖文法可但 eliminating noise 語意更切
空格 2produce emit / make / generate / produce
搭配the sound they produce 為自然搭配，produce「製造（聲音）」，後文 quieter options 呼應減少噪音產生
時態關係子句 they ___ 主詞 cars 為複數，用原形 produce 數一致
✗ emit/make/generate 雖近義，但 the sound cars produce 最自然慣用，emit 多用於排放、generate 偏正式發電語感
空格 3role role / function / importance / position
搭配play a greater role 為固定搭配，play a role「扮演角色」
語意句意「聲學應在所有建築中扮演更重要角色」，play a role 最貼合
✗ function/importance/position 皆無法與 play a greater ___ 構成慣用搭配，唯 play a role 成立
空格 4rather more / rather / other / another
搭配rather than 為固定片語，表「而非」，後接 tacked on as an afterthought
語意句意「應從規劃初期就納入考量，而非事後才補上」，rather than 最貼合對比
✗ more/other/another 皆無法與 than 構成「而非」的對比片語，唯 rather than 成立
439.Eco-friendly Smoothies(環保冰沙)5 格#080453
Students at the University of Leicester have recently whizzed up a storm of eco-friendly smoothies. This comes as part of a week of events aimed at promoting environmental initiatives 1on campus. A range of events and activities were organized by the University Environment Team and the Students Union to encourage students to waste less, recycle 2more , travel sustainably and save energy to contribute to the University's target of cutting its carbon footprint 3by 60% by the year 2020. The highlight of the week was a cycle-powered smoothie maker. Students rescued fruit from Leicester market which would 4otherwise have been thrown away and salvaged it to create delicious smoothies. 5No electricity was used as the fruit was whizzed up in a blender attached to the back of a bike pedaled by enthusiastic student volunteers. in at on with
空格 1on in / at / on / with
搭配events on campus 為固定搭配，on campus「在校園裡」
語意句意「推動校園內的環保倡議」，on campus 最貼合
✗ in/at/with 皆不與 campus 構成「在校園」的慣用片語，on campus 為固定用法
空格 2more Much / fewer / less / more
搭配recycle more 與前 waste less 形成對稱搭配，more 為 recycle 的數量副詞
語意句意「少浪費、多回收」，recycle more 最貼合並與 waste less 對仗
✗ Much 不單獨修飾動詞、fewer 修飾可數名詞、less 與「回收更多」語意相反，唯 more 與 waste less 對稱
空格 3by for / by / on / to
搭配cutting its carbon footprint by 60% 為固定搭配，by 表「減少的幅度」
語意句意「將碳足跡削減 60%」，reduce/cut...by + 百分比 為慣用法
✗ for/on/to 皆不表「變化幅度」，數量增減的幅度慣用介系詞 by
空格 4otherwise otherwise / seldom / necessarily / instead
語意fruit which would ___ have been thrown away 句意「原本（若不撿）會被丟棄的水果」，otherwise「否則、不然」最貼合
搭配would otherwise have been 為慣用結構，表「本來會…」
✗ seldom/necessarily/instead 皆不構成「原本否則會被丟棄」的假設語意，唯 otherwise 成立
空格 5No Little / No / Any / Some
語意___ electricity was used 句意「沒有用到電」，後文 fruit was whizzed up... pedaled by volunteers 說明用人力，No 最貼合
詞性No 作限定詞修飾不可數名詞 electricity，表「零、毫無」，語法成立
✗ Little 表「少量仍有」與「全靠人力無電」不符、Any 多用於否定/疑問句、Some 表「有一些」與語意相反
440.Food Minding(美食思維)5 格#080454
At supper Johnson talked of good eating with uncommon 1satisfaction ."Some people," said he, "have a foolish way of not minding, or pretending not to mind, what they eat. For my part, I mind my belly very 2studiously , and very carefully; for I look upon it, that he who does not mind his belly will hardly mind anything else," He was, for the moment, not only serious but 3vehement ". Yet I have heard him, upon other occasions, talk with great contempt of people who were anxious to gratify their palates; and the other occasions, talk with great contempt of people who were anxious to gratify their palates; and the 206th number of his Rambler is a masterly essay against 4gulosity . His practice, indeed, I must acknowledge, may be considered as casting the balance of his different opinions upon this subject; for acknowledge, may be considered as casting the balance of his different opinions upon this subject; for I never knew any man who 5relished good eating more than he did.
空格 1satisfaction satisfaction / emotion / dissatisfaction / anger
搭配with uncommon satisfaction 為自然搭配，satisfaction「滿足」
語意Johnson 談美食「帶著非比尋常的滿足感」，呼應全文他極愛美食的正面語境
✗ dissatisfaction/anger 與「愛美食」相反、emotion「情緒」過於籠統不如 satisfaction 精準
空格 2studiously carelessly / carefully / studiously / thoughtfully
詞性I mind my belly very ___, and very carefully 須用副詞與 carefully 並列，studiously「用心地」為副詞
語意句意「我非常用心、仔細地照顧我的胃」，studiously 與 carefully 並列最貼合
✗ carelessly「漫不經心」與 carefully 矛盾、carefully 與後文重複、thoughtfully 雖可但 studiously 與原文用詞對應
空格 3vehement vehement / vehemently / mild / mildly
詞性not only serious but ___ 須與 serious（形容詞）並列作 be 的補語，vehement「激烈的」為形容詞
語意句意「他當下不只認真，還很激動」，vehement 最貼合
✗ vehemently/mildly 為副詞不能與形容詞 serious 並列、mild「溫和」與 serious 的強烈語氣不合
空格 4gulosity eating / gulosity / dieting
語意a masterly essay against ___ 句意「一篇抨擊『暴食/口腹之慾』的傑作」，呼應前文 gratify their palates，gulosity「貪食」最貼合
搭配後文又出現 gulosity，前後用詞一致，且 essay against gulosity 語意連貫
✗ eating/dieting 偏中性「飲食/節食」，與「批判貪嘴」的負面對象不符，gulosity 才切合
空格 5relished liked / relished / hated / despised
搭配relished good eating 為固定搭配，relish「享受、津津有味地品味」
語意句意「我從沒見過比他更享受美食的人」，relished 與全文愛吃形象呼應且語氣最強
✗ liked 語氣太弱、hated/despised 與「最愛美食」完全相反，relished 最貼合
441.Smoking Happiness(吸煙快樂)5 格#080455
On March 18th, we told you that smoking doesn't make people happy. Well, we hear you ask, what will On March 18th, we told you that smoking doesn't make people happy. Well, we hear you ask, what will make me happy? What? What! Ok, first, relax. Then, take out your wallet. Because 1according to a study published in the March 21st issue of Science, giving money to other people is what brings us joy. published in the March 21st issue of Science, giving money to other people is what brings us joy. Scientists from Boston and British Columbia got to wondering whether money really can buy happiness. They were 2bothered by the fact that over the past 20 or 30 years, people in the US and happiness. They were bothered by the fact that over the past 20 or 30 years, people in the US and other developed countries have been making much more money—yet our happiness has pretty much 3flatlined . What they found is that money can buy happiness. But only when you spend it on someone flatlined . What they found is that money can buy happiness. But only when you spend it on someone else. In one experiment, the scientists asked volunteers to 4rate their happiness. Then they gave each subject some cash, either 5 or 20 dollars. Half the 5participants were told to spend the money on subject some cash, either 5 or 20 dollars. Half the participants were told to spend the money on themselves. The others were asked to give it away. At the end of the day, the folks who got the biggest boost were the ones who spread the wealth, even if it was only five bucks. So if you want to be happy, boost were the ones who spread the wealth, even if it was only five bucks. So if you want to be happy, here's a big tip: always leave a big tip.
空格 1according thanks / according / due / based
搭配固定片語 according to「根據」，後面接 a study；其他選項接 to 都不成立
✗ thanks 須用 thanks to、due 須 due to、based 須 based on，但搭配與語意都不如 according to 自然
空格 2bothered convinced / bothered / satisfied / fascinated
搭配be bothered by「為…感到困擾」，後面接 by the fact 形成被動搭配
語意語意：賺更多錢但快樂卻持平，科學家感到困擾才合理
✗ convinced/satisfied/fascinated 都是正面或中性語意，與後文「困擾於矛盾現象」不合
空格 3flatlined flatlined / increased / decreased / fluctuated
語意語意對比：賺更多錢「yet」快樂卻 flatlined「持平、毫無起色」，呼應轉折
✗ increased 與 yet 轉折矛盾、decreased 太強、fluctuated 指波動非持平，皆不合語意
空格 4rate evaluate / measure / appreciate / rate
搭配rate their happiness「為快樂程度評分」是固定搭配，後文也用 happiness 當受詞
語意實驗請受試者自評快樂，rate 最貼切
✗ evaluate/measure 偏客觀測量、appreciate 為欣賞，搭配 happiness 自評時不如 rate 自然
空格 5participants recipients / participants / observers / contributors
語意後文 Half the participants 重複此字，指實驗「參與者」
單複數複數動詞 were told 對應複數主詞 participants
✗ recipients/observers/contributors 語意偏受贈者/旁觀者/捐助者，不符實驗受試者身分
442.Umami(鮮味)4 格#080456
Umami was first identified in Japan, in 1908, when Dr· Kikunae Ikeda concluded that Kombu, a type of Umami was first identified in Japan, in 1908, when Dr· Kikunae Ikeda concluded that Kombu, a type of edible seaweed, had a different taste than most foods. He conducted 1experiments that found that the high concentration of glutamate in Kombu was what made it so tasty. From there, he crystallized high concentration of glutamate in Kombu was what made it so tasty. From there, he crystallized monosodium glutamate (MSG), the seasoning that would become 2popular the world over. Decades later Umami became scientifically defined as one of the five individual tastes sensed by receptors on later Umami became scientifically defined as one of the five individual tastes sensed by receptors on the 3tongue . Then in 1996, a team of University of Miami researchers studying taste perception made another breakthrough. They discovered separate taste receptor cells in the tongue for detecting another breakthrough. They discovered separate taste receptor cells in the tongue for detecting Umami. Before then, the concept was uncharted. 'Up until our research, the 4predominant wisdom in the scientific community was that Umami was not a separate sense. It was just a combination of the the scientific community was that Umami was not a separate sense. It was just a combination of the other four qualities (salty, sweet, bitter, sour)', explained Dr· Stephen Roper, the University of Miami physiology and biophysics professor who helped zero in on the taste along with Nirupa Chaudhari, the physiology and biophysics professor who helped zero in on the taste along with Nirupa Chaudhari, the
空格 1experiments etests / samples / experiments / theories
搭配conduct experiments「進行實驗」是固定搭配，動詞 conducted 已點明
語意後接 that found「發現…」，唯有實驗能得出發現
✗ etests 非標準字、samples/theories 不與 conducted 搭配也不導出 found 的結果
空格 2popular popular / renowned / famous / fashionable
搭配become popular the world over「風行全球」固定搭配，popular 可後接 the world over
語意MSG 這調味料變得普及，popular 最貼切
✗ renowned/famous 偏「著名」、fashionable 偏「流行時尚」，皆不如 popular 與 the world over 自然
空格 3tongue mouth / nose / tongue / umami
語意receptors on the tongue「舌頭上的受體」，味覺受器位於舌頭
✗ mouth/nose 非味覺受器精確位置、umami 是味道本身非器官，皆不合
空格 4predominant random / controversial / ancient / predominant
搭配predominant wisdom「主流見解」是常見搭配，呼應後文 was just a combination 的普遍看法
語意Up until our research 暗示先前「主流」觀點，predominant 最切
✗ random/ancient 不符學界共識語境、controversial 指有爭議，與「一致認為」矛盾
443.Losing Weight(減肥)5 格#080457
Losing weight is no walk in the park. ( Although a walk in the park wouldn't hurt). Seems no matter Losing weight is no walk in the park. ( Although a walk in the park wouldn't hurt). Seems no matter what diet you try, those 1stubborn love handles just won't go away. Part of the problem is that the bulk of your bulk is stored inside fat cells. And the number of fat cells you have is set before you reach of your bulk is stored inside fat cells. And the number of fat cells you have is set before you reach adulthood. So if you chunked up as a child, that battalion of fat cells is with you for life. It's enough to make you want to bury your face in a tray of 2brownies , I know. But hold off. Because researchers from make you want to bury your face in a tray of brownies , I know. But hold off. Because researchers from Stockholm think they've found a loophole. The Swedish scientists confirmed that even after massive weight loss, the number of fat cells an adult has remains the same. But they 3discovered that individual weight loss, the number of fat cells an adult has remains the same. But they discovered that individual fat cells don't last a 4lifetime . Each year, about 10 percent of them die off. Of course new fat cells take their place, findings that appear in the online issue of the journal Nature. While that might not seem their place, findings that appear in the online issue of the journal Nature. While that might not seem like a major victory, if scientists can figure out how to stop the 5replacement fat cells from being born, that would tip the scales in your favor. So you might just be able to have your cake and eat it too, and that would tip the scales in your favor. So you might just be able to have your cake and eat it too, and still fit into your pants.
空格 1stubborn strong / stubborn / determined / elastic
搭配stubborn love handles「頑固的腰間贅肉」常見搭配，後接 won't go away 呼應頑固
語意贅肉怎麼減都不掉，stubborn 最傳神
✗ strong/determined 用於人或意志、elastic 為彈性，皆不修飾頑固脂肪
空格 2brownies vegetables / fruits / brownies / salads
語意bury your face in a tray of brownies「把臉埋進一盤布朗尼」，後文 hold off、have your cake 都呼應甜食誘惑
✗ vegetables/fruits/salads 是健康食物，與「忍不住想大吃」的放縱語境矛盾
空格 3discovered discovered / investigated / recognized / disclosed
時態對比前句 confirmed，此處 But they discovered「卻發現」新事實，過去式且語意為發現
語意發現脂肪細胞不會終生不變，是新發現用 discovered
✗ investigated 偏「調查過程」非結果、recognized/disclosed 語意為認知/揭露，不如 discovered 點出新發現
空格 4lifetime lifespan / year / lifetime / month
搭配last a lifetime「持續一輩子」固定搭配，don't last a lifetime 指不會終生存在
語意後文 Each year about 10 percent die off 證明非終生
✗ lifespan 多作名詞修飾語、year/month 太短且與後文每年汰換的對比不合
空格 5replacement changing / replacement / exchanging / position
詞性需形容詞性名詞修飾 fat cells，replacement fat cells「替補脂肪細胞」
語意前文 new fat cells take their place，replacement 呼應「取代」
✗ changing/exchanging 為動名詞語意不合、position 為「位置」皆無法修飾 fat cells 表替補
444.Odorous House Ant (臭氣熏天的螞蟻)5 格#080458
A common response to seeing an ant inside your house is to stomp on it. But if you crush a member of A common response to seeing an ant inside your house is to stomp on it. But if you crush a member of the ant species Tapinoma sessile, you might catch a whiff of a strange smell—a smell that reminds some people of blue cheese, rancid butter or rotten coconut. In fact, the smell is so noticeable that the some people of blue cheese, rancid butter or rotten coconut. In fact, the smell is so noticeable that the insect's common name is the "odorous house ant." And many people call it the coconut ant. In an effort to figure out why people have these reactions, 1researchers enlisted 2visitors at an event called the effort to figure out why people have these reactions, researchers enlisted visitors at an event called the North Carolina BugFest. One-hundred-forty-three volunteers smelled smushed ants and were asked to identify the scent from four choices: blue cheese, rancid butter, rotten coconut or just other. Although identify the scent from four choices: blue cheese, rancid butter, rotten coconut or just other. Although Web sites overwhelmingly call the smell rotten coconut, almost 40 percent of the human judges picked blue cheese and about 25 percent picked rotten coconut. More than 30 percent went with the choice blue cheese and about 25 percent picked rotten coconut. More than 30 percent went with the choice of other. The scientists then analyzed the chemicals 3responsible for the ant odor, as well as the smelly chemicals in blue cheese, fresh coconut and coconut buried underground for three days. It turns out chemicals in blue cheese, fresh coconut and coconut buried underground for three days. It turns out that the chemistry of the ants' scent is indeed similar to that of blue cheese and rotten coconut. But not to fresh coconut. And the researchers note that the Penicillium 4microbes that turn coconut oil not to fresh coconut. And the researchers note that the Penicillium microbes that turn coconut oil rancid are also 5involved in the production of blue cheese. The study is in the journal American Entomologist. The researchers also noted that the most common write-in candidate as a description Entomologist. The researchers also noted that the most common write-in candidate as a description for the ants' aroma was "cleaning spray." And one little girl told them that the ants "smelled exactly associated contributing responsible unrelated
空格 1researchers anthropologists / sponsors / organizers / researchers
語意後文 In an effort to figure out why...，主導研究者為 researchers
✗ anthropologists 範圍太窄、sponsors/organizers 是贊助/主辦者，非執行研究的人
空格 2visitors residents / researchers / scientists / visitors
搭配enlisted visitors at an event「招募活動現場的訪客」，後文 One-hundred-forty-three volunteers 即這些訪客
語意BugFest 活動現場找來的是來賓 visitors
✗ researchers 與前句主詞重複、residents/scientists 不符活動現場參與者身分
空格 3responsible associated / contributing / responsible / unrelated
搭配the chemicals responsible for「造成…的化學物質」固定後位修飾，responsible for 接原因
語意分析造成螞蟻氣味的化學物質
✗ associated/contributing 後接 with/to 才通、unrelated 語意相反，皆不接 for 表「造成」
空格 4microbes substances / organisms / bacteria / microbes
語意Penicillium「青黴菌」屬微生物，後文 microbes that turn coconut oil rancid 重複此字
✗ substances 太籠統、organisms 太廣、bacteria 是細菌而青黴為真菌，microbes 最精確
空格 5involved involved / participating / involved
搭配be involved in「參與、涉及」固定搭配，are also involved in the production of blue cheese
✗ participating 須接 in 且多指人主動參與，involved 更貼合「涉及生產過程」的被動語意
445.Oliver Smithies(奧利弗·史密斯)6 格#080459
Oliver Smithies won the Nobel Prize in 1Physiology or Medicine in 2007. On June 27th, he spoke to students about what he learned from his thesis 2research , which 3involved developing a new method to measure the osmotic pressures of mixes of proteins: "Here's my osmotic pressure 4measurement . And I was rather proud of this method. And I 5published it with great delight. This paper has a record, you know: nobody ever quoted it. And nobody ever used the method again. And I didn't use the method again. So I have to ask you, what was the point of it all? Well, the answer is really a very serious answer. The answer is I learned to do good science. But it didn't matter what I did when I was learning to do good science. So it doesn't matter what you do when you're doing a thesis, you see. But it's very important that you enjoy it. Because if you don't enjoy it, you won't do a good job and you won't learn science. So all of this comes around to the fact that if you don't enjoy what you're doing, ask your advisors to let you do something else. And if your advisor won't do that, there's another 6solution : Chemistry Genetics Physiology Psychology paper experiment research study
空格 1Physiology Chemistry / Genetics / Physiology / Psychology
語意史密斯獲 Nobel Prize in Physiology or Medicine「生理學或醫學獎」，為固定獎項名稱
✗ Chemistry/Genetics/Psychology 皆非此諾貝爾獎正式名稱中的領域
空格 2research paper / experiment / research / study
搭配thesis research「論文研究」常見搭配，後接 which involved developing a new method
語意他談論從論文研究中學到什麼
✗ paper 偏成品論文、experiment 範圍太窄、study 與 thesis 連用不如 research 自然
空格 3involved entailed / required / involves / involved
時態關係子句修飾過去的 thesis research，需過去式 involved；involves 為現在式不一致
搭配involve doing「涉及做某事」，後接 developing 動名詞
✗ involves 時態錯、entailed/required 後不慣接動名詞此處語意，involved developing 最通順
空格 4measurement calculation / evaluation / measurement / assessment
搭配osmotic pressure measurement「滲透壓測量」，呼應前文 measure the osmotic pressures
✗ calculation/evaluation/assessment 偏計算/評估，與 measure 的「測量」語意不同
空格 5published presented / published / announced
搭配publish a paper/method「發表」固定搭配，後文 nobody ever quoted it 呼應已發表
時態過去式敘事，published 與 quoted/used 一致
✗ presented/announced 偏口頭發表/宣布，與後文「被引用」的書面發表語境不合
空格 6solution alternative / option / advice / solution
搭配another solution「另一個解決辦法」，呼應前文遇到指導教授不放行的問題
語意提供解決困境的辦法，solution 最切
✗ alternative/option 偏「選項」、advice 為「建議」，不如 solution 對應「解決問題」
446.Body Energy(身體能量)5 格#080460
If you've ever had to pick up and carry a tired child through the mall, you know that walking sometimes tuckers out the 1toddlers . Now scientists think they know why. The results appear in the Journal of Experimental Biology. Larger animals tend to use less energy per gram of body 2mass than smaller ones do, even at rest. But what happens when they're in motion? Researchers 3recruited walkers of different ages and sizes, from a three-foot-tall kindergartner to a six-foot adult. While the subjects logged miles on the treadmill, the scientists 4measured their stride and metabolism. And they found that people pretty much walk the same way, regardless of their stature. If you scaled a five-year-old up to be six-and-a-half feet tall, the giant child would lope along just like a similarly sized adult. What's more, walkers of all heights use the same amount of energy per step. That means that big people don't 5conserve energy by strolling in a more economical style. They expend less energy because—just as you may have always suspected —they simply need fewer strides to cover the same ground. Which means that for some people a walk in the park ain't necessarily a walk in the park. adults researchers toddlers infants
空格 1toddlers adults / researchers / toddlers / infants
搭配tuckers out the toddlers「累壞學步幼兒」，押頭韻且呼應前文 carry a tired child
語意走路會累垮的是幼兒 toddlers
✗ adults/researchers 非易累的對象、infants 還不會走路，toddlers 最合「走累」語意
空格 2mass size / density / mass / volume
搭配body mass「體重/身體質量」固定搭配，per gram of body mass「每克體質量」
✗ size/density/volume 為大小/密度/體積，與 per gram 計量的「質量」不符
空格 3recruited gathered / found / recruited / enlisted
搭配recruit walkers「招募受試者」固定搭配，呼應後文實驗找來不同年齡受試者
✗ gathered/found 偏收集/發現、enlisted 雖近義但 recruited 為實驗招募標準用詞
空格 4measured measured / measuring
時態並列於 logged 的過去式敘事，主句需過去式動詞 measured；measuring 非限定動詞無法當主要動詞
✗ measuring 為現在分詞，句中缺主要動詞會不成句
空格 5conserve waste / maintain / preserve / conserve
搭配conserve energy「節省能量」固定搭配，後文 expend less energy 呼應節能主題
✗ waste 語意相反、maintain/preserve 偏維持/保存，不如 conserve energy 精準
447.Bird Food(鳥類食物)5 格#080461
If you've ever been to an all-you-can-eat buffet, you know how 1important it is to 2carefully weigh your options. You don't want to fill up on salad when so many 3calorie-laden delights await. It seems some options. You don't want to fill up on salad when so many calorie-laden delights await. It seems some birds also weigh their mealtime choices—literally. A study finds that Mexican Jays pick up and shake peanuts to assess their relative heft before choosing one. That report is served up in the Journal of peanuts to assess their relative heft before choosing one. That report is served up in the Journal of Ornithology. Foods that hide their edible bits on the inside present a challenge to hungry diners. How can you tell which fruits are ripe or which shells harbor the biggest nuts? We humans knock on melons can you tell which fruits are ripe or which shells harbor the biggest nuts? We humans knock on melons or squeeze avocados. But how do other species select the highest quality snacks? To find out how the jays do it, researchers fiddled with their feed. First they doctored peanuts so that some contained three jays do it, researchers fiddled with their feed. First they doctored peanuts so that some contained three nuts while others had none. When they offered these pods to some jays, the birds turned their beaks up at the empty shells and instead chose those that were full. And when the jays were allowed to up at the empty shells and instead chose those that were full. And when the jays were allowed to choose between normal peanuts and those that weighed just one gram more, because the researchers had stuffed them with clay, the birds again went for the heavier meal. Videos 4revealed that the jays had stuffed them with clay, the birds again went for the heavier meal. Videos revealed that the jays shake the nuts before 5selecting one, which apparently lets them gauge the nut's mass and perhaps also listen for the rattle of a well-packed shell. Pretty clever for a bird brain. also listen for the rattle of a well-packed shell. Pretty clever for a bird brain. correctly carefully attentively conservatively low calorie delicious nutrient rich calorie laden revealed revealing proved reveals
空格 1important difficult / important / significant / hard
搭配it is important to「…很重要」固定句型，後接 to carefully weigh your options
語意吃到飽要謹慎權衡選擇很重要
✗ difficult/hard 偏困難、significant 語感較正式抽象，important to do 最自然
空格 2carefully correctly / carefully / attentively / conservatively
詞性需副詞修飾動詞 weigh，carefully weigh「仔細權衡」
語意謹慎權衡才不會被沙拉填飽，carefully 最切
✗ correctly/attentively/conservatively 語意偏正確/專注/保守，不如 carefully 貼合「仔細衡量」
空格 3calorie-laden low / calorie / delicious / nutrient / rich / calorie / laden
搭配calorie-laden delights「滿是熱量的美食」，passage 原文即用此複合形容詞
語意與前文 fill up on salad 對比，不想被沙拉填飽而錯過高熱量美食
✗ low-calorie/nutrient-rich 偏低熱量/營養、delicious 太普通，calorie-laden 與原文及語境最合
空格 4revealed revealed / revealing / proved / reveals
時態Videos revealed that「影片顯示」過去式敘事，主句需過去式動詞
單複數主詞 Videos 為複數但動詞過去式 revealed 形態不變，仍為限定動詞才成句
✗ revealing 非限定動詞無法當主要動詞、reveals 現在式與敘事時態不符、proved 語意太強
空格 5selecting select / selecting / eating / packing
搭配before selecting「在挑選之前」，介系詞 before 後接動名詞
語意搖晃堅果後再挑選一顆，selecting 呼應前文 choosing
✗ select 為原形不接 before、eating/packing 語意為吃/裝填，與「挑選」不符
448.Active Brain(活躍的大腦)6 格#080462
Keeping the brain active and engaged appears to combat the cognitive decline associated with getting older. Now a study has found a new, but related, factor in maintaining a sharp mind—the space in older. Now a study has found a new, but related, factor in maintaining a sharp mind—the space in which we live. Researchers recruited almost 1,300 senior citizens, none of whom showed any signs of clinical dementia at the start of the study. The participants had their cognitive function tested annually clinical dementia at the start of the study. The participants had their cognitive function tested annually for up to eight years. And they also described their living space. For example, maybe they mostly hung around their bedroom. Perhaps they spent time in the yard. Or frequently traveled. By the end of the around their bedroom. Perhaps they spent time in the yard. Or frequently traveled. By the end of the study, 180 people had Alzheimers. And those whose 1life-space narrowed in on their immediate home were almost twice as likely to develop the 2condition as those who ventured out. The homebound folks were almost twice as likely to develop the condition as those who ventured out. The homebound folks also had an 3increased risk of other cognitive impairments and a faster rate of cognitive decline. The research was published in the American Journal of Geriatric Psychiatry. The study's lead investigator, research was published in the American Journal of Geriatric Psychiatry. The study's lead investigator, Bryan James of the Rush University Medical Center in Chicago, 4suggests that, "Perhaps life space is an indicator of how much we are 5actively engaging and challenging our cognitive 6abilities ." indicator of how much we are actively engaging and challenging our cognitive abilities ." situation condition state impairment increasing increased decreasing decreased suggests advices mentions finds
空格 1life-space life / span / life / space / lifestyle / life / cycle
搭配life-space「生活空間」是本文核心術語，後文 life space narrowed、life space is an indicator 反覆出現
語意破折號後說明 the space in which we live，即生活空間
✗ life-span 為壽命、lifestyle 為生活方式、life-cycle 為生命週期，皆非本文反覆定義的 life-space
空格 2condition situation / condition / state / impairment
搭配develop the condition「罹患此病症」，the condition 回指前文 Alzheimers
語意後文 develop the condition 重複此字指阿茲海默症
✗ situation/state 偏情況/狀態、impairment 雖近義但與後句重複用字不一致，condition 最切
空格 3increased increasing / increased / decreasing / decreased
詞性需過去分詞當形容詞修飾 risk，an increased risk「升高的風險」
語意宅在家者認知障礙風險升高，increased 合語意
✗ increasing 為進行式語感、decreasing/decreased 語意相反（風險應升高非下降）
空格 4suggests suggests / advices / mentions / finds
搭配研究者 suggests that「提出…的看法」，後接推論性子句
語意主導研究者提出推測，suggests 最切
✗ advices 非標準動詞拼法（應為 advises）、mentions/finds 語意為提及/發現，不如 suggests 表推論
空格 5actively passively / actively / slowly / quietly
詞性需副詞修飾 engaging，actively engaging「積極投入」
語意生活空間反映我們多積極運用、挑戰認知能力
✗ passively 語意相反、slowly/quietly 偏緩慢/安靜，與「積極投入」不合
空格 6abilities limits / abilities / decline / status
搭配cognitive abilities「認知能力」固定搭配，呼應前文 cognitive function/abilities
✗ limits/decline/status 偏限制/衰退/狀態，與 challenging our cognitive ___「挑戰認知能力」不合
449.Security Footage(安全錄像)5 格#080463
The introduction of security footage in courtrooms as evidence is increasingly common. With the number of closed-circuit television (CCTV) cameras rising, the likelihood of images deemed relevant number of closed-circuit television (CCTV) cameras rising, the likelihood of images deemed relevant for criminal proceedings being recorded also increases. However, while CCTV footage may arguably have assisted in achieving 1convictions in some high-profile cases, can it assist in the overall reduction have assisted in achieving convictions in some high-profile cases, can it assist in the overall reduction of violence against women? A well-known example in Australia of CCTV helping solve a crime is the footage pulled from a shop on Sydney Road the night Jill Meagher was raped and murdered by Adrian footage pulled from a shop on Sydney Road the night Jill Meagher was raped and murdered by Adrian Bayley. This footage was mentioned in his sentencing in 2013. In the same year, Simon Gittany was found 2guilty of the murder of his partner Lisa Harnum. CCTV footage – taken from his own security found guilty of the murder of his partner Lisa Harnum. CCTV footage – taken from his own security cameras – was again 3interpreted as key evidence. Beyond the courtroom, news media reports of crime are saturated with the use of CCTV footage. In both contexts, it is often seen to be 4decisive – an are saturated with the use of CCTV footage. In both contexts, it is often seen to be decisive – an authoritative and objective witness that can tell us “what really happened”. While used in a range of offenses, its inclusion in instances of extreme (and public) violence against women can mean certain offenses, its inclusion in instances of extreme (and public) violence against women can mean certain images receive significant and sustained media 5attention , and may remain online indefinitely. The strength of CCTV in our public consciousness is such that questions of privacy are often dismissed as strength of CCTV in our public consciousness is such that questions of privacy are often dismissed as inconsequential. CCTV installed in the homes of family violence victims has even been considered.
空格 1convictions dismissals / reduction / convictions / arrests
搭配achieving convictions「取得定罪」固定搭配，後文 found guilty 呼應定罪結果
語意CCTV 助高調案件達成定罪
✗ dismissals/reduction/arrests 為撤案/減少/逮捕，與 achieving 及定罪語境不合
空格 2guilty offense / guilty / innocent / conducting
搭配found guilty of「被判有罪」固定搭配，後接 of the murder
✗ offense 為名詞、innocent 語意相反、conducting 不通，found guilty of 為固定法律用語
空格 3interpreted interpret / interpreting / interpreted
時態被動語態 was again interpreted as「被解讀為」，be + 過去分詞
✗ interpret 原形、interpreting 現在分詞，皆無法構成 was ___ 的被動式
空格 4decisive important / decisive / irrelevant / essential
語意後文同位語 an authoritative and objective witness「權威客觀的證人」呼應 decisive「具決定性」
✗ important/essential 偏一般重要、irrelevant 語意相反，decisive 最對應「一錘定音的證據」
空格 5attention exposure / publication / attention / attentive
搭配media attention「媒體關注」固定搭配，前有 significant and sustained 修飾
✗ exposure/publication 偏曝光/出版、attentive 為形容詞詞性不符，media attention 最自然
450.Sand Battery(沙電池)5 格#080464
Finnish researchers have installed the world's first fully working "sand battery", which can store green Finnish researchers have installed the world's first fully working "sand battery", which can store green power for months at a time. The developers say this could solve the problem of year-round supply, a major issue for green energy. Using low-grade sand, the device 1is charged up with heat made from major issue for green energy. Using low-grade sand, the device is charged up with heat made from cheap electricity from solar or wind. The sand stores the heat at around 500C, 2which can then warm homes in winter when energy is more expensive. Because of climate change and now thanks to the homes in winter when energy is more expensive. Because of climate change and now thanks to the rapidly rising price of fossil fuels, there's a surge of investment in new renewable energy production. But 3while new solar panels and wind turbines can be quickly added to national grids, these extra But while new solar panels and wind turbines can be quickly added to national grids, these extra sources also present huge challenges. 4Right now , most batteries are made with lithium and are expensive with a large, physical footprint, and can only cope with a limited amount of excess power. expensive with a large, physical footprint, and can only cope with a limited amount of excess power. One of the big challenges now is whether the technology can be scaled up to really make a difference — and will the developers be able to use it to get electricity out 5as well as heat? The efficiency falls — and will the developers be able to use it to get electricity out as well as heat? The efficiency falls dramatically when the sand is used to just return power to the electricity grid. 1 charges_up_with charging_up_with has_been_charging_up_ is_charged_up_with of_which which in_which of_thos 2 of_which which in_which of_thos as_long_as ifif while unless Until_now Eventually Rarely Right_now 5 instead_of apart_from as_well_as with
空格 1is charged up with charges up with / charging up with / has been charging up with / is charged up with
時態the device 為被動承受充能，is charged up with heat 表「以熱來充能」被動式
搭配be charged up with 固定被動搭配，指被充入能量
✗ charges up with/charging up with 為主動形式不合裝置「被充能」；has been charging up 為主動完成進行，與被動語意不符。
空格 2which of which / which / in which / of thos
詞性非限定關係子句主詞，先行詞 heat，which can then warm homes，which 作子句主詞
語意指代前面的 heat，which 引導補充說明
✗ of which/in which 為介系詞+關代須有對應介系詞結構；of thos 為拼字錯誤非有效選項。
空格 3while as long as / if / while / unless
語意對比：太陽能風機可快速加入，「但」也帶來挑戰，while 表對比讓步
詞性句首 But while 引導對比子句，while 表「雖然/然而」
✗ as long as/if/unless 表條件，與此處單純對比（可加入 vs 帶來挑戰）的語意不符。
空格 4Right now Until now / Eventually / Rarely / Right now
語意「現在」大多數電池用鋰且昂貴，Right now 表當下現況，配現在式 are made
時態搭配現在式描述目前狀態，Right now 表此刻
✗ Until now 暗示情況已改變；Eventually 表最終；Rarely 表很少，皆不合「目前現況」的陳述。
空格 5as well as instead of / apart from / as well as / with
搭配as well as 固定片語，get electricity out as well as heat 表「除了熱還有電」
語意問能否同時取出電力「以及」熱能，as well as 表並列附加
✗ instead of 表取代；apart from 偏「除…之外」語氣；with 介系詞語意較弱，皆不如 as well as 表並列。
451.Fluid Mechanics(流體力學)6 格#080465
Fluid Mechanics with Historical Perspective is part of a series of modules covering the broader subject of thermodynamics at the University of Bath. At the start of each hour-long lecture, the tutor gives a of thermodynamics at the University of Bath. At the start of each hour-long lecture, the tutor gives a 15-minute input on the aspect of discoveries and developments 1related to flight. This historical background usually consists of a five-minute PowerPoint presentation, 2followed by a short video clip background usually consists of a five-minute PowerPoint presentation, followed by a short video clip proving the context for the formulae and calculations that are 3to be explained in the lecture. For example, at the start of a lecture on compressible flow of gases, the presentation is on the story of the example, at the start of a lecture on compressible flow of gases, the presentation is on the story of the first supersonic flight. The tutor 4developed 24' mini-history lectures' to accompany the lecture series which he hopes will make this largely theoretical-based subject more interesting for his students. The lectures are supported by a set of notes 5given out at the beginning of each topic. The notes include lectures are supported by a set of notes given out at the beginning of each topic. The notes include visual images, as well as a brief note on the historical 6perspective shown and the theoretical concepts explored. The notes are not, however, complete and students are expected to bring them to the explored. The notes are not, however, complete and students are expected to bring them to the lecture each week to fill in the blanks. 3 to_be_explained explained being_explained to_being_explained
空格 1related relating / relates / related / are related
時態後位修飾 discoveries and developments 的被動分詞，related to flight 表「與飛行相關的」
搭配related to 固定搭配，指「與…有關」
✗ relating 為主動現在分詞語意偏弱；relates 為謂語動詞不合後位修飾；are related 為完整被動式無法作分詞片語修飾。
空格 2followed following / followed / which was followed / which is following
時態後位修飾 presentation，followed by a short video clip 表「接著是」被動分詞
搭配followed by 固定搭配，表「其後接著…」
✗ following 為主動表「接在…之後」方向相反；which was followed 雖正確但較冗長，分詞 followed 更簡潔且為標準答案；which is following 時態與語意皆不符。
空格 3to be explained to be explained / explained / being explained / to being explained
時態formulae that are to be explained，be to be + 過去分詞表「將被解說」的未來被動
語意公式是即將在課堂上被講解的，被動不定詞合語意
✗ explained 缺助動詞無法接 are；being explained 表正在被解說（進行）不合「即將」；to being explained 語法錯誤。
空格 4developed develops / is going to develop / have been developing / developed
時態敘述過去完成的動作，The tutor developed 24 mini-history lectures，一般過去式
語意導師「研發了」迷你歷史講座，過去式陳述事實
✗ develops 為現在式不合過去敘述；is going to develop 表未來；have been developing 為完成進行且主詞 tutor 單數須 has，皆不符。
空格 5given gave / have given / giving / given
時態後位修飾 a set of notes，given out at the beginning 表「發放的」被動分詞
搭配give out 片語動詞，notes given out 表「發出的講義」
✗ gave 為過去式謂語不能作後位修飾；have given 為主動完成式；giving 為主動現在分詞，皆不合講義「被發放」的被動語意。
空格 6perspective context / perspective / development / notion
語意歷史「觀點/視角」，historical perspective 為固定術語，呼應全文 Historical Perspective 標題
搭配historical perspective 固定搭配，指歷史視角
✗ context 偏背景脈絡；development 表發展；notion 表概念，皆不如 historical perspective 與標題呼應精準。
452.Light Energy(光能)4 格#080466
Light is usually described as a form of energy and it is indeed a kind of electromagnetic energy, not Light is usually described as a form of energy and it is indeed a kind of electromagnetic energy, not much different from radio waves, television signals, heat, and X-rays. All of these are made up of waves that 1spread , bend, interfere with one another, and react with obstacles in their path, rather like waves that spread , bend, interfere with one another, and react with obstacles in their path, rather like waves in water. A physicist might tell you that light, along with all its electromagnetic relatives, is really a form of matter, little different from more 2substantial matter such as houses and, like them, it is made up of of matter, little different from more substantial matter such as houses and, like them, it is made up of individual particles. Light particles, called photons, travel in streams, similar to the way in which water pours through a hose. To most people, this might sound paradoxical or illogical, as many things to do pours through a hose. To most people, this might sound paradoxical or illogical, as many things to do with physics seem to these days. How can light be both energy and matter, wave and particle? The reason it can be is, in fact, not at all 3complicated : all energy is a form of matter. Almost everybody reason it can be is, in fact, not at all complicated : all energy is a form of matter. Almost everybody recognizes — even if they do not understand — Einstein’s famous equation, E =mc2, which spells it out: E refers to energy and m to the mass of matter. Furthermore, all matter has some of the out: E refers to energy and m to the mass of matter. Furthermore, all matter has some of the characteristics of waves and some of the particles, but the waves of such solid-seeming things as houses are not 4discernible and can generally be ignored because ordinary matter acts as if it were houses are not discernible and can generally be ignored because ordinary matter acts as if it were made up of particles.
空格 1spread spread / shrink / vibrate / move
單複數關係子句主詞 waves 為複數，動詞用原形 spread（與並列的 bend, interfere, react 一致）
語意波會擴散、彎曲、互相干涉，spread 合語意
✗ shrink/vibrate/move 為收縮/振動/移動，與後接 bend, interfere 描述波的擴散特性不協調
空格 2substantial immaterial / substantial / insignificant / ordinary
搭配substantial matter「實體物質」，more substantial matter such as houses 呼應有形實體
語意與光相比，房屋是更「實在」的物質
✗ immaterial/insignificant 語意相反（非實體/不重要）、ordinary 偏普通，不如 substantial 表「實體有形」
空格 3complicated complicating / complicated / complication
詞性be 動詞後需形容詞作補語，not at all complicated「一點也不複雜」
✗ complicating 為分詞語感不符、complication 為名詞無法作 is 的形容詞補語
空格 4discernible indistinct / discernible / discerning / discernment
詞性be 動詞後需形容詞，are not discernible「無法察覺」
語意房屋這類實體的波動性不可察覺、可忽略，discernible 合語意
✗ indistinct 語意雖近但搭配 not 會雙重否定混亂、discerning 為「有洞察力的」、discernment 為名詞詞性不符
453.Birds(鳥)3 格#080467
Some birds of prey have learned to control fire, a 1skill previously thought to be unique to humans. The Some birds of prey have learned to control fire, a skill previously thought to be unique to humans. The birds appear to deliberately spread wildfires in order to 2flush out prey. The finding suggests that birds may have 3beaten us to the use of fire. may have beaten us to the use of fire. repel flush flash attract
空格 1skill kind / species / skill / predator
搭配同位語回指 control fire「控制火」，a skill previously thought to be unique to humans「一種技能」
語意用火是一種能力/技能
✗ kind/species/predator 為種類/物種/掠食者，無法回指「控制火」這個能力
空格 2flush repel / flush / flash / attract
搭配flush out prey「驅趕出獵物」固定片語動詞，放火逼出獵物
✗ repel 為驅離（不利捕食）、flash 為閃現、attract 為吸引，皆不搭 out 表「逼出獵物」
空格 3beaten beaten / amazed
搭配beat someone to「搶先某人做某事」，may have beaten us to the use of fire
時態have + 過去分詞，beaten 為 beat 的過去分詞
✗ amazed 語意為「使驚訝」且不接 to 表搶先，beaten us to 才合「比我們更早」
454.A National Crisis (國家危機)4 格#080468
In 1868, botanist Jules-émile Planchon 1unmasked the culprit behind a national crisis. For five years, a 2blight had been stealing across France’s vineyards. Its cause was invisible, its spread 3inexorable . blight had been stealing across France’s vineyards. Its cause was invisible, its spread inexorable . Always it followed the same pattern. First a single vine would 4wither ,then a circle of plants. Entire vineyards were wiped out within years. vineyards were wiped out within years. blight pandemic blast destruction reversible inexorably inexorable adaptable wiped vanish wither decompose
空格 1unmasked endorsed / concealed / unmasked / masked
搭配unmask the culprit「揭露元兇」固定搭配，後文 Its cause was invisible 呼應揭開隱形禍首
語意植物學家揭發了國家危機的罪魁禍首
✗ endorsed 為背書、concealed/masked 語意相反（隱藏），與「揪出元兇」矛盾
空格 2blight blight / pandemic / blast / destruction
搭配a blight「枯萎病」，後文 the same pattern、vine would wither 呼應植物病害
語意葡萄園遭受的是病害 blight
✗ pandemic 指人類傳染病、blast 為爆炸、destruction 太籠統，blight 才是植物枯萎病
空格 3inexorable reversible / inexorably / inexorable / adaptable
詞性與 invisible 並列作補語形容詞，its spread inexorable「蔓延無法遏止」
✗ inexorably 為副詞詞性不符、reversible/adaptable 語意相反（可逆/可調適），與「無法阻擋」矛盾
空格 4wither wiped / vanish / wither / decompose
搭配a vine would wither「藤蔓會枯萎」，then a circle of plants 呼應植物逐步凋萎
單複數主詞 a single vine 單數，助動詞 would 後接原形 wither
✗ wiped 須被動 wiped out、vanish 偏「消失」、decompose 為「分解腐爛」，wither 最合植物「枯萎」
455.Heart of Study(研究的核心)5 格#080469
Turning now to the heart of the study, in two divisions an attempt 1was made to change the supervision so that the decision levels were 2pushed down and detailed supervision of the workers reduced. More so that the decision levels were pushed down and detailed supervision of the workers reduced. More general supervision of the clerks and their supervisors was introduced. In addition, the managers, assistant managers, supervisors and assistant supervisors of these two divisions were 3trained in group assistant managers, supervisors and assistant supervisors of these two divisions were trained in group methods of leadership, which they 4endeavored to use as much as their skill would permit during the experimental year. For easy reference, the experimental changes in these two divisions 5will be labelled experimental year. For easy reference, the experimental changes in these two divisions will be labelled 2 pushing_down pushed_down pulled_up held_steady 5 have_been_labelled is_labelled was_labelled will_be_labelled
空格 1was made is made / made / was made / making
時態敘述過去研究，an attempt was made to change，過去式被動 was made
搭配an attempt was made to + V 固定被動結構，表「曾嘗試去…」
✗ is made 為現在式不合過去敘述；made 缺被動助動詞；making 為現在分詞無法作謂語。
空格 2pushed down pushing down / pushed down / pulled up / held steady
時態the decision levels were pushed down，被動分詞表「被下放」，配前句 were
語意決策層級往下推、下放權力，pushed down 表向下移轉
✗ pushing down 為主動；pulled up 表上拉方向相反；held steady 表維持不變，與「下放決策」矛盾。
空格 3trained dismissed / trained / introduced / training
時態managers...were trained in group methods，被動過去式表「被訓練」
搭配be trained in 固定被動搭配，指「在…方面受訓」
✗ dismissed 表解雇語意相反；introduced 表引進不合人被訓練；training 為主動現在分詞不合被動。
空格 4endeavored were endeavored / endeavored / had been endeavoring / endavorer
時態關係子句 which they endeavored to use，主詞 they 主動過去式 endeavored 表「努力嘗試」
搭配endeavor to + V 固定搭配，表努力去做
✗ were endeavored 被動不合（人主動努力）；had been endeavoring 完成進行式過於複雜；endavorer 為拼字錯誤非有效詞。
空格 5will be labelled have been labelled / is labelled / was labelled / will be labelled
時態the experimental changes will be labelled，未來被動式表「將被標記命名」，配 For easy reference 後續說明
語意為方便參照，這些變化「將被」標籤命名，指向後文即將給的名稱
✗ have been labelled/was labelled 為過去/完成式與「即將命名」的前瞻語境不符；is labelled 為現在式且主詞 changes 複數須 are。
456.Health Concept(健康概念)4 格#080470
The concept of health holds different meanings for different people and groups. These meanings of The concept of health holds different meanings for different people and groups. These meanings of health have also 1changed over time. This difference is no more 2evident than in Western society today, when 3notions of health and health promotion are being challenged and 4expanded in new ways. when notions of health and health promotion are being challenged and expanded in new ways. notions facts realities researchers criticized contracted expanded countered
空格 1changed changes / changed / changing
時態現在完成式 have also changed over time「隨時間改變」，have + 過去分詞
✗ changes 為現在式、changing 為現在分詞，皆無法構成 have ___ 完成式
空格 2evident ambiguous / evident / accepted / bizarre
搭配no more evident than「在…再明顯不過」固定比較句型
語意這種差異在當今西方社會最為明顯
✗ ambiguous/bizarre 偏含糊/怪異、accepted 為被接受，與 no more ___ than 表「最明顯」不合
空格 3notions notions / facts / realities / researchers
搭配notions of health「健康的觀念」，後接 are being challenged and expanded 呼應觀念被挑戰
單複數複數動詞 are 對應複數主詞 notions
✗ facts/realities 偏事實/現實、researchers 為人，與「健康觀念被挑戰與擴展」語意不合
空格 4expanded criticized / contracted / expanded / countered
搭配challenged and expanded in new ways「以新方式被挑戰與拓展」，與 challenged 並列且正向呼應
✗ contracted 語意相反（收縮）、criticized/countered 偏批評/反駁，不如 expanded 與「拓展新方式」相合
457.Dictionary Publishers(詞典出版商)3 格#080471
For the first time, dictionary publishers are 1incorporating real, spoken English into their data. It gives lexicographers (people who write dictionaries) 2access to a more vibrant, up-to-date 3vernacular language which has never really been studied before. incorporating introducing translating transmitting
空格 1incorporating incorporating / introducing / translating / transmitting
搭配incorporate A into B「把 A 納入 B」固定搭配，incorporating real spoken English into their data
✗ introducing/translating/transmitting 為引進/翻譯/傳輸，皆不如 incorporate into 表「納入資料」
空格 2access opportunity / conduit / access / channel
搭配access to「取得…的管道」固定搭配，gives lexicographers access to a more vibrant vernacular
✗ opportunity/conduit/channel 雖近義，但 access to 才是「使用、接觸到」資源的標準搭配
空格 3vernacular formal / standard / vernacular / foreign
搭配vernacular language「日常口語/方言」，呼應前文 real spoken English
語意從未被研究過的生動日常用語
✗ formal/standard 偏正式/標準、foreign 為外語，與「真實口說英語」的日常語境不合
458.Ebb and Flow(潮起潮落)3 格#080472
Roman poet Ovid wrote that “there is nothing 1constant in the universe. All ebb and flow, and every shape that’s born bears in its 2womb the seeds of change”. These words are remarkably 3relevant shape that’s born bears in its womb the seeds of change”. These words are remarkably relevant when one considers the way life has changed through time as revealed by fossil record.
空格 1constant constant / similar / identical / fluid
語意there is nothing constant「沒有什麼是恆常的」，後接 All ebb and flow 呼應萬物變動
✗ similar/identical 為相似/相同、fluid 為流動，與「宇宙中無一恆常不變」的語意不合
空格 2womb incubating / womb / incubation / heart
搭配bears in its womb「在其子宮孕育」固定意象，後接 the seeds of change
語意每個誕生的形體都在子宮裡懷著變化的種子
✗ incubating/incubation 為孵化（動名詞/名詞）、heart 為心臟，不如 womb 切合「孕育種子」的意象
空格 3relevant sophisticated / relevant / profound / vague
搭配remarkably relevant when「在…時格外切題」，呼應這些話與化石記錄揭示的生命變遷相關
語意這些話放在生命隨時間變化的脈絡下格外貼切
✗ sophisticated/profound 偏精緻/深刻、vague 為模糊，與「格外切題相關」語意不合
459.Technology Calendar(技術日曆)5 格#080473
According to BT's futurologist, Ian Pearson, these are among the developments scheduled for the first few decades of the new millennium (a period of 1,000 years), when supercomputers will dramatically accelerate progress in all areas of life. Pearson has 1pieced together the work of hundreds of researchers around the world to produce a 2unique millennium technology calendar that gives the latest dates when we can expect hundreds of key 3breakthroughs and discoveries to take place. Some of the biggest developments will be in medicine, including an 4extended life expectancy and dozens of artificial organs 5coming into use between now and 2040. extending extended prospective expected come coming has_come will_be_coming
空格 1pieced pieced / scattered / gathered
搭配piece together「拼湊整合」固定片語動詞，pieced together the work of hundreds of researchers
✗ scattered 語意相反（分散）、gathered 雖近義但不接 together 表「拼湊成整體」，pieced together 最切
空格 2unique generic / unique / superior / affordable
搭配a unique calendar「獨一無二的日曆」，呼應前文整合上百研究產出的特殊成果
✗ generic/affordable 偏通用/平價、superior 偏優越，不如 unique 表「獨特首創」
空格 3breakthroughs impediments / breakthroughs / inventions / detections
搭配breakthroughs and discoveries「突破與發現」並列，呼應科技日曆預測的重大進展
✗ impediments 語意相反（阻礙）、inventions/detections 偏發明/偵測，不如 breakthroughs 與 discoveries 並列
空格 4extended extending / extended / prospective / expected
詞性需過去分詞作形容詞修飾 life expectancy，an extended life expectancy「延長的壽命」
✗ extending 為主動分詞、prospective/expected 偏預期，不如 extended 修飾「延長的預期壽命」
空格 5coming come / coming
搭配come into use「開始使用」，現在分詞 coming into use 後位修飾 artificial organs
詞性與 extended 並列修飾名詞，分詞 coming 表「即將投入使用」
✗ come 為原形無法作後位修飾分詞，coming into use 才通順
