These days of course, this ancient trait won't help us find extra calories — but it may encourage us to These days of course, this ancient trait won't help us find extra calories — but it may encourage us to
空格 1exercise event / training / exercise / purpose
搭配"endurance exercise" 耐力運動為固定搭配，下文 "long-distance running" 呼應。
語意講演化為耐力運動的哺乳類。
✗ event 是事件、training 偏訓練、purpose 是目的，皆不符 "endurance ___" 固定詞。
空格 2compounds compounds / compound / compositions / composites
單複數"some of the ___ thought to trigger"，some of the 後需複數，且 endocannabinoids 為複數同位語。
語意指多種化合物，compounds 最貼切。
✗ compound 單數與 "some of the" 不一致；compositions、composites 語意不符化學「化合物」。
空格 3sedentary sitting / sedentary / situated / stiled
語意雪貂是「久坐／不活動」物種，與耐力動物相對，故 sedentary（靜態的）。
詞性需形容詞修飾 species。
✗ sitting 偏動作、situated 是位於、stiled 拼字不存在，皆不符「不愛活動的物種」。
空格 4feel good felt / good / felt / bad / feel / good / feel / bad
搭配"feel-good molecules" 令人愉悅的分子為固定複合形容詞，與後文 "feel-good reward" 一致。
詞性需作前位複合修飾語 feel-good 修飾 molecules，故選 feel + good。
✗ felt 為過去式無法構成 "feel-good" 慣用複合詞；feel bad／felt bad 語意相反（這些是愉悅分子）。
空格 5behavior event / participation / behavior / relationship
語意"a feel-good reward to that beneficial ___"，指把獎賞連結到有益的「行為」（跑步）。
搭配"beneficial behavior" 為自然搭配。
✗ event、participation、relationship 皆不符 "beneficial ___" 指跑步這項「行為」。
497.Austria (奧地利)3 格#080513
Since Austria sits at a high elevation and spends a quarter of the year under 1snow , it should come as Since Austria sits at a high elevation and spends a quarter of the year under snow , it should come as no surprise that heating is a matter of considerable 2importance in the country. What may be surprising, however, is that Vienna—a grand imperial city of music, art, and history—actually boasts a museum however, is that Vienna—a grand imperial city of music, art, and history—actually boasts a museum 3dedicated specifically to heating systems.
空格 1snow rain / sunshine / snow / fros
語意"spends a quarter of the year under ___"，下文講暖氣很重要，故為「雪」覆蓋。
搭配"under snow" 為自然搭配（被雪覆蓋）。
✗ rain、sunshine 不需暖氣、fros 拼字不對（frost），皆不符高海拔「積雪」語境。
空格 2importance important / importance / insignificance / irrelevance
詞性"a matter of considerable ___" 介系詞 of 後需名詞，importance 為名詞。
搭配"a matter of importance" 為固定搭配（重要的事）。
✗ important 是形容詞（詞性錯）、insignificance／irrelevance 語意相反。
空格 3dedicated dedicated / dictated / dessipated / delineated
搭配"a museum dedicated specifically to heating systems"，固定搭配 dedicated to（專門致力於）。
詞性需過去分詞作後位修飾 museum。
✗ dictated 是口述、dessipated 拼字不對、delineated 是描繪，皆不符 "dedicated to"。
498.Indie Rock Aesthetic (獨立搖滾美學)7 格#080514
Plants & Animals are a Montreal-based indie rock 1trio that began playing together as kids. Touring 2arduously for about five years after their proper full-length debut in 2008, they pretty much made their records on the go until 2013. So the band's decision to be slow, deliberate, and thorough on their latest offering Waltzed In From The Rumbling, represents a major change of pace. Finally sleeping in there in own beds while recording, the band assembled the album over the course of nine seasons. It's a return to their origins, but it also pushes audaciously forward. The 3aesthetic varies wildly and wonderfully from track to track, each song having its own hermetic seal but somehow still melding 4cohesively as a body of work. Jangling guitars, drums leaning toward the off-kilter swing of J Dilla, found sounds, a hint of shoegaze, and 5unorthodox instrumentation come together to keep the ear constantly 6engaged with a feeling of constant evolution. They found an antique guiro next to broken VCR and recorded both. They made an empty fridge sound like a timpani drum. They recorded gossip on a city bus. They brought in classical string flourishes. They sometimes left mistakes if they felt they were perfectly imperfect. It's truly DIY, but with a feel of big production value that makes the album soar. Contemplative lyrics anchor the album through all the exploratory 7wandering . The words are delivered melodically, belying their potency, but listening beyond the pretty aesthetic reveals piercing observations and an undeniable translation of feeling. The simplicity of the penetrating refrain on the observations and an undeniable translation of feeling. The simplicity of the penetrating refrain on the three-part mini-opus "Je Voulais Te Dire" is a paragon of how the lyrics effortlessly cut through the instrumentation. Guitarist or vocalist Warren Spicer sings "It's only loving, but you want it bad." instrumentation. Guitarist or vocalist Warren Spicer sings "It's only loving, but you want it bad." encompassing how we try to avoid and downplay our desire for love and affection, but ultimately search and long for it anyway. search and long for it anyway. spontaneously simply rapidly arduously aesthetic creative visual expressive randomly cohesively tightly loosely
空格 1trio trio / quartet / triplet / triolet
語意下文吉他手 Warren Spicer 等指三人團體，trio（三重奏／三人組）。
搭配"indie rock trio" 獨立搖滾三人組為自然搭配。
✗ quartet 是四重奏、triplet 是三胞胎、triolet 是一種詩體，皆不符「三人樂團」。
空格 2arduously spontaneously / simply / rapidly / arduously
語意"Touring ___ for about five years"，指「辛苦地」巡演五年，與後文邊巡演邊錄音的艱辛一致。
詞性需副詞修飾動名詞 Touring。
✗ spontaneously 是自發地、simply 是僅僅、rapidly 是快速地，皆不符「辛勞巡演」語意。
空格 3aesthetic aesthetic / creative / visual / expressive
語意"The ___ varies wildly"，指音樂「美學風格」多變，與標題及後文 "pretty aesthetic" 呼應。
詞性此處作名詞當主詞，aesthetic（美學風格）。
✗ creative、visual、expressive 皆為形容詞或語意不合，不能作此主詞名詞。
空格 4cohesively randomly / cohesively / tightly / loosely
語意"melding ___ as a body of work"，指各曲雖獨立卻「協調一致地」融合成整體。
詞性需副詞修飾動詞 melding。
✗ randomly 是隨機地、tightly 是緊密地、loosely 是鬆散地，皆不符「和諧融合為整體」。
空格 5unorthodox traditional / conventional / typical / unorthodox
語意與 "found sounds、a hint of shoegaze" 等實驗手法並列，instrumentation 是「非正統的」配器。
詞性需形容詞修飾 instrumentation。
✗ traditional、conventional、typical 皆為「傳統／常規」語意相反。
空格 6engaged interested / detached / bonded / engaged
搭配"keep the ear constantly ___"，固定搭配 keep ... engaged（保持耳朵投入）。
語意持續演進的感覺讓聽眾「全神貫注」。
✗ interested 偏被動、detached 是疏離（相反）、bonded 是黏合，皆不符 "keep the ear engaged"。
空格 7wandering wander / wandering / wonder / wondering
搭配"exploratory ___"，形容詞 exploratory 後需名詞，動名詞 wandering（漫遊）作名詞。
語意歌詞貫穿整張專輯探索性的「漫遊」。
✗ wander 是動詞、wonder/wondering 是「驚奇／納悶」語意不符，皆不合 "exploratory ___"。
499.Classic(經典)5 格#080515
One of the most important things to remember is that "classic" does not necessarily translate to "favorite" or "bestselling". Literature is instead considered classic when it has stood the test of time and it stands the test of time when the artistic 1quality it expresses - be it an expression of life, truth, beauty, or anything about the universal human condition - continues to be relevant and continues to inspire emotional responses, no matter the period in which the work was 2written . Indeed, classic literature is considered as such 3regardless of book sales or public popularity. That said, classic literature 4usually merits lasting recognition - from critics and other people in a position to influence such decisions - and has a universal appeal. And, while effective use of language as well as technical excellence - is a must, not everything that is well-written or is 5characterized by technical achievement or critical acclaim will automatically be considered a classic. Conversely, works that have not been acknowledged or received positively by the writer's contemporaries or critics can still be considered as quality quantity equality reality witting wrote written having_written 3 with_regard_to regardless_of regardful_of disregard
空格 1quality quality / quantity / equality / reality
搭配「artistic quality」是固定搭配（藝術品質）。
語意後文 it expresses...continues to be relevant，指作品所表現的「品質」。
✗ quantity/equality/reality 與 artistic 搭配及語意都不合。
空格 2written witting / wrote / written / having written
時態「the work was written」被動語態，was＋過去分詞 written。
詞性作品是被寫的，須用過去分詞構成被動。
✗ wrote(過去式主動)、witting、having written 都無法與 was 構成被動。
空格 3regardless of with regard to / regardless of / regardful of / disregard
搭配「regardless of book sales」固定片語（不論…）。
語意強調無論銷量或人氣如何都算經典，用 regardless of。
✗ with regard to（關於）語意相反；regardful of 罕用且不搭；disregard 為動詞，文法不合。
空格 4usually unusually / always / usually / must
語意經典文學「通常」會獲得長久肯定，usually 表常態而非絕對。
詞性副詞修飾動詞 merits，須用 usually。
✗ always 過於絕對與全文謹慎語氣不符；unusually 語意相反；must 詞性不對（非副詞）。
空格 5characterized defined / recorded / represented / characterized
搭配「characterized by technical achievement」是 be characterized by（以…為特徵）固定搭配。
時態與 well-written 並列，is...characterized by，被動分詞。
✗ defined/represented/recorded 都不與 by＋特徵 構成此慣用被動搭配。
500.Nightjar(夜鷹)4 格#080516
When you spend your days nesting on the ground and weigh less than 100 grams, self-preservation depends on mastering the art of disguise. The nightjar's soft plumage and variegated coloring help it 1blend in with its surrounds, but it is the bird's own judgement in choosing the most sympathetic background that 2makes it a camouflage champion. Each bird chooses where to nest 3based on its specific patterns and colors, says camouflage researcher Martin Stevens, of the Centre for Ecology and Conservation at the University of Exeter in Cornwall. "Each individual bird looks a little bit different," he says. "This is not a species-level choice. Individual birds consistently sit in places that enhance their own unique markings, 4both within a habitat and at a fine scale with regards to specific background
空格 1blend combine / blend / integrate / move
搭配"blend in with its surrounds" 固定片語（融入周遭）。
語意夜鷹羽色幫助它與環境「融為一體」。
✗ combine、integrate 雖近義但不與 "in with" 構成偽裝慣用片語；move 語意不符。
空格 2makes making / makes / made / make
單複數主詞為 "the bird's own judgement"（單數），動詞需第三人稱單數 makes。
時態陳述一般事實用現在式。
✗ making 是分詞、made 是過去式、make 原形與單數主詞不一致。
空格 3based based / built / according / founded
搭配"chooses where to nest ___ on its patterns"，固定搭配 based on（根據）。
詞性based on 為慣用過去分詞片語。
✗ according 需接 to（according to）、built on 語意不符、founded on 偏抽象，皆不如 based on 直接。
空格 4both either / neither / both / each
搭配"both within a habitat and at a fine scale"，固定關聯詞 both...and...。
語意同時在棲地內與細部尺度兩方面強化markings。
✗ either 配 or、neither 配 nor、each 不與後面的 and 構成關聯結構。
501.Flowers and Bees(花和蜜蜂)4 格#080517
Most people assume, correctly, that flowers look the way they do to attract insects, which pollinate Most people assume, correctly, that flowers look the way they do to attract insects, which pollinate them. But that’s not the whole story. Scientists have now discovered that plants have another ‘trick up their leaves’ to make themselves 1irresistible to even the most choosy insect - solar power. up their leaves’ to make themselves irresistible to even the most choosy insect - solar power. Beverley Glover, a senior lecturer in the department of plant sciences at Cambridge University, and her 2colleagues recently set up some fake flowers filled with a sugar solution, which they kept at different colleagues recently set up some fake flowers filled with a sugar solution, which they kept at different temperatures. Unleashing a team of bumblebees on their floral 3offerings , they watched as the insects visited the flowers to drink the 'nectar' on offer. Very quickly, it became obvious that the bees were visited the flowers to drink the 'nectar' on offer. Very quickly, it became obvious that the bees were concentrating on the flowers with the warmest nectar. Just in case it was something to do with the color of the fake flowers, the scientists also tried a different color combination and got the same 4result. color of the fake flowers, the scientists also tried a different color combination and got the same result orations offerings origins organisms result restrictions responsibilities restitution
空格 1irresistible irresistible / invisible / irregular / implausible
語意"make themselves ___ to even the most choosy insect"，使自己對挑剔昆蟲「無法抗拒」。
搭配"irresistible to" 為固定搭配。
✗ invisible 是隱形、irregular 是不規則、implausible 是難以置信，皆不符「使昆蟲無法抗拒」。
空格 2colleagues cooperative / conspirators / contemporaneous / colleagues
語意"Beverley Glover ... and her ___"，指她的「同事」一起做實驗，下文 "the scientists" 回指。
搭配"her colleagues" 為自然搭配。
✗ cooperative 是形容詞、conspirators 是共謀者、contemporaneous 是同時代的，皆不符「同事」。
空格 3offerings orations / offerings / origins / organisms
語意"their floral ___" 指她們擺出的「假花供品」，下文 "the 'nectar' on offer" 呼應 offer。
單複數需複數名詞，offerings 指多個花朵供品。
✗ orations 是演說、origins 是起源、organisms 是生物，皆不符 "floral ___" 語境。
空格 4result result / restrictions / responsibilities / restitution
搭配"got the same ___"，固定搭配 the same result（得到相同結果）。
語意換顏色組合也得到相同實驗結果。
✗ restrictions、responsibilities、restitution 皆不符 "got the same ___" 的「結果」語意。
502.Working Heritage(工作遺産)5 格#080518
In this role, due to their working heritage, Border Collies are very demanding, playful, and energetic. They thrive best in households that can provide them with plenty of play and exercise, either with humans or other dogs. Due to their demanding personalities and need for mental 1stimulation and exercise, many Border Collies develop problematic behaviors in households that are not able to provide for their needs. They are infamous for chewing holes in walls and furniture, and 2destructive scraping and hole digging, due to boredom. Border Collies may exhibit a strong desire to herd, a trait they may show with small children, cats, and other dogs. The breed's herding trait has been deliberately encouraged, as it was in the dogs from which the Border Collie was developed, by selective breeding for many generations. However, being 3eminently trainable, they can live amicably with other pets if given proper socialization training. The American Border Collie Association recommends that potential owners, before taking on the breed as a household pet, should be sure they can provide regular exercise 4commensurate with the collie's high energy and prodigious stamina. A working collie may run many miles a day, using its experience, personality and intelligence to control challenging livestock. These dogs will become 5distressed and frustrated if left in isolation, ignored or inactive. Like many working breeds, Border Collies can be motion-sensitive and may chase moving vehicles and bicycles, but this behavior can be modified by training. Some of the more difficult behaviors require patience, as they are developmental and may disappear as the dog matures. stimulation establishment satisfaction fulillment
空格 1stimulation stimulation / establishment / satisfaction / fulillment
搭配"mental stimulation" 心智刺激為固定搭配。
語意邊境牧羊犬需要「心智刺激」與運動。
✗ establishment、satisfaction、fulillment（fulfillment 拼錯）皆不符 "mental ___" 固定詞。
空格 2destructive destructive / mild / abrupt / constructive
語意與 "chewing holes、hole digging" 並列，指「破壞性」行為。
搭配"destructive scraping" 破壞性抓扒為自然搭配。
✗ mild 是溫和、abrupt 是突然、constructive 是建設性（相反），皆不符破壞行為。
空格 3eminently obscurely / mostly / eminently / marginally
搭配"eminently trainable" 極易訓練為常見搭配（eminently 強調程度高）。
詞性需副詞修飾形容詞 trainable。
✗ obscurely 是隱晦地、mostly 是大多、marginally 是些微地，皆不符「極為」可訓練的高程度。
空格 4commensurate collective / commensurate / collaborate / evenly
搭配"exercise commensurate with the collie's high energy"，固定搭配 commensurate with（與…相稱）。
語意運動量要「與」高活力「相稱」。
✗ collective、collaborate（動詞）、evenly 皆不符 "___ with" 表「相稱」之意。
空格 5distressed tired / contented / distressed / composed
語意"become ___ and frustrated if left in isolation"，與 frustrated 並列，指「苦惱不安」。
詞性need 形容詞作 become 補語。
✗ tired 是累、contented 是滿足（相反）、composed 是鎮定（相反），皆不符與 frustrated 並列的負面情緒。
503.Science Writing(科學寫作)5 格#080519
At the World Conference of Science Journalists last week in London, outgoing Scientific American At the World Conference of Science Journalists last week in London, outgoing Scientific American Editor in Chief John Rennie talked to writers about the future of what they do, remarks that also pertain to this podcast: The question then is, how could science writing for the public possibly be pertain to this podcast: The question then is, how could science writing for the public possibly be better? I think there are a couple of different ideas. One of them is, maybe there should just be less of it. And because I would like to leave this room unlynched, let me amend that to say that at least there it. And because I would like to leave this room unlynched, let me amend that to say that at least there should be less of some of it. If our job is, ultimately as we see it, to try to inform the public better about science and technology, I for one think that we could all do with a lot fewer of the "what about science and technology, I for one think that we could all do with a lot fewer of the "what causes/cures cancer this week" story. I think that in fact is directly related, that kind of story is really related to a different problem, which is that we have a model of 1following what defines science news related to a different problem, which is that we have a model of following what defines science news as that 95 percent of the time it is " 2interesting paper that appears in prestigious journal this week." That constitutes science news. Except that we're all smart enough to know that has absolutely That constitutes science news. Except that we're all smart enough to know that has absolutely nothing to do with how science works. That has to do with how publishing works. That's what did they put into press this week. Science actually doesn't change when one, new important paper comes out. put into press this week. Science actually doesn't change when one, new important paper comes out. We all know that. The reality of science is it takes time for science to play itself out. When interesting new results come in, they're tested and they're confirmed and people rework them. One paper can be new results come in, they're tested and they're confirmed and people rework them. One paper can be the landmark that starts to affect some of that, but the reality is the actual change in the science follows that often by a considerable amount of time. Sometimes long after we've actually written the follows that often by a considerable amount of time. Sometimes long after we've actually written the big headlines about the exciting, dramatic, 3revolutionary change of whatever has come about because of something. And I think that's something that I don't have a 4particular prescription on all of this. But I of something. And I think that's something that I don't have a particular prescription on all of this. But I really think this comes down to why it is that we have a 5responsibility as editors to try to rethink what counts as science news. counts as science news. nuanced interesting intricating controversial revolutionary temporary interesting gradual unique generic particular broad
空格 1following follows / following / observing / monitor
時態"a model of ___ what defines science news"，介系詞 of 後需動名詞 following。
語意指「追隨／依循」什麼算科學新聞的模式。
✗ follows 是動詞、observing 偏觀察、monitor 是原形動詞（詞性錯），皆不合 of 後接動名詞。
空格 2interesting nuanced / interesting / intricating / controversial
搭配與下文 "interesting paper that appears in prestigious journal" 完全重複呼應。
語意科學新聞被定義為「有趣的論文」登上知名期刊。
✗ nuanced、intricating（非標準字）、controversial 皆不符後句重複出現的 "interesting paper"。
空格 3revolutionary revolutionary / temporary / interesting / gradual
語意與 "exciting, dramatic, ___ change" 並列形容大新聞的「革命性」變化。
詞性需形容詞修飾 change。
✗ temporary、interesting、gradual 皆與 "exciting, dramatic" 的誇張並列語氣不符（gradual 甚至相反）。
空格 4particular unique / generic / particular / broad
搭配"a ___ prescription"，固定搭配 a particular prescription（特定的處方／良方）。
語意作者說自己對此沒有「特定」解方。
✗ unique 偏獨一無二、generic 是通用、broad 是廣泛，皆不如 particular 表「具體特定」貼切。
空格 5responsibility opinion / viewpoint / responsibility / standard
搭配"we have a ___ as editors to ..."，固定搭配 have a responsibility to（有責任去）。
語意編輯「有責任」重新思考何謂科學新聞。
✗ opinion、viewpoint、standard 皆不符 "have a ___ to do" 的「責任」句型。
504.Legendary Scientists(傳奇科學家)4 格#080520
Einstein, Newton and many other legendary scientists did groundbreaking work in their 20s. But if your hair has gone gray and no Nobel seems likely, don't fret just yet. Because the age at which Nobel- hair has gone gray and no Nobel seems likely, don't fret just yet. Because the age at which Nobel- winning work gets done has been going up. So says a study in the Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences . Researchers 2analyzed 525 science Nobel Prize-winners from 1901 to 2008. In the Academy of Sciences . Researchers analyzed 525 science Nobel Prize-winners from 1901 to 2008. In the small sample before 1905, about two-thirds of Nobel winners did their major work before age 40. But by 2000 most laureates did their cited work after age 40. The entire field of quantum mechanics was by 2000 most laureates did their cited work after age 40. The entire field of quantum mechanics was predominantly a young man's game — which meant that as late as 1934, more than three-quarters of physics prizes were for work done by people under 40. But the more mature researchers have steadily physics prizes were for work done by people under 40. But the more mature researchers have steadily increased their catch since then. The study authors note that a shift from theoretical to experimental work can account for some of the age change. It also takes longer to educate and train new work can account for some of the age change. It also takes longer to educate and train new contributors to now-mature fields. So keep plugging. Unlike the youthful Archimedes, your "eureka" moment may come in a bathtub with safety bars. moment may come in a bathtub with safety bars. analyzed utilized recruited selected entire utterly 3two thirds sheerly maintained deceit 4increased undertaken
空格 1Nobel winning需覆核 Stripling / Pretending / Nobel / winning / Persevering
搭配"Nobel-winning work" 諾貝爾獎得獎研究為固定複合修飾，與全文 Nobel Prize 主題一致。
詞性需複合形容詞修飾 work，故由 Nobel + winning 構成 Nobel-winning。
✗ Stripling（少年）、Pretending、Persevering 皆不符 "___ work gets done" 指諾貝爾級研究的語境。
空格 2analyzed analyzed / utilized / recruited / selected
搭配"Researchers ___ 525 ... Nobel Prize-winners"，研究者「分析」資料，analyzed 為自然搭配。
時態敘述已完成的研究用過去式。
✗ utilized 是利用、recruited 是招募、selected 是挑選，皆不符對得獎者資料的「分析」。
空格 3two thirds需覆核 entire / utterly / two / thirds / sheerly
搭配"about ___ of Nobel winners did their major work before age 40"，分數 two-thirds（三分之二）。
語意與後文 "three-quarters" 等分數並列描述比例。
✗ entire、utterly、sheerly 皆非分數，無法接 "about ___ of" 表比例。
空格 4increased maintained / deceit / increased / undertaken
語意"more mature researchers have steadily ___ their catch"，指成熟研究者的成果「增加」。
時態"have steadily ___" 完成式需過去分詞。
✗ maintained 是維持、deceit 是名詞（詞性錯）、undertaken 是承擔，皆不符「穩步增加」。
505.HK Marine(香港海事)5 格#080521
Understanding the number of species we have in our marine environment is a 1basic need if we are to protect and conserve our biodiversity. This is 2vital in today's rapidly changing world, not just here in protect and conserve our biodiversity. This is vital in today's rapidly changing world, not just here in Hong Kong, but 3especially in Southeast Asia which holds the world's most diverse marine habitats. SWIMS is playing a major role in trying to measure and conserve these important resources, both SWIMS is playing a major role in trying to measure and conserve these important resources, both within Hong Kong but also, together with its regional collaborators, in Southeast Asia." said Professor Gray A. Williams, the leader of this study and the Director of HKU SWIMS. The enormous 4array of Gray A. Williams, the leader of this study and the Director of HKU SWIMS. The enormous array of marine life in Hong Kong, however, has yet to receive its desirable level of conservation as currently only less than 2% of Hong Kong's marine area is protected as marine parks or reserve as compared only less than 2% of Hong Kong's marine area is protected as marine parks or reserve as compared with approximately 40 % of our terrestrial area. The Government has committed to designate more new marine parks in the coming years. The Brothers Marine Park in the northern Lantau waters will be new marine parks in the coming years. The Brothers Marine Park in the northern Lantau waters will be launched soon, which will bring Hong Kong's total protected marine area to more than 2%. The research team welcomed the initiative of the new marine park, 5while also urging the Hong Kong research team welcomed the initiative of the new marine park, while also urging the Hong Kong government to move towards the global target of at least 10% marine protected area by the year 2020 under United Nation's Convention on Biological Diversity (CBD). under United Nation's Convention on Biological Diversity (CBD). vital alien definite strange especially specifically rather even number category array line
空格 1basic essential / general / basic / normal
搭配"a ___ need"，basic need（基本需求）為固定搭配。
語意了解物種數量是保育的「基本」前提。
✗ essential、general、normal 雖近義，但 "a basic need" 才是此處最自然慣用搭配。
空格 2vital vital / alien / definite / strange
語意"This is ___ in today's rapidly changing world"，強調「至關重要」。
詞性需形容詞作 be 動詞補語。
✗ alien 是外來的、definite 是明確的、strange 是奇怪的，皆不符「至關重要」語意。
空格 3especially especially / specifically / rather / even
語意"not just here in Hong Kong, but ___ in Southeast Asia"，遞進強調「尤其」是東南亞。
搭配"but especially" 為常見遞進搭配。
✗ specifically 偏具體指明、rather 是寧可、even 語氣不同，皆不如 especially 表「尤其」。
空格 4array number / category / array / line
搭配"The enormous ___ of marine life"，固定搭配 an array of（一大批／眾多）。
語意指海洋生物的「龐大陣容／多樣」。
✗ number 需 of 但語意平淡、category 是類別、line 是行列，皆不符 "enormous array of"。
空格 5while while / and / but / even
搭配"welcomed the initiative ... ___ also urging the government"，while + 分詞表「同時／一邊…一邊」。
語意研究團隊歡迎新海洋公園，「同時」也敦促政府達標。
✗ and 無法接後面的分詞 urging、but 轉折太強、even 語意不合，皆不如 while + V-ing。
506.Virus Mutation(病毒變異)7 格#080522
All viruses mutate constantly, and scientists can identify the different 1strains . Coronavirus has mutated into a number of notable strains since the first case was detected in December 2019, with the latest into a number of notable strains since the first case was detected in December 2019, with the latest found in Australia believed to originate in Russia. " 2Whilst this is not considered a variant of concern, little is known about the strain," a letter sent to passengers said. Scientists believe it could be up to 70 little is known about the strain," a letter sent to passengers said. Scientists believe it could be up to 70 per cent more 3transmissible than others and slightly more deadly. However, more studies will be needed to verify this claim. Last month, Germany's Health Minister said the virus 4variant first detected needed to verify this claim. Last month, Germany's Health Minister said the virus variant first detected in Britain last year now accounts for more than a fifth of all positive tests in the country. The B.1.351 strain was first identified in South Africa, where it has become the dominant type infecting local strain was first identified in South Africa, where it has become the dominant type infecting local residents. Cases and deaths in South Africa have started to fall recently after a second 5surge of the virus. However, the nation is still battling one of Africa's most severe 6outbreaks , with more than 46,000 virus. However, the nation is still battling one of Africa's most severe outbreaks , with more than 46,000 people dead. The P.1 strain was first detected in Brazil, and is suspected of 7fuelling a COVID-19 resurgence in the nation. Brazilian authorities said 260,000 people have already died. resurgence in the nation. Brazilian authorities said 260,000 people have already died. However Nevertheless Therefore Whilst miserable transmissible countable approachable concord likeness variant version
空格 1strains organisms / elements / strains / shapes
搭配"the different ___" 病毒「株／變異株」，全文反覆出現 strain(s)。
單複數需複數名詞指多種病毒株。
✗ organisms 太籠統、elements 是元素、shapes 是形狀，皆不符病毒「品系」之意。
空格 2Whilst However / Nevertheless / Therefore / Whilst
語意"___ this is not considered a variant of concern, little is known"，讓步轉折「雖然」。
搭配Whilst 引導讓步子句，後接逗號分句最自然。
✗ However、Nevertheless 是副詞通常獨立用、Therefore 是因果（語意相反），皆不適合引導此讓步從句。
空格 3transmissible miserable / transmissible / countable / approachable
搭配"more ___ than others" 指病毒「更具傳染力」，transmissible 為流行病學固定用詞。
語意與 "more deadly" 並列描述病毒特性。
✗ miserable 是悲慘、countable 是可數、approachable 是親近，皆不符「傳染力」語意。
空格 4variant concord / likeness / variant / version
搭配"the virus ___ first detected in Britain"，virus variant（病毒變異株）為固定搭配。
語意與前文 "variant of concern" 呼應。
✗ concord 是和諧、likeness 是相似、version 較口語，皆不符流行病學「變異株」用詞。
空格 5surge boon / surge / virtue / cluster
搭配"a second ___ of the virus"，疫情「激增／爆發潮」用 surge。
語意下文病例死亡開始下降是在「第二波激增」之後。
✗ boon 是恩惠、virtue 是美德、cluster 是群聚（規模較小），皆不符 "a second ___" 的疫情大潮。
空格 6outbreaks outbreaks / restrictions / barriers / recoveries
搭配"one of Africa's most severe ___"，疫情「爆發」用 outbreaks，與後文逾4.6萬死亡呼應。
單複數"one of the most ... ___" 需複數名詞。
✗ restrictions 是限制、barriers 是障礙、recoveries 是康復（相反），皆不符「最嚴重的疫情爆發」。
空格 7fuelling doubling / fuelling / reporting / copying
搭配"suspected of ___ a COVID-19 resurgence"，fuel a resurgence（助長／加劇捲土重來）為固定搭配。
時態"suspected of" 後接動名詞 fuelling。
✗ doubling、reporting、copying 皆不符「助長疫情再起」的 "fuel a resurgence" 搭配。
507.Tokyo’s Skytree (東京的Skytree)5 格#080523
Team Lab's digital mural at the entrance to Tokyo’s Skytree, one of the world’s monster skyscrapers, is 40 metres long and immensely detailed. 1However massive this form of digital art becomes -and it's a is 40 metres long and immensely detailed. However massive this form of digital art becomes -and it's a form 2subject to rampant inflation--Inoko's theories about seeing are based on more modest and often pre-digital sources. An early devotee of comic books and cartoons (no surprises there), then computer pre-digital sources. An early devotee of comic books and cartoons (no surprises there), then computer games, he recognised when he started to look at traditional Japanese art that all those forms had something 3in common : something about the way they captured space. In his discipline of physics, something in common : something about the way they captured space. In his discipline of physics, Inoko had been taught that photographic lenses, 4along with the conventions of western art were the logical way of transforming three dimensions into two, conveying the real world on to a flat surface. logical way of transforming three dimensions into two, conveying the real world on to a flat surface. 5But Japanese traditions employed "a different spatial logic",as he said in an interview last year with j- collabo·org, that is "uniquely Japanese". collabo·org, that is "uniquely Japanese". subject_to related_with apart_from based_on 2 subject_to related_with apart_from based_on in_fact in_common as_whole in_the_same_term 3 in_fact in_common as_whole in_the_same_term along_with further_afield apart_from out_of 4 along_with further_afield apart_from out_of
空格 1However However / Whereas / Whichever / Wherever
搭配「However massive...becomes」是 However＋形容詞（無論多麼…）讓步句型。
詞性However 可接形容詞 massive，引導讓步子句。
✗ Whereas（然而）不接形容詞作此結構；Whichever 接名詞；Wherever 表地點，皆不合。
空格 2subject to subject to / related with / apart from / based on
搭配「subject to rampant inflation」固定搭配（易受…影響、難免…）。
語意指這種數位藝術形式「難免」會無節制膨脹。
✗ related with/based on/apart from 與 inflation 搭配後語意都不通。
空格 3in common in fact / in common / as whole / in the same term
搭配「have something in common」固定片語（有共同點）。
語意後句 something about the way they captured space 即說明共同點。
✗ in fact/as whole/in the same term 都不與 have something 構成此慣用搭配。
空格 4along with along with / further afield / apart from / out of
搭配「lenses, along with the conventions of western art」表「連同、以及」並列。
語意鏡頭加上西方藝術慣例同被視為轉換手法，用 along with。
✗ further afield/apart from/out of 與此並列語意都不合（非排除或別處）。
空格 5But Thus / In addition / But / Therefore
語意前句講西方/物理觀點，本句轉折講日本傳統不同邏輯，用 But 表對比。
✗ Thus/Therefore 表結果；In addition 表補充，皆無法呈現此處轉折。
508.World Map of Happiness(世界幸福地圖)5 格#080526
Bhutan used to be one of the most isolated nations in the world. Developments include direct international flights, the Internet, mobile phone networks, and cable television have 1increasingly international flights, the Internet, mobile phone networks, and cable television have increasingly modernized the urban areas of the country. Bhutan has 2balanced modernization with its ancient culture and traditions under the guiding philosophy of Gross National Happiness (GNH). culture and traditions under the guiding philosophy of Gross National Happiness (GNH). Rampant 3destruction of the environment has been avoided. The government takes great 4measures to preserve the nation's traditional culture, identity and the environment. In 2006, great measures to preserve the nation's traditional culture, identity and the environment. In 2006, Business Week magazine rated Bhutan the happiest country in Asia and the eighth-happiest in the world, 5citing a global survey conducted by the University of Leicester in 2006 called the "World Map world, citing a global survey conducted by the University of Leicester in 2006 called the "World Map
空格 1increasingly beneficially / increasingly / contemporarily / mechanically
詞性修飾動詞 modernized 需副詞，increasingly「日益地」
語意語意指這些發展「日益」現代化都市地區
✗ beneficially/contemporarily/mechanically 語意不合「逐漸增強」之意
空格 2balanced juggled / opted / balanced / altered
搭配balance A with B「在 A 與 B 之間取得平衡」，後接 with its ancient culture
語意不丹「平衡」現代化與古老文化
✗ juggled 雖可搭 with 但語意偏負面雜耍；opted 搭 for；altered 改變不搭 with B 結構
空格 3destruction destruction / embodiment / vanity / execution
搭配destruction of the environment「環境破壞」固定搭配
語意後句 avoided 表「避免了猖狂的環境破壞」
✗ embodiment/vanity/execution 與 environment 及 avoided 語意不合
空格 4measures pride / measures / effects / allowance
搭配take great measures to do「採取重大措施去做」固定搭配
單複數take measures 慣用複數
✗ take pride/effects/allowance 皆非「採取措施」的慣用搭配
空格 5citing submitting / citing / reviewing / proving
時態分詞構句修飾 rated，現在分詞 -ing 表主動「援引...調查」
語意雜誌評比時「引述」萊斯特大學的全球調查為依據
✗ submitting 提交、reviewing 審查、proving 證明，皆不符「引述來源」之意
509.Circular Time (循環時間)4 格#080527
Each of us is born into and raised in a particular "time world" - an environment with its own 1rhythm to Each of us is born into and raised in a particular "time world" - an environment with its own rhythm to which we entrain ourselves. Certain cultures have related to time as a 2cyclical phenomenon, in which there is no pressure or future anxiety. The whole of existence goes around: the cycle of 3the seasons ,of there is no pressure or future anxiety. The whole of existence goes around: the cycle of the seasons ,of planting and harvesting, the daily return of the sun, of birth and death. In circular time there is no pressing 4need to achieve and create newness, or to insatiably produce more than is needed to simply pressing need to achieve and create newness, or to insatiably produce more than is needed to simply survive. Additionally, there is no fear of death. Such societies have successfully integrated the past and future into a peaceful sense of the present. They also honored the wisdom of elders who held the future into a peaceful sense of the present. They also honored the wisdom of elders who held the knowledge of the past - upon which the future was clearly linked. 3 the_nature the_time the_year the_seasons
空格 1rhythm rhythm / tempo / peace / flow
搭配「an environment with its own rhythm to which we entrain ourselves」搭配 rhythm（節奏），呼應 entrain（同步）。
語意time world 各有其「節奏」，我們使自身與之同步。
✗ tempo 偏音樂節拍；peace/flow 與 entrain ourselves 搭配及語意不如 rhythm 貼切。
空格 2cyclical circular / cyclical / repetitive / recurring
搭配「a cyclical phenomenon」搭配（循環現象），呼應後文 goes around、cycle of seasons。
語意把時間視為循環現象，cyclical 最切題。
✗ circular 多指形狀；repetitive/recurring 偏「重複」，不如 cyclical 對應整段「循環」概念。
空格 3the seasons the nature / the time / the year / the seasons
搭配「the cycle of the seasons」固定搭配（四季循環）。
語意後接 of planting and harvesting 呼應季節更迭。
✗ the nature/the time/the year 與 cycle of 搭配後不如 the seasons 自然且呼應下文。
空格 4need urge / demand / need / compulsion
搭配「no pressing need to achieve」搭配（沒有迫切的需要），pressing 慣與 need 連用。
詞性pressing 作形容詞修飾名詞 need。
✗ urge/demand/compulsion 不與 pressing 構成此慣用搭配，且語氣不如 need 中性貼切。
510.SISU (上海外國語大學)4 格#080528
Upholding the motto of "Integrity, Vision and Academic Excellence", Shanghai International Studies University (SISU) is an internationally recognized, 1prestigious academic institution distinctive for its multidisciplinary and multicultural nature, committed to preparing innovative professionals and future global leaders for a wide range of international expertise to address the critical challenges of our times. Drawing on our strengths in multi-language programs and multi-disciplinary resources, 2while responding to national and regional strategies, we operate more than 70 research institutes and centers serving as academic think tanks to provide advisory services on language policies, 3country's diplomatic strategies and global public opinion of China. These academic entities have contributed landmark research and are also dedicated to promoting the development of social sciences in China. We have now established partnerships with more than 330 universities and institutions from 56 countries and regions, and have 4maintained close connection with international organizations, including the United Nations and the European Union. universal amiable dishonest prestigious as with while of 3 city's country's university's province's
空格 1prestigious universal / amiable / dishonest / prestigious
語意與 internationally recognized 並列形容名校，prestigious（享有盛譽的）最貼切。
✗ universal/amiable 不形容學術機構地位；dishonest 為貶義，與正面語境相反。
空格 2while as / with / while / of
詞性「while responding to...」分詞結構，while＋現在分詞表「同時、一方面」。
語意Drawing on...while responding to...兩動作並進。
✗ as/with/of 無法與 responding 構成「一邊…一邊…」的伴隨結構。
空格 3country's city's / country's / university's / province's
搭配「country's diplomatic strategies」搭配（國家外交策略），與後文 global public opinion of China 呼應。
語意智庫為國家外交政策提供諮詢，用 country's。
✗ city's/university's/province's 與 diplomatic strategies（外交）層級不符。
空格 4maintained maintained / disarmed / displaced / revised
搭配「maintained close connection」固定搭配（維持密切聯繫）。
時態與前面 have established 並列，have maintained 現在完成式。
✗ disarmed/displaced/revised 與 close connection 搭配及語意都不通。
511.Eureka (尤裏卡)4 格#080529
The king had commissioned the crafting of a crown as a tribute to the gods. He gave a carefully weighed amount of gold to a smith, who produced a beautiful crown within due course. The king weighed amount of gold to a smith, who produced a beautiful crown within due course. The king became suspicious, however, 1that the craftsman had not used all of the gold he had been given in the crown. It was a common trick to alloy gold with cheaper silver, but the King knew no way of proving crown. It was a common trick to alloy gold with cheaper silver, but the King knew no way of proving that the craftsman had been dishonest. He called upon his close friend Archimedes to solve the problem. Archimedes knew that gold and silver have different densities, 2meaning that a lump of gold problem. Archimedes knew that gold and silver have different densities, meaning that a lump of gold will weigh about twice as much as a lump of silver the same size. The trouble was that no one knew how to work out the size of an irregularly shaped object like a crown. Whilst he was pondering this how to work out the size of an irregularly shaped object like a crown. Whilst he was pondering this conundrum, Archimedes went to the public baths to relax. As he slipped into the water he noticed some spilling over the edge, and he had a sudden flash of inspiration. The 3displaced water must have some spilling over the edge, and he had a sudden flash of inspiration. The displaced water must have exactly the same volume as him. And if you know the volume of an object you can easily calculate its density. All Archimedes had to do was find out whether a lump of pure gold, with the same volume as density. All Archimedes had to do was find out whether a lump of pure gold, with the same volume as the crown, weighed more. The crown would be lighter than it should be if the craftsman had deviously used some silver instead. Archimedes, in a fit of jubilation, leapt straight out of the bath and ran naked used some silver instead. Archimedes, in a fit of jubilation, leapt straight out of the bath and ran naked down the streets shouting “Eureka!” – “I’ve found it!”. The goldsmith soon 4confessed and was dealt with by the King. dealt with by the King. that although so whereas meaning meant means to_mean expelled moved removed displaced
空格 1that that / although / so / whereas
時態the King knew no way of proving ___「無法證明...」，that 引導受詞子句
詞性proving 後需 that 子句作受詞，子句完整 (the craftsman had been dishonest)
✗ although/so/whereas 為狀語連接詞，不能引導 proving 的受詞名詞子句
空格 2meaning meaning / meant / means
時態分詞構句修飾前句，現在分詞 meaning「意即」引出解釋，主動表述
搭配..., meaning that...「也就是說」慣用分詞插入
✗ meant 過去式/分詞、means 第三人稱動詞、to_mean 不定詞，皆不能在此作非限定分詞插入語
空格 3displaced expelled / moved / removed / displaced
語意後文 The displaced water must have... volume，呼應「被排開的水」
搭配displaced water「排開的水」為阿基米德原理固定用語
✗ expelled 驅逐、moved 移動、removed 移除，皆不如 displaced 與後句 displaced water 一致
空格 4confessed revealed / confessed / acknowledged / seduced
語意金匠最終「招認」其欺騙，confess（坦承罪行）最貼合作弊被揭穿語境
時態soon confessed 過去式，與全文敘事一致
✗ revealed/acknowledged 偏中性披露/承認；seduced 引誘語意完全不合
512.Well-being (幸福狀況)5 格#080530
1Life in the UK 2012 provides a unique overview of well-being in the UK today. The report is the first snapshot of life in the UK to be delivered by the Measuring National Well-being program and will be snapshot of life in the UK to be delivered by the Measuring National Well-being program and will be 2updated and published annually. Well-being is discussed in terms of the economy, people and the environment. Information such as the unemployment rate or 3number of crimes against the person is environment. Information such as the unemployment rate or number of crimes against the person is presented alongside 4data on people's thoughts and feelings, for example, satisfaction with our jobs or 5leisure time and fear of crime. Together, a richer picture on 'how society is doing' is provided. leisure time and fear of crime. Together, a richer picture on 'how society is doing' is provided. revised amended refreshed updated number amount total sum statistics information data facts
空格 1life existence / life / living / lifestyle
搭配the first snapshot of life in the UK「英國生活的首份快照」，life in 為慣用
語意標題 Well-being、overview of well-being，life 指整體生活樣貌
✗ existence 偏哲學存在、living 偏謀生、lifestyle 偏個人生活風格，皆不如 life in the UK 自然
空格 2updated revised / amended / refreshed / updated
搭配updated and published annually「每年更新並發布」，update 搭 annually 最自然
時態will be updated 被動，報告將被更新
✗ revised/amended 偏修訂內容、refreshed 偏刷新，updated 才搭 published annually 表定期更新版本
空格 3number number / amount / total / sum
單複數the number of crimes，修飾可數複數名詞 crimes 用 number 不用 amount
搭配the number of + 可數名詞 固定搭配
✗ amount 修飾不可數；total/sum 偏總和金額，皆不搭可數的 crimes
空格 4data statistics / information / data / facts
搭配data on people's thoughts「關於...的數據」，data on 慣用搭配
語意與前文 unemployment rate、number 等量化資訊並列，指統計數據
✗ statistics/information/facts 雖近義，但 data on people's thoughts and feelings 最自然且呼應 report 量化語境
空格 5leisure leisure / free / spare / idle
搭配leisure time「休閒時間」固定複合名詞
語意與 jobs 並列指工作之外的休閒生活滿意度
✗ free time 須 free 但此處慣用 leisure time；spare/idle time 語意或語體不合此正式報告
513.The Incidence of Lightning Strikes(雷擊的發生率)4 格#080531
A drop in the incidence of lightning strikes could 1impact on the frequency of wildfires, especially in tropical regions. It could also lower the incidence of lightning strikes to infrastructure and affect how tropical regions. It could also lower the incidence of lightning strikes to infrastructure and affect how greenhouse gases in the atmosphere contribute to climate change. Scientists from the Universities of Edinburgh and Leeds and Lancaster University used a newly devised method to calculate the likely Edinburgh and Leeds and Lancaster University used a newly devised method to calculate the likely incidence of lightning flashes from storm clouds. 2Unlike traditional calculations of lightning flashes at the global scale, which are based on the height of clouds, their approach takes into account the the global scale, which are based on the height of clouds, their approach takes into account the movement of tiny ice particles that form and move within clouds. Electrical charges 3build up in these ice particles, and in cold water droplets and soft hail formed inside clouds. These are 4discharged during ice particles, and in cold water droplets and soft hail formed inside clouds. These are discharged during storms, giving rise to lightning flashes and thunder.
空格 1impact affection / influence / impact / alter
搭配impact on the frequency「對...造成影響」，impact on 固定搭配（此處 could impact on）
詞性could 後接原形動詞 impact
✗ affection 名詞情感、influence 雖可但無此 could influence on 結構需求；alter 語意偏改變，impact on 最貼合「衝擊頻率」
空格 2Unlike Contrary / Unlike / Dissimilar / Differ
詞性Unlike + 名詞片語 (traditional calculations)，作介系詞引導對比
語意對比傳統算法（依雲高）與新方法（考慮冰晶運動）
✗ Contrary 須接 to；Dissimilar 須接 to；Differ 為動詞，皆不能直接接名詞作句首對比
空格 3build需覆核 gather / collect
搭配phrasal verb 'build up'「累積」，後文 build up in these ice particles，電荷在冰晶中累積
時態Electrical charges ___ up，主詞複數用原形 build
✗ gather/collect 雖近義，但與 up 搭配描述電荷累積的慣用片語動詞是 build up；原文用 build up
空格 4discharged releasing / expelled / discharged / emitting
時態These are ___ during storms 被動語態需過去分詞 discharged
語意電荷在風暴中「被釋放/放電」，discharge 是電學專用語
✗ releasing/emitting 為現在分詞不符被動 are+pp；expelled 偏驅逐，discharged 才是放電專詞
514.Assessments of language (語言評估)5 格#080532
Assessments of language learning in 18-month-olds suggest that children are better at grasping the Assessments of language learning in 18-month-olds suggest that children are better at grasping the names of objects with repeated syllables, over words with non-identical syllables. Researchers say the study may help explain 1why some words or phrases, such as 'train' and 'good night', have given rise to study may help explain why some words or phrases, such as 'train' and 'good night', have given rise to versions 2with repeated syllables, such as choo-choo and nightnight. The researchers say such words are easier for infants to learn, and may provide them with a starter point for vocabulary learning. A are easier for infants to learn, and may provide them with a starter point for vocabulary learning. A team from the University of Edinburgh assessed the infants' language learning behavior in a series of visual and attention tests 3using pictures on a computer screen of two unfamiliar objects. The two visual and attention tests using pictures on a computer screen of two unfamiliar objects. The two objects were named with made-up words which were 4communicated to the infants by a recorded voice — one with two identical syllables, for example neenee, and the other without repeated syllables, such — one with two identical syllables, for example neenee, and the other without repeated syllables, such as bolay. The infants were then tested for their recognition of 5each made-up word. Recordings of their eye movements showed they looked more reliably at the object labeled with repeated syllables, than eye movements showed they looked more reliably at the object labeled with repeated syllables, than the other object. Researchers validated their results with a control test, in which the infants responded to pictures of familiar objects — such as a dog or an apple. to pictures of familiar objects — such as a dog or an apple.
空格 1why why / that / whether / however
語意explain why...「解釋為何」，後句說明某些詞演變成疊字版的原因
詞性explain + why 引導名詞子句解釋原因
✗ that 不帶原因語意、whether 表是否、however 為副詞，皆不符 explain 後說明「原因」
空格 2with with / as / for / in
搭配give rise to versions with repeated syllables「帶有疊音節的版本」，with 表附帶特徵
語意versions with X「具有 X 的版本」
✗ as/for/in 皆無法表「具有疊音節特徵的版本」之附帶屬性
空格 3using using / having / applying / doing
時態分詞片語 using pictures「使用圖片」修飾 tests，現在分詞表方式
搭配tests using pictures on a screen「以螢幕圖片進行的測試」
✗ having/applying/doing 在此皆不如 using 自然搭配「使用圖片進行測試」
空格 4communicated communicated / expressed / accommodated / accelerated
搭配communicated to the infants by a recorded voice「透過錄音傳達給嬰兒」，communicate to sb by 慣用
時態were ___ 被動，過去分詞 communicated
✗ expressed/accommodated/accelerated 與 to the infants by a voice 的「傳達」語意不合
空格 5each each / another / one / dual
語意tested for recognition of each made-up word「每個自創詞」，逐一測試辨識
單複數each + 單數名詞 word
✗ another 另一、one 一個、dual 雙重，皆不符「對每一個詞」逐一測試之意
515.Housing(住房)3 格#080534
Housing is a key component of individual and family. In addition to being a place where family and friends can gather, housing is important for a sense of security and 1privacy. privacy . One 2significant aspect of security is the wealth in the homes of owner occupiers. The wealth of households 3increases as the wealth (or equity) in the homes of owner occupiers increases through paying off outstanding housing loans, or as property values rise. In 2003-04, the primary residence was, on average, the most valuable asset of owner-occupier households, with the net value of owned homes accounting for an average of 55% of the net worth of those households. accounting_for resulting_in depending_on belonging_to 4 accounting_for resulting_in depending_on belonging_to
空格 1privacy paucity / prowess / privacy / poverty
語意a sense of security and privacy，與 security 並列指「隱私」，且後句重複 privacy
搭配security and privacy 固定並列搭配
✗ paucity 匱乏、prowess 本領、poverty 貧窮，皆與 security 並列語意不合（音近干擾項）
空格 2significant considerate / temporal / significant / consistent
詞性One ___ aspect，修飾名詞 aspect 的形容詞
語意「一個重要面向」引出 wealth in homes 的重點
✗ considerate 體貼、temporal 時間的、consistent 一致的，皆不符「重要面向」之意
空格 3increases stablizes / falls / appears / increases
時態The wealth of households ___，主詞單數用 increases；後句 as...increases 重述
語意隨房貸還清或房價上漲，家戶財富「增加」
✗ stablizes 穩定、falls 下跌、appears 出現，皆與「財富增加」語境矛盾
516.Pop Art(波普藝術)5 格#080535
Pop art was a cultural 1movement that began in the mid-20th century, 2turning to everyday life as a source of inspiration. American artists often used 3familiar subjects from their surroundings, such as beer bottles, clothing, comic strips, and advertisements, to create bold and striking artworks. In the United Kingdom, however, pop art drew heavily from 4imagery found in magazines, as well as archives and mass media culture. Together, these approaches made pop art one of the most accessible and influential movements in modern art. for_example unless as_well_as 5therefore
空格 1movement invention / judgement / measurement / movement
搭配cultural movement「文化運動」固定搭配，標題即 Pop Art movement
語意波普藝術是一場文化運動
✗ invention 發明、judgement 判斷、measurement 測量，皆不搭 cultural ___
空格 2turning turned / turning / turn
時態分詞片語 turning to...「轉向」修飾前面主句，現在分詞表伴隨
搭配turn to ... as a source of inspiration「轉向...作為靈感來源」
✗ turned 過去式/分詞、turn 原形，皆無法在 began..., ___ to 處作分詞狀語
空格 3familiar similar / popular / familiar / regular
語意familiar subjects from their surroundings「來自周遭的熟悉題材」，呼應 everyday life
詞性修飾 subjects 的形容詞
✗ similar 類似、popular 流行、regular 規律，皆不如 familiar 呼應「日常周遭」
空格 4imagery comments / imagery / articles / titles
搭配drew heavily from imagery found in magazines「取材自雜誌中的影像」，imagery 與視覺藝術搭配
語意與 mass media、archives 並列指圖像素材
✗ comments 評論、articles 文章、titles 標題，皆不符波普藝術取材「視覺影像」之意
空格 5therefore需覆核 unless / therefore
語意前文 Together, these approaches made pop art... 帶結論語氣，需表結果的副詞 therefore
詞性選項僅 unless（除非條件）與 therefore（因此），語境為總結因果
✗ unless 引導條件假設，與此處綜述兩種取向所致結果的語意不合
517.Choice of Subjects(主題選擇)4 格#080536
The lack of interest among adolescents in school science courses is a complex issue, but two 1factors are particularly critical. Contemporary students live in a culture that increasingly emphasizes self- reflection and autonomy, and the range of subjects they are 2confronted with is far broader than in the past. Adolescence is a key period for the formation of identity, and ample evidence shows that the way subject choices contribute to one's sense of self-particularly in how they reflect personal 3values ——is crucial for young people. Specifically, science curricula need to more clearly demonstrate the career pathways that science can offer——both within scientific fields and in science-related professions——and articulate 4why these careers are valuable, meaningful, and rewarding.
空格 1factors factors / standards / objects / items
單複數two ___ are particularly critical，two 後接複數，且 are 對應複數主詞
語意後文逐一說明兩個「因素」，factors 呼應
✗ standards 標準、objects 物件、items 項目，皆不符「兩個關鍵因素」之意
空格 2confronted attached / confronted / included / compromised
搭配be confronted with「面對、被擺在面前」固定被動搭配，後接 with
語意學生「面對」的科目範圍遠比過去廣
✗ attached/included/compromised 雖部分可搭 with，但 confronted with 才表「面對眾多科目」
空格 3values values / resume / morale / status
語意後句 how they reflect personal values 重複 values，指科目選擇反映「個人價值觀」
搭配personal values「個人價值觀」固定搭配
✗ resume 履歷、morale 士氣、status 地位，皆不符「反映個人價值觀」之語境（且後文明寫 values）
空格 4why what / however / where / why
搭配articulate why these careers are valuable「闡明為何...」，why 引導名詞子句說明原因
語意與前文 demonstrate pathways 並列，進一步說明「為何」這些職涯有價值
✗ what 問內容、however 為副詞、where 問地點，皆不符「闡明原因」之意
518.The Literary Paradox(文學悖論)4 格#080537
The normal novel is dying. People nowadays prefer to engage in other forms of entertainment, such as music, rather 1than reading books during their leisure time. However, 2ironically, ironically , a survey conducted by a certain organisation or website reveals that the number of potential online writers, particularly in the genre of novels, is continuously increasing. This contradiction highlights the fact that despite the decline in reading books, global literacy rates are at an all-time high. This signals a shift in how people consume and engage with literature. While novels may be 3losing popularity as a medium, the rise of online writers and the overall improvement in literacy rates underscore the enduring importance and value of written communication. It also challenges the notion that literature is dying and suggests that it is merely evolving to adapt to the preferences and habits of modern readers. In conclusion, the novel, like any other art form, may transform in response to changing times but is far from fading 4away for as than to ironically thoroughly radically respectively
空格 1than for / as / than / to
搭配prefer to do X rather than do Y / prefer X ... than Y，此處 prefer... rather than reading，比較結構用 than
語意偏好其他娛樂「而非」閱讀，表對比
✗ for/as/to 無法構成 rather...than 的比較對比結構（句中 rather 已出現）
空格 2ironically ironically / thoroughly / radically / respectively
語意後句重複 ironically，且小說沒落卻有更多人想當網路作家，構成「諷刺」對比
詞性句首評注性副詞修飾全句
✗ thoroughly 徹底、radically 激進、respectively 各自地，皆不符此「諷刺對比」語境
空格 3losing losing / maintaining / loosing / regaining
時態may be ___ popularity，be 後接現在分詞 losing 構成進行式「正在失去」
搭配lose popularity「失去人氣」固定搭配
✗ loosing 是常見拼字錯誤(鬆開)；maintaining/regaining 與前文小說沒落的語意矛盾
空格 4away upon / on / up / away
搭配far from fading away「遠未消逝」，phrasal verb fade away「逐漸消失」
語意結論：小說會轉變但遠未消亡
✗ fade upon/on/up 皆非慣用片語，唯 fade away 表「消逝」

Being able to give a good and clear presentation to a public audience is a skill that you and your future employer will value 1greatly. . Prospective employers invariably ask for your experience in using these key employer will value greatly Prospective employers invariably ask for your experience in using these key skills during interviews. You need to be able to articulate what makes a good and poor presentation and offer evidence for your knowledge. So, when you are asked to give a talk or produce a poster as and offer evidence for your knowledge. So, when you are asked to give a talk or produce a poster as part of your studies, recognize the importance of developing the skills of delivery 2as well as conveying the content. Posters and oral presentations are forms of presentation that enable you to develop your the content. Posters and oral presentations are forms of presentation that enable you to develop your confidence in different ways. Posters check your ability to present information succinctly, and present it in an attractive and message-focused way, 3while oral presentations allow for more information and a in an attractive and message-focused way, while oral presentations allow for more information and a more in-depth delivery. In both modes you will probably find yourself taking questions and 4explaining randomly greatly consistently excessively except as_well_as as_long_as rather_than 2 except as_well_as as_long_as rather_than while nevertheless moreover however
空格 1greatly randomly / greatly / consistently / excessively
搭配「value greatly」搭配（高度重視）。
詞性副詞修飾動詞 value，greatly 表程度高。
✗ randomly/excessively 語意不合（隨機/過度）；consistently（一貫地）不符「重視程度」語意。
空格 2as well as except / as well as / as long as / rather than
搭配「delivery as well as conveying the content」表「以及、不僅…還…」並列。
語意既要發表技巧，也要傳達內容，用 as well as 並列兩者。
✗ except/rather than 表排除或取代，語意相反；as long as 表條件，不合。
空格 3while while / nevertheless / moreover / however
語意比較海報 vs 口頭報告兩種模式，while 表「然而、相較之下」對比。
詞性連接兩個對比子句，while 引導從屬子句。
✗ nevertheless/moreover/however 為副詞，無法在此直接連接兩子句作對比連接詞。
空格 4explaining understanding / disguising / concealing / explaining
語意回答問題並「解釋」內容，explaining 最合理。
詞性與 taking questions 並列，動名詞 explaining。
✗ disguising/concealing（偽裝/隱瞞）語意相反；understanding 不符「回答提問後的動作」。
520.Design(設計)5 格#080539
Of course, for as long as there have been objects they have been designed. Yet design only 1emerged as a dedicated discipline in the 19th century and its literature and theory are still very much in its as a dedicated discipline in the 19th century and its literature and theory are still very much in its infancy. It is curious that 2despite the increasingly prominent role that self-consciously designed commodities play in our everyday lives and in the way we define ourselves, the literature around the commodities play in our everyday lives and in the way we define ourselves, the literature around the subject is hugely disappointing. In fact, beyond bland coffee-table books, it is barely there at all. Nikolaus Pevsner's Pioneers of Modern Design, a classic Hegelian text treating modernism as the Nikolaus Pevsner's Pioneers of Modern Design, a classic Hegelian text treating modernism as the inevitable 3outcome of a historical process, is, despite being first published in 1936 and hopelessly dated, still the key text. There have been 4other books, from quirky Bruno Munari (Design as Art) to deadpan Norman Potter (What is a Designer: Things, Places, Messages), and Deyan Sudjic's 2008 The deadpan Norman Potter (What is a Designer: Things, Places, Messages), and Deyan Sudjic's 2008 The Language of Things, 5which attempted a broader examination. Nevertheless there is surprisingly little critique, an almost complete absence of theory and little genuinely popular, compelling writing on the critique, an almost complete absence of theory and little genuinely popular, compelling writing on the
空格 1emerged vanished / expanded / introduced / emerged
搭配emerge as a discipline「作為一門學科興起」，emerge as 固定搭配
語意設計直到19世紀才「興起」為專門學科
✗ vanished 消失、expanded 擴張、introduced 須被動，皆不搭 emerged as a discipline 之「興起」
空格 2despite despite / nevertheless / however
詞性despite + 名詞片語 (the increasingly prominent role)，介系詞引導讓步
語意「儘管設計商品角色日益重要，文獻卻令人失望」讓步轉折
✗ nevertheless/however 為副詞，不能直接帶名詞片語作讓步介系詞
空格 3outcome evidence / outcome / onus / clause
搭配the inevitable outcome of a historical process「歷史進程的必然結果」，outcome of 固定搭配
語意黑格爾式文本把現代主義當成歷史過程的必然「結果」
✗ evidence 證據、onus 責任、clause 條款，皆不搭 inevitable ___ of a process
空格 4other any / some / simple / other
單複數other + 複數名詞 books「其他書籍」，承接前文 the key text 之外
語意There have been other books「還有其他書」引出 Munari、Potter 等
✗ any/some 語氣不符肯定列舉；simple 語意不合，唯 other books 表「另有其他書」
空格 5which which / then / however / as
詞性關係代名詞 which 引導非限定子句修飾前面書籍 (The Language of Things)，作 attempted 的主詞
搭配, which attempted a broader examination「該書嘗試更廣泛的探討」
✗ then/however/as 無法作關代引導修飾該書並當子句主詞
521.Apartment Renting(公寓出租)5 格#080540
My name is Tonia. My roommate and I are looking for a nice apartment near my college's campus. We My name is Tonia. My roommate and I are looking for a nice apartment near my college's campus. We are very quiet and study a lot. I study history, and my roommate studies French. We are very interested 1in renting your apartment. We can 2pay the rent on time because we do a part-time work, too. Some of in renting your apartment. We can pay the rent on time because we do a part-time work, too. Some of our friends live in the same building and 3have recommended your place to us. They mentioned that you are a kind and responsible landlord, and we hope to have the same positive experience. I would you are a kind and responsible landlord, and we hope to have the same positive experience. I would 4like to make an appointment to view the apartment in person. 5Our application form is ready, and we are prepared to proceed with the process quickly. We look forward to hearing from you soon. Best are prepared to proceed with the process quickly. We look forward to hearing from you soon. Best 4 have_made making like_making like_to_make
空格 1in for / about / at / in
搭配「interested in renting」固定搭配（be interested in＋動名詞）。
✗ for/about/at 都不與 interested 構成此慣用介系詞搭配。
空格 2pay afford / get / pay / bring
搭配「pay the rent」固定搭配（付租金）。
語意後接 on time，指準時繳付房租。
✗ afford 後不直接接 the rent on time 此結構；get/bring 與 rent 搭配語意不通。
空格 3have form / meet / decide / have
搭配「have the same positive experience」搭配（擁有同樣的經驗）。
語意希望和朋友一樣有正面租屋經驗，用 have。
✗ form/meet/decide 與 the same positive experience 搭配語意都不合。
空格 4like to make have made / making / like making / like to make
時態「I would like to make an appointment」固定句型（would like to＋原形）。
搭配would like to make an appointment（想預約）是禮貌請求慣用語。
✗ have made/making/like making 都無法與 would 構成 would like to do 的正確結構。
空格 5Our Your / Us / Ours / Our
詞性後接名詞 application form，需用所有格 Our。
單複數指「我們的」申請表，所有格形容詞用 Our。
✗ Your 指對方；Us 為受格；Ours 為所有格代名詞不可接名詞。
522.Invention and Innovation(發明與創新)5 格#080541
For our purposes the words 'invention' and 'innovation' can be used interchangeably. More 1specifically For our purposes the words 'invention' and 'innovation' can be used interchangeably. More specifically however, the term 'invention' refers to the discovery of new products or processes, while 'innovation' refers to the commercialization (bringing to the market) of new products or processes. 2Furthermore , refers to the commercialization (bringing to the market) of new products or processes. Furthermore , we can distinguish between product innovations and process innovations. Product innovations result 3in the production of a new product, such as the change from a three-wheel car to a four-wheel car, or the the production of a new product, such as the change from a three-wheel car to a four-wheel car, or the change from LP records to CDs. Process innovations increase the 4efficiency of the methods of production of existing products, for example the invention of the assembly-line technique. The production of existing products, for example the invention of the assembly-line technique. The inventions and innovations that form industrial revolutions are those that open new doors and create new ways of doing things, not simply those that fill gaps in existing ways of doing things (Mokyr, new ways of doing things, not simply those that fill gaps in existing ways of doing things (Mokyr, 1997). The core of the First Industrial Revolution in the eighteenth century was a succession of technological changes that brought about material advances in three basic areas: (1) the substitution technological changes that brought about material advances in three basic areas: (1) the substitution of mechanical devices (such as machines) for human labour; (2) the substitution of inanimate sources of power (such as steam) for animate sources of power (such as horse power); and (3) the substitutiorn of power (such as steam) for animate sources of power (such as horse power); and (3) the substitutiorn of mineral raw materials for vegetable or animal substances, and in general the use of new and more
空格 1specifically naturally / expectedly / extensively / specifically
搭配More specifically「更具體地說」句首慣用語，引出更精確的定義
詞性More + 副詞 specifically 修飾全句
✗ naturally/expectedly/extensively 與 More 連用皆不如 More specifically 引出明確區分之意
空格 2Furthermore However / Nevertheless / Furthermore / Anyway
語意前後皆為遞進補充（再區分產品/流程創新），需遞進副詞 Furthermore（且原文已現 Furthermore）
詞性句首連接副詞
✗ However/Nevertheless 表轉折、Anyway 偏口語收束，皆不符此「進一步補充」之遞進語氣
空格 3in on / by / at / in
搭配result in「導致、造成」固定片語動詞，後接 the production of a new product
語意產品創新「導致」新產品問世
✗ result on/by/at 皆非慣用，唯 result in 表「導致結果」
空格 4efficiency altitude / qualification / revenue / efficiency
搭配increase the efficiency of「提高...的效率」，efficiency 與 increase 搭配
語意流程創新提升既有產品「生產方法的效率」
✗ altitude 高度、qualification 資格、revenue 收入，皆不符「提升生產效率」之意
空格 5abundant scant / snobbish / frugal / abundant
搭配more and more ___ 與 new 並列，the use of new and more abundant... 表「更豐富的」資源
語意工業革命使用「更新更豐富的」資源
✗ scant 稀少、frugal 節儉、snobbish 勢利，皆與「更豐富」之正向遞增語意矛盾

Although economic development is not a linear phenomenon, most industrialized countries have seen Although economic development is not a linear phenomenon, most industrialized countries have seen sustained economic growth in recent years, which is 1marked with an increase of income per capita. The use of telephones, televisions and computers by people has increased. People read more and more use of telephones, televisions and computers by people has increased. People read more and more newspapers. Infrastructure of transport has been better developed, developed , and the number of cars has increased. Less economically developed countries usually tend to be agricultural countries, which are increased. Less economically developed countries usually tend to be agricultural countries, which are 2 The_use_for A_use_of The_use_of A_use_for 3 developed_better better_developing developing_better better_developed 4 have_tended_to tends tending_to tend_to
空格 1marked made / created / compared / marked
搭配be marked with「以...為特徵/標誌」固定被動搭配，後接 with an increase
時態which is ___ with，被動需過去分詞 marked

524.Durham University Sailing Boat Club(達勒姆大學帆船俱樂部)4 格#080543
Durham University Sailing club was 1founded by Malcolm Dodds in1966. We have 2grown a lot since then and now our members take part in team racing, fleet racing, match racing and yachting events around the country. We have a jet 3flight of eleven Fireflies and sail at Derwent Reservoir, which is about a 30-minute drive from Durham. Any Durham University students can join the sailing club, and while most of the sailing that we currently do is racing, there are other opportunities too, for example, 4enjoying the sunshine in one of our summer sailing sessions. It is always possible to come along to one of our sailing socials whether you are part of the team or not and if you would like to do some sailing while at Durham then it couldn't be easier. found founded was_founded has_founded
空格 1founded found / founded
時態was ___ by Malcolm Dodds in 1966，被動語態需過去分詞 founded（was founded「被創立」）
搭配be founded by sb「由某人創立」固定被動搭配
✗ found 為原形/或「發現」的原形，無法構成 was + 過去分詞的被動，唯 founded 正確
空格 2grown grow / growing / grown
時態have ___ a lot，現在完成式需過去分詞 grown（grow-grew-grown）
搭配have grown a lot since then「自那時起成長許多」
✗ grow 原形、growing 現在分詞，皆不能接在 have 之後構成完成式
空格 3flight passage / lag / delay / flight
搭配a flight of「一隊/一群」，a flight of eleven Fireflies「十一艘 Firefly 帆船隊」（Firefly 為船型）
語意下文 sail at Reservoir，指俱樂部擁有的船隊
✗ passage 通道、lag 延遲、delay 延誤，皆不符「一隊帆船」的集合量詞之意
空格 4enjoying enjoy / enjoyed / enjoying
搭配for example, ___ the sunshine，與前文舉例並列，動名詞 enjoying 作 opportunities 的同位舉例
時態舉例的活動用 -ing 動名詞 enjoying
✗ enjoy 原形、enjoyed 過去式，皆不符 for example 後接動名詞舉例的結構
525.Brain Bus5 格#080544
Why does the smell of cut grass remind you of summer? How can you measure your nerve endings with a paper fastener? And how can you create the sound of church bells with just a serving spoon and a piece of string ...? These 1fascinating questions and more will be revealed by University of Manchester scientists when they take to the road on their 'Brain Bus'. The bus is taking hands-on 2activities to test the senses to the suburbs, to show young and old alike how the brain works and how science can answer some of life's most captivating questions. Organizer Dr Stuart Allan, lecturer at the Faculty of Life Sciences, explains: "Three-year-olds and upwards can understand the senses and it's an area that is 3intriguing to all ages." It takes effort to get out of bed on a Saturday morning and go to the Museum. We are bringing science to your doorstep and going further afield this year in the hope of finding new and different 4audiences. audiences . "We want people to see that science is interesting as well as important in our lives, and to 5encourage people who may not consider it possible to go to University.' activities images facets revenues misleading disproportionate intriguing proximal groups mobs auditors audiences
空格 1fascinating fascinating / unattended / gratuitous / underlying
語意These ___ questions and more will be revealed，呼應後文 intriguing/captivating，指「引人入勝的」問題
詞性修飾 questions 的形容詞
✗ unattended 無人理會、gratuitous 無端、underlying 潛在，皆不符「迷人有趣的問題」之意
空格 2activities activities / images / facets / revenues
搭配hands-on activities「動手做的活動」固定搭配，The bus is taking hands-on ___ to the suburbs
語意巴士把實作「活動」帶到郊區測試感官
✗ images 影像、facets 面向、revenues 收入，皆不搭 hands-on ___ 之「實作活動」
空格 3intriguing misleading / disproportionate / intriguing / proximal
語意an area that is ___ to all ages「對各年齡層都引人入勝」，呼應 fascinating/captivating
詞性be 動詞後接形容詞 intriguing
✗ misleading 誤導、disproportionate 不成比例、proximal 近端的，皆不符「引人入勝」之正向意
空格 4audiences groups / mobs / auditors / audiences
搭配finding new and different ___，後文重複 audiences，指尋找新「觀眾/受眾」
語意希望吸引新的不同受眾群
✗ groups 過於籠統、mobs 暴民（貶義）、auditors 查帳員，皆不如 audiences 指目標受眾
空格 5encourage force / plead / credit / encourage
搭配encourage people to do「鼓勵人們去做」固定搭配，後接 to go to University
語意希望「鼓勵」原本不認為可能上大學的人
✗ force 強迫、plead 懇求、credit 歸功，皆不符 ___ people to go「鼓勵就學」之正向搭配

Leonardo da Vinci 2as well as being a painter, was considered one of 3the best artists of his era.The Mona Lisa is da Vinci as well as being a painter, was considered one of the best artists of his era.The Mona Lisa is often 4described as the most famous painting in the world. 2 rather_than as_much_as as_well_as as_long_as 3 better_artists artist the_better_artist the_best_artists

搭配「every year」固定搭配（每年）。
單複數every＋單數名詞 year，表每一年。
✗ per 須搭配如 per year（無 the）但此處語法不順；ever/once 與 year 搭配語意不通。

搭配「as well as being a painter」表「除了…之外也」，後接動名詞 being。
語意達文西除身為畫家外，也被視為最佳藝術家之一。
✗ rather than 表取代、語意相反；as much as/as long as 不接 being 作此並列。

搭配「one of the best artists」固定搭配（最…之一），最高級＋複數名詞。
單複數one of the＋最高級＋複數，故為 the best artists。
✗ better artists/artist 非 one of 後正確結構；the better artist 為比較級非最高級，與 one of 不合。

527.UK Universities(英國大學)7 格#080547
The research, commissioned by HEDQF, asked 1,000 students from UK universities for their views on The research, commissioned by HEDQF, asked 1,000 students from UK universities for their views on the quality of their university campus and sheds new light on how students make decisions as they go through the application process. When asked what the most important factors were when deciding through the application process. When asked what the most important factors were when deciding where to study, 76% of students 1ranked campus facilities as either 'quite' or 'very' important, with only 8% saying it was 'not very' or 'not at all' important in their choice. This was the fourth most important 8% saying it was 'not very' or 'not at all' important in their choice. This was the fourth most important factor after course, location and reputation. Estate quality increases in importance once a student has chosen a university, with 86% of students saying that it is 'quite or 'very' important in their first year of chosen a university, with 86% of students saying that it is 'quite or 'very' important in their first year of studies. However, the importance students 2attach to estates decreases to 79% for third years students. The research also highlighted how factors such as demographics, region and type of university The research also highlighted how factors such as demographics, region and type of university 3attended have an impact on how students view the university buildings. Students in Russell Group universities are much more likely to describe their buildings as 'inspiring', closely followed by students universities are much more likely to describe their buildings as 'inspiring', closely followed by students in newer universities such as Lincoln, Gloucestershire and Ravensbourne College. This pattern was repeated when students were asked to rate the overall quality and design of estate, with Russell Group repeated when students were asked to rate the overall quality and design of estate, with Russell Group students, and students from newer universities, more likely to rate the estates as excellent. 4Existing data shows capital expenditure on estates has been the highest amongst the Russell Group universities data shows capital expenditure on estates has been the highest amongst the Russell Group universities during 2001-2011. When asked where they would invest money in their universities, the top three areas in order of 5preference were: smaller class sizes, bursaries for poorer students and new buildings areas in order of preference were: smaller class sizes, bursaries for poorer students and new buildings and facilities. When their expenditure options were restricted to estates-only items, the repair and 6maintenance of existing buildings came out top with 77%, which suggests that new buildings should maintenance of existing buildings came out top with 77%, which suggests that new buildings should not be at the 7expense of the rest of the estate, and may even highlight the deficiencies of tired and attached attended acquired augmented Collective Existing Predictable Collateral prefer preferential prefect preference
空格 1ranked referred / claimed / prescribed / ranked
搭配ranked X as 'quite' or 'very' important「將...評為」，rank ... as 固定搭配
語意76% 學生把校園設施「評等為」重要
✗ referred 須接 to、claimed 主張、prescribed 規定，皆不搭 ___ facilities as important
空格 2attach deliver / attach / summon / acquire
搭配attach importance to「重視、賦予重要性」固定搭配，the importance students ___ to estates
語意學生對房舍「賦予的重視程度」下降
✗ deliver/summon/acquire 皆不搭 importance...to，唯 attach importance to 慣用

搭配type of university attended「就讀的大學類型」，attend a university「就讀」的過去分詞作後位修飾

✗ attached/acquired/augmented 皆不符 university ___「就讀的大學」之意
空格 4Existing Collective / Existing / Predictable / Collateral
搭配Existing data shows「現有數據顯示」，Existing data 固定搭配

✗ Collective 集體、Predictable 可預測、Collateral 附帶的，皆不搭 ___ data shows 之「現有數據」
空格 5preference prefer / preferential / prefect / preference
搭配in order of preference「依偏好順序」固定片語
詞性of + 名詞 preference，介系詞後需名詞
✗ prefer 動詞、preferential 形容詞、prefect 級長（拼字干擾），皆非名詞或語意不合 order of ___
空格 6maintenance ratification / annexation / benevolence / maintenance
